Matthew1:1 Ena entipat e Yesu Kristo enkerai e Daudi, enkerai e Abraham." 
Matthew1:2 Etoiwuo Abraham Isaak, neiu Isaak Yakobo, neiu Yakobo Yuda o lalashera lenyena;" 
Matthew1:3 neiu Yuda o enkitok enye Tamar Peres o Sera; neiu Peres Hesron; neiu Hesron Aram; 
Matthew1:4 neiu Aram Aminadab; neiu Aminadab Nashon; neiu Nashon Salmon; 
Matthew1:5 neiu Salmon Boas te Rahab; neiu Boas o enkitok enye Rusi Obed; neiu Obed Yese; 
Matthew1:6 neiu Yese olaiguanani Daudi. Neiu Daudi o enkitok e Uria Solomon; 
Matthew1:7 neiu Solomon Rehoboam; neiu Rehoboam Abiya; neiu Abiya Asa; 
Matthew1:8 neiu Asa Yehoshafat; neiu Yehoshafat Yoram; neiu Yoram Usia; 
Matthew1:9 neiu Usia Yotam; neiu Yotam Ahas; neiu Ahas Hesekia; 
Matthew1:10 neiu Hesekia Manase; neiu Manase Amon; neiu Amon Yosia; 
Matthew1:11 neiu Yosia Yekonia o lalashera lenyena te nkata e yararoto e Babilon. 
Matthew1:12 Ore te siadi e yararoto e Babilon, neiu Yekonia Shealtiel; neiu Shealtiel Serubabel" 
Matthew1:13 neiu Serubabel Abiud; neiu Abiud Eliakim; neiu Eliakim Asor; 
Matthew1:14 neiu Asor Sadok; neiu Sadok Akim; neiu Akim Eliud; 
Matthew1:15 neiu Eliud Eleasar neiu Eleasar Matan; neiu Matan Yakobo; 
Matthew1:16 neiu Yakobo Yosef, ilo payian le Mariamu natoiwuo Yesu oji Kristo." 
Matthew1:17 Metaa era iishoritin ebaiki Abraham o metabaiki Daudi iishoritin tomon o ong'uan; ore ebaiki Daudi o metabaiki eyararoto e Babilon era iishoritin tomon o ong'uan; ore ebaiki eyararoto e Babilon o metabaiki Yesu Kristo nera iishoritin tomon o ong'uan. 
Matthew1:18 Inji eikununo einoto e Yesu Kristo; ore eidipa Yosef atisira Mariamu ng'otonye Yesu, eton eitu eboitare, nedoli enuta, enutai e Nkiyang'et Sinyati." 
Matthew1:19 Ore amu oltung'ani apa loo sipat Yosef, olpayian lenye, nemeyieu nesul Mariamu, neyieu neleliari aing'uaa." 
Matthew1:20 Ore eton eiguanare kuna baa, neipang'aki olmalaika lo Laitoriani te nkidetidet, nejoki, “Yosef, olayioni le Daudi, miureyu irik esiankiki ino Mariamu, amu ore enutai enye, naa ene Nkiyang'et Sinyati." 
Matthew1:21 Naa keiu enkayioni, nijo enkarna enye Yesu, amu ninye oyooki aitajeu iltung'ana lenyena too ng'ok enye.”" 
Matthew1:22 Etaasate kuna pooki pee ebaya inaatejo Olaitoriani to lkilikuai lo loiboni le Nkai otejo," 
Matthew1:23 “Kenutayu entito neiu enkayioni; neji enkarna enye Immanuel;” naa eji, “Enkai te nebo iyiook.”" 
Matthew1:24 Ore pee eputunye Yosef too njio neas anaa enaitanapa olmalaika lo Laitoriani nerik esiankiki enye ang; 
Matthew1:25 neitu eboitare ninye o metoiu enkayioni, nejo enkarna enye Yesu." 
Matthew2:1 Ore pee eini Yesu te Betlehem e Yudea te nkata o laiguanani Herode nepuonu ilang'eni ooing'uaa oloosaen, nebau Yerusalem," 
Matthew2:2 neikilikuanu, aajo “Kaji etii Olarikoni loo Lyahudi otoiwuoki? Amu kitoduaa olakira lenye eilepu to loosaen, nikietuo iyiook aaserem ninye.”" 
Matthew2:3 Ore pee ening Herode ina, neing'aeng'ai ninye o Yerusalem pooki." 
Matthew2:4 Ore pee eiturrur Herode ilapolosak kituak o ilaiteng'enak loo nkitanapat leilo orere, neikilikuan ajoki, “Kaji etoiunyeki Kristo?”" 
Matthew2:5 Nejokini, “Te Betlehem e Yudea; amu inji eigeroki aajo to loiboni le Nkai:" 
Matthew2:6 ‘Ore iyie Betlehem te nkop e Yuda, mira hoo kini tiatua ilaitoriak le Yuda; amu iyie epukunye olarikoni oyooki aitore iltung'ana laainei loo Siraeli.’ ”" 
Matthew2:7 Ina pee eipotu Herode ilang'eni too nkurrat, netem asipunye oleng enkata apa nataliee ilo akira." 
Matthew2:8 Neirriwaa ninche Betlehem nejoki, “Enchom, enkilikuanu imbaa eina kerai, ore pee itumutumu ninye nikiyakiki olomoni pee alotu sii nanu aserem ninye.”" 
Matthew2:9 Ore pee eidip ilang'eni aatoning olaiguanani nepuo; ore ilo akira apa otoduaa ninche to loosaen nerikoo ninche o metaba anaa neitashe te shumata ewueji netii enkerai. 
Matthew2:10 Ore pee edol ninche ilo akira neng'ida te ng'ida kitok oleng. 
Matthew2:11 Ore pee ejing aji, nedol ina kerai o Mariamu ng'otonye, negil kung aaserem ninye; nebol ilbenia lenye neitaiki ninye inkishoorot: saabu o enkorropil o emanoo." 
Matthew2:12 Ore pee eikok Enkai ninche te nkidetidet pee meshukokino Herode nerrinyo ti ae oitoi aapuo enkop enye. 
Matthew2:13 Ore pee errinyo ilang'eni, neipang'aki olmalaika lo Laitoriani Yosef te nkidetidet nejoki, “Inyo, tudumu enkerai o ng'otonye, isikaki Misiri, niton teine o metaba anaa naaliki, amu eing'oru Herode ina kerai pee ear metua.”" 
Matthew2:14 Neinyototo nedumu enkerai o ng'otonye arik Misiri kewarie; 
Matthew2:15 neton teine o metua Herode; pee ebaya enapa natejo Olaitoriani to loiboni le Nkai pee ejo, “Aipotuo enkerai ai aitung'uaa Misiri.”" 
Matthew2:16 Ore pee edol Herode ajo etipika lelo ang'eni olosek negoro metiminisa, neirriwaa iltung'ana metaara metuata inkayiok pooki naatii Betlehem o neemanita pooki naaitabaitie ilarin aare nedou aishiaakinye ina kata natisipunye lelo ang'eni." 
Matthew2:17 Nebaya ina kata ororei oiroro oloiboni le Nkai oji Yeremia otejo," 
Matthew2:18 “Etoning'oki oltoilo te Rama, olkiyioi o enkishirata sapuk, eishiraki Raheli inkera enyena, nemeitigirayu amu meekure eetae.”" 
Matthew2:19 Ore pee eye Herode, neipang'aki olmalaika lo Laitoriani Yosef te nkidetidet te Misiri." 
Matthew2:20 Nejoki, “Inyo tudumu enkerai o ng'otonye, shomo enkop oo Siraeli amu etuata lelo apa ooing'oru enkishui eina kerai.”" 
Matthew2:21 Neinyototo arik enkerai o ng'otonye nepuo enkop oo Siraeli. 
Matthew2:22 Kake ore pee ening inchere etaa Arkelaus olaiguanani le Yudea, te rishata e papaai lenye Herode neureyu errinyo ina alo; neikoki te nkidetidet nebo ina alo olkerenket le Galilaya." 
Matthew2:23 Nelo aton te nkang naji Nasaret, pee ebaya enatejo oloiboni le Nkai nchere: “Keaku keji Olnasarayoi.”" 
Matthew3:1 Ore te nena olong'i nelotu Yohana Olaibatisani elikioo ti ong'ata e Yudea, ejo," 
Matthew3:2 “Erridutu, amu etinyikua enkitoria e keper.”" 
Matthew3:3 Amu ore ele, ninye eimaka oloiboni le Nkai oji Isaya pee ejo, “Etii oltoilo obuaku ti ong'ata Entobiraki Olaitoriani enkoitoi nalala entorioi inkoitoi enyena.”" 
Matthew3:4 Neishopito apa ninye Yohana enkila oo lpapit le ntames, o enkeene te mpolos enye; ore endaa enye na lmaat o naishi e ong'ata." 
Matthew3:5 Nepuo apa enetii ninye ina kata Yerusalem o Yudea pooki o lkirinen pooki lo lkeju Yordan; 
Matthew3:6 neibatisai pooki to lkejule le Yordan neirridu ing'ok enye. 
Matthew3:7 Ore pee edolu Yohana Ilfarisayo kumok o Sadukayo epuonu meibatisae nejoki ninche, “Naishoi oo lasuriaa ai ng'ae otoroja intae elanya engoro nalotu?" 
Matthew3:8 Entoiu ilng'anayio ooishiaakinore enkirridunoto. 
Matthew3:9 Nimijojo tiatua ate, ‘Kiaata iyiook Abraham aa papa lang; amu ajoki intae, keidim Enkai aishoo Abraham inkera te kulo soito." 
Matthew3:10 Neiteleikiaki taata entolu intona oo lkeek naa ore pooki shani lemeiu lng'anayio sidain, nedung'i aanang'aki enkima.’ ”" 
Matthew3:11 “Kaibatisa nanu intae te nkare pee eitodolu nchere irridutua ing'ok; kake ore olaasujita, naa kegol ninye, aalang nanu, maaishiaakino hoo nanu te nanapaki inamuka enyena, naa ninye oibatisa intae te Nkiyang'et Sinyati o te nkima." 
Matthew3:12 Neeta esilet enye te nkaina enye, naa keor asip olkurroto lenye oidong'ishoreki, nesotoki enkano enye olkompe, ore isuut nepej te nkima nemearayu.”" 
Matthew3:13 Ore te siadi ina nelotu Yesu eing'uaa Galilaya enetii Yohana meibatisa to lkeju le Yordan. 
Matthew3:14 Neyieu Yohana neany eibatisa Yesu, nejoki, “Keishiaakino naa iyie likimbatisa nanu, paa nilotu iyie enatii?”" 
Matthew3:15 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Tonyorrai taata iyie, amu teina eishiakino nikintabaya naayieu Enkai pooki.” Nenyorraa Yohana." 
Matthew3:16 Ore pee eidipi aaibatisa Yesu, neilepu nabo kata aing'uaa enkare; ng'ura, nebolo shumata nedol ninye Enkiyang'et Sinyati e Nkai edou anaa enturkuluo, elotu shumata ninye;" 
Matthew3:17 neningi oltoilo te shumata ejo, “Enkerai ai ena nanyor, natishipe te ninye.”" 
Matthew4:1 Ore ina kata neilepie Enkiyang'et e Nkai Yesu arik ong'ata metetema oloirirua. 
Matthew4:2 Ore pee eidip atupukoi nkolong'i artam dama o kewarie. 
Matthew4:3 Nelotu olatemani nejoki, “Te naa ira iyie Enkerai e Nkai, tiaaki kulo soito metaa mukateni.”" 
Matthew4:4 Kake newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Etisiraki nchere, ‘Meishuyie oltung'ani emukate ake, kake eishuyie pooki rorei oing'uaa enkutuk e Nkai.’ ”" 
Matthew4:5 Neitoki Sheitani arik Yesu enkanasa sinyati neitoton ninye te ntopij e nkaji e Nkai. 
Matthew4:6 Nejoki. “Te naa ira iyie Enkerai e Nkai, tusulai kewan enkop; amu etisiraki aajo: ‘Keitanap Enkai ilmalaika lenyena te nkaraki iyie, eikinap ninche too nkaik enye, pee mikinkob osoit enkeju ino.’ ”" 
Matthew4:7 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Etisiraki sii aajo, ‘Mitem iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino.’ ”" 
Matthew4:8 Neitoki Sheitani arik ninye oldoinyo oado oleng, neitodol ninye inkitoriat pooki e nkop o enkitoo enye." 
Matthew4:9 Nejoki ninye, “Ekaaisho nanu iyie kuna tokitin pooki ti nikigilaki kung aserem.”" 
Matthew4:10 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Shomo Sheitani amu, etisiraki aajo, ‘Teserema Olaitoriani Enkai ino naa ninye ake openy isiaai.’ ”" 
Matthew4:11 Neing'uaa Sheitani ninye teina kata; nepuonu ilmalaika aaisiaai ninye. 
Matthew4:12 Ore pee ening Yesu ajo eteenaki Yohana neibelekenya alo Galilaya. 
Matthew4:13 Neing'uaa Nasaret nelotu abik te Kapernaum, enkang natii embata e naiposha te nkop e Sebulon o Naftali," 
Matthew4:14 pee ebaya enatejoki to loiboni le Nkai oji Isaya pee ejo," 
Matthew4:15 “Enkop e Sebulon o enkop e Naftali ineeshepita enkoitoi nalo enaiposha, lido kekun lo lkeju le Yordan te Galilaya oo loreren," 
Matthew4:16 etoduaa ewang'an kitok olorere otonita tiatua enaimin, ore lelo ootonita te nkop o to loip lee keeya, etabaikia ewang'an.”" 
Matthew4:17 Ore ebaiki ina kata neiteru Yesu alikioo ororei le Nkai ejo, “Erridutu amu etinyikua enkitoria e keper.”" 
Matthew4:18 Ore eloito Yesu te mbata e naiposha e Galilaya nedol ilalashera oaare, Simon oji Petero o lalashe lenye Anterea, enang'aki o rreshet atua enaiposha, amu ilarreshok apa loo sinkir." 
Matthew4:19 Nejoki ninche, “Wootu, erukurukoreki, naa kaitaa intae ilarreshok loo ltung'ana.”" 
Matthew4:20 Neing'uaa nabo kata irresheta lenye neirukurukore Yesu. 
Matthew4:21 Ore pee enyikaa Yesu penyo nedol kulikae alashera oaare. Yakobo le Sebedayo, o Yohana olalashe lenye, tiatua empeut eboitare papaai lenye Sebedayo, eripita irresheta lenye neipot ninche." 
Matthew4:22 Neing'uaa nabo kata empeut o papaai lenye neirukurukore. 
Matthew4:23 Nemanaa Yesu te Galilaya pooki eiteng'enisho too nkajijik enye e ntumo, nelikioo ilomon Supati le ina kitoria, neishiunye pooki keeya o emuoyian tiatua olorere." 
Matthew4:24 Neibula olning'o lenye te enkop pooki e Siria; neyakini Yesu iltung'ana pooki oomuoyiaa ooibung'a nkeyaitin oo mpukunot kumok o looata iloiriruani o looata emuoyian e nkiterria o lmaiman o looidimua emion; neishiunye ninye ninche. 
Matthew4:25 Nesuj iltung'ana kumok ooing'uaa Galilaya o Dekapoli o Yerusalem o Yudea o lido kekun lo lkejule Yordan. 
Matthew5:1 Ore pee edol Yesu iltung'ana kumok neilepaki oldoinyo: ore pee eton nepuonu lkipaareta lenyena enetii. 
Matthew5:2 Neiteng'en ninye ninche nejo: 
Matthew5:3 “Emayiana ilaisinak too ltauja; amu enenye enkitoria e keper. 
Matthew5:4 “Emayiana ilooishir; amu ninche eilejileji. 
Matthew5:5 “Emayiana ilo obor; amu ninche oojung enkop. 
Matthew5:6 “Emayiana ilooata esumash o enkure eing'oru enayieu Enkai; amu ninche eitaraposhi. 
Matthew5:7 “Emayiana ilooata olng'ur amu ninche eing'urrieki. 
Matthew5:8 “Emayiana ilooitukuo iltauja; amu ninche oodol Enkai. 
Matthew5:9 “Emayiana lelo ooitayu osotua; amu ninche eji inkera e Nkai. 
Matthew5:10 “Emayiana lelo ooisilisili te nkaraki enayieu Enkai amu enenye enkitoria e keper. 
Matthew5:11 “Imayianana intae te nesukeny ninche intae, neisilisil, neiteeniki intae imbaa pooki torrok e lejare te naa te nkaraki nanu." 
Matthew5:12 Enting'idata nishipapa oleng; amu kitok olerrinyore linyi te keper; amu eisilisilo ninche aaiko neijia iloibonok le Nkai ootii apa te dukuya intae. 
Matthew5:13 “Irara intae emunyan e nkop; kake te netuyiatuyu emunyan, ainyoo eshukokinyeki enkisuisho? Meitoki aata tipat katukul, kake kenang'ari boo meitunyoi iltung'ana too nkejek." 
Matthew5:14 “Irara intae ewang'an e nkop. Meisudoroyu enkanasa natii oldoinyo. 
Matthew5:15 Nemeinok sii ltung'ana oltaa nepising to ltoo, kake eiteleiki olperere; neitawang'aki pooki ootii aji." 
Matthew5:16 Ore sii ntae enchoo ewang'an inyi metawang'a te dukuya iltung'ana pee edol iasat inyi supati, pee eyanyituni Papa linyi otii keper." 
Matthew5:17 “Emijo kaewuo aitarruoo Nkitanapat aashu inaaigero loibonok le Nkai, eitu alotu aitarruoo kake pee aitabaya." 
Matthew5:18 Amu esipa ajoki intae, ore ometaba anaa nelusoo shumata o enkop, melusoo osirata obo anaa oltipoto obo loo Nkitanapat eitu eitabari." 
Matthew5:19 Ore pooki ng'ae ogil enkitanapata nabo e kuna kutiti, hoo te naa enkinyi, neitayiolo ilkulikae metigila, naa keji ninye olkini te pooki te nkitoria e keper; kake ore oloas nena neitayiolo sii ilkulikae metaasa, naa keji ilo olkitok te nkitoria e keper." 
Matthew5:20 Amu ajoki intae te nemelusoo esupatisho inyi alang enoo laiteng'enak loo nkitanapat o enoo Lfarisayo, nimijing'ijing'i enkitoria e keper." 
Matthew5:21 “Itoning'o aajo etiaakaki iltung'ana li apa, ‘Miar metua; naa ore oloar metua neishiaakino enkiguana.’" 
Matthew5:22 Kake ajoki nanu intae, ore pooki ogorokino olalashe, naa keishiaakino enkiguana; ore olosukeny olalashe, neishiaakino, nerikokini ilkituaak; ore olodekisho ajo ‘Lo modai!’ Keishiaakino olbalbal le nkima." 
Matthew5:23 Naa ti niyau enkishooroto ino olperere lo lasar, nidamu teine olalashe lino likiaatakinore," 
Matthew5:24 tung'uai teine enkishooroto te mbata o lperere lo lasar, shomo; tang'asa toning'ore olalashe lino, pee intoki ashukunye aitayu enkishooroto ino." 
Matthew5:25 “Tasioki toning'ore olintarrikinore eton iriamariri te nkoitoi; pee mikirik enetii oladung'oni le nkiguana nikirikoki oladung'oni le nkiguana osikari, nikinang'akini jila." 
Matthew5:26 Esipa aajoki, mipuku teine katukul ometaba anaa nilak empisai nabayie." 
Matthew5:27 “Itoning'o aajo etejoki, ‘Miloloito.’" 
Matthew5:28 Kake ajoki nanu intae, ore oloing'or eng'oruoi neng'uar eidipa atololoito to ltau lenye." 
Matthew5:29 Ti nikintasur enkong'u ino e tatene, tukurtu, inturrai, amu enaikash te neimin erubata nabo alang te nenang'akini osesen lino pooki olbalbal le nkima." 
Matthew5:30 Naa ti nikintasur enkaina ino e tatene, tudung'u inturrai; amu eikash erubata ino nabo te neimin, alang osesen lino pooki te nenang'akini olbalbal le nkima." 
Matthew5:31 “Etejoki sii, ‘Ore oloorore enkitok enye, inchoo eisho ninye empalai naorore.’" 
Matthew5:32 Kake ajoki nanu intae, ore pooki ng'ae oorore enkitok enye, neme te nkaraki e loloito ake, etipika ninye atua eloloito; ore oloyam ina natoororeki, etololoite ninye." 
Matthew5:33 “Itoning'o sii iltung'ana li apa enatiaakaki, ‘Minya olmumai le lejare, kake intabai ilmuma linono to Laitoriani.’" 
Matthew5:34 Kake ajoki nanu intae eminya ilmuma katukul hoo te keper, amu olorika le nkitoria e Nkai;" 
Matthew5:35 aashu te nkop, amu olorika loo nkejek enyena; aashu te Yerusalem, amu enkang o laiguanani kitok." 
Matthew5:36 Minya olmumai te ndukuya ino, amu mindim aiborrie olpapita obo anaa aitoroka." 
Matthew5:37 Kake enchoo irorei linyi metaa ee, neaku ee, aashu mme, neaku mme, amu ore enalusoo te nena naa ilo torrono eing'uaa." 
Matthew5:38 “Itoning'o aajo etejoki, ‘Enkong'u o te nkong'u, o olalae to lalae.’" 
Matthew5:39 Kake ajoki nanu intae, migilunore olikintaas entorrono kake ore olikiosh eseder e tatene, imbelekenyaki sii enkae." 
Matthew5:40 Ore oltung'ani pooki oyieu nikirik enkiguana, eyieu nikioru olkila li atua, inchoo meewa sii oli oriong." 
Matthew5:41 Ore olikiaraki, shomo enkilomita nabo, shomo are." 
Matthew5:42 Ore olikiomon, inchoo; ore olikisilen, mimitiki." 
Matthew5:43 “Itoning'o aajo etejoki, ‘Tonyorra ole latia ino, nimbayu olmang'atinta lino.’" 
Matthew5:44 Kake ajoki nanu intae, entonyor ilmang'ati linyi, niomonokiki lelo ooisilisil intae;" 
Matthew5:45 pee itumutumu intae aataa inkera e Papa linyi otii keper; amu eilepakinye enkolong enye iltorrok o supati neirriwaki enchan ilooata sipat o ilemeeta. 
Matthew5:46 Amu ti ninyorrinyorro iloonyor intae, kaa shunet itumutumu intae? Ai meiko neijia oshi ilasotok le kodi?" 
Matthew5:47 Naa te naa ilalashera linyi ake irorokiki, kaa yasata naa italang'ie ilkulikae? Ai meiko oshi neijia ilkulikae oreren?" 
Matthew5:48 Entaa naa bayarot anaa Papa linyi otii keper laa aibayaroti. 
Matthew6:1 “Eng'ura pee miasiasa isupati inyi te dukuya inkonyek oo ltung'ana ijojo pee edol ninche intae; amu ti ninkoko neijia nimitumutumu shunet te Papa linyi otii keper. 
Matthew6:2 “Ore ti nintayu iyie enkishooroto ino o lng'ur nimiosh emowuo, anaa enaiko isunkuro too nkajijik e ntumo o too nkoitoi, pee errep iltung'ana. Esipa ajoki intae, eidipa ninche aanoto enchunet enye." 
Matthew6:3 Kake ti nintayu iyie enkishooroto ino o lng'ur nimincho enkaina ino e kedianye metayiolo enaas ene tatene; 
Matthew6:4 pee eaku intokitin ninchooyo, inoo nkisudorot; naa ore Papa lino odol too nkisudorot, nikincho ninye olerrinyore.”" 
Matthew6:5 “Naa ti niomonono nimitiuu anaa isunkuro, amu kenyor ninche aatoomon eitashoo too nkajijik e ntumo o too lojat oo nkoitoi naalala e nkanasa, pee etum aatodol iltung'ana. Esipa ajoki intae, eidipa ninche aanoto shunet enye." 
Matthew6:6 Kake ti niomon iyie, tijing'a olgilata lino, ore pee indip aikeno kutuk aji niomon Papa lino too nkisudorot, ore Papa lino odol too nkisudorot naa aikilaaki iyie." 
Matthew6:7 “Naa tiniomonono, emintaa irorei kumok anaa enaas iloreren, amu kedamu ninche aajo kening'i ninche te nkumoi oo rorei lenye." 
Matthew6:8 Emitiuu anaa ninche, amu keyiolo Papa linyi iniyieuu eton eitu iomonunu intae." 
Matthew6:9 Naa inji entejo: ‘Papa lang otii keper meitisinyi enkarna ino 
Matthew6:10 meeu enkitoria ino, metaasi eniyieu te nkop anaa enatiu te keper." 
Matthew6:11 Inchoo iyiook ena olong endaa ang e anaake. 
Matthew6:12 Nipalaki iyiook inkitarruorrot ang, anaa eninikipalaki iyiook ilooinyal iyiook." 
Matthew6:13 Nimirikoki iyiook atua intemat, kake intajeu iyiook tialo ilo torrono.’" 
Matthew6:14 “Amu tinipalakiki intae iltung'ana inkitarruorrot enye, naa kepalaki sii ninye intae Papa linyi otii keper." 
Matthew6:15 Kake ti nimipalakiki intae iltung'ana inkitarruorrot enye, nemepalaki sii intae Papa linyi inkitarruorrot inyi." 
Matthew6:16 “Naa ti nieniene ate aapukoo, emitiu anaa isunkuro oosot inkomomi, amu keidisie ninche inkomomi enye, pee edol iltung'ana aajo etupukoitie. Esipa ajoki intae, eidipa aanoto shunet enye." 
Matthew6:17 Kake ore ti nipukoo iyie, iela endukuya ino nisuj enkomon ino;" 
Matthew6:18 mikidol iltung'ana inchere itupukoiyie, kake kedol Papa lino otii inkisudorot; ore Papa lino odol too nkisudorot nikimputaki." 
Matthew6:19 “Emishumaki ate te nkop imasaa kiroteti, eneinosie oriri o olasai, negil ilapurrok, nepurroo," 
Matthew6:20 Kake entushumaki ate te keper imasaa inyi kiroteti, enemeinosie oriri, anaa olasai, nemegil ilapurrok nemepurroo;" 
Matthew6:21 amu ore enetii masaa inono kiroteti, naa ine eyooki atii oltau lino." 
Matthew6:22 “Ore oltaa lo sesen naa enkong'u, metaa te neikishiaan enkong'u ino, neiput osesen lino pooki ewang'an." 
Matthew6:23 Kake te naa torrono enkong'u ino neiput osesen lino pooki enaimin. Amaa te neaku ore ewang'an nikitii iyie naa enaimin: kebaa esapuko e ina aimin? 
Matthew6:24 “Metii oltung'ani oidim aaisiaayia ilkituaak oaare amu keibayu obo nenyorru olikae; aashu eibung'are obo nemenu olikae. Mindimidimi aaisiaayia Enkai o Masaa, Enkai oo mpisai." 
Matthew6:25 “Neaku ina pee ajoki intae, eminyamaliki enkishui inyi, aajo ainyoo inyanya, anaa ainyoo iokioko, anaa too seseni linyi aajo ainyoo inchopishopo. Ai melusoo enkishui alang endaa, nelusoo osesen alang nkilani?" 
Matthew6:26 Eng'ura imotonyi o loing'ang'e ajo meunisho nemeikesisho, nemeiturrurroki ilkompen neitoti ninche Papa linyi otii Keper. Aimirara intae kiroteti aalang ninche?" 
Matthew6:27 Ai ng'ae te intae oidim te neitanyamaluo atoponai enkadori enye entemata nabo? 
Matthew6:28 “Kainyoo naa pee inyamalakiki inkilani? Entadamu intapuka e ong'ata enaikununye te nebulu; amu measisho ninche nemepiyaisho; 
Matthew6:29 kake ajoki nanu intae eitu eishopi ninye Solomon te sikar enye pooki anaa nabo e kuna tapuka. 
Matthew6:30 Amaa te neishop Enkai inkujit e ong'ata aiko neijia, naatai taata neyookini aanang'aki enkima taaisere, ai meitulusoo oleng aishop intae, lo tung'ana ooti enkirukoto?" 
Matthew6:31 “Eminyamalu ijojo, ‘Kainyoo kinya?’ Anaa, ‘Kainyoo kiok?’ Anaa ‘Kainyoo kinchop?’" 
Matthew6:32 Amu nena pooki eing'oru iloreren lemeyiolo Enkai; amu eyiolo Papa linyi le keper ajo iyieuu nena pooki. 
Matthew6:33 Kake entang'as eng'oru enkitoria enye o sipat enyena; naa keponikini intae nena pooki. 
Matthew6:34 Metaa eminyamalaki ine ntaaisere amu enyamalaki e ntaaisere kewan. Eidip enkolong intorrok enyena. 
Matthew7:1 “Eminguanare pee meiguanareki intae. 
Matthew7:2 Amu ore enkiguana ning'uanarere, naa ninye eiguanareki intae; ore enintorisiokiki ilkulikae, naa ninye eitorisiokini intae." 
Matthew7:3 Kainyoo pee ing'uraa entubuloi natii enkong'u o lalashe lino, nimidol olchata otii enkong'u ino makewan?" 
Matthew7:4 Anaa kaji inko ti nijoki olalashe lino, ‘Inchooki maitayu entubuloi te nkong'u ino;’ etii olchata atua enkong'u ino makewan?" 
Matthew7:5 Lo sunkuroi, tang'asa intayu ilo shata te nkong'u ino makewan pee itumoki atoduaa oleng, aitayu ina tubuloi te nkong'u o lalashe lino." 
Matthew7:6 “Emincho ildiein entoki nasinya, niminang'akiki ilului inyi ilbitiro pee meituny too nkejek enye, neibelekenyakino intae aanya." 
Matthew7:7 “Entoomonu pee eishori intae; eng'oru naa itumutumu entooshiosh kutuk aji pee eboluni intae. 
Matthew7:8 Amu ore pooki oomonu neishori, ore olooshiosh neboluni." 
Matthew7:9 Anaa kalo tung'ani te intae laa, te neomon enkerai endaa, neisho ninye osoit?" 
Matthew7:10 Aashu aa te neomon osinkirri, neisho olasurai?" 
Matthew7:11 Aiti niyiololo intae oora torrok aaishoo inkera inyi inkishoorot sidain, kebaa eitulusoo naleng Papa linyi otii keper aisho intokitin sidain lelo oomon ninye?" 
Matthew7:12 Metaa ore pooki niyieuu neitaas intae iltung'ana entaasa sii intae ninche nena, amu kuna nkitanapat o loibonok le Nkai." 
Matthew7:13 “Entijing intae te nkishomi napirik amu dapash kishomi nelala enkoitoi nalo enkiminata, naa kumok iloojing ina kishomi nalala." 
Matthew7:14 Amu kepirik kishomi naa ronkai enkoitoi nalo enkishon, naa ilkuti ootum ina kishomi napirik." 
Matthew7:15 “Entorrip ate too loibonok le lejare oopuonu enitii eishopito inkilani oo ntare, kake ore atua ninche, naa isuyian ooata enkarri." 
Matthew7:16 Too lng'anayio lenye iyiolouu. Keitayuni isabibu too lkiku anaa ilng'abolo too ilkeek loo ilkiku? 
Matthew7:17 Neijia etiu, eiu pooki shani sidai ilng'anayio sidain, neiu pooki shani torrono ilng'anayio torrok." 
Matthew7:18 Meidim olchani sidai atoiu ilng'anayio torrok, nemeidim sii olchani torrono atoiu ilng'anayio sidain." 
Matthew7:19 Ore pooki shani lemeiu ilng'anayio sidain, nedung'i aauroo nenang'akini enkima." 
Matthew7:20 Neijia naa etiu, too lng'anayio lenye iyiolouu ninche." 
Matthew7:21 “Mme pooki tung'ani laajo ‘Olaitoriani, Olaitoriani,’ ojing enkitoria e Nkai, kake ilo oas enayieu Papa lai otii keper." 
Matthew7:22 Aayooki aajoki ilkumok teina olong, ‘Olaitoriani, Olaitoriani, keitu kimbonisho te nkarna ino, nikiaraa iloiriruani te nkarna ino, nikiaas ine nking'asia te nkarna ino?’" 
Matthew7:23 Naa kashirraki ina kata ajoki ninche, ‘Eitu aekata ayiolou intae, enchom entung'uayioki intae, ilaasak loo ntorok.’" 
Matthew7:24 “Metaa ore pooki ng'ae oning lelo rorei laainei neas, neitanyaanyukieki oltung'ani otesheta ng'en enkaji enye te ndapidapoi," 
Matthew7:25 nesha enchan, nenang'unye enkare, nekutu olkutati, neosh ina aji, neitu euroo; amu etuunokoki olkitamanyunoto lenye shumata endapidapoi." 
Matthew7:26 “Naa ore pooki ng'ae oning kulo rorei laainei nemeas, neitanyaanyukieki oltung'ani omoda otesheta enkaji enye te shumata osinyai;" 
Matthew7:27 nesha enchan nenang'unye enkare, nekutu olkutati, neosh ina aji, neurori neaku kitok euroroto enye.”" 
Matthew7:28 Ore pee eidip Yesu kulo rorei, neing'asia siamon te nkiteng'enare enye;" 
Matthew7:29 amu eiteng'ena Yesu ninche anaa oloata enkidimata nemetiu anaa ilaiteng'enak lenye loo nkitanapat. 
Matthew8:1 Ore pee edou Yesu to ldoinyo, neirukurukore iltung'ana kumok." 
Matthew8:2 Nelotu enetii oloata enkeeya oo lbolot, negil kung aserem, nejoki, “Lo kitok, ti niyieu kindim atisika.”" 
Matthew8:3 Neitorioo Yesu enkaina enye neiseyie nejo, “Kayieu; tisikayu.” Nesikari nabo kata enkeeya enye." 
Matthew8:4 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Miliki ake oltung'ani, kake shomo intoduaai kewan to olapolosani, nintayu enkishooroto naitanapishe Musa, metaa shakenisho te ninche.”" 
Matthew8:5 Ore pee ejing Yesu Kapernaum, nelotu olkitok loo sikarini enetii asai ninye," 
Matthew8:6 nejoki, “Lo kitok, eirrag olaisiaayiani lai ti aji, etaa olmaima, neitabayie emuoyian oleng.”" 
Matthew8:7 Nejoki Yesu, “Kalotu aishiunye.”" 
Matthew8:8 Newaliki ilo kitok loo sikarini ajoki, “Lo kitok, kaamakua nanu ti nijing'u enkaji ai, kake tejo ake olomoni obo, naa keishiu olaisiaayiani lai." 
Matthew8:9 Amu ara sii nanu oltung'ani otii abori enkitoo, naata nanu sikarini laatii ti abori, te najoki obo, ‘Shomo,’ nelo; najoki likae, ‘Wou,’ nelotu; naa te najoki osinka lai, ‘Taasa ena, neas.’ ”" 
Matthew8:10 Ore pee ening Yesu nena, neing'asia nejoki lelo oosujita, “Esipa ajoki intae, eitu ae kata adol likae tiatua Siraeli oata enkirukoto sapuk naba inji." 
Matthew8:11 Najoki nanu intae, kepuonu ilkumok ooing'uaa oloosaen o loontoluo aatoni te nebo Abraham o Isaak o Yakobo tiatua enkitoria e keper;" 
Matthew8:12 kake ore lelo laa ninche naaji ile ina kitoria nenang'akini atua enaimin e auluo; neaku enkishirata o eonyoto oo lala.” 
Matthew8:13 Nejoki Yesu ilo kitok loo sikarini, “Shomo ang; metotiwuo te iyie anaa ina niruko.” Neishiunyeki olaisiaayiani lenye teina kata ake." 
Matthew8:14 Ore pee ejing Yesu enkaji e Petero, nedol enkaputani e Petero eirrag emuoi oloirobi." 
Matthew8:15 Neiseyie enkaina enye neing'ueki oloirobi, neinyototo aisiaai ninye." 
Matthew8:16 Ore pee eaku teipa, neyakini Yesuilkumok ooata iloiriruani nearaa iloiriruani to rorei, neishiunye lelo pooki oomuoi," 
Matthew8:17 Pee etum atabai enairoroki to loiboni le Nkai oji Isaya pee ejo, “Ewa ninye openy imuoyiaritin ang, netanapa inkeyaitin ang.”" 
Matthew8:18 Ore pee edol Yesu iltung'ana kumok emanita, neitanap metalang'a aapuo lido kekun." 
Matthew8:19 Nelotu olaiteng'enani loo nkitanapat nejoki, “Lo Aiteng'enani, kaasuj pooki wueji nilo.”" 
Matthew8:20 Nejoki Yesu, “Keeta imbariak ingumot, neeta motonyi o loing'ang'e nkajijik enye kake meeta Enkerai e Tung'ani eneiteleiki endukuya enye.”" 
Matthew8:21 Nejoki likai loo lkipaareta lenye, “Lo kitok, inchooki matang'asa alo anukaa papa.”" 
Matthew8:22 Kake etiaaka Yesu ninye, “Tusujuaki iyie; inchoo ilmeneng'a metunukai ilmeneng'a lenye.”" 
Matthew8:23 Ore pee ejing Yesu empeut, nesuj lkipaareta lenyena." 
Matthew8:24 Nedumunye olkutati kitok te naiposha, metaa keimisie ilopir le nkare empeut; kake keirura ninye Yesu." 
Matthew8:25 Nepuo enetii lkipaareta lenyena, neinyeyie, nejoki, “Intajeu iyiook, Lo Kitok, amu kindaaitie.”" 
Matthew8:26 Nejoki, “Kainyoo pee iureishoyuyu intae ilooti enkirukoto?” Neinyototo neisikong olkutati o enaiposha; nelotu enkitirring'ata kitok." 
Matthew8:27 Neing'asia lelo tung'ana nejo, “Kaa pukunoto o ltung'ani ele oning olkutati o enaiposha?”" 
Matthew8:28 Ore pee ebaiki Yesu lido kekun le nkop oo Lgadaren, nenang'are iltung'ana oaare ooata iloiriruani oopi oleng ooing'uaa inkuraren o metaa meidim oltung'ani aima ina oitoi." 
Matthew8:29 Nebuak ninche aajo, “Kainyoo iatakinore iyie iyiook Enkerai e Nkai? Amaa iewuo iyie aitame iyiook eton eng'or enkata?”" 
Matthew8:30 Netii eluaata oo lbitiro nadaa nalakuaniki ninche. 
Matthew8:31 Nesai lelo oiriruani Yesu aajoki, “Te naa iaraa iyiook aipang'ie, inchoo iyiook maape aajing enda boo oo lbitiro.”" 
Matthew8:32 Nejoki, “Enchom.” Ore pee eipung ninche, nepuo aajing ilbitiro; nekuet emboo pooki, nesulari te marti aajing enaiposha, neye tiatua enkare." 
Matthew8:33 Neilanyisho ilchekuti aapuo inkang'itie enye nelikioo imbaa pooki o nena naataasate te lelo ooata iloiriruani. 
Matthew8:34 Nepuku enkanasa pooki aapuo aanang'are Yesu; ore pee edol nesai metung'uai ilo kirine lenye. 
Matthew9:1 Neked Yesu empeut nelang alo enkanasa enye. 
Matthew9:2 Neyakini oltung'ani maima, eirrag te rruat; ore pee edol Yesu enkirukoto e lelo tung'ana, nejoki ilo maima, “Nakerai, ntagoluoyu to ltau amu kitapalakaki ng'ok inono.”" 
Matthew9:3 Nejo kulikae aiteng'enak loo nkitanapat maate, “Enkai emor ele tung'ani.”" 
Matthew9:4 Neyiolou Yesu ndamunot enye nejoki, “Aainyo pee mbirribirrirri ntorrok too ltauja linyi?" 
Matthew9:5 Kaa nalelek, te neji ‘Kitapalakaki ng'ok inono,’ ana te neji, ‘Inyo shomo?’" 
Matthew9:6 Kake ore pee itumutumu aatayiolo aajo, keeta Enkerai e Tung'ani engolon te nkop napalakinye iltung'ana ng'ok,” nejoki ilo maima, “Inyo, tudumu erruat ino, shomo ang.”" 
Matthew9:7 Neinyototo ilo tung'ani, nelo ang." 
Matthew9:8 Kake ore pee edol iltung'ana kumok, neureishoyu neisho Enkai enkitoo naishoo ltung'ana engolon naaijo ina." 
Matthew9:9 Ore eimita Yesu ine nedol oltung'ani oji Matayo, eton te nelakieki kodi nejoki, “Tusujuaki,” neinyototo asuj." 
Matthew9:10 Eaku ore eton Yesu teina aji e Matayo anya endaa, nepuonu ilasotok le kodi o laing'okok kumok netoni te nebo Yesu o lkipaareta lenyena." 
Matthew9:11 Ore pee edol Ilfarisayo ina, nejoki lkipaareta lenyena, “Aainyo pee eng'arie Olaiteng'enani linyi endaa ilasotok le kodi olaing'okok?”" 
Matthew9:12 Kake ore pee ening Yesu, nejo, “Meyieu ilememuoi olabaani, kake iloomuoi ooyieu." 
Matthew9:13 Enchom enteng'ena ate eneikununo ele rorei, ojo, ‘Olng'ur ayieu mme olasar;’ amu eitu alotu aipot isupati kake ilaing'okok.”" 
Matthew9:14 Nepuonu ina kata lkipaareta le Yohana enetii Yesu nejoki, “Aainyo pee kipukoo oleng iyiook o Lfarisayo, nemepukoo lkipaareta linono?”" 
Matthew9:15 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Keidim ilchoreta lo loyamishe aaishira eton eboitare oloyamishe? Kake kepuonu nkolong'i naayae olayamishe aaitung'uaa ninche, ina kata kenya epukoo." 
Matthew9:16 “Meetae oltung'ani oripaki enkarasha ng'ejuk enkila musana; amu ore ina natipikaki nepolos enkila, neponari apolosa." 
Matthew9:17 Nemepik sii iltung'ana enaisho ng'ejuk oo sabibu ilbenia musan; naa te nepik nepolosa ilbenia, neibukori enaisho oo sabibu nepolosa sii Lbenia; kake ilbenia ng'ejuko epiki pee erripi pokira are.”" 
Matthew9:18 Ore eton eliki Yesu ninche kuna baa, nelotu oltung'ani oitore enkaji e ntumo negilaki Yesu kung nejoki, “Etua te na kata entito ai, kake wou inteleiki enkaina ino pee epiu ninye.”" 
Matthew9:19 Neinyototo Yesu o lkipaareta lenyena nesuj ninye. 
Matthew9:20 Nelotu enkitok te siadi ninye, naturuke osarge larin tomon o are, neiseyie olcholoi lo lkila lenye; amu etejo to ltau lenye," 
Matthew9:21 “Te naiseyie ake olcholoi lo lkila lenye naishiu.” 
Matthew9:22 Neibelekenya Yesu nedol ninye, nejoki, “Naito, intagoluoyu amu kinchiunye enkirukoto ino.” Neishiu ina kitok aiteru teina kata ake." 
Matthew9:23 Ore pee elotu Yesu enkaji eilo oitore enkaji e ntumo nedol ilookut indulen o lorere eilepilep oleng," 
Matthew9:24 nejoki, “Ewuang'a amu eitu eye entito, keirura.” Nekueniyie ninche aayiet." 
Matthew9:25 Ore pee eidipi aaipung'ie olorere, nejing neibung enkaina enye, neinyototo entito." 
Matthew9:26 Neibulu kulo omon ilo kerenket pooki. 
Matthew9:27 Ore pee egiroo Yesu ine nesuj iltung'ana aare modook ooishiraki aajoki, “Ing'urrie iyiook enkerai e Daudi.”" 
Matthew9:28 Ore pee ebaiki aji, nepuonu ilmodook enetii, nejoki Yesu ninche, “Irukuruku aajo kaidim ataasa ena?” Nejoki, “Ee lo kitok.”" 
Matthew9:29 Neiseyie nkonyek enye nejo, “Inchoo etiu anaa enkirukoto inyi.”" 
Matthew9:30 Nebolo inkonyek enye. Neitanap Yesu nereiki ajoki ninche, “Entodol emincho hoo oltung'ani obo eyiolou.”" 
Matthew9:31 Kake eipung'o nepuo aaibulunye ilomon lenyena ilo kerenket pooki. 
Matthew9:32 Ore pee eipang lelo, neyakini Yesu oltung'ani lemeiro otijing'a oloirirua." 
Matthew9:33 Ore pee earaa oloirirua, neiro ilo lemeiro apa, neing'asia iltung'ana kumok nejo, “Eitu ae kata edoli ena tiatua enkop oo Siraeli.”" 
Matthew9:34 Kake etejo Lfarisayo, “Engolon oo loiriruani eararie Yesu iloiriruani.”" 
Matthew9:35 Neman Yesu inkang'itie pooki sapuki o nkutiti, neiteng'enisho too nkajijik enye e ntumo, nelikioo ilomon supati le nkitoria e keper, neishiunye pooki keeya o pooki pukunoto e muoyian." 
Matthew9:36 Ore pee edol ninye olorere netum olng'ur te ninche amu eteekate ninche, nelepori neidapashari netiu anaa ntare nemeeta olchekut." 
Matthew9:37 Nejoki Yesu lkipaareta lenyena, “Esipa aisapuk enkikesare kake kuti ilaisiaayiak." 
Matthew9:38 Kaae, entoomon naa Olaitoriani liopeny enkikesare meirriu ilaisiaayiak atua enkikesare enye.”" 
Matthew10:1 Neipot Yesu lelo ooiteng'eni lenyena tomon o aare, neisho meitoria nearaa iloiriruani ooiduruk, neishiunye sii mpukunot pooki oo muoyiaritin o nkeyaitin." 
Matthew10:2 Naa kuna nkarn oo lkipaareta lenyena pokira tomon o aare; ole dukuya naa Simon oji Petero, o Andrea olalashe lenye; Yakobo le Sebedayo o Yohana olalashe lenye;" 
Matthew10:3 Filipo, o Bartolomayo; Tomas o Matayo olasotoni le kodi; Yakobo le Alfayo, o Tadayo;" 
Matthew10:4 Simon onyor olosho lenye o Yudas Iskariot laa ninye otakaldayie Yesu. 
Matthew10:5 Kulo pokira tomon o aare eirriwayie Yesu neitanap ajoki, “Emipuo nkoitoi oo Loreren, nimijing'ijing'i enkang hoo nabo oo ltung'ana le Samaria" 
Matthew10:6 kake enchom enetii ntare kiminat e nkaji e Siraeli. 
Matthew10:7 Ore ipuopuo, entolikioi entejo ‘Etinyikua enkitoria e keper.’" 
Matthew10:8 Enchiunye iloomuoi, entopiu ilootuata enchiunye ilooata enkeeya oo lbolot, entaarai iloiriruani. Eishooki intae pesho, enchooi sii intae pesho." 
Matthew10:9 Emishoroo saabu anaa mpisai too lbenia linyi," 
Matthew10:10 nimishoroo olbene te lototo inyi, anaa inkilani maare, anaa inamuka, anaa eng'udi, amu keishiaakino olaisiaayiani endaa enye." 
Matthew10:11 “Ore pooki ang sapuk o enkiti nijing'ijing'i, enkilikuanisho tenaa ketii oltung'ani supat atua, nitonini tenebo ninye o metaba anaa nidumunyenye aapuo." 
Matthew10:12 Naa tinijing'ijing'i enkaji eroroki. 
Matthew10:13 Naa te neitoomoni intae teina aji, nejing osotua linyi shumata ninye, naa te neitu eitoomoni intae, neshukokino intae osotua linyi." 
Matthew10:14 Ore pooki ng'ae lemeng'amaa intae, anaa olemening ororei linyi, ore pee ipukuku aaing'uaa ina aji, anaa ina ang, nimpiripiroo enterit natii nkejek inyi." 
Matthew10:15 Esipa ajoki intae, keikashieki Sodom o Gomora teina ang te nkolong enkiguana!" 
Matthew10:16 “Kairriwaa intae anaa nkerra atua suyian, enteng'enita anaa lasuriaa, niborrurru anaa nturkuluoni." 
Matthew10:17 Kake entodol ate too ltung'ana amu keishooyo intae meiguanareki neidong intae tiatua nkajijik enye e ntumo 
Matthew10:18 Naa keriki intae dukuya ilbalosuni o laiguanak te nkaraki nanu, pee iakuku shakeni te ninche o too Loreren." 
Matthew10:19 Kake ore ina kata te nerik intae, eming'aeng'ae aajo, ‘Kaa kijo’, amu keishori intae teina kata enijojo." 
Matthew10:20 Amu mme intae ooiro, Enkiyang'et e Papa linyi nairo tiatua intae." 
Matthew10:21 “Naa keishooyo olalashe olikae, metaari metua, neishooyo menye enkerai, nedumakino nkera ntoiuo enye neishooyo ninche metaari metuata." 
Matthew10:22 Naa keibayu intae iltung'ana pooki, te nkaraki enkarna ai, kake ore olong'iri o metabaiki enkiting'oto nejeu." 
Matthew10:23 Naa te nearari intae te nkang nabo, esikaki enkae, amu esipa ajoki intae, miishushu nkang'itie e Siraeli pooki eitu elotu Enkerai e Tung'ani." 
Matthew10:24 “Melang oloiteng'eni oloiteng'en ninye, nemelang osinka oloitore ninye." 
Matthew10:25 Keidim oloiteng'eni atotiuo anaa oloiteng'en ninye, netiu osinka anaa oloitore ninye. Pasa taa etejo olopeny enkaji Beelsebul, kebaa eitulusoo aajo neijia lootii enkaji enye!" 
Matthew10:26 “Metaa emiure lelo tung'ana amu meetae embae naisudoyioki nemeyiolouni. 
Matthew10:27 Ore enajoki nanu intae te naimin embalunye te wang'an, ore enining'ining'i te nkiok, entolikioi too nchumarot oo nkajijik." 
Matthew10:28 Emiureyu ilo oar osesen nemeidim aatar enkiyang'et, enare ti niureyuyu ilo oidim aidaikie pokira are enkiyang'et o sesen tiatua olbalbal le nkima." 
Matthew10:29 Ai meinosieki imotonyi are empisai nabo, kake mesulunye nabo aosh enkop, meyiolo Papa linyi." 
Matthew10:30 Ore ninche intae, eikenaki o metabaiki lpapit loo lukuny inyi." 
Matthew10:31 Ore te nkaraki ina emiureishoyu amu irara ile tipat inkashikasha aalang imotonyi kumok. 
Matthew10:32 “Ore naa pooki laaibalie te dukuya ltung'ana, naa kaibalie sii ninye te dukuya Papa lai otii keper." 
Matthew10:33 Ore pooki laamiki te dukuya ltung'ana naa kamiki sii nanu ninye te dukuya Papa lai otii keper. 
Matthew10:34 “Emidamu nijojo kaewuo ayau osotua enkop; eitu alotu ayau osotua, kake olalem ayaua." 
Matthew10:35 Aewuo nanu airriki olayioni o menye nairriki entito o ng'otonye, nairriki entito o enkaputani." 
Matthew10:36 Ore lmang'ati lo ltung'ani keaku lelo le nkaji enye. 
Matthew10:37 “Ore olonyor menye anaa ng'otonye aitalang nanu, anaa olonyor olayioni lenye anaa entito enye pee aaitalang nanu, nemaishiaakino nanu." 
Matthew10:38 Ore olemenap osalaba lenye naasuju nemaaishiakino nanu. 
Matthew10:39 Ore ologolie enkishui enye neiminie, ore oloiminie enkishui enye te nkaraki nanu negolie." 
Matthew10:40 “Ore olong'amaa intae, nanu etang'amayie, ore olaang'amaa nanu naa ilo lairriwua etang'amayie." 
Matthew10:41 Ore olong'amaa oltung'ani supat te nkaraki naa supat, netum olerrinyore lo ltung'ani supat." 
Matthew10:42 Ore oloisho obo le kulo ooti, enkikompe e nkare nairobi te nkaraki naa oloiteng'eni lai, esipa ajoki intae, meimin olerrinyore lenye.”" 
Matthew11:1 Ore pee eidip Yesu aitanapa lkipaareta lenyena tomon o are, neing'uaa ine nelo aiteng'enisho, nelikioo ororei too nkang'itie naamanita ine." 
Matthew11:2 Nening Yohana eena te jila nkiasin e Kristo, neirriwaki lkipaareta lenyena nejoki," 
Matthew11:3 “Ai yie olapa olotu ana keetae likae likiaanyu?” 
Matthew11:4 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Enchom entoliki Yohana imbaa nining'itoto o nidolitata." 
Matthew11:5 Etodolishote ilmodook, nepuo ilmaiman, neishiunyeki le nkeeya oo lbolot, nening'ishoyu lming'anta, neitopiuni ilootuata, ore ilaisinak, nelikini Ororei Supat le Nkai." 
Matthew11:6 Nemayiana olemetum olkob te nanu.” 
Matthew11:7 Ore epuoito lkipaareta le Yohana neimaki Yesu Yohana to lorere ajoki, “Kainyoo ishomo intae aadol ti ong'ata? Ke olperesi oyuk osiwuo?" 
Matthew11:8 Kake aainyo pee impang'a aapuo? Ke oltung'ani oishopito nkilani naapuyiapui ishomo aadol? Ore ilo oishop inkilani naapuyiapui nkajijik oo laiguanak etii. 
Matthew11:9 Kake ainyoo pee impang'a aapuo? Ke oloiboni le Nkai ishomo aadol? Ee pae olkitok olang oloiboni le Nkai Yohana. 
Matthew11:10 Amu ninye eimakaki pee etisiraki aajo, ‘Kairriwaa olkipaaret lai aiturukie te iyie, likintobiraki enkoitoi ino.’" 
Matthew11:11 Kesipa ajoki intae, eitu etumi aekata too ltung'ana ooiu nkituaak, olkitok olang Yohana Olaibatisani. Kake ore oloti aisul te nkitoria e keper naa kitok te ninye." 
Matthew11:12 Ore ebaiki nkolong'i e Yohana Olaibatisani o taata eisimitai te ngolon enkitoria e keper, neisimaa ilo ogol." 
Matthew11:13 Amu eibonutuo loibonok pooki le Nkai nkitanapat ometabaiki Yohana; 
Matthew11:14 naa te naa iyieuu ning'amumu ena, ele doi Eliya, olapa olotu." 
Matthew11:15 Oloata nkiyiaa toning'o. 
Matthew11:16 “Kainyoo aitanyaanyukie ltung'ana le na kata? Etiu anaa nkera naatoni too neemirishoreki, neipot inkulie nejoki," 
Matthew11:17 ‘kitooshokito intae ndulen neitu iranyiranya; nikinchirakita intae neitu nchirishiri.’ 
Matthew11:18 Amu eewuo Yohana nemedaa, nemeokisho, nejo ltung'ana, ‘Keeta oloirirua.’" 
Matthew11:19 Ore Enkerai e Tung'ani neewuo nedaa, neokisho, nejo ninche, ‘Eng'ura oltung'ani oulu, olaokoni le naisho naa olchore loo loosotu kodi o laing'okok!’ Kake too nkiasin etokorduaki kulo tiatua ltung'ana, pee eaku ilng'anayio le dukuya le Nkai o lo Lkuoo le Ker.”" 
Matthew11:20 Neiteru Yesu aisikong nkang'itie naataasie siaaitin enyena e nking'asia, amu eitu eirridu ng'ok enye," 
Matthew11:21 “Ee kake ayia Korasin, ee kake ayia Betsaida, amu te naa ketaasaki inenking'asia naataasaki tiatua intae, te Tiro o te Sidon anaata eirridutua apa te musano, neishop ilkuniyiani neelare nkuruon." 
Matthew11:22 Kake ajoki intae, keikashieki Tiro o Sidon te nkolong e nkiguana aaitalang intae." 
Matthew11:23 Oi iyie Kapernaum aa ijo eikisisi aailepie shumata? Ae kintadouni tabaiki enemeneng'a. Amu ore isiaaitin naataasaki tiatua iyie, te naa ketaasaki apa te Sodom anaata eton eetae ina ang o tene." 
Matthew11:24 Amu esipa ajoki intae, keikashieki enkang e Sodom te nkolong e nkiguana aaitulusoo te iyie.”" 
Matthew11:25 Neitoki Yesu ajo teina kata, “Aaisho iyie enashe, Papa Olaitoriani le keper o enkop, amu isudorie kuna baa iltung'ana ng'eni niboloki nkera." 
Matthew11:26 Ee neijia etiu Papa amu ina nikintishipa iyie. 
Matthew11:27 “Aaishoo Papa pooki toki, nemeetae hoo obo oyiolo ina Kerai leme Papa ake, nemeetae hoo obo oyiolo Papa leme ina Kerai ake o pooki ng'ae ogelu Enkerai aboloki." 
Matthew11:28 “Wootu enatii intae pooki oonyamal niatata ilolan ooiroshi, pee ayeng'iyeng'ie intae." 
Matthew11:29 Enteleiki ate enchata ai oo murto, enteng'ena ate te nanu, amu kabor nemawuasa to ltau, naa itumutumu intae enkiyeng'iyeng'ata to nkorroki inyi;" 
Matthew11:30 amu kelelek enchata ai oo murto naa keneneng olola lai.” 
Matthew12:1 Ore teina kata nelo Yesu te nkolong e nkiyeng'iyeng naji Sabato aim atua nkurman e nkano, netir esumash lkipaareta lenyena, neitayu enkano aanya." 
Matthew12:2 Ore pee edol Ilfarisayo nejoki, “Ng'ura enaasita lkipaareta linono, nemeishiaa te neasi te nkolong e nkiyeng'iyeng'ata.”" 
Matthew12:3 Nejoki Yesu, “Keitu isumusumu enataasa apa Daudi o looboitare etotiro esumash?" 
Matthew12:4 Etijing'a enkaji e Nkai nenya emukate nasinya nemeishoruno too nkitanapat meinosa ninye o lelo ooboitare, ilapolosak ake oonya." 
Matthew12:5 Ana keitu isumusumu too nkitanapat inchere kegil ilapolosak le nkaji e Nkai enkolong e nkiyeng'iyeng naji Sabato nemeikeni aajo eisarkionie ninche nemeji eitarruoitie ninche? 
Matthew12:6 Kake ajoki intae, etii ene entoki kitok alang enkaji e Nkai." 
Matthew12:7 Kake te naa itayioloito eneikununo ele rorei ojo, ‘Olng'ur ayieu mme olasar.’ Naa anaata mipikipiki entioto ilemeeta." 
Matthew12:8 Amu Olaitoriani le nkolong e nkiyeng'iyeng'ata Enkerai e Tung'ani.” 
Matthew12:9 Nelo Yesu aing'uaa ine alo ajing enkaji e ntumo 
Matthew12:10 Netii ine oltung'ani oikaole enkaina. Neikilikuan ninche aajoki, “Inyorriki keishoruno too nkitanapat te nebakishoe te nkolong e nkiyeng'iyeng naji Sabato?” Aa kejo taa pee etum aaitang'oro ninye." 
Matthew12:11 Nejoki ninche, “Kalo tung'ani linyi oata enker nabo, naa te nedoiki ina ker engumoto te nkolong e kiyeng'iyeng'ata, nemeibung aitayu?" 
Matthew12:12 Kebaa naa elusoo oltung'ani te nker! Te nkaraki e ina keishoruno metaasi mbaa supati te nkolong e nkiyeng'iyeng'ata.” 
Matthew12:13 Nejoki Yesu ilo tung'ani, “Intorioi enkaina ino!” Neitorioo neishiu atiu anaa enkae." 
Matthew12:14 Kake eipang'a ake Ilfarisayo nepuo aaiguanare aaing'oru eneiko pee ear ninye metua. 
Matthew12:15 Neyiolou Yesu ilo rorei nelo teine, nesuj iltung'ana kumok neishiunye ninche pooki." 
Matthew12:16 Neitanap ajoki, pee melikioo," 
Matthew12:17 ejo pee etum atabai enatejoki te nkutuk o loiboni le Nkai oji Isaya pee ejo," 
Matthew12:18 “Osinka lai ele, lategelua, olanyor lai, oshipakino oltau lai; naa kapik Enkiyang'et ai shumata ninye, olaa ninye odung'oki loreren enkiguana te sipata" 
Matthew12:19 nemeilepilep ninye nemebuak; nemening'i oltoilo lenye too nkoitoi oo nkaulele," 
Matthew12:20 nemegil oltiyani oilenye, nemear oltaa oiliilari, omanaa omeisulie enkiguana." 
Matthew12:21 Naa enkarna enye eyooki Loreren aaisilig.” 
Matthew12:22 Nerikokini Yesu ina kata oltung'ani oata oloirirua; naa modooni nemeiro, neishiunye, Yesu ninye neiro nedolishoyu." 
Matthew12:23 Neing'asia olorora pooki nejo, “Keidim ele ataa ninye Enkerai e Daudi?”" 
Matthew12:24 Ore pee ening Ilfarisayo ina nejo, “Mearaa ele tung'ani iloiriruani mme te ngolon e Beelsebul olkitok loo loiriruani.”" 
Matthew12:25 Neyiolou Yesu ndamunot enye nejoki, “Ore enkitoo pooki naoro tiatua nerruoyo; anaa enkang ake pooki, anaa enkaji naoro aara maate, meitashe." 
Matthew12:26 Amaa teniaraa Sheitani Sheitani, neoro ninye makewan, kaji naa eiko enkitoria enye teneitashe?" 
Matthew12:27 Amaa te naa te Beelsebul aaraa nanu iloiriruani, ai ng'ae eararie ninche nkera inyi? Ninche maate ooyooki aairrash intae." 
Matthew12:28 Kake amaa te naa te Enkiyang'et e Nkai aaraa nanu iloiriruani, enkitoria e Nkai naa naewuo atua intae." 
Matthew12:29 “Keidim oltung'ani atijing'a enkaji o ltung'ani ogol neya ntokitin enyena, eitu eng'as aen ilo tung'ani ogol? Pee etum aawa ntokitin e nkaji enye?" 
Matthew12:30 “Ore olemaaning'ore naa olmang'atinta lai ore olemeiturrur te nebo nanu, keisardaikie." 
Matthew12:31 Te nkaraki ena ajoki intae, epalakini ltung'ana ng'ok pooki o emoroto namor Enkai, kake ore emoroto namor Enkiyang'et Sinyati, nemepalakini." 
Matthew12:32 Ore olomor Enkerai e Tung'ani, kepalakini, kake ore pooki ng'ae omor Enkiyang'et Sinyati, nemepalakini tena ishoi o te ishoi nalotu." 
Matthew12:33 “Entaa olchani sidai, nesidanu ilng'anayio lenyena, aashu entaa olchani torrono, netorronu lng'anayio lenyena amu too lng'anayio lenyena eyiolouni olchani." 
Matthew12:34 Naishoi oo lasuriaa, kaji nkoko pee ndimidimi aairoro irorei supati irara intae torrok? Amu inaabore oltau eiro enkutuk." 
Matthew12:35 Ore oltung'ani supat neitayu supati tiatua olchumati lenye sidai, ore oltung'ani torrono, neitayu ntorrok to lchumati lenye torrono." 
Matthew12:36 “Ajoki naa intae, ore pooki rorei lemeeta tipat oiro iltung'ana, eikenu kenya ake te nkolong e nkiguana." 
Matthew12:37 Amu to nkirorot inono kinkenakini isupati, naa to nkirorot inono kinkenakini ntorrok.”" 
Matthew12:38 Nejoki ilaiteng'enak loo nkitanapat o Lfarisayo Yesu, “Olaiteng'enani, kiyieu nikidol olmonekie te iyie.”" 
Matthew12:39 Newaliki ajoki, “Keyieu kulo tung'ana lena kata torrok oololoito olmonekie nemeishori, pooki o lmonekie oishori naa olo loiboni le Nkai oji Yona." 
Matthew12:40 Ore anaa apa etii Yona enkoshoke e ntiamasi o sinkirri ndamaritin uni o nkewarieitin uni, neijia sii etiu Enkerai e Tung'ani, kelo aton ndamaritin uni o nkewarieitin uni tiatua olodo lenkop." 
Matthew12:41 Keitasheikinore iltung'ana le Ninawi te nkiguana ltung'ana le na ishoi, naa keiguanaki ninche nchere, eitarruoitie amu eirridutua ninche to lkilikuai le Yona; netii ene olkitok olang Yona." 
Matthew12:42 Keitasheikinore enkaiguanani e moikuape te nkiguana ltung'ana le na kata naa keiguanaki ninche nchere eitarruoitie, amu eewuo ninye te nkop nalakua alotu ainining eng'eno e Solomon, netii ene olkitok olang Solomon." 
Matthew12:43 “Te nepuku oloirirua torrono aing'uaa oltung'ani neimaa iwuejitin netoito eing'oru eneyeng'iyeng'are, nelau;" 
Matthew12:44 nejo, ‘Kashukokino enkaji ai natung'uayie’; ore pee elotu nedol ajo mijooni netooroki enkaji neikodi." 
Matthew12:45 Nelo ariku kulikae oiriruani oopishana torrok aalang ninye, nejing aatoni, neaku mbaa eilo tung'ani torrok aalang enkiterunoto; neijia sii etiu te kulo tung'ana le na ishoi torrono.”" 
Matthew12:46 Ore eton eirorie Yesu iltung'ana neitashe ng'otonye o lalashera te boo eyieu neirorie. 
Matthew12:47 Nejoki oltung'ani, “Eitashe ng'utunyi te boo, o lalashera linono, kiyie nikirorie.”" 
Matthew12:48 Newaliki Yesu ilo tung'ani ajoki, “Ae ng'ae yieyio anaa ae loo ng'ae ilalashera laainei?”" 
Matthew12:49 Neutaki te nkaina enye lelo ooiteng'eni lenyena nejoki, “Kulo yieyio o lalashera laainei." 
Matthew12:50 Amu ore oloas enanyor Papa otii keper, ninye olalashe lai o enkanashe ai, o yieyio lai.”" 
Matthew13:1 Nepuku Yesu teina olong ti ang, nelo aton te mbata e naiposha." 
Matthew13:2 Neiturrurrokino iltung'ana kumok, nejing empeut aton, neitashe olorere te mbata e naiposha." 
Matthew13:3 Neirorie ninye too nkitanyaanyukot ajoki, “Etupukuo olaunoni alo aunisho." 
Matthew13:4 Ore eunisho, nedoiki kulikae anterera embata e nkoitoi, nepuonu imotonyi aanya." 
Matthew13:5 Nedoiki kulikae olkarkar loo soito ewueji nemetii enkulupuoni sapuk, nebulu nabo kata, amu metii enkulupuoni sapuk." 
Matthew13:6 Ore pee edalu enkolong nepej, ore te nkaraki nemeeta ntona netoyu." 
Matthew13:7 Nedoiki kulikae atua ilkiku negor ilkiku nkaitubulu. 
Matthew13:8 Nedoiki kulikae enetii enkulupuoni sidai, neiu obo iip neiu likae ntomoni ile, neiu likae tomoni uni.”" 
Matthew13:9 “Oloata nkiyiaa toning'o.” 
Matthew13:10 Nepuonu lkipaareta le Yesu nejoki ninye, “Kaji etiu pee irorie ninche too nkitanyaanyukot?”" 
Matthew13:11 Neng'amaa ajoki, “Te nkaraki naishooki intae entayiolo inkisudorot e nkitoria e keper, kake eitu eishori ninche." 
Matthew13:12 Amu ore oloata naa keishori neponikini ninye enadooyo, ore olemeeta neoruni ninye ina naata." 
Matthew13:13 Te nkaraki ina pee airorie nanu ninche too nkitanyaanyukot amu kedolisho too nkonyek nemedol, nening'isho too nkiyiaa nemening, nemejing'aa." 
Matthew13:14 “Naa te ninche eitabari enaibon e Isaya pee ejo, ‘Ining'ining'i nimining'ung'u hoo pito, ning'oring'oro, nimidolidolo toki," 
Matthew13:15 amu eiroshiutuo iltauja le kulo tung'ana, netiripate inkiyiaa mening, neikeno nkonyek enye, pee medolisho ake too nkonyek enye, nening'ishoyu too nkiyiaa enye, neyiolou ltauja lenye, naaibelekenyakino nanu pee aishiunye ninche.’" 
Matthew13:16 “Kake emayiana inkonyek inyi amu idolishosho, nemayiana nkiyiaa inyi amu ining'ishosho." 
Matthew13:17 Kesipa ajoki intae, kumok iloibonok le Nkai o ltung'ana supati oong'uar apa pee edol kuna baa nidolitata intae, neitu edol, o pee ening kuna baa nining'ining'i intae, neitu ening." 
Matthew13:18 “Entoning naa intae enkitanyaanyukoto o launoni. 
Matthew13:19 Ore pooki tung'ani oning ororei le nkitoria e keper nemejing'aa, nelotu ilo torrono awuapaa inaatuunoki to ltau lenye. Nena etuunoki te mbata e nkoitoi." 
Matthew13:20 Ore inaatuunoki to lkarkar loo soito, na elde oning ororei neng'amaa nabo kata te ng'ida;" 
Matthew13:21 kake meeta intona makewan, kake keton penyo, ore pee epuonu isinaitin anaa olosilisili te nkaraki eilo rorei nerrorro." 
Matthew13:22 Naa ore inaatuunoki tiatua lkiliku, naa ilo oning ororei, neirony isinaitin le na kop, o elejare oo masaa e na kop, negor ororei nemeisho." 
Matthew13:23 Ore nena naatuunoki te nkulupuoni sidai, naa ilo oning ororei nejing'aa naa keiu ilng'anayio, aiu obo iip, neiu likae intomoni ile, neiu likae tomoni uni.”" 
Matthew13:24 Neitoki aliki ae kitanyaanyukoto ajo, “Etiu enkitoria e keper anaa oltung'ani otuuno enkano te nkurma enye." 
Matthew13:25 Kake ore eirura ltung'ana nelotu olmang'atinta aun endiati tiatua enkano, nelo." 
Matthew13:26 Ore pee ebulu enkano, neiu ilng'anayio nebulu sii ninye eriaa." 
Matthew13:27 Nepuo isinkan enetii olopeny enkaji nejoki, ‘Lo kitok, keitu iyie iun enkano te nkurma ino? Kaji eing'uaa eriaa?’" 
Matthew13:28 Nejoki, ‘Olmang'atinta lai oikuna neijia.’ Nejoki isinkan, ‘Iyieu nikipuo aadotu aaiturrurru?’" 
Matthew13:29 Nejoki, ‘Emipuo pee midotunyenye eriaa enkano." 
Matthew13:30 Entapal metubulu pokira are ometaa enkata nadung'i, paa ore enkata enkikesare, najoki iladung'ok entang'as enturrurro eriaa, enteen irridat, entapejoi, ninturrurrokiki enkano olkompe lai.’ ”" 
Matthew13:31 Neitoki Yesu aliki ninche ae kitanyaanyukoto ajo, “Etiu enkitoria e keper enaa enkantererai naji karadali natuuno oltung'ani te nkurma enye." 
Matthew13:32 Naa kiti ninye alang ilanterera pooki, kake ore pee ebulu neaku sapuk alang inkaitubulu ometaa olchani, omeetu imotonyi aapik nkajijik ilng'osil lenyena.”" 
Matthew13:33 Neitoki aliki ninche ae kitanyaanyukoto nejo, “Etiu enkitoria e keper anaa enkaisuishoi natudumua enkitok neitushulaki imboreitin uni e nkurma e nkano ometaba anaa neisuishoyu pooki.”" 
Matthew13:34 Einosaka Yesu olorora mbaa pooki too nkitanyaanyukot, neitu hoo einosaki likae rorei metii enkitanyaanyukoto." 
Matthew13:35 Pee etum atabai enatolimuo oloiboni le Nkai otejo, “Too nkitanyaanyukot abol enkutuk ai, alimu mbaa naaisudoro apa te musano pee eitamanyuni enkop.”" 
Matthew13:36 Neing'uaa Yesu siamon nejing aji, nepuonu lkipaareta lenyena nejoki, “Imbalakinye iyiook enkitanyaanyukoto endiati te nkurma.”" 
Matthew13:37 Neng'amaa ajoki, “Ore oloun ilanterera sidain, naa Enkerai e Tung'ani." 
Matthew13:38 Ore enkurma naa enkop, ore ina antererai sidai naa nkera e ina Kitoria, ore endiati na nkera e ilo torrono." 
Matthew13:39 Ore ilo mang'atinta oun naa Sheitani, ore enkikesare, naa enkiting'oto e nkop, ore ilooikes naa ilmalaika." 
Matthew13:40 Ore anaa enatasotuoki endiati aapejoo te nkima, neijia sii etiu te nkiting'oto e nkop." 
Matthew13:41 Keirriu Enkerai e Tung'ani ilmalaika lenyena, meitayu tiatua enkitoria enye inkitadiaat pooki o loas intorrok." 
Matthew13:42 Nenang'aki ninche olmoti le nkima, neaku enkishirata o eonyoto oo lala." 
Matthew13:43 Ore teina kata newang'u isupati anaa enkolong te nkitoria e Menye. Oloata nkiyiaa naaning'ie, toning'o." 
Matthew13:44 “Etiu enkitoria e keper anaa olchumati oisudoyioki tiatua enkurma, netum oltung'ani neturoo aisudoo, ore te nchipai enye, nelo amir pooki toki naata nelotu ainyiang'u ina kurma." 
Matthew13:45 “Etiu enkitoria e keper anaa oltung'ani omirisho, oing'oru soito oogol enkinyang'a." 
Matthew13:46 Ore pee etum obo, nelo amir intokitin pooki naata, neinyang'u ina." 
Matthew13:47 “Ore ake sii, etiu enkitoria e keper anaa orreshet otanang'akaki atua enaiposha, nejing impukunot pooki oo sinkir." 
Matthew13:48 Ore pee eiput neyietuni embata e naiposha, netoni aagelaki isidain ilbenia, neiturrarri iltorrok." 
Matthew13:49 Neijia etiu te nkiting'oto e nkop. Kepuonu ilmalaika aagelu iltorrok aarishie isupati. 
Matthew13:50 Nenang'akini ninche atua olmoti le nkima, neaku enkishirata o eonyoto oo lala.”" 
Matthew13:51 Neikilikuan Yesu ajoki, “Itoning'utuo nena pooki?” Nejoki ninche, “Ee.”" 
Matthew13:52 Nejoki, “Te nkaraki ina, ore pooki aiteng'enani loo nkitanapat ng'en te nkitoria e keper etiu anaa oltung'ani liopeny enkaji oitayu te nkaji enye nashumishoreki olchumati lenye, ing'ejuko o musan.”" 
Matthew13:53 Ore pee eidip Yesu atolimu kuna kitanyaanyukot nelo. 
Matthew13:54 Ore pee ebaya enkang enye, neiteng'enisho te nkaji e ntumo, neing'asia iltung'ana oleng, nejo, “Kaji enotie ele tung'ani eng'eno o enkidimata naasie kuna naas e nking'asia?" 
Matthew13:55 Ae mme ele doi olayioni lo laguetani? Neji ng'otonye Mariamu? Ae emeji lalashera lenyena Yakobo o Yosef o Simon o Yuda? 
Matthew13:56 Ae metii sii nkanashera enyena pooki atua iyiook? Kaji enotie ele tung'ani kuna baa pooki?” 
Matthew13:57 Neaku etanyaita ninche ninye, kake etiaaka Yesu ninche, “meishori oloiboni le Nkai enkanyit te nkop enye aashu te nkaji enye.”" 
Matthew13:58 Neitu eas Yesu inenking'asia kumok teine te nkaraki enkirukoto nemeeta ninche. 
Matthew14:1 Ore ina kata nening'oo olaiguanani Herode olning'o le Yesu 
Matthew14:2 nejoki sinkan lenyena, “Yohana Olaibatisani taa ele otopiwuo aing'uaa lootuata, paa ina magilanisho naasisho tiatua ninye.”" 
Matthew14:3 Amu eibung'a apa Herode Yohana aen apik jila te nkaraki e Herodias enkitok e Filipo olalashe lenye. 
Matthew14:4 Amu etiaaka Yohana, “Mikinchoro too nkitanapat ti niaata ninye.”" 
Matthew14:5 Ore pee eyieu near Yohana metua, neureyu olorere amu kejo pooki oloiboni le Nkai Yohana." 
Matthew14:6 Ore pee ebau enkolong e inoto e Herode, neranyisho entito e Herodias te mpolos o lorere, neitiship Herode." 
Matthew14:7 Nenya Herode olmumai nchere, ore entoki pooki naomon ninye, neisho." 
Matthew14:8 Neiguan ng'otonye, nejoki tiaaki, “Inchooki tena beshen elukunya e Yohana Olaibatisani.”" 
Matthew14:9 Neisinanuo Olaiguanani, kake ore te nkaraki ilmuma lenyena o lelo ooboitare neitanapisho meishori." 
Matthew14:10 Neirriwaa oltung'ani meshomo adung'u elukunya e Yohana te jila. 
Matthew14:11 Neyauni elukunya enye te mbeshen neishori entito, neyaki ina tito ng'otonye." 
Matthew14:12 Nepuo lkipaareta le Yohana aaya osesen aanukaa, nepuo aainosaki Yesu." 
Matthew14:13 Ore pee ening Yesu lelo omon, neinyototo ajing empeut alo ewueji neliyio, ore pee ening olorere, nesuj too nkejek eing'uaa nkang'itie enye." 
Matthew14:14 Ore pee edou Yesu te mpeut, nedol olorere kumok, neing'urrie neishiunye iltamuoyia lenye." 
Matthew14:15 Ore pee eaku teipa, nepuo lkipaareta lenyena enetii nejoki, “Ore ene nikitii naa ewueji neliyio, netaa teipa tiaaki olorere meshomo kuna ang'itie pee epuo aainyiang'aki ate endaa.”" 
Matthew14:16 Nejoki Yesu, “Meeta tipat napuoyie, enchoo intae endaa.”" 
Matthew14:17 Nejoki lkipaareta, “Mikiaata iyiook toki neme mukateni miet o sinkir aare.”" 
Matthew14:18 Nejoki, “Eyakaki.”" 
Matthew14:19 Nejoki olorere metotona too nkujit, nedumu nena mukateni imiet o sinkir aare, neing'or shumata, nemayian, negil nena mukateni, neisho lkipaareta lenyena, neisho lkipaareta lenyena olorere." 
Matthew14:20 Nenya pooki neraposho, nesotuni naatelekutua nkikapuni tomon o aare, naabore." 
Matthew14:21 Ore ilooinosa naa inkalifuni imiet ilewa metii nkituaak o nkera. 
Matthew14:22 Neitanap Yesu ina kata lkipaareta lenyena meituruko aapuo te mpeut lido kekun ometaba anaa neitanapare olorere. 
Matthew14:23 Ore pee eidip aitanapare olorere, neilepaki oldoinyo alo aomon; ore pee eaku teipa neaku ninye ake openy." 
Matthew14:24 Netalama empeut enkop natoyio, eyukito lopir le nkare amu kenang'are osiwuo." 
Matthew14:25 Ore pee enyiku enkakenya, nelotu Yesu enetii ninche elo too nkejek ti oriong enkare." 
Matthew14:26 Ore pee edol lkipaareta lenyena eloito too nkejek ti oriong enkare neureishoyu nejo, “Oloip doi!” Nebuak aaishir te nkuretisho." 
Matthew14:27 Neirorie taa Yesu nejoki, “Entagoluoto, Nanu doi! Emiureisho.”" 
Matthew14:28 Newaliki Petero ajoki, “Lo Kitok, te naa eiyie, tiaakaki maeu enitii too nkejek ti oriong enkare.”" 
Matthew14:29 Nejoki, “Wou.” Nedou Petero te mpeut nelo too nkejek ti oriong enkare enetii Yesu." 
Matthew14:30 Ore pee edol osiwuo neureishoyu neiteru aimis, nebuak to ltoilo sapuk ajo, “Lo Kitok, tasaruaki!”" 
Matthew14:31 Neitorioo Yesu enkaina nabo kata aibung nejoki, “Oi iyie oloti enkirukoto, aainyo pee inyaaka aing'ash?”" 
Matthew14:32 Ore pee eilepaki, empeut, negira osiwuo." 
Matthew14:33 Ore ilo otii ina peut neserem ninye nejoki, “Esipa ira iyie Enkerai e Nkai.”" 
Matthew14:34 Ore pee eidip aatalang, nebaiki enkop e Genesaret." 
Matthew14:35 Ore pee eyiolou iltung'ana le ina kop ninye neirriwaa ilkiliku ilubot pooki eilo kirine neyakini ltamuoyia. 
Matthew14:36 Nesai meiseyie olcholoi lo lkila lenye, ore ilooiseyie pooki neishiu." 
Matthew15:1 Nepuonu Ilfarisayo oo laiteng'enak loo nkitanapat ooing'uaa Yerusalem enetii Yesu ejo," 
Matthew15:2 “Kainyoo pee einyal lkipaareta linono inkoon oo lpayiani? Amu kenya endaa meisuja inkaik.” 
Matthew15:3 Newaliki Yesu ajoki ninche, “Kainyoo pee inyalinyala intae inkitanapat e Nkai te nkaraki nena koon inyi?" 
Matthew15:4 Amu etejo Enkai, ‘Iyanyita minyi o ng'utunyi; ore oloitarriki menye aashu ng'otonye, inchoo metua.’" 
Matthew15:5 Kake ijojo intae, ore oltung'ani ojoki menye anaa ng'otonye inchere, ‘Ore toki naata naaretie iyie etaa enaisho Enkai to lasar,’ neaku meyanyit menye aashu ng'otonye." 
Matthew15:6 Ore te nkaraki nkoon inyi niwuang'ieng'ie nkitanapat e Nkai. 
Matthew15:7 Lo sunkuro, enotoko Isaya te naibon enye pee ejo," 
Matthew15:8 ‘Kayanyit ele orere too nkutukie, kake kaalakuaniki iltauja lenye;" 
Matthew15:9 naa pesho aaserem ninche nanu, aa nkitanapat oo ltung'ana eitudupaa anaa ae ninche enkiteng'enare nasipa.’ ”" 
Matthew15:10 Neipotu iltung'ana nejoki, “Enining'o niyiolouu." 
Matthew15:11 Mme entoki naim enkutuk naidurukie oltung'ani, kake enapuku te nkutuk naidurukie oltung'ani.”" 
Matthew15:12 Nepuonu lkipaareta lenyena nejoki, “Itayioloito aajo etirikate Ilfarisayo pee ening ilo rorei?”" 
Matthew15:13 Newaliki Yesu ajoki ninche, “Ore pooki aitubului neme Papa le keper otuuno kedotuni." 
Matthew15:14 Entapal ilarikok modook loo lmodook. Naa te nerik olmodooni olikae modooni nesulakino pokira aare engumoto.” 
Matthew15:15 Newaliki Petero ajoki, “Imbalakinye iyiook ena kitanyaanyukoto.” Nejoki Yesu," 
Matthew15:16 “Keton ake sii mejing'aa intae? 
Matthew15:17 Aimiyiololo aajo ore pooki toki najing enkutuk o ltung'ani, enkoshoke elo neipang?" 
Matthew15:18 Kake ore enapuku te nkutuk, oltau eing'uaa; naa ninye naisarkionie oltung'ani;" 
Matthew15:19 amu oltau epukunye indamunot torrok, enkitayunoto oo loikop, eloloito, enkiborra oo nkonyek, enkiteenikinoto o emorore." 
Matthew15:20 Kuna naaisarkionie oltung'ani, kake te nedaa meisuja inkaik, nemeisarkionie oltung'ani.”" 
Matthew15:21 Nelo Yesu teine aito enkalo o lkerenket le Tiro o Sidon. 
Matthew15:22 Nelotu enkitok e Kanaan naing'uaa ina kop neishiraki ajoki, “Lo Kitok, ng'urrieki, ara Daudi, eitanyamalita enkerai ai oloirirua.”" 
Matthew15:23 Kake eitu hoo eng'amaa Yesu. Nepuonu lkipaareta lenyena aasai aajoki, “Inchoo ena kitok elo amu, kesujita iyiook eishirita.”" 
Matthew15:24 Newaliki ajoki, “Ntare kiminat ake e nkaji e Siraeli aairriwakaki.”" 
Matthew15:25 Nelotu ina kitok neserem nejoki, “Lo Kitok, taretuoki.”" 
Matthew15:26 Newaliki ajoki, “Meishiaakino te nenang'akini ildiein endaa oo nkera.”" 
Matthew15:27 Nejoki, “Kedede, Lo Kitok; kake kenya sii ildiein inaadoyio te misa oo lkituaak lenye.”" 
Matthew15:28 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Na kitok, aisapuk enkirukoto ino, metotiwuo te iyie anaa ina niyieu;” neishiu entito enye teina kata." 
Matthew15:29 Nelo Yesu teine ashep enaiposha e Galilaya; neilepaki oldoinyo neton teine. 
Matthew15:30 Neyiaya olorere kumok, erikito iltung'ana ng'ojiniaa o lmodook o lemeiro, o lmaiman, o lkulikae kumok neirragie too nkejek enyena, neishiunye pooki," 
Matthew15:31 ometaba anaa neing'asia iltung'ana pee edol eiroro ilemeiro, neishiu ilmaiman, nepuo iltung'ana ng'ojiniaa, nedolishoyu ilmodook, neisis Enkai oo Siraeli." 
Matthew15:32 Neipot Yesu lkipaareta lenyena meetu enetii nejoki, “Kaing'urrie iltung'ana amu, nkolong'i uni taata aaboitare nemeeta entoki nanya, nemayieu naisho meshomo eeta esumash, meiterriaa te nkoitoi.”" 
Matthew15:33 Nejoki lkipaareta lenyena, “Kaji kitumie tena ong'ata imukateni naaraposh ena siamo kitok naba inji?”" 
Matthew15:34 Nejoki Yesu, “Kaja mukateni niaatata?” Nejoki, “Naapishana o lkuti sinkir kutiti.”" 
Matthew15:35 Neitanap iltung'ana metotona te nkop; 
Matthew15:36 nedumu nena mukateni naapishana o lelo sinkir, ore pee eisho Enkai enashe, nebelibel neisho lkipaareta lenyena pee eisho lkipaareta iltung'ana." 
Matthew15:37 Nenya pooki neraposho neiturrur mbelat naatelekuaki naaiputa nkikapuni naapishana. 
Matthew15:38 Ore ilooinosa nera ilewa nkalifuni ong'uan, metii inkituaak o nkera." 
Matthew15:39 Neisho esiamo meshomo nejing ninye empeut nelo enkop e Magadani. 
Matthew16:1 Nepuonu Ilfarisayo o Sadukayo enetii Yesu aatem eyieu neitodol olmonekie ooing'uaa keper. 
Matthew16:2 Newaliki ajoki, “Ore te nteipa nijojo, ‘Mesha ade taata amu kenyokie shumata.’" 
Matthew16:3 Nijojo tadekenya, ‘Keidis ade taata amu kenyokie shumata netunukua.’ Indimidimi intae aatumusu ilmonek le shumata kake mindimidimi aaibalie ilmonek le kuna katitin." 
Matthew16:4 Keing'oru kulo tung'ana torrok lena kata olmonekie kake meishori likae leme olapa le Yona.” Nelo aing'uaa ninche. 
Matthew16:5 Ore pee epuo lkipaareta lido kekun, nerikino eitu eya imukateni." 
Matthew16:6 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Entorrip ate te nkisuisho oo Lfarisayo o Sadukayo.”" 
Matthew16:7 Nejokino maate, “Te nkaraki neitu kiyau mukateni.”" 
Matthew16:8 Neyiolou Yesu ilo rorei nejo, “Oi intae ilooti enkirukoto, kainyoo pee ijokinono maate mukateni miaatata?" 
Matthew16:9 Keitu ejing'aa intae? Aimidamumu mukateni imiet naainosa iltung'ana nkalifuni imiet, kaja nkikapuni ninturrurrutuo?" 
Matthew16:10 Aashu mukateni naapishana naainosa inkalifuni ong'uan oo ltung'ana, kaja nkikapuni ninturrurrutuo?" 
Matthew16:11 Kainyoo pee mejing'aa intae nchere mme mukateni aimaka? Kake entorrip ate te nkisuisho oo Lfarisayo o Sadukayo.” 
Matthew16:12 Nejing'aa teina kata inchere, mme enkisuisho oo mukateni eimaka kake inenkiteng'enare oo Lfarisayo o Sadukayo." 
Matthew16:13 Ore pee elo Yesu enkalo e Kaisari e Filipi neikilikuan lkipaareta lenyena aajoki, “Kejo iltung'ana ae ng'ae Enkerai e Tung'ani?”" 
Matthew16:14 Nejoki, “Kejo kulikae Yohana Olaibatisani; nejo kulikae Eliya; nejo kulikae Yeremia, anaa obo loo loibonok le Nkai.”" 
Matthew16:15 Nejoki, “Paa aijojo intae kara nanu ng'ae?”" 
Matthew16:16 Newaliki Simon Petero ajoki, “Ira Iyie Kristo, Enkerai e Nkai naishu.”" 
Matthew16:17 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Imayiana Simon ara Yona, amu eitu kiboloki ena entoki naata osesen o sarge, kake Papa lai otii keper." 
Matthew16:18 Naajoki nanu iyie, ira Petero naa te nchumata ele soit ashet enkanisa ai; nemegilu aekata ltimito le nemeneng'a." 
Matthew16:19 Naa kaaisho iyie ilboleta le nkitoria e keper ore eniyiooki aen te nkop, neaku eidipaki aateen te keper; ore enilak te nkop eidipaki aatalak te keper.”" 
Matthew16:20 Neitanap lkipaareta lenyena pee meliki oltung'ani nchere ninye Kristo. 
Matthew16:21 Neiteru Yesu teina kata aibalakinye lkipaareta lenyena inchere meeta kata nemelo Yerusalem meisilisili too mbaa kumok ilpayiani o lapolosak kituaak, o laiteng'enak loo nkitanapat neari metua, neitopiuni te nkolong e uni." 
Matthew16:22 Nerik Petero Yesu enkilepata nekurraki ajoki, “Mikintapaasha Enkai, Lo Kitok, mikitalama nena.”" 
Matthew16:23 Neibelekenyakino Petero ajoki, “Shomo te siadi nanu Sheitani, amu aikirror; amu mme imbaa e Nkai idamu kake noo ltung'ana.”" 
Matthew16:24 Nejoki Yesu teina kata lkipaareta lenyena, “Ore pooki tung'ani oyieu naasuj inchoo eany kewan nenap osalaba lenye naasuj." 
Matthew16:25 Amu ore pooki tung'ani ojo aitajeu enkishui enye neiminie, ore pooki oiturraa enkishui enye te nkaraki nanu, neitoki atum." 
Matthew16:26 Amu kaa dupoto etum oltung'ani te netum enkop pooki, neiturraa enkishui enye?" 
Matthew16:27 Amu kelotu Enkerai e Tung'ani te nkitoo e Menye te nebo o lmalaika lenyena; nelaaki pooki tung'ani teina kata aitorisioki inaataasa. 
Matthew16:28 Kesipa ajoki intae, Ketii kulikae ooitashe te ne, lemeishamisham keeya katukul ometaba anaa nedol Enkerai e Tung'ani elotu te nkitoria enye.”" 
Matthew17:1 Ore pee elusoo inkolong'i ile, nerik Yesu Petero o Yakobo o lalashe lenye Yohana ailepie ninche oopeny shumata oldoinyo oado." 
Matthew17:2 Neibelekenya empukunoto e Yesu newang'u enkomom enye anaa enkolong, neiborru inkilani enyena aatiu anaa ewang'an." 
Matthew17:3 Neipang'aki Musa o Eliya aairorie ninye. 
Matthew17:4 Neirorie Petero Yesu nejoki, “Lo Kitok, ai sidai kitii ene, naa te naa iyieu naitobir ilng'oborri okuni, olino obo o le Musa o le Eliya.”" 
Matthew17:5 Ore eton eirorita, neitushur enkatampoi nawang; neningi oltoilo teina atampoi ojo, “Enkerai ai ena nanyor, natishipe te ninye. Entoning ninye.”" 
Matthew17:6 Ore pee ening lkipaareta lenyena neirut oleng nebatata aairrabalakino enkop. 
Matthew17:7 Nelotu Yesu neiseyie nejoki, “Enyoito emirut.”" 
Matthew17:8 Nejo mataraposhu nkonyek, neitu edol likae tung'ani Yesu ake openy." 
Matthew17:9 Ore edou ninche to ldoinyo neitanap Yesu ajoki, “Emiliki oltung'ani nena nitoduaa ometaba anaa nepiu Enkerai e Tung'ani aing'uaa ilootuata.”" 
Matthew17:10 Neikilikuan lkipaareta lenyena aajoki, “Kainyoo naa pee ejo ilaiteng'enak loo nkitanapat eji keng'as Eliya alotu?”" 
Matthew17:11 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Kesipa eng'as Eliya alotu neitobir imbaa pooki." 
Matthew17:12 Kake ajoki intae, eidipa Eliya aeu, neitu eyiolou ninche ninye, kake eitaasa pooki ninye naayieu. Neijia sii etiu Enkerai e Tung'ani, keisilisil ninche.”" 
Matthew17:13 Neyiolou taa teina kata lkipaareta aajo Yohana Olaibatisani eimaka. 
Matthew17:14 Ore pee ebaya enetii iltung'ana nelotu oltung'ani obo agilaki kung nejoki," 
Matthew17:15 “Lo Kitok, ing'urrie enkerai ai amu keeta enkiterria neisilisilo oleng amu katitin kumok eurokino enkima nesulakino enkare." 
Matthew17:16 Natorikoko lkipaareta linono, netalaikinote aaishiunye.”" 
Matthew17:17 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Oi intae iltung'ana lena ishoi lemeeta enkirukoto, ootapong'ori, kaboitare intae o anu? Kang'iri te intae o anu? Entorikokoki.”" 
Matthew17:18 Neisikong Yesu oloirirua, nepuku oloirirua aing'uaa neishiu enkayioni teina kata." 
Matthew17:19 Nepuo ina kata lkipaareta enetii Yesu oopeny nejoki, “Kainyoo pee kitalakinote iyiook aataarai?”" 
Matthew17:20 Nejoki, “Te nkaraki naa kiti enkirukoto inyi, amu kesipa ajoki intae, ti niaatata enkirukoto naba anaa ene kantererai naji karadali, naa indimidimi aatiaaki ele doinyo ‘Tadotunye te ne, shomo idie;’ nedotunye; nemetii embae nemeidimayu te intae." 
Matthew17:21 Kake mepuku eneeijo ena mme te nkomono o te mpukoroto.” 
Matthew17:22 Ore eiturrurro te Galilaya nejoki Yesu lkipaareta, “Etaa kepiki Enkerai e Tung'ani nkaik oo ltung'ana;" 
Matthew17:23 near ninche ninye metua, ore te nkolong e uni neitopiuni.” Neisinanuo lkipaareta oleng." 
Matthew17:24 Ore pee epuonu Kapernaum, nepuo iloosotu olpisiai le shekeli e kodi enetii Petero nejoki, “Aimelak Olaiteng'enani linyi shekeli e kodi?”" 
Matthew17:25 Nejo, “Kelak.” Ore pee ejing aji nemurutoki Yesu aikilikuan ajoki, “Ijo aa Simon? Ai ng'ae eitalak ilkituaak le na kop kodi oo masaa aashu enoo ltung'ana, ai nkera enye ana ineeiking'a.”" 
Matthew17:26 Ore pee ejo Petero, “Ineeiking'a.” Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Neijia etiu, metii nkera enye esiana." 
Matthew17:27 Kake ore pee mikintagor, shomo iyie enaiposha tanang'aki orreshet nintayu osinkirri ling'as aibung; nibol enkutuk, nitum shekeli, niya aitainye kodi ai o enino.”" 
Matthew18:1 Nepuonu ina kata lkipaareta enetii Yesu nejoki, “Kaing'ae olkitok te nkitoria e keper?”" 
Matthew18:2 Neipot enkerai neitasheyie te mpolos enye. 
Matthew18:3 Nejo, “Kesipa ajoki intae, te neitu imbelekenyanya aatiu anaa inkera kutiti, nimijing'ijing'i katukul enkitoria e keper." 
Matthew18:4 Ore pooki oitadou kewan anaa ena kerai, ninye olkitok aisul te nkitoria e keper." 
Matthew18:5 Ore pooki ng'ae ong'amu enkerai naba anaa ena te nkarna ai, naa nanu etang'amua." 
Matthew18:6 “Kake ore oloitapong'oo nabo kiti te kuna naairuk nanu metaasa ing'ok, keishiaakino neenikini osoit oituutishoreki emurt nenang'akini olmegut le naiposha." 
Matthew18:7 Oi enkop te nkaraki mbaa naayau empong'oroto, amu meeta nchere pee mepuonu mbaa e nkitapong'oroto. Kake ee kake ayia te ilo laa ninye eimu empong'oroto." 
Matthew18:8 “Ti nikintapong'oo enkaina ino aashu enkeju ino, tudung'oi nturrai amu enaikash te nijing enkishui miata enkaina aashu enkeju alang ti niata inkaik are o nkejek are, nikinang'akini enkima oo ntarasi." 
Matthew18:9 Naa ti nikintapong'oo enkong'u ino, tukurtu nturrai amu enaikash ti nijing enkishui iata enkong'u nabo alang ti nikinang'akini enkima e Yehanam iata nkonyek pokira are." 
Matthew18:10 “Eng'ura emimenaa nabo e kuna kutiti; amu ajoki intae ore te keper, eing'orita oshi ake ilmalaika lenye enkomom e Papa lai otii keper." 
Matthew18:11 [Amu eewuo Enkerai e Tung'ani pee eitajeu inaaimina]. 
Matthew18:12 “Aijojo aa intae? Amaa te neeta oltung'ani nkerra iip nabo, aimeing'uaa kunda ntomoni naaudo o naaudo too ldoinyo nelo aing'oru ina naimina?" 
Matthew18:13 Ore pee etum, Kesipa ajoki intae, keshipakino oleng ina alang nena ntomoni naaudo o naaudo neitu eimin." 
Matthew18:14 Neijia sii etiu mme eyieunoto e Papa linyi otii Keper, pee eimin nabo e kuna kutiti." 
Matthew18:15 “Ti nikinyal olalashe lino, shomo toliki enikinyalie aa intae ake pokira aare; naa ti nikining, itoning'ote o olalashe lino." 
Matthew18:16 Naa te neitu kining, torikoki likae tung'ani obo aashu aare, pee esipuni pooki bae too nkutukie oo lchakenini oaare aashu okuni." 
Matthew18:17 Naa te neany ening ninche toliki kanisa; naa te neitu ening sii kanisa, inchoo etiu te iyie anaa oloo loreren lemeiruk, anaa olosotu kodi." 
Matthew18:18 “Kesipa ajoki intae, ore pooki niyeniyene te nkop, neeni te keper; ore pooki nitalaa te nkop, nelaki sii te keper." 
Matthew18:19 “Kesipa aitoki ajoki intae, te nining'okinono oaare linyi embae ake pooki te nkop niomonunu, naa keitaas intae Papa lai otii keper" 
Matthew18:20 Amu ore enetumore oaare anaa okuni te nkarna ai, natii nanu ine atua ninche.”" 
Matthew18:21 Nelotu Petero teina kata nejoki Yesu, “Lo Kitok, ae katitin aja aainyal olalashe lai, napalaki? Kemetabaiki katitin naapishana?”" 
Matthew18:22 Nejoki Yesu, “Maajoki metabaiki katitin naapishana, kake metabaiki ntomoni naapishana katitin naapishana." 
Matthew18:23 Ore te nkaraki ina, etiu enkitoria e keper anaa olaiguanani otayiewua neikenisho te nebo isinkan lenyena." 
Matthew18:24 Ore pee eiteru aikenisho nerikokini oltung'ani obo oata esile enye intalantani nkalifuni tomon. 
Matthew18:25 Ore pee elau entoki nalakie, neitanapisho olkitok lenye metimiri ninye o enkitok enye o nkera enyena o ntokitin pooki naata, aalakie ina sile." 
Matthew18:26 Nebatata ilo sinka too nkejek enyena nesai nejoki, ‘Lo Kitok, ting'iriakaki ometaba anaa naalaaki pooki.’" 
Matthew18:27 Neing'urrie olkitok ilo sinka nelaku nepalaki ina sile pooki. 
Matthew18:28 “Ore pee eipung ilo sinka nedol likae sinka oboita te siaai oata esile enye dinari iip nabo; neibung olgos agor nejoki, ‘Talaakaki esile ai pooki.’" 
Matthew18:29 Nebatata ilo sinka oboita te siaai too nkejek enyena nesai ejo, ‘Ting'iriakaki ometaba anaa naalaaki pooki.’" 
Matthew18:30 Neany nerik apik jila ometaba anaa nelak esile pooki. 
Matthew18:31 Ore pee edol ilkulikae ooboitare te siaai ena bae, neisinanuo oleng nepuo aaliki olkitok lenye inaataasate pooki." 
Matthew18:32 Neipot olkitok ilo sinka nejoki, ‘Lo sinka arruoni, kaatapalaka idia sile pooki te nkaraki nikitasayia:" 
Matthew18:33 paa aimeishiaakino sii iyie ning'urrie osinka liboitare te siaai anaa enaaing'urrie nanu iyie?’ 
Matthew18:34 Negoro olkitok nepik inkaik oo looitameisho ometaba anaa nelak esile enye pooki. 
Matthew18:35 “Neijia sii eiko intae Papa lai otii keper ti nimipalakiki too ltauja pooki tung'ani olalashe lenye.” 
Matthew19:1 Ore pee eidip Yesu atejo kuna baa neing'uaa Galilaya nelotu enkop e Yudea te lido kekun lo lkeju le Yordan; 
Matthew19:2 nesuj ninye iltung'ana kumok; neishiunye ninche teine. 
Matthew19:3 Nepuonu Ilfarisayo enetii aatem aajoki, “Keishiaakino te neorore olee enkitok enye te pooki bae?”" 
Matthew19:4 Newaliki ajoki, “Keitu isumusumu aajo ore oloitobira ninche te nkiterunoto, eitobira olee o eng'oruoi?" 
Matthew19:5 Nejo ninye te nkaraki ena eing'uaa olee menye o ng'otonye neibung'are enkitok enye, neaku ninche pokira osesen obo?" 
Matthew19:6 Metaa meekure aa are, kake osesen obo. Ore enaitutumo, Enkai, mincho erish oltung'ani.”" 
Matthew19:7 Nejoki Ilfarisayo ninye, “Kainyoo naa pee eitanapishe Musa meishori empalai e oro, neing'uaro?”" 
Matthew19:8 Nejoki Yesu, “Eishoo Musa intae entoorore inkituaak inyi te nkaraki engolon oo ltauja linyi, kake mme neijia apa etiu te nkiterunoto." 
Matthew19:9 Ajoki nanu intae, ore pooki ng'ae oorore enkitok enye neme te nkaraki eloloito neyam ae, netololoite, ore oloyam enda natoororeki naa keloloito.”" 
Matthew19:10 Nejoki lkipaareta ninye, “Te naa inji naa etiu, embae o lmoruo o enkitok enye, meeta tipat enkiyama.”" 
Matthew19:11 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Mme pooki ooidim aatang'amai ele rorei, kake lelo ake ooishoro." 
Matthew19:12 Amu etii ilooini aa sunashi too nkoishuaa oo noo ng'otonye, netii iloogelem iltung'ana, netii ilooitaa ate sunashi te nkaraki enkitoria e keper. Ore ilo oidim atang'amu ena, inchoo eng'amu.”" 
Matthew19:13 Neyakini Yesu inkera kutiti pee eiteleiki nkaik enyena, neomonoki. Neisikong lkipaareta lenyena ilooyautua." 
Matthew19:14 Nejoki Yesu, “Entapal inkera kutiti emimitiki epuonu enatii, emimitiki amu enoo naatiu anaa kuna enkitoria e keper.”" 
Matthew19:15 Neiteleiki ninche inkaik enyena nelo teine. 
Matthew19:16 Nelotu oltung'ani nejoki, “Olaiteng'enani, kaa bae naikishiaan aas pee atum enkishui nemeish?”" 
Matthew19:17 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Kainyoo pee kinkilikuan nanu inenkishiaa? Obo ake eetai aa supat; te naa iyieu nijing atua enkishui, imbung'a inkitanapat.”" 
Matthew19:18 Nejoki, “Akua?” Nejoki Yesu, “Kuna, miar metua, miloloito, mipurrisho, minchakenoki elejare." 
Matthew19:19 Iyanyita minyi o ng'utunyi, tonyorra ole latia ino anaa kewan.”" 
Matthew19:20 Nejoki ilo barnoti ninye, “Aidipa aibung'a nena pooki: kainyoo ae naatong'orikia?”" 
Matthew19:21 Nejoki Yesu, “Te naa iyieu niaku bayaroti, shomo timira masaa pooki niaata, inchoo ilaisinak, neaku iata olchumati te keper, nikilotu asuj.”" 
Matthew19:22 Ore pee ening ilo barnoti ilo rorei, nelo eisinanuo amu eeta masaa kumok." 
Matthew19:23 Nejoki Yesu lkipaareta lenyena, “Esipa ajoki intae nchere kegol pee ejing olkarsis enkitoria e keper." 
Matthew19:24 Naitoki ajoki intae, kelelek te ntames eim enaudoto o ltidu alang olkarsis ejing enkitoria e Nkai.”" 
Matthew19:25 Ore pee ening lkipaareta lenyena neing'asia oleng nejo, “Aing'ae naa oidim atajeu?”" 
Matthew19:26 Nekurraki Yesu nkonyek nejoki ninche, “Meidimayu ina too ltung'ana, kake eidimayu pooki te Nkai.”" 
Matthew19:27 Newaliki Petero teina kata ajoki, “Ng'ura ajo kitung'aitie iyiook pooki toki, nikisuj iyie, kainyoo naa kenya kitum?”" 
Matthew19:28 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Kesipa ajoki intae, ore intae likitusuja nanu, ore te nkop ng'ejuk te neton kenya Enkerai e Tung'ani to lorika le nkitoo enye, ore intae likitusuja nanu nitonini sii intae too lorikan tomon o aare aaiguanare lelo oshon tomon o aare loo Siraeli." 
Matthew19:29 Naa ore pooki ng'ae otung'uayie inkajijik, anaa lalashera, anaa nkanashera, anaa menye anaa ng'otonye, anaa nkera, anaa nkurman te nkaraki enkarna ai naa ketum ninche inaalus o enkishui nemeish." 
Matthew19:30 Kake keaku ilkumok le dukuya ile siadi, neaku ile siadi ile dukuya." 
Matthew20:1 “Amu etiu enkitoria e keper anaa oltung'ani liopeny enkang otayoo enasirie alo aing'oru iltung'ana ootur enkurma enye oo Ing'anayio. 
Matthew20:2 Ore pee eidip atoning'ore ilaisiaayiak pee elaaki dinari te nkolong, nerik enkurma enye oo sabibu." 
Matthew20:3 Neitoki alo saa uni, netum kulikae eitashoo te nemirishoreki meeta esiaai," 
Matthew20:4 nejoki sii lelo, ‘Enchom sii intae enkurma oo sabibu naisho intae entoki nairirikino.’ Nepuo." 
Matthew20:5 Neitoki ake alo etaa saa ile, o saa naaudo, neiko ake neijia." 
Matthew20:6 Ore saa tomon o obo, nelo netum kulikae ooitashoo nejoki, ‘Kainyoo pee intasheshe intae te ne endama pooki, miatata esiaai?’" 
Matthew20:7 Nejoki ninche ninye, ‘Amu eitu kitum oltung'ani oishoo iyiook esiaai.’ Nejoki, ‘Enchom sii intae enkurma oo sabibu.’" 
Matthew20:8 “Ore pee eaku teipa nejoki olopeny enkurma oo lng'anayio olaitasheikinoni lenye, ‘Impoto laisiaayiak, inchoo olekoisiayio, tang'asu to lobayie o mpung'ie to loiturukuo.’" 
Matthew20:9 Ore pee epuonu laduoo ooiterutua saa tomon oo obo netum ake pooki tung'ani dinari. 
Matthew20:10 Nepuonu ile dukuya ejo ketum ninche nkumok, netum sii ninche pooki tung'ani dinari." 
Matthew20:11 Ore pee eidip ninche aatang'amu neing'unyung'unyaki ilo openy enkang. 
Matthew20:12 Nejo, ‘Ore kulo ooisiadutua esaa nabo ake etaasishote, nintorisioko iyiook ooting'iria te esiaai nagol enkolong pooki.’" 
Matthew20:13 “Newaliki obo lenye ajoki, ‘Olchore eitu nanu aainyal. Keitu duoo kining'okino o iyie dinari?" 
Matthew20:14 Imbung'a enino shomo. Amu atonyorrayie aisho ele oisiadua anaa enaaisho iyie. 
Matthew20:15 Aimaaishiaakino te naas anaa enayieu too naainei? Ana keiba enkong'u ino te nkaraki naleng nanu?’ 
Matthew20:16 “Neijia etiu, keaku ile siadi ile dukuya, neaku ile dukuya ile siadi.”"
