Matthew20:17 Ore pee eaku keilep Yesu alo Yerusalem nerik lelo ooiteng'eni lenyena tomon o aare enkilepata te nkoitoi, nejoki," 
Matthew20:18 “Kilepita aapuo Yerusalem, naa kepiki Enkerai e Tung'ani nkaik oo lapolosak o laiteng'enak loo nkitanapat neiguanare ninye enkiguana e keeya." 
Matthew20:19 Neisho iloreren metusurdaanya,, near too nkeenta, neshei neitopiuni te nkolong e uni.”" 
Matthew20:20 Nelotu ng'otonye layiok le Sebedayo enetii Yesu eboitare ilayiok lenyena pokira aare neserem eeta enaomonu. 
Matthew20:21 Neikilikuan Yesu ajoki, “Kainyoo iyieuu?” Nejoki, “Intanapisho metotona kulo ayiok laainei pokira aare obo te nkaina ino e tatene, neton olikae te nkaina e kedianye te nkitoria ino.”" 
Matthew20:22 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Miyiololo eniomonunu, aa ndimidimi aatook enkikompe naok nanu?” Nejoki, “Ee kindim.”" 
Matthew20:23 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Ee kesipa iokioko enkikombe ai kake ore entonata te nkaina ai e tatene ana te ne kedianye, mme nanu oishoru, kake eaku ene lelo ooitobiraka Papa lai.”" 
Matthew20:24 Ore pee ening kuldo tomon ina, negorokino lelo alashera pokira aare." 
Matthew20:25 Neipot Yesu ajoki, “Iyiololo aajo, ore Ilaitoriak loo Loreren eitaa ate kituaak, neitoreisho te ngolon." 
Matthew20:26 Ore te intae metiu neijia; kake ore pooki tung'ani te intae oyieu neaku kitok; inchoo eaku olaisiaayiani linyi," 
Matthew20:27 ore oloyieu neaku ole dukuya te intae neaku osinka linyi; 
Matthew20:28 anaa eneitu elotu Enkerai e Tung'ani meisiaai kake eewuo aisiaaisho neitayu enkishui enye metaa elakunoto oo lkumok.” 
Matthew20:29 Ore epuo aaing'uaa Yeriko nesuj olorora kitok. 
Matthew20:30 Naa ng'ura, Netii ltung'ana aare modook ootoni te mbata e nkoitoi, ore pee ening inchere Yesu ilo oimita ine nebuak aajo, “Lo Kitok ara Daudi, ing'urrie iyiook!”" 
Matthew20:31 Neisikong olorere ninche aaitigir, kake enyaakita aaitulusoo aabuak aajo, “Lo Kitok ara Daudi, ing'urrie iyiook!”" 
Matthew20:32 Neitashe Yesu neipot ninche nejoki, “Kaa iyieuu naitaas intae?”" 
Matthew20:33 Nejoki ninche ninye, “Lo Kitok, pee eboli iyiook inkonyek.”" 
Matthew20:34 Neing'urrie Yesu ninche neiseyie inkonyek enye; nedolishoyu ninche teina kata nesuj ninye. 
Matthew21:1 Ore pee enyikaki Yerusalem nebaiki Betfage to Ldoinyo loo Loirienito neirriwaa Yesu lkipaareta oaare, nejoki ninche," 
Matthew21:2 “Enchom enkang natii dukuya intae na idolidolo nabo kata teine esikiria naena o lkurrarru, entalaku enterewakaki." 
Matthew21:3 Naa te neng'amaa intae oltung'ani entiaaki, ‘Olkitok oatayie enkolat’; nerewakini teina kata.”" 
Matthew21:4 Netaasate nena pee ebaya enatejo oloiboni le Nkai," 
Matthew21:5 “Entiaki Yerusalem, kelotu enitii iyie olaiguanani lino, nebor nekedito esikiria, akedito olkurrarru le sikiria.”" 
Matthew21:6 Nepuo lkipaareta neas anaa inaitanapa Yesu," 
Matthew21:7 nereu ina sikiria o enkurrarru neirotoki inkilani enye neked Yesu atonie. 
Matthew21:8 Neisalaash ilkumok lo lorora ilkilani lenye te nkoitoi nedung'u kulikae ilng'osil loo lkeek neisalaashaki enkoitoi. 
Matthew21:9 Ore olorere oituruko o losujita, nebuak aajo, “Hosana, Enkerai e Daudi; metamayiani ilo olotu te nkarna o Laitoriani; Hosana te shumata naisul pooki.”" 
Matthew21:10 Ore pee ejing ninye Yerusalem, neiriiro enkang pooki, aajo, “Ai ng'ai ele?”" 
Matthew21:11 Nejo esiamo, “Yesu ele, oloiboni le Nkai le Nasaret e Galilaya.”" 
Matthew21:12 Nejing Yesu enkaji e Nkai nearaa lelo pooki oomirisho o looinyiang'isho aitupuku te nkaji e Nkai neibeloo misai oo ilooibelekeny mpisai o lorikan loo loomir inturkuluoni. 
Matthew21:13 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Etisiraki inchere, ore enkaji ai keji enkaji e nkomono kake intaa intae enkapune oo laisimak.”" 
Matthew21:14 Nepuonu enetii Yesu tiatua enkaji e Nkai ilmodook o lng'ojiniaa; neishiunye ninye. 
Matthew21:15 Kake ore pee edol ilapolosak kituaak o laiteng'enak loo nkitanapat imbaa e nking'sia naataasa ninye o nkera eilepie iltoiloishi lenye te nkaji e Nkai ejo, “Hosana, Enkerai e Daudi.” Negoro ninche," 
Matthew21:16 nejoki ninye, “Aa ining'ito enajoito kuna?” Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Ee, keitu isumusumu ai kata nchere, ‘Intabayie enkisisa too nkutukie oo nkera kutiti naanakita’?”" 
Matthew21:17 Neing'uaa ninche, neipang teina anasa nelo Betania neirrag ine." 
Matthew21:18 Ore tadekenya eloito Yesu arrinyokino ina anasa netir esumash. 
Matthew21:19 Nedol olng'aboli te mbata e nkoitoi neiwuang'aki, neitu etumie toki, imbenek ake; nejoki ilo shani, “Tala Ing'anayio ntarasi.” Netoyu nabo kata olng'aboli." 
Matthew21:20 Ore pee edol lkipaareta ina bae, neing'asia nejo, “Kaji eikuna pee etoyio olng'aboli nabo kata?”" 
Matthew21:21 Newaliki Yesu, ajoki, “Kesipa ajoki intae, te naa iatata enkirukoto ming'ashing'asha, neme ena ake naitaasaki olng'aboli iasiasa kake ti nijokiki oldoinyo, ‘Tadotunye tanang'akinoyu enaiposha,’ neaku ina." 
Matthew21:22 Ore pooki toki ninkilikuanunu te nkomono te nkirukoto nitumutumu.” 
Matthew21:23 Ore pee ejing Yesu enkaji e Nkai nepuonu ilapolosak kituaak o lpayiani kituaak enetii, eiteng'enisho nejoki, “Ai ti aa kidimata ias iyie kuna baa? Naa ai ng'ae likinchoo ena kidimata?”" 
Matthew21:24 Newaliki Yesu nejoki, “Kaikilikuan sii nanu intae embae nabo, naa tinikiwalikiki, naliki sii nanu intae enkidimata naasie kuna baa." 
Matthew21:25 Amaa, enkibatisa e Yohana, kaji eing'uaa? Ke keper eing'uaa ana ke ltung'ana?” Nejokino maate, “Te nikijo, ‘keper eing'uaa;’ naa kejoki iyiook, ‘Oo naa pee eitu irukuruku?’" 
Matthew21:26 Naa ti nikijo, ‘Iltung'ana eing'uaa’ nikiure olorere, amu kejo ltung'ana pooki oloiboni le Nkai Yohana.”" 
Matthew21:27 Newaliki ninche Yesu aajoki, “Mikiyiolo.” Nejoki sii ninye, “Maliki sii nanu intae enkidimata naasie kuna baa." 
Matthew21:28 “Ijojo aa? Eeta apa oltung'ani ilayiok aare; nelo enetii obo nejoki, ‘Enkerai ai, shomo taata ntayu esiaai te nkurma oo sabibu.’" 
Matthew21:29 Neng'amaa ajoki, ‘Malo’ ore te siadi neirridu nelo." 
Matthew21:30 Neitoki alo enetii olikae nejoki neijia. Neng'amaa ilo ajoki, ‘Kalo Papa’, kake eitu elo." 
Matthew21:31 Kalo te lelo pokira aare otaasa enanyor menye?” Nejoki, “Lido le dukuya.” Nejoki Yesu, “Kesipa ajoki intae, iloosotu kodi o loololoito oong'as aajing enkitoria e Nkai te dukuya intae." 
Matthew21:32 Amu eewuo Yohana enitii, te nkoitoi e supatisho, neitu irukuruku; kake eiruko iloosotu kodi o loololoito; kake ore pee idolidolo intae ina, neitu irridudu te siadi, aairuk ninye." 
Matthew21:33 “Enining'o sii ae kitanyaanyukoto: Etii apa oltung'ani oata enkang, neun enkurma oo lng'anayio neitaman enkikarrata netur ewueji neironyie lng'anayio, neshetaki oltalet, neing'ueiki ilaturok, nelo ninye paran ae kop." 
Matthew21:34 Ore pee eaku enkata naku lng'anayio, neirriwaki isinkan lenyena lelo aturok, meishoo lng'anayio lenyena." 
Matthew21:35 Neibung ilaturok isinkan lenyena, neidong obo, near likai metua, near likai too soito." 
Matthew21:36 Neitoki airriwaki kulikae sinkan kumok oolang lelo le dukuya, neiko sii ninche neijia." 
Matthew21:37 Ore te siadi neirriwaki enkerai enye ejo, ‘Keyanyit ninche enkerai ai.’" 
Matthew21:38 “Kake ore ake pee edol ilaturok enkerai, nejokino maate, ‘Ele olajung'oni, mataar pee kitum enjung'ore enye.’" 
Matthew21:39 Neibung ninye nearaa aaipung'ie oriong enkurma oo lng'anayio near metua. 
Matthew21:40 Amaa kenya te nelotu olopeny ina kurma oo lng'anayio, kaa eitaas lelo aturok?”" 
Matthew21:41 Nejoki, “Kear oleng lelo tung'ana torrok metuata neisho enkurma oo lng'anayio kulikae aturok ooitabaiki ninye ilng'anayio too rishat enye.”" 
Matthew21:42 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Keitu aekata isumusumu too lkigerot, ‘Ore ilo soit otanyaita ilashetak ninye otaa osoit kitok lo lmairroto. Ore ilo rorei naa Olaitoriani eing'uaa, naa ole nking'asia too nkonyek ang.’" 
Matthew21:43 Te nkaraki ina pee ajoki intae, keoruni intae enkitoria e Nkai aaisho olorere oiki lng'anayio, [" 
Matthew21:44 naa ore olosulakino ilo soit, negiligil. Ore olosulakino ilo soit neidong aitaa emposio.]”" 
Matthew21:45 Ore pee ening ilapolosak kituaak o Lfarisayo kuna kitanyaanyukot, neyiolou aajo ninche eipirta." 
Matthew21:46 Ore eing'oru eneiko pee eibung, neureyu olorere amu ejo ninche, oloiboni le Nkai Yesu." 
Matthew22:1 Neitoki Yesu airorie ninche, too nkitanyaanyukot ejo:" 
Matthew22:2 “Etiu enkitoria e keper anaa olaiguanani oitobiraka enkerai enye osirua le nkiyama. 
Matthew22:3 Neirriwaa isinkan lenyena meipoto ilooitoomonoki meetu osirua le nkiyama neany ninche epuonu. 
Matthew22:4 Neitoki airriwaa kulikae sinkan ajoki, ‘Entiaki lelo ooipotoki, Eng'ura Aidipa aitobira endaa o sirua, eyiang'a ilmong'i o lasho oopir eidipate intokitin pooki, wootu osirua le nkiyama.’" 
Matthew22:5 Neitu ninche eshilaa ina, nepuo pooki nkolati enye, nelo likae enkurma enye, nelo likai emirare enye." 
Matthew22:6 Ore ilkulikae ootelekutua, neibung isinkan lenyena aainyal near metuata." 
Matthew22:7 Ore pee ening olaiguanani ina negoro oleng, neirriwaa iltimito loo lmurran lenyena metaara lelo tung'ana arruok, nepejoo enkang enye." 
Matthew22:8 Nejoki olopeny enkiyama isinkan lenyena, ‘Eoto indaiki o sirua le nkiyama, kake ore lelo ooipotoki nemeishiaakino nepuonu ele sirua." 
Matthew22:9 Enchom ineerishare inkoitoi ore pooki lidolidolo, empotoki osirua le nkiyama.’" 
Matthew22:10 Nepuo lelo inkoitoi naalala enkanasa, neiturrurru pooki oonoto ninche, iltorrok o supati, neiput ilomon ina aji e nkiyama." 
Matthew22:11 Nejing'u olaiguanani aing'or ilomon, nedol oltung'ani obo lemeishopito enkila e nkiyama; nejoki," 
Matthew22:12 ‘Olchore kaji nkununye ene miaata enkila e nkiyama?’ Negira 
Matthew22:13 Nejoki olaiguanani isinkan lenyena, ‘Enteen ninye inkaik o nkejek, ninang'akiki enaimin e auluo; neaku enkishirata o eonyoto oo lala.’" 
Matthew22:14 “Amu kumok ilooipotoki kake ilkuti oogeluno.” 
Matthew22:15 Nepuo ina kata Ilfarisayo aaiguanare enaiko pee erresh Yesu too nkirorot enyena. 
Matthew22:16 Neirriwaki ninche ninye lkipaareta lenye te nebo ile Herode aajoki, “Loaiteng'enani, kiyiolo aajo ira olasipani nintayiolo ltung'ana; enkoitoi e Nkai te sipata amu miing'or empukunoto o ltung'ani. Toliki naa iyiook." 
Matthew22:17 Ijo aa iyie? Keishaa ti nikincho Kaisari kodi ana eimeishaa?” 
Matthew22:18 Kake neyiolou Yesu esunkuroisho enye nejoki, “Lo sunkuro, kainyoo pee kitemiteme intae?" 
Matthew22:19 Entoduaaki empisai e kodi.” Neyaki ninche ninye empisai. 
Matthew22:20 Neikilikuan Yesu ninche ajoki, “Koleng'ae ele oip o ele kigeroto?”" 
Matthew22:21 Nejoki, “Ole Kaisari.” Nejoki ina kata, “Enchoo Kaisari ine Kaisari, ninchosho Enkai ine Nkai.”" 
Matthew22:22 Ore pee ening ninche ina, neing'asia oleng nepuo aaing'uaa ninye." 
Matthew22:23 Ore teina olong nepuonu Isadukayo, lelo oojo meetae empiunoto, neikilikuan aajoki," 
Matthew22:24 “Lo Aiteng'enani, etejo Musa te neye oltung'ani neitu eiu inkera, neyam olalashe enkitok enye aiki inkera." 
Matthew22:25 Etii apa atua iyiook ilalashera oopishana, neyamisho ole dukuya neye meeta inkera, neing'ueiki olalashe enkitok enye." 
Matthew22:26 Neiko neijia ole aare o le okuni o metabaiki ole oopishana. 
Matthew22:27 Ore te siadi pooki neye sii enkitok. 
Matthew22:28 Amaa, kenya te mpiunoto, keaku enkitok ene ng'ae te lelo oopishana? Amu eyama pooki.”" 
Matthew22:29 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Ipong'oriri amu miyiololo ilkigerot anaa engolon e Nkai." 
Matthew22:30 Amu ore te mpiunoto nemeyamishoe, nemeishoori meyami, kake etiu anaa ilmalaika te keper." 
Matthew22:31 “Kake ore too naaipirta empiunoto oo lootuata, keitu isumusumu enatiaaka intae Enkai pee ejo," 
Matthew22:32 ‘Kara Enkai e Abraham nara Enkai e Isaak nara Enkai e Yakobo?’ Mme Enkai oo lootuata, enoo looishu.”" 
Matthew22:33 Ore pee ening esiamo, neing'asia too nkiteng'enat enyena." 
Matthew22:34 Kake ore pee ening Ilfarisayo inchere eitigira Isadukayo nepuo aatumo. 
Matthew22:35 Neikilikuan olang'eni obo lenye atem Yesu, ajoki," 
Matthew22:36 “Lo Aiteng'enani kaa kitanapata naisul inkitanapat?” 
Matthew22:37 Nejoki Yesu, “Tonyorra Olaitoriani Enkai ino to ltau lino pooki ote nkishui ino pooki o te ng'eno ino pooki." 
Matthew22:38 Ena kitanapata ene dukuya naa ninye naisul. 
Matthew22:39 Ore eni are nanyaanyukie naa ena, ‘Tonyorra ole latia ino anaa kewan.’" 
Matthew22:40 Ore kuna kitanapat pokira are ninche naaun nkitanapat o loibonok le Nkai.” 
Matthew22:41 Ore pee eiturrurro lelo Farisayo neikilikuan Yesu ninche ajoki," 
Matthew22:42 “Ijojo aa too mbaa e Kristo? Kole ng'ae?” Nejoki, “Ole Daudi.”" 
Matthew22:43 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Kaji naa etiu pee eipot Daudi te Nkiyang'et Sinyati ajo ‘Olaitoriani’, ejo," 
Matthew22:44 ‘Etiaaka Olaitoriani, Olaitoriani lai, Totona te tatene ai, ometaba anaa naitadou ilmang'ati linono apik abori nkejek inono.’" 
Matthew22:45 Amaa naa te naa kejo Daudi ninye Olaitoriani, kaji eiko pee eitoki ninye aaku enkerai enye?”" 
Matthew22:46 Nemetii ho obo oidima atawaliki ninye ororei hoo obo, nemetii oltung'ani ebaiki ina olong onyaaka aitieu aikilikuana likai rorei." 
Matthew23:1 Neirorie Yesu ina kata siamon o lkipaareta lenyena ajoki," 
Matthew23:2 “Laiteng'enak loo nkitanapat o Lfarisayo ootonita to lorika le Musa. 
Matthew23:3 Ore imbaa pooki naajoki ninche intae entaas, niaasiasa; amu keiro ninche nemeas." 
Matthew23:4 Amu keeniki ilolan sapuki ooiroishi aaiteleiki iloilila loo ltung'ana; nemeyieu ninche neiseie to lkimojino lenye. 
Matthew23:5 Neas isiaaitin enye pooki pee edol iltung'ana, amu keitalala ilkerreti lenye neitulus enkikodo oo nkilani enye." 
Matthew23:6 Nenyor iwuejitin enkanyit too siruai, o lorikan sidain tiatua inkajijik e ntumo," 
Matthew23:7 neshipa te neirorokini too wuejitin neemirishoreki, nenyor te neipoti aajo ‘Olaiteng'enani’." 
Matthew23:8 Kake eminchosho eipoti intae aajo ‘Olaiteng'enani’ amu obo olaiteng'enani linyi, nirara pooki ilalashera." 
Matthew23:9 Nimijojo oltung'ani papa te nkop, amu obo Papa linyi otii keper." 
Matthew23:10 Niminchosho eji intae ilarikok amu obo olarikoni linyi naa Kristo. 
Matthew23:11 Ore ilo ora kitok te intae, keaku osinka linyi." 
Matthew23:12 Ore oloilepie kewan, neitadouni; ore oloitadou kewan neilepieki." 
Matthew23:13 “Oi! Intae isunkuro loo laiteng'enak loo nkitanapat o Lfarisayo! Amu irishieshie ltung'ana enkitoria e Keper, nimijing'jing'i intae maate, ore ilooyieu nejing, nimitikiki ejing." 
Matthew23:14 ‘Ee kake ayia! Isunkuro o laiteng'enak loo nkitanapat o Lfarisayo, amu idaarere nkajijik oo nkolia, niomonono enkomono naado aaitaakuno; ore te nkaraki ina itumutumu enkiguana nagol oleng.’" 
Matthew23:15 “Ee kake ayia! Ilaigerok o Lfarisayo sunkuro! Amu imanimana naaiposha o enkop natoyio aaing'oru obo osuj intae, ore pee eibelekenya, nintaa ninye ololmoti le nkima katitin are alang ninye intae." 
Matthew23:16 “Ee kake ayia! Ilarikok modook oojo, ‘Te nenyayie oltung'ani enkaji e Nkai olmumai neme toki; kake te nenyayie olmumai saabu e nkaji e Nkai neen ilo mumai.’" 
Matthew23:17 Lo moda modook; kaa nalusoo, ai saabu ana kenkaji e Nkai naitisiny ina saabu?" 
Matthew23:18 Ijojo sii ore oloinosie olmumai olperere lo lasar, neme toki kake ore oloinosie olmumai enkishorunoto natii olperere lo lasar, neen ilo mumai." 
Matthew23:19 Lo tung'ana modook, kaa nalusoo, e ina kishorunoto ana kolperere lo lasar oitisiny ina kishorunoto?" 
Matthew23:20 Ore oloinosie olmumai olperere lo lasar, einosie olperere lo lasar o pooki toki natii enchumata enye." 
Matthew23:21 Ore oloinosie olmumai enkaji e Nkai neinosie o ilo obik tiatua. 
Matthew23:22 Ore oloinosie keper olmumai neinosie olorika le nkitoo le Nkai neinosi ilo otonita. 
Matthew23:23 “Ee kake ayia! Ilaigerok o lfarisayo sunkuro! Amu intayuyu ematua e tomon o enkorropil o sinantei o empeu naitorropil endaa, nitapalaitie mbaa kituaak oo nkitanapat, aa isipat e nkiguana, o lng'ur o enkirukoto; kuna eishiaakino nitaasa nimipalipala nena kulie." 
Matthew23:24 Lo arikok modook, isilulu enkojong'ani nimurgutaa entames!" 
Matthew23:25 “Ee kake ayia! Ilaigerok o Lfarisayo sunkuro amu intukuku oriong enkikompe o esaani kake ebore atua intae eului o enkarri nemeeta enkiririkinoto. 
Matthew23:26 Lo Farisayoi modooni! Tang'asa intukuo atua enkikompe o esaani pee etum sii oriong ataa sidai. 
Matthew23:27 “Ee kake ayia! Ilaigerok o Lfarisayo! Amu itiuu intae anaa nkuraren naaelieki enturoto meiborra, nedoli anaa ai sidain ti oriong kake ore atua eiputa loik loo lmeneng'a o loirerioni pooki." 
Matthew23:28 Naa neijia sii itiuu intae, kedoli intae ti oriong aa ijo irara supati kake ore tiatua, nebore esunkuroisho o enkarruoisho." 
Matthew23:29 “Ee kake ayia! Ilaigerok o lfarisayo sunkuro amu ishetishete inkuraren oo loibonok ninkodikodo inkuraren e lelo asipak le Nkai," 
Matthew23:30 nijojo, ‘Te naa ai kitii apa too nkolong'i oo loo Papa, anaata eitu kishulare ninche te nkibukoroto osarge loo loibonok.’" 
Matthew23:31 Nitaa intae shakeni nchere irara inkera e lelo ootara lelo oibonok le Nkai. 
Matthew23:32 Emputa eneitong'oro iloo minyi. 
Matthew23:33 Naishoi oo lasuriaa o nturbubuani, kaji inkoko pee ilanyilanya enkiguana o lmoti le nkima." 
Matthew23:34 “Ore te nkaraki ena, eng'urai airriwaki intae iloibonok o ltung'ana ng'eni o laiteng'enak loo nkitanapat; niariara kulikae, metuata nisheshe, niariara kulikae too nkajijik inyi e ntumo, niaraa kulikae too nkang'itie aaisikie;" 
Matthew23:35 pee etum ainepu intae osarge loo ltung'ana le Nkai oibukori te nkop ebaiki osarge le Abel lemeeta entiyoto, o metabaiki osarge le Sakaria le Barakia litaara intae te rishata ewueji sinyati o olperere lo lasar." 
Matthew23:36 Esipa ajoki intae, kepuonu kuna baa pooki shumata kulo tung'ana le na kata." 
Matthew23:37 “Woi Yerusalem, Yerusalem naar iloibonok le Nkai, nenang too soito lelo ooirriwakini ninye! Ai katitin aja atonyuaa ajo aiturrur inkera inono anaa elukunku naiturrur inkuoo enyena too naipuko enyena, nitanyaita!" 
Matthew23:38 Neina enkaji inyi natung'eikiaki eliyio. 
Matthew23:39 Amu ajoki intae, mikintokiki aadol katukul, metaba anaa nijojo, ‘Emayiana ilo olotu te nkarna o Laitoriani.’ ”" 
Matthew24:1 Nepuku Yesu te nkaji e Nkai alo, nepuonu lkipaareta lenyena enetii pee eitodol enchetunoto e nkaji e Nkai." 
Matthew24:2 Newaliki ajoki, “Ai midolitata kuna pooki? Kesipa ajoki intae meing'uari te ne wueji osoit obo te shumata olikae, lemesulakini enkop.”" 
Matthew24:3 Ore eton Yesu to Ldoinyo loo Loirienito, nepuonu lkipaareta enetii ninye too nkurrat nejoki, “Toliki iyiook ajo kanu ebau kuna baa? Naa kainyoo olmonekie le lotunoto ino o ene nkiting'oto e na kop?”" 
Matthew24:4 Neng'amaa Yesu nejoki, “Entorrip ate meitapong'oo intae oltung'ani." 
Matthew24:5 Amu kepuonu ilkumok te nkarna ai oojo, ‘Kara nanu Kristo,’ neitapong'oo ilkumok." 
Matthew24:6 Naa ining'ining'i intae ilarrabali o mbaa oo njoreitin eimakini, naa entodol ake emirut amu meeta inchere pee mebau kuna baa; kake eton eng'or enkiting'oto." 
Matthew24:7 Amu kedumakino olorere olikae orere, nedumakino enkitoria enkae kitoria; naa kepuonu ilameitin o nkikirikirat e nkop too wuejitin kumok." 
Matthew24:8 Kake ore nena baa pooki naa ine nkiterunoto oo sinaitin. 
Matthew24:9 Teina kata taa eishoori intae meisilisili neari intae entuata; neibayu intae iloreren pooki te nkaraki enkarna ai. 
Matthew24:10 “Teina kata taa errorro ilkumok nekaldaa olikae olikae, neibayuno ninche maate." 
Matthew24:11 Naa kepuku iloibonok kumok le lejare neiminie lkumok. 
Matthew24:12 Naa ore te nkaraki naponari entorroni neiropiju enyorrata oo lkumok. 
Matthew24:13 “Kake ore olongiri ometabaiki enkiting'oto nejeu. 
Matthew24:14 Naa kelikiori kulo omon supati le na kitoria e Nkai te nkop pooki metaa shakenisho too loreren pooki; ore ina kata nebau enkiting'oto. 
Matthew24:15 “Ore pee idolidolo ina torroni nabau e mutata natolimuo oloiboni le Nkai oji Daniel eitashe te wueji sinyati. (Inchoo ilo oisumita metayiolo.) 
Matthew24:16 Ore ina kata lootii Yudea neipukoki ldoinyo. 
Matthew24:17 Ore olotii shumata enkaji nemedou alo aitayu intokitin te nkaji enye. 
Matthew24:18 Ore olotii enkurma nemeshukunye adumu enkila enye. 
Matthew24:19 Wooi nena naanuta o naaitanakisho te nena olong'i! 
Matthew24:20 Entoomon pee meaku enaipuk inyi ene nkata o loirujuruj anaa enkolong e nkiyeng'iyeng'ata. 
Matthew24:21 Amu keaku elotu ina kata entaboi sapuk neitu ae kata etumi, anaa pee eiteruni enkop o taata, nemeitoki aaku katukul." 
Matthew24:22 Naa te neme keitodorropaki nena olong'i anaata mejeu toki naishu; kake ore te nkaraki oo lgelunot lenyena eitodorropaki nena olong'i. 
Matthew24:23 “Te nejoki intae ina kata oltung'ani, ‘Nele Kristo otii ene!’, Anaa ‘Nelido otii idie!’, Emiiruk" 
Matthew24:24 amu kepuonu ilooitaa ate iloo Kristo le lejare o looitaakuno iloibonok ooitoduaaya ilmonek o nenking'asia kituaak pee te naa keidimayu naaji neiminie ninche lelo gelunot le Nkai. 
Matthew24:25 Ng'ura ajo aidipa atoliki intae te dukuya eitu abau. 
Matthew24:26 Metaa te nejoki intae, ‘Ng'ura, Etii ong'ata’, emipuku; anaa, ‘Etii lgilat li atua aji’ emiruk." 
Matthew24:27 Amu ore anaa enatiu enkiwuang'ata naing'uaa eneilepunye enkolong nelioyu te nedoyiorie; neijia etiu elotunoto e Nkerai e Tung'ani. 
Matthew24:28 Amu enetii empopok eiturrurrokino lmotonyi. 
Matthew24:29 “Ore ake pee eish isinaitin le nena olong'i, neitomisimisi enkolong nemeitoki olapa awang'u, nesulunye ilakir to loing'ang'e, neigirigiro engolon o loing'ang'e." 
Matthew24:30 Nelioyu ina kata olmonekie le Nkerai e Tung'ani te keper neaku olkiyioi lo lauui too loreren pooki le nkop, nedoli Enkerai e Tung'ani elotu too nkatampo e keper te ngolon o te nkitoo sapuk." 
Matthew24:31 Naa keirriwaa ninye ilmalaika lenyena te ndarata kitok e mouwo meiturrurru ilgelunot lenyena too lubot pokira ong'uan naaing'uaa osiwuo, neitung'uaa ineeiting'ie keper, too lubot pooki." 
Matthew24:32 “Entuutarie ate enkitanyaanyukoto o lng'aboli ore te neiteru aitayu imbenek niyiolouu aajo etinyikua oladalu. 
Matthew24:33 Ore sii intae ti nidolidolo nena pooki, entayiolo aajo etinyikua, ee etii inkutukie oo nkajijik." 
Matthew24:34 Kesipa ajoki intae, meishari kulo tung'ana le na kata eitu ebau kuna baa." 
Matthew24:35 Keish keper o enkop kake meish irorei laainei katukul. 
Matthew24:36 “Kake meetae oloyiolo ina olong anaa ina saa, aa ilmalaika le keper anaa Enkerai, Papa ake oyiolo." 
Matthew24:37 Amu ore anaa enatiu apa too nkolong'i e Noa, neijia sii etiu elotunoto e Nkerai e Tung'ani." 
Matthew24:38 Amu ore te nena olong'i eton etioyo oloirrag le nkare, kedaae, neokishoi, neyamishoe, neishoori meyami, o metabau ina olong natijing'a Noa esafina," 
Matthew24:39 neitu eyiolou o meeu oloirrag le nkare aya pooki ng'ae; neijia sii etiu elotunoto e Nkerai e Tung'ani. 
Matthew24:40 Ore ina kata te netii ilewa oaare enkurma, neyae obo neing'uari olikae." 
Matthew24:41 Neiutuutisho nkituaak are to soit neyai nabo neing'uari enkae. 
Matthew24:42 “Entorripisho naa, amu miyiolo enkolong nalotu Olaitoriani linyi." 
Matthew24:43 Kake iyiololo aajo, te naa keyiolo olopeny enkaji enkata nalotu olapurroni, anaata etorripishe pee meisho enkaji enye metigili." 
Matthew24:44 Enterretenata sii intae; amu te nkata niminteikiki elotu Enkerai e Tung'ani. 
Matthew24:45 “Kalo naa sinka ilo oisiligayu naa ng'en otung'eikia olkitok lenye enkaji enye, meitotio ltung'ana te nkata naishiaakino?" 
Matthew24:46 Emayiana ilo sinka laa te nelotu olkitok lenye nenyorriki easita enatung'eikia. 
Matthew24:47 Esipa ajoki intae, keisho meitoria intokitin enyena pooki." 
Matthew24:48 Kake te nejo ilo sinka torrono to ltau lenye, ‘Keimutie olkitok lai’;" 
Matthew24:49 neng'as aar isinkan ooboitare, nedaa neokisho te nebo o lamerak;" 
Matthew24:50 kelotu olkitok le ilo sinka te nkolong nemeiteikini o te saa nemeyiolo," 
Matthew24:51 naa kedung'udung neitaboitaki sunkuro. Neaku enkishirata o eonyoto oo lala. 
Matthew25:1 “Etiu enkitoria e keper anaa ntoyie tomon, naatudumutua ltaai lenye aapuo aanang'are oloyamisho." 
Matthew25:2 Ore imiet nemoda, ore inkulie imiet naa ng'eni." 
Matthew25:3 Amu ore nekua naamoda ewaita iltaai lenye neitu eya eilata 
Matthew25:4 Ore nekua ng'eni, neya eilata too ltuleta lenye o too ltaai." 
Matthew25:5 Ore pee eimutie oloyamisho, neimug pooki neirura." 
Matthew25:6 Ore te mpolos e nkewarrie, nebuaki aajo, ‘Neilo oloyamisho, entupuku entanang'are.’" 
Matthew25:7 Neinyototo ina kata nena toyie aaitobir iltaai lenye. 
Matthew25:8 Nejoki naamoda kunda ng'eni, ‘Enchoo iyiook enkiti ilata inyi; amu keye iltaai lang.’" 
Matthew25:9 Kake newaliki ng'eni ajoki, ‘A'a mebaiki iyiook o ntae; enaikash ti nipuopuo enetii iloomir aainyang'aki ate.’" 
Matthew25:10 Ore pee einyototo aapuo aainyiang'u, nebau oloyamisho, nejing nena naaterretenate tenebo oloyamisho atua osirua le nkiyama; neikeni kutuk aji." 
Matthew25:11 Neitoki te siadi aapuonu nekua toyie aajo, ‘Lo kitok, Lo, kitok, tabolu iyiook.’" 
Matthew25:12 Newaliki ajoki, ‘Kesipa ajoki, intae, mayiolo ntae.’" 
Matthew25:13 Entorripisho naa, amu miyiololo ntae ina olong aashu esaa." 
Matthew25:14 “Etiu enkitoria e keper anaa te neyieu oltung'ani nelo enkop nalakua neipot isinkan lenyena neitaaki ntokitin enyena. 
Matthew25:15 Neitaaki obo ntalantani imiet, neitaaki olikae are neitaaki likae nabo; aisho pooki tung'ani anaa enkidimata enye; nelo." 
Matthew25:16 Ore lido oitaakaki ntalantani imiet nelo nabo kata aasishore netum kulie talantani imiet. 
Matthew25:17 Netumie sii elde oitaakaki are kulie are. 
Matthew25:18 Kake ore elde oitaakaki nabo, nelo aturoo aisudoo empisai o lkitok lenye." 
Matthew25:19 Ore etulusoyie enkata naado nelotu olkitok le lelo sinkan, neyieu esiana oo ntokitin enyena." 
Matthew25:20 Neng'asunye oloitaakaki ntalantani imiet neyau kulie talantani imiet; nejoki, ‘Lo Kitok kinchoo apa ntalantani imiet; ng'ura ajo anoto kulie imiet.’" 
Matthew25:21 Nejoki olkitok lenye, ‘Ee osinka supat laisilig, itaa oloisiligayu too nkuti, kaaisho intoria kumok; tijing'a eng'ida o lkitok lino.’" 
Matthew25:22 Nelotu oloitaakaki ntalantani are nejoki, ‘Lo Kitok, kintaaka apa ntalantani are, ng'ura ajo, anotie kulie are.’" 
Matthew25:23 Nejoki olkitok lenye, ‘Ai sidai enitaasa iyie osinka supat oisiligayu; tijing'a eng'ida o lkitok lino.’" 
Matthew25:24 Nelotu sii elde oitaakaki entalanta nabo nejo, ‘Lo Kitok, kayiolo ajo ira iyie oltung'ani ogol oikes ineitu iun, ninturrur ineitu isuaaya." 
Matthew25:25 Neaku atureishie nanu nalo aturoo aisudoo ina talanta ino tiatua enkop, ing'ura, nena enino, inko.’" 
Matthew25:26 Neng'amaa olkitok lenye, nejoki, ‘Lo sinka torrono oshal, itayiolo ajo kaikes ineitu aun, nasotu ineitu aisuaaya;" 
Matthew25:27 anaata naa inchoo ina pisai ai lelo ooasishore pee te nalotu natum enaai o kulie. 
Matthew25:28 Entooru naa ina talanta enchoo ilo oata ntalantani tomon. 
Matthew25:29 Amu ore pooki oata neponikini pee eaku naata nkumok kake ore olemeeta, ore ninye enda naata neoruni." 
Matthew25:30 Entanang'aki ilo sinka lemeeta tipat enaimin e auluo; neaku enkishirata o eonyoto oo lala.’ 
Matthew25:31 “Ore te nelotu Enkerai e Tung'ani te nkitoo enye, eboitare ilmalaika pookin, neton ina kata to lorika lenye le nkitoo." 
Matthew25:32 Neiturrurrokino iloreren pooki dukuya ninye negel ninche anaa olchekut ogelu nkerra arishie nkineji. 
Matthew25:33 Nepik nkerra enkaina enye e tatene, nepik inkineji ene kedianye." 
Matthew25:34 Naa kejoki ina kata olaiguanani lelo ootii enkaina enye e tatene, ‘Wootu intae ilootamayiana Papa lai, entujung enkitoria naitobirakaki apa intae apa ebaiki enkiterunoto e nkop." 
Matthew25:35 Amu kaata apa esumash nikinchosho endaa; naata enkure nikinchosho enkare naok; nara omoni nikirikiriki ang; 
Matthew25:36 nemaishopo nikinchopishopo; namuoi nikirumurumu, naena nikibaikiki.’" 
Matthew25:37 Neng'amaa ina kata ltung'ana le Nkai aajoki, ‘Lo kitok, kanu kitoduaa iyie iata esumash nikintoti iyie? Aashu iata enkure nikintook iyie?" 
Matthew25:38 Ana kanu kitaduaa iyie ira omoni nikirik iyie ang? Anaa minchopo nikinchop iyie?’ 
Matthew25:39 Ana kanu kitaduaa iyie imuoi anaa iena nikibaiki iyie? 
Matthew25:40 Neng'amaa olaiguanani ajoki, ‘Kesipa, ajoki intae, ore anaa enintaasa lelo alashera laainei ooti, nanu intaasa.’" 
Matthew25:41 Neitoki Yesu ina kata ajoki ilootii enkaina enye e kedianye, ‘Enyoito intae entung'uayioki iloodiaa, enchom enkima oo ntarasi naitobirakaki Sheitani o lmalaika lenyena." 
Matthew25:42 Amu aata apa esumash neitu kintotiti; naata enkure neitu kinchosho enkare naok. 
Matthew25:43 Nara omoni neitu kirikiriki ang; nemaishopo neitu kinchopishopo; namuoi, naena neitu kibaikiki.’" 
Matthew25:44 Neng'amaa sii ninche aajoki, ‘Kanu kitaduaa iyie iata esumash, anaa enkure, anaa ira omoni, anaa minchopo, anaa imuoi anaa iena neitu kisiai iyie?’" 
Matthew25:45 Naa keng'amaa ajoki, ‘Kesipa ajoki intae, ore anaa eneitu intaasiasa obo le kulo ooti, nanu eitu intaasiasa.’" 
Matthew25:46 Naa kepuo ninche enkitamioto oo ntarasi; nejing iltung'ana le Nkai enkishui nemeish.” 
Matthew26:1 Ore pee eidip Yesu lelo rorei pooki, nejoki lkipaareta lenyena," 
Matthew26:2 “Iyiololo aajo inkolong'i are naatiooyo pee eaku Pasaka, naa keishoori Enkerai e Tung'ani metashei.”" 
Matthew26:3 Neiturrurro lapolosak kituaak o lpayiani te wueji olapolosani kitok oji Kaiafas; 
Matthew26:4 neiguana maate te nebo pee etum aaibung'a Yesu to losek aataar metua. 
Matthew26:5 Neitoki aajo, “Neme to sirua pee mejing olong'oling'oli atua ltung'ana.”" 
Matthew26:6 Ore etii Yesu Betania enkaji e Simon le nkeeya oo lbolot," 
Matthew26:7 nelotu enetii ninye enkitok naata oltulet lo soit oji alabasta le ilata narropil nagol enkinyang'a nebukoki elukunya enye teine einosita endaa. 
Matthew26:8 Ore pee edol lkipaareta lenyena ina negoro naleng nejo, “Ijo meima ena ilata siu?" 
Matthew26:9 Amu anaata etimiraki aainosie mpisai kumok pee eishori ilaisinak.” 
Matthew26:10 Kake etayiolo Yesu ina nejoki, “Kainyoo pee intanyamalala ena kitok? Naa esidai aaitaasa." 
Matthew26:11 Amu iatata ilaisinak anaake kake mikiaata nanu anaa ake. 
Matthew26:12 “Amu ore ina ilata narropil naatubukoko, osesen lai eitobiraki enukaroto." 
Matthew26:13 Esipa ajoki intae, ore pooki wueji nelikiorieki ele rorei supat te nkop pooki, naa keimakini ena naaitaasa ena kitok metaa enadamunyeki ninye.”" 
Matthew26:14 Nelo ina kata obo le lelo tomon o aare oji Yudas Iskariot enetii ilapolosak kituaak," 
Matthew26:15 nejoki, “Kainyoo kinchosho te naitarasaki intae Yesu?” Nelaaki ninche impisai tomoni uni e nkosholai." 
Matthew26:16 Ore ebaiki ina kata neing'oru erishata nakaldarie ninye. 
Matthew26:17 Ore te nkolong e dukuya o sirua loo Mukateni Nemeisuishieki, nepuonu lkipaareta enetii Yesu nejoki, “Kaji kintobiraki iyie pee inyayie osirua le Pasaka?”" 
Matthew26:18 Nejoki, “Entijing enkanasa enchom enetii oltung'ani oje entiaki, ‘Eji Olaiteng'enani, etinyikua enkiririkinoto e nkata ai; te nkaji ino aitobir Pasaka te nebo o lkipaareta laainei.’ ”" 
Matthew26:19 Neas lkipaareta ina natiaka Yesu, neitobiraki Yesu Pasaka." 
Matthew26:20 Ore pee eaku tara, neton Yesu te misa tenebo lkipaareta lenyena tomon aare." 
Matthew26:21 Ore einosita endaa nejoki, “Kesipa ajoki intae, kaakaldaa obo linyi.”" 
Matthew26:22 Neisinanuo oleng neikilikuana moo obo, “Ainanu sa Lo Kitok?”" 
Matthew26:23 Newaliki ajoki, “Elde oitadoikio enkaina enye esaani te nebo nanu, ninye laakaldaa nanu." 
Matthew26:24 Kelo Enkerai e Tung'ani anaa enatisiraki, kake, ee kake ayia elde la ninye oitarasaa Enkerai e Tung'ani. Enaikash apa te neitu eini.”" 
Matthew26:25 Neng'amaa Yudas laa ninye otakaldaiyie ajoki, “Aijo, sa ainanu, Olaiteng'enani?” Nejoki Yesu, “Iyie otejo.”" 
Matthew26:26 Ore einosita endaa nedumu Yesu emukate nemayian negiligil; neisho lkipaareta lenyena nejo, “Enkoito enosa; osesen lai ele.”" 
Matthew26:27 Nedumu enkikompe, neisho Enkai enashe, neitarasaki ninche nejoki, “Entook pooki;" 
Matthew26:28 amu osarge lai ele lo sotua oibukori te nkaraki oo lkumok te mpalakinoto oo ng'ok. 
Matthew26:29 Ajoki intae, ore ebaiki taata, maitoki aekata aok enaisho oo lng'anayio loo sabibu o metabau enkolong naok eokoto ng'ejuk te nebo intae te Nkitoria e Papa.”" 
Matthew26:30 Ore pee erany osinkolio neipang aapuo Oldoinyo loo Loirienito. 
Matthew26:31 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Ore tena kewarie, naa aikisikisiki pooki aaing'uaa nanu amu etisiraki aajo, ‘Kaosh olchekut neidapasha eluaata oo nkerra.’" 
Matthew26:32 Kake ore pee aaitopiuni naituruk alo Galilaya.” 
Matthew26:33 Newaliki Petero ajoki, “Te naa aiking'uaa pooki, maaing'uaa aekata nanu.”" 
Matthew26:34 Nejoki Yesu, “Kesipa aajoki iyie, ore te na kewarie, eitu eru olchogoo, nikimiki iyie katitin uni.”" 
Matthew26:35 Nejoki Petero, “Te naa kaye te nebo iyie maamiki nanu iyie.” Nejo sii neijia lkipaareta pooki." 
Matthew26:36 Nelotu Yesu o ninche ewueji neji Getsemane nejoki lkipaareta lenyena, “Entotoni te ne mashomo ende aomon.”" 
Matthew26:37 Nerik Petero o layiok pokira aare le Sebedayo. Neiteru aisinanuo nenyamalu oltau. 
Matthew26:38 Nejoki, “Keeta oltau lai osina kitok o metaa kaye; entotoni te ne entashololoto te nebo nanu.”" 
Matthew26:39 Neigut penyo neirrabalakino enkop neomon nejo, “Papa lai, te naa keidimayu intapaashaki ena kikompe, kake mme anaa enayieu nanu kake anaa eniyieu iyie.”" 
Matthew26:40 Nelotu enetii lkipaareta neinepu eirurate, nejoki Yesu Petero, “Amaa ai mindimidimi hoo aatashololoto te nebo nanu esaa nabo?" 
Matthew26:41 Entashololoto niomonono pee mijing'ijing'i atua intemat; kesipa keyieu oltau, kake keshal osesen.”" 
Matthew26:42 Neitoki alo enkata e are neomon nejo, “Papa lai, te nemeidimayu pee aapaash ena kikompe eitu aok, inchoo metotiwuo anaa eniyieu.”" 
Matthew26:43 Neitoki alotu, neinepu ninche eirurate, amu eiroshiutuo inkonyek enye." 
Matthew26:44 Neitoki aing'uaa ninche nelo aomon enkata e uni te lelo ake rorei. 
Matthew26:45 Neitoki ashukokino lkipaareta lenyena nejoki, “Keton doi ake irurara aayeng'iyeng'a! Eng'ura Etinyikua esaa napikieki Enkerai e Tung'ani inkaik oo laing'okok." 
Matthew26:46 Enyeoto emaape; nelde olaakaldaa otabawua.” 
Matthew26:47 Ore eirorita, ng'ura, nelotu Yudas laa obo le lelo tomon o aare, eboitare empikas sapuk naata lalema o siaren ooing'uaa enetii lapolosak o lpayiani lo lorere." 
Matthew26:48 Naa ore ilo oitarasayie eidipa aishoo ninche olmonekie ejoki, “Ore elde lang'utut, ninye ilo embung'a.”" 
Matthew26:49 Nelo ina kata enetii Yesu nejoki, “Supa Olaiteng'enani;” neng'utut." 
Matthew26:50 Nejoki Yesu, “Olchore, kainyoo pee itii ene? Tasioki taasa ina nikiyawua.” Nepuonu taa enetii neibung aakurraki." 
Matthew26:51 Neshutu obo le lelo ooboitare Yesu olalem, neosh osinka lo lapolosani nedung'u enkiok." 
Matthew26:52 Nejoki Yesu, “Tushukoki olalem lino enchashur amu ore pooki oibung olalem nemuta to lalem." 
Matthew26:53 Aijo iyie eimaidim atasayia Papa maairriwaki nabo kata mpuot tomon o aare oo lmalaika? 
Matthew26:54 Paa kaji naa eiko pee eitabari ilkigerot nemeeta nchere pee eitu ebaya?” 
Matthew26:55 Ore ina kata nejoki Yesu ina siamo, “Aikipuonunu aaibung iatata ilalema o siaren anaa ilo oibung olaisimani? Natii oshi ake enkaji e Nkai aiteng'enisho neitu kimbung'ubung'u?”" 
Matthew26:56 Kake etaasate kuna pooki pee ebaya ilkigerot loo loibonok le Nkai. Neilanyisho ina kata lkipaareta pooki aaing'uaa. 
Matthew26:57 Ore lelo ooibung'a Yesu nerikoki olapolosani kitok, oji Kaiafas, enotote teine laiteng'enak loo nkitanapat o lpayiani." 
Matthew26:58 Kake esujita Petero ninye te nelakua, o metabaiki olgoriet lo lapolosani kitok. Ore pee ejing atua, neton ninye te nebo ilarripok adol enaasayu." 
Matthew26:59 Neing'oru ilapolosak kituaak o enkiguana pooki shakenisho e lejare naiteeniki Yesu pee eari metua. 
Matthew26:60 Kake eitu etum hoo pito hoo neetuo lchakenini kumok le lejare. 
Matthew26:61 Ore te siadi nepuonu aare ootejo, “Etejo ele tung'ani kaidim atigila enkaji e Nkai naitoki ashet too nkolong'i uni.”" 
Matthew26:62 Neitashe olapolosani kitok ajoki ninye. “Aimeeta eniwalu? Kakua baa kuna nikinteeniki kulo tung'ana?” 
Matthew26:63 Kake etigire Yesu. Nejoki taa olapolosani kitok, “Aainosie olmumai te Nkai naishu, toliki iyiook te naa ira iyie Kristo, Enkerai e Nkai.”" 
Matthew26:64 Nejoki Yesu, “Iyie otejo; kake ajoki intae, ore ebaiki taata idolidolo Enkerai e Tung'ani eton te nkaina e tatene naata engolon edou too nkatampo e shumata!”" 
Matthew26:65 Nepolos olapolosani kitok ilkilani lenyena nejo, “Etamorishe ele, kainyoo shakenisho neton kiyieu? Itoning'o emorore enye." 
Matthew26:66 Ijojo aa?” Newaliki aajoki, “Keiririkino ele tung'ani keeya.”" 
Matthew26:67 Ore teina kata nenotaki enkomom neikum, nedam, neosh kulikae te ndap." 
Matthew26:68 Ejoki, “Kristo, imbonoki yiook, ai ng'ae likitoosho?”" 
Matthew26:69 Neton Petero te boo to olkoriet. Nelo enkaisiaayiani enetii nejoki, “Ira sii iyie obo loo loboitare Yesu le Galilaya.”" 
Matthew26:70 Nemiki ninye te dukuya ninche pooki ejo, “Maiyiolo enijoito.”" 
Matthew26:71 Ore pee eipung alo entaloishi e kishomi nedol ae tito ninye nejoki ilootii ine, “Eiriamariyie sii oshi ele tung'ani Yesu le Nasaret.”" 
Matthew26:72 Neitoki anya olmumai amiki ajo, “Maiyiolo ilo tung'ani.”" 
Matthew26:73 Ore te nkiti kata nepuonu lelo ooitashoo teine nejoki Petero, “Kesipa ira sii iyie obo le lelo; amu aikilikioo nkirorot inono.”" 
Matthew26:74 Neiteru, adek kewan nenya olmumai nejo, “Maiyiolo ilo tung'ani.” Neru nabo kata olchogoo." 
Matthew26:75 Nedamu Petero olapa rorei otiaaka Yesu inchere, “Ore eitu eru olchogoo, aikimiki katitin uni.” Neipang alo aishir te mion." 
Matthew27:1 Ore pee ekenyu, netumo ilapolosak pooki o lpayiani lo lorere neiguanare pee ear Yesu metua." 
Matthew27:2 Neen ninye nerik aaitarasaki olgafanai oji Pilato. 
Matthew27:3 Ore Yudas ilo otakaldayie Yesu pee edol ajo eidipaki aaiguanare, neitoki ainosu neshuku nena pisai tomoni uni e nkosholai ashukoki ilapolosak kituaak o lpayiani," 
Matthew27:4 nejo, “Aitarruoyie atakaldayie oltung'ani lemeeta entiyoto metari.” Kake etiaakita ninche, “Kainyoo natii ninche iyiook? Iyie ine.”" 
Matthew27:5 Nenang'aki nena pisai e nkosholai atua enkaji e Nkai neipung; nelo agor kewan. 
Matthew27:6 Nedumu ilapolosak nena pisai e nkosholai nejo, “Mebara ti nikipik olbene le Nkai amu osarge einosieki.”" 
Matthew27:7 Neiguana te nebo neinyiang'unye enkurma o laitobirani loo motioo pee enukarieki iltung'ana leeiking'a. 
Matthew27:8 Te nkaraki e ina pee eji ina kurma, enkurma o sarge o taata." 
Matthew27:9 Ina kata eitabayioki ina natejo oloiboni le Nkai oji Yeremia pee ejo, “Neya ninche impisai tomoni uni e nkosholai nainosieki ilo otudung'oki enkinyiang'a, otudung'okito enkinyiang'a lkulikae ayiok loo Siraeli." 
Matthew27:10 Neishooyo aainosie enkurma o laitobirani loo motioo anaa enaaitanapa nanu Olaitoriani.” 
Matthew27:11 Neitasheyieki Yesu te dukuya olgafanai neikilikuan olgafanai ninye ajoki, “Aa ira iyie olaiguanani loo Lyahudi?” Nejoki Yesu, “Iyie ojo.”" 
Matthew27:12 Ore pee eitang'or ilapolosak kituaak o lpayiani, neitu hoo ewaliki." 
Matthew27:13 Nejoki Pilato, “Ai mining eneba imbaa nikinteenikini?”" 
Matthew27:14 Kake eitu ewaliki te mbae hoo nabo, o meing'asiayu olgafanai oleng." 
Matthew27:15 Naa ore apa ake to sirua le Pasaka, naa kelaaki olgafanai esiamo oltung'ani obo oena anaa oloyieu ninche." 
Matthew27:16 Netii ina kata oltung'ani obo yioloti te nkarruoisho oena oji Barabas. 
Matthew27:17 Ore pee etumo, nejoki Pilato ninche, “Kalo iyieuu nalaaki intae? Ai Barabas anaa Yesu oji Kristo?”" 
Matthew27:18 Amu keyiolo ajo to lom eishooitie ninye. 
Matthew27:19 Ore pee eton Pilato to lorika le nkiguana neirriwaki enkitok enye olkilikuai ajoki, “Toduaa miaas ae te ilo tung'ani lemeeta entiyoto amu atanyamala duoo too mbaa kumok te nkidetidet te nkaraki ninye.”" 
Matthew27:20 Kake etukurrakita ilapolosak kituaak o lpayiani lo lorere metoomonu Barabas, neishooyo Yesu metaari." 
Matthew27:21 Neitoki ake olgafanai ajoki ninche, “Kaing'ae te kulo pokira aare iyieuu nalaaki intae?” Nejo, “Barabas.”" 
Matthew27:22 Nejoki Pilato, “Kaa naa aitaas Yesu oji Kristo?” Nejoki pooki, “Inchooi metashei.”" 
Matthew27:23 Nejo, “Aainyo, kaa torroni etaasa ninye?” Neitoki aaitulusoo aabuak aajo, “Inchoo metashei!”" 
Matthew27:24 Ore pee edol Pilato ajo meeta ae naidim ataasa, kake keponari ake oloilole nedumu enkare, neisuj inkaik te dukuya olorere nejo, “Maata taa nanu entiyoto to sarge lele tung'ani eng'urai maate ena bae.”" 
Matthew27:25 Newaliki iltung'ana pooki aajoki, “Inchoo osarge lenye meeu shumata iyiook o nkera ang.”" 
Matthew27:26 Nelaaki teina kata Barabas; neari Yesu too nkeenta, neishori metashei." 
Matthew27:27 Nerik isikarini lo lbalusui Yesu atua enkaji o lbalusui naji Praitorio neiturrurrokinote oltim pooki. 
Matthew27:28 Neoru nkilani enyena neishopoki olkila onyokie. 
Matthew27:29 Neshetu olmarisian loo lkiku nepik elukunya enye, nepik entiyani enkaina enye e tatene, negilaki kung aakueniyie nejoki, “Supa olaiguanani loo Lyahudi!”" 
Matthew27:30 Nenotaki ninye neoru ina tiyani naibung'ita, neoshioshie endukuya enye." 
Matthew27:31 Ore pee eidip aatakueniyie, neoru olkila onyokie neishopoki nkilani enyena, nerik ninye aapuo aashe." 
Matthew27:32 Ore epuku aapuo neinepu oltung'ani le Kirene oji Simon nearaki ninye pee enap osalaba. 
Matthew27:33 Ore pee ebaiki ewueji neji Golgata, (aa keji ewueji e mborbor)," 
Matthew27:34 neisho ninche Yesu enaisho oo sabibu naitushulakaki olodua metooko. Ore pee eishamisham neany eok. 
Matthew27:35 Ore pee eidip aatasho ninye, neor nkilani enyena aaoshie enkukuo." 
Matthew27:36 Netoni ninche aarrip ninye teine. 
Matthew27:37 Nepik ele sirata shumata elukunya enye aajo “YESU ELE OLAIGUANANI LOO LYAHUDI.” 
Matthew27:38 Neshei ninye teina kata te nebo o lapurrok aare, obo te nkaina e tatene, o likae te nkaina e kedianye." 
Matthew27:39 Nemor iloogiroo eipirripir ilukuny, aajo," 
Matthew27:40 “Eiyie doi ogil enkaji e Nkai nishet too nkolong'i uni, intajeu kewan; te naa iyie Enkerai e Nkai, tadou to salaba.”" 
Matthew27:41 Neiko sii ninche neijia lapolosak o lasirak te nebo lpaiyiani ejo," 
Matthew27:42 “Kulikae ake eitajeu nemeidim aitejeu kewan, olaa ninye olaiguanani loo Siraeli. Inchoo taata edou to salaba pee kiruk ninye.”" 
Matthew27:43 Ore amu Enkai etipika osiligi lenye inchoo naa eitajeu Enkai ninye tenaa keetayie tipat; amu etejo naa, “Kara Enkerai e Nkai!”" 
Matthew27:44 Nemor sii lelo apurrok ootashoki te nebo o ninye. 
Matthew27:45 Ore pee ebaiki saa ile, nerip enaimin enkop o metabaiki saa naaudo." 
Matthew27:46 Ore pee ebaya saa naaudo, neishir Yesu to ltoilo sapuk ajo, “Eli, Eli, lama sabaktani?” Naa inchere, “Enkai ai, Enkai ai, kaainyo pee kitung'uayie?”" 
Matthew27:47 Ore pee ening kulikae te lelo ooitashe teine nejo, “Eliya eipoto.”" 
Matthew27:48 Nekuet nabo kata obo le lelo nepik osuguroi enaisho naisuisho oo sabibu neremoki eng'udi naado neisho metooko. 
Matthew27:49 Nejoki ilkulikae, “Tapala maing'urai te naa kelotu Eliya aitajeu.”" 
Matthew27:50 Neitoki Yesu aishir to ltoilo sapuk, nedung'o tau." 
Matthew27:51 Neiperra nabo kata olkarasha le nkaji e Nkai aaku are, aiteru te shumata o metabaiki abori, neikirikira enkop nedanya ndapidapo;" 
Matthew27:52 nebolo inkuraren neitopiuni seseni kumok loo sinyat ooirurate; 
Matthew27:53 ore pee epuku too nkuraren eidipa Yesu atopiu, nejing ina ang sinyati neipang'aki ltung'ana kumok." 
Matthew27:54 Ore ilo kitok loo sikarini oorripito Yesu o lelo ootii te nebo ninye, pee edol eikirikire enkop o kulie baa naataasate, neureishoyu oleng ejo, “Kesipa Enkerai e Nkai ele tung'ani.”" 
Matthew27:55 Netii ine wueji inkituaak kumok naaing'orita te nelakua naatusujutua Yesu eing'uaa Galilaya eisiaaita ninye. 
Matthew27:56 Ore te nebo ninche etii Mariamu Magdalene o Mariamu ng'otonye Yakobo o Yosef o ng'otonye layiok le Sebedayo. 
Matthew27:57 Ore pee eaku teipa nelotu oltung'ani karsis oing'uaa Arimatea oji Yosef, otaa apa olointeng'eni le Yesu." 
Matthew27:58 Nelo sii apa ninye enetii Pilato neomonu osesen le Yesu. Neitanapisho Pilato pee eishori. 
Matthew27:59 Neitayu Yosef osesen, neirin te nkarasha sidai e kitani," 
Matthew27:60 neirragie te nkurare enye ng'ejuk nataguetua to soit, neibeleleng'oki osoit sapuk enkutuk e ngumoto, nelo." 
Matthew27:61 Netii ine Mariamu Magdalene o enkae Mariamu etoni aaipirare enkurare. 
Matthew27:62 Ore taaisere aa enkolong nasujita ene Nkitobirare, neiturrurrokino lapolosak kituaak o Lfarisayo Pilato," 
Matthew27:63 aajoki, “Lo kitok, kitadamutua aajo etejo, apa ilo kalamas eton eishu, ‘Ore pee elusoo nkolong'i uni, napiu.’" 
Matthew27:64 Intanapisho naa metorripi enkurare o metabaiki enkolong e uni, pee mepuonu lkipaareta lenyena aapurroo nejoki olorere, ‘Etopiwuo’; neaku elejare torrono oleng alang ene dukuya.”" 
Matthew27:65 Nejoki Pilato, “Iatata larripok loo sikarini, enchom entorrip anaa enindimidimi.”" 
Matthew27:66 Nepuo aaitagol erripoto e nkurare, nepik olmishire osoit te nebo ilarripok." 
Matthew28:1 Ore pee eidipayu enkolong e nkiyeng'iyeng naji Sabato ekenyu aa enkolong e dukuya e wiki, nelotu Mariamu Magdalene oo enkae Mariamu aaing'uraa enkurare." 
Matthew28:2 Na ng'ura ajo etijing'a olokirikiri kitok enkop, amu etadowuo olmalaika lo Laitoriani oing'uaa keper, nelotu neibeleleng'oo osoit netonie enchumata." 
Matthew28:3 Netiu enkomom enye anaa enkiwuang'ata, neibor inkilani enyena anaa empaso." 
Matthew28:4 Neikirikira ilarripok te nkaraki ninye, netiu anaa ilootuata." 
Matthew28:5 Nejoki ilo malaika inkituaak, “Emiureishoyu intae; amu kayiolo ajo Yesu ing'oruru otashoki." 
Matthew28:6 Metii ene amu etopiwuo anaa enatejo ninye. Wootu eng'urai ewueji apa neirragieki. 
Matthew28:7 Naa enchom entasiooi entoliki lkipaareta lenyena entiaaki, ‘Etopiwuo aing'uaa lootuata; neituruko alo Galilaya, naa teine idolidolo.’ Entadamu enaidipa atoliki intae.”" 
Matthew28:8 Nepuo nabo kata aaing'uaa enkurare te nkuretisho o te ng'ida sapuk, nekuet aaliki lkipaareta." 
Matthew28:9 Nenang'are Yesu ninche nejoki, “Entakuenya.” Nenyikaki ninche aaibung inkejek enyena aaserem." 
Matthew28:10 Nejoki Yesu, “Emiureishoyu; enchom entoliki ilalashera laainei meshomo Galilaya naa kaadol teine.”" 
Matthew28:11 Ore epuo te nkoitoi, nejing kulikae loo larripok atua enkanasa neliki ilapolosak kituaak imbaa pooki naataasate." 
Matthew28:12 Netumo ilpayiani te nebo, ore pee eidip aaiguanata, neisho isikarini impisai kumok aajoki," 
Matthew28:13 “Entiaaki olorere, lkipaareta lenyena ooetuo kewarie aapurroo kirura." 
Matthew28:14 Naa te nebaiki ele rorei nkiyiaa o lbalusui, nikirorie iyiook pee kintung'uaa intae enyamali.”" 
Matthew28:15 Neya ninche impisai neas anaa enatiaakaki. Neibulunyeki ele rorei Ilyahudi o metabaiki taata. 
Matthew28:16 Nepuo lelo ooiteng'eni tomon o obo Galilaya o metabaiki oldoinyo otiaaka Yesu enchom. 
Matthew28:17 Ore pee edol neserem ninye; kake eing'asha kulikae. 
Matthew28:18 Nelotu Yesu enetii neirorie ajoki, “Aaishooki enkidimata pooki te keper o te nkop." 
Matthew28:19 Enchom entaa iloreren pooki lkipaareta laainei, nimbatisasa te nkarna e Papa o ene Nkerai o ene Nkiyang'et Sinyati:" 
Matthew28:20 ninteng'ening'ene meibung'a inaaitanapa intae pooki; amu atii te nebo intae nkolong'i pooki o metabau enkiting'oto e nkop.” 
Mark1:1 Nji eikununo enkiterunoto oo lomon supati le Yesu Kristo Enkerai e Nkai. 
Mark1:2 Anaa enaigero oloiboni le Nkai oji Isaya pee ejo, “Kairriwaa olkipaaret lai dukuya iyie, oitobir enkoitoi ino." 
Mark1:3 Etii oltoilo obuaku ti ong'ata, ‘Entobiraki Olaitoriani enkoitoi, entobiraki irrekiei ooitoriori.’”" 
Mark1:4 Neipang'u ti ong'ata Yohana Olaibatisani, nelimu enkibatisa nayau enkirridunoto neyau empalakinoto oo ng'ok." 
Mark1:5 Nepuo enetii ninye iltung'ana le nkop pooki e Yudea, o le Yerusalem, neibatisa Yohana ninche to lkeju le Yordan eirridu ing'ok enye." 
Mark1:6 Naa enkila oo lpapit e ntames eishopito Yohana neeta enkeene e mpolos, naa lmaat o naishi e ong'ata enya." 
Mark1:7 Nelikioo ninye ejo, “Kelotu te siadi nanu ologol laalang nanu olaa kaamakua te nairrugokino alak enkeene e namuke enye." 
Mark1:8 Aidipa nanu aibatisa intae te nkare kake te Nkiyang'et Sinyati eibatisa ninye intae.” 
Mark1:9 Nelotu Yesu te nena olong'i eing'uaa enkanasa e Nasaret te Galilaya, neibatisa Yohana ninye to olkeju le Yordan." 
Mark1:10 Ore nabo kata pee eilepu Yesu te nkare, nedol pee ebolo keper nedou Enkiyang'et Sinyati eikununo anaa enturkuluo adoiki ninye;" 
Mark1:11 nelotu oltoilo oing'uaa keper ojo, “Ira iyie Oinoti lai lanyor; atishipe te iyie.”" 
Mark1:12 Ore nabo kata nerik Enkiyang'et e Nkai Yesu ong'ata. 
Mark1:13 Nebik ti ong'ata nkolong'i artam, etemita Sheitani; neboitare ng'uesi e ong'ata; neisiaai ilmalaika ninye." 
Mark1:14 Ore eidipaki aateen Yohana, nelotu Yesu Galilaya, alikioo lomon Supati le Nkai;" 
Mark1:15 ejo, “Etabaua enkata, netinyikua enkitoria e Nkai; erridutu, naa eruko ele rorei supat.”" 
Mark1:16 Ore eshepita Yesu enaiposha e Galilaya, nedol Simon o Andrea olalashe le Simon enang'aki orreshet atua enaiposha; amu ilarreshok loo sinkir apa ninche." 
Mark1:17 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Entusujuaki pee aitaa intae ilarreshok loo ltung'ana.”" 
Mark1:18 Neing'uaa nabo kata irresheta lenye nesuj Yesu. 
Mark1:19 Ore pee enyikaa peno, nedol Yakobo o Yohana ilayiok le Sebedayo etii atua empeut eripita irresheta." 
Mark1:20 Neipot nabo kata; neing'uaa Sebedayo menye lenye te mpeut eboitare ilaisiaayiak nesuj Yesu. 
Mark1:21 Nepuo Yesu o lkipaareta lenyena aabaya Kapernaum. Ore ake pee eaku enkolong e Sabato nejing enkaji e ntumo neiteng'enisho. 
Mark1:22 Neing'asiae te nkiteng'enare enye, amu eiteng'ena ninche anaa oloitore enajo, nemetiu anaa ilaigerok." 
Mark1:23 Netii teina kata ake te nkaji enye e ntumo oltung'ani oata oloirirua oiduruk; 
Mark1:24 nebuaku ajo, “Kainyoo iatayie iyie iyiook, Yesu le Nasaret? Iewuo aidaikie iyiook? Kaayiolo ajo ira ng'ae, ira iyie ilo Sinyati le Nkai.”" 
Mark1:25 Kake eisikong'a Yesu ninye ajoki, “Tigirayu, tupuku tung'uai ninye!”" 
Mark1:26 Nediding'unye oloirirua aiterreyie, nebuaku to ltoilo sapuk, nepuku aing'uaa." 
Mark1:27 Neing'asia pooki, o meikilikuanata aajo, “Kainyoo ena? Enkiteng'enare ng'ejuk! Eji keitore te ngolon iloiriruani ooiduruk, nening ninche ninye.”" 
Mark1:28 Ore ina kata ake, neibulu olning'o lenye pooki wueji te nene neemanita Galilaya." 
Mark1:29 Nepuku Yesu te nkaji e ntumo, nejing enkaji e Simon o Andrea, eboitare Yakobo o Yohana." 
Mark1:30 Neirrag enkaputani e Simon emuoi oloirobi, neinosakini ninye teina kata." 
Mark1:31 Nelotu neibung enkaina nedumu, neing'ueiki oloirobi, neinyototo aisiaai ninche." 
Mark1:32 Ore pee eaku teipa, etadoyie enkolong, nerikokini Yesu iltamuoyia pooki o lelo ooata loiriruani." 
Mark1:33 Nesotokino enkanasa pooki enkalo e kutuk aji. 
Mark1:34 Neishiunye ilkumok ooata muoyiaritin oo mpukunot kumok, nearaa iloiriruani kumok; neitu eisho iloiriruani meiroro amu keyiolo ninche ninye." 
Mark1:35 Ore enasirie, neinyototo Yesu ayok alo ewueji neliyio neomon teine." 
Mark1:36 Neing'oru Simon o lelo ooboitare. 
Mark1:37 Ore pee etum nejoki, “King'oru ltung'ana pooki.”" 
Mark1:38 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Emaape kunda kulie ang'itie, pee aliki sii ninche, amu ina doi pee aewuo enkop.”" 
Mark1:39 Neman Yesu Galilaya pooki, alikioo ilo rorei too nkajijik enye e ntumo, nearaa loiriruani." 
Mark1:40 Nelotu oltung'ani oata enkeeya oo lbolot asai Yesu, negilaki kung nejoki, “Tiniyieu eikindim aishiunye matisikayu.”" 
Mark1:41 Neing'urrie Yesu, neitorioo enkaina aiseyie, nejoki, “Ekayieu, tisikayu.”" 
Mark1:42 Neing'uaa enkeeya oo lbolot nabo kata ilo tunga'ani, nesika." 
Mark1:43 Neing'ode Yesu oleng nereu nabo kata," 
Mark1:44 nejoki, “Toduaa ake miliki likae tung'ani; kake shomo intoduaai kewan to lapolosani; ninchooyo entoki apa naitanapishe Musa te nkisujata, pee intadedeyie to lorere.”" 
Mark1:45 Kake etupukuo ake ilo tung'ani neiteru ainosaa, aibalie ilo omoni, neaku eitu eitoki Yesu aidim atijing'a enkang eduaakini, neaku ti ong'ata eton; nepuonu ltung'ana aayiaya eing'uaa nkaloli pooki." 
Mark2:1 Ore pee errinyo Yesu Kapernaum eishari nkuti olong'i, nening'i aajo etii ang." 
Mark2:2 Neiturrurrokino iltung'ana kumok o metaa, meetae enepaashareki te kutuk aji, einosaki Yesu ninche ilomon." 
Mark2:3 Nepuonunui neyakini oltung'ani tarrush oikaole onapita ltung'ana oong'uan. 
Mark2:4 Ore pee elau eneimu te nkumoi o lorere, nebol aadede shumata enkaji, ine neipirare. Ore pee eidip aatabol neitadou erruat napetita ilo oikaole." 
Mark2:5 Ore pee edol Yesu enkirukoto e lelo tung'ana, nejoki ilo oikaole, “Enkerai ai, kitapalakaki ng'ok inono.”" 
Mark2:6 Netoni teine laigerok nedamisho aajo too ltauja lenye," 
Mark2:7 “Kainyoo pee ejo ele tung'ani inji? Eijo kemorisho! Ai ng'ae oidim atapalaki ng'ok, leme Enkai ake?”" 
Mark2:8 Neyiolou nabo kata Yesu ina to ltau lenye nchere, kedamu ninche nena too ltauja lenye, neikilikuan ajoki, “Kaji etiu pee inkilikuanana ate nena too ltauja linyi?" 
Mark2:9 Kaa nalelek, ai te najoki ele oikaole, ‘Kitapalakaki ng'ok inono,’ ana ai te najoki, ‘Inyo, tudumu erruat ino shomo?’" 
Mark2:10 Kake ore pee itumutumu aatayiolo nchere keeta Enkerai e Tung'ani enkidimata te nkop napalakinye ng'ok.” Nejoki ilo oikaole," 
Mark2:11 “Aajoki, inyo, tudumu erruat ino shomo ang.”" 
Mark2:12 Neinyototo, nedumu nabo kata erruat enye, neipang te dukuya ninche pooki; o meing'asiata pooki neisis Enkai, ejo, “Eitu ai kata kidol embae naaijo ena!”" 
Mark2:13 Neitoki Yesu apuku teine nelo embata e naiposha, nesotokino iltung'ana kumok ninye neiteng'en ninche." 
Mark2:14 Ore ina kata eloito nedol Lawi ole Alfayo eton te nkapisi oo mpisai e kodi nejoki, “Tusujuaki.” Neinyototo Lawi asuj ninye." 
Mark2:15 Ore etonita anya endaa te nkaji e Lawi, netoni ilasotok kumok loo mpisai e kodi o looata ng'ok te nebo Yesu o lkipaareta lenyena; amu aikumok apa iloosujita." 
Mark2:16 Ore pee edol ilaigerok lo Lfarisayo eng'arie ninye endaa looata ng'ok o lasotok le kodi, nejoki lkipaareta lenyena, “Kaji etiu pee eng'arie ninye ilasotok le kodi o looata ng'ok endaa?”" 
Mark2:17 Ore pee ening Yesu, nejoki ninche, “Meyieu ilememuoi olabaani, iloomuoi ake ooyieu neitu alotu aipot isupati, kake ilooata ng'ok aewuo aipot.”" 
Mark2:18 Neaku enkata naitupukoo ate lkipaareta le Yohana o loo Lfarisayo. Nepuonu ltung'ana enetii Yesu nejoki, “Kaji etiu pee eitupukoo ate lkipaareta le Yohana o loo Lfarisayo, nemeitupukoo ate ilinono?”" 
Mark2:19 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Keitupukoo ate ilchoreta lo loyamishe eton eisiritore? Ore eton eisiritore oloyamishe, nemeidim aaitupukoi ate." 
Mark2:20 Keyooki aapuonu nkolong'i, naayae oloyamishe aaitung'uaa ninche, neitupukoo taa a teina olong." 
Mark2:21 Meetae oltung'ani oripaki enkarasha ng'ejuk enkila musana; amu te neripaki, neng'erunye ina ng'ejuk teidia musana, nejarari eng'erata." 
Mark2:22 Nemeetae oltung'ani opik enaisho ng'ejuk atua ilbenia musan; naa te nepik, nedany ina aisho ilbenia. Ilbenia ng'ejuko ake epiki enaisho ng'ejuk.”" 
Mark2:23 Ore egira Yesu aim inkurman te nkolong e nkiyeng'iyeng naji Sabato, ore epuoito neiteru lkipaareta lenyena aagilu ilukuny e nkano." 
Mark2:24 Nejoki Ilfarisayo ninye, “Amaa kaji etiu pee easita lkipaareta linono enemeishoruno too nkitanapat metaasi te nkolong e Sabato?”" 
Mark2:25 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Keitu ai kata isumusumu enataasa Daudi, etanyamala netir esumash ninye o lelo ooisiritore:" 
Mark2:26 eneikuna pee ejing enkaji e Nkai enapa kata aa Abiatar olapolosani kitok, nenya emukate nasinya nemeishoruno too nkitanapat meinosa likae leme olapolosani, nenya ninye neisho sii lelo ooboitare?”" 
Mark2:27 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Eitayioki enkolong e Sabato te nkaraki oltung'ani, eitu eitaini oltung'ani te nkaraki enkolong e Sabato;" 
Mark2:28 netaa Enkerai e Tung'ani Olaitoriani le nkolong e Sabato.” 
Mark3:1 Neitoki Yesu ajing enkaji e ntumo, netii ine oltung'ani oikaolo enkeeya enkaina." 
Mark3:2 Neing'or iltung'ana ninye tenaa keishiunye ilo tamoyiai te nkolong e Sabato, pee etum aaitang'oro ninye." 
Mark3:3 Nejoki Yesu ilo tung'ani oikaole enkaina “Wou ene.” 
Mark3:4 Nejoki ninche, “Kaa naishoruno too nkitanapat mataas te nkolong e Sabato, metaasi isupati anaa metaasi intorrok, meitopoki ana metaari metua?” Kake etigirate lelo tung'ana." 
Mark3:5 Nekurraki Yesu pooki nkonyek te ngoro, eisinanuo te nkaraki nerook oishuaa, nejoki ilo tung'ani “Intorioi enkaina ino!” Neitorioo, neishiu, enkaina." 
Mark3:6 Neipang Ilfarisayo, nepuo nabo kata aanya enkiguana eboitare esirit oo le Herode, pee egilunore ninye eing'oru olosek oarie Yesu metua." 
Mark3:7 Nerrinyo Yesu teine te nebo o lkipaareta lenyena aapuo enaiposha e Galilaya, nesuj olorora kitok oing'uaa Galilaya; o looing'uaa Yudea" 
Mark3:8 o Yerusalem o Idumea o lido kekun le Yordan o lorora kitok oing'uaa Tiro o Sidon; etoning'o nena pooki naataasa Yesu, nepuonu enetii ninye." 
Mark3:9 Nejoki lkipaareta lenyena meitobirakini empeut te nkaraki olorere, pee merratanyi ninye;" 
Mark3:10 amu eidipa aishiunye lkumok, ometaa keiding'akino lelo pooki oomuoyiaa ejo maiseyie." 
Mark3:11 Naa ore ake pee emaniki iloiriruani ooiduruk, nerriaa te dukuya ninye ebuaku aajo, “Ira iyie Enkerai e Nkai!”" 
Mark3:12 Nekurraki areiki ajoki pee melikioo. 
Mark3:13 Neilepaki Yesu oldoinyo, neipotu lelo ooyieu ninye openy nepuonu enetii ninye." 
Mark3:14 Negelu tomon o aare, ooisiritore ninye, pee etum airriwai metolikioi ororei le Nkai;" 
Mark3:15 neisho ninche enkitoria naararie iloiriruani. 
Mark3:16 Neisho Simon enkarna ajo Petero; 
Mark3:17 Yakobo le Sebedayo, o Yohana olalashe Yakobo, neisho lelo enkarna ajo Boanerge, aa keji Ilenkikurrukur:" 
Mark3:18 Andrea, o Filipo, o Bartolomayo, o Matayo, o Tomas, o Yakobo le Alfayo o Tadayo, o Simon olkanaani," 
Mark3:19 o Yudas Iskariot, laa ninye otakaldayie. Nelo ang." 
Mark3:20 Neitoki ake olorere aasoto, metaa metumoki Yesu o lkipaareta lenyena aainosa endaa." 
Mark3:21 Ore pee ening iltung'ana lenyena le sotua, nepuo pee epuo aaibung, amu kejo, “Etarruoyie elukunya.”" 
Mark3:22 Nejo laiteng'enak loo nkitanapat ootadoutuo eing'uaa Yerusalem, “Beelsebul eeta, naa ninye etumie engolon naararie loiriruani.”" 
Mark3:23 Neipotu enetii ninye, nejoki too nkitanyaanyukot, “Kaji eiko pee eidim Sheitani ataarai Sheitani?" 
Mark3:24 Teneoro enkitoria tiatua, nemeidim ina kitoria aitasho." 
Mark3:25 Naa te neoro enkaji tiatua kewan, nemeidim ina aji aitasho." 
Mark3:26 Naa te netudumakine Sheitani kewan aor, meitashe, kake keiting." 
Mark3:27 Meetae oltung'ani oidim atijing'a enkaji o ltung'ani ogol nearaa masaa enyena, eitu eng'as aen ilo ogol, pee etumoki taa ataara enkaji enye." 
Mark3:28 Esipa ajoki intae, epalakini ltung'ana ng'ok pooki, o emorore pooki namorisho ake;" 
Mark3:29 kake ore oloba anaa olomor Enkiyang'et sinyati, metum empalakinoto aikata, kake etum eng'oki ntarasi.”" 
Mark3:30 Amu ketejo ninche, “Oloirirua oiduruk eeta ninye.”" 
Mark3:31 Nelotu ng'otonye Yesu o lalashera lenyena; ore eitashe ninche te boo neirriwaa enkutuk meipoti ninye. 
Mark3:32 Netoni olorere aamanita ninye; nejokini, “Etii ng'utunyi o lalashera linono boo kinkilikuanu.”" 
Mark3:33 Newaliki ajoki, “Ai ng'ae yieyio o lalashera laainei?”" 
Mark3:34 Ore pee eitaman inkonyek lelo oomanita ninye, nejo, “Noolo yieyio o lalashera laainei!" 
Mark3:35 Ore pooki ng'ae oas enayieu Enkai, ninye olalashe lai, o enkanashe ai o yieyio.”" 
Mark4:1 Neitoki Yesu aiteru aiteng'enisho te mbata e naiposha e Galilaya. Neiturrurrokino iltung'ana kumok oleng, o metijing'a atua empeut aton tiatua enaiposha; netoni lelo tung'anak te nkop natoyio te mbata e naiposha." 
Mark4:2 Neutaki Yesu ninche mbaa kumok too nkitanyaanyukot nejoki: 
Mark4:3 “Entoning! Eshomo olaunoni aunisho. 
Mark4:4 Ore eunisho nedoiki kulikae anterera embata e nkoitoi, nepuonu motonyi aanya." 
Mark4:5 Nedoiki kulikae enkop oo soito nemetii inkulupuok kumok, nesioki aabulu, naa ore ake pee ebulu amu megut nkulupuok;" 
Mark4:6 ore pee eilepu enkolong nepej, naa ore amu meeta intona netoyu." 
Mark4:7 Nedoiki kulikae anterera atua lkiku nebulu lelo kiku negor, metaa eitu eiu ilng'anayio." 
Mark4:8 Nedoiki kulikae anterera atua nkulupuok sidain nebulu neiu ilng'anayio, neponari aaiu maa tomoni uni, maa ntomoni ile, maa iip.”" 
Mark4:9 Nejo Yesu, “Oloata nkiyiaa naaning'ishore, toning'o.”" 
Mark4:10 Ore etaa Yesu ake, neikilikuan lelo ooboitare tenebo lkipaareta lenyena enajo nena kitanyaanyukot." 
Mark4:11 Nejoki Yesu, “Eishooki intae entayiolo mbaa nemeibala e nkitoria e Nkai, kake ore te lelo ootii auluo, etiu mbaa pooki anaa nkitanyaanyukot;" 
Mark4:12 pee te neing'or, neing'or nemedol, naa te nening, nening nemejing'aa, pee meibelekenyakino ake Enkai, nepalakini.”" 
Mark4:13 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Aimining'ung'u ena kitanyaanyukoto? Kaji naa inkoko pee ining'ung'u nkulie kitanyaanyukot pooki?" 
Mark4:14 “Ore olaunoni, ororei eun." 
Mark4:15 Naa kulo ilootii embata e nkoitoi, ine eunieki ororei. Ore pee ening; nelotu Sheitani nabo kata aya ilo rorei otuunoki tiatua ninche." 
Mark4:16 Naa inji etiu lelo ootuunoki te nkop oo soito, lelo laa, ore pee ening ororei, neng'amu nabo kata te ng'ida;" 
Mark4:17 nemeeta ntona tiatua ate, kake kebikie enkiti kata; kake ore pee elotu osina anaa enkisilisilore te nkaraki ilo rorei, nerrorro nabo kata." 
Mark4:18 Ore lelo ootunokoki atua lkiku; naa lelo ooning ilo rorei," 
Mark4:19 kake ore pee ejing'aki nyamalaritin e nkop, o eng'ida oo masaa, o eng'uarrata e kulie tokitin, negor ilo rorei, metaa meisho etum ilng'anayio." 
Mark4:20 Kake ore lelo ootuunokoki enkulupuoni sidai, naa lelo ooning ilo rorei neiruk nepik iltauja neiu ilng'anayio maa tomoni uni, maa ntomoni ile, maa iip.”" 
Mark4:21 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Keyauni oltaa nepising'ari to ltoo, aashu epiki orunku le erruat? Mme eneiperere epiki?" 
Mark4:22 Amu meetae entoki naisudoyioki neme keji ake pee eibalunyeki; nemeetae entoki natunukaki neme keji ake pee eibalayu. 
Mark4:23 Oloata nkiyiaa naaning'ishore, toning'o.”" 
Mark4:24 Nejoki ninche, “Enining'o entobiraki ena nining'itoto; amu ore emborei ninchooyo iyie naa ninye kinchori sii iyie, nikiponikini." 
Mark4:25 Amu keponikini ilo oata aaisho kulie; ore ilo lemeeta, neoruni ina naata.”" 
Mark4:26 Nejo Yesu, “Etiu enkitoria e Nkai anaa te neisuaaki oltung'ani lanterera enkop." 
Mark4:27 Neirura, neinyototo dama o kewarie, nerumishoyu lanterera nebulu, nemeyiolo ninye eneikununye." 
Mark4:28 Enkop naitubulu openy, neng'asunye mbenek, neitoki ntapuka neitoki ilng'anayio aabulaki." 
Mark4:29 Kake ore pee eku ilng'anayio, neitayu oltung'ani olalem adung'u amu etabawua enkikesare.”" 
Mark4:30 Nejo Yesu, “Kainyoo kintanyaanyukie enkitoria e Nkai, anaa kaa kitanyaanyukoto kiaasishore te ninye?" 
Mark4:31 Etiu anaa enkantererai kini, enaa ore euni te nkop, ninye enkini aisul ilanterera le nkop;" 
Mark4:32 kake ore pee euni nebulu, aisul inkeek e ntim, neitayu lng'osil, o metaa kepuonu imotonyi e shumata aapik inkajijik oloip lenye.”" 
Mark4:33 Neinosaki Yesu iltung'anak ilo rorei aiko neijia too nkitanyaanyukot kumok, anaa enaidima ninche aatoning." 
Mark4:34 Neitu eirorie metii enkitanyaanyukoto, kake ore pee eaku ninye ake o lkipaareta lenyena neibalakinye ninche pooki toki." 
Mark4:35 Ore ina olong pee eaku teipa, nejoki Yesu lkipaareta lenyena, “Ematalang aapuo lido kekun.”" 
Mark4:36 Neing'uaa olorere nerik ninche ninye, etiu anaa duoo ake, teina peut. Netii kulie peuti ine te nebo ninye." 
Mark4:37 Nedumunye olkutati kitok, nedam ilopir le nkare ina peut, o metaa keiput enkare." 
Mark4:38 Kake etii ninye Yesu siadi empeut, eirura epetita enkirishet e lukunya; neinyeyie lkipaareta lenyena ninye nejoki, “Olaiteng'enani, aimme toki te iyie te nikindaaya?”" 
Mark4:39 Neinyototo Yesu neisikong osiwuo, nejoki enaiposha, “Tigirayu! Ntirring'ayu.” Neish osiwuo, neitiring'a enkare oleng." 
Mark4:40 Nejoki ninche, “Kainyoo pee itureishote?”" 
Mark4:41 Neiputukuny ninche, nejokino, “Ai ng'ae doi ele? Olaa kening ninye osiwuo o enaiposha?”" 
Mark5:1 Nebaiki Yesu o loiteng'eni lenyena olikae kekun le naiposha, te enkop oo Lgerasene." 
Mark5:2 Ore pee edou Yesu te mpeut, nenang'are nabo kata oltung'ani otamanya nkuraren, eeta oloirirua oiduruk:" 
Mark5:3 nemeetae oltung'ani oidima ateena ninye too lpisia. 
Mark5:4 Amu eteenaki katitin kumok too lpisia; nemeeta hoo obo oidimua aitoborro. 
Mark5:5 Naa kebuakita ake dama o kewarie too nkuraren o to o ldoinyo, near kewan too soito." 
Mark5:6 Ore pee edol Yesu te nelakua, nekuet aserem ninye." 
Mark5:7 Nebuaku to ltoilo sapuk, ajo, “Kainyoo kiatayie nanu, Yesu, Enkerai e Nkai natii Shumata Aisul? Aatasayia te Nkai, mikisilisil.”" 
Mark5:8 Amu ketiaaka, “Tupuku tung'uai ilo tung'ani, lo oirirua oiduruk!”" 
Mark5:9 Neikilikuan Yesu ajoki, “Aikiji ng'ae?” Newaliki ajoki, “Kaaji empuoto; amu aikira kumok.”" 
Mark5:10 Nesai ninche Yesuoleng pee mearaa teinakop. 
Mark5:11 Netii eluaata oo lbitiro nadaa teine te mbata o ldoinyo. 
Mark5:12 Nesai iloiriruani Yesu aajoki, “Irriwai iyiook maape aajing kuldo bitiro, nchoo iyiook matijing.”" 
Mark5:13 Neisho Yesu meshomo. Nepuku lelo oiriruani ooiduruk nejing lelo bitiro; ore ina luaata, nabaya nkalifuni are, neipirri aadoyio to loshong'ishong'i neng'orokino enaiposha, neimis te naiposha." 
Mark5:14 Neisik ilchekuti lenye, nepuo aalikioo teina anasa o teina kop. Nepuonu ltung'ana aadol enataase." 
Mark5:15 Nepuonu enetii Yesu, nedol oladuoo tung'ani oata oloirrirua eton teine, eishopo naa biyoto enkorrok enye, oladuoo otang'asa aata empuoto oo loiriruani: neureishoyu ninche." 
Mark5:16 Ore lelo ootoduaa ina nelikioo nena nataasate te ilo apa otang'asa aata iloiriruani o too lbitiro. 
Mark5:17 Neiteru aaomon Yesu metung'uai ina latia enye. 
Mark5:18 Ore ejing'ita Yesu empeut, neomon ilo apa otang'asa aata iloiriruani eji pee eisiritore." 
Mark5:19 Kake etanya Yesu nejoki, “Shomo ang enetii ilchoreta linono, toliki ninche eneba enikintaasa Olaitoriani, o eneikuna pee king'urrie.”" 
Mark5:20 Nelo ilo tung'ani neiteru alikioo te Dekapoli nena naaitaasa Yesu ninye; neing'asia ltung'ana pooki. 
Mark5:21 Ore pee eitoki Yesu alang'aki olikae kekun, neiturrurrokino olorora kitok; etii ninye embata e naiposha." 
Mark5:22 Nelotu ina kata obo le lelo ooitore enkaji e ntumo, oji enkarna Yairo; ore pee edol Yesu, nebatata too nkejek enyena." 
Mark5:23 Nesai, ajoki, “Etaa keye entito ai kiti. Wou inteleiki nkaik, pee eishiu, nepok.”" 
Mark5:24 Neiriamariyie Yesu ninye. Nesuj iltung'ana kumok aaiding'akino. 
Mark5:25 Netii enkitok natawe larin tomon o aare," 
Mark5:26 netanyamala oleng eruk ilabaak kumok, netumuta ntokitin pooki apa naata, nepal enaikashu, neponari arrishu." 
Mark5:27 Netoning'o eimakini Yesu, neimu te siadi tiatua olorere neiseyie olkila lenye." 
Mark5:28 Amu etejo, “Te naiseyie ninye olkila lenye, naishiu.”" 
Mark5:29 Negem nabo kata ewooto enye, nening to sesen lenye nchere eishiunyeki emuoyian enye." 
Mark5:30 Ore Yesu, etayiolo ajo eshomo engolon aing'uaa ninye, neibelekenya nabo kata tiatua olorere, nejo, “Ai ng'ae naaiseyie lkilani laainei?”" 
Mark5:31 Nejoki lkipaareta lenyena, “Idolita iltung'ana kumok kinding'akino, nintoki ajo, ‘Ai ng'ae naaiseyie?’ ”" 
Mark5:32 Neing'orisho Yesu pee edol olotaasa ina. 
Mark5:33 Kake eishoo ina kitok pee edol enaitaasaki, nelotu te nkuretisho eikirikira, nebatata te dukuya ninye, neliki sipat pooki." 
Mark5:34 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Na kerai, kinchiunye enkirukoto ino; shomo te seriani, ninchiu emuoyian ino.”" 
Mark5:35 Ore eton eirorita Yesu, nepuonu ilooing'uaa enkaji e ilo oitore enkaji e ntumo nejo, “Etua entito ino kainyoo pee intoki aitanyamal Olaiteng'enani?”" 
Mark5:36 Kake eitu eshilaa Yesu ina natejoki, nejoki oloitore enkaji e ntumo, “Miureishoyu, iruko ake iyie.”" 
Mark5:37 Neitu eisho likae tung'ani metusuja ninye leme Petero ake o Yakobo o Yohana olalashe Yakobo. 
Mark5:38 Ore pee ebaiki ninche enkaji e ilo oitore enkaji e ntumo, nedol olong'oling'oli lo lorere ooishirita nebuaku aaishir oleng." 
Mark5:39 Ore pee ejing atua, nejoki ninche, “Kainyoo pee inchirishiri aabuaku? Eitu eye enkerai keirura.”" 
Mark5:40 Nekueniyie iltung'ana ninye. Kake eipang'ie Yesu lelo pooki boo, nerik menye enkerai o ng'otonye o lelo ooiriamunore, nejing ine netii enkerai." 
Mark5:41 Neibung enkaina nejoki, “Talita kumi;” eji, “Entito kinyi, aajoki inyo.”" 
Mark5:42 Neinyototo nabo kata entito aitashe nelo, amu enoo larin tomon o aare embotoro enye. Ore nabo kata neing'asia iltung'ana oleng." 
Mark5:43 Nereiki Yesu ajoki pee meliki hoo likae tung'ani ena bae nejoki ninche meishoo ina tito endaa nanya. 
Mark6:1 Neing'uaa Yesu ine nelotu enkop enye e Nasaret, nesuju lkipaareta lenyena." 
Mark6:2 Ore te nkolong e Sabato neiteru aiteng'enisho te nkaji e ntumo; ore ilkumok ootoning'o ninye neing'asia, ejo, “Kaji enotie ele tung'ani kuna pooki. Kaa ng'eno eishooki ninye? Kebaa kuna baa e nking'asia naas inkaik enyena!" 
Mark6:3 Mme olaguetani loo nkeek doi ele, olayioni le Mariamu, naa olalashe Yakobo o Yosef, Yudas o Simon, naa aimetii inkanashera enyena atua iyiook?” Neany ninche eiruk ninye." 
Mark6:4 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Meishori oloiboni le Nkai enkanyit te nkop enye, o tiatua enkaji enye.”" 
Mark6:5 Nelaikino Yesu ataasa inenking'asia teine; ilkuti tung'ana ake oomuoi eiteleikia inkaik neishiunye. 
Mark6:6 Neing'asia ninye te nkaraki nemeeta ninche enkirukoto. Nemanaa too nkang'itie eiteng'enisho. 
Mark6:7 Neipotu Yesu lelo Ooiteng'eni lenyena tomon o aare, neisho meitoria iloiriruani torrok." 
Mark6:8 Neitanap ajoki, “Emishoroo toki te lototo inyi, eng'udi ake; naa emiya emukate, aashu olbene, aashu impisai too ilkonosi linyi." 
Mark6:9 Enchopoi inamuka kake eminchopoo lkilani maa are.” 
Mark6:10 Nejoki ninche, “Ore ake enkaji nijing'ijing'i, entotoni teine o entung'uai ine wueji." 
Mark6:11 Naa te neitu eng'amu intae dikae wueji, nemening intae, ore ipuopuo, empiripiroi enterit niaatata too nkejek inyi metaa shakeni te ninche.”" 
Mark6:12 Nepuo aalikioo nchere keishiaakino neirridu ltung'ana. 
Mark6:13 Nearaa ninche iloiriruani kumok, neelie eilata iltamuoyia kumok neishiunye." 
Mark6:14 Nening olaiguanani oji Herode ina; amu etayioloki enkarna e Yesu. Nejo kulikae, “Eitopiwuoki Yohana Olaibatisani too lootuata; ina pee easisho ena golon tiatua ninye.”" 
Mark6:15 Nejo kulikae, “Eliya doi.” Nejo sii kulikae, “Oloiboni le Nkai otiu anaa iloibonok le Nkai li apa.”" 
Mark6:16 Kake ore pee ening Herode nejo, “Yohana, olapa latudung'oyie elukunya eitopiwuoki.”" 
Mark6:17 Amu eirriwayie Herode ltung'ana meibung'i Yohana, neen apik jila te nkaraki Herodias, enkitok o lalashe lenye oji Filipo amu eyama apa ninye." 
Mark6:18 Amu etiaaka Yohana Herode, “Mikinchoro too nkitanapat iyama enkitok o lalashe lino.”" 
Mark6:19 Neetayie Herodias elap Yohana neaku keyieu near metua, Kake etalaikine," 
Mark6:20 amu keure Herode Yohana, eyiolo ajo oltung'ani supat naa sinyati, nerrip eseriani enye. Ore pee elo neinining nemiloyu; eji neng'ida sii te nening." 
Mark6:21 Kake eewuo erishata to lkekun otoinyieki Herode neitoomonisho ninye neipot ilkituaak lenyena o ltung'ana arikok le Galilaya. 
Mark6:22 Ore pee elotu entito e Herodias aranyaki, neitiship Herode o lomon lenyena; nejoki olaiguanani ina tito, “Toomonoki entoki ake pooki niyieu, naa kaaisho.”" 
Mark6:23 Nenya olmumai ajo, “Ore entoki ake pooki nikiomon, kaaisho o metabaiki ematua e nkop naitore.”" 
Mark6:24 Neipang nelo ajoki ng'otonye, “Kainyoo aomonu?” Nejoki ng'otonye, “Elukunya e Yohana Olaibatisani.”" 
Mark6:25 Nejing'u nabo kata asieku enetii olaiguanani, neomon ajoki, “Ayieu nikincho nabo kata elukunya e Yohana Olaibatisani te mbeshen.”" 
Mark6:26 Neisinanuo naleng olaiguanani; kake ore te nkaraki ilmuma lenyena o lelo omon lenyena neaku, meyieu nedot ina natiaaka." 
Mark6:27 Neirriwaa olaiguanani nabo kata osikari le rripore, neitanap ninye meyau elukunya e Yohana. Nelo ilo nedung'u elukunya te jila," 
Mark6:28 neyau ina lukunya te mbeshen, neisho ina tito; neisho entito ng'otonye." 
Mark6:29 Ore pee ening lkipaareta le Yohana, nepuonu aaya osesen lenye, neturoo te nkurare." 
Mark6:30 Nerrinyunye ilkipaareta enetii Yesu, neliki ninye nena pooki naataasa o naaiteng'enishote." 
Mark6:31 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Wootu oopeny emaape eneliyio, eyeng'iyeng'ata enkiti kata.” Amu aikumok iloopuonu epuo, neaku meeta ninye erishata nainosie endaa." 
Mark6:32 Nepuo te mpeut ewueji neliyio aa ninche ake oopeny. 
Mark6:33 Netoduaaitie iltung'ana kumok, neyiolou, neipirri aapuo too nkejek ine eing'uaa nena ang'itie pooki, neng'asie ine wueji." 
Mark6:34 Ore pee edou Yesu te mpeut nedol iltung'ana kumok, neing'urrie ninche, amu etiu anaa ntare nemeeta olchekut; neiteru aiteng'en mbaa kumok." 
Mark6:35 Ore pee emutu, nepuonu lkipaareta lenyena enetii nejoki, “Keliyio ene wueji, nemuto;" 
Mark6:36 intanapa iltung'ana, meshomo nkurman o kuna ang'itie naamanita ene aainyang'aki ate entoki nanya.”" 
Mark6:37 Kake etawalikia Yesu ajoki ninche, “Enchoo intae ninche entoki nanya.” Nejoki ninche ninye. “Aikipuo aainyiang'u mukateni oo ndinarii iip are, pee kincho meinosa?”" 
Mark6:38 Nejoki ninche, “Kaja mukateni niatata intae? Enchom eng'urai.” Ore pee eing'uraa neyiolou, nejoki, “Imiet o sinkir aare.”" 
Mark6:39 Neitanap Yesu lkipaareta lenyena meitotona olorere too nkujit naanyori, anaa ltimito." 
Mark6:40 Netoni aaitayu ltimito maa iip, anaa maa onom." 
Mark6:41 Ore pee edumu Yesu nena mukateni imiet o sinkir aare neshumu inkonyek aing'or shumata, nemayian, nebel imukateni neisho lkipaareta lenyena meishoo lelo tung'ana; neoriki lelo sinkir aare ninche pooki." 
Mark6:42 Nenya pooki neraposho. 
Mark6:43 Nesotu mbelat naatelekuaki o noo sinkir sii neiput inkikapuni tomon o aare. 
Mark6:44 Ore lelo ooinosa nena mukateni nera nkalifuni imiet ilewa. 
Mark6:45 Nejoki Yesu lkipaareta lenyena nabo kata meshomo, nejing empeut neituruk aapuo lido kekun, aapuo Betsaida eitanapare ninye olorere." 
Mark6:46 Ore pee eorore, nelo aomon to ldoinyo." 
Mark6:47 Ore etaa teipa, eidipa empeut ashomo empolos e naiposha, netii ninye openy enkop natoyio." 
Mark6:48 Nedol ajo keekenya lkipaareta lenyena earare enkurtoroto e mpeut amu kenang'are osiwuo ninche. Ore saa naudo e nkewarie nelotu enetii ninche, elo eporito enkare. Neyieu negiroo." 
Mark6:49 Kake etoduaa ninche Yesu eloito te shumata e nkare nejo ke nkukuu tung'ani, nebuaku aaishir;" 
Mark6:50 amu etoduaa pooki ninye, neiputukuny. Kake eirorie Yesu ninche nabo kata nejoki, “Entagoluoto, nanu doi, emiureisho.”" 
Mark6:51 Nejing ninye atua empeut te nebo ninche negira osiwuo. Neing'asia pooki," 
Mark6:52 amu eitu ejing'aa enapa kias oo mukateni, kake eitagoloki iltauja lenye." 
Mark6:53 Ore pee elang ninche lido kekun, nepuonu enkop e Genesaret, neen empeut te mbata e naiposha." 
Mark6:54 Ore pee epuku te mpeut neyiolou iltung'ana Yesu teina kata ake. 
Mark6:55 Nekuet aaman ina kop pooki, neiteru aariku ltung'ana pooki oomuoi too rruatin enye aaya ewueji ake pooki nening'oki aajo etii." 
Mark6:56 Neaku ore pooki wueji nelo, too nkang'itie, too nkanas kituaak, o teina kop, nerikokini iloomuoyiaa aairragie too wuejitin neemirishoreki, nesai Yesu meishoo eiseyie ninye olcholoi lo lkila lenye; ore lelo pooki ooiseyie neishiunyeki." 
Mark7:1 Ore pee eiturrurrokino Ilfarisayo enetii Yesu, eboitare ninche ematua oo lasirak, ooetuo eing'uaa Yerusalem." 
Mark7:2 Nedol aajo kenya kulikae ooiteng'eni lenyena endaa eiduruk inkaik, eji meisuja." 
Mark7:3 (Amu ore Ilfarisayo, naa neijia etiu Ilyahudi pooki, menya endaa eitu eisuj inkaik enye, pee eitabaya nkoon oo loo nkakuyiaa." 
Mark7:4 Naa te nepuonu eing'uaa ineemirishoreki; menya endaa eitu eng'as aaisuj ate. Naa keeta kulie koon naaitabaya ninche, anaa enkisujata oo nkikompeni o motioo o ntokitin oo suyan.)" 
Mark7:5 Neikilikuan Ilfarisayo o lasirak Yesu aajoki, “Kainyoo pee mesuj lkipaareta linono inkoon oo loo nkakuyiaa metaa kenya endaa too nkaik naaiduruk.”" 
Mark7:6 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Kesipa enotoko Isaya pee eibonisho ajo tialo intae, irara isunkuro, anaa enaigero; ‘Too nkutukie ake, aayanyit, kulo tung'ana, kake kaalakuaniki ltauja lenye nanu," 
Mark7:7 naa pesho aaserem nanu, aa nkoon oo ltung'ana eiteng'enare." 
Mark7:8 Itapalaitie intae inkitanapat e Nkai, nikurrakiki aaibung inkoon oo ltung'ana.’ ”" 
Mark7:9 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Inotito intae olosek lianyienyie nkitanapat e Nkai, pee itumutumu aaitabai nkoon inyi." 
Mark7:10 Amu etejo, Musa ‘Iyanyita minyi o ng'utunyi,’ nejo sii, ‘Ore olomor menye anaa ng'otonye, neiririkino keeya.’" 
Mark7:11 Kake nijojo intae, ‘Te nejoki oltung'ani menye aashu ng'otonye, Ore dupoto duoo nikitumie nanu etaa Korban (aa taa enkishooroto naishori Enkai)" 
Mark7:12 nimintokiki aaisho ilo meitaasa menye anaa ng'otonye toki.’ 
Mark7:13 Ore teina nintaa pesho ororei le Nkai te nena koon inyi nintarasakinono. Niasiasa doi kulie kumok naaijo nena.” 
Mark7:14 Neitoki Yesu aipotu olorere nejoki, “Entoning'oki intae pooki, naa enchoo ejing'aa intae." 
Mark7:15 Meetae entoki e oriong oltung'ani naa te nejing ade atua neidim aisarkionie ninye; kake mbaa naapuku tiatua oltung'ani naaitaa ninye torrono. 
Mark7:16 Te neeta oltung'ani nkiyiaa naaning'ishore toning'o.” 
Mark7:17 Ore pee ejing aji, neing'uaa olorere, neikilikuan lkipaareta lenyena enajo ina kitanyaanyukoto." 
Mark7:18 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Aimejing'aa sii ninche intae? Aimidolidolo aajo ore pooki toki natii oriong oltung'ani, te nejing nemeidim aitarruoi;" 
Mark7:19 amu te nejing, mme oltau lenye ejing kake enkoshoke, neipang ade ake?” (Ore pee ejo neijia neitisiny indaiki pooki.)" 
Mark7:20 Nejo, “Ore inaapuku tiatua oltung'ani, ninche naaitarruoo oltung'ani." 
Mark7:21 Amu atua oltung'ani eing'uaa indamunot torrok, enkiborra oo nkonyek, empurrorre, earata metua, eloloito," 
Mark7:22 ng'uarrat torrok, enkarruoisho, olosek torrono, enkipororonkos, olom, esulare, olwuasa, emodai." 
Mark7:23 Atua oltung'ani eing'uaa kuna torrok pooki, naa kuna naaisarkionie oltung'ani.”" 
Mark7:24 Ore pee epuku Yesu teine nelo olkirine le Tiro o Sidon. Nejing enkaji nabo, nemeyieu neyiolouni aajo etii ine; kake etalaikinoteki aaisudoi." 
Mark7:25 Kake ore nabo kata netii enkitok, naibung'a entito enye kiti oloirirua oiduruk, nening ajo etii Yesu ine, nelotu, nebatata too nkejek e Yesu aserem." 
Mark7:26 Ore ina kitok naa enoo Lyunani, o losho le Foinike te inoto. Neomon metaarai oloirirua teina tito enye." 
Mark7:27 Nejoki Yesu ina kitok, “Inchoo eng'asi aaitoti nkera, amu meishiaakino teneyae mukateni oo nkera aanang'aki ildiein.”" 
Mark7:28 Kake etawalikia ninye nejoki, “Ee itisipa lo kitok; kake ore sii ninche ildiein kelutoo emisa nesotu rrarrat naitadoyio nkera.”" 
Mark7:29 Nejoki Yesu, “Ore te nkaraki ina nitejo, shomo ang; etung'uayie oloirirua entito ino.”" 
Mark7:30 Nelo ang, neinepu enkerai eirrag te rruat, neshomo oloirirua." 
Mark7:31 Nerrinyunye Yesu aing'uaa ilo kirine le Tiro, neimaa Sidon alo enkalo e naiposha e Galilaya, nepolos aimaa atua Dekapoli." 
Mark7:32 Nerikokini oltung'ani ming'ani laa penyo sii neiro, nesai meiteleiki inkaik." 
Mark7:33 Nerik aitung'uaa atua olorere ewueji naa ninye ake openy, nepik ilkimojik inkiyiaa enyena, nenotu inkamulak neiseyie olng'ejep lenye;" 
Mark7:34 neing'or keper, neitadoiyio oltau, nejoki ilo tung'ani, “Efafata,” nchere, “Taboloyu.”" 
Mark7:35 Nebolo nkiyiaa, enyena nelaa eneta o lng'ejep lenye, neiro aitobiraki." 
Mark7:36 Neitanap Yesu pee meliki likae tung'ani; kake ore anaa pee eitanap ajoki pee melikioo, neitulus ninche eitadaraa ina." 
Mark7:37 Nelus enking'asia e Yesu neaku keji, “Etaasa mbaa pooki aitobiraki ore ninye ilming'anta o lemeiro, neidimie aisho meiroro.”" 
Mark8:1 Ore te nena olong'i, enyaaka olorora kitok asoto, nemeeta entoki nanya, neipotu Yesulkipaareta lenyena nejoki ninche," 
Mark8:2 “Kaata olng'ur tele orere, amu nkolong'i uni taata aaisiritore nanu nemeeta entoki nanya." 
Mark8:3 Naa te najoki meshomo nkang'itie enye, neiterriaa te nkoitoi; neetuo kulikae eing'uaa enelakua.”" 
Mark8:4 Newaliki lkipaareta lenyena aajoki, “Kaji eiko oltung'ani te neitoti kulo tung'ana too mukateni te ne ti ong'ata?”" 
Mark8:5 Neikilikuan Yesu ajoki, “Kaja mukateni niatata intae?” Nejoki, “Naapishana.”" 
Mark8:6 Neitanapisho metotona ltung'ana te nkop, nedumu nena mukateni naapishana, ore pee eisho Enkai enashe nebelibel neisho lkipaareta lenyena meitarasaki olorere. Neitarasaki ninche ilo orora." 
Mark8:7 Neeta sii lkuti sinkir kutiti. Ore pee emayian, neitanapisho meitarasari sii ninche lelo aaisho olorere."
