Mark8:8 Nenya, neraposho. Nesotuni lmong'oishi ootelekuaki, nkikapuni naapishana naabore." 
Mark8:9 Nebaya lelo tung'ana nkalifuni ong'uan. 
Mark8:10 Neitanap Yesu meshomo ang; nejing ninye nabo kata atua empeut te nebo lkipaareta lenyena, nepuo enkalo olkerenket le Dalmanuta." 
Mark8:11 Nepuonu Ilfarisayo, aaishankarrarre Yesu aayie olmonekie oing'uaa keper aatem." 
Mark8:12 Neitadoiyio Yesu oltau te nguton, nejo, “Kainyoo pee eing'oru kulo tung'ana le na kata olmonekie oing'uaa keper? Esipa, ajoki intae, meetae hoo olmonekie oishori ltung'ana le na kata.”" 
Mark8:13 Neing'uaa Yesu ninche, neitoki ajing empeut nelo olikae kekun." 
Mark8:14 Netorikine lkipaareta eitu eyau mukateni; neaku emukate nabo ake eeta tiatua empeut. 
Mark8:15 Neitanap Yesu ninche ajoki, “Entorrip ate te nkisuisho oo Lfarisayo o te nkisuisho e Herode.”" 
Mark8:16 Neiguana maate aajo, “Mukateni mikiaata.”" 
Mark8:17 Neyiolou Yesu ina, nejoki ninche, “Kainyoo pee ijokinono eji miatata mukateni? Keton ake mejing'aa intae naa aimining'ung'u? Kaji etiu pee egol intae ilukuny?" 
Mark8:18 Aimidolidolo niatata nkonyek? Niatata nkiyiaa aimining'ishosho? Aimidamumu? 
Mark8:19 Amaa pee abel imukateni imiet abelaki ltung'ana nkalifuni imiet, kaja nkikapuni oo lmong'oishi naabore nitasotutuo?” Nejoki, “Tomon o aare.”" 
Mark8:20 “Oo napa naapishana natebelaka nkalifuni ong'uan: kaja nkikapuni naabore oo lmong'oishi nitasotutuo?” Nejoki, “Naapishana.”" 
Mark8:21 Nejoki Yesuninche, “Neton ake intae mining'ung'u?”" 
Mark8:22 Nepuonu Betsaida. Nerikokini Yesu olmodooni, aaomon meiseyie." 
Mark8:23 Nerik ilo modooni aibung enkaina, neipung'ie teina ang. Ore pee enotaki nkonyek enyena, neiteleiki nkaik, neikilikuan ajoki, “Idol toki?”" 
Mark8:24 Neshumu nkonyek nejo, “Kadol iltung'ana; kake etiu anaa lkeek, epuoito.”" 
Mark8:25 Neitoki ake Yesu aiteleiki nkonyek enyena nkaik, neing'orisho ninye oleng neishiu, nedolishoyu aitobiraki." 
Mark8:26 Neisho elo ang, nejoki, “Nimirrinyo ake ajing ena ang.”" 
Mark8:27 Nelo Yesu o lkipaareta lenyena, nkang'itie e Kaisaria e Filipi. Ore epuo te nkoitoi neikilikuan Yesu lkipaareta lenyena ajoki, “Kejo iltung'ana kara nanu ng'ae?”" 
Mark8:28 Nejoki ninche ninye, “Yohana Olaibatisani, nejo kulikae, Eliya; nejo sii kulikae ira obo loo lapa oibonok le Nkai.”" 
Mark8:29 Neikilikuan Yesu ajoki, “Kake amaa intae, nijojo kara ng'ae?” Newaliki Petero ajoki, “Ira iyie Kristo.”" 
Mark8:30 Neitanap ninche pee meliki likae tung'ani. 
Mark8:31 Neiteru Yesu aiteng'en ilooteng'eni lenyena ajoki meeta nchere pee meisilisili Enkerai e Tung'ani too mbaa kumok neany ilpayiani o lapolosak kituaak o lasirak, neari metua, ore pee elusoo nkolong'i uni neitoki apiu." 
Mark8:32 Nelimu ina aibalunye. Nerik Petero ninye neiteru aisikong. 
Mark8:33 Kake eibelekenye Yesu ore pee edol lkipaareta lenyena, neing'ode Petero, nejoki, “Shomo kurum ai Sheitani! Amu mitii iyie enkalo e Nkai, kake enoo ltung'ana itii.”" 
Mark8:34 Neipotu Yesu olorere te nebo o lkipaareta lenyena meetu enetii ninye, nejoki ninche, “Te neyieu oltung'ani naasuj nanu, nchoo metanya inaayieu oltau lenye, nedumu osalaba lenye naasuj nanu." 
Mark8:35 Amu ore olojo aitopok enkishui enye neiminie; ore oloiturraa enkishui enye te nkaraki ele rorei supat, neitajeu." 
Mark8:36 Amu ainyoo edupore oltung'ani, te netum enkop pooki neiturraa enkishui enye?" 
Mark8:37 Anaa kainyoo einosie oltung'ani enkishui enye? 
Mark8:38 Amu ore olodol enkurruna te naaimaki nanu aashu ororei lai tena ishoi oo ng'ok naloloito nedol sii ninye Enkerai e Tung'ani enkurruna eimaki ninye teina olong elotu te nkitoo e Menye eiriamunore ilmalaika sinyat.” 
Mark9:1 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Esipa, ajoki intae, etii doi ilooitashe tene lemeishamisham keeya katukul o metaba anaa nedol enkitoria e Nkai eewuo te ng'olon.”" 
Mark9:2 Ore pee eishunye nkolong'i ile nerik Yesu Petero o Yakobo o Yohana, neilepie enchumata o ldoinyo oodo aa ninche ake. Neibelekenya emua e Yesu edolita ninche." 
Mark9:3 Neitintilu lkilani lenyena, aaiborru oleng, enaa meetae olaisujani te nkop oidim aiborrie metotiwuo neijia." 
Mark9:4 Neliooyu Eliya o Musa te dukuya ninche; eirorie Yesu. 
Mark9:5 Nejoki Petero Yesu, “Olaiteng'enani, aisidai kitii ene; nchoo iyiook mateshetu ilng'oborri okuni, olino obo o le Musa o le Eliya”" 
Mark9:6 naa aimeyiolo enajoito, amu eiputukunyo oleng." 
Mark9:7 Neitemoo enkatampoi ninche, nepuku oltoilo ojo, “Nele Oinoti lai lanyor, ninye entoning.”" 
Mark9:8 Ore nabo kata ake, ejo maing'orisho neitu eitoki aadol likae otii te nebo ninche. Yesu ake openy." 
Mark9:9 Ore edou to ldoinyo, neitanap Yesu amitiki einosaki likae tung'ani nena naatoduaa ninche, o metaba naa nepiu Enkerai e Tung'ani aing'uaa ilootuata." 
Mark9:10 Neibung ninche ilo rorei, neikilikuana maate aajo. “Kainyoo doi ena najo ake, kepiu aing'uaa ilootuata?”" 
Mark9:11 Neikilikuan ninche Yesu aajoki, “Kainyoo pee ejo ilaiteng'enak loo nkitanapat eji meeta nchere pee meng'as Eliya alotu?”" 
Mark9:12 Newaliki Yesu ajoki ninche, “Esipa eng'as Eliya alotu neitang'ejuk imbaa pooki. Paa amaa, kainyoo pee ejo lkigerot tialo Enkerai e Tung'ani, eji keitamei too mbaa kumok nemenuni?" 
Mark9:13 Kake ajoki nanu intae, eewuo Eliya, neitaas ninche ninye enapa ake nayieu neitaas, anaa enatisirakaki ninye.”" 
Mark9:14 Ore pee epuonu enetii ilkulikae ooiteng'eni, nedol emanita olorere kumok, neishankarrarre ilaiteng'enak loo nkitanapat ninche." 
Mark9:15 Ore ake pee edol ilo orere Yesu, neing'asia oleng, nekuetiki aairoroki." 
Mark9:16 Neikilikuan ajoki, ninche, “Kainyoo doi ena shankar niaatata o ninche?”" 
Mark9:17 Newaliki oltung'ani obo te ilo orere ajoki, “Olaiteng'enani, atorikuo duoo enkayioni ai enitii, eeta oloirirua lemeisho eiro;" 
Mark9:18 olaa ore pee eibung, nenang'ie enkop; neitayu ilabur, nenya lala neikaolo; najo ajoki lkipaareta linono metaarai, nelaikino.”" 
Mark9:19 Newaliki Yesu ajoki ninche, “Wooi ena ishoi nemeeta enkirukoto! Kebaa aton aboitare intae? Kapal intae o anu? Entoriku ninye ene natii.”" 
Mark9:20 Nerikokini; ore pee edol ilo oirirua Yesu neiterreyie enkayioni nabo kata, nebatata te nkop neiperipera, neitayu ilabur te nkutuk." 
Mark9:21 Neikilikuan Yesu menye enkerai ajoki, “Kanu iterua atum ena pukunoto?” Nejo, “Te keraisho eiterua." 
Mark9:22 Naa katitin kumok etanang'aka ninye atua enkima nenang'aki enkare ejo aar; kake te nindim iyie ataasa ae, ing'urrie iyiook taretu iyiook.”" 
Mark9:23 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Eji te nindim Keidimayu imbaa pooki to loiruk.”" 
Mark9:24 Nebuak nabo kata menye ina ayioni nejo, “Airuko, ore eneton eitu airuk taretokoki!”" 
Mark9:25 Ore pee edol Yesu olorere ekuetu aasotokino, neing'ode ilo oirirua oiduruk, nejoki, “Lo oirirua ming'ani lemeiro, nanu laaitore, tupuku tung'uai ena ayioni, nimingil ajing ae kata.”" 
Mark9:26 Nebuaku aishir neiterreyie aipushupush oleng, nepuku, netiu enkayioni anaa olmeneng'ani o metejo lkumok, “Ae etua!”" 
Mark9:27 Kake eibung'a Yesu enkaina nedumu, neinyototo aitashe." 
Mark9:28 Ore pee ejing atua aji, neikilikuan lkipaareta lenyena too nkurrat aajoki, “Kainyoo pee eitu kindim iyiook aatarai ninye?”" 
Mark9:29 Nejoki, “Meararoyu ena pukunoto ti ae oitoi neme te nkomono ake.”" 
Mark9:30 Nepuo Yesu o lkipaareta lenyena teine neimaa Galilaya. Nemeyieu Yesu neyiolou hoo oltung'ani: 
Mark9:31 amu lkipaareta lenyena eiteng'enita, ajoki, “Keitarasakini Enkerai e Tung'ani inkaik oo ltung'ana, near ninche ninye metua; ore pee eidipi aatar metua, neishari nkolong'i uni nepiu.”" 
Mark9:32 Kake eitu ening'u ninche ina natejo, neureyu sii eikilikuan." 
Mark9:33 Nepuonu Kapernaum; ore etii Yesu aji neikilikuan ninche ajoki, “Kainyoo naaji enchankar niaatata te nkoitoi?”" 
Mark9:34 Negira ninche; amu keishankarrate aajo kalo olkitok te pooki. 
Mark9:35 Neton Yesu neipot lelo tomon o aare; nejoki ninche, “Ore oloyieu neaku ole dukuya, nchoo metaa ninye obayie te pooki neaku osinka le pooki.”" 
Mark9:36 Nedumu enkerai, neitasheyie te mpolos enye; nedumu aibung too nkaik enyena nejoki ninche," 
Mark9:37 “Ore pooki ong'amu enkerai anaa ena te nkarna ai, nanu eng'amu; ore olaang'amu, neme nanu ake eng'amu kake ilo laairriwua.”" 
Mark9:38 Nejoki Yohana ninye, “Olaiteng'enani, kitoduaa oltung'ani earaa iloiriruani te nkarna ino, nikimitiki, amu mme ole ncholiek ang.”" 
Mark9:39 Kake etiaaka Yesu, “Emimitiki, amu meetae hoo oloas embae sapuk te nkarna ai, laa ore aa enaidipie ina, naaitoki aidim atusukenya." 
Mark9:40 Amu ore ilo lemegilunore iyiook naa ole nkalo ang. 
Mark9:41 Kesipa, ajoki intae, ore ake oloisho intae enkikompe e nkare entook te nkaraki naipotieki intae Kristo, nemeeta nchere pee etala olerrinyore lenye." 
Mark9:42 “Ore ake oloitapong'oo nabo e kuna kutiti naairuk nanu, enaikash te neenikini ninye osoit oiutuutishoreki emurt, nenang'akini enaiposha." 
Mark9:43 Naa ti nikintapong'oo enkaina ino, tudung'oi; enaikash te nijing enkishui iata enkumur alang ti niata nkaik pokira are, nilo Yehanam atua enkima nemeye ntarasi;" 
Mark9:44 (enemeye lkuru lenye nemeye enkima.) 
Mark9:45 Naa ti nikintapong'oo enkeju ino, tudung'oi; amu enaikash te iyie ti nijing enkishui ira ng'ojine, alang ti nikinang'akini Yehanam, iata nkejek pokira are;" 
Mark9:46 (ewueji nemeye ilkuru lenye, nemeye enkima.)" 
Mark9:47 Naa ti nikintapong'oo enkong'u ino, tukurtu; enaikash ti nijing enkitoria e Nkai iata enkong'u nabo alang ti nikinang'akini Yehanam iata inkonyek pokira are;" 
Mark9:48 ewueji nemeye ilkuru lenye, nemeye enkima." 
Mark9:49 “Amu keitisinyi pooki ng'ae te nkima, anaa enaitisinyi olasar te munyan." 
Mark9:50 Sidai emunyan; kake amaa te nelau emunyan enkisukut enye, kaji eikoni pee eitokini aaisukutie? Enoto emunyan tiatua ate, nitonini te seriani intae maate.”" 
Mark10:1 Nedumunye Yesu teina alo, nelotu olkerenket le Yudea te lido kekun le Yordan, neiturrurrokino ninye aaitoki iltung'ana kumok enetii ninye; neitoki ake aiteng'en ninche anaa enatamoo apake." 
Mark10:2 Nepuonu Ilfarisayo enetii ninye neikilikuan, ejo pee etem aajoki, “Keishiaakino te neiturraa oltung'ani enkitok enye?”" 
Mark10:3 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Kaa eitanapa intae Musa?”" 
Mark10:4 Nejoki, “Eishorua Musa meigeroki oltung'ani enkitok enye empalai naiturrarie, nearaa.”" 
Mark10:5 Kake etiaaka Yesu ninche, “Te nkaraki engolon oo ltauja linyi pee etisiraka intae ina kitanapata." 
Mark10:6 Kake ore ebaiki enkiterunoto e nkop, eitobira Enkai olee o eng'oruoi." 
Mark10:7 Te nkaraki ena pee eing'uaa olee menye o ng'otonye, neibung'are enkitok enye," 
Mark10:8 neaku ninche pokira are osesen obo, Metaa meekure era are kake etaa osesen obo." 
Mark10:9 Ore naa inaaitutumo Enkai mincho ake erish oltung'ani.” 
Mark10:10 Ore ti aji neitoki ake lkipaareta lenyena aaikilikuan ena bae. 
Mark10:11 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Ore ake oloiturraa enkitok enye neyam ae, keloloito." 
Mark10:12 Naa te neiturraa enkitok olmoruo lenye, nelo meyama likae, keloloito.”" 
Mark10:13 Neyakini Yesu nkera kutiti pee etum aiteleiki nkaik, nebuaaki lkipaareta lenyena lelo tung'ana ooriku." 
Mark10:14 Ore pee edol Yesu ina, negoro, nejoki lkipaareta lenyena, “Enchoo nkera epuonu enatii emimitiki; amu enoo nkera naatiu anaa kuna enkitoria e Nkai." 
Mark10:15 Kesipa ajoki intae, ore olemeng'amu enkitoria e Nkai anaa enang'amu enkerai kiti, nemejing katukul.”" 
Mark10:16 Nemuataki inkera inkaik amayian, neiteleiki nkaik nemayian ninche." 
Mark10:17 Ore te nkoitoi epuku Yesu alo, nekuetiki oltung'ani negilaki kung, neikilikuan ajoki, “Olaiteng'enani supat, kaji aiko pee ajung enkishui nemeish?”" 
Mark10:18 Nejoki Yesu, “Kaji etiu pee kijo nanu supat? Meetae hoo obo supat, Enkai ake esupat." 
Mark10:19 Iyiolo iyie nkitanapat, inchere, ‘Miar metua, miloloito, mipurrisho, minteeniki likae elejare, minkonyisho to losek, iyanyita minyi o ng'utunyi.’ ”" 
Mark10:20 Nejoki ninye, “Olaiteng'enani, aibung'a kuna pooki ebaiki apa ara enkerai.”" 
Mark10:21 Neing'or Yesu ninye akurraki nkonyek nenyorru, nejoki, “Nabo ake nikitong'orikia; shomo, timira iniata pooki nincho laisinak, naa itum olchumati te keper; nikilotu taa asuj.”" 
Mark10:22 Neidisie enkomom enye teina bae, nelo eisinanuo; amu keeta imasaa kumok." 
Mark10:23 Neing'or Yesu nkaloli pooki, nejoki lkipaareta lenyena, “Kegol atiu aja to lkarsis pee ejing enkitoria e Nkai!”" 
Mark10:24 Neing'asia lkipaareta too rorei lenyena. Kake eigilie Yesu ajoki, “Nakera, kegol atiu aja pee ejing oltung'ani enkitoria e Nkai!" 
Mark10:25 Entames nalelek te neim enaudoto o ltidu alang olkarsis ejing enkitoria e Nkai.” 
Mark10:26 Neing'asia lkipaareta lenyena oleng, nejoki ninche ninye, “Ae ng'ae naa kenya oidim atajeu?”" 
Mark10:27 Neing'or Yesu ninche nejoki, “Meidimayu too ltung'ana, kake mme neijia etiu te Nkai; amu keidimayu mbaa pooki te Nkai.”" 
Mark10:28 Neiteru Petero ajoki ninye, “Kitung'uaitie iyiook pooki toki aasuj iyie.”" 
Mark10:29 Nejo Yesu, “Esipa ajoki intae, meetae hoo obo otung'uayie enkaji anaa lalashera anaa nkanashera anaa ng'otonye anaa menye anaa nkera anaa nkurman, te nkaraki nanu o te nkaraki kulo omon supati," 
Mark10:30 lemetum inkatitin iip taata te na kata, aa nkajijik o lalashera o nkanashera o noo ng'otonye o nkera o nkurman te nebo oloisilisili, naa ore te ina kata nalotu netum enkishui nemeish." 
Mark10:31 Kake etii ilkumok ooiturukutuo ooyooki aaku ile siadi, neaku ilooisiadutua ile dukuya.”" 
Mark10:32 Ore etii Yesu o lkipaareta lenyena enkoitoi, eilep aapuo Yerusalem eiturukito Yesu te dukuya ninche; neing'asia ninche, ore iloosujita netureishote. Neitoki ake arik lelo tomon o aare neiteru aliki nena naapuo aatum ninye." 
Mark10:33 Nejoki, “Yerusalem kilep aapuo; naa keitarasakini Enkerai e Tung'ani ilapolosak kituaak o laiteng'enak loo nkitanapat, nedung'oki ninche ninye enkiguana e keeya, neitarasaki Iloreren;" 
Mark10:34 nesukeny ninche ninye, nenotaki, neosh aaitame near metua ore pee eishari nkolong'i uni nepiu.”" 
Mark10:35 Neisho Yakobo o Yohana, ilayiok le Sebedayo, nepuonu enetii Yesu, nejoki, “Olaiteng'enani, kiyieu nintaas iyiook embae ake pooki nikiomon iyie.”" 
Mark10:36 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Kainyoo iyieuu naitaas intae?”" 
Mark10:37 Nejoki ninche, ninye, “Inchoo iyiook metotona obo lang te nkaina ino e tatene neton olikae te ne kedianye, te nkitoo ino.”" 
Mark10:38 Kake etiaaka Yesu ninche, “Miyiololo intae ina niomonunu. Indimidimi sa aatook enkikompe naok nanu, aashu meibatisai intae te nkibatisa naaibatisai nanu?”" 
Mark10:39 Nejoki, “Ee kindim.” Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Iokioko taa ninye enkikompe naok nanu, neibatisae intae te nkibatisa naaibatisai nanu;" 
Mark10:40 kake ore entonata te nkaina ai e tatene aashu te ne kedianye, mme nanu oishoru, kake ene lelo laa ninche eitobirakaki.”" 
Mark10:41 Ore pee ening lelo pokira tomon ina, neiteru aagorokino Yakobo o Yohana." 
Mark10:42 Neipotu Yesu ninche enetii nejoki, “Iyiololo aajo ore lelo ooitaa ate ilaitoriak loo Loreren neitoreisho te ng'olon, negilu iltung'ana lenye kituaak ninche." 
Mark10:43 Kake mme neijia etiu te intae, kake ore olinyi oyieu neaku kitok neaku olaisiaayiani linyi," 
Mark10:44 ore oloyieu neituruk neaku osinka le pooki. 
Mark10:45 Amu eitu elotu Enkerai e Tung'ani meisiaai kake keewuo aisiaaisho, neishoru enkishui enye metaa elakunoto oo lkumok.”" 
Mark10:46 Nepuonu Yeriko; ore epuo aaing'uaa Yeriko eiriamariyie Yesu lkipaareta lenyena o lorora kitok, netii olmodooni oomonisho oji Bartimayo ole Timayo, oton te mbata e nkoitoi." 
Mark10:47 Ore pee ening eji Yesu le Nasaret ilo neiteru abuak eishiraki ajo, “Yesu, olayioni le Daudi, ing'urrieki!”" 
Mark10:48 Nebuaaki ilkumok aajoki metigirayu; kake etabuaa oleng ajo, “Olayioni le Daudi, ing'urrieki nanu!”" 
Mark10:49 Neitashe Yesu nejo, “Empoto.” Neipoti ilo tung'ani modooni aajoki, “Intagoluoyu; inyo amu kimpot ninye.”" 
Mark10:50 Nenang'aa olkila lenye, neipid nelo enetii Yesu." 
Mark10:51 Neng'amaa Yesu ajoki, “Kaa iyieu naaitaas?” Nejoki ilo modooni, “Lo kitok kayieu nadolishoyu.”" 
Mark10:52 Nejoki Yesu, “Shomo, kinchiunye enkirukoto ino.” Nedolishoyu ina kata ake neirukurukore Yesu te nkoitoi." 
Mark11:1 Ore pee etaaniki ninche embata e Yerusalem, aabaiki Betfage o Betania, to Ldoinyo loo Loirienito, neirriwaa Yesu lkipaareta aare lenyena," 
Mark11:2 nejoki, “Enchom enda ang naipirare intae, ore ake pee ijing'ijing'i nitumutumu olkurrarru oena, leitu ae kata eked likae tung'ani. Entalaku entereu ene." 
Mark11:3 Ore te nejoki intae oltung'ani, ‘Kainyoo pee inkoko inji?’ Entejo, ‘Olkitok oatayie enkolat naa keshuku nabo kata.’ ”" 
Mark11:4 Nepuo ninche, neinepu olkurrarru eena te kishomi ti auluo enkoitoi nalala e nkanasa, nelaku ninche." 
Mark11:5 Nejoki lelo ooitashe teine, “Kainyoo pee igirara aalaku olkurrarru?”" 
Mark11:6 Neliki ina natiaaka Yesu, neisho ninche meshomo." 
Mark11:7 Nerewaki Yesu ilo kurrarru, neirotoki lkilani lenye, neked atonie." 
Mark11:8 Neisalaash ilkumok lenye lkilani te nkoitoi nalala, neisalaash kulikae ilng'osil ooata mbenek ootudung'utuo too nkurman." 
Mark11:9 Ore lelo ooituruk o loosujita nebuaku aajo, “Hosana! Emayiana ilo olotu te nkarna o Laitoriani!" 
Mark11:10 Emayiana enkitoria nalotu e papa lang Daudi! Hosana te shumata naisul!” 
Mark11:11 Nejing Yesu Yerusalem, nelo atua enkaji e Nkai, ore pee eshil pooki toki, nemuto, neipang alo Betania o lelo pokira tomon o aare." 
Mark11:12 Ore te nkolong nasujita ina, pee eshukunye Yesu te Betania, netir esumash." 
Mark11:13 Ore pee edol te nelakua olng'aboli oata mbenek, nelo ejo ebaiki netumie toki. Nejo abaiki, mbenek ake eeta, amu mme enkata oo lng'abolo." 
Mark11:14 Nejoki ilo ng'aboli, “Metaa mikingil likae anyayie lng'anayio ntarasi.” Nening lkipaareta lenyena." 
Mark11:15 Nepuonu Yerusalem. Nejing Yesuenkaji e Nkai neiteru aaraa lelo oomirisho o looinyang'isho te nkaji e Nkai, neibeleleng'oo imisai oo laibelekenyak loo mpisai o lorikan le lelo omir inturkuluoni;" 
Mark11:16 nemit meitoki oltung'ani anap toki aitudung enkaji e Nkai. 
Mark11:17 Neiteng'enisho, nejoki ninche, “Keitu eigeri aajo, ‘Keaku enkaji ai ene sayiare too loreren pooki?” Kake intaa intae enkapune oo laisimak." 
Mark11:18 Nening ilapolosak kituaak o laiteng'enak loo nkitanapat ina neing'oru enkoitoi pee ear Yesu; kake etureita ninye, amu eing'asiayie enkikoo enye ilo orora pooki." 
Mark11:19 Ore pee ebau enteipa neipang teina anasa. 
Mark11:20 Ore epuoito te nkakenya, nedol olang'ole ng'aboli etoyio o metabaiki intona." 
Mark11:21 Nedamu Petero nejoki Yesu, “Olaiteng'enani, ng'ura ajo etoyio olang'ole ng'aboli litediaa!”" 
Mark11:22 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Eruko Enkai." 
Mark11:23 Esipa ajoki intae, ore ake olojoki ele doinyo, ‘Tadotunye tanang'akinoyu enaiposha’, nemeing'ash to ltau lenye, kake neiruk ina najo nchere keaku, neaku te ninye anaa enatejo." 
Mark11:24 Metaa ajoki intae, ore embae ake pooki ninkilikuanunu te nkomono, eruko nchere itumutumu neaku ina." 
Mark11:25 Naa ore nkatitin pooki nintasheshe aaomon, entapalakinoto pee epalaki sii ninche intae Papa linyi otii keper nkitarruorrot inyi." 
Mark11:26 (Kake ti nimipalakinono, nemepalaki sii ninye Papa linyi otii keper intae nkitarruorrot inyi.)”" 
Mark11:27 Neitoki ake aapuonu Yerusalem. Ore eloolo Yesu te nkaji e Nkai, nepuonu aayiaya ninye ilapolosak kituaak o lasirak o lpayiani." 
Mark11:28 Nejoki ninche ninye, “Kaa golon ena niaasie iyie kuna baa, naa ae ng'ae likinchoo ena golon niasie?”" 
Mark11:29 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Kaikilikuan intae embae nabo; entawalikiaki pee, aliki intae engolon naasie kuna baa." 
Mark11:30 Amaa apa enkibatisare e Yohana ae keper eing'uaa anaa ei ltung'ana? Entawalikiaki.” 
Mark11:31 Neishankarra aajo maate, “Ti nikijo, ‘Keper eing'uaa,’ naa kejoki iyiook, ‘Oo naa pee eitu irukuruku?’" 
Mark11:32 Kake ti nikijo, ‘Ltung'ana eing'uaa?’ ” Neureyu iltung'ana, amu etonyorraitie pooki inchere oloiboni le Nkai o dede Yohana." 
Mark11:33 Neaku etawalikitia Yesu aajoki, “Mikiyiolo.” Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Maliki sii nanu intae eneing'uaa enkitoria naasie kuna baa.”" 
Mark12:1 Neiteru Yesu airorie ninche too nkitanyaanyukot ajoki, “Etuuno oltung'ani enkurma oo sabibu, neitaman enkikarrata, neturu engumoto naironyieki lng'anayio, neshetu oltalet oodo, neitaaki laturok enkurma enye, nelo enkop nalakua." 
Mark12:2 Ore pee ebau enkata enye, neirriwaki lelo aturok osinka, meishoo ematua oo lng'anayio le ina kurma." 
Mark12:3 Neibung lelo aturok ilo sinka near, nearaa meeta toki." 
Mark12:4 Neitoki ake airriwaki likae sinka, nebor ilo elukunya, neinyal aasul." 
Mark12:5 Neirriwaki ake likae, near ilo metua; neiko sii neijia kulikae kumok, neosh kulikae near kulikae metuata." 
Mark12:6 Neaku eton apa eeta likae obo, laa oinoti lenye kirotet; neirriwaki aitabayie ninye, nejo, ‘Keyanyit oinoti lai.’" 
Mark12:7 Kake etiakinote lelo aturok ooitaakaki enkurma, ‘Ele doi olajung'oni; wootu, mataar metua pee eaku enaang enjung'ore.’" 
Mark12:8 Neibung ninche ninye near metua, nenang'aki auluo ina kurma oo sabibu." 
Mark12:9 Kaa kenya eitaas olopeny ina kurma oo sabibu? Kelotu kenya aidaikie lelo aturok neisho ninye kulikae enkurma oo sabibu. 
Mark12:10 Keitu doi isumusumu ele kigeroto ojo, ‘Ilo soit otanyaita ilashetak otaa osoit kitok lo lmairroto;" 
Mark12:11 Olaitoriani otaasa ena, naa ene nking'asia too nkonyek ang’?”" 
Mark12:12 Neing'oru ninche eneiko pee eibung Yesu, kake etureita olorere, amu etayioloito aajo ninche eipirta ina kitanyaanyukoto; neaku eshomo aaing'uaa." 
Mark12:13 Neirriwakini Yesu ematua oo Ilfarisayo o ematua oo le ncholiek e Herode, pee epuonu aarresh too rorei lenyena." 
Mark12:14 Nepuonu enetii nejoki, “Olaiteng'enani, kiyiolo aajo ira iyie, asipani, nimishilaa hoo iyie likae tung'ani; amu mishilaa enkitoo oo ltung'ana, kake enkoitoi ake e Nkai iutaa too sipat. Keishiaakino te nikincho Kaisari kodi, anaa aimeishiaakino?" 
Mark12:15 Aikilak, ana aimikilak?” Kake ore amu etayiolo Yesu esunkuroisho enye, nejoki, “Kainyoo pee kitemiteme? Eyakaki empisai, maing'ura.”" 
Mark12:16 Neyakini. Nejoki ninche, “Ai ng'ae ele osirakino ena pisai naa ae ng'ae eigero?” Nejokini, “Kaisari.”" 
Mark12:17 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Enchoo Kaisari ine Kaisari, ninchosho Enkai ine Nkai.” Neing'asiakino ninche Yesu oleng." 
Mark12:18 Nepuonu Sadukayo enetii Yesu, lelo taa oojo eji meetae empiunoto; neikilikuan aajoki;" 
Mark12:19 “Olaiteng'enani, eigeroko Musa iyiook nchere te neye oltung'ani alashe olikae, neing'uaa enkitok meeta enkerai, neyam olalashe ina kitok, pee eiki olalashe nkera." 
Mark12:20 Eetae apa lalashera oopishana; neyam olbotor enkitok, ore pee eye neitu eing'uaa nkera." 
Mark12:21 Neyam oliaare, neye neitu eiu nkera; naa neijia eikuna oliokuni;" 
Mark12:22 neaku eitu eing'uaa nkera pokira oopishana. Ore te nkiting'oto neye ina kitok. 
Mark12:23 Amaa kenya te mpiunoto oo lootuata, keaku ene ng'ae ina kitok? Amu eyama naa pokira oopishana?”" 
Mark12:24 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Eijojo mme nji taa doi etiu pee ipong'oriri, mme ilkigerot miyiololo nimiyiololo sii engolon e Nkai?" 
Mark12:25 Amu te nepiu kenya lelo too lootuata, meyamisho nemeyami, kake ketiu anaa lmalaika te keper." 
Mark12:26 Naa amaa doi enkitopiunoto oo lootuata, keitu isumusumu too nkitanapat e Musa, te noshi wueji neimaki osanag oyupuyup, pee ejoki Enkai ninye. ‘Ara nanu Enkai e Abraham, o Enkai e Isaak o Enkai e Yakobo?’" 
Mark12:27 Mme Enkai oo lootuata ninye, kake enoo looishu, itapong'ori oleng.”" 
Mark12:28 Nelotu obo loo laiteng'enak loo nkitanapat nening eishankarra, ore pee ening ajo etawalikia Yesu aitobiraki, neikilikuan ninye ajoki, “Kaa kitanapata naituruk?”" 
Mark12:29 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Ena naituruk, ‘Toning'o iyie Siraeli; Enkai ang Olaitoriani; obo Olaitoriani;" 
Mark12:30 naa tonyorra Olaitoriani Enkai ino to ltau lino pooki, o te nkishui ino pooki, o te ng'eno ino pooki, o te ngolon ino pooki.’" 
Mark12:31 Naa ena eniare, ‘Tonyorra ole latia ino anaa eninyor kewan.’ Meetae ae kitanapata kitok nalang nena.”" 
Mark12:32 Nejoki ilo aiteng'enani loo nkitanapat, “Itisipa, Olaiteng'enani; itisipa nchere nabo Enkai, nemeetae likae leme ninye;" 
Mark12:33 naa ti ninyorru ninye to ltau lino pooki o te ng'eno ino pooki, o te ngolon ino pooki, ninyorru sii ole latia ino anaa eninyor kewan, nelang nena kishorunot pooki naapeji elulung'a nelang ilasarri ake pooki.”" 
Mark12:34 Ore pee edol Yesu ajo etawalikia te ng'eno, nejoki, “Milakuaniki iyie enkitoria e Nkai.” Ore ebaiki ina kata, metii oltung'ani onyaaka aitieu aikilikuana Yesu ae bae." 
Mark12:35 Ore eiteng'enisho Yesu te nkaji e Nkai, nejo, “Kaji etiu pee ejo laiteng'enak loo nkitanapat Kristo eji olayioni le Daudi?" 
Mark12:36 Netejo Daudi openy, etuutaka Enkiyang'et Sinyati, nchere, ‘Etiaka Olaitoriani, Olaitoriani lai, Totona te nkaina ai e tatene, o matipika lmang'ati linono abori nkejek inono.’" 
Mark12:37 Eipoto Daudi openy ajo Olaitoriani; kaji eitoki aakunye enkerai enye?” Neinining ilo orora kitok ninye te ng'ida. 
Mark12:38 Ore eiteng'enisho Yesu nejo, “Entodol ake ate too laiteng'enak loo nkitanapat, oonyor aaishopo lkilani adoru neyieu neirorokini too neemirishoreki," 
Mark12:39 nenyor ilorikan le nkitoo too nkajijik e nkomono o wuejitin e nkitoo too mashoi," 
Mark12:40 nedaare nkajijik oo nkolia neitaakuno eitoodor enkomono. Keyooki lelo aatum enkiguana kitok.” 
Mark12:41 Neton Yesu aishiaakinore eneitadoikini mpisai e nkaji e Nkai, nejur olorere epik mpisai ilo sanduku. Nepik iltung'ana kumok karsisi te nkumoi." 
Mark12:42 Nelotu enkoliai aisinani, nepik isuyan are naabaya olking'otore obo." 
Mark12:43 Neipotu Yesu lkipaareta lenyena enetii, nejoki, “Esipa, ajoki intae, etipika ena oliai aisinani nkumok alang lelo kulikae pooki ootipika ilo sanduku." 
Mark12:44 Amu etipika pooki te nkumoi naata; kake ore ninye to sina lenye netipika entoki duoo pooki naata, entoki duoo pooki naishuyie.”" 
Mark13:1 Ore ina kata epuku Yesu te nkaji e Nkai, nejoki obo loo lkipaareta lenyena ninye, “Olaiteng'enani, ng'ura eneba kulo soito le nking'asia o kuna ajijik e nking'asia!”" 
Mark13:2 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Idol kuna kituaa ajijik sapuki? Meing'uari tene osoit obo oiteleikino olikae lemesulakini enkop.”" 
Mark13:3 Ore etonita Yesu to Ldoinyo loo Loirienito eipirare enkaji e Nkai, neikilikuan Petero o Yakobo o Andrea too nkurrat aajoki," 
Mark13:4 “Toliki iyiook, kanu ebau kuna baa, naa kalo olmonekie oitodolu enkata nataanu kuna baa pee eitabari?”" 
Mark13:5 Neiteru Yesu ajoki, “Enteng'enuoto meitapong'oo intae oltung'ani." 
Mark13:6 Kepuonu lkumok te nkarna ai, ejo, ‘Nanu ilo!’ Neitapong'oo lkumok." 
Mark13:7 Naa te nining'ining'i njoreitin o lmarenke loo njoreitin, eming'aing'ae; amu meeta nchere pee metiu neijia; kake eton eng'or ina kiting'oto." 
Mark13:8 Amu kedumakino olorere olikae orere, nedumakino enkitoria enkae kitoria; netumi olokirikiri le nkop too wuejitin kumok, netumi lameitin; naa ena enkiterunoto oo sinaitin." 
Mark13:9 “Kake entodol ate. Amu keitarasakini intae nkiguanat; neari intae too nkajijik enye e ntumo; nintasheshe te dukuya ilaitoriak o laiguanak te nkaraki nanu, pee iakuku shakeni te dukuya ninche." 
Mark13:10 Nemeeta nchere pee meng'asi aalikioo ele rorei supat too loreren pooki. 
Mark13:11 Naa ore pee erikuni intae enkiguana aaitarasaa, eming'aing'ae te dukuya aajo aikijo aa; kake ina naishori intae teina saa entejo, amu mme intae ooiro, kake Enkiyang'et Sinyati." 
Mark13:12 Naa keitarasaa olalashe olalashe lenye metari metua, neitarasaa menye enkerai enye, nedumakino nkera iloomenye, neitarasaa metari metuata." 
Mark13:13 Naa keibayuni intae iltung'ana pooki te nkaraki enkarna ai. Kake ore olong'iri ometabaiki enkiting'oto naa keitajeuni. 
Mark13:14 “Kake ore pee idolidolo ina taboi nayau emutata eitashe te wueji nemeishiaakino (tayiolo taa ake oloisuma ena), esikaki ildoinyo ilootii Yudea." 
Mark13:15 Ore olotii shumata enkaji nemedou ajing aji ashoroo ae toki. 
Mark13:16 “Ore olotii enkurma nemeshuko ang ajo ashoroo olkila lenye. 
Mark13:17 Wooi nena tuaan o naaitanakisho te nena olong'i! 
Mark13:18 Entasaisho pee mebau nena te nkata e nkirobi. 
Mark13:19 Amu ore te nena olong'i kepuonu isinaitin leitu ae kata etumi anaa apa pee eitayu Enkai enkop o te nne, nemeitokini ae kata aatum intarasi." 
Mark13:20 Te neme Olaitoriani oitodorropa nena olong'i, anaata meetae hoo oltung'ani obo opok. Kake ore te nkaraki ilgelunot lenyena ootegelua ninye, neitodorropa ninye nena olong'i." 
Mark13:21 Ore ina kata te nejoki intae oltung'ani, ‘Ng'ura, nele Kristo otii ende!’ Anaa ‘Ng'ura, nelido otii ende!’ Emiruk." 
Mark13:22 Keinyototo loo Kristo le lejare o loibonok le lejare neitoduaaya lmonek o mbaa e nking'asia, ejo maitapong'oi, te naa keidimayu, ebaiki lelo ootegeluaki." 
Mark13:23 Kake entodol ate; aidipa atoliki intae mbaa pooki te dukuya. 
Mark13:24 “Kake ore te nena olong'i, etulusoitie lelo sinaitin, nemisimisu enkolong, nemeitoki olapa awang'u" 
Mark13:25 nesulunye ilakir te keper, neikirikirieki engolon o loing'ang'e." 
Mark13:26 Nedoluni ina kata Enkerai e Tung'ani elotu too nkatampo te ngolon sapuk o te nkitoo. 
Mark13:27 Neirriwaa teina kata ilmalaika, meiturrurro lelo gelunot lenyena aaitung'uaa ilubot pokira ong'uan, neitung'uaa ineeiting'ie enkop o neeiting'ie keper." 
Mark13:28 “Enteng'ena ate te nkitanyaanyukoto o lng'aboli; laa ore ake pee enanau ilng'osil neiturumisho mbenek, niyiolouu aajo etinyikua erishata oladalu." 
Mark13:29 Neijia naa etiu, ti nidolidolo nena baa etabautua, niyiolouu aajo etataana ninye, auluo etii." 
Mark13:30 Esipa ajoki intae, meishari ena ishoi eitu eitabari kuna baa pooki." 
Mark13:31 Keishari keper o enkop, kake meishari irorei laainei." 
Mark13:32 “Kake ore ina olong o ina saa, meetae hoo obo oyiolo, aimeyiolo ninche lmalaika le keper, nemeyiolo Enkerai e Tung'ani, Papa ake oyiolo." 
Mark13:33 Entodol ate, entashololoto; amu miyiololo aajo kanu ebau ina kata." 
Mark13:34 Etiu anaa oltung'ani oshomo elototo, ore elo ti ang, neing'ueiki ilaisiaayiak, neisho ake oltung'ani eramatare enye, neitanap olorrip kishomi metashololoyu." 
Mark13:35 Entashololoto naa amu miyiololo aajo kanu elotu olopeny enkaji, anaa ae te nteipa, anaa ae te nasirie" 
Mark13:36 pee melotu ake neluamisho neinepu intae irurara. 
Mark13:37 Naa ore ina najoki intae, neijia ajoki pooki: entashololoto.”" 
Mark14:1 Ore etaa nkolong'i are naatiooyo pee ebau Pasaka, nebau sii osirua loo Mukateni Nemeisuiisheki. Neing'oru ilapolosak kituaak o laiteng'enak loo nkitanapat eneiko pee eibung Yesu to losek, aar metua;" 
Mark14:2 amu etejo ninche, “Neme taa te nkata o sirua, mepuku ake olong'oling'oli lo lorere.”" 
Mark14:3 Ore etii Yesu Betania enkaji e Simon oata enkeeya oo lbolot. Ore einosita endaa, nejing'u enkitok naata oltulet lo soit oji alabasta nebore eilata narropil naleng naji nardo, nagol oleng enkinyang'unoto, nedany ilo tulet nebukoki ina ilata elukunya e Yesu." 
Mark14:4 Kake etii ilootagorote nejokino, “Kainyoo pee eitarruoyioki ena ilata narropil aaiko inji?" 
Mark14:5 Amu anaata etimiraki ena ilata aainosie dinari iip uni, neishori laisinak.” Neing'unyung'unyaki ina kitok." 
Mark14:6 Nejo Yesu, “Entapal, kainyoo pee intanyamalala? Nanu eitaasa embae naikishian oleng." 
Mark14:7 Amu iatata laisinak anaake, naa te niyieuu, indimidimi ake aaitaasa ninche isupati; kake mikiaatata nanu anaake." 
Mark14:8 Etaasa anaa enaidima; osesen lai eitera ael eton eitu enukari. 
Mark14:9 Naa kesipa, ajoki intae, ore pooki wueji nelikiorieki ele rorei supat te nkop pooki, neinosari ena nataasa edamunyeki ninye.”" 
Mark14:10 Nelo Yudas Iskariot laa obo le lelo tomon o aare enetii ilapolosak kituaak pee etum atakaldai Yesu te ninche. 
Mark14:11 Ore pee ening ninche neshipayu neisiligie aajo keisho mpisai. Neing'oru Yudas erishata nakaldarie Yesu. 
Mark14:12 Ore te nkolong e dukuya e nkata oo Mukateni Nemeisuiishieki, enkolong apa nayieng'i ilkuoo, oodamunyeki Pasaka, nejoki lkipaareta lenyena Yesu, “Kaji iyieu nikipuo aaitobir pee inyayie Pasaka?”" 
Mark14:13 Neirriwaa lkipaareta lenyena aare, nejoki, “Enchom enda anasa, ore pee enang'are intae oltung'ani onapita emoti e nkare; erukurukore," 
Mark14:14 ore ake enejing, entiaaki olopeny enkaji. ‘Etejo Olaiteng'enani, Koree enkaji ai oo lomon, nainosie Pasaka te nebo lkipaareta laainei?’" 
Mark14:15 Naa keitodol intae enkaji e shumata nalala naitobira; teine entobiraki iyiook.” 
Mark14:16 Nedumunye lkipaareta lenyena nepuo ina anasa, neinepu etiu anaa enatiaakaki neitobiraki Pasaka." 
Mark14:17 Ore pee eaku teipa nelotu Yesu o lelo tomon o aare. 
Mark14:18 Ore etoni aanya endaa, nejo Yesu, “Esipa, ajoki intae, kaakaldaa obo linyi, oloinosita endaa te nebo nanu.”" 
Mark14:19 Neiteru lkipaareta aaisinanuo, nejoki maa obo ninye, “Ke nanu sa?”" 
Mark14:20 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Obo doi le kulo tomon o aare, obo oitadoiki emukate embakuli te nebo nanu." 
Mark14:21 Amu elo ake Enkerai e Tung'ani aikunari anaa enatisirakaki ninye, kake ooi ilo tung'ani laa ninye okaldaa Enkerai e Tung'ani! Enaikash apa te neitu eini ilo tung'ani.”" 
Mark14:22 Ore einosita endaa, nedumu Yesuemukate nemayian, nebelibel, neisho ninche, nejo, “Enkoito; osesen lai ele.”" 
Mark14:23 Nedumu enkikompe, ore pee eisho Enkai enashe neisho ninche, neok pooki." 
Mark14:24 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Osarge lai ele lo sotua, oibukori te nkaraki ilkumok." 
Mark14:25 Esipa, ajoki intae, meekure aigil aok aekata enoo lng'anayio loo sabibu o metabau ina olong naok eokoto ng'ejuk te nkitoria e Nkai.”" 
Mark14:26 Ore pee eidip aatarany osinkolio nepuku aapuo Oldoinyo loo Loirienito. 
Mark14:27 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Isikisiki ade pooki aailanyisho; amu etisiraki aajo, ‘Kaosh olchekut, neisardak intare!’" 
Mark14:28 Kake ore pee aaitopiuni, naituruk te intae alo Galilaya.”" 
Mark14:29 Nejoki Petero, “Te naa keisik pooki, maaorore nanu.”" 
Mark14:30 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Esipa aajoki iyie, ore ade te na kewarie, eton eitu eru olchogoo katitin are nikimiki iyie katitin uni.”" 
Mark14:31 Neisimu oleng ajo, “Te naa kaye te nebo o iyie, maamiki nanu iyie.” Nejo ninche pooki neijia." 
Mark14:32 Nepuo ewueji neji Getsemane; nejoki Yesu lkipaareta lenyena, “Entaanyuaki tene o maidipa enkomono.”" 
Mark14:33 Nerik Petero o Yakobo o Yohana, pee eiriamariyie, neiteru aiputukuny oleng nenyamalu." 
Mark14:34 Nejoki ninche, “Keeta oltau lai osina kitok oba anaa keeya; entotoni tene entashololoto.”" 
Mark14:35 Neigut penyo, neirrabalakino enkop neomon inchere, te naa keidimayu metogiroi ina kata ninye." 
Mark14:36 Nejo, “Abba, Papa, keidimayu imbaa pooki te iyie; iwuang'akinyeki ena kikompe; kake mme enaa enayieu nanu, kake anaa eniyieu iyie.”" 
Mark14:37 Neshukunye neinepu eirurate, nejoki Petero, “Simon, iyie ilo oirura? Italaikine atashololoyu ena ninye nabo?" 
Mark14:38 Entashololoto naa entasaisho pee mijing'ijing'i atua ntemat; keyieu oltau, kake keshal osesen.”" 
Mark14:39 Neitoki ake alo neomon, neigil iladuoo ake rorei." 
Mark14:40 Neitoki aitu neinepu eirurate, amu eiroshiutuo nkonyek oleng; nelau ninche enawaliki ninye." 
Mark14:41 Neitu ene uni nejoki ninche, “Keton ake duoo irurara aayeng'iyeng'a? Eidipe; etabawua esaa; naitarasari Enkerai e Tung'ani aaitarasaki nkaik oo larruok." 
Mark14:42 Enyoito, emaape; idol etabaua ilo laakaldaa.”" 
Mark14:43 Ore nabo kata, eton eirorita Yesu, nelotu Yudas, obo le lelo tomon o aare, neiriamunore ninye empuoto neeta lalema o siaren, eirriutua ilapolosak kituaak o lasirak o lpayiani." 
Mark14:44 Eishoo taa duoo ilo otakaldayie olmonekie, ajoki, “Ore taa olang'utut ninye ilo, embung'a entorik entirrisha.”" 
Mark14:45 Ore pee elotu Yudas, nelo nabo kata enetii Yesu, nejoki, “Lo kitok!” Neng'utut." 
Mark14:46 Nesaru aaibung ninye. 
Mark14:47 Kake etushutua obo le lelo ooitashe teine olalem, neosh osinka lo lapolosani kitok nedung'u enkiok." 
Mark14:48 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Ietuo itanapate anaa iloopuo aaibung olaisimani, aa nanu ipuonunu aaibung inapitata ilalema o siaren?" 
Mark14:49 Natii oshi ake enkaji e Nkai te nebo intae aiteng'enisho, neitu kimbung'ubung'u? Kake nchoo eitabari ilkigerot.”" 
Mark14:50 Neing'uaa lkipaareta lenyena pooki ninye, neilanyisho." 
Mark14:51 Neirukurukore oloti barnoti Yesu laa olkarasha ake errotianita; neibung ninche ninye. 
Mark14:52 Kake eitiaa ninye ilo karasha neisik meishopo. 
Mark14:53 Nerikoki ninche Yesu olapolosani kitok, netumo lapolosak pooki kituaak o lpayiani o lasirak." 
Mark14:54 Nesujita Petero ninye elakuaniki, o metijing'a abaiki olgoriet lo lapolosani kitok; neton te nebo ilarripok aij enkima." 
Mark14:55 Neing'oru lapolosak kituaak o ina kiguana pooki shakenisho naarie Yesu metua; kake etalaita. 
Mark14:56 Amu eetuo lkumok ooiteenikitia mbaa, kake eitu eipira nkiteenikinot enye." 
Mark14:57 Neinyototo kulikae aaiteeniki, ejo," 
Mark14:58 “Kitoning'o iyiook ejo, ‘Kagil nanu ena aji e Nkai naitobiraki too nkaik, ore too nkolong'i uni nashetu ae, neitu eitobiri too nkaik.’ ”" 
Mark14:59 Kake ore ake eyia, eitu eipira ina shakenisho enye." 
Mark14:60 Neinyototo olapolosani kitok nelo aitashe te mpolos, neikilikuan Yesu ajoki, “Ai miata ewalata niwalu? Kaa shakenisho ena nikintang'orie kulo tung'ana?”" 
Mark14:61 Kake etigire Yesu neitu ewaliki. Neitoki ake olapolosani kitok aikilikuan ajoki. “Ira iyie Kristo, Oinoti lo Lomayiana?”" 
Mark14:62 Nejo Yesu, “Ee, ara, naa iyiookiki aadol Enkerai e Tung'ani eton te nkaina e tatene o Lopeny Engolon, elotu too nkatampo e keper.”" 
Mark14:63 Nepolos olapolosani kitok ilkilani lenyena nejo, “Kainyoo kintoki aayieunye lchakenini?" 
Mark14:64 Itoning'okito ate emoroto namor Enkai. Ijojo aa?” Nedung'oki pooki enkiguana aajo keishiaakino keeya. 
Mark14:65 Neiteru kulikae aanotaki, neimulumul enkomom, nedam, nejoki, “Imbonisho!” Neitanang'are ilarripok ninye ioshot." 
Mark14:66 Ore etii Petero olgoriet ti abori ine, nelotu enkaisiaayiani nabo o lapolosani kitok." 
Mark14:67 Ore pee edol Petero eijito enkima, neing'or ninye, nejo, “Iboitare sii oshi iyie Yesu le Nasaret.”" 
Mark14:68 Kake etomikio ejo, “Mayiolo nemaning'u enijoito.” Nepuku ninye alo kishomi." 
Mark14:69 Nedol ina aisiaayiani, neitoki ake ajoki lelo ooitashe teine, “Ore ele tung'ani, obo lenye.”" 
Mark14:70 Kake enyaaka ake Petero amiki. Ore ake sii te nkiti rishata nejoki lelo ooitashe te nebo Petero, “Edede taa ninye ira iyie obo lenye; amu ira ole Galilaya.”" 
Mark14:71 Kake eiterua adek kewan nenya lmuma ajo. “Mayiolo nanu ele tung'ani liimakiki.” 
Mark14:72 Ore nabo kata ake neru olchogoo ene are. Nedamu Petero enatiaaka Yesu nchere, “Ore eton eitu eru olchogoo katitin are, nikimiki iyie katitin uni.” Nedanya Petero aishir." 
Mark15:1 Ore ake pee ekenyu, neiguana ilapolosak kituaak, o lpayiani o laigerok o enkitoo pooki nalulung'a. Neen Yesu, nerik neitarasaki Pilato." 
Mark15:2 Neikilikuan Pilato ajoki, “Ira doi iyie Olaiguanani loo Lyahudi?” Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Iyie otejo neijia.”" 
Mark15:3 Neitang'or ilapolosak kituaak ninye too mbaa kumok. 
Mark15:4 Neigil Pilato aikilikuan ninye ajoki, “Aimiata hoo embae niwalu? Nidol eneba mbaa nikintang'orie ninche?”" 
Mark15:5 Kake eitu hoo ewaliki Yesu, o metaba anaa neing'asia Pilato." 
Mark15:6 Naa ore apake te ilo sirua kelaku apa Pilato oltung'ani obo oena, naa olotoomonutuo ake iltung'ana." 
Mark15:7 Ore too ltung'ana otigilunore enkitoria ooena te jila, neitayutuo loikop ina kata, netii oltung'ani oji Barabas." 
Mark15:8 Nepuonu lelo tung'ana neiteru aaikilikuan Pilato meitaasa enoshi ake naitaas. 
Mark15:9 Newaliki ajoki, “Iyieuu nalaaki intae Olaiguanani loo Lyahudi?”" 
Mark15:10 Amu etayiolo Pilato ajo olom ake eitarasarie ilapolosak kituaak Yesu. 
Mark15:11 Kake einuaakita ilapolosak kituaak olorere metejo pee elaakini ninche Barabas. 
Mark15:12 Neitoki ake Pilato ajoki ninche, “Paa kaa naa aitaas ele tung'ani lijojo Olaiguanani loo Lyahudi?”" 
Mark15:13 Neilepilep aaigil aajo, “Tasho ninye.”" 
Mark15:14 Nejoki Pilato ninche, “Kainyoo, kaa torrono etaasa ninye?” Kake eilepilepa oleng aajo, “Tasho ninye.”" 
Mark15:15 Ore amu keyieu Pilato neitiship lelo tung'ana, nelaaki Barabas neng'as aishooyo Yesu metooshi too nkeenta neitoki aitarasaa metashei." 
Mark15:16 Neriku sikarini Yesu atua enkaji e nkitoo naji praitorio; neipotu esikari e sirit nalulung'a. 
Mark15:17 Neishopoki Yesu olkila mugie neshetu olmarisian loo lkiku neishopoki Yesu elukunya. 
Mark15:18 Neiteru aairoroki aajoki, “Olele Olaiguanani loo Lyahudi!”" 
Mark15:19 Neigilie aaosh elukunya te ntiyani, nenotaki, negilaki kung aaitaakuno keserem." 
Mark15:20 Ore pee eidip aatadalare, neoru ilo kila mugie neishopoki nkilani enyena. Nerik auluo pee epuo aashe." 
Mark15:21 Nearakini olpayian obo oji Simon le Kirene, otadokuo ti ae kop, menye taa Aleksanta o Rufus, metanapa osalaba le Yesu." 
Mark15:22 Nerik o meitabaiki Golgota, (eji ewueji e mborbor)." 
Mark15:23 Neisho enaisho natipikaki entoki naji manemane, kake etanya ninye eok." 
Mark15:24 Neshe ninche ninye, neorikino lkilani lenyena, neoshie enkukuo pee etum oloya." 
Mark15:25 Naa saa uni ina kata pee eshe ninche ninye. 
Mark15:26 Ore embae naitanang'aki ninye neigero ajo, “Olaiguanani loo Lyahudi.”" 
Mark15:27 Netashoki lapurrok aare te nebo Yesu, atii obo te tatene netii olikae te kedianye." 
Mark15:28 Neitabari olkigeroto ojo, “Eikenayioki ninye te nebo ilarruok.”" 
Mark15:29 Ore lelo oopuaya o looim ine, nesurdaany ninye eing'unie lukuny, nejo, “Hoo! Eiyie doi ojo igil enkaji e Nkai nintoki ashetu too nkolong'i uni?" 
Mark15:30 Intajeu kewan tadou te ilo salaba!” 
Mark15:31 Neiko sii ninche neijia ilapolosak kituaak aaikordod ejokino maate, “Kulikae ake eitajewuo; nemeidim aitajeu kewan." 
Mark15:32 Nchoo naa duoo Kristo, Olaiguanani le Siraeli, edou to salaba matodol pee kiruk.” Ore lelo ootashoki te nebo ninye nemor sii ninche." 
Mark15:33 Ore pee eipir enkolong, neiput enaimin enkop pooki o metabaiki saa naaudo." 
Mark15:34 Ore pee eaku saa naaudo nebuak Yesu to ltoilo sapuk ajo, “Eloi, Eloi, lama sabaktani?” Eji, “Enkai ai, Enkai ai, ainyoo pee kitung'uayie?”" 
Mark15:35 Ore pee ening kulikae ooitashe teine nejo, “Ining, Eliya eipoto.”" 
Mark15:36 Nekuet obo, neiput osuguroi enaisho naisuisho naji siki, nepik oloomi neisho metooko, nejo, “Ntasho matodol te naa kelotu Eliya aitadou.”" 
Mark15:37 Nebuaku Yesu oleng, nedung'o tau." 
Mark15:38 Neiperra aaku are olkarasha oor enkaji e Nkai, eiteru te shumata o meiting'o ti abori." 
Mark15:39 Ore pee edol osajini oitashe aipirare Yesu, ajo etaa etundung'e tau, nejo, “Kedede Oinoti le Nkai ele tung'ani.”" 
Mark15:40 Netii sii nkituaak naaing'orita elakuaniki inaatii Mariamu Magdalene, o Mariamu ng'otonye Yakobo oti o Yosef, netii sii Salome," 
Mark15:41 ninche napa, etii Yesu Galilaya, naatusujutua neisiaai. Netii sii kulie kituaak kumok naairiamunore ninye epuonu Yerusalem." 
Mark15:42 Ore pee eaku teipa, naa enkolong e Nkitobirakinoto, aa enoshi olong taa pee eyookini enkolong e Sabato." 
Mark15:43 Neshirraki Yosef le Arimatea, obo loo looyanyiti le nkiguana, olaa keanyita ninye enkitoria e Nkai, nelo enetii Pilato neomonu osesen le Yesu." 
Mark15:44 Neing'asia Pilato pee eji eidipa Yesu atua, ore pee eipotu osajini, neikilikuan te naa keidipa Yesu atua." 
Mark15:45 Ore pee ening to sajini ajo etua, neisho Yosef ilo sesen." 
Mark15:46 Neinyang'u Yosef olkarasha le kitani neenie osesen le Yesu, neirragie te nkurare nataguetuaki to soit, neibeleleng'oki osoit enkutuk e ina kurare." 
Mark15:47 Netoduaa Mariamu Magdalene o Mariamu ng'otonye Yosef eneirragieki osesen le Yesu. 
Mark16:1 Ore pee eishari enkolong e nkiyeng'iyeng naji Sabato, neinyang'u Mariamu Magdalene o Mariamu ng'oto Yakobo, o Salome iila naarropil pee epuo aael osesen le Yesu." 
Mark16:2 Ore tadekenya oleng te nkolong e nkiterunoto e wqiki, nepuonu enkurare eilepua enkolong," 
Mark16:3 ejokino maate, “Ae ng'ae ade oret iyiook aibeleleng'oo, osoit te nkutuk e nkurare?”" 
Mark16:4 Nejo maing'ura, nedol aajo eidipaki aaibeleleng'oi osoit aaiwuang'ie amu ae sapuk apa oleng." 
Mark16:5 Ore pee ejing enkurare, nedol oltung'ani barnoti eitashe te nkalo e tatene, neishopito olkila oibor; neing'asia ninche." 
Mark16:6 Nejoki ilo tung'ani ninche, “Eming'asia; Yesu le Nasaret ing'oruru, otashoki. Etopiwuo, metii ene; eng'ura enapa wueji neirragieki ninye." 
Mark16:7 Kake enchom, entoliki lkipaareta lenyena o Petero nchere, keituruk alo Galilaya; teine ipuopuo aadol, anaa enatiaaka intae.”" 
Mark16:8 Nepuku aapuo neipirri aaing'uaa enkurare; amu einepua olokirikiri o enkiputukuny, neitu eliki likae tung'ani, amu etureishote." 
Mark16:9 Ore pee epiu Yesu enasirie te nkolong e nkiterata e wiki, Mariamu Magdalene etang'asa aipang'aki enapa kitok nataararie iloiriruani oopishana. Kake etolikitio Petero too ndorropu o lelo ooboitare nena naatolikioki ninche." 
Mark16:10 Nelo ninye aliki lelo apa ooiriamariyie ninye, eishirita ninche neilisho. Ore te siadi nena, neitanap yesu makewan ninche mewaita enkilepunoto neya endoyioroto elikioroto sinyati e njeunoto nemeish nebik intarasi.]" 
Mark16:11 Kake ore pee ening ninche aajo eishu netoduaa ninye, neitu sii eiruk." 
Mark16:12 Ore te siadi nena, eibelekenye Yesu atum ae mua, neitalioo kewan te kulikae kipaareta aare lenyena epuo nkurman." 
Mark16:13 Nerrinyo lelo aapuo aaliki lkulikae, kake eitu ninche eiruk." 
Mark16:14 Ore te siadi nena, neipang'aki Yesu lelo tomon oobo etoni aadaa; neisikong ninche te nkaraki engolon oo lukuny enye o te nkaraki nemeeta enkirukoto amu eitu eiruk lelo ootoduaa ninye eidipa atopiu." 
Mark16:15 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Enchom enkop pooki entoliki ltung'ana pooki ele rorei supat." 
Mark16:16 Ore oloiruk neibatisae nejeu; ore olemeiruk nedung'okini enkiguana. 
Mark16:17 Naa kulo lmonek ooiriamariyie lelo ooiruk te nkarna ai earaa loiriruani; neiro too nkutukie ng'ejuko. 
Mark16:18 Nedumu lasuriaa, naa teneok entoki ake pooki nayaisho nemeeta enaiko ninche; neiteleiki ltamuoyia nkaik, neishiu.”" 
Mark16:19 Neaku ore pee eidip Olaitoriani Yesu airorie ninche, neilepieki aaya Keper, neton te nkaina e tatene e Nkai." 
Mark16:20 Nedumunye ilkipaareta aapuo aalikioo ilo rorei too wuejitin pooki, neasisho Olaitoriani te nebo ninche neitadedeyie ilo rorei too lmonek ooiriamariyie. Eesai. [" 
Luke1:1 Ore te nkaraki natii lkumok ootonyuaakita aaiger imbaa naatupukutuo tiatua iyiook. 
Luke1:2 Neigero anaa enainosakita iyiook lelo apa ootoduaa te nkiterunoto too nkonyek enye, oora ninche ilaisiaayiak ooinosu ele rorei le Nkai." 
Luke1:3 Nadol sii nanu, Oloyanyiti Teofilo, ajo keishiaakino amu atisipua mbaa pooki te rishata naado, naaigeroki mbaa naaitobirakino aitisipaki," 
Luke1:4 pee itum atayiolo esipata e kuna baa nikinosakaki. 
Luke1:5 Etii apa te nkata o laiguanani Herode, le Yudea, olapolosani oji Sakaria, le ntalipa o lapolosak e Abija. Ore enkitok enye naa ene ntalipa e Aaron, neji enkarna enye Elisabet." 
Luke1:6 Naa supati ninche pokira are tialo Enkai, nesuj inkitanapat o nkitoriat pooki o Laitoriani, meitong'or." 
Luke1:7 Nemeeta enkerai, amu koolupi Elisabet, naa moruak pokira are oleng." 
Luke1:8 Neaku ore eitayu Sakaria esiaai e mpolosare too nkatitin olkekun lenye te dukuya Enkai," 
Luke1:9 anaa enaikununo olkuak loo lapolosak. Nedoiki enkukuo metaa ninye ojing enkaji o Laitoriani, ainok olasar le nkorropil." 
Luke1:10 Neomon olorere te boo, ina kata einoki enkorropil." 
Luke1:11 Neipang'aki olmalaika lo Laitoriani aitashe te nkalo e tatene olperere lo lasar le nkorropil. 
Luke1:12 Ore pee edol Sakaria neirut," 
Luke1:13 nejoki olmalaika, “Sakaria, miureishoyu, etoning'oki enkomono ino: naa aikiiki enkitok ino Elisabet enkayioni, naa ijo enkarna enye Yohana." 
Luke1:14 Naa itum iyie enchipai o eng'ida to ltau lino, neng'ida ltung'ana kumok te inoto enye." 
Luke1:15 Amu keakuninye kitok te dukuya Olaitoriani, nemeok enaisho oo sabibu aashu enaisho napi, naa keiput Enkiyang'et Sinyati ebaiki etii enkoshoke e ng'otonye." 
Luke1:16 Naa kerrinyoki Siraeli kumok Olaitoriani Enkai enye. 
Luke1:17 Neituruk te dukuya Olaitoriani aaku olkilikuai lenye, te nkiyang'et o te ngolon naaijo ene Eliya. Neitaiki osotua inkera o loo menye, neibelekeny iloogolong'u menoto eng'eno e lelo supati pee eitobiraki Olaitoriani iltung'ana ooishiaakino.”" 
Luke1:18 Nejoki Sakaria olmalaika, “Kainyoo ayiolounye ena bae? Nataa moruo, naa moruo sii ninye enkitok ai?”" 
Luke1:19 Newaliki olmalaika ajoki, “Ara nanu Gabriel, oitashe te dukuya Enkai; naairriwua maairorie naaitabaiki ele kilikuai supat." 
Luke1:20 Ekionyo enkutuk nimintoki airo, o metabau ina olong naibalayu nena, amu eitu iruk irorei laainei, kake keitabari ake te nkata naikenakaki.”" 
Luke1:21 Naa keanyita apa lelo tung'ana Sakaria neing'asia te nkimutioto naimutie tiatua Enkaji e Nkai. 
Luke1:22 Ore pee epuku Sakaria, nelaikino airorie ninche, neyiolou ninche aajo eeta enatoduaa te neinokieki olasar. Neitodol too lmonek etalaikine airorie." 
Luke1:23 Ore pee eidipayu ilkekuno le nkisiayiare enye, nelo Sakaria ang." 
Luke1:24 Ore pee elusoo nena olong'i, nenutayu enkitok enye Elisabet, neisudoo kewan ilapaitin imiet, nejo," 
Luke1:25 “Ena aaitaasa Olaitoriani te nkata natoduaa naaoru esulare te dukuya iltung'ana.” 
Luke1:26 Ore to lapa le ile le nutai e Elisabet, neirriwaa Enkai olmalaika oji Gabriel, meshomo enkanasa e Galilaya naji Nasaret," 
Luke1:27 enetii eselenkei natisira oltung'ani oji Yosef, lo lgilata le Daudi; naa keji apa ina selenkei Mariamu." 
Luke1:28 Nejing'aki olmalaika nejoki, “Takuenya na kirotet! Etii Olaitoriani te nebo iyie!”" 
Luke1:29 Neirut Mariamu oleng te nkaraki lelo rorei, nejo to ltau, “Kaji eikununo ina kirorokino?”" 
Luke1:30 Nejoki olmalaika, “Mariamu, miureishoyu, itaa kirotet te Nkai." 
Luke1:31 Naa inutayu, niiu enkayioni, nijo enkarna enye Yesu." 
Luke1:32 Naa keaku kitok neji Enkerai e Nkai natii shumata aisul te pooki naa keisho Olaitoriani Enkai ninye olorika le nkitoo le Daudi menye lenye," 
Luke1:33 neitore olgilata le Yakobo intarasi, nemeiting enkitoria enye.”" 
Luke1:34 Nejoki Mariamu ilo malaika, “Kaji eiko pee eaku ena nemayiolo olee?”" 
Luke1:35 Newaliki olmalaika ajoki, “Kelotu Enkiyang'et Sinyati shumata iyie, nikintoip engolon o Lotii Shumata Aisul, ore te nkaraki ina, ore enkerai naini, neji sinyati, Enkerai e Nkai." 
Luke1:36 Naa ore enkanashe ino Elisabet nenuta te moruao enye, naa keiu enkayioni, naa ole ile ele apa, te nutai enye, netejoki oshi koolupi." 
Luke1:37 Amu meetae embae nemeidimayu te Nkai.” 
Luke1:38 Nejo Mariamu, “Kara nanu esinka o Laitoriani; metotiwuo te nanu anaa enitejo.” Nelo olmalaika aing'uaa ninye." 
Luke1:39 Ore te nena olong'i, nedumunye Mariamu aisarrisar alo enkop oo oldoinyo natii enkanasa e Yuda." 
Luke1:40 Nejing enkaji e Sakaria, neiroroki Elisabet." 
Luke1:41 Ore ake pee ening Elisabet enkirorokino e Mariamu, neipid enkerai te nkoshoke; neiput Elisabet Enkiyang'et Sinyati," 
Luke1:42 nebuak to ltoilo sapuk ajo, “Kitamayianaki iyie too nkituaak, nemayiani eishoi e nguset ino!" 
Luke1:43 Kaji eikununo ena kias kitok, eji ng'otonye Olaitoriani lai nalotu enatii?" 
Luke1:44 Amu ore ake pee aning too nkiyiaa aainei enkiroroto ino, neipid enkerai te nchipai te nkoshoke ai." 
Luke1:45 Emayiana enairuko nchere keitabari inaatiaakaki ninye eing'uaa Olaitoriani.” 
Luke1:46 Nejo Mariamu, “Kalimu to ltau lai enkitoo o Laitoriani;" 
Luke1:47 neshipakino enkiyang'et ai Enkai Olaitajeunoni lai," 
Luke1:48 amu etadamua enchalan e sinka enye. Amu ore ebaiki taata, kaajo ishoritin pooki namayiana;" 
Luke1:49 amu aaitaasa ologol isapuki, aisinyati enkarna enye." 
Luke1:50 Ore olng'ur lenye netii shumata lelo ooure ninye too ishoritin pooki. 
Luke1:51 Etaasa ine ngolon te nkaina enye; neisardakie iloowuasa o nkiguanat oo ltauja lenye. 
Luke1:52 Eitadowuo ilaitoriak too lorikan lenye le nkitoo, neilepie iloomeni." 
Luke1:53 Eitaraposho ilooata esumash too ntokitin sidain, nearaa ilkarsisi meeta toki." 
Luke1:54 Etasarua Israel osinka lenye, te nkaraki olng'ur lenye," 
Luke1:55 anaa enatiaaka iloo papa, Abraham o eishoi enye intarasi.”" 
Luke1:56 Neton Mariamu aboitare Elisabet ilapaitin oobaya okuni, nerrinyo alo ang." 
Luke1:57 Nebau enkata naishore Elisabet, neiu enkayioni." 
Luke1:58 Nening elatia enye, o lgilata lenye nchere, eing'urrie Olaitoriani, neshipayu te nebo ninye." 
Luke1:59 Ore te nkolong e isiet, nepuonu aamurat enkerai, neyieu nedung'oki enkarna aaipotie Sakaria menye lenye." 
Luke1:60 Nejo, ng'otonye, “Mme nejia, keipoti aajo, Yohana.”" 
Luke1:61 Nejokini Elisabet, “Meetae oltung'ani lo lmarei linyi oji nejia.”" 
Luke1:62 Neikilikuan menye too lmonek enayieu neji enkerai. 
Luke1:63 Neipotu osoit dapash neiger ajo, “Keji enkarna enye Yohana!” Neing'asia pooki." 
Luke1:64 Nebolo Sakaria enkutuk ina kata ake, nelaa olng'ejep lenye, neiteru airo, aisis Enkai." 
Luke1:65 Neureishoyu pooki oomanya ina latia, nelikiori nena baa pooki to ldoinyo le Yudea." 
Luke1:66 Ore lootoning'o pooki neiteng'el too ltauja lenye ejo, “Keaku pasa ena kerai keniaa pukunoto?” Amu etii engolon e Nkai tenebo ninye." 
Luke1:67 Neiput Sakaria, menye le Yohana Enkiyang'et Sinyati neibonisho ajo;" 
Luke1:68 “Meisisi Olaitoriani Enkai oo Siraeli, amu etabaikia nekordu ltung'ana lenyena." 
Luke1:69 Eishorua Olaitajeunoni Magilani to lgilata lo sinka lenye Daudi," 
Luke1:70 anaa enatejo apake too nkirorot oo sinyat o enoo loibonok le Nkai liapa moitie 
Luke1:71 pee kijeu too lmang'ati lang, o too nkaik e lelo pooki ooiba iyiook;" 
Luke1:72 neitabaya olng'ur oisiligie iloo papa lang, nedamu osotua lenye sinyati," 
Luke1:73 olmumai oinosie papa lang Abraham," 
Luke1:74 nchere, ore pee eitajeu iyiook, too nkaik oo lmang'ati lang, nikisiaai ninye metiii enkuretisho," 
Luke1:75 te sinyatisho o te supatisho, too nkolong'i pooki e nkishui ang." 
Luke1:76 Ore sii iyie na kerai ai, aikiji oloiboni lo Lotii Shumata Aisul te pooki. Amu inturuk te dukuya Olaitoriani, aitobiraki nkoitoi enyena." 
Luke1:77 Aliki ltung'ana lenyena enjeunoto, te mpalakinoto oo ng'ok enye," 
Luke1:78 te nkaraki enanai o lng'ur le Nkai ang, laa te ninye ekenyiki iyiook enjeunoto eing'uaa keper," 
Luke1:79 eitawang'aki ilootoni te naimin, o lootoni to loip le keeya, pee eutaki nkejek ang inkoitoi osotua.”" 
Luke1:80 Nebulu enkerai, neponari engolon e nkiyang'et, nebik ti ong'ata o metabau enkolong naipang'akinyeki olorere loo Siraeli." 
Luke2:1 Ore te nena olong'i nepuku enkitanapata naing'uaa olaiguanani kitok Kaisari Augustus inchere pee eikeni iltung'ana pooki te nkitoria oo Roma. 
Luke2:2 Naa ena enkikena oo ltung'ana e dukuya nataasaki te nkata e Kirinius olgafanai le Siria. 
Luke2:3 Neshuko ake oltung'ani enkang enye meigeri. 
Luke2:4 Nelo sii ninye Yosef te Galilaya aing'uaa enkang e Nasaret, ailep alo enkang e Daudi naji Betlehem amu ole nkaji e Daudi apa te ntalipa," 
Luke2:5 pee eikeni te nebo enkitok enye, Mariamu, natasayia aa entuaa." 
Luke2:6 Ore ebikito teine, nebaya inkolong'i pee eisho Mariamu." 
Luke2:7 Neiu enkerai enye kikau, neishopoki nkilani e keraisho, neirragie ninye te mpeut oo nkishu, amu eitu etum enejing te nkaji oo lomon." 
Luke2:8 Naa ore teina kop netii apa ilchekuti ootoni arrip intare kewarie. 
Luke2:9 Neipang'aki olmalaika lo Laitoriani, neimerlelu enkitoo o Laitoriani too nkaloli pooki, neureishoyu ninche oleng." 
Luke2:10 Nejoki olmalaika ninche, “Emiureishoyu amu ilomon supati le ng'ida sapuk ayau naaku too ltung'ana pooki," 
Luke2:11 amu ore te nkanasa e Daudi, netoiwuoki Olaitajeunoni, te nkaraki intae, laa ninye Kristo, Olaitoriani." 
Luke2:12 Naa ele olmonekie te intae: itumutumu elooyo naishopokino nkilani e keraisho, neirragita te mpeut oo nkishu.”" 
Luke2:13 Neboitare ilo malaika, olorora kitok le keper oisisita Enkai aajo," 
Luke2:14 “Meisisi Enkai te shumata naisul te pooki, netumi osotua te nkop, too ltung'ana pooki laa ninche eshipakino ninye!”" 
Luke2:15 Ore pee epuo lelo malaika keper aaing'uaa ninche, nejokino ilchekuti, “Enyoito emaape aabaya Betlehem, aadol ena bae nataase naitayiolo iyiook Olaitoriani.”" 
Luke2:16 Neisarrisar aapuo neinepu Mariamu o Yosef, nedol eirrag elooyo te mpeut." 
Luke2:17 Ore pee edol ilchekuti ninye neinosu ninche lomon ootiaakaki te nkaraki ina looyo. 
Luke2:18 Ore lelo pooki ootoning'o nena naatolimutuo ilchekuti neing'asia. 
Luke2:19 Kake eiteng'ela Mariamu nena baa pooki edamu to ltau lenye. 
Luke2:20 Neshuko lelo shekuti eisho Enkai enkitoo neisis too mbaa pooki naatoning'o o naatoduaa anaa enatiaakaki ninche. 
Luke2:21 Ore pee eaku enkiting'oto e nkolong e isiet, nemurati neji enkarna enye Yesu, ina arna apa natudung'oko olmalaika eton eitu enutaini." 
Luke2:22 Ore pee ebaya nkolong'i e nkata e nkipooto anaa enatiu too nkitanapat e Musa, neriku ninye Yerusalem pee eitarasakini Olaitoriani," 
Luke2:23 anaa enatisiraki too nkitanapat o Laitoriani nchere, “Ore pooki lee kikau, neng'amari te dukuya Olaitoriani.”" 
Luke2:24 Nejo sii pee eishooyo olasar anaa enajo nkitanapat o Laitoriani, aa, “Nturkuluoni are, aashu nkera are e nturkuluo.”" 
Luke2:25 Naa ketii apa Yerusalem oltung'ani oji Simeon, naa oltung'ani apa supat nenyor Enkai, neanyita apa meitajeu Enkai Siraeli. Netii Enkiyang'et Sinya tiatua ninye." 
Luke2:26 Neitayiolo Enkiyang'et Sinyati ninye nchere meye eitu edol Olaitajeunoni oisiligie apa Olaitoriani. 
Luke2:27 Nelotu enkaji e Nkai, erikito Enkiyang'et Sinyati ninye, ore pee eyaki intoiwuo enkerai Yesu meitaasa anaa entipat oo nkitanapat e Musa," 
Luke2:28 neng'amu Simeon Yesu too nkaik enyena, neisis Enkai nejo," 
Luke2:29 “Olaitoriani, inchoo taata osinka lino meshomo te seriani, anaa enisiligie." 
Luke2:30 Amu etoduaa nkonyek aainei enjeunoto ino 
Luke2:31 nintobira meibalayu too loreren pooki: 
Luke2:32 ewang'an naboloki loreren enkoitoi ino, neaku errepet oo Siraeli linono.”" 
Luke2:33 Neing'asia menye o ng'otonye Yesu te nena naairoroki te nkaraki ninye. 
Luke2:34 Nemayian Simeon ninche nejoki Mariamu, ng'otonye Yesu, “Eitaaki ena kerai olobatatare naa olodumunore sii ilkumok ootii Siraeli. Neaku olmonekie le nkai ogilunoreki," 
Luke2:35 naa aikiim olalem oltau lino, pee eibalunyeki indamunot oo ltauja kumok.”" 
Luke2:36 Netii enkoiboni naji Ana entito e Fanuel, o losho le Asheri: naa entasat moruo, naa larin oopishana ake etotona eeta olmoruo." 
Luke2:37 Naa enkoliai oo larin ntomoni isiet o oong'uan. Nemepuku tiatua enkaji e Nkai, neen kewan aitupukoo." 
Luke2:38 Nelotu ninye teina kata, neisho Enkai enashe, neimaki ina kerai aliki lelo pooki ooanyita metalaku Enkai Yerusalem." 
Luke2:39 Ore pee eidip intoiwuo e Yesuaaitabai inaaitanapishoteki pooki, too nkitanapat o Laitoriani, nerrinyo aapuo Galilaya, enkang enye te Nasaret." 
Luke2:40 Nebulu ina kerai negolu, neiput eng'eno nagut, netii enkirotetisho e Nkai shumata ninye." 
Luke2:41 Kepuo apake ntoiwuo e Yesu Yerusalem to lari ake pooki pee enyiku osirua le Pasaka. 
Luke2:42 Ore pee eaku Yesu oloo larin tomon o aare neilep aapuo anaa olkuaak le ilo sirua. 
Luke2:43 Ore pee ebaya nkolong'i naashukore, neing'uari enkayioni Yesu te Yerusalem. Neitu eyiolou intoiwuo enyena." 
Luke2:44 Kake ore ejo ninche etii ake atua encholiek enye, nepuo endama nalulung'a, neing'oru te lelo lo lgilata lenye, o too le latia enye." 
Luke2:45 Ore pee elau ninye, neshuko Yerusalem aapuo aaing'oru." 
Luke2:46 Ore etulusoitie nkolong'i uni, netum te nkaji e Nkai, etonita te rishata ilaiteng'enak, einining'ito neikilikuanishore." 
Luke2:47 Ore ilootoning'o pooki, neing'asia te ng'eno enye o too naawalu." 
Luke2:48 Ore pee edol intoiwuo enyena neing'asia. Nejoki ng'otonye, “Na kerai; aainyo pee inkuna iyiook inji? King'orutua iyie, nanu o papaai lino te nkirutoto o to sina.”" 
Luke2:49 Nejoki Yesu, “Kainyoo pee king'oruru? Aimiyiololo aajo keishiaakino tenatii enkaji e Papa?”" 
Luke2:50 Neitu eibung ele rorei otiaaka. 
Luke2:51 Nedou Yesu airiamunore ninche nebau Nasaret, nening ninye ninche. Neshum ng'otonye nena baa pooki to ltau lenye." 
Luke2:52 Neponari Yesu eng'eno, nebulu, neitiship Enkai o ltung'ana." 
Luke3:1 Ore to lari le tomon o miet le nkitoria o laiguanani kitok oji Tiberia Kaisaria, aa Pontio Pilato olgafanai le Yudea, naa Herode olkitok le Galilaya, naa Filipo olalashe lenye olkitok le Iturea o Trikoniti, naa Lisenias olkitok le Abilene," 
Luke3:2 naa Annas o Kaiafas ilapolosak kituaak. Nebaiki ororei le Nkai Yohana olayioni le Sakaria ti ong'ata. 
Luke3:3 Nelo ina kop pooki oo mbat o lkeju le Yordan elikioo enkibatisa nayau enkirridunoto neyau empalakinoto oo ng'ok," 
Luke3:4 anaa enaigero te mbuku e Isaya oloiboni le Nkai ajo, “Oltoilo lo lobuakita ti ong'ata, entobiraki Olaitoriani enkoitoi, entorioi irrekiei lenyena." 
Luke3:5 Nenuki nong'ot pooki, ore pooki doinyo o lkiushin neitodorropi; ore ineekordilo nererei, ore nkoitoi naasur neisiashayieki;" 
Luke3:6 pee etum iltung'ana pooki enjeunoto e Nkai.” 
Luke3:7 Nejoki Yohana ilo orere ooetuo enetii ninye meibatisa, “Na ishoi oo lasuriaa! Ae ng'ae naikoo intae eng'atai engoro nalotu?" 
Luke3:8 Entadedeyie naa enkirridunoto inyi too lng'anayio lenyena; nimintokiki ake ajo, ‘Kiata Abraham aa papa lang.’ Ajoki intae, keidim Enkai aitobiraki Abraham nkera te kulo soito." 
Luke3:9 Eidipaki taata aaiteleiki entolu ntonat oo lkeek; ore olchani ake pooki lemeiu lng'anayio sidain nedung'i aauroo nenang'akini enkima.” 
Luke3:10 Neikilikuan lelo tung'ana Yohana aajoki, “Kaa naa kiaas?”" 
Luke3:11 Newaliki ajoki, “Ore oloata nkilani are, inchoo eisho nabo ilo lemeeta, ore oloata endaa neng'arie olemeeta.”" 
Luke3:12 Nepuonu sii ninche ilasotok le kodi meibatisai, neikilikuan aajoki, “Lo aiteng'enani, kaa kiaas iyiook?”" 
Luke3:13 Nejoki ninche, “Emintulus aitalak ltung'ana alang ina naitanapaki intae.”" 
Luke3:14 Neikilikuan sii ninche sikarini aajoki, “Oo iyiook, kaa kiaas?” Nejoki ninche, “Emisim oltung'ani anaa inteenikiki elejare, ninchosho sii ebaiki intae olekoisiayio linyi.”" 
Luke3:15 Ore elimana ltung'ana eanyita enaasayu, neitiko ltauja le pooki te nkaraki Yohana, emusumusu aajo ebaiki naa Kristo ninye, ana mme ninye." 
Luke3:16 Newaliki Yohana ninche pooki ajoki, “Esipa aibatisa nanu intae te nkare, kake kelotu ologol te nanu lemeishiaakino nalak inkeenta oo namuka enyena. Ilo oibatisa intae te Nkiyang'et Sinyati o te nkima." 
Luke3:17 Neibung'ita ninye esilet enye te nkaina pee eor asip katukul olkurroto lenye oidong'ishoreki, nesotoki enkano olkompe; kake ore suut, nepej te nkima nemearayu ntarasi.”" 
Luke3:18 Ore te kulie oitoi kumok nereiki Yohana aikok olorere eliki lomon supati. 
Luke3:19 Kake ore Herode ilo balusui pee eisikong ninye Yohana te nkaraki nayama Herodias enkitok o lalashe lenye, o sii te nkaraki kulie bususi naataasa," 
Luke3:20 neponiki Herode ena nena pooki neikenoo Yohana te jila. 
Luke3:21 Ore eibatisaki iltung'ana pooki neidipaki aaibatisa sii ninye Yesu, eomonito Enkai nebolo keper," 
Luke3:22 nedou Enkiyang'et Sinyati etiu anaa enturkuluo adoiki Yesu. Nelotu oltoilo oing'uaa keper ojo, “Ira iyie Oinoti lai lanyor, kaashipakino iyie.”" 
Luke3:23 Ore pee eiteru Yesu enkisiaayiare enye naa oloo larin oobaya tomoni uni. Ore ninye anaa enajo iltung'ana naa olayioni le Yosef, olayioni le Heli," 
Luke3:24 olayioni le Matat, olayioni le Lawi, olayioni le Melki, olayioni le Yanai, olayioni le Yosef," 
Luke3:25 olayioni le Matatias, olayioni le Amos, olayioni le Nahum, olayioni le Elsi, olayioni le Nagai," 
Luke3:26 olayioni le Maat, olayioni le Matatias, olayioni le Semein, olayioni le Yosek, olayioni le Yuda," 
Luke3:27 olayioni le Yonan, olayioni le Resa, olayioni le Serubabel, olayioni le Shealtiel, olayioni le Neri," 
Luke3:28 olayioni le Melki, olayioni le Adi, olayioni le Kosam, olayioni le Elmadam, olayioni le Er," 
Luke3:29 olayioni le Yoshua, olayioni le Eliesa, olayioni le Yorim, olayioni le Matar, olayioni le Lawi," 
Luke3:30 olayioni le Simeon, olayioni le Yuda, olayioni le Yosef, olayioni le Yonam, olayioni le Eliakim," 
Luke3:31 olayioni le Melea, olayioni le Mena, olayioni le Matata, olayioni le Natan, olayioni le Daudi," 
Luke3:32 olayioni le Yese olayioni le Obed, olayioni le Boas, olayioni le Sala, olayioni le Nashon," 
Luke3:33 olayioni le Aminadab, olayioni le Admin, olayioni le Arni, olayioni le Hesron, olayioni le Peres, olayioni le Yuda," 
Luke3:34 olayioni le Yakobo, olayioni le Isaak, olayioni le Abraham, olayioni le Tera, olayioni le Nahor, olayioni le Serug," 
Luke3:35 olayioni le Reu, olayioni le Peleg, olayioni le Eber, olayioni le Shela," 
Luke3:36 olayioni le Kainan, olayioni le Alfasad, olayioni le Shem, olayioni le Noa, olayioni le Lamek," 
Luke3:37 olayioni le Metusela, olayioni le Enok, olayioni le Yared, olayioni le Mahalalel, olayioni le Kainan," 
Luke3:38 olayioni le Enos, olayioni le Seti, olayioni le Adam, olayioni le Nkai." 
Luke4:1 Neiput Yesu Enkiyang'et Sinyati apa pee errinyunye eing'uaa olkeju le Yordan, Nerik Enkiyang'et ninye ong'ata," 
Luke4:2 nkolong'i artam, metetema oloirirua. Neitu enya Yesu ae toki te nena olong'i. Ore pee eishunye nena olong'i netir esumash." 
Luke4:3 Nejoki Sheitani ninye, “Te naa ira iyie Enkerai e Nkai, tiaaki ele soit metaa endaa.”" 
Luke4:4 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Etisiraki aajo, ‘Mme endaa ake eishuyie oltung'ani.’ ”" 
Luke4:5 Neilepie Sheitani Yesu enchumata o ldoinyo oodo, neitodol enkitoo o pooki e nkop, te nkiti kata," 
Luke4:6 nejoki Sheitani ninye, “Kaaisho ntoria kuna pooki, o enkitoo enye, amu aaishooki, pee aisho pooki layieu naisho;" 
Luke4:7 metaa te nikiserem iyie nanu neaku ninono pooki.” 
Luke4:8 Newaliki Yesu ajoki ninye, “Etisiraki aajo, ‘Olaitoriani Enkai ino ake iserema, naa ninye ake isiaai.’ ”" 
Luke4:9 Nerik Sheitani Yesu Yerusalem neitasheyie te ntopij e enkaji e Nkai, nejoki, “Te naa ira Enkerai e Nkai, tusulai kewan," 
Luke4:10 amu etisiraki aajo, ‘ekirriwaki Enkai lmalaika, mikitorripo,’ netejoki sii," 
Luke4:11 Eking'amaa too nkaik enye, pee mikinkob osoit enkeju ino.”" 
Luke4:12 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Eigeroki aajo, ‘Mitem iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino.’ ”" 
Luke4:13 Ore pee emitunye Sheitani too ntemat enyena pooki nelo aing'uaa eanyu ai rishata enye. 
Luke4:14 Nerrinyo Yesu Galilaya ebore engolon e Nkiyang'et Sinyati, neibulaa enkisisa enye, nkuapi naamanita ilo kerenket." 
Luke4:15 Neiteng'enisho too nkajijik enye e ntumo nerrep iltung'ana pooki ninye. 
Luke4:16 Neito Yesu Nasaret ine netubulaka, nejing enkaji e ntumo te nkolong e nkiyeng'iyeng'ata, anaa enaiko apake, neitashe aisum ilkigerot." 
Luke4:17 Neishori embuku o loiboni le Nkai Isaya. Nebol ina buku netum ewueji netisiraki aajo," 
Luke4:18 “Etii Enkiyang'et o Laitoriani atua nanu, amu aatubukoko ninye eilata, aput, naairriwua matoliki ilaisinak ororei supat, nalaku te sinkaisho ilooena, naliki lmodook emboloto oo nkonyek enye, nalaku aisho epuo lelo ooitorogonyaki," 
Luke4:19 nalimu olari osarunye Enkai ltung'ana lenyena.” 
Luke4:20 Neiken Yesu embuku, neshukoki olashumani neton. Neibelekenya lelo pooki ootoni te nkaji e ntumo aaing'or ninye." 
Luke4:21 Neiteru ajoki ninche, “Eitabayioki taata kulo sirat ining'itoto too nkiyiaa inyi.”" 
Luke4:22 Neimaki pooki ninye aarrep eing'asia too rorei le mpiris ooimu enkutuk enye. Nejo, “Ae mme olayioni le Yosef doi ele?”" 
Luke4:23 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Meeta nchere pee eitu kiyiookiki aadung'ie rashe aajoki, ‘Olabaani tabaa kewan,’ nijojo, ‘Taasa sii iyie teine nitubulaka, mbaa naaijo nena nikitoning'o nchere itaasa te Kapernaum.’ ”" 
Luke4:24 Nejo Yesu, “Esipa ajoki intae, meetae oloiboni le Nkai oyanyiti te murua natubulaka." 
Luke4:25 Esipa nchere keetae apa nkolia kumok tiatua Siraeli te nkata o loiboni Eliya, pee elai enchan too larin okuni o lapaitin ile, neibulu olameyu ina kop pooki;" 
Luke4:26 kake ore eyia, eitu eirriwakini Eliya oltung'ani hoo obo te Siraeli, enkoliai e Sarepta ake eirriwakaki te nkop e Sidon." 
Luke4:27 Kumok sii iltung'ana le nkeeya oo lbolot ootae te Siraeli te nkata o loiboni le Nkai Elisha, nemeetae hoo likae obo oishiunyeki, leme Naaman ake le Siria.”" 
Luke4:28 Ore pee ening iltung'ana nena baa pooki etoni tiatua enkaji e ntumo neiput engoro. 
Luke4:29 Neinyototo, nearaa Yesu auluo eina anasa neriku embata e marti nataaniki ina anasa, ejo pee esulaa teina marti;" 
Luke4:30 kake etapaashare Yesu apolos atua lelo tung'ana nelo ninye. 
Luke4:31 Nedoyio Yesu alo Kapernaum, enkanasa natii Galilaya, neiteng'en iltung'ana te nkolong e nkiyeng'iyeng'ata naji Pasaka." 
Luke4:32 Neing'asia iltung'ana te nkiteng'enare enye, amu keiro anaa oloata enkitoria." 
Luke4:33 Netii atua ina aji e ntumo oltung'ani oata oloirirua oiduruk. Nebuak aishir to ltoilo sapuk ejo," 
Luke4:34 “Ooi Yesu le Nasaret, ainyoo iatakinore iyiook? Iewuo aidaikie iyiook? Kaayiolo ajo ira ng'ae: ira ilo obo Sinyati le Nkai.”" 
Luke4:35 Neisikong Yesu ilo oirirua nejoki, “Tigirayu! Tupuku tung'uai ninye.” Nebatat ilo oirirua torrono ilo tung'ani te dukuya ninye nepuku aing'uaa meeta enaitaasa ninye." 
Luke4:36 Neing'asia iltung'ana pooki nejokino, “Kaa kiroroto ena nairo ele tung'ani? Aaku kearaa te nkitoria o te ngolon iloiriruani ooiduruk, nepuku ninche.”" 
Luke4:37 Neibulu enkisisa e Yesu pooki wueji te nena murua naamanita. 
Luke4:38 Ore pee eing'uaa Yesu enkaji e ntumo nejing enkaji e Simon. Neitirrishaka olkirobi enkaputani e Simon, neomoni Yesu meishiunye." 
Luke4:39 Neitashe arumaki ninye kop nearaa ilo kirobi, neishiu olkirobi. Neinyototo nabo kata aisiaai ninche." 
Luke4:40 Ore edoyio enkolong, neyau lelo pooki ooata ltamuoyia loo mpukunot kumok aayaki Yesu meishiunye. Neiteleiki ake pooki tung'ani nkaik neishiunye ninche." 
Luke4:41 Nepuku sii iloiriruani ooiduruk kumok, aaing'uaa iltung'ana ebuaaya aajo, “Ira iyie Enkerai e Nkai.” Neing'ode amitiki eiro, amu keyiolo ninche aajo Kristo ninye." 
Luke4:42 Ore pee ekenyu nelo Yesu ewueji neliyio; kake eing'orutua olorere ninye. Nepuonu enetii, nejo maiboo neing'uaa ninche;" 
Luke4:43 kake etiaaka ninche, “Kalo ake pee aliki sii ninche kulie ang'itie kulo omon supati le nkitoria e Nkai. Ina pee aairriwuaki.”" 
Luke4:44 Nelikioo lelo omon too nkajijik e ntumo e Yudea. 
Luke5:1 Ore eiding'akino ltung'ana aaman Yesu einining'u lomon le Nkai, neitashe ninye te mbata e naiposha e Genesaret." 
Luke5:2 Nedol impeuti are eirrag te mbata e naiposha. Etupukutuo larreshok loo sinkir aapuo aaisuj irresheta lenye. 
Luke5:3 Nejing Yesu atua empeut nabo, naa ene Simon nejoki meturrumoi peno aitalam enkop natoyio. Neton aiteng'en olorere etonita ninye tiatua empeut." 
Luke5:4 Ore pee eidip airoro nejoki Simon, “Terewa enegut nintadoikiki irresheta linyi enaiposha aaibung isinkir.”" 
Luke5:5 Nejoki Simon, “Lo Kitok, kitaasishote enkewarie nalulung'a neitu kitum toki, kake ore amu itejo, kaitadoyio irresheta.”" 
Luke5:6 Ore pee eiko nejia neibung olkito turrur loo sinkir omeiteru aang'era resheta lenye. 
Luke5:7 Neyuku ile ncholiek enye ootii enkae peut meetu aaret. Nepuonu, neiput impeuti pokira are, ometaa keimis." 
Luke5:8 Ore pee edol Simon Petero ina nebatata too nkejek e Yesu, nejoki, “Olaitoriani, tung'uayioki nanu amu, kara oltung'ani loo ng'ok.”" 
Luke5:9 Amu eing'asie ninye o lelo ooboitare, te nkumoi oo sinkir ooibung'a;" 
Luke5:10 eing'asiate sii ninche layiok le Sebedayo, aa Yakobo o Yohana, oora le ncholiek e Simon, Nejoki Yesu Simon, “Miureishoyu; ore ebaiki taata, iltung'ana intorioo aibung.”" 
Luke5:11 Nereu mpeuti enkop natoyio, neing'uaa pooki toki nesuj Yesu." 
Luke5:12 Ore etii Yesu ae ang, netii oltung'ani oata enkeeya oo lbolot, ore pee edol ninye Yesu, nebatata te nkomom, neserem ajoki, “Olaitoriani, te niyieu eikindim aishiunye naishiu.”" 
Luke5:13 Neitorioo Yesu enkaina enye neiseyie nejoki, “Ekayieu, inchiu tisikayu.” Neishiu asika nabo kata ina keeya oo lbolot." 
Luke5:14 Neitanap Yesu ninye pee meliki likae tung'ani; nejoki, “Kake shomo, intoduaai kewan mikitisipu olapolosani ninchooyo olasar le nkishiunoto naitanapishe Musa pee eitadedeyie ina sikata ino te ninche.”" 
Luke5:15 Kake etoponari lomon le Yesu aaibulu enkop pooki, nepuonu iltung'ana kumok enetii aainining neishiunye imuoyiaritin enye pooki." 
Luke5:16 Kake kekepari ake nelo ong'ata, aomon Enkai openy." 
Luke5:17 Ore nabo olong eiteng'enisho Yesu, netii ine Ilfarisayo o laigerok ooing'uaa nkang'itie pooki e Galilaya, o Yudea o Yerusalem. Netii engolon e Nkai atua Yesu pee etum aishiunye olorere." 
Luke5:18 Nepuonu ina kata ltung'ana oonapita te rruat, oltung'ani maima, netem aajo mayaki Yesu tiatua aji." 
Luke5:19 Ore te nkaraki enkiding'a o lorere nelaikino aayaki. Nedumu aailepakinye shumata enkaji, nebol aaitayu elusie, neitadou te rruat aaitadoiki nkejek e Yesu te mpolos o lorere." 
Luke5:20 Ore pee edol Yesu enkirukoto naata ninche, nejoki ilo tung'ani, “Olchore, kitapalakaki ng'ok inono.”" 
Luke5:21 Neiteru ilaigerok o Lfarisayo aaishankarra ejo, “Ae ng'ae ele oiro amor Enkai? Aimme Enkai ake naidim atapalaki oltung'ani ing'ok?”" 
Luke5:22 Nedol Yesu eishankarra newaliki ajoki, “Kainyoo pee inchankarrarra maate?" 
Luke5:23 Kaa nalelek, te najo, ‘Kitapalakaki ng'ok inono,’ ana te najo, ‘Inyo shomo?’" 
Luke5:24 Kake ore pee iyiolouu aajo keeta Enkerai e Tung'ani enkitoria te nkop napalakinye ng'ok,” nejoki ilo tung'ani maima, “Aajoki inyo tudumu erruat ino shomo ang.”" 
Luke5:25 Neinyototo nabo kata ilo tung'ani te dukuya ninche, nedumu enaduoo rruat napetita, nelo ang eisisita Enkai." 
Luke5:26 Neing'asia pooki neisis Enkai, neureishoyu, nejo, “Kitoduaa ake taata mbaa e nking'asia!”" 
Luke5:27 Ore pee eidipayu nena nelo Yesu, nedol oltung'ani osotu kodi oji Lawi, eton te wueji nesotunye kodi; nejoki, “Tusujuaki nanu.”" 
Luke5:28 Neing'uaa Lawi pooki toki, neinyototo asuj Yesu." 
Luke5:29 Neitoomon Lawi Yesu to sirua kitok netii iltung'ana kumok oo loosotu kodi o kulikae ake oodaa te nebo ninche. 
Luke5:30 Neing'unyung'unyaki Lfarisayo o laigerok lkipaareta lenyena aajo, Kainyoo pee ing'arierie endaa niokishosho te nebo iloosotu kodi o laing'okok?”" 
Luke5:31 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Meyieu iltung'ana biyot olabaani, iloomuoi ooyieu." 
Luke5:32 Eitu alotu aipot lelo supati kake ilaing'okok aeuo aipot meetu aairridu.” 
Luke5:33 Nejoki iltung'ana Yesu, “Anaaijo keen ate aaitupukoo oshi lkipaareta le Yohana neomon Enkai naleng sii, naa nejia eiko lkipaareta loo Lfarisayo, nedaa ninche linono neokisho?”" 
Luke5:34 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Indimidimi aaitupukoi ilomon lo loyamisho eton eboitare oloyamisho?" 
Luke5:35 Kake keyooki aapuonu nkolong'i naayae oloyamisho aaitung'uaa, nepukoo taa ninche te nena olong'i.”" 
Luke5:36 Neitoki Yesu aliki ena kitanyaanyukoto nejoki, “Meetae oltung'ani oboru erashe to lkila ng'ejuk aripaki olkila musana, pee meinyal ilo ng'ejuk elde musana." 
Luke5:37 Meetae sii olobukoki enaisho oo sabibu ng'ejuk ilbenia musan pee medany ina aisho oo sabibu lelo benia musan, neibukori enaisho neidaaya ilbenia." 
Luke5:38 Kake ilbenia ng'ejuko epiki enaisho ng'ejuk. 
Luke5:39 Meetae sii oltung'ani otooko enaisho nao oitoki ayieu enajon, amu kejo, ‘Enao esidai.’ ”" 
Luke6:1 Neaku ore te nkolong e nkiyeng'iyeng naji Sabato, neim Yesu atua nkurman e nkano. Negilu lkipaareta lenyena lukuny e nkano nepupu too nkaik aanya lanterera." 
Luke6:2 Nejoki embata oo Lfarisayo, “Kaji etiu pee iasiasa enemeishoruno too nkitanapat ang te nkolong e Sabato?”" 
Luke6:3 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Keitu ai kata isumusumu enataasa Daudi o looisiritore pee etir esumash?" 
Luke6:4 Eneikuna pee ejing enkaji e Nkai, neitayu emukate nasinya, nenya, neng'arie sii lelo ooisiritore. Neibala nchere meishoruno too nkitanapat meinosa likae tung'ani ina mukate leme lapolosak?”" 
Luke6:5 Neitoki Yesu ajoki, “Olkitok le nkolong e Sabato doi Enkerai e Tung'ani.”" 
Luke6:6 Ore ti ae olong e Sabato nejing Yesu enkaji e ntumo aiteng'enisho. Netii oltung'ani ine oikaoele enkaina e tatene. 
Luke6:7 Neing'oru ake kulikae aigerok o Lfarisayo embae naitang'orie Yesu aajo eitarruoyie; nejur pee edol te naa keeta oltung'ani oishiunye te nkolong e Sabato. 
Luke6:8 Kake etayiolo Yesu ndamunot enye nejoki ilo tung'ani oikaoele enkaina, “Inyo wou dukuya tene.” Neinyototo ilo tung'ani neitashe teine." 
Luke6:9 Nejoki taa Yesu ninche, “Aikilikuan intae ena? Kaa naishoruno too nkitanapat mataas te nkolong e Sabato? Keishoruno mataar ana mataret?”" 
Luke6:10 Nekurraki pooki inkonyek aing'or, neitoki ajoki ilo tung'ani, “Intorioi enkaina ino!” Neiko nejia, neishiu enkaina enye." 
Luke6:11 Kake eiputa ninche engoro sapuk neiguana maate eing'oru enaitaas Yesu. 
Luke6:12 Ore te nena olong'i, neilep Yesu alo oldoinyo aomon, neton enkewarie pooki eomonito Enkai." 
Luke6:13 Ore pee ekenyu neipot lkipaareta lenyena negelu tomon o aare tiatua ninche nejo ninche lkipaareta. 
Luke6:14 Naa Simon eipoto ajo Petero o Anterea olalashe lenye; o Yakobo o Yohana, o Filipo o Bartolomayo;" 
Luke6:15 Matayo o Tomas, Yakobo ole Alfayo o Simon oji olkirowuai;" 
Luke6:16 Yudas olayioni le Yakobo o Yudas Iskariot laa ninye otakaldayie Yesu. 
Luke6:17 Ore pee edou Yesu oo lkipaareta lenyena to ldoinyo nepuonu enkisiashata. Netii ine lkipaareta lenyena kumok o siamon naaing'uaa Yudea o Yerusalem o lomanaa le Tiro o Sidon; 
Luke6:18 laa ninye eetuo aainining nejo sii pee eishiunye imuoyiaritin enye. Ore lelo ooitanyamalita loiriruani ooiduruk, neishiunye." 
Luke6:19 Netem pooki ng'ae teina siamo aiseyie ninye amu, kepuku engolon tiatua ninye neishiunye pooki." 
Luke6:20 Neraposhu Yesu nkonyek aing'or lkipaareta lenyena nejo, “Imayianana intae ilaisinak amu eninyi enkitoria e Nkai." 
Luke6:21 “Imayianana ilooata taata esumash; amu keitaraposhi intae. “Imayianana ilooishir taata amu iyiookiki aakueni. 
Luke6:22 “Imayianana te neibayu intae iltung'ana, nekepaa intae nemor, nemit eipoti nkarn inyi ejo ntorrok, te nkaraki Enkerai e Tung'ani." 
Luke6:23 Ore ina olong entishipata niranyiranya aaipidipid te ng'ida, amu kesipa ai kitok enkishorunoto naishori intae te Keper; amu ina apa eitaasa iloo papaai linyi iloibonok li apa." 
Luke6:24 “Kake ee ekake ayia intae ilkarsisi taata; indipa intae aanoto olkar linyi. 
Luke6:25 “Ee kake ayia intae ilooraposho taata; keyooki atir intae esumash. “Woi ake intae ilookueni taata; iyiookiki ake aaishir. 
Luke6:26 “Ee kake ayia te neimaki intae ltung'ana aaisis; nejia taa apake eikuna iloo papaai linyi aaisis iloibonok le lejare. 
Luke6:27 “Kake ajoki intae kulo laaning'ito," 
Luke6:28 entonyor ilmang'ati linyi; entaasa isupati ilooiba intae; entamayian ilo odek intae; ore iloosukeny intae neinyial, entoomonoki." 
Luke6:29 Ore pee kiosh oltung'ani eseder nyaaki inchoo sii enkae; ore pee eya oltung'ani olkila lino; inchoo sii enchati meewa. 
Luke6:30 Inchoo pooki likiomon; ore pee eya oltung'ani enino, mimpotu aoru." 
Luke6:31 Intaasa ilkulikae tung'ana anaa eniyieu nikintaas ninche iyie. 
Luke6:32 “Amaa te naa iloonyor intae ake inyorrinyorro, kaji eret ina te intae? Kenyor sii ninche larruok iloonyor ninche." 
Luke6:33 Amaa sii te naa lelo ake ooitaas intae isupati intaasiasa sii intae, kaji eret ina te intae? Nejia eiko sii ninche ilarruok." 
Luke6:34 Naa amaa te naa pooki ake olisilen naa elde ake liyiolo ajo kilaaki, ainyoo eret ina te iyie? Keisilenokino sii ninche ilarruok eyiolo aajo kelaakini aaiputaki." 
Luke6:35 Kake ore intae, entonyor ilmang'ati linyi niaasiasa isupati; enchooi te sile misiligugu toki naitu; naa itumutumu enkishorunoto kitok; niaakuku nkera o lotii Shumata Aisul te pooki, amu ore ninye keing'urrie ilarruok o lemeeta enashe." 
Luke6:36 Enoto olng'ur anaa Papa linyi oata olng'ur. 
Luke6:37 “Minguanare pee mikinguanareki; minor pee mikinorri, entapalaki pee epalakini intae." 
Luke6:38 Enchooi pee eishori intae; aaisho emborei sidai narujakino, neiposhakino, o metadooi nepiki ilbenia too lgooitie linyi; amu ore ake ina nitemakinyenye lkulikae naa ninye ake etemakinyeki sii ninche intae.”" 
Luke6:39 Neitoki Yesu aisho ninche enkitanyaanyukoto, nejo, “Keidim olmodooni atoriko likae modooni? Aimesulakino pokira aare engumoto?" 
Luke6:40 Megiroo oloiteng'eni oloiteng'en; kake ore eidipaki aaiteng'ena netiu anaa oloiteng'ena ninye. 
Luke6:41 Kainyoo pee idol entubuloi natii enkong'u o lalashe lino, nimidol olchata otii enkong'u ino makewan?" 
Luke6:42 Kaji nko pee ijoki olalashe lino, ‘Olalashe lai, ntasho maaitayu entubuloi nikitii enkong'u ino makewan,’ eji nimidol olchata likitii enkong'u ino makewan? Lo sunkuroi, tang'asa intayu ilo shata likitii enkong'u ino pee itum taa atodolisho, nintayu entubuloi natii enkong'u o lalashe lino." 
Luke6:43 “Meetae olchani sidai oiu ilng'anayio torrok, aashu olchani torrono oiu ilng'anayio sidain;"
