Luke6:44 amu eyiolouni ake olchani too lng'anayio lenyena. Amu metumieki olaimurunyai ilng'abolo, nemetumieki isabibu intulele." 
Luke6:45 Keitayu oltung'ani supat isupati naaitung'uaa olchumati supat otii oltau lenye, neitayu oltung'ani torrono ntorrok naaitung'uaa olchumati torrono otii oltau lenye, amu inaabore oltau lo ltung'ani eiro oltung'ani te nkutuk enye." 
Luke6:46 “Kainyoo pee kijojo, ‘Olaitoriani, Olaitoriani,’ nimiaasiasa enajoki intae?" 
Luke6:47 Kaliki intae enetiu ololotu enatii nening enajoki, neas nena natejo." 
Luke6:48 Etiu ninye anaa oltung'ani oshet enkaji, neng'as atur enkop aitugut, neunoki osoit olkitamanyunoto. Ore pee enang'unye enkare nenang'akino ina aji, kake nelaikino aigusugusie amu enotokoki olkitamanyunoto." 
Luke6:49 Kake ore ilo oning nemeas ae, etiu anaa oltung'ani otesheta enkaji eitu eng'as apik olkitamanyunoto. Ore pee enang'unye enkare neipony te ngolon enaduoo aji, neurori nabo kata, neme euroroto sii iyie ina natuurori enaduoo aji.”" 
Luke7:1 Ore pee eidip Yesu atoliki nena baa pooki, nejing Kapernaum." 
Luke7:2 Nemuoi naleng osinka kirotet lo sajini kitok loo Roma, etaa keye." 
Luke7:3 Ore pee ening ilo kitok eimakini Yesu, neirriwaki lpayiani loo Lyahudi meeu ninye aishiunye ilo sinka lenye." 
Luke7:4 Ore pee epuonu ninche enetii Yesu, neitirrishaki aasai aajoki, “Keishiaakino nintaas ninye ena:" 
Luke7:5 amu kenyor olorere lang, neteshetaka ninye iyiook enkaji e ntumo.”" 
Luke7:6 Neiriamariyie Yesu ninche. Ore etataanikia enkaji enye, neirriwaki ilo kitok loo sikarini ilchoreta lenyena ajoki, “Olaitoriani, mintanyamal kewan, amu maaishiaakino nanu te nijing'u enkaji ai;" 
Luke7:7 nemajo kara hoo ng'ae likilotu anang'are: kake olomoni obo doi ake tejo neishiu osinka lai. 
Luke7:8 Amu ara sii nanu oltung'ani otii enkitoria, naaitorei, naata sii nanu sikarini laitore. Naitore ele ajoki, ‘Shomo!’ Nelo; najoki elde ‘Wou!’ Nelotu; naitore osinka lai ajoki, ‘Taasa ena!’ Neas.”" 
Luke7:9 Ore pee ening Yesu nena, neing'asia te nkaraki ninye. Neibelekenya, nejoki lelo tung'ana oosujita, “Ajoki intae, eitu ai kata atum enkirukoto kitok naba nji tiatua Siraeli, eitu atum.”" 
Luke7:10 Nejo matorrinyoto aji iladuoo ooirriwuaki eishiwuo oladuoo sinka omuoi. 
Luke7:11 Ore te nkiti kata nelo Yesu enkanasa naji Nain; neiriamariyie ninye lkipaareta lenyena o lorora kitok. 
Luke7:12 Ore etii auluo etinyikaka kishomi e ina anasa, nedol enapitai olmeneng'ani aaya, naa ilo otua ake eeta ng'otonye, naa enkoliai; nerubare ltung'ana kumok le ina anasa." 
Luke7:13 Ore pee edol Olaitoriani ninye neing'urrie nejoki, “Minchir.”" 
Luke7:14 Nenyikaki Yesu neiseyie osanduku neitashe lewa oonapita. Nejoki Yesu, “Lo barnoti! Inyo!”" 
Luke7:15 Neinyototo ilo duoo otua aton, neiteru airo. Neisho Yesu ng'otonye." 
Luke7:16 Neureishoyu ninche pooki; neisis Enkai nejo, “Einyo oloiboni kitok le Nkai tiatua iyiook,” nejo sii, “Eewuo Enkai abaiki iltung'ana lenyena.”" 
Luke7:17 Neibulu enkisisa e ina nataasa Yesu Yudea pooki, o ina kop namanita." 
Luke7:18 Neliki lkipaareta le Yohana, Yohana nena baa pooki naasita Yesu." 
Luke7:19 Neipot Yohana aare le lelo kipaareta lenyena neirriwaki Yesu meikilikuana aajoki, “Aa iyie doi apa olotu? Anaa ai likae kiaanyu?”" 
Luke7:20 Ore pee epuonu lelo tung'ana enetii Yesu nejoki, “Yohana Olaibatisani oirriwua iyiook enitii ejo, ‘Aa iyie doi apa olotu anaa ai kianyu likae?’ ”" 
Luke7:21 Ore teina kata ake neishiunye Yesu iltung'ana ooata nkeyaitin o muoyiaritin kumok, nearaa nkiyang'eta torrok. Ore ilmodook kumok nebol inkonyek nedolishoyu." 
Luke7:22 Newaliki Yesu ninche nejoki, “Enchom entoliki Yohana kuna nitoduaa o nitoning'o; etodolishote ilmodook, nepuo lmaiman, neishiunyeki aasik ilooata enkeeya oo lbolot, nening'ishoyu lming'anta, neitopiuni ilootuata, nelikini laisinak ororei supat." 
Luke7:23 Emayiana ilo tung'ani lemetum olkob te nanu.” 
Luke7:24 Ore eidipa aashom ilkipaareta le Yohana neiteru Yesu ainosaa Yohana to lorere nejo, “Kainyoo nawa intae enchom entodol ti ong'ata? Kolperesi oyuk enkijape?" 
Luke7:25 Mme ninye? Kainyoo naa ishomo intae aadol? Ko ltung'ani oishopito nkilani naapuyiapui o naaitintil? Nkang'itie oo laiguanak etumieki lelo ooishop nkilani naapuyiapui o ne nkuso. 
Luke7:26 Kake kainyoo doi ishomo aadol? Koloiboni le Nkai? Ee pae naa kelang ninye oloiboni le Nkai. 
Luke7:27 Ninye doi eimakita lkigerot aajo, ‘Nele olkipaaret lai laiturukie te iyie, olaa ninye likintobiraki enkoitoi ino.’" 
Luke7:28 Ajoki intae, kitok Yohana alang pooki tung'ani oiu enkitok kake ore eyia, ore olobayie te nkitoria e Nkai naa kitok alang ninye.”" 
Luke7:29 Ore pee ening iltung'ana pooki o loosotu kodi neitadedeyie Enkai amu eibatisaki te nkibatisare e Yohana. 
Luke7:30 Kake etanyaita ninche Lfarisayo o laiteng'enak loo nkitanapat enayiewuaki Enkai amu etanyaita ninche maate eibatisa Yohana. 
Luke7:31 Nejo Yesu, “Kainyoo atemaki kulo tung'ana le kuna olong'i? Kainyoo enyaanyukie?" 
Luke7:32 Kenyaanyukie nkera naatoni te nemirishoreki, naaipotuno ejo, ‘Kitooshokito intae ndulen, neitu iranyishosho; nikinchirakita intae, neitu nchirishiri.’" 
Luke7:33 Amu eewuo Yohana Olaibatisani neitupukoo kewan, nemeok enaisho oo sabibu; nijojo intae, ‘Keeta oloirirua.’" 
Luke7:34 Eewuo Enkerai e Tung'ani nedaa neokisho; nijojo, ‘Eng'ura oltung'ani oulu, naa olamerani, naa olchore loo loosotu kodi o laing'okok!’" 
Luke7:35 Ore naa eng'eno e Nkai, neitadedeyie pooki oora inkera enyena.”" 
Luke7:36 Neipot oltung'ani obo loo Lfarisayo Yesu pee eitoomon te nkaji enye. Nejing Yesuenkaji e ilo Farisayoi neton anya endaa. 
Luke7:37 Netii enkitok ina anasa, naa enkaasani oo ng'ok. Ore pee eyiolou ajo einosita Yesu endaa te nkaji e ilo Farisayoi, neyau oltulet lo soit oji alabasta le ilata narropil," 
Luke7:38 neitashe te siadi ninye too nkejek, e Yesu, neiteru aituku nkejek enyena too lkiyio, nejut too lpapit le endukuya enye, neng'utut nkejek enyena, neelie ina ilata." 
Luke7:39 Ore pee edol ilo Farisayoi oitoomono Yesu nejo to ltau, “Te naa koloiboni le Nkai ele tung'ani anaata etayiolo ajo aing'ae anaa kaa pukunoto e nkitok ena naibung ninye!”" 
Luke7:40 Neirorie Yesu nejoki, “Simon, kaata embae naaliki.” Nejoki, “Ee Olaiteng'enani.”" 
Luke7:41 Neliki Yesu ena kitanyanyukoto, “Eisilenoko oltung'ani iltung'ana aare indinari enyena, neisho obo indinari iip imiet, neisho olikae onom." 
Luke7:42 Ore pee elau pokira aare entoki nalakie, nepalaki pokira aare. Amaa te pokira aare, kalo onyorru ninye oleng?”" 
Luke7:43 Newaliki Simon ajoki, “Amen ajo, elde otapalakaki nkumok.” Nejoki Yesu, “Itisipa ewalata.”" 
Luke7:44 Neibelekenyakino Yesu enkitok, nejoki Simon, “Idol ena kitok? Aewuo enkaji ino neitu kincho enkare oo nkejek; kake aaitashala ena kitok inkejek aainei too lkiyio nejut too lpapit lenyena." 
Luke7:45 Eitu king'utut; ore ninye, anaa duoo pee ajing'u eitu aapal maang'utut inkejek aainei." 
Luke7:46 Eitu kiel endukuya te ilata, kake aaela ninye nkejek te na ilata." 
Luke7:47 Aajoki naa te nkaraki ina, etapalakaki ng'ok enyena, aa kumok, amu etonyorrishe oleng, amu ore doi olopalakini nkuti naa kiti enyorrata enye.”" 
Luke7:48 Nejoki Yesu ina kitok, “Kitapalakaki ing'ok inono.”" 
Luke7:49 Ore lelo ootoni aadaa te nebo ninye neiteru aajo maate, “Ai ng'ae ele eji opalaki oltung'ani ng'ok?”" 
Luke7:50 Nejoki ina kitok, “Kintajewuo enkirukoto ino; shomo te seriani!”" 
Luke8:1 Neaku ore pee eidipayu nena, nemanaa Yesu too nkanas sapuki o nkutiti elikioo ilo rorei neyaki lomon supati le nkitoria e Nkai. Neiriamariyie ninye lkipaareta lenyena tomon o aare," 
Luke8:2 o nkituaak naaishiunyeki nkiyang'eta torrok o nkeyaitin: Mariamu Magdalena, nataarayioki loiriruani oopishana metung'uai," 
Luke8:3 o enkitok e Kusa osinka le Herode naji Yoana o Susana o kulie kumok naaitoomono ninche Yesu o lkipaareta too masaa enye. 
Luke8:4 Ore pee etumo ltung'ana kumok aaiturrurro, nesotokino lelo le nena ang'itie pooki, neiro Yesu alimu ena kitanyaanyukoto." 
Luke8:5 “Etupukuo olaunoni alo aun ilanterera lenyena; ore eunisho, nedoiki kulikae embata e nkoitoi, neitunyori too nkejek, nenya motonyi e shumata." 
Luke8:6 Nedoiki kulikae enkop o soit, nejo matubulu, netoyu amu meeta enkare naok." 
Luke8:7 Nedoiki kulikae atua lkiku, neiriamunore lkiku, negor ninche." 
Luke8:8 Nedoiki kulikae enkop sidai, nebulu, neiu ilng'anayio iip nabore.” Ore ejoito Yesu nejia nebuak ajo, “Oloata nkiyiaa, toning'o!”" 
Luke8:9 Neikilikuan lkipaareta lenyena ninye enalimu ena kitanyaanyukoto. 
Luke8:10 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Eishooki intae entayiolo nkisudorot e nkitoria e Nkai; kake keishori ilkulikae too nkitanyaanyukot pee eing'or nemedol, nening ninche nemejing'aa”." 
Luke8:11 “Naa inji eikununo ina kitanyaanyukoto. Ore ilanterera naa ninche ororei le Nkai. 
Luke8:12 Ore lelo ootadoikitio embata e nkoitoi naa lelo ooning ororei; nelotu Sheitani aitayu too ltauja lenye arishie pee meiruk neitajeuni. 
Luke8:13 Ore ilanterera ootadoikitio enkop o soit naa lelo ooning ororei neng'amu te ng'ida. Kake eitu ejing'aa atua ninche; neiruk te nkiti kata ake, ore pee epuonu ntemat nebatata aaitiak." 
Luke8:14 Ore lelo ootadoikitio atua lkiku naa lelo ooning, kake nepuo neitirrishaki enyamali oo masaa o esikar ena kishon nemeitabaya aaiu ilng'anayio." 
Luke8:15 Ore ilanterera ootadoikitio enkulupuoni sidai naa lelo ooning ele rorei, neibung aakuraki too ltauja lenye neiu ilng'anayio." 
Luke8:16 “Meetae oltung'ani oinok oltaa neitoki aitoip to ltoo anaa epik orunku le rruat, kake kepik enerupa neitasheyie pee edol iloojing ewang'an." 
Luke8:17 Amu meetae entoki naisudoro, nemeibalunyeki; nemeetae enoo nkurrat nemeibalunyeki te wang'an." 
Luke8:18 Enteng'enuoto too mbaa nining'ining'i amu ore oloata, naa keishori, ore olemeeta neoruni ina najo ninye keeta.”" 
Luke8:19 Nelotu ng'otonye Yesu o lalashera lenyena nelaikino aatabaiki ninye te nkiding'a o lorere. 
Luke8:20 Neyakini olkilikuai aajoki, “Etii ng'utunyi o lalashera linono boo, eitashe, kiyieu nikitumore.”" 
Luke8:21 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Ore yieyio o lalashera laainei naa, lelo ooning ororei le Nkai neibung.”" 
Luke8:22 Ore nabo olong; nejing Yesu empeut o lkipaareta lenyena; nejoki ninche, “Ematalang aapuo lido kekun le naiposha,” nedumunye aapuo." 
Luke8:23 Ore epuoito neirura Yesu. Nedumunye olkutati te naiposha, neaku keiput empeut enkare, nejing bata." 
Luke8:24 Nepuo loiteng'eni aainyeyie ninye ajoki, “Lo Kitok! Lo Kitok! Kindaaitie!” Neinyototo neisikong osiwuo o enkilugo e nkare; negira, nelotu enkitirring'a." 
Luke8:25 Nejoki ninche, “Koree enkirukoto inyi?” Neureishoyu lkipaareta lenyena, neing'asia, nejokino maate, “Kaing'ae taa ele laa keitore osiwuo o enkare, nening?”" 
Luke8:26 Nebaya ninche lido kekun loo Lgeraseni, oipirare Galilaya." 
Luke8:27 Ore pee edoiki Yesu enkop natoyio nenang'are oltung'ani obo leina anasa oata iloiriruani; oshomo nkolong'i kumok meishopo, nemejing ang, too nkuraren eton." 
Luke8:28 Ore pee edol Yesu, nebuak, nebatata te dukuya ninye, nejo to ltoilo sapuk, “Kainyoo aatayie nanu iyie Yesu, Enkerai e Nkai Natii Shumata Aisul te pooki? Aatasayia mikisilisil.”" 
Luke8:29 Amu ketaarayie Yesu ilo oirirua torrono otii ilo tung'ani metupuku. (Amu eibung'a nkolong'i kumok, neteenaki aarrip, nerridi too sekenke naairoishi o too lpisia; ore pee eitirrie pooki nearaa oloirirua ninye ong'ata.)" 
Luke8:30 Neikilikuan Yesu ajoki, “Aikiji ng'ae?” Nejo, “Kaaji, Empuoto;” amu iloiriruani kumok ootijing'a." 
Luke8:31 Nesai iloiriruani Yesu pee mearaa ninche meshomo olodo le nkop. 
Luke8:32 Netii ine emboo oo lbitiro, nadaa to losho; nesai meishoo pee epuo aajing lelo bitiro. Neisho meshomo." 
Luke8:33 Nepuku lelo oiriruani te ilo tung'ani, nejing ilbitiro; nekuet ina luaata oo lbitiro to loshong'ishong'i neimis te naiposha neya enkare." 
Luke8:34 Ore pee edol lchekuti le lelo bitiro inaatotiwuo, neisik aapuo aalikioo teina anasa o teina kop." 
Luke8:35 Nepuku iltung'ana aapuo aadol enatotiwuo. Nepuonu enetii Yesu, neinepu ilo tung'ani otaarayioki loiriruani etonita, neishopo, nenyakua oltau lenye biyoto, etonita too nkejek e Yesu; neureishoyu ninche." 
Luke8:36 Nelikioo lelo apa ootoduakita ilo tung'ani earari loiriruani metaa biyoto, enaikuna pee eishiunyeki." 
Luke8:37 Ore lelo tung'ana pooki le nkop oo Lgeraseni o neemanita, nesai Yesu metung'uai ninche amu etureishote oleng. Nejing ninye empeut ashuko." 
Luke8:38 Nesai oladuoo oishiunyeki Yesu meturubare, kake eitanapa Yesu ajoki," 
Luke8:39 “Tushukoyu enkang inyi, imbalakinye enaba ina nikintaasa Enkai.” Nelo aing'uaa, einosaa teina anasa pooki nena e nking'asia naaitaasa Yesu ninye." 
Luke8:40 Ore pee eitu Yesu, neitoomon olorere te nchipai amu keanyita apa ake pooki." 
Luke8:41 Nelotu oltung'ani oji Yairo naa olkitok le nkaji e ntumo; nebatata too nkejek e Yesu nesai meshomo enkaji enye," 
Luke8:42 amu entito nabo ake eeta, oo larin tomon o aare, neirrag etaa keye. Kake ore ejo Yesu alo neiding'akino olorere." 
Luke8:43 Netii enkitok naturuke osarge larin tomon o aare; netumuta masaa enyena kumok too labaak, neitu eishiunye hoo obo." 
Luke8:44 Neimu te siadi Yesu, neiseyie olcholoi lo lkila lenye negem nabo kata osarge." 
Luke8:45 Nejo Yesu, “Ae ng'ae naatoshoroyie?” Neitolilo olorere, nejoki Petero, “Lo Kitok, kironyita olorere likinturrurrokinote!”" 
Luke8:46 Kake etiaaka Yesu, “Etii oltung'ani laatoshoroyie, amu atayiolo ajo etii engolon natupukuo te nanu.”" 
Luke8:47 Neisho ina kitok, pee edol ajo meekure eidim aisudori, nekuetu eikirikira, nebatata te dukuya Yesu, neibalakinye mbaa pooki te dukuya olorere, ajo ainyoo pee etaasa ina, o eneikuna pee eishiwuo." 
Luke8:48 Nejoki Yesu ina kitok, “Naito, kinchiunye enkirukoto ino. Shomo te seriani.”" 
Luke8:49 Ore ejo nejia, nelotu oltung'ani oing'uaa enkaji e ilo kitok le nkaji e ntumo, nejoki, “Etua entito ino; mintoki aintanyamal olaiteng'enani.”" 
Luke8:50 Ore pee ening Yesu ina, newaliki Yairo ajoki, “Miureishoyu: iruko ake iyie, naa keitaae biyoto.”" 
Luke8:51 Ore pee ebaya ina aji, neitu eisho Yesu likae tung'ani ejing'u, Petero ake o Yohana o Yakobo, o menye o ng'otonye ina kerai." 
Luke8:52 Ore aa kitok olkiyioi loo ltung'ana, nejoki Yesu ninche, “Eminchir amu eitu eye, keirura.”" 
Luke8:53 Nekueniyieki oleng, amu keyiolo aajo eidipa atua." 
Luke8:54 Kake ore ninye, neibung, neipot ajoki, “Nakerai, inyo!”" 
Luke8:55 Neshukokino ninye enkiyang'et enye, neinyototo nabo kata, neitanapisho meishori endaa." 
Luke8:56 Neing'asia ntoiwuo e ina kerai kake eitanapa Yesu pee meliki hoo oltung'ani enataase. 
Luke9:1 Neipot Yesu lkipaareta lenyena tomon o aare, neisho engolon o enkidimata naitoreyie iloiriruani pooki, neishiunye imuoyiaritin." 
Luke9:2 Neirriwaa metolikioi enkitoria e Nkai, neishiunye iloomuoyiaa." 
Luke9:3 Nejoki ninche, “Emiya hoo toki te lototo inyi, aa eng'udi, aashu embene, aashu endaa, aashu impisai, nimiyaya nkilani maa are." 
Luke9:4 Ore enkaji pooki nijing'ijing'i, entotoni teine o entupuku teina ang." 
Luke9:5 Ore ilemeitoomon intae, entung'uai ina ang nimpiripiroo enterit natii nkejek inyi metaa shakeni te ninche.”" 
Luke9:6 Nepuo aamanaa te nena ang'itie, pooki elikioo lomon supati, neishiunye iltamuoyia too wuejitin pooki." 
Luke9:7 Ore Herode laa ninye oitore Galilaya, pee ening nena pooki naasitae; neiputukuny amu etejo kulikae tung'ana, “Yohana otopiwuo too lootuata.”" 
Luke9:8 Nejo kulikae, “Eliya oipang'ua.” Nejo kulikae, “Obo loo loibonok li apa otopiwuo.”" 
Luke9:9 Nejo Herode, “Atudung'oyie taa ninye Yohana elukunya, ae ng'ae naa ele laning mbaa enyena?” Neing'oru eyieu nedol ninye." 
Luke9:10 Ore pee eshukunye ilkipaareta, neinosaki Yesu mbaa pooki naataasa. Nerik nepuo enkilepata, o metoriko enkanasa naji Betsaida." 
Luke9:11 Ore pee eyiolou olorora, nesujaa. Neitoomon neirorie aliki ninche mbaa e nkitoria e Nkai, neishiunye ilooyieu neishiunyeki." 
Luke9:12 Ore pee eaku kedoiyo enkolong, nepuonu lkipaareta lenyena enetii nejoki, “Intanapa olorere meshomo kuna kurman o nkang'itie naataana aairrag neing'oru endaa amu ong'ata ene nikitii.”" 
Luke9:13 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Enchoo doi intae endaa.” Nejoki ninche, “Mikiaata ae toki neme mukateni miet o sinkir aare, aashu te naa aikipuo aainyang'aki ele orere pooki endaa.”" 
Luke9:14 Amu kebaya lewa ootii, nkalifuni miet. Nejoki Yesu lkipaareta lenyena, “Entotona olorere too intukusi maa onom.”" 
Luke9:15 Neas ina, neitoton iltung'ana pooki." 
Luke9:16 Nedumu Yesu imukateni pokira miet, o sinkir are, neing'or shumata nemayian nebel, neisho lkipaareta lenyena meishoo olorere." 
Luke9:17 Nenya, neraposho pooki. Nesotuni lmong'oishi, neiput inkikapuni tomon o aare." 
Luke9:18 Ore eomonito Yesu openy, netii lkipaareta lenyena, neikilikuan ajoki, “Kejo olorere kara nanu ng'ae?”" 
Luke9:19 Newaliki aajoki, “Ejo Yohana Olaibatisani, nejo kulikae, Eliya; nejo kulikae ira obo loo loibonok li apa otopiwuo.”" 
Luke9:20 Nejoki, “Nijojo intae kara ng'ae?” Nejoki Petero, “Iyie Kristo le Nkai.”" 
Luke9:21 Neitanap Yesu lkipaareta lenyena neitanap pee meliki hoo oltung'ani ilo rorei. 
Luke9:22 Nejoki, “Meeta nchere pee meinyali Enkerai e Tung'ani too mbaa kumok, neany ilpayiani o lapolosak kituaak o lasirak neari metua, neitopiuni te nkolong e uni.”" 
Luke9:23 Nejoki ninche pooki, “Te neyieu oltung'ani naasuj nanu, inchoo emenaa kewan, nenap osalaba lenye inkolong'i pooki, naasuj." 
Luke9:24 Amu ore oloyieu neitajeu enkishui enye, neiminie; kake ore pooki oiturraa enkishui enye te nkaraki nanu neitajeu." 
Luke9:25 Amu ainyoo dupoto o ltung'ani tenetum enkop pooki neiturraa enkishui enye. 
Luke9:26 Amu ore olodol enkurruna te nanu o too rorei laainei, neduaaki sii ninye Enkerai e Tung'ani ninye enkurruna te nelotu te nkitoo enye o ene menye o enoo lmalaika sinyat." 
Luke9:27 Kake ajoki intae too sipat nchere etii kulo ooitashe te ne lemeishamisham keeya katukul, eitu eng'as aadol enkitoria e Nkai.”" 
Luke9:28 Ore too nkolong'i naabaya isiet eidipate nena baa nerik Yesu Petero o Yohana o Yakobo neked oldoinyo aaomon. 
Luke9:29 Neaku ore eomonito, neibelekenya emua e nkomom e Yesu, o nkilani enyena, neiborru neimerlelu." 
Luke9:30 Neirorie ninye Musa o Eliya 
Luke9:31 etalioote te nkitoo e keper, neirorie Yesu eimaki eneyooki aiko teneitabaya eyieunoto e Nkai aye te Yerusalem." 
Luke9:32 Ore Petero o looboitare neiliara too njio, kake edolisho ake nedol enkitoo e Yesu, o lelo tung'ana pokira aare ooitashe te nebo ninye." 
Luke9:33 Ore epuo lelo tung'ana aaing'uaa Yesu, nejoki Petero Yesu, “Lo Kitok, eisidai kitii ene, maitobira lng'oborri okuni, obo lino, o obo le Musa o le Eliya.” Nemeyiolo enajoito." 
Luke9:34 Ore ejoito nejia nedou enkatampoi neitoip ninche apik oloip; neureishoyu pee ejing atua ina atampoi. 
Luke9:35 Nepuku oltoilo te nkatampoi nejo, “Ena Enkerai ai Gelunoti, entoning ninye.”" 
Luke9:36 Ore pee egira ilo toilo, nedoli Yesu aa ninye ake. Negira ninche, eitu eliki ltung'ana te nena olong'i inaatoduaa." 
Luke9:37 Ore pee ekenyu pee edou ninche to ldoinyo, netumore olorora kitok Yesu." 
Luke9:38 Nebuaku oltung'ani obo tiatua ilo orora ajo, “Olaiteng'enani, aatasayia ng'urai enkerai ai amu ninye ake aata;" 
Luke9:39 naa kenang'aa oloirirua, nebuak, neiterreyie o meitayu labur nemeing'uaa asioki, near oleng." 
Luke9:40 Natasayia lkipaareta linono meitayu netalaikinote.” 
Luke9:41 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Oi ena ishoi nemeeta enkirukoto, kaboitare intae naitaas intae o anu? Iyau enkerai ino ene.”" 
Luke9:42 Ore egira ayau, nenang'aa oloirirua neiterreyie. Nebuaaki Yesu ilo oirirua torrono, neishiunye ina kerai, neshukoki menye." 
Luke9:43 Neing'asia lelo pooki ootoduaa engolon magilani e Nkai. Ore eton eing'asia pooki too mbaa naataasa Yesu, nejoki ninye lkipaareta lenyena," 
Luke9:44 “Emincho ake erikino intae kuna taata naliki intae! Keishoori Enkerai e Tung'ani aaitarasaki inkaik oo ltung'ana.” 
Luke9:45 Kake eitu ejing'aa lkipaareta ina natiaaka; eton eisudoro te ninche, metaa mening'u tipat enye, nemeitieu sii aaikilikuana." 
Luke9:46 Neiteru enchankar tiatua ninche maate ejo kalo lenye olkitok te pooki. 
Luke9:47 Neyiolou Yesu ina naibirribirrita ninche, nedumu enkerai neitataaniki kewan aitasheyie." 
Luke9:48 Nejoki ninche, “Ore pooki ng'ae ong'amu ena kerai te nkarna ai, nanu etang'amua, ore oloisul te nkitisho tiatua intae, naa ninye oisul te nkitoo.”" 
Luke9:49 Neng'amaa Yohana Yesu ajoki, “Lo Kitok, kitoduaa oltung'ani earaa loiriruani te nkarna ino nikimitiki, amu mme ole ncholiek ang.”" 
Luke9:50 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Emimitiki, amu ore olemekesh intae, naa ole nkalo inyi.”" 
Luke9:51 Netaanu nkolong'i pee eilep Yesu alo keper, nemut nabo ajo kelo Yerusalem." 
Luke9:52 Neirriwaa ilkipaareta meituruko dukuya ninye aajing enkang oo Samaria, pee eitobiraki enejing." 
Luke9:53 Kake eitu eitoomon ilopeny te nkaraki neipirita Yerusalem. 
Luke9:54 Ore pee edol lkipaareta lenyena, Yakobo o Yohana nena, nejo, “Olaitoriani, iyieu nikimpotu enkima te keper metapejoi?”" 
Luke9:55 Neibelekenyakino Yesu aing'ode nejoki, “Mayiolo aajo kaa pukunoto oo ltauja iatata," 
Luke9:56 amu eitu doi elotu Enkerai e Tung'ani amut iltauja loo ltung'ana, kake pee eitajeu.” Nepuo ae ang." 
Luke9:57 Ore epuoito te nkoitoi, nejoki oltung'ani obo Yesu, “Ekaasuj nanu iyie pooki wueji nilo.”" 
Luke9:58 Nejoki Yesu, “Eeta mbariak ngumot enye, neeta motonyi nkajijik enye. Kake meeta Enkerai e Tung'ani eneirishaki elukunya enye.”" 
Luke9:59 Nejoki likae, “Tusujuaki nanu.” Kake etiaaka, “Lo Kitok, nchooki ang'as alo anukaa papa.”" 
Luke9:60 Nejoki Yesu, “Inchoo lmeneng'a, metunukai ilmeneng'a kake shomo iyie tolikioi ilomon le nkitoria e Nkai.”" 
Luke9:61 Nejoki sii likae, “Olaitoriani, kaasuj kake, nchooki ang'as alo aitanapare iltung'ana to lmarei lang.”" 
Luke9:62 Nejoki Yesu, “Ore oltung'ani otonyorra enturore neitoki anang silig, nemeishiaakino enkitoria e Nkai.”" 
Luke10:1 Ore te siadi nena, negelu Olaitoriani kulikae tung'ana ntomoni naapishana neirriwaa maare, meturuko nena ang'itie o pooki wueji neyieu neitoki openy alo." 
Luke10:2 Ejoki Yesu ninche, “Aisapuk enkikesare kake aikuti ilaisiaayiak, entoomon naa olopeny enkikesare meirriu ilaisiaayiak meetu enkikesare enye." 
Luke10:3 Enchom! Airriwaa intae anaa lkuoo le kerra ooirrikini atua suyian. 
Luke10:4 Emiya embene, aashu nkilani, aashu namuka, nimirorokiki hoo oltung'ani te nkoitoi." 
Luke10:5 Ore enkaji pooki nijing'ijing'i entang'as entejo, ‘Metijing'a eseriani ena aji.’" 
Luke10:6 Naa te netii oltung'ani onyor eseriani ine netum ninye eseriani inyi, naa te nemetii, neshukokino intae eseriani inyi." 
Luke10:7 Entotoni teina aji ninyanya, niokioko entoki naba anaa enaishori intae, amu kenare olaasani le siaai olekoisiaayio lenye; emipuo aarukurukoo nkajijik." 
Luke10:8 Ore enkang pooki nijing'ijing'i neitoomon intae, enosa endaa naishooki intae;" 
Luke10:9 ninchiunyenye iloomuoi ootii nijokiki etinyikua enkitoria e Nkai. 
Luke10:10 Ore enkang nijing'ijing'i nemeitoomon intae, enchom inkoitoi enyena naalala nijojo," 
Luke10:11 ‘Ore ninye enterit e nkang inyi nikiaata too nkejek ang, kimpiripiroki intae, kake entayiolo nchere, etinyikua enkitoria e Nkai.’" 
Luke10:12 Esipa ajoki intae, ore teina olong e nkiguana, Sodom eikashieki alang enaitaasi ina ang!" 
Luke10:13 “Ee kake ayia iyie Korasin! Ee kake ayia iyie Betsaida! Amu tenaa ketaasaki apa te Tiro o Sidon nena e nking'asia naatasaki tiatua intae, anaata eirridutua apa moitie, neishop lkuniyiani, neelare nkuruon." 
Luke10:14 Kake Tiro o Sidon eikashieki te nkolong e nkiguana aaitalang intae. 
Luke10:15 Oi iyie Kapernaum, eijo shumata kilepieki! Kintadouni shomo enemeneng'a.”" 
Luke10:16 Nejoki Yesu lkipaareta lenyena, “Ore pooki oning intae, nanu ening, ore oloany intae, nanu eany, ore olaany nanu, naa ilo laairriwua etanya.”" 
Luke10:17 Neshukunye lelo kipaareta ntomoni naapishana o aare te ng'ida. Nejo, “Olaitoriani, ore ebaiki loiriruani, etoning'o iyiook kiaaraa te nkarna ino!”" 
Luke10:18 Newaliki Yesu nejoki, “Atoduaa Sheitani esulunye anaa enkiwuang'ata eing'uaa shumata." 
Luke10:19 Enining'o! Aishoo intae enkidimata, metaa indimidimi aaitunyoi ilasuriaa o nkulupani, o engolon pooki e ilo mang'atinta, nemeeta enaiko intae." 
Luke10:20 Kake eming'idare ina naning intae iloiriruani; kake enting'idata amu eigero nkarn inyi te keper.” 
Luke10:21 Ore ina kata ake neshipayu Yesu eiputa Enkiyang'et Sinyati, nejo, “Ashe Papa Olaitoriani le keper o enkop! Amu isudorie kuna baa ilang'eni o loata eyiolounoto niboloki inkera naanana, amu ina eyieunoto e mpiris ino." 
Luke10:22 Nanu eishoo Papa pooki toki, nemeetae oloyiolo Oinoti leme Papa ake, nemeetae oloyiolo Papa leme Oinoti lenye ake, o pooki ng'ae ake ogelu enkerai aboloki ninye.”" 
Luke10:23 Neibelekenyakino Yesu lkipaareta lenyena, neirorie too nkurrat nejo, “Emayiana inkonyek naadol kuna nidolitata intae." 
Luke10:24 Amu ajoki intae, keyieu apa iloibonok o laiguanak, nedol kuna nidolidolo, kake eitu hoo edol; neyieu apa nening kuna nining'ining'i kake eitu hoo ening.”" 
Luke10:25 Neinyototo olang'eni obo aikilikuanishore Yesu, eyieu netem, nejoki, “Lo Aiteng'enani, kaji aiko pee ajung enkishui nemeish?”" 
Luke10:26 Nejoki Yesu, “Kakua baa naaigero too nkitanapat e Nkai? Kejo aa enisuma iyie?”" 
Luke10:27 Newaliki olang'eni ajoki, “Tonyorra Olaitoriani Enkai ino to ltau lino pooki, o te nkiyang'et ino pooki, o te ng'eno ino pooki, o te ngolon ino pooki, ninyorru o le latia ino anaa eninyor kewan.”" 
Luke10:28 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Itawalua aitobiraki, taasa ina pee ibik inchu.”" 
Luke10:29 Neyieu ninye neitaa kewan asipani, nejoki Yesu, “Ai ng'ae doi ole latia ai?”" 
Luke10:30 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Etadowuo oltung'ani eing'uaa Yerusalem alo Yeriko, neinepu ilaisimak ninye neoru nkilani, near neing'uaa etaa keye." 
Luke10:31 Nelotu olapolosani aim ina oitoi, ore pee edol nepaash, nelo." 
Luke10:32 Nelotu sii ninye ole Lawi aim ine ore pee edol nepaash, nelo." 
Luke10:33 Kake ore pee elotu Osamariyiai olo sii ninye nkang'itie, ore pee edol neing'urrie." 
Luke10:34 Nebaiki neen ilbaa lenyena nebukoki eilata neisho enaisho oo sabibu, neitoki aitaked esikiria enye, nerik enkaji naitoomonishoreki neramat teine." 
Luke10:35 Ore pee ekenyu, neitayu dinari are aisho olopeny ina aji nejoki, ‘Ing'ura taa ele tung'ani, ore pooki toki nanya nalusoo te nena, nalotu alak tenashukunye.’" 
Luke10:36 Kaa idol iyie te lelo tung'ana pokira okuni, kalo otaa ole latia teilo otara ilaisimak?”" 
Luke10:37 Nejo ninye; ilo oing'urrie ninye. Nejoki Yesu Ninye shomo sii iyie taasa ina. 
Luke10:38 Ore epuoito Yesu o lkipaareta lenyena neimaa Yesu enkang namanya enkitok naji Marisa, neitoomon te nkaji enye." 
Luke10:39 Neeta enkanashe naji Mariamu, nelotu ina aton too nkejek e Yesu, aton aainining inkiteng'enat e Yesu." 
Luke10:40 Nenyamalu Marisa too siaaitin enyena kumok, nelotu enetii Yesu nejoki, “Olaitoriani, aimidol ajo emakua te naasisho openy, naapalaki enkanashe ai? Tiaaki naa maaeu aret.”" 
Luke10:41 Kake etawalikia Olaitoriani ajoki, “Marisa, Marisa, intanyamaluo nimposha too mbaa kumok;" 
Luke10:42 kake nabo bae ake naata tipat, ena bae natudutayie Mariamu naisul; nemeyae aaitung'uaa ninye.”" 
Luke11:1 Neaku ore eomonito Yesu te dikae wueji, ore pee eidip, nejoki obo loo lkipaareta lenyena, “Olaitoriani, inteng'ena iyiook enkomono anaa enaiteng'ena Yohana lkipaareta lenyena.”" 
Luke11:2 Nejoki Yesu, “Ti niomonono entejo: Papa meitisinyi enkarna ino, meeu enkitoria ino." 
Luke11:3 Inchoo iyiook anaa ake endaa nabaiki iyiook. 
Luke11:4 Nipalaki iyiook ing'ok ang, anaa pee kipalaki sii iyiook ilooinyal iyiook. Nimirik iyiook atua ntemat.”" 
Luke11:5 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Kalo linyi oata olchore laa te nelo ainyeyie eitorite enkewarie, ajoki, ‘Olchore, isilenokoki mukateni uni;" 
Luke11:6 amu eewuo olchore lai eing'uaa nkang'itie nemaata entoki naisho.’ 
Luke11:7 Kejoki ilo otii aji, ‘Mikintanyamal, amu eikeno kutuk aji, neirurate nkera, kirurate pooki. Meekure aidim ainyo pee aaisho?’" 
Luke11:8 Ajoki ntae, te nemeisho duoo te nkaraki naa olchore lenye, kake ore te nkaraki naitirrishaka olikae, keinyototo ake aisho naaba anaa naayieu." 
Luke11:9 Najoki naa ntae, entoomonu pee eishori ntae, eng'oru pee itumutumu; entooshiosh kutuk aji pee eboluni ntae." 
Luke11:10 Amu ore pooki oomonu netum; ore oloing'oru netum; ore olooshiosh kutuk aji neboluni. 
Luke11:11 “Kalo te ntae oisho enkerai enye osoit etoomonuo emukate? Aashu te neomonu osinkirri, neisho olasurai?" 
Luke11:12 Aashu te neomonu olmosori, neisho enkulupa?" 
Luke11:13 Asa taa doi iyiololo ntae iltung'ana torrok, aaishoo nkera inyi ntokitin sidain, kebaa na eitulus Papa linyi otii keper aisho Enkiyang'et Sinyati lelo oomon ninye?”" 
Luke11:14 Neera Yesu oloirirua lemeiro. Neaku ore pee epuku ilo oirirua lemeiro, neiro ilo tung'ani apa oonyo kutuk, neing'asia olorere." 
Luke11:15 Kake etejo kulikae lenye, “Beelsebul, olkitok loo loiriruani oishoo engolon naararie loiriruani.”" 
Luke11:16 Netem sii kulikae eing'oru osapiipiyiet oing'uaa keper. 
Luke11:17 Kake ore pee eirrash Yesu ndamunot enye, nejoki, “Ore enkitoria ake ninye pooki naoro aara oopeny neidaaya, ore enkaji naara openy neurori." 
Luke11:18 Kaji eiko enkitoria e Sheitani te neoro aara makewan, keitoki enkitoria enye auno? Amu ijojo naa te ngolon e Beelsebul aaraa loiriruani?" 
Luke11:19 Naa amaa te naa keng'olon e Beelsebul aararie nanu loiriruani, keng'olon e ng'ae doi eararie ninche nkera inyi loiriruani? Ninche naa ooyooki aaiguanare ntae." 
Luke11:20 Kake te naa ai to lkimojino le Nkai aaraa loiriruani, enkitoria e Nkai naewuo atua ntae." 
Luke11:21 Ore te nerrip oltung'ani ogol otanape enkaji enye, neserian imasaa enyena pooki." 
Luke11:22 Kake te nerasaki ologol alang ninye nemir, neoru masaa o larrabal duoo naawuasare, nelo aor iyarunot naatarua." 
Luke11:23 “Ore pooki leme ole nkalo ai, nanu ekesh, ore ole maaret asotu, naa keisardaikie." 
Luke11:24 “Ore te neidur oloirirua oiduruk to ltung'ani nelo aimaa iwuejitin nemetii enkare, eing'oru eneyeng'iyeng'are; ore pee elau, nejo, ‘Kashukokino enkaji ai apa natung'uayie.’" 
Luke11:25 Ore pee ebau, neinepu etooroki neikodi," 
Luke11:26 neito ninye alo aipot kulikae oiriruani oopishana torrok aalang ninye, meetu aamany ine; nerruoyo empukunoto e ilo tung'ani alang enatiu apa te dukuya.”" 
Luke11:27 Ore pee ejo Yesu nejia, nebuaku enkitok nabo tiatua olorora nejoki, “Emayiana sii ake enkoshoke nikitoiwuo o lki likintanaaki.”" 
Luke11:28 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Ee paa emayiana aaisul, ilooning ele rorei le Nkai neibung.”" 
Luke11:29 Ore pee eiturrurrokino esiamo Yesu neiteru ajoki, “Arruok sii ake ltung'ana lena kata, embae eing'oru; kake meetae naa embae enking'asia naishori neme ene Yona." 
Luke11:30 Amu ore anaa enataa Yona embae enking'asia too ltung'ana le Ninawi, nejia sii etiu Enkerai e Tung'ani too ltung'ana le na kata." 
Luke11:31 Keyooki enkaiguanani e kopikop adumunye te nkiguana oo ltung'ana lena ishoi nedung'oki ninche enkiguana, amu eewuo ninye too neeiting'ie enkop elotu ainining eng'eno e Solomon, naa ketii ene olkitok olang Solomon." 
Luke11:32 Keyooki ltung'ana le Ninawi aaitasheiki neitang'or ltung'ana le na ishoi, te nkolong e nkiguana, nedung'oki enkiguana, amu eirridutua ninche etolikio Yona ororei le Nkai, naa ketii taa ene olkitok olang Yona." 
Luke11:33 “Meetae oltung'ani oinok oltaa nepik orunku aashu epising to ltoo, kake kepik eneiperere pee eitawang'aki iloojing'u." 
Luke11:34 Etiu nkonyek inono anaa oltaa lo sesen lino, naa te naa biyot nkonyek inono, newang osesen lino pooki; kake ore pee kira torrok nkonyek nerip enaimin osesen lino pooki." 
Luke11:35 Toduaa naa pee miaku ewang'an niata enaimin. 
Luke11:36 Amu te nebore osesen lino pooki ewang'an, nemeeta enemisimis, newang'u pooki wueji, atiu anaa te nikilang oltaa owang.”" 
Luke11:37 Ore eirorita Yesu, neipot Olfarisayoi obo meshomo anya endaa te nkaji enye, nelo, neton anya endaa." 
Luke11:38 Neing'asia ilo Farisayoi pee edol ajo eitu eng'as aisuj inkaik eitu enya endaa. 
Luke11:39 Kake etiaaka Olaitoriani ilo Farisayoi, “Intukuku ntae Ilfarisayo oriong enkikompe o esaani, kake ore atua ntae nebore enkowuarisho o enkarruoisho." 
Luke11:40 Lo moda! Aime ele obo oitobira oriong o atua? 
Luke11:41 Kake enchoru to lng'ur nena tokitin naatii atua, naa kesinyayu pooki toki te ntae." 
Luke11:42 “Ee kake aiyia intae lo Farisayo! Amu inchoruru ematua e tomon oo ntasimi oo mbenek pooki nipalaa enkiguana oo sipat o enyorrata e Nkai, naa keishiaakino nitaasa nimipalaa nena kulie." 
Luke11:43 Ee kake aiyia ntae Ilfarisayo! Amu inyorrinyorro ilorikan sidain too nkajijik e ntumo, ninyorrinyorro lng'asak too wuejitin neemirishoreki." 
Luke11:44 Ee kake aiyia ntae! Amu itiuu anaa nkuraren nemelioo, naaitunyoo ltung'ana meyiolo.”" 
Luke11:45 Newaliki obo loo laiteng'enak loo nkitanapat ajoki, “Olaiteng'enani, te nijo nji, iyiook sii iyiataa.”" 
Luke11:46 Nejoki, “Ee kake ayia sii ntae ilang'eni loo nkitanapat! Amu intanapinapa ilkulikae ilolan ooiroishi lemenapayu, ore ntae maate nimiseyieyie too lkimojik linyi." 
Luke11:47 Ee kake ayia! Amu ishetishete nkuraren oo iloibonok le Nkai laa loo papaai linyi ootaara metuata. 
Luke11:48 Metaa, itaa shakeni, nitonyorraitie nkiasin oo loo minyi, amu ninche ootaara metuata, nishetakiki ntae nkuraren." 
Luke11:49 “Ore te nkaraki ina, etejo eng'eno e Nkai, ‘Kairriwaki ninche iloibonok o lkipaareta, near kulikae metuata, nearaa kulikae’," 
Luke11:50 paa ore ilo sarge loo loibonok le Nkai, oibukoyioki ebaiki apa pee eitamanyuni enkop, neitalakuni ltung'ana le na ishoi;" 
Luke11:51 ebaiki osarge le Abel o metabaiki osarge le Sakaria, oitanang'aki erishata olperere lo lasar o ewueji sinyati, ee ajoki intae keitalakuni too ltung'ana lena ishoi." 
Luke11:52 “Ee kake aiyia lang'eni loo nkitanapat! Amu iwaita embolet najing'ieki ewueji e ng'eno; neitu ijing'ijing'i ntae maate nirishieshie lelo oojing'ita. 
Luke11:53 “Ore eing'uaa Yesu ine, neiteru lasirak o Lfarisayo aaitirrishaki oleng, nerrumoki meimaki imbaa kumok" 
Luke11:54 erreshu enaitang'orie te nena naajo ninye.” 
Luke12:1 Ore kiti, neiturrurro olorora kitok metaa keitunyoro, neiteru Yesu aiturukie lkipaareta lenyena ajoki, “Entodol ake ate te nkisuisho oo Lfarisayo amu keisunkur." 
Luke12:2 Meetae enaimulumularo nemeibalunyeki, aashu enaisudoro nemeyiolouni." 
Luke12:3 Ore embae pooki nitejo ntae te naimin neyookini aalikioo te wang'an, ore nena nipuopuo aaing'oming'omakino too lgilat loo nkisudorot neyookini aalikioo too nchumarot oo nkajijik." 
Luke12:4 “Ajoki ntae, loshoreta laainei, emiure lelo ooar osesen, nemeitoki aata ai naaidim aataas eidipa ina." 
Luke12:5 Kake aikok intae aliki olonare niurere; entureita ilo laa ore eidipa atara metua, neitoki aata engolon nanang'akinye Yehanum; ee ajoki ntae, ilo entureita!" 
Luke12:6 “Aimme nchilinkini are ake enya imotonyi miet? Nemelang ninye Enkai hoo nabo e nena. 
Luke12:7 Oo naa ntae ilaa keikena ninye lpapit loo lukuny inyi. Emiureisho; iatata pae tipat aalang motonyi kumok. 
Luke12:8 “Najoki nanu ntae, ore pooki laaibalie te dukuya ltung'ana, neibalie sii ninye Enkerai e Tung'ani ninye te dukuya ilmalaika le Nkai." 
Luke12:9 Kake ore ilo laamiki te dukuya ltung'ana nemikini sii ninye te dukuya lmalaika le Nkai. 
Luke12:10 Ore oltung'ani pooki osukeny Enkerai e Tung'ani kepalakini, kake ore olomor Enkiyang'et Sinyati nemepalakini." 
Luke12:11 Naa te neyae ntae nkajijik e ntumo o laitoriak o enkitoo, eming'aing'ai aajo ai jojo aa anaa aiwalulu aajo aa;" 
Luke12:12 amu keutaki ntae Enkiyang'et Sinyati teina saa enijojo.” 
Luke12:13 Nejoki oltung'ani obo otii atua ilo orere Yesu, “Olaiteng'enani, tiaaki olalashe lai maatooriki enjung'ore ang.”" 
Luke12:14 Kake etiaaka, “Lo tung'ani, ai ng'ae laaitaa nanu olarishani anaa olooriki ntae imasaa?”" 
Luke12:15 Neitoki Yesu ajoki ninche, “Entodol ake ate, entodol ate to lng'uarra; amu ore enkishui neme nkumoi oo masaa naata oltung'ani.”" 
Luke12:16 Neitoki aliki enkitanyaanyukoto, nejoki, “Eetae apa olkarsis neisho enkurma enye oleng," 
Luke12:17 nejoki kewan enye, ‘Kaa taa aas, amu maata enapik endaa ai?’" 
Luke12:18 Nejo, ‘Inji aiko, kaar ilkompen laainei nashetu loolala oolang kulo pee ashumie endaa ai o masaa aainei." 
Luke12:19 Naa kajoki oltau lai, lo tau! Iata masaa kumok nikitushumakaki too larin kumok; isikarrayu tadaayu niokisho nishipa.’" 
Luke12:20 Kake nejoki Enkai, ‘Lo modai! Ena kewarie kiyieki oltau lino; paa amaa nena tokitin ninteng'ela keaku pasa nkuneng'ae ninche?’" 
Luke12:21 Nejia etiu oloshumaki kewan imasaa neme karsis tialo Enkai.” 
Luke12:22 Nejoki Yesu lkipaareta lenyena, “Ajoki naa ntae, emintanyamaluo te nkaraki enkishon inyi, te ntoki ninyanya, o too seseni linyi te ntoki ninchopishopo." 
Luke12:23 Amu kitok enkishui alang endaa, naa kitok osesen alang inkilani." 
Luke12:24 Ing'ura lkurruki; meunisho, nemesotisho, nemeeta sitooni anaa ilkompen, neitoti ake Enkai sii ninche. Kebaa naa elang tipat inyi ntae enoo motonyi!" 
Luke12:25 Naa kalo obo linyi oidim atoponiki kewan entemata nabo e nkaina te nkishui enye? 
Luke12:26 Amaa naa te nimindimidimi aataas enkiti bae anaa ina, oo pee intanyamaluoluo too nkulie pooki?" 
Luke12:27 Ng'ura ntapuka, eneiko te nebulu, nemeekenya nemepiyaisho; kake ajoki ntae, ore ninye Solomon te sikar enye pooki nemeikodo anaa enatiu nabo e kuna." 
Luke12:28 Kake pasa taa eishop Enkai aiko nji olkujita obulu taata ti ong'ata ore taaisere nenang'akini enkima, kebaa eitulus aishop intae, lo tung'ana kulo ooti enkirukoto!" 
Luke12:29 Naa eming'oruru entoki ninyanya anaa eniokioko, naa emisinanuo." 
Luke12:30 Amu kuna tokitin eing'oru loreren pooki le nkop; neyiolo Papa linyi ajo nkolati inyi nena. 
Luke12:31 Ore enaikash, naa eng'oru enkitoria enye, naa keaku sii nkuninyi nena kulie." 
Luke12:32 “Emiureisho, lo turrur oti, amu Papa linyi otonyorra aisho ntae enkitoria enye." 
Luke12:33 Entimir imasaa inyi, enchoo laisinak; eng'uraki ate lbenia lememusanu, ooata olchumati te keper lememuta, ine nemenyikaki olapurroni nemeinosie oriri." 
Luke12:34 Amu ore ine netii olchumati lino naa ine etii oltau lino. 
Luke12:35 “Enterreten impolosi inyi, naa enchoo etoni eyupuyup ltaai linyi" 
Luke12:36 nitiuu anaa iltung'ana ooanyita olkitok lenye elotu eing'uaa osirua le nkiyama, pee te nebau neipotisho nesioki aabolu nabo kata." 
Luke12:37 Emayiana ake lelo aisiaayiak laa te nebau olkitok lenye neinepu erripisho. Esipa ajoki ntae, kerretena ninye openy neisho ninche metotona te misa, nelotu aitoti ninche." 
Luke12:38 Naa te neewuo te rripore e are, aashu tene uni, neinepu etiu nejia nemayian ake lelo aisiaayiak!" 
Luke12:39 Kake entayiolo nchere, tenaa keyiolo olopeny enkaji esaa nalotunye olapurroni, anaata etorripishe naa anaata eitu eisho metigili enkaji enye." 
Luke12:40 Entashololoto sii ntae; amu kelotu Enkerai e Tung'ani te saa niminteikiki.” 
Luke12:41 Nejoki Petero, “Olaitoriani, aiyiook ake iliki ena kitanyaanyukoto ena ei pooki ng'ae?”" 
Luke12:42 Nejoki Olaitoriani, “Kalo pasa abarani? Ilo supat naa ng'en otung'eikia olopeny enkaji, meitotio lootii too rishat enye." 
Luke12:43 “Emayiana ake sii ilo aisiaayiani oinepu olkitok lenye easita ina naitanapa. 
Luke12:44 Esipa ajoki ntae, keisho meitoria masaa enyena pooki." 
Luke12:45 Kake oo te nejo ilo aisiaayiani openy, ‘Eimutie olkitok lai,’ neiteru aidong nkaisiaayiak, nedaa ninye neokisho amera." 
Luke12:46 Neyooki alotu olkitok le ilo aisiaayiani to lkekun, lemeiteikini o te saa nemeyioloi, neitame neitaboitaki ilemening'isho." 
Luke12:47 Ore ilo aisiaayiani apa oyiolo enayieu olkitok lenye, neitu eas aitabaya aashu ina nanyor, neidong'i oleng." 
Luke12:48 Kake ore ilo lemeyiolo, netaasa enaishiaakino enkidong'oto, eari penyo. Ore pooki oishooki nkumok, neyieki ninye nkumok; ore ilo laa ninye eitanap iltung'ana nkumok neyieki ninye nkumok oleng." 
Luke12:49 “Aewuo aisuroki enkop enkima; naa oi sii ake duoo te naa keidipa atudupai! 
Luke12:50 Kake kaata enkibatisa naaibatisae; nebaa enaaitirrishita o meitabari kenya! 
Luke12:51 Aijojo pasa kaewuo ayaki enkop osotua? A'a, ajoki eoro ayaki;" 
Luke12:52 amu ore ebaiki taata eoro enkaji nara miet; nepong'ore uni are, nepong'ore are uni;" 
Luke12:53 nepong'o enkerai o menye, nepong'o entito o ng'otonye, nepong'ore enkaputani enkitok o layioni lenye, nepong'ore esiankiki enkaputani.”" 
Luke12:54 Nejoki sii Yesu olorere, “Te nidolulu oshi enkatampoi eilepu te nkalo e ndoyioroto, nijojo nabo kata, ‘Kelotu asha’; netiu nejia." 
Luke12:55 Ore pee idolidolo osiwuo oing'uaa moikuape nijojo, ‘Kelotu airowuaju’; netiu nejia." 
Luke12:56 Lo sunkuro kulo! Iyiololo intae aatolimu ilbulabul le nkop o loing'ang'e; kake kaji inkoko pee miyiololo aaing'ura nilimumu enatiu ena kata? 
Luke12:57 “Naa kaji etiu pee mirishushu oopeny enasipa? 
Luke12:58 Ore eton iriamariri te nkoitoi o ilo likintang'or to larishani, tetema toning'ore ninye eton ipuopuo, pee mikiyeataki enetii olaiguanani, nikintarasaki olaiguanani osikari, nikipik osikari jila." 
Luke12:59 Aajoki, mipuku aikata teine mme italaa empisai nabayie.”" 
Luke13:1 Netii apa kulikae ootii ine ina kata ootolikitio Yesu eneikuna Pilato Ilgalilaya ootara metuata neitushulaki osarge loo lasarri lenye. 
Luke13:2 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Ijojo pasa ai lelo Galilaya ooata ing'ok aalang ilkulikae Galilaya pooki, eji amu nejia eikunaki enkitamioto?" 
Luke13:3 Ajoki ntae, mme nejia; kake te neitu iridudu sii ntae nindaayaya aaiko nejia.”" 
Luke13:4 Aashu doi lapa oora tomon o isiet ootuurokine enkaji naado te Siloam near metuata, ijojo pasa ninche larruok aalang ilkulikae pooki oomanya apa Yerusalem?" 
Luke13:5 Ajoki ntae mme nejia; kake te neitu irridudu sii ntae nindaayaya aaiko nejia. 
Luke13:6 Neinosaki Yesu ninche ena kitanyaanyukoto: “Eeta apa oltung'ani olng'aboli ouno te nkurma enye oo lng'anayio nelotu aing'orunye lng'anayio neitu etumie. 
Luke13:7 Nejoki oloramat ilng'anayio, ‘Eji larin okuni taata alotu ake aing'orunye ele ng'aboli lng'anayio, nematumie, tudung'o tuuroi; oo pee etumuta empiron e nkop?’" 
Luke13:8 Newaliki ajoki, ‘Tapala, lo kitok, tele ari sii taata, matuturoki napik entulugumi." 
Luke13:9 Ore pee etoiwuo lng'anayio tele ari olotu naa sidai; kake te neitu, nidung auroo.’ ”" 
Luke13:10 Neaku eiteng'enisho apa ninye Yesu te nkaji e ntumo te nkolong e Sabato. 
Luke13:11 Netii enkitok naata oloirirua le lepori too larin tomon o isiet; neaku keirrugori meidim ataraposhunye. 
Luke13:12 Ore pee edol Yesu ninye, neipot, nejoki, “Na kitok, kitooruoki emuoyian ino.”" 
Luke13:13 Neiteleiki nkaik enyena, neraposhunye teina kata. Neisis Enkai." 
Luke13:14 Kake etagore olkitok le nkaji e ntumo te nkaraki naishiunye Yesu olorere te nkolong e Sabato nejoki olorere, “Eetai nkolong'i ile naaishiaakino neasieki esiaai; wootu te nena olong'i meishiunyeki ntae, neme te nkolong e Sabato.”" 
Luke13:15 Newaliki taa Olaitoriani nejoki, “Lo sunkuro! Keetae obo linyi lemelaku olkiteng anaa osikiria lenye to lale te nkolong e Sabato, nerik aitook enkare?" 
Luke13:16 Paa aimeishiaakino ninye ena kitok, entito e Abraham nateena Sheitani larin tomon o isiet, aimeishiaakino netalakuaki te nkolong e Sabato?”" 
Luke13:17 Ore pee ejo nejia, nekurru lelo pooki ooing'orunore; neshipa olorere pooki too mbaa pooki e nkisisa naataasa ninye." 
Luke13:18 Neitoki taa Yesu aikilikuan ajoki, “Kaji eikununo enkitoria e Nkai? Naa kainyoo pasa eitanyaanyukieki?" 
Luke13:19 Etiu anaa enkantererai e karadali natuuno oltung'ani te nkurma enye; nebulu aaku olchani, nemany imotonyi ilng'osil lenyena aapik inkajijik enye.”" 
Luke13:20 Neitoki ake Yesu aikilikuan ajoki, “Kainyoo pasa aitanyaanyukie enkitoria e Nkai?" 
Luke13:21 Etiu anaa enkasuishoi natudumua enkitok neitushulaki mboreitin uni e nkano, o metaba anaa neisuishoyu pooki.”" 
Luke13:22 Neimaa Yesu nkang'itie sapuki oo nkutiti neiteng'enisho eloito enkalo e Yerusalem. 
Luke13:23 Nejoki oltung'ani obo, “Olaitoriani, ai kuti pasa lelo oojeu?” Newaliki ninche ajoki," 
Luke13:24 “Entonyok eimu kutuk aji napirik; amu ajoki ntae, eyooki lkumok aaing'oru pee eimu nelaikino." 
Luke13:25 Ore ake pee eaku einyo olopeny enkaji aiken kutuk aji, ninteruru aaitashoo te boo ioshiosho kutuk aji ijojo, ‘Olaitoriani, tabolu iyiook.’ Newaliki ninye ntae ajoki, ‘Mayiolo nanu ajo kaji ing'uaa.’" 
Luke13:26 Nintokiki taa aajo, ‘Kitadaate nikitookishote o iyie, ninteng'enishe too nkoitoi ang naalala oo nkanas.’" 
Luke13:27 Kake kejoki ninye ntae, ‘Ajoki ntae, mayiolo nanu ajo kaji ing'uaa; entalamaki nanu, intae pooki oora laasak loo ntorrok?’" 
Luke13:28 Ore teine ninchirishiri nionyionyo lala, idolidolo Abraham o Isaak o Yakobo o loibonok le Nkai pooki etii enkitoria e Nkai nimanikiki ate etanang'ayioki ntae auluo." 
Luke13:29 Naa kepuonu ltung'ana ooing'uaa enkilepunoto o endoyioroto, o looing'uaa kopikop o moikuape aatoni te misa tiatua enkitoria e Nkai." 
Luke13:30 Naa ketii ile siadi ooaku ile dukuya, netii ile dukuya ooaku ile siadi.”" 
Luke13:31 Ore teina saa ake nepuonu embata oo Ilfarisayo, nejoki Yesu, “Inyo shomo te ne amu keyieu Herode nikiaar tua.”" 
Luke13:32 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Enchom entiaaki ilo barie, ‘Kaaraa nanu loiriruani naishiunye iltamuoyia taata o taaisere o te nkolong e uni; naidip inkolati aainei." 
Luke13:33 Kake ore etiu nejia enkoitoi ai ake asuj taata o taaisere o idia olong; amu meidimayu metaa kenang oloiboni le Nkai dikae neme Yerusalem.’ 
Luke13:34 Oi Yerusalem, Yerusalem naar iloibonok le Nkai ninang too soito lelo likirriwakini. Aikat aja pasa ajo aiturrur inkera inono te nebo anaa elukungu naiturrur inkuoo enyena ti abori inaipuko enyena nimiyieu." 
Luke13:35 Eitaa Enkai enkaji ino mijooni. Naajoki meekure kintoki aekata adol o tejo, ‘Emayiana ilo olotu te nkarna o Laitoriani!’ ”" 
Luke14:1 Ore apa te Sabato nabo nelo Yesu anya endaa te nkaji o Lfarisayoi obo kitok, te nkolong e nkiyeng'iyeng'ata, neing'or ninche aajur." 
Luke14:2 Naa ketii ine oltung'ani dukuya ninye otejia osesen. 
Luke14:3 Neirorie Yesu lang'eni loo nkitanapat o Lfarisayo ajoki, “Keishoruno pasa too nkitanapat meishiunyeki oltung'ani te nkolong e Sabato anaa ai meishoruno?”" 
Luke14:4 Kake etigirate ninche. Neibung ilo tung'ani neishiunye, neisho meshomo." 
Luke14:5 Nejoki ninche, “Ai ng'ae te ntae laa te neeta enkurrarru anaa olkiteng otusulakine olkesumet lemesaru nabo kata aitayu, oi aa te nkolong e Sabato.”" 
Luke14:6 Nelaikino aatawaliki ina. 
Luke14:7 Neitoki Yesu aliki enkitanyaanyukoto lelo ooitoomoni, etoduaa eneiko tenegelaki ate iwuejitin oo lorikan aailepie ate. Nejoki ninche," 
Luke14:8 “Te nikimpotokini osirua le nkiyama, mitonie ake ewueji enkanyit, melotu ake likae oipoto kitok likilang;" 
Luke14:9 nelotu ilo oipoto ntae, pokira oaare, nikijoki, ‘Nchoo sii iyie ele tung'ani enetonie,’ nintoki iyie adou te nkurruna alo ewueji e abori." 
Luke14:10 Kake ore iyie pee kimpoti, totona te wueji nebayie tukul, paa te nelotu ilo oitoomonisho nikijoki, ‘Olchore, ilepa sii iyie;’ nikiyanyitu iltung'ana pooki liboitare te misa." 
Luke14:11 Amu ore pooki oilepie kewan neitadouni, ore oloitadou kewan neilepieki.”" 
Luke14:12 Nejoki sii ninye ilo oitoomonisho, “Te nincho ltung'ana endaa aashu ntobiraki osirua, mimpot lchoreta linono o lalashera linono o lelo lo lmarei lino aashu lkarsisi le latia ino, pee mikiyiooki sii ninche aaitoomon, nikilaaki enda apa nintaasa." 
Luke14:13 Kake ore ti nintobir iyie osirua, mpoto laisinak, o ltarrushi o lng'ojiniaa o lmodook," 
Luke14:14 naa eikimayiani amu mikindim ninche aatalaaki iyie. Aikilaakini kenya ake te mpiunoto e lelo supati.” 
Luke14:15 Ore pee ening ina obo le lelo ootoni te misa tenebo o Yesu, nejoki, “Emayiana ilo oyooki adaa te nkitoria e Nkai.”" 
Luke14:16 Kake etiaaka ninye ilo, “Etii apa oltung'ani oitobira osirua kitok, neipot iltung'ana kumok," 
Luke14:17 ore pee ebau enkata e ilo sirua neirriwaa olaisiaayiani lenye metiaaki lelo ooipotoki, ‘Wootu; amu keirrag pooki toki!’" 
Luke14:18 Kake eiterutua pooki aaitaakuuk. Nejo ole dukuya, ‘Ainyang'ua enkurma, naa kalo ake adol; aatasayia tung'ueikiaki nanu.’" 
Luke14:19 Nejo likae, ‘Ainyang'ua nanu lmong'i tomon naa kalo pee alo asipu; aatasayia tung'ueikiaki nanu.’" 
Luke14:20 Nejo likae, ‘Enayamie enkitok, nemaidim naa aeu.’" 
Luke14:21 Kaae, nelotu olaisiaayiani aliki olkitok lenye nena. Negoro olopeny enkaji nejoki olaisiaayiani lenye, ‘Tasiooi shomo nkoitoi oo nkaulele e ina anasa, toriku laisinak o ltarrushi o lmodook o lng'ojiniaa.’" 
Luke14:22 Nejoki ilo aisiaayiani, ‘Lo kitok, eidipaki aataas ina nitejo, neton ake meiputa enkaji.’" 
Luke14:23 Nejoki olkitok ilo aisiaayiani lenye, ‘Shomo nkoitoi sapuki o nkutiti, o lkirinen taaru ltung'ana meetu, o meiputayu enkaji ai." 
Luke14:24 Amu ajoki ntae, meishiamisham hoo obo le lelo apa ooipotokoki endaa ai.’ ”" 
Luke14:25 Ore eiriamariyie olorora kitok Yesu, neibelekenyakino nejoki," 
Luke14:26 “Ore pooki ng'ae olotu enatii lemeibayu menye o ng'otonye, o enkitok enye o nkera, o lalashera o nkanashera, oo ebaiki enkorrok enye, nemeidim ataa oloiteng'eni lai." 
Luke14:27 Ore pooki lemenap osalaba lenye naairukurukore, nemeidim ataa oloiteng'eni lai." 
Luke14:28 Amu kalo pasa linyi, laa te neyieu neshetu oltalet, lemeng'as aton aikenisho pee eyiolou te naa keidip intokitin naata?" 
Luke14:29 Pee meaku ake, ore eidipa aitamanyu nelaikino aidipa, nesukeny pooki ng'ae odol," 
Luke14:30 nejo, ‘Eiterua ele tung'ani ashetisho, neitu eidip.’" 
Luke14:31 Anaa kalo aiguanani oyieu nerasaki likae aiguanani to larrabal, eitu eng'as aiguana te naa keirish ilenyena iip tomon, iip tikitam le lido oarare?" 
Luke14:32 Naa te nemeirish, ore eton eitu enyiku olikae, neirriwaki lkiliku aikilikuanu mbaa naaitayu osotua." 
Luke14:33 Nejia naa etiu, ore ake olinyi lemeibayu pooki toki naata nemeidim ataa oloiteng'eni lai." 
Luke14:34 “Ai sidai emunyan; kake amaa te netuyiatuyu emunyan kerrinyokinoyu enkisukut enye? 
Luke14:35 Meitoki aata tipat te nkurma nemeeta to lchala; keiturrarri ake. Oloata nkiyiaa naaning'ie inchoo ening.” 
Luke15:1 Ore lasotok le kodi o laasak loo ng'ok neaku kepuonu aanyikaki Yesu aainining. 
Luke15:2 Neing'unyung'uny Ilfarisayo o lasirak aajo, “Keitoomon ele tung'ani ilaasak loo ng'ok neng'arie endaa.”" 
Luke15:3 Ore te nkaraki ina, neliki Yesu ninche ena kitanyaanyukoto:" 
Luke15:4 “Kalo te ntae laa te neeta intare iip pee eimin nabo, lemeing'uaa kunda ntomoni naaudo o naaudo ti ong'ata, alo aing'oru ina nabo naimina, o menoto ade?" 
Luke15:5 Ore pee etum, neiteleiki oloililai te nchipai." 
Luke15:6 Ore pee ebau ang, neiturrurru ilchoreta lenyena o elatia enye ajoki ninche, ‘Matishipata, amu anoto enaduoo kerai naimina.’" 
Luke15:7 Ajoki ntae, nejia etiu, ai kitok oleng enchipai natumi te keper to laasani loo ng'ok obo oirridu alang iltung'ana ntomoni naaudo o naaudo supati lemeetayie ninche tipat enkirridunoto." 
Luke15:8 “Anaa kaa kitok ina, naa te neeta mpisai tomon e nkosholai, pee eimin nabo, nemeinok oltaa neor enkaji neing'oru ade o menoto?" 
Luke15:9 Ore pee etum, neiturrurru nchorueta enyena o elatia ajoki, ‘Matishipata amu anoto enkosholai ai naimina.’" 
Luke15:10 Ajoki ntae, nejia etiu, keshipa sii lmalaika le Nkai to laasani loo ng'ok obo oirridu.”" 
Luke15:11 Nejo Yesu, “Etii apa oltung'ani oata layiok aare;" 
Luke15:12 nejoki oloti menye, ‘Papa, nchooki nanu masaa naaku inaainei.’ Neoriki pokira masaa enyena." 
Luke15:13 Ore pee elusoo nkuti olong'i, neiturrurru ilo oti masaa pooki naata nemir newalunye mpisai nelo enkop nalakua, nelo aishang'itie masaa enyena teine te nkiwushuush." 
Luke15:14 Ore pee eidip atumuta pooki toki, nelotu olameyu sapuk teina kop, neiteru atir esumash." 
Luke15:15 Ore te nkaraki ina nelo aibung'are olkarsis obo le ina kop, neirriwaa ilo shoo meshomo airrita lbitiro." 
Luke15:16 Neaku nena kinyat naanya lbitiro eng'uar pee enya; nemeetae oloisho toki. 
Luke15:17 Kake ore pee eirrash kewan nejo, ‘Kaja pasa laisiaayiak le papa ooata endaa nanya neleku, kake eji nanu ele oya olameyu te ne!" 
Luke15:18 Kainyototo alo enetii papa, najoki: Papa, ataasa eng'oki te Nkai o te dukuya iyie," 
Luke15:19 meekure eishiaakino naaji kara enkerai ino; ntaaki anaa abo le kulo aisiaayiak linono.’ 
Luke15:20 Neinyototo nelotu enetii menye. Kake ore eton elakua, nedolu menye neing'urrie, nekuetiki aibung ang'utut." 
Luke15:21 Nejoki olayioni menye, ‘Papa, ataasa eng'oki te Nkai o te dukuya iyie; meishiaakino naaji kara enkerai ino.’" 
Luke15:22 Kake etiaaka menye laisiaayiak lenyena, ‘Entasieku olkila oisul, enchopoki; naa entipik olgisoi olkimojino lenye, ninchopokiki namuka nkejek enyena;" 
Luke15:23 entereu olkiteng opir enteyieng, ematishipata emating'idata;" 
Luke15:24 amu ore ena kerai ai ketua apa, nenyaaka apiu.’ Neimina apa, nenyaakaki aatum." 
Luke15:25 “Netiooyo ina kata olayioni lenye botor te nkurma; ore pee elotu anyikaki ina aji, nening'oo osinkolio eranyishoi." 
Luke15:26 Neipot olaisiaayiani obo aikilikuan enaasitae. 
Luke15:27 Nejoki, ‘Eewuo olalashe lino, neyiang'aki papaai lino olashe opir, amu enoto menye eserian.’" 
Luke15:28 Kake negoro neany ejing'u. Nepuku menye ailejilej. 
Luke15:29 Kake etawalikia ninye menye ajoki, ‘She, aaisiaayia nanu iyie kulo arin kumok, neitu ai kata aany aas enikijoki, neitu ai kata kincho nanu olkuoo ninye, pee atum atishipayu tenebo o lchoreta laainei." 
Luke15:30 Kake ore pee elotu ele ayioni lino, otumutaka masaa inono malayoni, niyieng'aki olkiteng opir.’" 
Luke15:31 Nejoki, ‘Enkerai ai, itii oshi ake iyie ene natii naa enino entoki pooki naata." 
Luke15:32 Keishiaakino pae duoo niking'ida, nikishipa amu ketua apa ele alashe lino, neishu taata, eimina apa nenotoki.’ ”" 
Luke16:1 Neitoki Yesu ajoki lkipaareta lenyena, “Etii apa oltung'ani karsis oata olaing'urani le nkaji, neitang'ori ilo shekut aajo keishang'itie intokitin olkitok lenye." 
Luke16:2 Neipotu ninye nejoki, ‘Kaa bae ena natoning'o nikimpirta iyie? Inkenakaki intokitin pooki aainei ning'orita.’" 
Luke16:3 Nejo olchekut makewan, ‘Kaji aiko, netaa kaaoru olkitok lai enking'urata e siaai? Nemaata engolon naturishore, nemaaisho isura aomonisho." 
Luke16:4 Atayiolo enaas, pee aang'amu ltung'ana too nkajijik enye te naaoruni enking'urata e siaai.’" 
Luke16:5 Kaae, neipot lelo pooki ootayie olkitok lenye silen maa obo, nejoki oloiturukuo, ‘Kebaa esile niata o lkitok lai?’" 
Luke16:6 Nejo, ‘Iltuleta iip le ilata.’ Nejoki ninye ilo, ‘Tudumu empalai ino e sile, totona tasioki ngero onom.’" 
Luke16:7 Neitoki ajoki likae, ‘Kebaa esile niata iyie?’ Nejo, ‘Ilbenia iip le nkano.’ Nejoki ninye ilo, ‘Tudumu empalai ino e sile ngero ntomoni isiet.’" 
Luke16:8 Neisis olkitok ilo aing'urani aimonkoni amu kalamas; amu ng'eni nkera e na kop too mbaa enye aalang nkera e wang'an. 
Luke16:9 “Najoki intae entaiki ate lchoreta te kuna masaa enkop nemesinya, paa ore pee emuta neng'amari intae te nenen neebikieki ntarasi." 
Luke16:10 “Ore ilo oisiligayu too nkuti neisiligayu sii too nkumok ore olemeisiligayu too nkuti nemeisiligayu too nkumok. 
Luke16:11 Amaa naa te nimisiligayuyu too masaa nemesinya, aing'ae pasa likintoki aisiligie imasaa naadede?" 
Luke16:12 Naa amaa te neitu iaku oloisiligayu too neeiking'a, ai ng'ae likincho nena naara ninono?" 
Luke16:13 Meetae osinka oidim aisiaayia lkituaak aare; keibayu ake obo nenyorru olikae, aashu eibung'are obo nemenaa olikae. Mindimidimi sii intae aaisiaayia Enkai o masaa.”" 
Luke16:14 Ore pee ening Ilfarisayo, iloonyor naa masaa neikordod Yesu." 
Luke16:15 Kake etiaaka Yesu, “Ntae lelo ooitaakuno irara asipak too ltung'ana, kake keyiolo Enkai ltauja linyi; amu ore ina nailepie ltung'ana naa olminong too nkonyek e Nkai." 
Luke16:16 “Keetae apa nkitanapat e Musa o noo loibonok o metabaiki Yohana; ore ebaiki ina kata nelikiori lomon supati le nkitoria e Nkai, nediding'akino pooki ng'ae te ngolon." 
Luke16:17 Kake kelelek pee eish keper o enkop alang te nelau tipat o ltipoto obo loo nkitanapat e Nkai. 
Luke16:18 “Ore oltung'ani ake pooki oituraa enkitok enye neyam ai keloloito. Ore oloyam enkitok natung'uayie olmoruo lenye naa keloloito.” 
Luke16:19 Nejo Yesu, “Etii apa oltung'ani karsis, oishop olkila onyokie o loibor, nenya olkar nkolong'i pooki." 
Luke16:20 Neirrag te kutuk aji e nkaji enye oltung'ani aisinani oomonisho oji Lasaro, oata nkirondoni" 
Luke16:21 oyieu neitaraposh kewan too mbelat naasulunye te misa o lkarsis; neaku kepuonu ldiein aamej nkirondoni enyena. 
Luke16:22 Neye ilo aisinani nenap ilmalaika aaya olgoo le Abraham. Neye sii ninye olkarsis nenukari. 
Luke16:23 Ore etii Yehanam, eitamei, neraposhu nkonyek, nedol Abraham elakua netii Lasaro olgoo lenye." 
Luke16:24 Neipotisho ajo, ‘Papa Abraham, ing'urrieki, irriu Lasaro meitadoiki olkimojino lenye enkare naaitong'aki olng'ejep lai; amu aainosita ena kima.’" 
Luke16:25 Kake etiaaka Abraham, ‘Nakerai, tadamu nchere inoto olkar loo mbaa pooki inchu te nkop, ore Lasaro nenoto sii ninye osina, kake ore taata neitishipi etii ene, nitii iyie osina." 
Luke16:26 Naa ore etii kuna pooki, etipikaki eng'erem narish iyiook o intae, pee melang'u ole naalo ine nemelang'u oleine alotu ene nikitii.’" 
Luke16:27 Nejoki olkarsis, ‘Aatasayia naa, papa, irriwai ninye metaa olkilikuai te nkang e papa," 
Luke16:28 amu imiet ilalashera laata, metoliki pee mepuonu sii ninche ene wueji o somit.’" 
Luke16:29 Kake etiaaka Abraham, ‘Keeta Musa o loibonok le Nkai, inchoo ninche ening lelo.’" 
Luke16:30 Nejoki, ‘A'a papa Abraham mme nejia; te netum olkilikuai loolooinguaa ilootuata, neirridu.’" 
Luke16:31 Nejoki ninye, ‘Te nemening Musa o loibonok le Nkai, nemening sii ninye oloing'uaa lootuata.’ ”" 
Luke17:1 Nejoki Yesu lkipaareta lenyena, “Meeta nchere pee mepuonu ntemat e nkarruoisho; kake ee kake aiyia ilo laa ninye eimu!" 
Luke17:2 Enaikash te neenikini ninye osoit oiutuutishoreki emurt nenang'akini atua enaiposha, alang te neitapong'oo nabo e kuna kutiti." 
Luke17:3 Entodol ate; te neitarruoo olalashe lino, irorie, ore pee eirridua, tapalaki;" 
Luke17:4 naa te nikinyala nabo, olong kat naapishana, nikingil kat naapishana ajoki, ‘airridua’, nipalaki ake.”" 
Luke17:5 Nejoki lkipaareta, “Olaitoriani, toponiki iyiook enkirukoto!”" 
Luke17:6 Nejoki Olaitoriani, “Tenaa iatata naaji enkirukoto naba anaa enkantererai e karadali, indimidimi aatiaaki ele ng'aboli, ‘Tadotunye, tuunokinoyu enaiposha’ nening intae." 
Luke17:7 “Keetae obo linyi oata osinka oturisho aashu oloirritisho, ojoki te nelotu eing'uaa enkurma, ‘Wou nabo kata totona tadaayu?’" 
Luke17:8 Anaa keng'as ake ajoki, ‘Tang'asa taa ntobirakaki endaa, nirretena nikiyaki, ore aidipa atadaayu naokisho; nilo sii iyie adaa niokisho?’" 
Luke17:9 Ijojo pasa keisho ilo sinka enashe te nkaraki nataasa enaitanapaki? 
Luke17:10 Nejia itiuu sii intae, ore pee ndipidipi aataas inaaitanapaki intae pooki, entejo, ‘Mikira sinkan le tipat; kitaasa ake iyiook enaishiaakino nikiaas.’ ”" 
Luke17:11 Neaku ore te nkoitoi eloito Yesu Yerusalem neim erishata e Samaria o Galilaya. 
Luke17:12 Ore ejing'ita enkang nabo, nenang'are ltung'ana tomon ooata enkeeya oo lbolot neitashe ninche te nelakua." 
Luke17:13 Nebuaku aajo, “Olaitoriani, Yesu, ing'urrie iyiook.”" 
Luke17:14 Ore pee edol Yesu ninche nejoki, “Enchom entoduaai ate too lapolosak.” Ore epuoito neishiu nesika." 
Luke17:15 Ore pee edol obo lenye ajo eishiunyeki, neshukunye eisisita Enkai to ltoilo sapuk;" 
Luke17:16 neirrabalakino enkop too nkejek e Yesu, ajoki ashe. Naa Osamariyiai ninye." 
Luke17:17 Neikilikuan Yesu, “Aimme ilewa tomon duoo ilaishiunye metisikata? Koree lkulikae pokira ooudo?" 
Luke17:18 Kaji etiu pee eitu etumi obo oshukunye aisho Enkai enashe meteleku ele leeiking'a?” 
Luke17:19 Nejoki ninye ilo, “Inyo shomo; kintajewuo enkirukoto ino.”" 
Luke17:20 Ore pee eikilikuan Ilfarisayo Yesu enkata nalotu enkitoria e Nkai, newaliki ajoki ninche, “Melotu enkitoria e Nkai too lmonek oolioo;" 
Luke17:21 nemeyookini aajo, ‘She, nena natii ene!’ Aashu ‘Neidia!’ Amu etii enkitoria e Nkai atua intae.”" 
Luke17:22 Nejoki Yesu lkipaareta lenyena, “Kepuonu inkolong'i naa ing'uarring'uarra pee idolidolo enkolong nabo e Nkerai e Tung'ani, nimidolidolo." 
Luke17:23 Naa kejokini intae, ‘Ng'ura ende!’ Aashu, ‘Ng'ura ene!’ Emipuo ake emirubare." 
Luke17:24 Amu ore anaa enatiu enkiwuang'ata naimerlelu neitawang embata nabo e shumata o metabaiki enkae, nejia etiu Enkerai e Tung'ani teina olong enye." 
Luke17:25 Kake ore eitu ebau ine eng'asi ake aainyal too nkumok neany iltung'ana lena kata. 
Luke17:26 Ore anaa enatiu apa too nkolong'i e Noa, nejia etiu too nkolong'i e Nkerai e Tung'ani." 
Luke17:27 Kedaae apa, neokishoi, neyamishoe, neishoori meyami, o meeu ina olong natijing'a Noa atua emeli, nelotu oloirrag le nkare nemut ninche pooki." 
Luke17:28 Nejia sii apa etiu too nkolong'i e Lot aa, kedaae apa, neokishoi, neinyiang'ishoe, nemirishoe, neunishoi, neshetishoe," 
Luke17:29 kake ore ake ina olong natupukuo Lot aing'uaa Sodom neshau enkima oo soito le nkima eing'uaa shumata neidaikie ninche pooki. 
Luke17:30 Nejia sii etiu ina olong naibalunyeki Enkerai e Tung'ani.” 
Luke17:31 Ore teina olong, inchoo ilo otii shumata enkaji, oata ntokitin tiatua, milotu ake ajo aya; ore sii ilo otii enkurma mirrinyo ake." 
Luke17:32 Entadamu enkitok e Lot. 
Luke17:33 Ore pooki ng'ae ojo agolie enkishui enye neiminie, kake ore pooki oiturraa enkishui enye neitopoki." 
Luke17:34 Ajoki intae, “Ore teina kewarie keirrag ltung'ana aare erruat nabo; neyai obo, neing'uari olikae." 
Luke17:35 Neiutuutisho nkituaak are te nebo to soit obo; neyai nabo neing'uari enkae. 
Luke17:36 Netii ltung'ana aare enkurma; neyae obo neing'uari olikae.” 
Luke17:37 Nejoki ilkipaareta lenyena ninye, “Olaitoriani, ae ti aji?” Nejoki, “Enetii empopok, eiturrurrokino lmotonyi.”" 
Luke18:1 Neliki Yesu lkipaareta lenyenaenkitanyaanyukoto, aitodol inchere keishiaakino ake neomon anaake nemenauru." 
Luke18:2 Nejoki, “Eetae apa te nkanasa nabo olaiguanani lemeure Enkai nemeshilaa tung'ani;" 
Luke18:3 neetae enkoliai teina anasa nalotu anaa ake enetii ajoki, ‘Tomituoki sii ake tele mang'atinta.’" 
Luke18:4 Neng'as aany; ore te siadi nejo openy, ‘Ore hoo nemaure Enkai nemaikenu tung'ani," 
Luke18:5 kake ore amu aateeka ena oliai, kamitu pee maaitoki aisomit te na lotunoto enye.’ ”" 
Luke18:6 Kejo Olaitoriani, “Entoning enajo ilo aiguanani arruoni." 
Luke18:7 Paa aijojo memitu ninye Enkai ilgelunot lenyena, ooishiraki dama o kewarie? Ijojo keimutie tialo ninche?" 
Luke18:8 Ajoki intae kemitu asioki. Kake amaa eyia, keinepu pasa Enkerai e Tung'ani te nelotu, eetai enkirukoto te nkop?”" 
Luke18:9 Etolikio sii Yesu ena kitanyaanyukoto lelo ooisilig ate aajo supati te Nkai nemen ilkulikae; 
Luke18:10 “Eilepa ltung'ana aare aapuo aaomon te nkaji e Nkai, naa Olfarisayoi obo naa olasotoni le kodi olikae." 
Luke18:11 Neitashe Olfarisayoi neomon te nkorrok enye makewan nejo nji, ‘Na Ai, aaisho enashe amu matiu nanu anaa ikulikae tung'ana, matiu anaa ilaikonyak ilaimonkok, iloololoito, nematiu sii anaa ele osotu kodi." 
Luke18:12 Kat are aen kewan aitupukoo te wiki, naishooyo ematua e tomon e pooki toki natum.’" 
Luke18:13 Kake eitasho ninye olasotoni le kodi, te nelakua nemeshumu ninye inkonyek enyena aing'orie shumata kake olgoo eoshiosh, nejo, ‘Na Ai, ing'urrieki nanu olaing'okoni!’" 
Luke18:14 Ajoki intae, etadoyie ele tung'ani alo enkaji enye eishooki esipata alang ilo likae; amu ore pooki ng'ae oilepie kewan neitadouni, ore oloitadou kewan neilepieki.”" 
Luke18:15 Neyakini sii Yesu nkera kutiti pee etum aiseyie, ore pee edol lkipaareta ina neisikong ninche." 
Luke18:16 Kake eipotuo Yesu enetii nejoki, Enchoo nkera epuonu enatii emimitiki; amu enoo naatiu anaa kuna enkitoria e Nkai." 
Luke18:17 Kedede, ajoki intae, ore pooki ng'ae lemeng'amu enkitoria e Nkai anaa enang'amu enkerai nemejing ina kitoria katukul." 
Luke18:18 Neikilikuan oltung'ani obo oitoreisho Yesu ajoki, “Laaiteng'enani supat, kaji aiko pee ajung enkishui oo ntarasi?”" 
Luke18:19 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Kainyoo pee kijo kara supat? Meetae hoo obo supat leme Enkai ake." 
Luke18:20 Iyiolo iyie nkitanapat: ‘Miloloito, miar metua, mipurrisho, minteeniki likae elejare iyanyita minyi o ng'utunyi.’ ”" 
Luke18:21 Nejoki ninye, “Aibung'a kuna pooki ebaiki apa ara oti.”" 
Luke18:22 Ore pee ening Yesu ina, nejoki, “Kitong'orikia entoki nabo. Timira pooki toki niaata tooriki laisinak, naa itum olchumati te keper; nikilotu taa asuj.”" 
Luke18:23 Kake ina ake etoning'o neisinanuo oleng, amu karsis apa naleng." 
Luke18:24 Neing'or Yesu ninye nejo, “Egol taa duoo to ltung'ani oata imasaa pee ejing enkitoria e Nkai!" 
Luke18:25 Amu kelelek te ntames pee eim enaudoto o ltidu alang oltung'ani karsis te nejing enkitoria e Nkai.” 
Luke18:26 Nejo lelo ootoning'o, “Ai ng'ae naa doi eitajeuni?”" 
Luke18:27 Kake etejo, “Ore enemeidimayu too ltung'ana keidimayu te Nkai.”" 
Luke18:28 Nejo Petero, “Ng'ura ajo kitung'uaitie iyiook inkang'itie ang nikisuj iyie.”" 
Luke18:29 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Kedede, ajoki intae, meetae oltung'ani otung'uayie enkaji, aashu enkitok, aashu lalashera, aashu ntoiwuo, aashu nkera, te nkaraki enkitoria e Nkai," 
Luke18:30 lemetum nkatitin kumok taata te na kata, ore teidia kata nalotu netum enkishui oo ntarasi.”" 
Luke18:31 Nerik Yesu lelo tomon o aare enkilepata, nejoki, “Yerusalem kilep aapuo, naa ore mbaa pooki naatisiraki naaipirta Enkerai e Tung'ani too loibonok le Nkai naa keitabari." 
Luke18:32 Keitarasakini ninye Iloreren nesurdaanyi neitaasi enesulare nenotakini; 
Luke18:33 neoshi ninye, neari metua, ore te nkolong e uni nepiu.”" 
Luke18:34 Kake eitu hoo ening'u lkipaareta embae nabo e kuna; keisudoro ena bae te ninche, neaku eitu ening'u enatiaaka Yesu." 
Luke18:35 Ore pee enyikaki Yesu Yeriko, netii oltung'ani modooni otonita te mbata e nkoitoi aomonisho." 
Luke18:36 Ore pee ening olorere egiroo aapuo, neikilikuanisho ajo kainyoo ina." 
Luke18:37 Nejokini, “Yesu le Nasaret oimita ene.”" 
Luke18:38 Nebuaku ajo, “Yesu, olayioni le Daudi, ing'urrieki nanu!”" 
Luke18:39 Ore lelo ootii dukuya ninye nebuaaki metigirayu; kake etabuakua ninye aitulus oleng, “Ara Daudi, ing'urrieki!”" 
Luke18:40 Neitashe Yesu nejo metorikuni enetii; ore pee enyikaki, nejoki," 
Luke18:41 “Kaa iyieu naaitaas?” Nejo, “Olaitoriani, kayieu nadolishoyu.”" 
Luke18:42 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Todolisho; kinchiunye enkirukoto ino.”" 
Luke18:43 Nedolishoyu nabo kata nesuj ninye, eisisita Enkai; ore lelo tung'ana pooki, pee edol ina, neisis Enkai." 
Luke19:1 Ore pee ejing Yesu Yeriko, nepolos alo." 
Luke19:2 Netii oltung'ani oji Sakayo; naa olkitok loo lasotok le kodi, naa karsis." 
Luke19:3 Neing'oru enaiko pee edol Yesu ajo ai ng'ae, nelaikino, te nkaraki olorere, amu eidorrop ninye." 
Luke19:4 Neipirri aituruk neked olng'aboli pee edol Yesu, amu ine wueji, eim ninye." 
Luke19:5 Ore pee ebaiki Yesu ine neraposhu nkonyek nejoki, “Sakayo, tasieku tadou; amu enkaji ino ade taata alo.”" 
Luke19:6 Nesieku taa nedou neng'amu te ng'ida. 
Luke19:7 Ore pee edol iltung'ana neing'unyung'uny pooki aajo, “Eshomo meitoomoni te nkaji o ltung'ani aing'okoni.”" 
Luke19:8 Neinyototo Sakayo nejoki Olaitoriani, “Olaitoriani, kaitorit aor imasaa aainei naisho laisinak naa te neetae hoo oltung'ani latooruo toki enye, te nkoitoi nemeishiaakino, nalaaki katitin ong'uan.”" 
Luke19:9 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Eewuo taata ena olong enjeunoto ena aji, amu ole Abraham sii doi ninye." 
Luke19:10 Amu eewuo Enkerai e Tung'ani aing'oru pee eitajeu ilooimina.” 
Luke19:11 Ore einining'ito ltung'ana nena, neitoki Yesu aliki ninche enkitanyaanyukoto, amu etinyikaka ninye Yerusalem naa kejo ninche etaa keibalunyeki enkitoria e Nkai teina kata." 
Luke19:12 Ore te nkaraki ina, nejoki, “Eshomo olaiguanani obo kitok enkop nalakua meishori enkitoria pee eshukunye." 
Luke19:13 Neipot isinkan lenyena tomon, neisho ake obo empisai e saabu nejoki, ‘Entaasishore o maeu.’" 
Luke19:14 Kake ore te nkaraki naiba ltung'ana le ina kop enye ninye, neitusuj olkilikuai ojo, ‘Mikiyieu neitore iyiook ele tung'ani.’" 
Luke19:15 Ore pee eitu, eidipa atang'amai enkitoria, neipot lelo sinkan lenyena apa ootung'eikia mpisai, meetu, pee eyiolou dupoto nanoto te nkinyang'a." 
Luke19:16 Neituruku ole dukuya, nejo, ‘Olaitoriani, enoto ropiyiani inono tomon kulie katitin tomon.’" 
Luke19:17 Nejoki, ‘Intobira, osinka supat! Ore te nkaraki nitaa oloisiligayu too nkuti oleng, iyiooki aitore nkanas tomon!’" 
Luke19:18 Nelotu ole aare, nejo, ‘Olaitoriani, enoto ropiyiani inono kulie tomon katitin imiet.’" 
Luke19:19 Nejoki ilo, ‘Intore sii iyie nkanas imiet.’" 
Luke19:20 Neitoki alotu likae sinka nejo. ‘Olaitoriani, nena empisai ina e saabu naisudoyie apa te nkarasha;" 
Luke19:21 amu iyie aturia, amu ira oltung'ani ogol pukunoto; odumu ineitu irragie, nidung neme iyie otuno!’" 
Luke19:22 Nejoki ninye, ‘Ekaadung'oki naa enkiguana te nkiroroto ino makewan, lo sinka torrono! Iyiolo apa ajo kara oltung'ani ogol pukunoto, odumu ineitu airragie, nasotu ineitu aun?" 
Luke19:23 Kaji naa etiu pee eitu ishum mpisai aainei te mbenki, pee te na lotu, natum nena aainei o naaiu?’" 
Luke19:24 Nejoki lelo ooitashe teine, ‘Entooru ina pisai e saabu naata ninye enchoo elde oata tomon katitin tomon.’" 
Luke19:25 (Nejoki ninche ninye, ‘Olaitoriani, keeta ninye ropiyiani tomon!’)" 
Luke19:26 Nejo ninye, ‘Ajoki intae, ore pooki ng'ae oata keponikini aaisho; kake ore elde lemeeta, keoruni ninye ina kiti naata." 
Luke19:27 Kake ore ninche kulo mang'ati laainei, apa lemeyieu naitore, eyau entaar metuata tene natii.’ ”" 
Luke19:28 Ore pee eidip Yesu atejo nejia, negiroo alo ailepaki Yerusalem." 
Luke19:29 Neaku ore pee enyikaki Betfage o Betania to Ldoinyo oji oloo Loirienito, neirriwaa lkipaareta lenyena aare," 
Luke19:30 nejoki, “Enchom enda ang naipirare intae, ore pee ijing'ijing'i nidolidolo enkurrarru naena, neitu ae kata eked oltung'ani; entalaku nireuu ene." 
Luke19:31 Naa te neikilikuani intae aajoki, ‘Kainyoo pee ilakuku?’ Entejo nji, ‘Olaitoriani oata enadung'ie.’ ”" 
Luke19:32 Nepuo lelo ooirriwayioki neinepu etiu anaa ina natiaaka Yesu. 
Luke19:33 Ore egira aalaku olkurrarru, nejoki lopeny, “Kaji etiu pee ilakuku olkurrarru?”" 
Luke19:34 Nejoki ninche, “Olaitoriani oata enadung'ie.”" 
Luke19:35 Nerewaki Yesu, ore pee eirotoki enkurrarru nkilani enye, neitaked ninye." 
Luke19:36 Ore eloito etii enchumata osikiria, neisalaash iltung'ana nkilani enye te nkoitoi." 
Luke19:37 Ore pee enyiku, to loshong'ishong'i lo Ldoinyo loo Loirienito, neiteru aashipa iltung'ana pooki oo lkipaareta neisis Enkai to ltoilo sapuk too nkiaasin e ngolon naatoduaa." 
Luke19:38 Nejo, “Emayiana Olaiguanani olotu te nkarna o Laitoriani, Eseriani te keper naa enkitoo te Nkai!”" 
Luke19:39 Nejoki kulikae loo Lfarisayo ootii atua olorere, “Olaiteng'enani, intigira lkipaareta linono.”" 
Luke19:40 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Ajoki intae, ore te negira kulo nebuaku ninche kulo soito.”" 
Luke19:41 Ore pee enyikaki Yesu ina anasa nedol neishiraki; 
Luke19:42 nejo, “Ooi te naa iyiolo sii ake tele kekun imbaa naayau eseriani! Kake ore taata keisudoro medol inkonyek inono." 
Luke19:43 Amu kepuonu nkolong'i, naman lmang'ati linono oolkerenket, nikipunyaki too nkaloli pooki," 
Luke19:44 nikinang'ie enkop, iyie taa, o nkera niata tiatua, nemeetae osoit obo tiatua iyie oing'uari eiteleikino olikae; amu eitu iyiolou olkekun likibaikinye Enkai.”" 
Luke19:45 Nejing Yesu enkaji e Nkai neiteru aaraa lelo oomirisho. 
Luke19:46 Nejoki ninche, “Etisiraki aajo, ‘Ore enkaji ai keaku ene nkomono;’ kake intaa intae enkapune oo laisimak.”" 
Luke19:47 Neiteng'enisho anaa ake te nkaji e Nkai. Neing'oru ilapolosak kituaak, o lasirak o ltung'ana kituaak le ilo orere enaiko pee eidaikie ninye;" 
Luke19:48 kake etalaita enaas, amu eteenikinote ltung'ana pooki irorei lenyena." 
Luke20:1 Ore nabo olong eiteng'enita Yesuiltung'ana nelikioo lomon supati te nkaji e Nkai, nepuonu lapolosak kituaak o lasirak o lpayiani enetii" 
Luke20:2 neikilikuan aajoki, “Toliki iyiook ae te ngolon e ng'ae ias iyie kuna baa, ae ng'ae likinchoo ena golon?”" 
Luke20:3 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Kaikilikuan sii nanu intae embae nabo; entolikioki," 
Luke20:4 amaa apa enkibatisa e Yohana ai Keper eing'uaa, anaa ltung'ana?”" 
Luke20:5 Neiguana maate ejo, “Amaa tenikijo, ‘Keper einguaa’, nejoki iyiook, ‘Kainyoo naa pee eitu irukuruku?’" 
Luke20:6 Kake ti nikijo, ‘Iltung'ana eing'uaa,’ nenang iyiook kulo tung'ana pooki too soito; amu keyiolo too ltauja aajo oloiboni le Nkai Yohana.”" 
Luke20:7 Newaliki aajoki, mikiyiolo eneing'uaa." 
Luke20:8 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Maliki sii nanu intae eneing'uaa engolon naasie kuna baa.”" 
Luke20:9 Neiteru Yesu aliki olorere ena kitanyaanyukoto, nejo, “Etuno oltung'ani enkurma oo lng'anayio, neisho laramatak meisilenoi nelo ai kop nebik enkata naado." 
Luke20:10 Ore pee ebau enkata, neirriu osinka airriwaki ilaramatak, meishoo ematua oo lng'anayio le ina kurma; kake eidong'o lelo ooisilenoitie ninye nerriny too nkaik naarook." 
Luke20:11 Neirriwaa likae sinka; near sii ilo nesul, nearaa too nkaik naarook." 
Luke20:12 Neitoki ake airriwaa oli okuni, nepik ilbaa ilo nearaa ong'ata." 
Luke20:13 Nejo olopeny ina kurma oolng'anayio, ‘Kaji aiko? Olayioni lai kirotet airriwaa; kebaiki neyanyit ninye.’" 
Luke20:14 Kake ore pee edol lelo ooisilenoitie ninye, nejokino maate, ‘Ele doi olajung'oni, mataar pee eaku enaang enjung'ore.’" 
Luke20:15 Nearaa auluo enkurma near metua. Kaa pasa kenya eitaasi ninche olopeny e nkurma? 
Luke20:16 Kelotu aidaikie lelo ooisilenoitie neisho kulikae ina kurma.” Ore pee ening ninche ina nejo, “Taba meiwuang'a!”" 
Luke20:17 Kake eing'ura Yesu ninche nejo, “Kaa naa ejo ilkigerot, ‘Ilo soit otanyaita lashetak otaa ole lukunya o lmairroto?’" 
Luke20:18 Ore pooki ng'ae osulakino ilo soit negiligil aitaa mpurdat; kake ore ake olourokino ninye nerrar tukul.” 
Luke20:19 Neiteru lasirak o lapolosak kituaak aajo matipik Yesu inkaik teina saa, kake etureita olorere; amu etoduaa aajo ninche eipirie ina kitanyaanyukoto." 
Luke20:20 Metaa neing'or ninche ninye neirriwaki ilaikitalak ooitaakuno supati te Nkai, pee etum aawaita kuna naajo, netum aaitarasaki enkitoria o enkiguana o lbalusui." 
Luke20:21 Neikilikuan ninche aajoki, “Olaiteng'enani, kiyiolo aajo iro iyie ninteng'enisho too sipat, metii enyorrakinoto, kake iutu iyie enkoitoi e Nkai te sipata." 
Luke20:22 Keishiaakino neishori Kaisari kodi ana aimeishiaakino?” 
Luke20:23 Kake etayiolo Yesu olosek lenye, nejoki," 
Luke20:24 “Entoduaaki empisai. Ai ng'ae esirakino naa kole ng'ae olkigeroto oata?” Nejoki, “Ole Kaisari.”" 
Luke20:25 Nejoki ninche, “Enchoo naa Kaisari inaara ine Kaisari, ninchosho Enkai inaara ine Nkai.”" 
Luke20:26 Nelaikino aaibung'a ninye etii olorere te nena naatejo; kake eing'asiate ninche te nena naawalu negira. 
Luke20:27 Nepuonu Sadukayo enetii Yesu, lelo apa oojo meetae empiunoto." 
Luke20:28 Neikilikuan embae nabo, aajoki, “Olaiteng'enani, etisiraka iyiook Musa nchere te neye olalashe oltung'ani, oata enkitok nemeeta nkera, neya ake ilo tung'ani ina kitok pee eiki olalashe nkera." 
Luke20:29 Eetae apa ilalashera oopishana; neyam ole dukuya enkitok, neye meeta nkera;" 
Luke20:30 neiko nejia oli aare," 
Luke20:31 neyam sii oli okuni. Neiko nejia pokira oopishana neye neitu eing'uaa nkera 
Luke20:32 ore te siadi neye sii ninye enkitok. 
Luke20:33 Amaa kenya te mpiunoto, etiu nejia, keaku ene ng'ae ina kitok? Amu eyama pokira oopishana ninye.”" 
Luke20:34 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Eyamisho neishoori meyami nkera e na kata;" 
Luke20:35 kake ore lelo oishiaakino nebaiki ina kata nebaiki sii empiunoto oo lootuata meyamisho nemeyami," 
Luke20:36 amu metiooyo eitoki aaye, amu etiu anaa lmalaika neaku nkera e Nkai, aaku nkera e mpiunoto." 
Luke20:37 Kake ore nchere kepiu ilootuata, etuutua ninye Musa, teine neigerore mbaa osanag oyupuyup teine neipotie ninye Olaitoriani ajo Enkai e Abraham naa Enkai e Isaak, naa Enkai e Yakobo." 
Luke20:38 Mme naa Enkai oo lootuata, kake enoo looishu; amu ninye eishuyie pooki.”" 
Luke20:39 Newalu embata oo lasirak aajo, “Olaiteng'enani, iroro aitobiraki.”" 
Luke20:40 Amu eturia ninche eitoki aaikilikuana ae bae. 
Luke20:41 Kake etiaaka Yesu ninche, “Kaji etiu pee eji Kristo enkerai e Daudi?" 
Luke20:42 Amu etejo Daudi openy te mbuku Olkerempe le Nkai, ‘Etiaka Olaitoriani, Olaitoriani lai, Totona te nkaina ai e tatene" 
Luke20:43 o metaba anaa naitaa ilmang'ati linono olorika loo nkejek inono.’ 
Luke20:44 Amaa teneipoto Daudi ninye ajo Olaitoriani; kaji naa eiko pee eitoki Yesu aaku enkerai enye?” 
Luke20:45 Nejoki Yesu lkipaareta lenyena einining'ito olorere pooki," 
Luke20:46 “Entorrip ate too lasirak, oopuaya eishopito lkilani oodo, nenyor neirorokini too neemishoreki nenyor ilorikan sidain aaisul tiatua nkajijik e ntumo, o wuejitin e nkanyit too mashoi," 
Luke20:47 nenya aamut nkajijik oo nkolia neitaakuno neitoodor enkomono e Nkai. Ketum ninche enkiguana narrish oleng.” 
Luke21:1 Neshumu Yesu nkonyek nedol ilkarsisi eitadoiki inkishoorot enye osanduku oshumishoreki; 
Luke21:2 nedol sii enkoliai aisinani eitadoiki isuyan are. 
Luke21:3 Nejo, “Kedede ajoki intae, ena oliai aisinani natipika aisul too lkulikae pooki;" 
Luke21:4 amu eishorutua pooki te nkumoi oo naata, kake eishorua ninye to sina lenye pooki toki naata.”" 
Luke21:5 Ore eimaki kulikae enkaji e Nkai, eneikunaki teneikodi too soito sidain o too nkishorunot, nejoki Yesu," 
Luke21:6 “Ore anaa kuna tokitin nidolitata, kepuonu nkolong'i nemeitokini aata osoit obo oiteleikino olikae lemesulakini enkop.”" 
Luke21:7 Neikilikuan lkipaareta lenyenaaajoki, “Olaiteng'enani, kanu eaku kuna baa, naa ainyoo olmonekie outu ajo etaa kebau?”" 
Luke21:8 Nejo, “Entodol meitapong'ori intae; amu kepuonu lkumok te nkarna ai, nejo, ‘Nanu ilo? Etinyikua enkata!’ Emisuj intae ninche." 
Luke21:9 Naa ore pee ining'ining'i njoreitin o long'oling'oli, emiureisho, amu keituruku ake nena aikununye nejia, kake melotu enkiting'oto e nkop nabo kata.”" 
Luke21:10 Nejoki ninche, “Kedumakino olosho likae osho, nedumakino enkitoria enkae kitoria;" 
Luke21:11 nelotu olokirikiri le nkop too wuejitin kumok, nelotu olameyu o olmeitai too wuejitin kumok, naa kepuonu ntabo naaitureisho o lmonek ooing'uaa shumata," 
Luke21:12 kake ore eton eitu ebau nena pooki keibung'i intae, neinyali, neitarasakini intae nkajijik e ntumo o jila, nerikokini intae laiguanak o lbalusuni te nkaraki enkarna ai." 
Luke21:13 Neaku te intae enkata nimbalielie enkirukoto inyi. 
Luke21:14 Entumut ena nabo too ltauja linyi nchere, emidamu eitu ebau enkata eninkoko tinimitutu ate;" 
Luke21:15 amu nanu oisho intae enkariyiano oo nkutukie o eng'eno, nemeetae hoo obo le lelo mang'ati linyi oidim airisha aashu ewal." 
Luke21:16 Keitarasaa intae intoiwuo o lalashera o ltung'ana lo lmarei o lchoreta, naa keari kulikae linyi metuata;" 
Luke21:17 neibayu intae pooki te nkaraki enkarna ai. 
Luke21:18 Kake meimin ninye olpapita obo loo lukuny inyi. 
Luke21:19 Kake te ng'iriata inyi itumutumu enkishui. 
Luke21:20 “Kake ore pee idolidolo Yerusalem etamana mpuot, entayiolo aajo etinyikua emutata enye." 
Luke21:21 Ore ina kata lootii Yudea esikaki ldoinyo, ore lelo ootii atua ina anasa nepuku aapuo, nemejing'u lelo ootioyo ti ong'ata;" 
Luke21:22 amu nkolong'i e nkitamioto kuna, naabaya mbaa pooki naatisiraki." 
Luke21:23 Woi nena naanuta o naaitanakisho te nena olong'i! Amu keaku kitok osina o engoro e Nkai nadoiki kulo tung'ana; 
Luke21:24 kedung'ori aauroo too lalema, neriki atua loreren pooki meshomo sinkaisho; neitiamie Iloreren Yerusalem o metaba anaa neitabari nkatitin oo Loreren." 
Luke21:25 “Naa keitodolu enkolong o lapa o lakir ilbulabul le nking'asia. Ore te nkop neinepu osina iloreren o enking'aing'ai neikurrukur enaiposha o lopir le nkare," 
Luke21:26 neiterriaa ltung'ana te nkiputukuny e nena baa naapuonu enkop; amu keigirigiro engolon pooki e shumata. 
Luke21:27 Ore teina kata nedoluni Enkerai e Tung'ani elotu te ngolon te nkatampoi o te nkisisa kitok. 
Luke21:28 Ore taa pee eng'as aabau kuna baa eng'ura shumata entushumu lukuny inyi, amu etinyikua esarunoto inyi.”" 
Luke21:29 Neliki Yesu lkipaareta lenyena enkitanyaanyukoto ajoki. “Eng'ura olng'aboli o lkeek pooki; 
Luke21:30 ore ake pee eiteru aaitayu mbenek, niduaakiki ate nchere etinyikua oladalu." 
Luke21:31 Nejia naa etiu, ore pee idolidolo eaku kuna baa, entayiolo entejo etinyikua enkitoria e Nkai." 
Luke21:32 Kedede, ajoki intae, meishari ena ishoi eitu eitabari nena pooki." 
Luke21:33 Keish keper o enkop, kake meish ororei lai hoo obo."
