Luke21:34 “Kake eng'ura ate pee meibiitiari ltauja linyi te nkaraki emerai o nkolati e na kop, neirrashu intae ina olong neluam intae anaa orreshet;" 
Luke21:35 amu nejia etiu, kedoiki lelo pooki oomanya enkop pooki." 
Luke21:36 Kake entashololoto intae inkatitin pooki, niomonunu meishori intae engolon nipaashieshie nena naapuonu, pee intasheshe te dukuya Enkerai e Tung'ani.”" 
Luke21:37 Neiteng'enisho Yesu te ndama nkolong'i pooki te nkaji e Nkai, kake ore kewarie neipang alo airrag oldoinyo oji oloo Loirienito." 
Luke21:38 Ore enasirie neyooki ltung'ana pooki aapuo aainining ninye te nkaji e Nkai. 
Luke22:1 Nenyiku osirua loo Mukateni neitu eisuishieki oji Pasaka. 
Luke22:2 Neing'oru ake lapolosak kituaak o lasirak eneiko pee ear Yesu metua; paa olorere eure. 
Luke22:3 Nejing Sheitani Yudas oji Iskariot, olaa obo le lelo tomon o aare;" 
Luke22:4 nedumunye alo aning'ore lapolosak kituaak o sikarini aitoriak eneiko pee ekaldaa Yesu te ninche. 
Luke22:5 Neshipa ninche nejoki keisho mpisai. 
Luke22:6 Nenyorraa Yudas, neing'oru erishata naitarasarie Yesu meyiolo olorere." 
Luke22:7 Nebau enkolong oo Mukateni Nemeisuishieki, ina olong nayieng'i olkuoo lo sirua le Pasaka." 
Luke22:8 Neirriwaa Yesu Petero o Yohana, ajoki, “Enchom entobiraki iyiook Pasaka pee kitum aainosa.”" 
Luke22:9 Nejoki ninche Yesu, “Kaji iyieu nikipuo aaitobirie?”" 
Luke22:10 Nejoki, “Eng'ura, ore ijing'ijing'i ina anasa, nenang'are intae olee onapita oltoo le nkare, enturubare nijing'ijing'i enkaji najing," 
Luke22:11 nijokiki olopeny enkaji, ‘Kitiaaka Olaiteng'enani, koree ake olgilata loo lomon, lainosie Pasaka o lkipaareta laainei?’" 
Luke22:12 Naa keutaki intae olgilata le shumata oidipaki aaitobira; entobira teine.” 
Luke22:13 Nepuo, neinepu etiu anaa enatiaaka; neitobiraki Pasaka." 
Luke22:14 Ore pee ebaya esaa, neton Yesu adaa, netoni lkipaareta lenyena te nebo ninye." 
Luke22:15 Nejoki ninche, “Atayiewua te yieuna sapuk nanya ena Pasaka te nebo intae eton eitu aaisilisili." 
Luke22:16 Amu ajoki intae, meekure aitoki ai kata anya o meitabari te nkitoria e Nkai.”" 
Luke22:17 Ore pee eng'amu enkikompe, neisho Enkai enashe nejo, “Entudumu ena entang'ar;" 
Luke22:18 amu ajoki intae ore ebaiki taata meekure aitoki ai kata aok ena kikombe oo lng'anayio lo sabibu o meeu enkitoria e Nkai.” 
Luke22:19 Nedumu emukate, ore pee eisho Enkai enashe nebel neisho ninche ejoito, “Osesen lai ele oishoori te nkaraki intae. Entaas ena kidamumu nanu.”" 
Luke22:20 Neiko nejia enkikompe eidipa endaa, ejoito, “Ore ena kikompe, osotua ng'ejuk eitaiki intae anaa enaibukori osarge lai, te nkaraki intae." 
Luke22:21 Kake eng'ura amu etii ilo laaitarasaa ena misa te nebo nanu. 
Luke22:22 Amu keikunari Enkerai e Tung'ani anaa enatejoki apake; kake ee kake aiyia ilo laa ninye oitarasaa!” 
Luke22:23 Neiteru ninche aaikilikuana maate, aajo kalo pasa oiko nejia." 
Luke22:24 Nepuku sii enchankar tiatua lkipaareta ejo kalo lenye oaku olkitok aisul te ninche. 
Luke22:25 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Eitoreisho laiguanak loo Loreren; ore lelo ooata enkitoria te ninche neji ninche ilooduporeki." 
Luke22:26 Kake mme nejia etiu te intae; enchoo ilo kitok aisul te intae pooki metotiwuo anaa ai ninye oloti aisul, netiu olarikoni anaa olaisiaayiani." 
Luke22:27 Amu kalo olkitok, koloton te misa, anaa keilo oisiaaisho? Aime ilo oton te misa? Kake atii nanu atua intae atiu anaa oloisiaaisho." 
Luke22:28 “Naa intae ootobiko kiboitarere too ntemat aainei 
Luke22:29 ore anaa enaaishoo Papa enkitoria, aisho sii nanu intae aiko nejia" 
Luke22:30 pee itonini aadaa te nebo nanu te nkitoria ai, nitonini too lorikan le nkitoo aaiguanaki lelo oshon tomon o aare loo Siraeli." 
Luke22:31 “Simon, Simon, kitoomonuo iyie Sheitani neishooki pee kitum ninye aipiripiro, anaa enkano," 
Luke22:32 kake aatoomonoko iyie pee meish enkirukoto ino, naa ore pee kishukokino, ntagolo lalashera linono.”" 
Luke22:33 Nejoki Petero, “Lo Kitok, atonyorrayie nanu pee aarubare jila aashu keeya.”" 
Luke22:34 Nejoki Yesu, “Aajoki, Petero, meru olchogoo ade taata, eitu kimiki iyie, katitin uni ajo mikiyiolo.”" 
Luke22:35 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Amaa apa pee airriwaa intae miatata mbenia oo mpisai aashu olbene aashu namuka, italaita toki?” Nejo, “Eitu.”" 
Luke22:36 Nejoki, “Kake ore ilo oata olbene inchoo eya, naa inchoo ilo lemeeta olalem emir enkila enye pee einyang'u." 
Luke22:37 Amu meeta nchere pee eitu eitabari ele sirata te nanu ojo, ‘Amu eikenakini ninye ilwushuush;’ amu kepuonu o metimitunye inaatisiraki tialo nanu.”" 
Luke22:38 Nejo ninche, “Olaitoriani, ng'ura doi, noolo lalema aare.” Nejoki ninche, “Eidipe.”" 
Luke22:39 Nepuku Yesu anaa enaiko apake, nelo oldoinyo loo Loirienito, nesuj lkipaareta lenyena." 
Luke22:40 Ore pee ebaiki ine wueji nejoki ninche, “Entoomon pee mijing'ijing'i atua ntemat.”" 
Luke22:41 Nelam ninche alo enelakua peno, negil kung aomon ejo," 
Luke22:42 “Papa, ti niyieu, torishieki ena kikompe; kake ore ake eyia mme anaa enayieu nanu, kake nchoo metotiwuo anaa eniyieu iyie.”" 
Luke22:43 Neipang'aki ninye olmalaika oing'uaa Keper, aitagol." 
Luke22:44 Ore te nkaraki naisina neitirrish oleng aomon netiu enkinyinyiret enye edoiki enkop anaa lkituaa kitong'at lo sarge. 
Luke22:45 Ore pee einyototo te nkomono, nelotu enetii loointeng'eni lenyena neinepu eirurate te nkaraki osina," 
Luke22:46 nejoki, “Kainyoo pee irurara? Enyoito entoomon pee mijing'ijing'i atua ntemat.”" 
Luke22:47 Ore eton eirorita, nelotu esiamo tenebo o ltung'ani oji Yudas, obo le lelo tomon o aare, erikito. Nenyikaki Yesu ang'utut;" 
Luke22:48 kake etiaaka Yesu, “Yudas, ai te ng'ututata intarasaa Enkerai e Tung'ani?”" 
Luke22:49 Ore pee edol lelo ooboitare enaasayu, nejo, “Olaitoriani, eikiosh too lalema?”" 
Luke22:50 Neosh obo osinka lo lapolosani kitok nedung'u enkiok e tatene. 
Luke22:51 Kake nejo Yesu, “Entapal ena!” Neiseyie enkiok enye neishiunye." 
Luke22:52 Neitoki Yesu ajoki lapolosak kituaak o laitoriak loo sikarini le nkaji e Nkai, o lpayiani, ooetuo aarasaki, “Amaa, eikipuonunu aarasaki anaa kara olaisimani, iatata lalema o siaren?" 
Luke22:53 Kaboitare intae anaa ake te nkaji e Nkai, neitu kimbung'ubung'u. Kake esaa inyi ena, o engolon e naimin.”" 
Luke22:54 Ore pee eidip aaibung'a Yesu nerik, neitabaiki enkang o lapolosani kitok. Nesuju Petero tenelakua." 
Luke22:55 Ore pee einoki enkima te mpolos o lkoriet netoni te nebo, neton sii ninye Petero te nebo ninche." 
Luke22:56 Ore pee edol enkaisiaayiani ninye eton te newang neunoki enkong'u nejo, “Ore ele tung'ani keboitare oshi Yesu.”" 
Luke22:57 Kake etomikio Petero, ejo, “Na kitok, maiyiolo nanu ninye.”" 
Luke22:58 Ore te nkiti kata nedol likae nejo, “Ira sii iyie obo lenye.” Kake etejo Petero, “Eero, mme nanu.”" 
Luke22:59 Ore etulusoyie esaa nabo neitoki ake likae aitirrishaki, ejo, “Kedede keboitare sii oshi ake ele tung'ani Yesu amu Olgalilayai.”" 
Luke22:60 Kake etejo Petero, “Lo lee, maiyiolo nanu enijoito.” Ore nabo kata, eton eirorita, neru olchogoo." 
Luke22:61 Neibelekenya Olaitoriani aing'or Petero. Nedamu Petero ororei lo Laitoriani otiaka, “Ore ade taata eitu eru olchogoo aikimiki iyie katitin uni.”" 
Luke22:62 Neipang alo aishir te mion. 
Luke22:63 Ore ina kata lelo ooibung'ita Yesu nesurdaany near ninye; 
Luke22:64 neitoki sii aaen nkonyek neikilikuan aajoki, “Imbonu! Ai ng'ae likitoosho?”" 
Luke22:65 Nejo siib kulikae rorei kumok aayietaa ninye neinyal. 
Luke22:66 Ore pee ekenyu, netumo olkioma loo lpayiani lo lorere o lapolosak kituaak o lasirak, nerik Yesu enetii olkioma lenye, nejoki," 
Luke22:67 “Toliki iyiook tenaa keyie Kristo?.” Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Tenaliki intae, mikirukuruku;" 
Luke22:68 naa te naikilikuan intae embae nimikiwalikiki. 
Luke22:69 Kake ore ebaiki taata keton Enkerai e Tung'ani te nkaina e tatene e ngolon e Nkai.” 
Luke22:70 Nejo ninche, “Metaa eira doi Enkerai e Nkai?” Nejoki ninye ninche, “Intae ootejo kara.”" 
Luke22:71 Nejo ninche, “Kainyoo ai shakenisho neton kiyieu? Kitoning'okito ate eimunye enkutuk enye.”" 
Luke23:1 Nedumunye olorora pooki, nerikokini Yesu Pilato." 
Luke23:2 Neiter aaitang'or ninye, aajo, “Kineputua ele tung'ani eiwushie olorere lang nemitiki iyiook kincho Kaisari kodi, nejo kewan Kristo naa olaiguanani.”" 
Luke23:3 Neikilikuan Pilato Yesu ajoki, “Ai yie doi Olaiguanani loo Lyahudi?” Newaliki ajoki, “Iyie otejo nejia.”" 
Luke23:4 Nejoki Pilato ilapolosak kituaak o lorora, “Eitu atum entiyoto tele tung'ani.”" 
Luke23:5 Kake eitirrishakita aajo, “Keing'oling'ol olorere, eiteng'enita te Yudea pooki, ebaiki Galilaya o meeu ene.”" 
Luke23:6 Ore pee ening Pilato ina, neikilikuanu tena kole Galilaya ilo tung'ani." 
Luke23:7 Ore pee ening ajo ole nkalo naitore Herode, neirriwaki Herode etii ninye Yerusalem ina kata." 
Luke23:8 Ore pee edol Herode Yesu, neshipa oleng, amu keyieu apa nedol te nkata naado, amu etoning'o imbaa enyena, nejo sii pee edol eas embae e nking'asia." 
Luke23:9 Ore te nkaraki ina neikilikuanishore Herode te nkata naado; kake eitu ewaliki Yesu. 
Luke23:10 Neitashoo lapolosak kituaak o lasirak aaitirrishaki aaitang'or ninye. 
Luke23:11 Nesul Herode o sikarini lenyena, neikordod; neitoki aishopoki olkila, nerrinyoki Pilato." 
Luke23:12 Neaku lchoreta Herode o Pilato aaiteru te ina olong, amu ore eton eitu ebau ena, naa ilmang'ati apa ninche pokira." 
Luke23:13 Neitoki Pilato aipot ilapolosak kituaak o laitoriak lo lorere 
Luke23:14 nejoki ninche, “Intae likitorikokito ele tung'ani anaa oloiwushie olorere; naiguanare te dukuya intae, neitu atumie ele tung'ani entiyoto hoo nabo too nitipika." 
Luke23:15 Eitu sii etumie Herode amu etorrinyoko iyiook. Eitu hoo eas ai nairirikino keeya; 
Luke23:16 metaa kaitame naisho elo.” 
Luke23:17 Nemeeta kata ake nemelaaki Pilato ninche oltung'ani obo te ilo sirua. 
Luke23:18 Kake etabuakutua pooki te nebo aajo, “Iwuang'ie ele tung'ani, naa Barabas talaaki iyiook”" 
Luke23:19 oltung'ani taa otanang'akaki jila, te nkaraki enkitarrikinoto natijing'a ina anasa, o te nkaraki natarishe." 
Luke23:20 Neitoki Pilato airorie olorere, eyieu nelaku Yesu;" 
Luke23:21 kake nebuaku ninche aajo, “Tasho ninye tasho!”" 
Luke23:22 Neigilie Pilato ene uni ajoki, “Kainyoo, kaa torroni etaasa? Eitu atumie nanu ninye entiyoto nairirikino keeya; metaa kaitame nalaku.”" 
Luke23:23 Kake eitirrishakita nekurraki to ltoilo sapuk ejo metashei. Neidimu oltoilo lenye ninye. 
Luke23:24 Nedung'oki Pilato enkiguana meitaasi Yesu ina nayieu ninche. 
Luke23:25 Nelaku ilo tung'ani otanang'akaki jila te nkaraki enkitarrikinoto oo nkitanapat o te nkaraki natarishe, ilo oipotutuo, kake eishooyie Yesu meitaasi ina nayieu ninche." 
Luke23:26 Ore erikitoi Yesu, neibung'i oltung'ani obo oji Simon le Kirene, oewuo eing'uaa nkurman, neitanapi osalaba, metanapa esujita Yesu." 
Luke23:27 Nesuj olorora kitok le lelo tung'ana, o nkituaak naaishiraki eoshiosh ilgooitie." 
Luke23:28 Kake eibelekenye Yesu aing'or nejoki, “Natoyie e Yerusalem, emikinchiraki nanu, kake ate enchiraki o nkera inyi," 
Luke23:29 amu kepuonu nkolong'i naaku keji, ‘Emayiana nkituaak olupin, nemayiana nkoishuaa neitu eisho, nemayiana ilki leitu enaki!’" 
Luke23:30 Neaku kejokini ildoinyo, ‘Entuurokinoto iyiook,’ nejokini ndoinyio, ‘Entoipoi iyiook.’" 
Luke23:31 Amu, pasa taa eikoni nji olchani onyori, kaji eikoni olotoyio?”" 
Luke23:32 Neriki sii kulikae wushuush aare, metari te nebo Yesu." 
Luke23:33 Ore pee ebaiki ewueji neji Emborbor, neshe Yesu teine, o lelo maisero, etii obo te tatene netii olikae te kedianye." 
Luke23:34 Nejo Yesu, “Papa, tapalaki ninche, amu meyiolo enaasita.” Neosh ninche enkukuo pee etum aatoor nkilani enyena." 
Luke23:35 Neitashoo ltung'ana teine, aaing'or; kake nesurdaany ilaitoriak, ejo, “Keitajewuo kulikae, nchoo naa eitajeu kewan te naa ai ninye doi Kristo le Nkai, ilo gelunoti lenye.”" 
Luke23:36 Nesurdaany sii ninche isikarini, epuonu aayaki enaisho naisuisho" 
Luke23:37 nejo, “Tenaa ira Olaiguanani loo Lyahudi, intajeu kewan!”" 
Luke23:38 Etisiraki sii olkigeroto te shumata elukunya enye ojo, “Ele Olaiguanani loo Lyahudi.”" 
Luke23:39 Nemor obo le lelo wushuush ootashoki te nebo ninye, nejo, “Aimira doi Kristo? Intajeu kewan o iyiook!”" 
Luke23:40 Neisikong olikae ajoki, “Ai miure iyie Enkai, nidol ajo ina kiguana kitudung'okoki sii iyie?" 
Luke23:41 Neishiaakino ninche iyiook; amu inikitaasa eitalakitae iyiook; kake meeta hoo ele tung'ani entorrono nataasa.” 
Luke23:42 Nejoki, “Yesu, tadamuaki nanu te nilotu te ngolon ino e nkitoria.”" 
Luke23:43 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Esipa aajoki iyie, ijing ade Paradiso te nebo nanu.”" 
Luke23:44 Neaku ina kata enaipirie enkolong, nerip enaimin enkop pooki o metabaiki saa naaudo," 
Luke23:45 neimis ewang'an e nkolong; nepolosa olkarasha orish enkaji e Nkai aaku are. 
Luke23:46 Ore Yesu, nebuaku to ltoilo sapuk, nejo, “Papa, inkaik inono apik enkiyang'et ai!” Ore pee ejo nejia nedung'o tau." 
Luke23:47 Ore pee edol olkitok loo sikarini enataase, neisis Enkai, nejo, “Kedede meeta hoo ele tung'ani entiyoto!”" 
Luke23:48 Ore ilo orora pooki ooetuo enking'urare, pee edol enataase, nerrinyo nkang'itie enye eoshiosh ilgooitie eisina." 
Luke23:49 Ore ilooyiolore Yesu pooki o nkituaak naatusujutua eing'uaa Galilaya neitashe te nelakua aadol kuna baa. 
Luke23:50 Netii apa oltung'ani oji Yosef le nkang oo Lyahudi naji Arimatea. Naa obo ninye lo lkiama, naa oltung'ani supat asipani," 
Luke23:51 neitu enyorraa ninye ina nayieu o enataasa ninche, amu keanyita enkitoria e Nkai." 
Luke23:52 Nelo ilo tung'ani enetii Pilato aomonu osesen le Yesu. 
Luke23:53 Neitadou neirin to lkarasha le kitani, neirragie te nkurare naguetuno to soit, neitu ai kata epiki likae." 
Luke23:54 Naa enkolong e Nkitobirare, etaa kebau Sabato." 
Luke23:55 Nesuj nkituaak naairiamunore Yesu eing'uaa Galilaya, nedol enkurare, nedol eneikunakaki osesen enturoroto." 
Luke23:56 Nerrinyo aapuo ang, nepuo aaitobir sonkoyoni o ila naarropil. Neyeng'iyeng'a te nkolong e Sabato anaa enajo inkitanapat." 
Luke24:1 Ore te nkolong e dukuya e wiki aa enasirie, nepuo nkituaak enkurare, neshoroo isonkoyoni naaitobira." 
Luke24:2 Neinepu osoit eibeleleng'oyioki te nkurare," 
Luke24:3 kake ore pee ejing atua neitu etum ilo sesen. 
Luke24:4 Ore eton eing'asia te nkaraki ina bae, neipang'aki iltung'ana aare ooata nkilani naaimerlel;" 
Luke24:5 ore pee eirut neirrugo aaing'orie nkomomi enye enkop, nejoki lelo lewa, “Kainyoo pee ing'oruru oloishu to lootuata?" 
Luke24:6 Metii ninye ene, kake etopiwuo. Entadamu anaa enatiaka intae, eton etii Galilaya," 
Luke24:7 nchere, keitarasari ake Enkerai e Tung'ani aaitarasaki inkaik oo looas ing'ok, neshei, nepiu te nkolong e uni.”" 
Luke24:8 Nedamu nena kituaak irorei lenyena," 
Luke24:9 ore pee errinyo aaing'uaa enkurare neinosaki lelo pokira tomon o obo nena baa neliki sii ilkulikae. 
Luke24:10 Naa Mariamu Magdalene, Yoana o Mariamu ng'otonye Yakobo o nkulie kituaak naatii te nebo ninche naatolikitio lkipaareta kuna baa." 
Luke24:11 Kake etotiwuo lelo rorei te ninche anaa le pesho, neaku eitu eiruk ninche." 
Luke24:12 Kake einyo Petero neipirri alo enkurare; neirrugo aing'or atua, nedol lkarash le kitani eirrag oopeny; nerrinyo alo ang eing'asia te nena naatotiwuo." 
Luke24:13 Ore teina olong ake epuoito aare loo loiteng'eni enkang naji Emmaus, naa mael naapishana ing'uaa Yerusalem," 
Luke24:14 neimaki pokira aare nena baa naataasate. 
Luke24:15 Ore einosaa lomon eiguana pokira aare, neinepu Yesu openy airiamariyie ninche." 
Luke24:16 Neikeno nkonyek enye pee meyiolou. 
Luke24:17 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Kakua omon kulo liimakiki ipuopuo pokira aare?” Neitashe, neisinanuo." 
Luke24:18 Ore obo lenye, oji Kleopas, newaliki ajoki ninye, “Keiyie doi ake olomoni te Yerusalem lemeyiolo kuna baa naataasate teine te kuna olong'i?”" 
Luke24:19 Nejoki, “Akua baa?” Nejoki ninche ninye, “Mbaa e Yesu le Nasaret, ora apa oloiboni le Nkai ogol too nkiasin o to rorei tialo Enkai o te dukuya ltung'ana pooki" 
Luke24:20 o enaikuna lapolosak lang kituaak o laitoriak pee eitarasaa metudung'okini enkiguana metari metua, neshei ninye." 
Luke24:21 Kake kisilig apa iyiook aajo ninye olaku Siraeli. Ee pae naa ore etii nena pooki, enkolong e uni duoo taata anaa neasayu nena baa." 
Luke24:22 Ore sii, eing'asiayie iyiook kulie kituaak e ncholiek ang. Etayookito enkurare duoo enasirie" 
Luke24:23 neitu einepu ilo sesen; neshukunye aajoki iyiook eji etoduaa ilmalaika, ootiaakita keishu." 
Luke24:24 Nepuo sii kulikae lang enkurare, nepuo ainepu etiu ake anaa ina natolimutuo nkituaak; kake eitu ake edol ninye.”" 
Luke24:25 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Lo tung'ana moda, nirara yietuti ltauja mirukuruku nena pooki naatejo loibonok le Nkai!" 
Luke24:26 Keeta apa kata nemeitamei Kristo aaiko nejia pee ejing enkitoo enye?” 
Luke24:27 Neiteru too mbukui e Musa o too loibonok pooki, neibalakinye ninche ilkigerot ooipirta enkorrok enye." 
Luke24:28 Ore pee eaku kenyikaki ninche ina ang apa napuoito, neiko ninye anaa keyieu negiroo." 
Luke24:29 Kake neibok ninche ninye, aajoki, “Irraga iyiook amu emuto netaa kewarie.” Nejing taa aton te nebo ninche." 
Luke24:30 Ore enyaita endaa te nebo ninche, nedumu emukate nemayian, negil, neisho ninche." 
Luke24:31 Nebolo nkonyek enye neyiolou ninye; neimisilori ina kata ake neitu eitoki ninche aadol ninye. 
Luke24:32 Nejokino, “Keitu eyupuyup iltauja lang eirorie iyiook te nkoitoi, eboloki iyiook, ilkigerot?”" 
Luke24:33 Neinyototo ake teina saa nerrinyo Yerusalem; neinepu lelo tomon o obo o lelo ooboitare," 
Luke24:34 nejoki, “Etopiwuo taa ninye Olaitoriani neipang'aka Simon!”" 
Luke24:35 Neliki taa ninche nena baa naataasate te nkoitoi, o eneikuna pee eitayiolo kewan ninche ebelaki emukate." 
Luke24:36 Ore ejoito ninche nena, neitashe Yesu makewan te mpolos enye, nejoki, “Entaseriana!”" 
Luke24:37 Kake eirriang'a ninche, neureishoyu, ejo koloip etoduaa." 
Luke24:38 Nejoki ninche, “Kainyoo pee inyamalala? Naa kaji etiu pee etii olng'ash iltauja linyi?" 
Luke24:39 Eng'ura nkaik aainei o nkejek nchere kewan ai, nanu makewan ele; embung'aki pee idolidolo; amu meeta enkiyang'et inkiri o loik anaa kulo lidolitata aata.”" 
Luke24:40 Ore pee ejoki nejia, neitodol inkaik enyena o nkejek." 
Luke24:41 Ore eton ake eitu eiruk te nkaraki eng'ida o nking'asia nejoki ninche, “Iatata tene toki nanyae?”" 
Luke24:42 Neisho embelati o sinkirri oyiera," 
Luke24:43 nedumu nenya te dukuya ninche. 
Luke24:44 Nejoki ninche, “Ilapa rorei laainei kulo latiaaka intae, eton atii te nebo intae, nchere ore mbaa pooki naatisiraki naaipirta nanu too nkitanapat e Musa o too loibonok le Nkai o to Lkerempe le Nkai, meeta nchere meitabari.”" 
Luke24:45 Nebol iltauja lenye metayiolo ilkigerot," 
Luke24:46 nejoki ninche, “Etisiraki aajo, keitamei Kristo naa ore te nkolong e uni nepiu aing'uaa lootuata," 
Luke24:47 naa te nkarna enye elikiori enkirridunoto o empalakinoto oo ng'ok too loreren pooki, neiteruni te Yerusalem." 
Luke24:48 Irara intae ilchakenini le kuna baa. 
Luke24:49 Naa kairriwaki intae ilo otejo Papa keisho intae; kake entotoni te na anasa, o meishopokini intae engolon naing'uaa keper.”" 
Luke24:50 Neitoki Yesu arik lkipaareta lenyena o metabaiki Betania, neilepie inkaik enyena nemayian." 
Luke24:51 Ore emayianita ninye ninche, neilep aing'uaa ninche." 
Luke24:52 Nerrinyo ninche aapuo Yerusalem te ng'ida sapuk," 
Luke24:53 nebik anaa ake te nkaji e Nkai eisisita Enkai. 
John1:1 Ore te nkiterunoto netii apa Ororei, netii ilo Rorei te nebo Enkai, naa Enkai ilo Rorei." 
John1:2 Netii ilo Rorei te nkiterunoto te nebo Enkai. 
John1:3 Etaa pooki toki te ninye, nemeetae hoo toki te nena nataa, naitaaki metii ninye." 
John1:4 Atua ninye etii enkishui, ore ena kishui naa ewang'an oo ltung'ana." 
John1:5 Newang'u ewang'an tiatua enaimin nemeidimu enaimin ninye. 
John1:6 Etii apa oltung'ani oirriwuaki oing'uaa enetii Enkai; oji enkarna enye Yohana. 
John1:7 Neewuo ele te nkaraki shakenisho, pee eishakenoo ina wang'an, pee etum pooki aairuko te ninye." 
John1:8 Neme ina wang'an ninye, kake eewuo pee eishakenoo ina wang'an." 
John1:9 Ewang'an nadede naitawang pooki tung'ani, nalotu enkop." 
John1:10 Netii Ororei enkop, naa te ninye eitobira Enkai enkop, neitu eyiolou enkop ninye." 
John1:11 Neewuo enetii ilenyena, neitu eng'amu ltung'ana lenyena ninye." 
John1:12 Kake ore lelo pooki ootang'amutua ninye, lelo ooiruko enkarna enye, neishoo engolon naakunye nkera e Nkai," 
John1:13 ilo otoiwuoki neme to sarge neme te yieunoto o sesen aashu te yieunoto o lee, kake ene Nkai." 
John1:14 Neaku Ororei osesen neton tiatua iyiook, nikitoduaa enkitoo enye, naa enkitoo o Inoti Obo le Papa, obore empiris o esipata." 
John1:15 Neishakenoo Yohana ninye nebuak ajo, “Ele taa atolimuo ajo, ‘Ore ololotu te siadi nanu ninye olkitok te nanu, amu etii apa ninye te dukuya nanu.’ ”" 
John1:16 Ore te mborei e supatisho enye, kitang'amutua pooki, empiris kitok oleng." 
John1:17 Amu te Musa eishoruaki Nkitanapat; nelotu empiris o esipata te Yesu Kristo. 
John1:18 Meetae oltung'ani ai kata otoduaa Enkai; kake ilo inoti obo laa Enkai, otii olgoo le Papa, oibalunye ninye." 
John1:19 Naa ena shakenisho e Yohana pee eirriwaki Lyahudi lapolosak o Lawi ooing'uaa Yerusalem pee epuo aaikilikuan ninye aajoki, “Ira iyie ng'ae?”" 
John1:20 Neibalunye, neitu emiki, neibalunye ajo, “Mara nanu Kristo.”" 
John1:21 Neikilikuan aajoki, “Ira Eliya?” Nejoki, “Mara.” Nejoki, “Ira ilo oiboni?” Newaliki ajoki, “A'a,”" 
John1:22 Nejokini, “Ira ng'ae, pee kitum ewalata nikiyaki lelo ooirriutua iyiook? Aijo iyie aa te nkaraki enkorrok ino?”" 
John1:23 Nejo, “Ara oltoilo lo lobuaku ti ong'ata, ‘Entorioi enkoitoi o Laitoriani,’ Anaa enatejo oloiboni Isaya.”" 
John1:24 Ore lelo ooirriwakaki Yohana naa Ilfarisayo eing'uaa. 
John1:25 Neikilikuan ninche ninye aajoki, “Kainyoo naa pee imbatisisho iyie, ti nimira ilo Kristo, aashu Eliya aashu ilo oiboni?”" 
John1:26 Newaliki Yohana ajoki ninche, “Te nkare aibatisisho nanu. Eitashe tiatua intae Obo limiyiololo," 
John1:27 laa ninye ilo olotu te siadi nanu, lemaaishiakino nalak nkeenta o namuka enyena.”" 
John1:28 Etaasate kuna baa te Betania te lido kekun le Yordan, teine apa neibatisishore Yohana." 
John1:29 Ore te nkolong nasujita ina nedol Yohana Yesu elotu enetii, nejo, “Ing'ura, olkuoo le ker le Nkai oya eng'oki e nkop." 
John1:30 Ele taa atolimuo ajo, ‘Ore te siadi nanu kelotu oltung'ani kitok te nanu, amu etii ninye te dukuya nanu.’" 
John1:31 Neitu ayiolou nanu ninye, kake te nkaraki ena pee aeuo nanu aibatisisho te nkare, pee etumi aataboloki ninye Siraeli.”" 
John1:32 Neishakenoki Yohana ejo, “Atoduaa Enkiyang'et edou anaa enturkuluo eing'uaa keper netonie shumata ninye." 
John1:33 Neitu ayiolou nanu ninye, kake ilo laairriwua maibatishisho te nkare, ninye laatiaaka nanu, ‘Ore olidol edoiki Enkiyang'et netonie, ninye oibatisisho te Nkiyang'et Sinyati.’" 
John1:34 Natoduaa nanu naishakenoko nchere Enkerai e Nkai ele.” 
John1:35 Neitoki te nkolong nasujita ina, neitashe Yohana o lkipaareta aare lenyena;" 
John1:36 neing'or Yohana Yesu eloito nejo, “Ing'ura olkuoo le ker le Nkai!”" 
John1:37 Nening lelo ooiteng'eni lenyena aare nesuj ninche Yesu. 
John1:38 Neibelekenya Yesu, nedol esujita nejoki, “Kainyoo ing'oruru?” Nejoki ninche ninye, “Rabi, (aa nchere olaiteng'enani), kaji nikimanya?”" 
John1:39 Nejoki ninche, “Wootu entodol.” Nepuonu nedol enemanya; nebik o ninye ina olong. Netaa keaku saa tomon ina kata." 
John1:40 Ore obo le lelo oaare ootoning'o Yohana eiro, nesuj ninye, naa Andrea, olalashe le Simon Petero." 
John1:41 Olalashe lenye Simon etang'asa atum nejoki ninye, “Kinoto Mesia,” laa ninye eji Kristo." 
John1:42 Neriku Simon arikoki Yesu. Neing'or Yesu nejoki, “Ira iyie Simon, enkerai e Yohana, naa aikiji Kefa.” Aa nchere keji Petero aashu Osoit." 
John1:43 Ore te nkolong nasujita ina, nelo Yesu Galilaya, netum Filipo. Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Tusujaki.”" 
John1:44 Ore apa Filipo naa Betsaida eing'uaa, enkanasa oo Andrea o Petero." 
John1:45 Netum Filipo Natanael nejoki, “Kinoto olapa otisira Musa tiatua nkitanapat nesir too loibonok, le Nkai Yesu le Nasaret olayioni le Yosef.”" 
John1:46 Nejoki Natanael, “Keidim atupukunye Nasaret entoki sidai?” Nejoki Filipo, “Wou toduaa.”" 
John1:47 Nedolu Yesu Natanael elotu enetii, nelimu ninye ajo, “Ing'ura Osiraeli odede lemeeta eleyiata.”" 
John1:48 Nejoki Natanael Yesu, “Ai ti aji kitayiolo?” Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Aatoduaa eton eitu kimpot Filipo, itii entonata o lng'aboli.”" 
John1:49 Newaliki Natanael ajoki, “Rabi, ira iyie Enkerai e Nkai, Iyie Olaiguanani loo Siraeli.”" 
John1:50 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Te nkaraki naatiaaka aatoduaa te ntonata o lng'aboli pee iruko? Iyooki adol imbaa kituaak naalang kuna.”" 
John1:51 Nejoki ninye, “Esipa, esipa, ajoki intae, aidolidolo keper etabole neilep nedou ilmalaika le Nkai aadoiki Enkerai e Tung'ani.”" 
John2:1 Ore te nkolong e uni neetae apa enkiyama te Kana te Galilaya; netii ng'otonye Yesu ine. 
John2:2 Neipotoki sii Yesu o lkipaareta lenyena teina kiyama. 
John2:3 Ore pee eishunye enaisho oo sabibu nejoki ng'otonye Yesu, “Meetae enaisho o sabibu.”" 
John2:4 Nejoki Yesu, “Nakitok, kaa kiatayie neton eng'or enkata ai?”" 
John2:5 Nejoki ng'otonye laisiaayiak, “Entaas pooki najoki intae.”" 
John2:6 Netii ine iltooi ile loo soito, naa iloo mboreitin are aashu uni obo, netushumaki teine to lkerreti le nkitukuore oo Lyahudi." 
John2:7 Nejoki Yesu lelo aisiaayiak, “Emputa iltooi enkare.” Neiput metabaiki nkutukie." 
John2:8 Neitoki ajoki, “Entooku enkiti, eyaki olaitasheikinoni lele sirua.” Neyaki." 
John2:9 Ore pee eishamisham olkitok le nkiyama enaduoo are naitaaki enaisho oo sabibu, nemeyiolo eneing'uaa, hoo neyiolo laduoo sinkan ootookokito enkare, neipot olkitok le nkiyama oloyamisho," 
John2:10 nejoki, “Keng'as oshi ake pooki ng'ae aishoru enaisho oo sabibu sidai, ore etookishoteki, neishoru eneme sidai oleng; imboo iyie idia sidai o taata.”" 
John2:11 Tiatua Kana te Galilaya etaasie Yesu ena naa enkiterunoto oo mbaa e nking'asia naitoduaaya enkitoo enye; neiruk lkipaareta lenyena. 
John2:12 Ore etulusoyie ina nedoiyio aapuo Kapernaum, ninye o ng'otonye o lalashera o lkipaareta lenyena; nebik inkuti olong'i teine." 
John2:13 Netinyikua apa osirua le Pasaka loo Lyahudi, neilep Yesu alo Yerusalem." 
John2:14 Neinepu lamirak loo nkishu o loo nkerra oo loo nturkuluoni tiatua enkaji e Nkai, netoni ilaibelekenyak loo mpisai." 
John2:15 Ore pee eitobir elishiei oo nkopit, nearaa ntare o nkishu pooki aipangie te enkaji e Nkai, neisuaaya mpisai oo laibelekenyak, neibeleleng'oo misai enye." 
John2:16 Nejoki lamirak loo nturkuluoni, “Ewaita kuna tokitin te ne emintaa enkaji e Papa enemirishoreki.”" 
John2:17 Nedamu lkipaareta lenyena enatisiraki nchere, “Kaanya olom le nkaji ino amut.”" 
John2:18 Newaliki Lyahudi aajoki, “Kainyoo enkitoduaata nintodol iyiook, oo pee ias kuna baa?”" 
John2:19 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Entarruoi enkaji e Nkai, ore too nkolong'i uni naitasheyie.”" 
John2:20 Nejoki taa Ilyahudi, “Artam o ile ilarin eshetitai ena aji e Nkai, eji nijo iyie intasheyie too nkolong'i uni?”" 
John2:21 Kake enkaji e Nkai a ilo sesen lenye eimaka ninye. 
John2:22 Ore pee eitopiuni too lootuata nedamu lkipaareta lenyena inchere etiaaka nejia, neiruk ilkigerot, o rorei oiroro Yesu." 
John2:23 Ore etii ninye Yesu Yerusalem, to sirua le Pasaka, neiruk ilkumok enkarna enye etoduaa inenking'asia naasita." 
John2:24 Kake eitu eiruk Yesu aisho makewan ninche, amu keyiolo ltung'ana pooki," 
John2:25 nemeetayie tipat shakenisho te tung'ani amu keyiolo openy naatii atua tung'ani. 
John3:1 Etii apa oltung'ani loo Lfarisayo oji enkarna Nikodemo, aitoriani loo Lyahudi." 
John3:2 Nelotu ele tung'ani enetii Yesu kewarie, nejoki ninye, “Rabi, kiyiolo aajo ira iyie olaiteng'enani oing'uaa Enkai; amu meetae oltung'ani oidim ataasa kuna kitoduaat nias iyie te nemeboitare Enkai ninye.”" 
John3:3 Newaliki Yesu ninye ajoki, “Esipa, esipa, aajoki iyie, te neitu eini oltung'ani aaigil te inoto naing'uaa keper, nemeidim atoduaa Enkitoria e Nkai.”" 
John3:4 Nejoki Nikodemo ninye, “Kaji eiko pee eidimi aatoiu oltung'ani etaa moruo? Keidim ninye atushukokinoyu eniare enkoshoke e ng'otonye metoini?”" 
John3:5 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Esipa, esipa, aajoki iyie, te neitu eini oltung'ani te nkare o te Nkiyang'et, nemeidim atijing'a Enkitoria e Nkai." 
John3:6 Ore ina natoiwuoki to sesen, naa osesen, ore enatoiwuoki te Nkiyang'et naa enkiyang'et." 
John3:7 Ming'asia te naajoki iyie, ‘Meeta nchere pee mikingili aaiu.’" 
John3:8 Eisiusiu osiwuo nelo eneyieu, nining oltoilo lenye, nimiyiolo eneing'uaa, aashu enelo: nejia etiu pooki ng'ae oini te Nkiyang'et.”" 
John3:9 Newaliki Nikodemo ajoki ninye, “Kaji eiko pee eidim aataa kuna baa?”" 
John3:10 Newaliki Yesu ajoki ninye, “Amaa, aa ira iyie olaiteng'enani loo Siraeli nimiyiolo kuna baa?" 
John3:11 Esipa, esipa, aajoki iyie, inikiyiolo kilimu, nikinchakenoki inikitoduaa niming'amaa intae shakenisho ang." 
John3:12 Amaa te natolikio intae mbaa e nkop nimirukuruku, kaji nkoko pee irukuruku te naliki intae mbaa e Keper?" 
John3:13 Meetae oloilepa alo keper, leme ilo otadowuo eing'uaa keper, Enkerai e Tung'ani.”" 
John3:14 Ore anaa enailepie Musa olasurai ti ong'ata meeta nchere pee eitu eilepieki Enkerai e Tung'ani aaiko nejia," 
John3:15 paa ore pooki ng'ae oiruk ninye netum enkishui nemeish. 
John3:16 Amu etonyorra Enkai enkop aiko nji o meishoru Enkerai enye nabo, paa ore pooki ng'ae oiruk nemeimin kake netum enkishui nemeish." 
John3:17 Amu eitu eirriu Enkai Enkerai enye enkop, meeu aiguanare enkop, kake pee etum enkop atajeu te ninye." 
John3:18 Ore ilo oiruk ninye; nemeiguanareki, ore ilo lemeiruk neidipaki aaiguanare, amu eitu eiruk enkarna e Nkerai inoti nabo e Nkai." 
John3:19 Naa ena enkiguana, eewuo ewang'an enkop, kake etonyorra iltung'ana enaimin aaitalang ewang'an amu ai torrok iasat enye." 
John3:20 Ore pooki ng'ae oas ntorrok naa keiba ewang'an, nemelotu enewang pee meibalieki iasat enyena," 
John3:21 kake ore oloas esipata, kelotu enewang pee eibalayu iasat enyena inchere etaasaki tiatua Enkai." 
John3:22 Orre te siadi kuna baa nelotu Yesu o lkipaareta lenyena enkop e Yudea, nebik teine te nebo o lorere neibatisa ninche." 
John3:23 Eibatisa sii apa ninye Yohana olorere te Enon nataaniki Salim, amu ai sapuk enkare teine; naa kepuonu ninche ine meibatisae;" 
John3:24 amu eton eitu epiki Yohana jila. 
John3:25 Nepuku enchankar oo lkipaareta le Yohana o Lyahudi obo too mbaa e nkitukuo enkitisinyare. 
John3:26 Nepuonu enetii Yohana nejoki, “Rabi, ore olapa liboitare te lido kekun le Yordan, liimaka aishakenoki, eibatisisho, neloito pooki ng'ae enetii ninye.”" 
John3:27 Newaliki Yohana ajoki, “Meidim oltung'ani atang'amai hoo toki te neme keishooki eing'uaa keper." 
John3:28 Kinchakenokiki intae maate nchere atejo, ‘Mara nanu Kristo, kake kaairriwuaki te dukuya ninye.’" 
John3:29 Ore olorikito esiankiki e nkiyama, ninye oyamisho; kake ore olchore lo loyamisho, oitashe ainining, neshipakino oleng oltoilo lo loyamisho. Etaboreyia naa ena shipai ai." 
John3:30 Meeta nchere pee mebul ninye nang'oroo nanu.” 
John3:31 Ore oloewuo eing'uaa keper netii shumata e pooki; ore oloing'uaa enkop naa enkop eing'uaa neiro ninye ine nkop. Ore ilo oing'uaa keper netii shumata te pooki. 
John3:32 Keishakenu ninye ina natoduaa o enatoning'o, ore ake eyia, nemeetae olong'amaa shakenisho enye." 
John3:33 Ore olotang'amayie shakenisho enye netipika olmishire lenye ena, nchere kaasipani Enkai." 
John3:34 Ore ilo oirriwua Enkai ninye oiro ororei le Nkai, amu meishoru Enkai Enkiyang'et te ntemakinoto." 
John3:35 Kenyor papa Enkerai, neishoo intokitin pooki metijing'a atua enkaina enye." 
John3:36 Ore oloiruk Enkerai neeta enkishui oo ntarasi; ore ologolong'aki Enkerai nemedol enkishui; kake keipirare ninye enkiguana e Nkai. 
John4:1 Ore apa pee eyiolou Yesu nchere etoning'o Ilfarisayo aajo eitaa Yesu iltung'ana kumok lkipaareta neibatisa lkumok oolang ile Yohana," 
John4:2 hoo neitu eibatisisho Yesu makewan, lkipaareta lenyena ake." 
John4:3 Neing'uaa Yudea nerrinyo alo Galilaya. 
John4:4 Kake meeta kata nemeimaa Samaria. 
John4:5 Nelotu taa enkanasa e Samaria naji Sikar, nanyikita enkurma apa naishoo Yakobo olayioni lenye Yosef." 
John4:6 Netii enchorro e Yakobo ine. Neton Yesu te mbata e nchorro, enaure te lototo enye. Netaa enaaku saa ile ina kata." 
John4:7 Nelotu enkitok e Samaria aoku enkare. Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Inchooki enkare naok,”" 
John4:8 amu eshomo lkipaareta lenyena aainyiang'u endaa teina anasa. 
John4:9 Nejoki ina kitok e Samaria ninye, “Kaji etiu pee kiomon iyie Olyahudi enkare nara nanu Esamariai?” (Amu mejing'a Lyahudi o Samaria)." 
John4:10 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Te naa iyiolo enkishorunoto e Nkai anaa ilo likijoki ‘inchooki enkare naok,’ anaata aa iyie naomon ninye naa eikincho ninye enkare e nkishui.”" 
John4:11 Nejoki enkitok ninye, “Lo Kitok, miaata toki niokunye negut olkesumet: ai ti aji iata enkare e nkishui?" 
John4:12 Aira iyie kitok alang papa lang Yakobo, oishoo iyiook ele shoro netooko ninye o layiok lenyena, o nkishu enyena?”" 
John4:13 Newaliki Yesu ajoki ninye, “Ore pooki ng'ae ook ena are naa keitoki atir enkure," 
John4:14 kake ore olook ina are naisho nanu, nemetir enkure ntarasi; amu ore ina are naisho nanu keaku enchorro tiatua ninye, naitootuaakino enkishui oo ntarasi.”" 
John4:15 Nejoki enkitok ninye, “Lo Kitok, inchooki ina are, pee maaitoki atir enkure, nemaitoki alotu ene neba inji aoku enkare.”" 
John4:16 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Shomo impoto olpayian lino wootu ene.”" 
John4:17 Newaliki enkitok ajoki ninye, “Maata nanu olpayian.” Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Intorioko ina nitejo, ‘Maata nanu olpayian,’" 
John4:18 amu imiet ilpayiani likiwaita, neme olino olikiaata taata. Ore tena, iroro esipata.”" 
John4:19 Nejoki enkitok ninye, “Lo Kitok, kadol ajo ira iyie oloiboni." 
John4:20 Eteseremishote apa loo papa tele doinyo, nijojo intae eji atua Yerusalem ake etii ewueji neseremishoreki.”" 
John4:21 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Irukoki nanu na kitok, kelotu esaa neme tele doinyo, neme te Yerusalem iserememe Papa." 
John4:22 Iserememe intae enimiyiololo, nikiserem iyiook enikiyiolo, amu Ilyahudi eing'uaa enjeunoto." 
John4:23 Kake kelotu esaa, netaa taata, naserem ilaseremak oosipa Papa te nkiyang'et o te sipata; amu ilaaijo lelo eing'oru Papa pee eserem ninye." 
John4:24 Enkiyang'et Enkai, ore ilooserem ninye, neishiaakino ake neserem te nkiyang'et o te sipata.”" 
John4:25 Nejoki enkitok ninye, “Kayiolo ajo kelotu Mesia laa ninye eji Kristo, Naa te nelotu neboloki iyiook imbaa pooki.”" 
John4:26 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Nanu doi ele laairorie iyie,”" 
John4:27 Nepuonu teina kata lkipaareta lenyena, neing'asia te nkaraki nairorie enkitok: kake metii olotejo, “Kainyoo ing'oru?” Aashu, “Oo pee irorie iyie ninye?”" 
John4:28 Neing'uaa ina kitok oltoo lo soit le nkare, nelo ina anasa nejoki olorere," 
John4:29 “Wootu entodol oltung'ani laatolikio mbaa pooki apa nataasa. Kebaiki sa naa ele Kristo?” 
John4:30 Neipang taa ninche te nkanasa nepuonu enetii Yesu. 
John4:31 Ore teina rishata ake nesai lkipaareta lenyena Yesu aajoki, “Olaiteng'enani, tadaayu.”" 
John4:32 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Kaata endaa nanya nimiyiololo intae.”" 
John4:33 Nejokino lkipaareta lenyena, “Keetae oloyaka endaa?”" 
John4:34 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Ore endaa ai naa te naas eyieunoto e lido laairriwua, naidip esiaai enye." 
John4:35 Aimijojo intae, keng'or ilapaitin oong'uan, pee ebau enkikesare? Entudumu nkonyek inyi, ajoki intae, eng'ura nkurman, eidipa aaiborrita pee eikesi." 
John4:36 Etumito olaikesani olekoisiaayio, neiturrurrito lng'anayio oobaiki enkishui oo ntarasi pee eshipa te nebo olaunoni o laikesani." 
John4:37 Ele rorei osipa, ilo otejoki nchere, keun obo neikes likae." 
John4:38 Airriwayie intae enkesa eneitu iyekarere; kulikae ooteekare, nietuo intae aajing enkikesare enye.”" 
John4:39 Neiruko Isamaria kumok le ina anasa te nkaraki ororei oishakenoko ina kitok inchere: “Aatolikio Yesu nataasa apa pooki.” 
John4:40 Ore pee epuonu Isamaria enetii Yesu, nesai metotona te nebo ninche, nebik inkolong'i are teine." 
John4:41 Neiruk kulikae kumok te nkaraki ororei lenye. 
John4:42 Nejoki ina kitok, “Meekure aa te nkaraki e nkiroroto ino pee kiruk, amu kitoning'o iyiook maate, naa eikiyiolo aajo kesipa ele Olaitajeunoni le nkop.”" 
John4:43 Ore pee elusoo nena olong'i pokira are neing'uaa Yesu ine alo Galilaya. 
John4:44 Amu etejo Yesu makewan nchere, “Meishori oloiboni enkanyit te nkop enye.”" 
John4:45 Ore pee elotu Galilaya, neng'amu Ilgalilaya ninye; etoduaa pooki naataasa te Yerusalem to sirua; amu eshomo sii ninche ilo sirua." 
John4:46 Neitoki alotu Kana e Galilaya ine neibelekenyie enkare aitaa enaisho oo sabibu. Netii apa oltung'ani kitok omuoi olayioni lenye te Kapernaum. 
John4:47 Ore pee ening ele tung'ani nchere eewuo Yesu eing'uaa Yudea alo Galilaya nelo enetii, nesai metadoi alo aishiunye olayioni lenye; amu etaa keye." 
John4:48 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Te neitu idolidolo ilmonek o mbaa e nking'asia nimirukuruku.”" 
John4:49 Nejoki ilo tung'ani kitok ninye, “Lo Kitok, tadou eton eitu eye enkerai ai.”" 
John4:50 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Shomo amu keishiu olayioni lino.” Neiruk ilo tung'ani ororei otiaaka Yesu, nelo." 
John4:51 Ore eton edoyio alo nenang'are isinkan lenyena neliki ninche aajoki, “Keishu enkerai ino.”" 
John4:52 Neikilikuan esaa naishiunye. Nejoki ninche ninye, “Ng'ole saa naapishana, etung'ueikia olkirobi.”" 
John4:53 Neyiolou menye ina kata ajo, enang'ole saa natiaakinye Yesu, “Ekeishiu olayioni lino.” Neiruk ninye makewan o enkaji enye pooki." 
John4:54 Ele taa olmonekie li are otaasa Yesu pee elotu eing'uaa Yudea alo Galilaya. 
John5:1 Ore te siadi nena, neetae osirua loo Lyahudi neilep Yesu alo Yerusalem." 
John5:2 Ore tiatua Yerusalem te mbata kishomi oo nkerra, netii ewueji neji te nkutuk oo Lbrania Betsaida, neeta nchomito imiet." 
John5:3 Neirrag te nena shomito olorora kitok loo ltamuoyia: ilmodook, ilng'ojiniaa, ilmaiman, eanyu meing'oling'oli enkare." 
John5:4 Amu keeta nkatitin naadoiki olmalaika ilo turoto neing'oling'ol enkare. Ore oloiteru ajing aa enaing'oling'olieki enkare neishiunyeki emuoyian ake ninye pooki naata. 
John5:5 Netii ine oltung'ani otobiko emuoi ilarin tomoni uni o isiet. 
John5:6 Ore pee edol Yesu ninye eirrag, neiyiolou ajo etobiko enkata naado teine, nejoki ninye, “Iyieu nikinchiunyeki?”" 
John5:7 Newaliki oltamuoyiai ajoki ninye, “Lo Kitok, maata nanu oltung'ani laaitadoiki olturoto te neing'oling'oli enkare; ore ajo alotu, nedoiki likae te dukuya nanu.”" 
John5:8 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Inyo tudumu erruat ino shomo.”" 
John5:9 Neishiu nabo kata ilo tung'ani, nedumu erruat enye nelo. Naa enkolong e Sabato apa ina olong." 
John5:10 Ore te nkaraki ina nejoki Lyahudi ilo oishiunyeki, “Sabato taata, nimikinchoro inap erruat ino.”" 
John5:11 Newaliki ninye ninche ajoki, “Ilo laaishiunye nanu laatiaaka, ‘Tudumu erruat ino shomo.’ ”" 
John5:12 Neikilikuan ninche ninye aajoki, “Aing'ae ilo likitiaaka, ‘Tudumu erruat ino shomo?’ ”" 
John5:13 Nemeyiolo ilo oishiunyeki ajo aing'ae, amu eiwuang'a Yesu etii olorere ine wueji." 
John5:14 Ore eidipate nena netum Yesu ninye to nkaji e Nkai, nejoki ninye, “Ing'ura ajo, inchiwuo; mintoki aekata aas ing'ok mikijing entorrono nalang ena.”" 
John5:15 Nelo ilo tung'ani, neliki Ilyahudi nchere Yesu oishiunye." 
John5:16 Ore te nkaraki e ina neiteru Ilyahudi aaing'orunore Yesu te nkaraki nataasa nena baa te enkolong e Sabato. 
John5:17 Newaliki Yesu ajoki ninche, “Easisho Papa o tena kata, naa kaasisho sii nanu.”" 
John5:18 Ore te nkaraki ina, nenyok Ilyahudi aaing'oru enkoitoi naarie metua, neme te nkaraki ake natigila enkolong e Sabato kake te nkaraki sii natejo menye lenye Enkai, aitorisioki kewan Enkai." 
John5:19 Newaliki Yesu ajoki ninche, “Esipa, esipa ajoki intae, meidim Enkerai ataasa ae toki openy, te neme naaduaaki menye easita; amu ore pooki naas menye neas sii ninye Enkerai aiko nejia." 
John5:20 Amu kenyor Papa Enkerai enye, neitodol pooki naas, naa keitodol kulie yasat sapuki naalang kuna, pee ing'asiasia intae." 
John5:21 Ore anaa enaitopiu Papa ilootuata neisho ninche enkishui nejia sii ninye etiu Enkerai enye eisho enkishui, oloyieu neisho." 
John5:22 Amu kedede meiguanare hoo Papa oltung'ani, kake eishoo ninye Enkerai enye enkiguana pooki," 
John5:23 pee eyanyitu pooki Enkerai anaa enayanyit Papa. Ore pooki ng'ae lemeyanyit Enkerai, nemeyanyit Papa oirriwua ninye." 
John5:24 Kesipa, kesipa, ajoki intae, ore oloinining'u ororei lai, neiruk ilo laairriwua, keeta enkishui oo ntarasi, nemejing enkiguana, kake etupukuo te keeya ajing atua enkishui." 
John5:25 “Esipa, esipa, ajoki intae, kelotu enkata, netii taata, naning ilootuata oltoilo le Nkerai e Nkai, ore lelo ootoning'o neishu." 
John5:26 Amu ore anaa enaata Papa enkishui makewan, nejia sii eikuna aisho Enkerai metaa keeta enkishui makewan;" 
John5:27 enyaaka sii aisho enkitoria pee eiguanare, amu Enkerai e Tung'ani ninye." 
John5:28 Eming'asia te na, amu kelotu enkata nayooki pooki ootii nkuraren aaning oltoilo lenye." 
John5:29 Neipang'u; ore ilootaasa isupati nejing empiunoto e nkishui; ore ilootaasa intorrok nejing empiunoto e nkiguana. 
John5:30 “Maidim ataasa toki te nkitoria ai makewan; aiguanare anaa enaning; naa enoo sipat enkiguana ai, amu mme eyieunoto ai aing'oru, kake eyieunoto e Papa laairriwua." 
John5:31 Te naishakenoki makewan, nemesipa shakenisho ai." 
John5:32 Etii likae laaishakenoki, nayiolo ajo ore ilo laaishakenoki kesipa shakenisho enye." 
John5:33 Irriwakita Yohana olkilikuai, neishakenoki esipata." 
John5:34 Kake mang'amaa nanu shakenisho naing'uaa tung'ani, kake kairo nanu kuna baa pee ijeuu." 
John5:35 Netaa Yohana oltaa oinuaaki newang, nitonyorraitie intae aang'idakino te nkiti kata ewang'an enye." 
John5:36 Kake ore shakenisho naata nanu naa eikitok alang ina e Yohana; amu ore isiaaitin naaishoo Papa maitabai, nena siaaitin naasita ninche maate naishakenoki nchere, Papa laairriwua." 
John5:37 Ore Papa laairriwua, ninye makewan laaishakenoko. Eitu aekata ining'ining'i intae oltoilo lenye, neitu idolidolo eneikununo;" 
John5:38 nimiaatata ororei lenye eton tiatua intae, amu ore ilo oirriwua ninye nimirukuruku." 
John5:39 Ijurrujurru intae ilkigerot amu idamumu aajo ninche itumiemie enkishui oo ntarasi, naa kulo kigerot lelo laaishakenoki nanu." 
John5:40 Niminyorraa intae aapuonu enatii pee itumutumu enkishui. 
John5:41 Mang'amu nanu enkitoo te tung'ani," 
John5:42 kake kayiolo intae ajo, miatata enyorrata e Nkai tiatua ate." 
John5:43 Aewuo te nkarna e Papa, nimiking'amumu intae nanu. Te nelotu likae te nkarna enye makewan ilo intae ingamumu." 
John5:44 Inyorrinyorro aisisata maate, kake mitemiteme aaing'oru enkisisa te Nkai nara openy; kaji naa inkoko pee kirukuruku nanu?" 
John5:45 Emijojo ake kaitang'or intae te Papa. Etii oloitang'or intae naa Musa laa ninye isiligigi. 
John5:46 Te naa iruko Musa, anaata kirukuruku sii nanu, amu imbaa aainei eigero ninye." 
John5:47 Amaa, ti nimirukuruku ilkigerot lenyena, kaji nkoko ti nirukuruku irorei laainei?”" 
John6:1 Ore pee eidipayu kuna baa nelo Yesu alang enaiposha e Galilaya, aa taa enaiposha e Tiberia." 
John6:2 Netii olorere kumok osujita, amu etoduaa ilmonek lenyena ooitaasita iltamuoyia." 
John6:3 Neilepaki Yesu oldoinyo neton teine te nebo o lkipaareta lenyena. 
John6:4 Netinyikua Pasaka, aa osirua loo Lyahudi." 
John6:5 Ore pee eraposhu Yesu nkonyek enyena nedol esiamo kitok elotu enetii, neikilikuan Yesu Filipo ajoki, “Kaji kinyang'unye mukateni pee etum kulo tung'ana aainosa?”" 
John6:6 Ketejo nejia aa ketem, amu keyiolo ninye makewan enaitaas." 
John6:7 Newaliki Filipo ajoki, “Mebaiki ninche inaainosieki dinarii iip are, te neishori pooki ng'ae enkiti.”" 
John6:8 Ore Andrea, obo loo lkipaareta lenyena, olalashe le Simon Petero, nejoki ninye," 
John6:9 “Etii enkiti ayioni natii ene naata mukateni imiet e shairi o sinkir aare; kake kainyoo ninche too lkumok ooba inji?” 
John6:10 Nejo Yesu, “Entotona ltung'ana.” Etii ine wueji nkujit oleng, netoni taa ltung'ana, nebaya esiana oo lewa nkalifuni miet." 
John6:11 Nedumu taa Yesu nena mukateni, neishooyo enashe neoriki lelo ootoni; neikunaki sii nejia isinkir anaa enatayieutua ninche." 
John6:12 Ore pee eraposho ninche nejoki ninye lkipaareta lenyena, “Enturrurru ilmong'oishi ootelekutua pee meimin toki.”" 
John6:13 Neiturrurru taa ninche, neiput nkikapuni tomon o aare ilmong'oishi loo naduoo mukateni miet e shairi ootelekutua lelo ooinosa." 
John6:14 Ore lelo tung'ana ootoduaa ina kitoduaata nataasa Yesu nejo, “Kesipa ele oloiboni olotu enkop.”" 
John6:15 Ore Yesu, etayiolo ajo kepuonu ninche aaibung ninye te ngolon aaitaa olaiguanani neiwuang ninye openy arrinyokino oldoinyo." 
John6:16 Ore pee eaku teipa nedoiyio lkipaareta lenyena aapuo enaiposha. 
John6:17 Ore pee ejing atua empeut, neaku kepuo aalang enaiposha aalang'aki Kapernaum. Neidipa atomisimiso, neton eitu elotu Yesu enetii ninche;" 
John6:18 neiterua enaiposha ailugo, amu etukutua osiwuo kitok." 
John6:19 Ore pee eidip aatukurtoi empeut nkilomitani miet aashu ile nedol Yesu eloito te shumata e naiposha elotu anyikaki empeut; neureishoyu ninche. 
John6:20 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Nanu ele; emiureishoyu.”" 
John6:21 Neyieu taa neng'amu aapik empeut, ore nabo kata nebaiki empeut enkop duoo napuo." 
John6:22 Ore te nkolong nasujita ina nedol enang'ole siamo naitashe te lido kekun le naiposha nchere, metii ai peut ine nabo ake, neitu eiriamariyie Yesu lkipaareta lenyena ajing atua empeut amu eshomo lkipaareta lenyena oopeny." 
John6:23 Kake ore ake eyia, eetuo mpeuti te Tiberia aanyikaki ine wueji neinosie mukateni eidipa Olaitoriani aishooi enashe." 
John6:24 Ore te nkaraki ina, ore pee edol esiamo ajo metii Yesu ine anaa lkipaareta lenyena, nejing ninche oopeny atua e mpeut nepuonu Kapernaum aaing'oru Yesu." 
John6:25 Ore pee etum lelo tung'ana Yesu te lido kekun le naiposha, nejoki ninye, “Rabi kanu iyeuo ene?”" 
John6:26 Newaliki Yesu ninche nejoki, “Kesipa, kesipa ajoki intae, ore pee king'oruru intae nanu, mme te nkaraki nitoduaa ilmonek kake te nkaraki ninosa mukateni niraposhosho." 
John6:27 Emisiayu endaa narruoyo kake esiaayu idia daa nabikoo nayau enkishui nemeish, naisho intae Enkerai e Tung'ani, amu ninye etipika Enkai Papa olmishire lenye.”" 
John6:28 Nejoki ninche ninye, “Kaji kinko pee kitum aataas isiaaitin e Nkai?”" 
John6:29 Newaliki Yesu ajoki ninche, “Ena esiaai e Nkai, pee irukuruku ilo oirriwua ninye.”" 
John6:30 Nejoki taa ninche ninye, “Kaa kitoduata ias, pee kidol nikiruk iyie? Kaa iasita iyie?" 
John6:31 Einosa iloo papa enapa daa naing'uaa keper ti ong'ata, anaa enaigeroki aajo, ‘Eishoo ninche emukate naing'uaa keper meinosa.’ ”" 
John6:32 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Esipa, esipa ajoki intae, eitu eisho intae Musa emukate naing'uaa keper. Kake keisho intae Papa lai ina mukate nasipa naing'uaa keper." 
John6:33 Ore emukate naishoru Enkai naa ina nadou aing'uaa keper neisho enkop enkishui.” 
John6:34 Nejoki ninche ninye, “Lo Kitok, inchoo iyiook anaa ake ina mukate.”" 
John6:35 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Ara nanu emukate e nkishui; ore ololotu enatii metum esumash, naa ore olaairuk nanu meitoki ai kata atir enkure." 
John6:36 Kake atiaaka intae nchere, kitoduaa kake eton mirukuruku." 
John6:37 Ore pooki laaisho Papa kelotu enatii, ore ololotu enatii nemanang'aa boo katukul," 
John6:38 amu atadowuo aing'uaa Keper neme pee alotu aas eyieunoto ai, kake eyieunoto e ilo laairriwua." 
John6:39 Ena eyieunoto e ilo laairriwua inchere pee maiturraa hoo obo le lelo laaishoo, kake kaitopiu nanu ninche te nkolong e nkiting'oto." 
John6:40 Amu ena eyieunoto e Papa inchere, ore pooki odol Enkerai neiruk ninye, netum enkishui nemeish; naa kaitopiu nanu ninye te nkolong e nkiting'oto.”" 
John6:41 Neaku keing'unyung'unyaki Lyahudi ninye, te nkaraki netejo, “Kara nanu emukate natadowuo aing'uaa keper.”" 
John6:42 Nejo ninche, “Aime Yesu ele, enkerai e Yosef, likiyiolo menye o ng'otonye? Kaji naa etiu pee etejo, ‘Atadowuo aing'uaa keper?’ ”" 
John6:43 Newaliki Yesu ajoki ninche, “Eming'unyung'uny maate." 
John6:44 Metii oltung'ani oidim aeu enatii, te neme Papa laairriwua oyietu ninye enatii; naa kaitopiu nanu ninye te nkolong e nkiting'oto." 
John6:45 Eigeroki too mbaa oo loibonok le Nkai aajo, ‘Naa keaku Enkai naiteng'en pooki.’ Ore naa pooki ng'ae otoning'o neiteng'ena kewan te papa nelotu enatii." 
John6:46 Mme taa ketoduaa hoo obo Papa, leme ilo oing'uaa Enkai, ninye otoduaa Papa." 
John6:47 “Esipa, esipa ajoki intae, ore olooiruk keeta enkishui nemeish." 
John6:48 Ara nanu emukate e nkishui. 
John6:49 Einosa loo papaai linyi mana ti ong'ata netuata. 
John6:50 Ena mukate nadou aing'uaa keper, ore olonya ninye nemeye." 
John6:51 Ara nanu emukate naishu natadowuo aing'uaa keper. Ore pooki ng'ae onya ena mukate neishu intarasi; naa ore emukate naishoru naa osesen lai, te nkaraki enkishui e nkop.”" 
John6:52 Neaku keishankarra Lyahudi aaitirrishakino maate, ejo, “Kaji eiko te neidim aishoo iyiook ele tung'ani osesen lenye mainosa?”" 
John6:53 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Esipa, esipa ajoki intae, te neitu inyanya osesen le Nkerai e Tung'ani niokioko osarge lenye, miaatata enkishui tiatua intae." 
John6:54 Ore olonya osesen lai neok osarge lai, keeta enkishui nemeish, naa kaitopiu nanu ninye te nkolong e nkiting'oto." 
John6:55 Amu endaa nasipa osesen lai, naa eokoto nasipa osarge lai." 
John6:56 Ore olonya osesen lai neok osarge lai, neton tiatua nanu naton nanu tiatua ninye." 
John6:57 Ore anaa enaairriwua Papa oishu, naishuyie nanu Papa, nejia sii etiu elde laanya nanu, nanu eishuyie." 
John6:58 Ena mukate natadowuo aing'uaa Keper, mme anaa enapa nainosa loo papa, netuata; ore olonya ena mukate neishu ntarasi.”" 
John6:59 Etejo Yesu kuna baa tiatua enkaji e ntumo, eiteng'enisho te Kapernaum." 
John6:60 Ore pee ening ilkumok loo lkipaareta lenyena kuna, nejo, “Kegol ele rorei. Aing'ae oidim atoning'o?”" 
John6:61 Neyiolou Yesu makewan nchere keing'unyung'uny lkipaareta lenyena te nkaraki ina, nejoki ninche, “Amaa keikob intae ena?" 
John6:62 Oo naa ti nidolidolo Enkerai e Tung'ani eilepieki enetii apa te dukuya? 
John6:63 Enkiyang'et naishoru enkishui; meeta osesen dupoto. Ore lelo rorei latiaaka intae, enkiyang'et naa enkishui." 
John6:64 Kake etii kulikae te intae leton meiruk.” Amu keyiolo apa ake Yesu te nkiterunoto ajo kakua leitu eiruk, naa kalo olo akaldaa ninye." 
John6:65 Nejo ninye, “Te nkaraki ina atiaaka intae nchere meetae oloidim aeu enatii, te neme keishoro te Papa.”" 
John6:66 Ore ebaiki ina kata, te nkaraki nena, nerrinyo ilkumok loo lkipaareta lenyena neitu eitoki aairiamariyie ninye." 
John6:67 Nejoki taa Yesu lelo tomon o aare, “Amaa, aiyieuu sii intae nipuopuo?”" 
John6:68 Newaliki Simon Petero ajoki ninye, “Lo Kitok, aing'ae kipuo enetii? Iyie oata rorei le nkishui nemeish," 
John6:69 nikiruko iyiook nikitayioloito nchere, ira iyie Ilo Obo Sinyati le Nkai.”" 
John6:70 Newaliki Yesu ninche ajoki, “Keitu agelu intae, pokira tomon oaare, ore obo linyi naa oloirirua?”" 
John6:71 Eimaka Yudas olayioni le Simon Iskariot, amu obo apa ninye te lelo tomon oaare, laa ninye oyooki akaldaa." 
John7:1 Ore pee eidipayu kuna baa nemanaa Yesu te Galilaya, amu meyieu nemanaa te Yudea te nkaraki naing'oru Lyahudi pee ear ninye metua." 
John7:2 Netinyikua osirua loo Lyahudi, aa osirua loo lng'oborri." 
John7:3 Neaku etiakita lalashera lenyena ninye, “Tung'uai ene shomo Yudea, pee edol sii ninche lkipaareta linono isiaaitin niasita." 
John7:4 Amu meetae oloas ai bae too nkisudorot laa keyieu ninye openy neliooyu aibalayu. Tenaa iasita iyie nena baa aibalunye, imbalakinye kewan enkop.”" 
John7:5 Amu eitu doi eiruk ilalashera lenyena ninye. 
John7:6 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Eton eitu ebau enkata ai, kake ore te ntae keishiaa erishata pooki." 
John7:7 Meidim enkop aibayu intae, kake kaaiba nanu, amu kaishakenoki nchere kaarruok iasat enyena." 
John7:8 Elepa intae enchom osirua. Mailep nanu alo ele sirua amu eton eitu ebaya enkata ai.” 
John7:9 Ore pee eidip atiaki ninche nejia, nebik te Galilaya." 
John7:10 Ore eidipa lalashera lenyena aailepa aashom ilo sirua, neitoki sii ninye Yesu alo, neitu eitalio kewan, kake etiu anaa keisudori." 
John7:11 Neaku keing'oru ninye Lyahudi teine to sirua, nejo, “Koree ninye?”" 
John7:12 Netii olong'unyung'unyi atua esiamo te nkaraki ninye, ejo kulikae, “Oltung'ani supat,” nejo kulikae, “A'a keitapong'oo ninye olorere.”" 
John7:13 Kake ore eyia nejia metii hoo obo oimaki ninye aibalunye eure Lyahudi. 
John7:14 Ore pee eitorito ilo sirua, neilep Yesu ajing enkaji e Nkai, neiteru aiteng'enisho." 
John7:15 Neing'asia Ilyahudi nejo, “Kaji eiko pee eyiolo ele tung'ani isirat, neitu ae kata eiteng'eni?”" 
John7:16 Newaliki Yesu nejoki ninche, “Mme enaai enkiteng'enare naata, kake ene ilo laairriwua." 
John7:17 Te nenyorraa oltung'ani aas eyieunoto e Nkai, keyiolou ineina kiteng'enare, te naa ke Nkai eing'uaa aashu te naa ai te nkitoria ai makewan airo." 
John7:18 Ore oloiro makewan, enchunet enye makewan eing'oru; kake ore ilo oing'oru enchunet e ilo oirriwua, nesipa ninye, nemetii inemesipa atua ninye." 
John7:19 Keitu eisho intae Musa nkitanapat? Nemetii obo linyi oibung'ita nena kitanapat. Kainyoo pee king'oruru aar nanu?” 
John7:20 Newaliki olorere aajoki, “Aiata oloirirua, Aing'ae liking'oru aar?”" 
John7:21 Newaliki Yesu ajoki ninche, “Ataasa esiaai nabo ning'asiate pooki." 
John7:22 Te nkaraki ena pee eishoo intae Musa emuratare, (neme Musa doi eing'uaa kake lelo loo papa), nimuratata intae oltung'ani te nkolong e Sabato." 
John7:23 Amaa amu kemurati oltung'ani te nkolong e Sabato pee megili nkitanapat e Musa, oo pee kigorokinono intae nanu amu aitaa oltung'ani biyoto katukul te nkolong e Sabato?" 
John7:24 Eminguanare too naalioo, kake enguanare te nkiguana oo sipat.”" 
John7:25 Nejo kulikae le Yerusalem, “Aime ele tung'ani doi eing'oru enkitoria aar metua?" 
John7:26 Kake eng'ura eiro aibalie, neitu ejoki ninche ae. Keidimayu sa metaa keyiolo ilooitoreisho aajo ele Kristo?" 
John7:27 Kake ore ele eikiyiolo eneing'uaa. Naa tenelioyu kenya ilo oji Kristo aibalayu nemeetae oloyiolo eneing'uaa ninye.” 
John7:28 Te nkaraki ina pee etabuaa Yesu te nkaji e Nkai eiteng'enisho ejo, “Eikiyiololo nanu niyiololo enaing'uaa. Neitu alotu te yieunoto ai makewan, kake ore ilo laairriwua ninye osipa, naa ninye miyiololo." 
John7:29 Kayiolo nanu ninye, amu ninye aing'uaa naa ninye laairriwua.”" 
John7:30 Neing'oru ninche eneiko pee eibung ninye, kake metii obo oiteleikia enkaina ninye, amu eton eitu ebau esaa enye." 
John7:31 Neiruk ilkumok ninye tiatua olorere, nejo, “Amaa te nelotu Kristo, keas inkitoduaat kumok naalang inaasita ele tung'ani?”" 
John7:32 Nening Ilfarisayo eimaki esiamo nena baa enyena, neirriwaa lapolosak kituaak o Lfarisayo larripok meshomo aaibung ninye." 
John7:33 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Eng'or enkiti kata eton atii tenebo intae, pee aitoki alo enetii ilo laairriwua." 
John7:34 Aikiyiookiki aaing'oru, kake mikitumutumu, ore enatii nimindimidimi aaetu.”" 
John7:35 Nejokino Lyahudi maate, “Kaji ejo pee elo, nimikitumie? Kejo pee elo enetii Lyahudi ooidapashakinote Ilyunani, nelo aiteng'en Ilyunani?" 
John7:36 Kalo rorei ele otejo, ‘Aikiyiookiki aaing'oru nimikitumutumu, ore enatii nimindimidimi aaetu?’ ”" 
John7:37 Ore te nkolong nabayie, naa ninye enkolong kitok e ilo sirua, neitashe Yesu nebuak ajo, “Te neeta oltung'ani enkure, inchoo elotu enatii aokisho." 
John7:38 Ore olaairuk nanu, anaa enajo ilkigerot. ‘Keyooki aarukunye nchorroi e nkare naishu to ltau lenye.’ ”" 
John7:39 Ore pee etejo Yesu nejia, Enkiyang'et eimaka natum lelo pooki ooiruk ninye, amu eton eitu ebau ina Kiyang'et ina kata, amu eton eitu eilepieki Yesu metaa kitok." 
John7:40 Ore pee ening ematua oo ltung'ana kulo rorei nejo, “Kesipa ilo oiboni ele.”" 
John7:41 Nejo kulikae, “Ele Kristo.” Nejo kulikae, “Ai Galilaya epukunye Kristo?" 
John7:42 Keitu ejo lkigerot eishoi e Daudi eimu Kristo, apukunye Betlehem, enkang natii apa Daudi?”" 
John7:43 Ore teina nejing empong'o atua esiamo te nkaraki Yesu. 
John7:44 Neyieu kulikae neibung ninye, kake metii oloitabaikia ninye enkaina." 
John7:45 Nepuonu ilarripok enetii lapolosak kituaak o Lfarisayo, nejokini ninche, “Kainyoo pee eitu iyauu ninye?”" 
John7:46 Newaliki larripok nejo, “Eitu aekata eiro oltung'ani anaa enairo ele tung'ani.”" 
John7:47 Newaliki Lfarisayo ilarripok aajoki, “Keitapong'oyioki sii ninche intae?" 
John7:48 Keetae too laitoriak anaa too Lfarisayo oloiruko ninye? 
John7:49 Kake ore ena siamo nemeyiolo nkitanapat naa kedia.” 
John7:50 Nejoki Nikodemo ninche, olapa taa otang'asa alotu enetii Yesu, laa obo le lelo Farisayo," 
John7:51 “Amaa kedung'oki nkitanapat ang oltung'ani enkiguana eton eitu eng'asi aainining neyiolouni enataasa?” 
John7:52 Newaliki aajoki ninye, “Aa Galilaya sii yie ing'uaa? Ing'urai tisipu ilkigerot, inchere meetae oloiboni opuku eing'uaa Galilaya.”" 
John7:53 Nelo pooki tung'ani enkaji enye. 
John8:1 Kake eshomo Yesu Oldoinyo loo Loirienito. 
John8:2 Ore enasirie neitoki Yesu ajing atua enkaji e Nkai, nepuonu ltung'ana pooki enetii ninye; neton neiteru aiteng'en ninche." 
John8:3 Nerikoki ninye lasirak o Lfarisayo enkitok nairrashaki eloloito. Neitasheyie ninye te mpolos oo ltung'ana. 
John8:4 Nejoki, “Lo Aiteng'enani, eirrashaki ena kitok eloloito." 
John8:5 Ore tiatua nkitanapat e Musa neitanapa iyiook mataar too soito nkituaak naatiu nejia; aijo iyie aa tialo ninye?” 
John8:6 Netejo ninche nji, aa entemata etem, pee etum aaitang'oro Yesu. Kake eirruge Yesu nesir enkop to lkimojino." 
John8:7 Ore pee ekurraki aaikilikuan nedumunye, nejoki ninche, “Enchoo eng'as olinyi lemeeta ng'ok, anang ninye to soit.”" 
John8:8 Neitoki aigil airrugo, asir enkop to lkimojino." 
John8:9 Ore pee ening ninche ina, neiteru aapuo moo obo, aiteru too lbotor lenye, neing'uari Yesu aa ninye ake, o enaduoo kitok eitashe te mpolos." 
John8:10 Nedumunye Yesu nejoki ninye, “Naa kitok, koree ninche? Aimeetae olikitudung'oko enkiguana?”" 
John8:11 Nejoki, “Metii Lo Kitok.” Nejoki Yesu, “Maaiguanare sii nanu. Shomo, ore ebaiki taata mintoki aas ing'ok.”" 
John8:12 Neitoki Yesu airorie Ilfarisayo nejoki, “Kara nanu ewang'an e nkop. Ore olaasuj nanu nemelo ai kata te naimin, kake ketum ewang'an e nkishui.”" 
John8:13 Nejoki Lfarisayo ninye, “Iyie oishakenoki kewan. Mesipa shakenisho ino.”" 
John8:14 Newaliki Yesu nejoki, “Te naa kaishakenoki duoo ninye kewan, kesipa shakenisho ai, amu kayiolo enaing'uaa nayiolo enalo; kake miyiololo intae enaing'uaa, aashu enalo." 
John8:15 Inguanarere intae to sesen; maiguanare nanu oltung'ani. 
John8:16 Kake te naiguanare, nesipa enkiguana ai, amu mme nanu ake, kake nanu o ilo laairriwua." 
John8:17 Etisiraki tiatua nkitanapat inyi nchere, kesipa shakenisho oo ltung'ana aare." 
John8:18 Kara nanu ilo olimu shakenisho enye makewan, naa kaaishakenoki nanu Papa laairriwua.”" 
John8:19 Nejoki taa ninche ninye, “Koree Papaai lino?” Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Mikiyiololo nanu nimiyiololo sii Papa te naa eikitayioloito nanu, naa anaata iyiololo sii ninye Papa.”" 
John8:20 Eiroro Yesu kulo rorei te wueji nepiki mpisai, eiteng'enisho te Nkaji e Nkai. Nemetii oltung'ani oibung'a ninye, amu eton eitu ebau esaa enye." 
John8:21 Neitoki Yesu ajoki ninche, “Kalo nanu, naa eiking'oruru intae, kake iyeye tiatua ing'ok inyi. Ore enalo mindimidimi aaetu.”" 
John8:22 Nejo Ilyahudi, “Kear kewan? Amu etejo, ‘Ore enalo nanu nimindimidimi aaetu’?”" 
John8:23 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Irara intae ile abori; nara nanu ole shumata; nirara intae ile na kop; nemara nanu ole na kop." 
John8:24 Ore teina atiaaka intae, iyeye tiatua ing'ok inyi amu tinimirukuruku nchere ‘Ara nanu’ niyeye tiatua ing'ok inyi.”" 
John8:25 Nejoki ninche ninye, “Aira iyie ng'ae?” Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Anaa ake ina natolikio intae te nkiterunoto." 
John8:26 Kaata mbaa kumok naimaki tialo intae, naiguanare; kake olaairriwua ninye osipa, naa inatoning'o te ninye, ninche ajoki enkop.”" 
John8:27 Neitu eyiolou ninche inchere Papa eimaki. 
John8:28 Nejoki Yesu ninche. “Tinilepiepie intae Enkerai e Tung'ani niyiolouu nchere ‘Kara nanu’, nemeeta nanu enaas te nkitoria ai makewan, kake kairo kuna baa pooki anaa enaatolikio Papa." 
John8:29 Ore olaairriwua netii te nebo nanu. Eitu aaing'uaa aa nanu ake, amu inaaitiship ninye oshi ake aas.”" 
John8:30 Ore ejoito kuna baa neiruk ilkumok ninye. 
John8:31 Neitoki Yesu ajoki lelo Yahudi ooiruko ninye, “Tinitonini to rorei lai nirara lkipaareta laainei oosipa;" 
John8:32 naa iyiolouu esipata; nelaku intae esipata.” 
John8:33 Newaliki ninche ninye aajoki, “Kira eishoi e Abraham; neitu ae kata kiaaku isinkan le likae tung'ani; kaji etiu pee ijo iyie, ‘Kelakuni intae?’ ”" 
John8:34 Newaliki Yesu ninche nejoki, “Esipa, esipa, ajoki intae, osinka loo ng'ok pooki ng'ae oas ing'ok." 
John8:35 Mebik osinka te nkaji o kenya kake kebik enkerai o kenya. 
John8:36 Te nelaku intae ina Kerai, neaku ilakunono tukul." 
John8:37 Kayiolo ajo irara eishoi e Abraham; kake king'oruru intae nanu aar, amu metii atua intae ororei lai." 
John8:38 Kalimu enatoduaa te Papa; niaasiasa intae enitoduakita papaai linyi.” 
John8:39 Newaliki ninche aajoki ninye, “Abraham papa lang.” Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Tenaa irara nkera e Abraham, anaata iasiasa nena naataasa Abraham;" 
John8:40 kake king'oruru taata intae aar matua oltung'ani otolikio intae esipata natoning'o te Nkai. Eitu eas Abraham ena. 
John8:41 Iasiasa intae enataasa papaai linyi.” Nejoki ninche ninye, “Mikitaluno; kiaata Papa obo, naa Enkai.”" 
John8:42 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Te naa Papaai linyi Enkai, anaata kinyorrinyorro, amu enetii Enkai aing'uaa, pee atii ene, Neitu alotu makewan, kake ninye laairriwua." 
John8:43 Kainyoo pee mining'ung'u intae enajo? Te nkaraki nimindimidimi aatoning ororei lai. 
John8:44 Irara le papaai linyi Sheitani, ore eyieunoto inyi naa easata oo ng'uarrat naaing'uaa papaai linyi. Olarani apa ake ninye te nkiterunoto, meitashe ninye te sipata amu metii esipata atua ninye. Te nejo ninye elejare, nejo te risioroto olkuaak lenye makewan; amu olalejani naa menye le lejare." 
John8:45 Kake ore nanu te nkaraki naa esipata airo, nimikirukuruku." 
John8:46 Kalo linyi laatoduaaka ng'ok? Amaa te nairo esipata kainyoo pee mikirukuruku intae nanu? 
John8:47 Ore ilo le Nkai nening irorei le Nkai. Ore te nkaraki ena nimining'ining'i intae amu mirara le Nkai.” 
John8:48 Newaliki Lyahudi aajoki Yesu, “Keitu kisip ti nikijo aira Osamariai naa iata oloirirua?”" 
John8:49 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Maata nanu oloirirua, kake Papa ayanyit, nikioruru intae enkanyit ai." 
John8:50 Maing'oru nanu enkitoo ai makewan; kake ketii oloing'oru naa ninye oladung'oni le nkiguana. 
John8:51 Esipa, esipa, ajoki intae, te neibung oltung'ani ororei lai nemedol ai kata keeya.”" 
John8:52 Nejoki Ilyahudi ninye, “Kitisiputua taata aajo iata oloirirua. Etua Abraham naa nejia sii etiu iloibonok le Nkai, eji nijo iyie, ‘Ore pooki ng'ae oibung ororei lai meishamisham ai kata keeya?’" 
John8:53 Ai iyie olkitok alang papa lang Abraham, otua? Netuata sii loibonok le Nkai. Aing'ae doi iyie ijo aitaa kewan?”" 
John8:54 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Te naa ainanu oitaa kewan kitok, neme toki enkitoo ai. Papa doi laaitaa kitok ilo lijojo intae, Enkai ang ninye." 
John8:55 Kake miyiololo doi intae ninye, nayiolo nanu ninye; naa te najo nanu mayiolo ninye, naaku olalejani anaa intae; kake kayiolo doi ninye nasuj ororei lenye." 
John8:56 Eting'ide papaai linyi Abraham pee edol enkolong e lotunoto ai; nedol ninye, neng'ida.”" 
John8:57 Nejoki Lyahudi ninye, “Eton eitu intabaya ilarin onom, paa nijo kitoduaa Abraham iyie?”" 
John8:58 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Esipa, esipa, ajoki intae, ore eton meetae Abraham, ‘Atii nanu.’ ”" 
John8:59 Nedumu ninche isoito pee ear, kake eisudori Yesu, nepuku te Nkaji e Nkai." 
John9:1 Ore eloito Yesu nedol oltung'ani otoiwuoki aa modooni. 
John9:2 Neikilikuan lkipaareta lenyena ninye aajoki, “Rabi, aing'ae otaasa eng'oki, kele tung'ani, anaa ilootoiutuo, pee etoiwuoki ninye aa modooni?”" 
John9:3 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Eitu eitarruoo ele tung'ani, anaa ilootoiutuo, kake nkiasin e Nkai eji pee eibalunyeki tiatua ninye." 
John9:4 Kenare nikias isiaaitin e ilo laairriwua eton aa dama; amu kelotu enkewarie, nemeidim oltung'ani aitayu esiaai." 
John9:5 Ore eton atii enkop, kara nanu ewang'an e nkop.”" 
John9:6 Ore pee ejo ilo rorei, nenotaki enkop, neipurjaki nkamulak inkulupuok; neyelie nkonyek e ilo modooni." 
John9:7 Nejoki, “Shomo sujai to lmoti le Siloam.” (Keji ina arna oirriwayioki). Neaku eshomo aisujaa neshukunye etodolishe." 
John9:8 Neaku, ore ile latia, o lelo ootoduaa apa ele tung'ani aa olaomononi, nejo. “Aimme ele oshi oton aomonisho?”" 
John9:9 Nejo kulikae, “Ninye.” Nejo kulikae, “Mme ninye, kake kenyaanyukie ninye.” Nejo ninye openy. “Nanu ilo.”" 
John9:10 Nejoki ninche ninye. “Kaji kinkunaki pee etabolote nkonyek inono?” 
John9:11 Newaliki ajoki, “Oltung'ani oji Yesu oipurja esarng'ab, naaelie nkonyek aainei, naajoki, ‘Shomo Olmoti le Siloam isujai.’ Nalo aisujaa nadolishoyu.”" 
John9:12 Nejoki ninche, “Kaji etii?” Nejoki, “Mayiolo nanu.”" 
John9:13 Nerik ninche ilo modooni enetii Ilfarisayo. 
John9:14 Naa enkolong e Sabato ina olong pee eipurj Yesu esarng'ab abol inkonyek enyena. 
John9:15 Neitoki sii Lfarisayo aaikilikuan ninye eneikuna pee etodolishe. Nejoki ninche, “Esarng'ab aaelie nkonyek aainei, naisuj, nadolishoyu.”" 
John9:16 Nejo kulikae loo Lfarisayo, “Mme Nkai eing'uaa ele tung'ani, amu meibung nkitanapat enkolong e Sabato.” Nejo kulikae, “Keidim oltung'ani arruoni ataasa inaaing'asiaisho naaijo kuna?” Nejing empong'o atua ninche." 
John9:17 Neaku etiakita ninche ilo tung'ani modooni, “Aijo iyie aa ninye, amu kitabolo naa nkonyek?” Nejo, “Oloiboni ninye.”" 
John9:18 Kake ore ake etiu nejia, eitu eiruk Ilyahudi mbaa enyena nchere modooni apa netodolishe, ometaba anaa neipot intoiwuo eilo tung'ani otodolishe," 
John9:19 neikilikuan ninche aajoki, “Kele olayioni linyi litejo apa etoiwuoki aa modooni? Kaji etiu taata pee edolisho?”" 
John9:20 Newaliki intoiwuo enyena aajoki. “Kiyiolo aajo olayioni lang, netoiwuoki apa aa modooni;" 
John9:21 kake mikiyiolo eneikuna pee etodolishe taata, nimikiyiolo olotabolo nkonyek enyena. Ai botor doi, enkilikuana ninye; kelimu mbaa enyena makewan.”" 
John9:22 Etejo intoiwuo ena te nkaraki naure Ilyahudi; amu eidipa Lyahudi aatoning'okinoto nchere, “Ore ake oltung'ani oibalie ajo ninye Kristo, nearari aaipang'ie te nkaji e ntumo." 
John9:23 Neaku ina pee etejo intoiwuo, ‘Ai botor doi, enkilikuana ninye,’ ”" 
John9:24 Neitoki taa aaipot ene are ilo tung'ani ora apa modooni, nejoki ninye, “Inchoo Enkai enkisisa. Kiyiolo iyiook aajo olarruoni ele tung'ani.”" 
John9:25 Newaliki ninye ajoki, “Te naa kolarruoni mayiolo nanu; nabo ake ayiolo, inchere kara apa modooni nadolisho taata.”" 
John9:26 Neitoki ninche aajoki, “Kaji kinkuna? Kaji eikuna pee kitabolo nkonyek inono?”" 
John9:27 Newaliki ajoki ninche, “Aidipa duoo atoliki intae, neitu ining'ining'i. Kaji etiu pee iyieuu nintokiki ake aaning? Iyieuu sii intae niakuku lkipaareta lenyena?”" 
John9:28 Nemor ninche ninye nejoki, “Ira iyie oloiteng'eni lenye, kake kira iyiook lkipaareta le Musa." 
John9:29 Kiyiolo iyiook aajo eirorie Enkai Musa, kake ore ele, mikiyiolo eneing'uaa.”" 
John9:30 Newaliki ilo tung'ani ninche ajoki, “Kainyoo, ene nking'asia eji miyiololo eneing'uaa ninye kake etabolo nkonyek aainei!" 
John9:31 Kiyiolo aajo mening Enkai ilaing'okok; kake ore oloserem Enkai neas enayieu ninye, kening Enkai ninye." 
John9:32 Eitu aekata ening'i olotabolo nkonyek o ltung'ani oini aa modooni. 
John9:33 Te neme Enkai eing'uaa ele tung'ani meidim ataasa toki.” 
John9:34 Newaliki ninche ninye aajoki, “Aa keiyie olotu aiteng'en iyiook oltung'ani otoikioki atua elulung'ata oo ng'ok?” Nearaa ninche ninye aaipang'ie." 
John9:35 Nening Yesu nchere etaaraitie Lfarisayo olapa tung'ani oishiuo emodoo aaipang'ie; ore pee elo netum nejoki ninye, “Iruko iyie Enkerai e Tung'ani?”" 
John9:36 Newaliki ajoki, “Lo Kitok, ai ng'ae ilo pee atum airuko ninye?”" 
John9:37 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Itoduaa iyie, naa ninye ele likirorie.”" 
John9:38 Nejo ninye, “Olaitoriani, airuko,” neserem ninye." 
John9:39 Nejo Yesu, “Te nkaraki enkiguana pee aewuo nanu enkop, pee edolishoyu lelo lemedolisho, neaku modook iloodolisho.”" 
John9:40 Nening ele rorei kulikae Farisayo ooboitare nejo, “Eikira sii iyiook modook?”" 
John9:41 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Te naa naaji irara modook anaata miatata eng'oki Ore enatiu, ijojo, ‘Kidolisho;’ nebik enkitarruorroto inyi.”" 
John10:1 “Esipa esipa, ajoki intae, ore ilo lemeimu kishomi ejing emuatata, kake dikae ekedu aimu, olapurroni naa olaisimani," 
John10:2 kake ore ilo oimu kishomi ninye olchekut loo nkerra. 
John10:3 Naa ninye ebolu olarriponi; nening nkerra oltoilo lenye; neipot inkerra enyena too nkarn enye nerik auluo. 
John10:4 Ore pee eidip aipang'ie nkerra enyena pooki nerik ninche, nesuj inkerra ninye; amu keyiolo oltoilo lenye." 
John10:5 Mesuj olomoni, kake keituria amu meyiolo oltoilo lo lomoni.”" 
John10:6 Etolikio Yesu ninche ena kitanyaanyukoto, kake eitu eyiolou ninche enatiaaka." 
John10:7 Neitoki Yesu ajoki ninche nchere, “Esipa esipa, ajoki intae, kara nanu kishomi oo nkerra." 
John10:8 Ore pooki ooiturukutuo te dukuya nanu naa lapurrok o laisimak, kake eitu ening inkerra ninche." 
John10:9 Kara nanu enkishomi; ore olaaimu nanu keitajeuni, nejing atua nepuku netum endaata." 
John10:10 Melotu olapurroni mme kelotu apurroo neiyieng neitarruoo. Aewuo nanu pee etum aanoto enkishui, netum te nkiputakinoto." 
John10:11 Kara nanu olchekut supat. Keitayu olchekut supat enkishui enye te nkaraki nkerra. 
John10:12 Ore olchekut oigero, leme olopeny inkerra, kedolu osuyiani elotu, neing'uaa nkerra aisik, neibung osuyiani ninche, neisardaikie." 
John10:13 Amu ore olchekut oigeroki nemeetayie tipat inkerra. 
John10:14 Kara nanu olchekut supat; nayiolo inaainei, naayiolo sii nanu inaainei," 
John10:15 anaa enaayiolo Papa, nayiolo sii nanu Papa; naa kaitayu nanu enkishui ai te nkaraki nkerra." 
John10:16 Naata sii kulie kerra, neme inena muatata. Meeta kata nemareu sii ninche naa kening oltoilo lai, naa keaku eluaata nabo, o lchekut obo." 
John10:17 Te nkaraki ena pee aanyor Papa, amu kaitayu enkishui ai, pee aitoki atum." 
John10:18 Meetae olaaoru enkishui ai, kake kaitayu openy te yieunoto ai. Kaata enkidimata pee aitayu, naata enkidimata naitoki ang'amunye. Te Papa atang'amua ena kitanapata.”" 
John10:19 Neitoki ake ajing eoro atua Ilyahudi te nkaraki kulo rorei. 
John10:20 Nejo ilkumok lenye, “Keeta oloirirua netijing'aki. Oo pee inining'ining'i?”" 
John10:21 Nejo kulikae, “Mme lo loata oloirirua kulo rorei. Keidim oloirirua atabolo inkonyek oo lmodook?”" 
John10:22 Neetae apa osirua le Nkitisinyata te Yerusalem, naa te nkata e nkirobi;" 
John10:23 nemanaa Yesu te nkaji e Nkai, to lgoriet le Solomon." 
John10:24 Neman Ilyahudi ninye nejoki, “O anu kenya ing'ashing'ashieshie iyiook? Te naa iyie Kristo toliki iyiook imbalakinye.”" 
John10:25 Newaliki Yesu ninche nejoki, “Atolikio intae neitu irukuruku; isiaaitin naas te nkarna e Papa, kuna naaishakenoki nanu;" 
John10:26 kake mirukuruku intae, amu mirara loo nkerra aainei, anaa enatiaaka intae." 
John10:27 Kening inkerra aainei oltoilo lai, nayiolo ninche, naa kaasuj ninche," 
John10:28 naa kaisho ninche enkishui nemeish, nemeimin ninche ntarasi, nemetii olaaidim aikonyarie ninche aitung'uaa enkaina ai." 
John10:29 Ore Papa laaishoo nanu ninche naa eikitok te pooki, nemetii hoo oloidim aikonyai te nkaina e Papa." 
John10:30 Kira nabo nanu o Papa.” 
John10:31 Neitoki Ilyahudi aadumu soito aanang ninye. 
John10:32 Newaliki Yesu ajoki ninche. “Aitoduaa intae isiaaitin kumok naaing'uaa Papa lai. Kaa nabo te kuna siaaitin kinang'ieng'ie nanu too soito?” 
John10:33 Newaliki Lyahudi aajoki, “Mikinang iyie too soito te siaai supat, kake te nkaraki nitamoro Enkai, o te nkaraki nintaa iyie kewan Enkai, nira oltung'ani.”" 
John10:34 Newaliki Yesu nejoki, “Aimesira tiatua Nkitanapat inyi nchere, ‘Atejo irara nkaitin?’" 
John10:35 Amaa te netejo Enkai ninche nkaitin, lelo ootabaikia ororei le Nkai, nemeidimi aaiwuang'ie ilkigerot," 
John10:36 nijokiki intae oloitisinyua Papa, neirriu enkop, ‘Itamoro Enkai,’ Te nkaraki natejo, ‘Kara nanu Enkerai e Nkai?’" 
John10:37 Te nemaas isiaaitin e Papa, emikiruk;" 
John10:38 kake te naas ninche, ore hoo ti nimikirukuruku nanu, eruko nena siaaitin, pee imusoso niyiolouu aajo ketii Papa atua nanu natii nanu atua Papa.”" 
John10:39 Neitoki ake aaing'oru eneibung'ie Yesu; kake etuluarie ninye ninche. 
John10:40 Neitoki Yesu alo lido kekun le Yordan ewueji neibatisishore apa Yohana te nkiterunoto; neton teine. 
John10:41 Nepuo ilkumok enetii ninye; nejo, “Eitu eas Yohana olmonekie kake ore pooki natejo Yohana eimaki ele tung'ani naa kesipa.”" 
John10:42 Neiruk iltung'ana kumok ninye teine. 
John11:1 Etii apa oltung'ani obo omuoi, oji Lasaro le Betania, le nkang oo Mariamu enkanashe Marisa." 
John11:2 Enapa Mariamu naelie Olaitoriani eilata narropil nejut nkejek too lpapit lenyena, ninye emuoi olalashe lenye Lasaro." 
John11:3 Neirriwaki taa nkanashera Lasaro Yesu olkilikuai nejoki, “Lo Kitok, kemuoi oloshi linyor.”" 
John11:4 Ore pee ening Yesu ina nejo, “Mme ene keeya ena muoyian, kake ene nkitoo e Nkai, paa ore teina neitaae kitok Enkerai e Nkai.”" 
John11:5 Kenyor apa Yesu Marisa o enkanashe o Lasaro. 
John11:6 Ore pee ening inchere kemuoi Lasaro, nebik nkolong'i are teine netii;" 
John11:7 ore pee eidipayu nena, nejoki ninye lkipaareta lenyena, “Enyoito manyaai Yudea.”" 
John11:8 Nejoki lkipaareta lenyena, “Rabi king'oru det Ilyahudi aar too soito; nintoki ake aito ine?”" 
John11:9 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Ai mera saai e ndama tomon o are? Ore te nelo oltung'ani dama nemerrorro, amu kedol ewang'an ena kop." 
John11:10 Kake te nelo oltung'ani kewarie nerrorro amu metii ewang'an atua ninye.” 
John11:11 Ore pee eidip Yesu atejo kuna baa, neitoki ajoki ninche, “Eirure olchore lang Lasaro; kake kalo pee alo ainyeyie ninye.”" 
John11:12 Nejoki lkipaareta lenyena, “Lo Kitok, te naa keirure ninye, keishiu.”" 
John11:13 Naa ore enaimaka Yesu naa keeya enye. Kake nejo ninche enkirura oo njio eimaka. 
John11:14 Neliki taa Yesu ninche aibalakinye nejoki, “Etua Lasaro," 
John11:15 nang'ida nanu te nkaraki intae inchere matii ine, pee itumutumu aairuko. Kake enyoito emaape enetii ninye.”" 
John11:16 Nejoki Tomas oji Olmaoi lkulikae ooiteng'eni, “Emaape sii yiook pee kiye te nebo ninye.”" 
John11:17 Ore pee elotu Yesu nenyorriki etobiko Lasaro te nkurare nkolong'i ong'uan. 
John11:18 Naa ketaaniki Betania Yerusalem, ewueji naa keidim ataa nkilomitani uni." 
John11:19 Neetuo ltung'ana kumok loo Lyahudi enetii Marisa o Mariamu aaitigir te nkaraki ilo alashe lenye. 
John11:20 Ore pee ening Marisa nchere kelotu Yesu nelo anang'are; kake etotona Mariamu ti aji. 
John11:21 Nejoki taa Marisa Yesu, “Lo Kitok, te naa itii apa ene anaata eitu eye olalashe lai." 
John11:22 Kake ore sii o taata, kayiolo ajo ore embae pooki niomonu te Nkai, aikincho iyie.”" 
John11:23 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Kepiu olalashe lino aitoki.”" 
John11:24 Nejoki Marisa, “Kayiolo ajo keitoki apiu te mpiunoto e nkiting'oto.”" 
John11:25 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Kara nanu empiunoto nara enkishui. Ore ilo laairuk nanu ore ninye te neye keitoki ake aishu;" 
John11:26 ore pooki oishu laairuk nanu nemeye ntarasi. Iruko iyie kuna?” 
John11:27 Nejoki, “Ee Olaitoriani, airuko nchere ira Kristo, Enkerai e Nkai nalotu enkop.”" 
John11:28 Ore pee eidip Marisa atejo nejia, nelo arojaa enkanashe enye Mariamu, arik enkilepata nejoki, “Eewuo Olaiteng'enani, nikimpotito.”" 
John11:29 Ore pee ening Mariamu ina neinyototo asioki nelo enetii. 
John11:30 Neton eitu ejing Yesu ina ang kake eton etii enaduoo wueji netii pee enang'are Marisa. 
John11:31 Ore Ilyahudi ootii aji te nebo ninye aaitigir, pee edol Mariamu einyototo asioki neipang, nesuj ejo, “Enkurare elo aishir teine.”" 
John11:32 Ore pee elotu Mariamu enetii Yesu nedol nebatata too nkejek enyena nejoki, “Lo Kitok, te naa itii apa ene anaata eitu eye olalashe lai.”" 
John11:33 Ore pee edol Yesu ninye eishir, neishir sii Lyahudi ooiriamunore, nenyamalu to ltau lenye netum osina," 
John11:34 nejo, “Ai ti aji irragie?” Nejoki ninche, “Lo Kitok, wou toduaa.”" 
John11:35 Neishir Yesu. 
John11:36 Nejo taa Lyahudi, “Eng'ura eneba enyorrata nanyor ninye!”" 
John11:37 Kake etejo kulikae lenye, “Ai meidim apa ninye, olotabolo nkonyek o lapa tung'ani modooni ataasa ai pee meye ele tung'ani?”" 
John11:38 Neitoki Yesu aisinanuo, nebaiki enkurare. Enkapune ina kurare, neigarakino to osoit." 
John11:39 Nejo Yesu, “Ewuang'ie osoit.” Ore Marisa, enkanashe ilo otua, nejoki ninye, “Lo Kitok, etong'ua taata, amu nkolong'i ong'uan anaa neye.”" 
John11:40 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Keitu duoo aajoki ti niruk iyie nidol enkitoo e Nkai?”" 
John11:41 Neaku, eiwuang'ie ninche osoit te nkurare; nedumu Yesu nkonyek aing'or shumata nejo, “Papa aaisho enashe amu kitoning'o." 
John11:42 Nayiolo nanu makewan ajo kining oshi ake; kake te nkaraki ele orere laamanita pee atejo nji, pee etum aairuko nchere iyie likirriwua.”" 
John11:43 Ore pee eidip atejo nejia, nebuak ninye to ltoilo sapuk ajo, “Lasaro tupuku boo.”" 
John11:44 Nepuku ilo apa otua, neena nkaik o nkejek too nkarash naanukarieki ltung'ana; neena enkomom enye te nkarasha. Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Entalak ninchosho ninye meshomo.”" 
John11:45 Ore lkumok loo Lyahudi, ooetuo tenebo Mariamu, pee edol kuna baa naataasa Yesu, neiruk ninye," 
John11:46 kake eshomo kulikae enetii Lfarisayo neliki enataasa Yesu. 
John11:47 Neaku eipotutuo ilapolosak kituaak o Lfarisayo, entumo e Nkiguana nejo, “Kaa kiaas iyiook? Amu easita ele tung'ani ilmonek kumok." 
John11:48 Tinikipalaa iyiook ninye etiu nji, neiruk pooki ninye, neyooki Iroma aapuonu aaidaikie ene wueji ang sinyati neidaikie olorere lang.”" 
John11:49 Ore Kaiafas, obo lenye, laa ninye Olapolosani Kitok te ilo ari nejoki ninche, “Miyiololo intae toki" 
John11:50 nimidamishosho aajo keikash te yiook te nenang oltung'ani obo olosho pee meidaaya olorere olulung'a.” 
John11:51 Kake eitu ejo ninye nena te ngolon enye makewan; kake te nkaraki nara ninye Olapolosani Kitok te ilo ari nelimu ajo kenang Yesu ilo orere," 
John11:52 neme ilo orere ake kake keji sii pee eiturrurru nkera e Nkai pooki naaisardaka aitaa nabo. 
John11:53 Neaku ore ebaiki ina olong nemut enkiguana pee ear Yesu. 
John11:54 Ore te nkaraki ina neitu eitoki Yesu aibalie kewan aloolo tiatua Lyahudi, kake eshomo enkalo e nkop nanyikita ong'ata, nelo enkanasa naji Efraim, nebik teine te nebo lkipaareta lenyena." 
John11:55 Netinyikua Pasaka oo Lyahudi, neilep ilkumok aapuo Yerusalem eing'uaa ina kop eton eitu ebau Pasaka, pee epuo aaipok ate." 
John11:56 Neing'oru Yesu, ejokino maate eitashe te Nkaji e Enkai, “Aijojo aa? Eji melotu tukul ele sirua?”" 
John11:57 Ore lapolosak kituaak o Lfarisayo neitanapisho paa tenetii oltung'ani oyiolo enetii, neitayiolo ninche, pee etum aaibung'a ninye." 
John12:1 Ore eng'or inkolong'i ile pee ebau Pasaka, nelotu Yesu Betania, enetii Lasaro, ilo oitopiwuo Yesu aitung'uaa keeya." 
John12:2 Neitobiraki ninche ninye endaa e teipa teine neisiaaisho Marisa; ore Lasaro naa obo le lelo ootonita aanya endaa te nebo o Yesu. 
John12:3 Neitayu taa Mariamu oltoo le ilata narropil e nardo, nagol enkinyang'a, neyelie nkejek e Yesu, nejut nkejek too lpapit lenyena. Neiput enkaji erropili e ina ilata." 
John12:4 Nejo Yudas Iskariot, obo loo lkipaareta lenyena, (ilo oyooki akaldaa)" 
John12:5 “Oo pee eitu emiri ena ilata narropil aainosie indinari iip uni neishori laisinak.” 
John12:6 Ore pee etejo nejia, mme te nkaraki naing'urrie laisinak, kake te nkaraki naa olapurroni, naa ore amu ninye apa onap olbene loo mpisai, neaku keya nena naapiki ine." 
John12:7 Nejo Yesu, “Tapala; aaitobiraka ena te nkaraki enkolong enukaroto ai;" 
John12:8 amu ore laisinak iatata anaa ake te nebo intae, kake mikiaata nanu anaake.”" 
John12:9 Ore pee eyiolou esiamo kitok oo Lyahudi aajo etii ninye ine nepuonu kake mme te nkaraki Yesu ake, kake eetuo sii aadol Lasaro, oitopiwuo Yesu aitung'uaa keeya." 
John12:10 Neiguanate lapolosak kituaak eyieu near sii Lasaro metua. 
John12:11 Amu ore te nkaraki ninye netoorori Ilyahudi kumok aairuk Yesu.
