John12:12 Ore te nkolong natusujua, nening ina siamo kitok naewuo osirua nchere kelotu Yesu Yerusalem." 
John12:13 Nedumu lng'osil loo ltuka nepuo aanang'are ninye. Nebuakita aajo, “Hosana! Emayiana ilo olotu te nkarna o Laitoriani. Laa Olaiguanani loo Siraeli!”" 
John12:14 Ore pee etum Yesu olkurrarru netonie; anaa enatisiraki aajo," 
John12:15 “Miureisho, Yerusalem! Kelotu olaiguanani lino, ekedito olkurrarru le sikiria.”" 
John12:16 Neitu eyiolou lkipaareta lenyena kuna baa te dukuya, kake ore pee eidipi aaitaa Yesu kitok, nedamu ninche ina kata nchere etisiraki kuna baa te nkaraki ninye, naa kuna eitaasa ninche ninye." 
John12:17 Ore ina siamo naboitare apa Yesu pee eipot Lasaro metung'uai enkurare aitopiu aitung'uaa ilootuata, neishakenoitie ina." 
John12:18 Te nkaraki ina sii pee eshomo ina siamo aanang'are amu etoning'o aajo etaasa ele monekie. 
John12:19 Nejokino Lfarisayo maate, “Idolitata taa aajo mitumutumu toki. Eng'ura ajo eirukurukore enkop pooki ninye.”" 
John12:20 Naa Ilyunani kulikae ooetuo Yerusalem aaseremisho te ilo sirua. 
John12:21 Nepuonu lelo enetii Filipo le Betsaida te Galilaya, neikilikuan ninye nejoki, “Lo Kitok, ekiiyieu nikidol Yesu.”" 
John12:22 Nelotu Filipo neliki Andrea; nepuonu Andrea o Filipo neliki Yesu. 
John12:23 Newaliki Yesu ninche nejoki, “Etabawua esaa pee eitaae kitok Enkerai e Tung'ani." 
John12:24 Kesipa, kesipa, ajoki intae, te neitu edoiki enkantererai e nkano enkop neye, nebik aa ninye ake openy; kake te neye, neiu ilng'anayio kumok." 
John12:25 Ore olonyor enkishui enye neiminie, ore oloibayu enkishui enye te nkop nerrip tiatua enkishui nemeish." 
John12:26 Te naaisiaai oltung'ani nanu, inchoo aairukurukore, ore enatii nanu neaku ine etii sii olaisiaayiani lai. Ore pooki ng'ae laaisiaai, neyanyitu Papa ninye.”" 
John12:27 “Aatanyamala oltau lai taata, paa kaa naa ajo? Kajo, ‘Papa intajeuoki te na saa?’ Kake te nkaraki ena bae e mion pee atabaikia ena saa." 
John12:28 Papa, intaa kitok enkarna ino.” Nelotu oltoilo oing'uaa Keper, “Kaitaa kitok, naa kaigil aitaa kitok.”" 
John12:29 Ore ina siamo naitashe teine, nening nejo etadara. Nejo kulikae, “Olmalaika oirorie ninye.”" 
John12:30 Newaliki Yesu nejo, “Mme te nkaraki nanu pee eewuo ele toilo, kake te nkaraki intae." 
John12:31 Taata enkiguana e na kop; taata earari olaitoriani le na kop aaitung'uaa. 
John12:32 Te naailepieki nanu te nkop nayietu iltung'ana pooki enatii.” 
John12:33 Netejo ninye ena eutu ajo kaa keeya eye ninye. 
John12:34 Newaliki esiamo aajoki, “Kitoning'o too nkitanapat nchere kebik Kristo ntarasi; oo naa pee ijo iyie meeta nchere pee meilepieki Enkerai e Tung'ani. Ai ng'ae doi ena Kerai e Tung'ani?”" 
John12:35 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Enkiti kata eton etii ena wang'an atua intae. Enchom eton iatata ina wang'an, pee meidimu intae enaimin, ore ilo olo te naimin nemeyiolo enelo." 
John12:36 Ore eton iatata ewang'an, eruko ina wang'an, pee itumutumu aataa nkera e wang'an.” Ore pee ejo Yesu kuna baa nelo aisudori pee medol ninche." 
John12:37 Ore hoo netaasa Yesu ilmonek kumok te dukuya ninche eitu ake eiruk ninche ninye," 
John12:38 pee eitabari ororei lo loiboni le Nkai Isaya otejo, “Olaitoriani aing'ae oiruko elikioroto ang? Naa aing'ae etabolokoki engolon e Nkai?”" 
John12:39 Ina pee etalaikinote ninche aairuko amu enyaaka sii Isaya ajo," 
John12:40 “Eitamodoo Enkai nkonyek enye, neitagol iltauja lenye, pee medol ake too nkonyek enye, neyiolou too ltauja lenye, neibelekenya, pee aishiunye.”" 
John12:41 Netejo Isaya kuna baa amu etoduaa enkitoo e Kristo nelimu mbaa enyena. 
John12:42 Kake ore etiu nejia, eiruko ilkumok loo lkituaak, kake ore te nkaraki Ilfarisayo, eitu eibalunye pee merishieki enkaji e ntumo;" 
John12:43 amu etonyorra enkisisa oo ltung'ana aaitalang enkisisa e Nkai. 
John12:44 Nebuak Yesu ajo, “Ore olaairuk nanu mme nanu eiruk kake lido laairriwua eiruko." 
John12:45 Ore olaaing'or nanu netoduaa lido laairriwua. 
John12:46 Aewuo nanu pee aaku ewang'an e nkop paa ore pooki laairuk nanu nemeton tiatua enaimin. 
John12:47 Te nening oltung'ani irorei laainei nemeibung nemaiguanare nanu ninye, amu eitu alotu pee aiguanare enkop, kake pee aitajeu enkop." 
John12:48 Ore ilo laany nanu, nemeng'amu irorei laainei, neeta oloiguanare. Ilo rorei lairoro oiguanare ninye te nkolong e nkiting'oto;" 
John12:49 amu eitu airo nanu makewan; kake Papa laairriwua, ninye openy laaishoo enkitanapata e nena najo o nena nalimu." 
John12:50 Nayiolo nanu nchere ore enkitanapata enye naa puaan oo ntarasi; metaa ore nena najo nanu, naa inaatiaaka Papa pee alimu.”" 
John13:1 Ore eton eng'or enkolong osirua oji ole Pasaka, etayiolo Yesu ajo etabawua esaa enye nalotie aing'uaa ena kop, alo enetii Papa. Netonyorra lelo lenyena ootii enkop, netonyorra ninche metabaiki enkiting'oto." 
John13:2 Ore einosita endaa, neidipa oloirirua atipika oltau le Yudas Iskariot, enkerai e Simon endamunoto nchere pee ekaldaa Yesu." 
John13:3 Neyiolou Yesu ajo eishoo Papa engolon e pooki toki, neyiolo ajo enetii Enkai eing'uaa naa enetii Enkai eito." 
John13:4 Neinyototo aing'uaa endaa, neirragie nkilani enyena, nedumu enkarasha arreten kewan." 
John13:5 Nebukoki enkare embeshen neiteru aisuj inkejek oo lkipaareta nejut te nkarasha narretenare. 
John13:6 Nelotu enetii Simon Petero. Nejoki ninye, “Lo Kitok, aa inkejek aainei intuku?”" 
John13:7 Neng'amaa Yesu ajoki ninye, “Ore enaasita nimiyiolo iyie taata kake iyiooki ayiolou te siadi.”" 
John13:8 Nejoki Petero ninye, “Mikintuku nkejek aainei ai kata!” Newaliki Yesu ajoki ninye, “Te neitu aaisuj iyie, nimira ole nkalo ai.”" 
John13:9 Nejoki Simon Petero ninye, “Lo Kitok, mme naa nkejek aainei ake, kake intukuoki nkaik o endukuya ai.”" 
John13:10 Newaliki Yesu ninye, “Ore oloidipa aitukuoyu meitoki ayieu enkitukuo meteleku nkejek enyena, tuan pooki wueji enye, nirara intae tuani, kake mme intae pooki;”" 
John13:11 amu keyiolo apa Yesu olokaldaa. Ina pee etejo, “Mirara tuani intae pooki.”" 
John13:12 Ore pee eidip aitukuo nkejek enye neishop nkilani neitoki aton, nejoki ninche, “Aiyiololo enaitaasa intae?" 
John13:13 Kijojo intae nanu, ‘Lo Aiteng'enani’, o ‘Lo Kitok’ nitisipa amu kara." 
John13:14 Amaa te naituku nanu intae Olkitok, nara Olaiteng'enani nkejek inyi, keishiaakino sii ninche intae neituku olikae olikae nkejek." 
John13:15 Aishoo intae enkitanyaanyukoto, paa ore ena naitaasa intae, nintaasasa sii intae," 
John13:16 Kesipa, kesipa, ajoki intae, mme kitok orrindik to lkitok lenye, neme kitok oloipaayioki to loipaayie." 
John13:17 Ti niyiololo kuna baa, imayianana ti niaasiasa." 
John13:18 Mme intae pooki aimaki. Kayiolo ilo lategelua; kake nchoo eitabari lkigerot oojo, ‘Ore ilooinosa emukate ai aatudumaka entutunyo enye aagilunore nanu.’" 
John13:19 Ore ebaiki taata, kaliki intae eton eitu eaku, pee te neaku, nirukuruku nchere, Kara nanu." 
John13:20 Kesipa, kesipa, ajoki intae, ore olong'amu pooki ng'ae lairriwaa, nanu eng'amu, ore olaang'amu naa ilo laairriwua eng'amu.”" 
John13:21 Ore pee eidip Yesu atejo nejia, nenyamalu to ltau nejo, “Kesipa, kesipa, ajoki intae, kaakaldaa obo linyi nanu.”" 
John13:22 Neing'urung'ura lkipaareta maate amu meyiolo aajo kalo eimaki. 
John13:23 Neirishakino olgoo le Yesu, obo loo lkipaareta onyor Yesu." 
John13:24 Neyuk Simon Petero te nkaina nejoki, “Nkilikuana tiaaki ai ng'ae eimaki.”" 
John13:25 Neirishakino olgoo le Yesu nejoki ninye, “Lo Kitok, aing'ae?”" 
John13:26 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Ilo laisho endung'oti e mukate aidipa aitadoiki embakuli.” Ore pee eidip aitadoiki, neitayu neisho Yudas Iskariot olayioni le Simon." 
John13:27 Ore pee eidip Yudas atang'amai endung'oti nejing Sheitani atua ninye. Neaku etiaaka Yesu ninye, “Tasioki taasa ina niyeu niaas.”" 
John13:28 Nemetii te lelo ooinosita endaa, oloyiolo ajo kainyoo pee etiaaka nejia." 
John13:29 Nejo kulikae, amu Yudas apa onap olbene loo mpisai, eji ketiaaka Yesu, “Inyang'u ntokitin nikiyieu to sirua,” aashu etiaaka meishoo ilaisinak toki." 
John13:30 Ore pee eng'amaa ninye endung'oti e mukate neipang nabo kata; naa eikewarie. 
John13:31 Ore pee eidip Yudas aipung'o boo nejo Yesu, “Eitaaki taa kitok Enkerai e Tung'ani, neitaaki Enkai kitok tiatua ninye." 
John13:32 Te neitaaki Enkai kitok tiatua ninye, keitaa sii ninye Enkai ninye kitok tiatua kewan, naa taata inji eitaa ninye kitok." 
John13:33 Nkera aainei, keng'or enkiti kata eton aboitare intae. Eikiyiookiki aaing'oru nanu, naa ore anaa enatiaaka Lyahudi, ‘Ore ine nalo mindimidimi aaetu,’ nejia sii ajoki intae taata." 
John13:34 Kaisho intae enkitanapata ng'ejuk, entonyorrata anaa enatonyorra nanu intae." 
John13:35 Teina eyiolou pooki ng'ae ajo, irara lkipaareta laainei, ti niatata enyorrata olikae o likae.”" 
John13:36 Nejoki Simon Petero ninye, “Lo Kitok, kaji ilo?” Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Ore enalo, nimikindim atusuju taata, kake eikisuju te siadi.”" 
John13:37 Nejoki Petero ninye, “Lo Kitok, Kainyoo pee maaidim atusuju taata? Ekaitayu enkishui ai te nkaraki iyie.”" 
John13:38 Newaliki Yesu nejoki ninye, “Eji intayu enkishui ino te nkaraki nanu? Kesipa, kesipa, aajoki, meru olchogoo eitu kimiki iyie katitin uni." 
John14:1 “Emincho enyamalu iltauja linyi, eruko Enkai nikirukuruku sii nanu." 
John14:2 Etii enkaji e Papa ilgilat kumok amaa, te neme nejia etiu kanaata atiaaka intae, kalo aitobiraki intae ewueji?" 
John14:3 Naa te nalo aitobiraki intae ewueji, naitoki ashukunye, naa karikoki intae kewan paa ore enatii nitii sii intae." 
John14:4 Ore enalo, iyiololo intae enkoitoi.”" 
John14:5 Nejoki Tomas ninye, “Lo Kitok mikiyiolo enilo; kaji kinko ti nikiyiolou enkoitoi?”" 
John14:6 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Kara nanu enkoitoi o esipata, o enkishui. Metii oltung'ani olotu enetii Papa mme nanu eimayie." 
John14:7 Te naa aikitayioloito nanu, anaata iyiololo sii Papa. Ore ebaiki taata iyiololo ninye; nitoduaa ninye.”" 
John14:8 Nejoki Filipo ninye, “Lo Kitok, intoduaa iyiook Papa, amu keidip iyiook.”" 
John14:9 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Kaboitare oshi intae ena kata pooki, neton ake mikiyiolo iyie Filipo? Ore olaatoduaa nanu netoduaa Papa; kainyoo pee itejo intoduaa iyiook Papa?" 
John14:10 Ai miruk inchere atii nanu atua Papa netii Papa atua nanu? Ore irorei laliki intae malimu te nkitoria ai makewan, kake Papa oton tiatua nanu oas isiaaitin enyena." 
John14:11 Irukoki inchere atii nanu atua Papa, netii Papa atua nanu: aashu naa kiruk te nkaraki oo siaaitin ate." 
John14:12 Kesipa, kesipa, aajoki, ore elde laairuk nanu, ore kuna siaaitin naas neas ninye, naa keas isapuki naalang kuna amu kalo enetii Papa;" 
John14:13 naa ore pooki niomonunu te nkarna ai, ina aas, pee etumi aaterrep Papa te nkaraki Enkerai." 
John14:14 Tinikiomonono toki te nkarna ai naa kaas ina. 
John14:15 “Te naa aikinyorrinyorro nanu naa imbung'ubung'u nkitanapat aainei," 
John14:16 naa kaomon nanu Papa, naa keisho intae likae Autaroni metobiko te nebo intae intarasi;" 
John14:17 laa Enkiyang'et e sipata, lemeng'amu enkop amu medol ninye nemeyiolo ninye. Iyiololo intae ninye amu keton tiatua intae, netii atua intae." 
John14:18 “Maing'uaa intae irara okishin; kalotu enitii. 
John14:19 Eng'or enkiti kata pee maaitoki adol ena kop, kake kidolitata intae nanu, ore amu kaishu ninchushu sii intae." 
John14:20 Ore teina olong niyiolouu intae aajo atii atua Papa, nitii intae atua nanu, natii nanu atua intae." 
John14:21 Ore oloata nkitanapat aainei, neibung ninche, ninye laanyor; naa ore olaanyor kenyorru Papa ninye, naa kanyorru nanu ninye. Naa kaibalakinye kewan ninye.”" 
John14:22 Nejoki Yudas ninye kake mme Iskariot, “Kaji inko lo Kitok, ti niboloki iyiook kewan, nimiboloki enkop?”" 
John14:23 Newaliki Yesu ajoki ninye, “Te naanyor oltung'ani nanu, keibung ororei lai, naa kenyorru Papa ninye, naa aikipuonu enetii ninye nikimany nebo o ninye." 
John14:24 Ore olemaanyor nanu, nemeibung irorei laainei, ore ele rorei lining'ining'i neme olalai kake ole Papa laairriwua." 
John14:25 “Atolikio intae kuna baa, eton aboitare intae." 
John14:26 Kake lido Autaroni, ora Enkiyang'et Sinyati oirriu Papa te nkarna ai, oitayiolo intae imbaa pooki neitadamu intae nena pooki natolikio intae." 
John14:27 Atung'eikia intae eseriani, aishoo intae eseriani ai. Aisho intae neme anaa enaishoru enkop. Emincho ltauja linyi enyamalu; emincho eureishoyu." 
John14:28 Itoning'o enatiaaka intae ajo, ‘Kalo, naa kashukokino intae.’ Te naa naaji aikinyorrinyorro anaata ing'idada nchere enetii Papa alo, amu kitok Papa te nanu." 
John14:29 Ore o taata, atolikio intae eton eitu eaku, pee te neaku nirukuruku." 
John14:30 Meekure aitoki airorie intae oleng, amu kelotu olkitok le na kop, kake meeta engolon te shumata nanu," 
John14:31 kake kaas nanu anaa enaaitanapa papa pee etum enkop atayiolo nchere kanyor nanu Papa. Enyoito emaape te ne. 
John15:1 “Kara nanu osabibu odede, naa Papa lai olaramatani." 
John15:2 Ore olng'osila tiatua nanu lemeiu Ilng'anayio, neiwuang'ie ninye, ore olng'osila pooki oiu ilng'anayio, neitobir metisidana, peyie eiu lng'anayio kumok." 
John15:3 Neitaaki taata intae sidain te nkaraki o rorei latiaaka intae. 
John15:4 Entotoni tiatua nanu anaa enaton tiatua intae. Ore anaa enemeidim olng'osila atoiu lng'anayio makewan, te nemetii olchani, mindimidimi sii intae tinimitonini tiatua nanu." 
John15:5 Nanu osabibu, intae ilng'osil. Ore oloton tiatua nanu, naton sii nanu tiatua ninye, neiu lng'anayio kumok, amu ore matii nanu nimindimidimi intae aataas toki." 
John15:6 Tenemeton oltung'ani tiatua nanu nenang'ari boo anaa olng'osila, netoyu, nesotu iltung'ana ninche nenang'akini enkima, metapejo." 
John15:7 Tinitonini intae tiatua nanu, neton ororei lai tiatua intae, entoomonu entoki pooki niyieuu naa keitaasi intae." 
John15:8 Teina errepi Papa, inchere iatata lng'anayio kumok, niakuku taa lkipaareta laainei." 
John15:9 Ore anaa enaatonyorra Papa, atonyorra sii nanu intae. Entotoni tiatua enyorrata ai." 
John15:10 Tinimbung'ubung'u intae nkitanapat aainei, naa aitonini tiatua enyorrata ai, anaa enaibung'a nkitanapat e Papa naton tiatua enyorrata enye." 
John15:11 Atolikio intae kuna baa pee etum eng'ida ai atotona tiatua intae, pee etum eng'ida inyi ataboreyia." 
John15:12 “Ena enkitanapata ai, inchere tonyorra olikae anaa enatonyorra nanu intae." 
John15:13 Meetae oloata enyorrata sapuk nalang ena, eji keitayu oltung'ani enkishui enye te nkaraki lchoreta lenyena." 
John15:14 Irara intae lchoreta laainei ti niaasiasa pooki ake bae naitanapa intae. 
John15:15 Maitoki ajo intae isinkan, amu meyiolo osinka enaasita olkitok lenye; kake atejo intae ilchoreta, amu atolikio intae pooki natoning'o te Papa." 
John15:16 Mme intae likitegelutua nanu kake kategelua intae naitanap intae enchom entoiu ilng'anayio, nebik ilng'anayio linyi, paa ore pooki niomonono Papa te nkarna ai, neisho intae." 
John15:17 Ena aitanap intae, inchere entonyorrata." 
John15:18 “Te neibayu intae enkop, entayiolo nchere nanu etang'asa aibayu eton eitu eibayu intae." 
John15:19 Te naa irara le nkop, naa anaata enyor enkop ilenyena; kake mirara ile nkop, amu ategelua intae aitung'uaa enkop, te nkaraki e ina pee eiba intae enkop." 
John15:20 Entadamu ilo rorei latiaaka intae, ‘Mme kitok osinka to lkitok lenye.’ Te naaisilisilo nanu keisilisil sii ninche intae; te neibung'a ororei lai, keibung sii ninye olinyi." 
John15:21 Kake keitaas intae kuna baa pooki te nkaraki enkarna ai, amu meyiolo ninche ilo laairriwua." 
John15:22 Te neitu apa alotu airorie ninche, anaata meeta eng'oki; kake meekure taata eeta eneitolonyaki te ng'oki enye." 
John15:23 Ore olaaiba nanu neiba sii ninye Papa. 
John15:24 Te neitu apa aas tiatua ninche isiaaitin neitu eas likae, anaata meeta eng'oki; ore taata netoduaa naaibayu nanu o Papa lai." 
John15:25 Kake ororei oigeroki tiatua nkitanapat enye eitabari, ‘Aaibaitie nanu pesho.’" 
John15:26 Ore te nelotu Olautaroni lairriwaki intae te netii Papa, Enkiyang'et e sipata olotu, eing'uaa enetii papa ninye laaishakenoki nanu," 
John15:27 nirara sii intae ilchakenini amu ore ebaiki enkiterunoto nikitaboitare intae nanu. 
John16:1 “Atolikio intae kuna baa pooki pee merrorri intae. 
John16:2 Kearaa intae aaipung'ie too nkajijik e ntumo: ee kelotu enkata naa kejo pooki ng'ae oar intae entuata ke Nkai eisiaita. 
John16:3 Neitaas intae kuna baa amu eitu eyiolou Enkai aashu nanu. 
John16:4 Kake atolikio intae kuna baa pee te nebau enkata enye, nidamumu ninche nchere atolikio intae. “Neitu aliki intae kuna te nkiterunoto, amu kaboitare apa intae." 
John16:5 Kake kalo taata enetii ilo laairriwua, kake metii obo linyi laaikilikuan ajoki, ‘Kaji ilo?’" 
John16:6 Kake ore amu atolikio intae kuna baa, eiputa iltauja linyi osina." 
John16:7 Kake esipata ena naliki intae, intae eret te nalo; amu te neitu alo nemelotu Olautaroni enitii; kake te nalo, nairriwaki intae ninye." 
John16:8 Ore te nelotu ninye neitayiolo enkop enetii eng'oki o esipata o enkiguana; 
John16:9 te mbae naipirta eng'oki amu maairuk nanu," 
John16:10 too mbaa naaipirta esipata amu kalo enetii Papa nimikintokiki aadol; 
John16:11 nitapong'ori sii too mbaa naipirta enkiguana amu eidipaki aiguanare olkitok lena kop. 
John16:12 “Eton aata mbaa kumok najoki intae, kake mindimaa taata;" 
John16:13 kake te nelotu ninye, ina Kiyang'et e sipata nerik intae atua esipata pooki, amu melotu airo anaa makewan, kake enaning pooki elimu, neliki intae imbaa naapuonu." 
John16:14 Naa ninye laaitaa nanu kitok; amu inaainei eng'amu neitodol intae. 
John16:15 Ore nena pooki naata Papa inaainei; ina pee atejo, inaainei; eng'amu neitodol intae." 
John16:16 “Ore te nkiti kata nimikintokiki aadol, ore ake sii te nkiti kata nikintokiki aadol.”" 
John16:17 Nejokino, ematua oo lkipaareta, “Kalo rorei ele ojoki Yesu iyiook, ‘Enkiti kata, nimikintokiki aadol ore ake sii te nkiti kata nikintokiki aadol?’ Nejo naa, Te nkaraki naa kalo enetii Papa?" 
John16:18 Nejo, “Kalo rorei ele ojo, ena ‘kiti kata?’ Mikiyiolo iyiook enajoito.”" 
John16:19 Neyiolou Yesu ajo keyieu neikilikuanishore, nejoki ninche, “Kena doi iyieuu nikinkilikuanana natejo, ‘Keng'or enkiti kata pee mikintokiki aadol, ore ake sii te nkiti kata nikintokiki aadol’?" 
John16:20 Kesipa, kesipa, ajoki intae, ainchirishiri niyietutu to sina, kake keng'ida enkop; keinosieki intae osina, kake keibelekenya osina linyi aaku eng'ida." 
John16:21 Ore eisho enkitok neeta osina le mion sapuk amu etabawua enkata enye; kake ore pee eidip atoiu enkerai, meitoki adamu osina te nkaraki eng'ida to ltung'ani otoiwuoki te nkop." 
John16:22 Ore sii intae iatata taata osina, kake kaitoki ake adol intae, neng'ida iltauja linyi, nemetii oltung'ani ooru intae eng'ida inyi." 
John16:23 Ore teina olong mikinkilikuanana nanu ae toki. Kesipa, kesipa, ajoki intae, ti niomonunu toki te Papa, neisho intae te nkarna ai." 
John16:24 Ore o taata eton eitu iomonunu toki te nkarna ai; entoomonu, naa itumutumu, pee eboreyu eng'ida inyi." 
John16:25 “Airorie intae too nkitanyaanyukot te kuna baa. Kelotu enkata nemaitoki airorie intae too nkitanyaanyukot, kake kaibalakinye intae aliki imbaa e Papa." 
John16:26 Ore teina olong, niomonono te nkarna ai, nemajoki intae kaomonoki intae te Papa;" 
John16:27 amu kenyor ninye Papa openy intae, amu kitonyorra intae nanu niruko nchere kaewuo aing'uaa Enkai." 
John16:28 Enetii Papa aing'uaa, nalotu enkop; naa kaitoki aing'uaa enkop alo enetii Papa.”" 
John16:29 Nejoki lkipaareta lenyena, “Aha, iroro taata aibalie, neme te nkitanyaanyukoto iroro." 
John16:30 Kitayioloito taata aajo iyiolo iyie pooki toki, nimikinare nikinkilikuanishore oltung'ani; te na kiruko inchere iewuo iyie aing'uaa Enkai.”" 
John16:31 Newaliki Yesu ninche ajoki, “Iruko taata?" 
John16:32 Kelotu enkata, neewuo taata, naisardakieki intae, nelo pooki tung'ani enkang enye, naaing'uari aa nanu ake; kake mme nanu ake, amu kaaboitare Papa." 
John16:33 Atolikio intae kuna baa pee iatata osotua tiatua nanu. Iatata osina tiatua ena kop, kake entagoluoto! Atimira nanu enkop!”" 
John17:1 Ore pee eidip Yesu atejo kuna baa, neing'orie nkonyek enyena Keper, ajo, “Papa etabawua esaa; intaa kitok Enkerai ino pee kintaa sii iyie Enkerai ino kitok." 
John17:2 Amu inchoo meitoria pooki tung'ani pee eisho enkishui nemeish lelo pooki linchoo iyie ninye. 
John17:3 Naa ena enkishui nemeish, inchere pee kiyiolou iyie Enkai nasipa nabo ake, neyiolou Yesu Kristo, ilo lirriwua." 
John17:4 Aaitaa nanu iyie kitok te nkop; aitabayie esiaai nikinchoo mataasa. 
John17:5 Ore taata Papa, intaaki iyie nanu kitok, te nebo iyie te nkitoo naata apa te nebo iyie eton eitu eitobiri enkop." 
John17:6 “Aibalakinye enkarna ino lelo tung'ana likinchoo iyie aitung'uaa enkop. Ilinono apa ninche, nikinchoo iyie ninche, neibung'a ororei lino." 
John17:7 Netayioloito taata ninche aajo ore pooki nikinchoo naa iyie eing'uaa; 
John17:8 amu ore irorei likinchoo iyie naishoo nanu ninche, netang'amutua ninche. Netisiputua aayiolou inchere, iyie aing'uaa, neiruko inchere iyie likirriwua." 
John17:9 Ninche aomonoki; maomonoki enkop, kake lelo likinchoo, amu ninche ilinono;" 
John17:10 naa ore ntokitin aainei pooki ininono, naa inaainei ininono, naaitaaki kitok tiatua ninche." 
John17:11 Meekure atii nanu enkop, netii ninche enkop; etaa kalotu nanu enitii. Papa Sinyati, torripo ninche te ngolon e nkarna ino, teina arna apa nikinchoo nanu, pee eaku nabo anaa enikira sii iyiook nabo." 
John17:12 Ore oshi eton atii te nebo ninche natorripo ninche, te nkarna ino, lelo likinchoo nanu atagolie nanu ninche, nemetii hoo obo oimina, meteleku ina kerai e nkiminata pee eitabari ilkigerot." 
John17:13 Kalotu taata enitii iyie, najo kuna baa te nkop pee eiputakino ninche eng'ida ai." 
John17:14 Aishoo ninche ororei lino; neibayu ninche enkop, amu mme le nkop anaa enemara nanu ole nkop." 
John17:15 Maomonoki intayu ninche te nkop, kake pee intajeu iyie ninche te ilo torrono." 
John17:16 Mme le nkop ninche anaa enemara nanu ole nkop. 
John17:17 Intisinya ninche te sipata ino. Esipata ororei lino. 
John17:18 Ore anaa enikirriwua iyie nanu atua enkop, airriwayie sii nanu ninche atua enkop;" 
John17:19 naa kaitisiny kewan te nkaraki ninche pee esinyayu sii ninche te sipata. 
John17:20 “Neme ninche ake aomonoki, kake o lelo pooki laairuk nanu te nkaraki ororei lenye;" 
John17:21 pee eaku pooki nabo, anaa iyie Papa itii atua nanu natii nanu atua iyie, pee etii sii ninche atua iyiook, pee etum enkop airuko nchere iyie likirriwua." 
John17:22 Aishoo ninche ina kitoo nikinchoo iyie nanu, pee etum aataa nabo anaa enikira iyiook nabo." 
John17:23 Katii nanu atua ninche nitii iyie atua nanu, pee eitaai ninche ilooiputakinote o metaa nabo, pee etum enkop atayiolo nchere iyie likirriwua, nitonyorra ninche anaa enikitonyorra nanu." 
John17:24 “Papa, kayieu netii, lelo likinchoo enatii nanu, pee edol enkitoo ai nikinchoo iyie, amu kitonyorra iyie nanu eton etioyo enkitamanyunoto e nkop." 
John17:25 Iyie Papa sinyati, eitu kiyiolou enkop, kake aatayiolo nanu netayioloito kulo nchere iyie likirriwua nanu." 
John17:26 Netaiyioloito ninche enkarna ino naa kaitoki aitayiolo, pee etii atua ninche ina nyorrata nikitonyorrie nanu, natii nanu atua ninche.”" 
John18:1 Ore pee eidip Yesu atejo kuna baa nepuku o lkipaareta lenyena, aapuo lido kekun lo yarata le Kidron enetii olokeri oshomo ninye o lkipaareta lenyena." 
John18:2 Ore Yudas, ilo otakaldayie ninye naa keyiolo sii apa ninye ine wueji amu kesesh apa elo Yesu ine o lkipaareta lenyena." 
John18:3 Nedumu Yudas empikas oo sikarini o larripok ooirriutua lapolosak kituaak o Lfarisayo, nepuonu ine eeta ltaai o lkilang'ilang'eta o masaa o larrabal." 
John18:4 Ore Yesu, eyiolo inaaitaasi ninye pooki, nepuku nejoki, “Ai ng'ae ing'oruru?”" 
John18:5 Newaliki ninche aajoki, “Yesu le Nasaret.” Nejoki Yesu ninche, “nanu ilo.” Ore sii Yudas ilo otakaldayie ninye neitashe te nebo ninche." 
John18:6 Ore pee eidip atiaaki ninche, “nanu ilo,” nerrinyo siadi nebatata te nkop." 
John18:7 Neigil, aikilikuan ajoki, “Ai ng'ae ing'oruru?” Nejo ninche, “Yesu le Nasaret.”" 
John18:8 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Atiaka intae nanu ilo, te naa nanu ing'oruru, enchoo kulo epuo.”" 
John18:9 Pee eitabari ororei apa oiroro, ajo, “Ore te lelo likinchoo, maata olaiturrayie.”" 
John18:10 Neeta Simon Petero olalem, neshutu, neoshie osinka lo Lapolosani Kitok nedung'u enkiok e tatene. Keji enkarna e ilo sinka Malkus." 
John18:11 Nejoki Yesu Petero, “Inyiaaki olalem lino enchashur. Amaa enkikompe naaishoo Papa, ai ninye maok?”" 
John18:12 Ore ina pikas o sikarini o lkitok lenye o larripok loo Lyahudi, neibung Yesu neen," 
John18:13 neng'as aarikoki Annas, amu olaputani le Kaiafas, laa ninye Olapolosani Kitok te ilo ari." 
John18:14 Kaiafas olapa otiaaka Lyahudi nchere keishiaakino naa oltung'ani obo onang olorere. 
John18:15 Nesuj Simon Petero o likae oiteng'eni Yesu. Neyiolo ilo likae oiteng'eni Olapolosani Kitok, nejing ninye o Yesu atua olkoriet lo Lapolosani Kitok." 
John18:16 Kake neitashe Petero ti auluo te mbata e kishomi. Nelotu taa ilo likae oiteng'eni oyiolo Olapolosani Kitok, neirorie enkarriponi e kishomi, neitijing'u Petero atua." 
John18:17 Ore ina tito narrip kishomi, nejoki Petero, “Aa ira sii iyie obo loo lkipaareta lele tung'ani?” Nejo, “Mara.”" 
John18:18 Neinuaa isinkan o larripok enkima oo nkuk amu keirobi, naa ore eitashoo teine, eijito enkima, neitashe sii ninye Petero o ninche, aij enkima." 
John18:19 Neikilikuan Olapolosani Kitok Yesu mbaa oo lkipaareta lenyena o mbaa naaiteng'enishe. 
John18:20 Newaliki Yesu ajoki ninye, “Airorie enkop aibalakinye mbaa. Aiteng'enisho oshi ake too nkajijik e ntumo o te nkaji e Nkai natumore Lyahudi pooki, nemeeta embae nairoro too nkisudorot." 
John18:21 Kainyoo paa nanu inkilikuan? Inkilikuana ilaatoning'o enatiaaka. Keyiolo ninche enatejo.” 
John18:22 Ore pee ejo ninye nejia, neosh obo loo larripok oitashe teine eseder te nkaina, nejoki, “Ai nejia ijo ti niwaliki Olapolosani Kitok?”" 
John18:23 Newaliki Yesu ajoki ninye, “Te naa katejo ntorrok, tolimu shakeni e ina torroni; kake amaa te naa sipat, kainyoo pee kiosh?”" 
John18:24 Neirriwaa Annas ninye eena enetii Olapolosani Kitok Kaiafas. 
John18:25 Neitashe Simon Petero aij enkima. Nejoki ninche ninye, “Oo iyie, aa ira obo loo lkipaareta lenyena?” Nemiki, nejo, “Mara.”" 
John18:26 Ore osinka obo lo Lapolosani Kitok alashe le ilo otundung'oyie Petero enkiok, nejo, “Keitu duoo aadol to lokeri te nebo Yesu?”" 
John18:27 Neitoki ake Petero amiki, ore ina kata neru olchogoo." 
John18:28 Nerik ninche Yesu aaitung'uaa Kaiafas, aarik enkaji o Lbalusui; naa enasirie. Eitu ejing ninche maate enkaji o Lbalusui pee meidurukieki. Amu kejo pee etum aainosa Pasaka." 
John18:29 Neaku eipang'aka neipang'aki Pilato ninche nejo, “Kaa kitarruorroto iyaunye ele tung'ani?”" 
John18:30 Newaliki ninche aajoki, “Te neme olaasani loo ntorrok ele tung'ani, anaata eitu kirikoki iyie.”" 
John18:31 Nejoki Pilato ninche, “Ewaita intae ninye eng'uanare too nkitanapat inyi.” Nejoki Lyahudi ninye, “Meishoro iyiook matar oltung'ani metua.”" 
John18:32 Etotiwuo nejia pee etum atabai enatejo Yesu pee eutu ajo kaa keeya eye ninye. 
John18:33 Neitoki Pilato ajing atua enkaji o Lbalosi neipot Yesu nejoki, “Aa ira iyie olaiguanani lo Lyahudi?”" 
John18:34 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Ai iyie makewan ojo nji ana ai lkulikae likitolikitio mbaa aainei?”" 
John18:35 Newaliki Pilato ajoki, “Kara nanu Olyahudi? Olorere lino o lapolosak kituaak likiyautua iyie enatii. Kaa itaasa iyie?”" 
John18:36 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Ore enkitoria ai mme ene na kop. Te naa naaji ke ne na kop enkitoria ai anaata aatang'oro lkipaareta laainei, pee maapiki nkaik oo Lyahudi; kake ore enatiu, mme ene ne enkitoria ai.” Nejoki Pilato ninye, “Metaa ira iyie olaiguanani?”" 
John18:37 Newaliki Yesu ajoki, “Iyie otejo nchere kara nanu olaiguanani. Aatoiwuoki nanu te nkaraki ena, naa te nkaraki ena pee aewuo enkop pee aishakenoki esipata. Kening ole sipata pooki oltoilo lai.”" 
John18:38 Nejoki Pilato ninye, “Kainyoo esipata?” Ore pee eidip Pilato atejo nejia, neitoki aipang'aki Lyahudi nejoki, “Eitu atumie hoo ninye entiyoto naishiakinore enkiguana." 
John18:39 Kake iatata olkerreti lalaakinye intae oltung'ani obo te Pasaka. Iyieuu nalaaki intae olaiguanani loo Lyahudi?” 
John18:40 Nebuak pooki aaitoki aajo, “Mme ele tung'ani, kake Barabas.” Naa olaisimani apa Barabas." 
John19:1 Nerik Pilato Yesu meidong'i te nkeene; 
John19:2 neshetu isikarini olmarisian loo lkiku, nepik elukunya enye, neishopoki olkila onyokie." 
John19:3 Neaku kepuonu enetii aajoki, “Supa, lo aiguanani loo Lyahudi!” Nedam isederi." 
John19:4 Neitoki Pilato aipang nejoki ninche, “Eng'ura, kaipang'akinye intae ninye pee iyiolouu aajo eitu atumie hoo enkitarruorroto.”" 
John19:5 Neipang'u taa Yesu eishopito olmarisian loo lkiku o lkila onyokie. Nejoki Pilato ninche, “Eng'ura ele tung'ani.”" 
John19:6 Ore pee edol ilapolosak kituaak o larripok ninye, nebuak aajo, “Tasho! Tasho!” Nejoki Pilato ninche, “Ewaita intae oopeny, entasho; amu eitu atumie nanu ninye hoo enkitarruorroto.”" 
John19:7 Newaliki Lyahudi ninye aajoki, “Ekiata iyiook enkitanapata naa ore teina kitanapata keishiaakino keeya te nkaraki naitaa kewan Enkerai e Nkai.”" 
John19:8 Ore pee ening Pilato ilo rorei neureishoyu oleng," 
John19:9 neitoki ajing atua enkaji o Lbalusui, nejoki Yesu, “Kaji ng'uaa iyie?” Kake eitu eisho Yesu ewalata hoo nabo." 
John19:10 Nejoki Pilato, “Aimikirorie nanu? Aimiyiolo ajo kaata engolon naalakunyie naata engolon naasheyie?”" 
John19:11 Newaliki Yesu nejoki, “Miata hoo naaji engolon te nanu te neme eikinchooki eing'uaa Keper. Neaku ina pee eeta olaatorikoko iyie eng'oki nalusoo.”" 
John19:12 Ore te nkaraki ena walata neing'oru Pilato enaiko pee elaku Yesu. Neidikidik Ilyahudi aabuak ejo, “Ti nilak ele tung'ani, nimira olchore le Kaisari. Ore pooki ng'ae oitaa kewan olaiguanani, naa Kaisari egilunore.”" 
John19:13 Ore pee ening Pilato lelo rorei neipang'unye Yesu boo, neton to lorika le nkiguana te wueji neji olpura loo soito, neji te nkutuk oo Lbrania Gabata." 
John19:14 Naa te Nkitobirakinoto e Pasaka naa inoo saa ile. Nejoki ninye Lyahudi, “Neilo olaiguanani linyi!”" 
John19:15 Nebuak aajo, “Iwuang'ie, Iwuang'ie ninye, tasho ninye!” Nejoki Pilato, “Kashe olaiguanani linyi?” Newaliki lapolosak kituaak, “Mikiaata iyiook olaiguanani leme Kaisari.”" 
John19:16 Neishooyo taa Pilato ninye meshomo aashe. Neibung ninche Yesu nerik. 
John19:17 Neipang enapita openy osalaba aya “Ewueji neji Emborbor”, neji (te nkutuk oo Lyahudi Golgota)." 
John19:18 Neshe ninche ninye teine, o kulikae tung'ana aare te nebo ninye, atii ake obo enkae matua netii olikae enkae netii Yesu erishata." 
John19:19 Nesir Pilato olkigeroto nepetoki osalaba, osira ajo, “Yesu le Nasaret, Olaiguanani loo Lyahudi.”" 
John19:20 Neisum Ilyahudi kumok ilo kigeroto amu ore ine wueji netasheyieki Yesu kenyikita ina anasa, natisiraki te nkutuk oo Lbrania o enoo Roma o enoo Lyunani." 
John19:21 Neaku ina pee etiaakita ilapolosak kituaak loo Lyahudi Pilato, “Misir ajo, ‘Olaiguanani loo Lyahudi’, kake nchere etejo ninye, ‘Kara Olaiguanani loo Lyahudi.’ ”" 
John19:22 Newaliki Pilato ajo, “Ore enatisira, atisira.”" 
John19:23 Ore pee eidip isikarini aatasho Yesu neya nkilani enyena neor kat ong'uan, neya ake osikari eoroti nabo, neya sii ilo kila. Nemeeta ilo kila lenye emanaroto e ripata olkila, keshetuno te shumata o meiting'o." 
John19:24 Naa ina pee etiaakinote, “Emikipolos, ematooshie ele enkukuo, pee kitum oloya,” pee ebaya ilo kigeroto ojo, “Etoorikinote nkilani aainei neoshie enkukuo olkila lai.”" 
John19:25 Kuna baa etaasa isikarini. Ore te mbata o salaba le Yesu neitashe ng'otonye, o Mariamu enkanashe ng'otonye, o enkitok e Kleopas, o Mariamu Magdalena." 
John19:26 Ore pee edol Yesu ng'otonye, eitashe teine, o loiteng'eni apa onyor, nejoki Yesu ng'otonye, “Yieyio, ng'ura enkerai ino.”" 
John19:27 Neitoki ajoki ilooiteng'eni, “Ng'ura ng'utunyi.” Ore ebaiki ina kata nerik ilooiteng'eni Mariamu enkang enye." 
John19:28 Ore te siadi ena, etayiolo Yesu ajo eitabayioki mbaa pooki, pee etumi aaitabai olkigeroto katukul, nejo, “Kaata enkure.”" 
John19:29 Netipikaki emoti ine, nabore siki; nepik osuguroi obore ina siki oloomi le hisopo netuloki enkutuk enye." 
John19:30 Ore pee eng'amu Yesu ina siki nejo, “Eidipe!” Neirrug elukunya neitaaya enkishui enye." 
John19:31 Ore Ilyahudi te nkaraki naa enkolong e rreten e Sabato, ejo pee meing'uari seseni te shumata o salaba te nkolong e Sabato amu enkolong kitok Sabato, neomon Pilato metigili ninche nkejek neiwuang'ieki aaya." 
John19:32 Neaku eetuo isikarini apa negil inkejek ole dukuya o no likae apa otashoki te nebo ninye. 
John19:33 Ore pee ebaiki enetii Yesu, nedol aajo eidipa atua, neitu egil inkejek enyena." 
John19:34 Kake etaremo osikari obo ematua te remet, nepuku osarge o enkare." 
John19:35 Ore ilo otoduaa neishakenoko, naa kesipa shakenisho enye, neyiolo ninye ajo esipata ejoito, pee irukuruku sii intae." 
John19:36 Etotiutuo kuna baa pee ebaya olkigeroto ojo, “Meetae oloito lenye ogili.”" 
John19:37 Enyaaka sii ajo likae kigeroto, “Keyooki ninche aaing'or ilo otaremo.”" 
John19:38 Ore te siadi nena, neishori Yosef le Arimatea, laa oloiteng'eni apa le Yesu, kake too nkurrat te nkaraki naure Ilyahudi, neomon Pilato meishoo meewa osesen le Yesu; neisho Pilato. Nelotu neya osesen lenye." 
John19:39 Nelotu sii Nikodemo, olapa otang'asa alo ayiaya Yesu kewarie, neshoru enkitushulati e ilata narropil o emanoo o esonkoyo nabaya ilkiloi tomoni uni." 
John19:40 Neya osesen le Yesu neirin too nkarash e kitani napuyiapui te nebo o ina ilata narropil, anaa enatiu olkerreti loo Lyahudi le nukaroto." 
John19:41 Netii ine wueji netasheyieki ninye enkurma, netii atua ina kurma enkurare ng'ejuk neton eitu aekata enukarieki likae." 
John19:42 Ore te nkaraki rreten e Sabato oo Lyahudi, netaana ina kurare, nenukari Yesu teine." 
John20:1 Ore enasirie te nkolong e dukuya e wiki, eton emisimis nelotu Mariamu Magdalena enkurare nedol ajo eiwuang'ieki osoit te nkurare." 
John20:2 Nekuet alo enetii Simon Petero o enetii olikae oiteng'eni apa onyor Yesu, nejoki ninche, “Eitayutuo Olaitoriani te nkurare, nimikiyiolo enetipika ninye.”" 
John20:3 Nepuku Petero o ilo likae oiteng'eni aapuo enkurare. 
John20:4 Nekuet aairiamari pokira aare; kake neing'ataa ilo likae oiteng'eni Petero nemurutoki enkurare. 
John20:5 Neirrugo arum nedol inkarash e kitani naapuyiapui eirrag teine, kake eitu ejing atua." 
John20:6 Nelotu sii ninye Simon Petero, esujita, nejing atua enkurare; nedol nena arash e kitani naapuyiapui teine, kake eitu ejing atua," 
John20:7 o ina anka natii apa endukuya enye. Nemeboitare inkarash e kitani naapuyiapui, kake keirina ti ai wueji openy alamita." 
John20:8 Nejing taa sii ninye ilo likae oiteng'eni otumurutoko olikae enkurare, atua nedol neiruk;" 
John20:9 amu eton apa eitu eyiolou olkigeroto ajo meeta nchere pee mepiu aing'uaa lootuata. 
John20:10 Neitoki lelo ooiteng'eni aapuo nkang'itie enye. 
John20:11 Kake eitasho Mariamu te nkutuk e nkurare, eishirita. Ore eishirita neirrugo arum enkurare," 
John20:12 nedol ilmalaika oaare ooishopito nkilani naaibor, neton obo te nkalo e ndukuya ore olikae neton te nkalo oo nkejek e ine duo neirragie osesen le Yesu." 
John20:13 Nejoki ninche ninye, “Na kitok, kainyoo pee inchirita?” Nejoki ninche, “Amu ewaita ninche Olaitoriani lai, nemayiolo nanu eneshomo aapik ninye.”" 
John20:14 Ore pee ejo nejia, neibelekenya nedol Yesu eitashe, neitu eyiolou ajo Yesu." 
John20:15 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Na kitok, kainyoo pee nchirita? Ai ng'ae ing'oru?” Ore amu kejo kolaturoni le nkurma nejoki, “Lo Kitok, te naa iyie owa ninye, tolikioki enishomo apik ninye, pee alotu aya.”" 
John20:16 Nejoki Yesu, “Mariamu!” Neibelekenya nejoki te nkutuk oo Lbrania, “Rabboni!” Eji Olaiteng'enani." 
John20:17 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Mikimbung, amu eton eitu ailep alo enetii Papa, kake shomo enetii lalashera laainei tiaaki ninche, ‘Kailep alo enetii Papa lai laa Papa linyi, enetii Enkai ai naa Enkai inyi.’ ”" 
John20:18 Nelo Mariamu Magdalena aliki lelo ooiteng'eni ajoki, “Atoduaa Olaitoriani,” neliki nena baa naatiaakaki ninye." 
John20:19 Ore ina olong teipa aa enkolong e dukuya e wiki, eikeno nkutukie e ina aji nasotore lelo ooiteng'eni te nkaraki naure Ilyahudi. Nelotu Yesu neitashe te mpolos, nejoki ninche, “Entaseriana.”" 
John20:20 Ore pee eidip atejo neijia, neitodol ninche inkaik enyena o ematua enye. Neng'ida lelo ooiteng'eni pee edol Olaitoriani." 
John20:21 Neitoki ake Yesu ajoki ninche, “Entaseriana. Ore anaa enairriwayie Papa, kairriwaa sii nanu intae.”" 
John20:22 Ore pee eidip atejo nejia neyang'aki ninche nejoki, “Entang'amu Enkiyang'et Sinyati." 
John20:23 Tenipalakiki oltung'ani ing'ok nepalakini, tenimipalakiki oltung'ani ing'ok, nemepalakini.”" 
John20:24 Ore Tomas otejoki Olmaoi, laa obo le lelo tomon o aare, nemetii te nebo ninche pee elotu Yesu." 
John20:25 Nejoki lelo kulikae ooiteng'eni, “Kitoduaa Olaitoriani.” Nejoki Tomas ninche, “Te neitu adol nanu inkiporo oo lmushumaani too nkaik enyena napik olkimojino lai ine wueji oo lmushumaani napik enkaina ai ematua enye, mairuk nanu katukul.”" 
John20:26 Ore etulusoitie nkolong'i isiet neitoki aatii lelo ooiteng'eni atua aji, netii Tomas te nebo ninche. Nelotu Yesu eikeno nkutukie e ina aji, neitashe te mpolos nejo, “Entaseriana.”" 
John20:27 Neitoki ajoki Tomas, “Tipika olkimojino lino ene, ing'ura inkaik aainei; nipik enkaina ino ene mbung'a ematua ai nimiaku olemeeta enkirukoto kake iruko.”" 
John20:28 Newaliki Tomas ajoki, “Olaitoriani lai naa Enkai ai!”" 
John20:29 Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Iruko iyie te nkaraki nikitoduaa nanu? Emayiani lelo leitu edol neiruko.”" 
John20:30 Etaasa, Yesu kulikae monek kumok etii lelo oiteng'eni lenyana neitu esiri tena buku;" 
John20:31 kake etisiraki kuna pee itumutumu aairuko nchere ore Yesu ninye Kristo, Enkerai e Nkai, naa tenirukuruku, nitumutumu enkishui tiatua enkarna enye." 
John21:1 Ore te siadi kuna baa neitoki Yesu aitoduaaya kewan te lelo ooiteng'eni lenyena te naiposha e Tiberias; neitoduaaya kewan tena oitoi. 
John21:2 Ore eboita Simon Petero, o Tomas oji Olmaoi, o Natanael le Kana te Galilaya, o layiok le Sebedayo o kulikae ooiteng'eni aare lenyena." 
John21:3 Nejoki Simon Petero lkulikae, “Kalo arresh isinkir.” Nejoki ninche ninye, “Aikiriamariyie sii iyiook iyie.” Nepuku aapuo nejing nabo kata empeut enye, neitu eibung ninche toki ina kewarie." 
John21:4 Ore enasirie neitashe Yesu te mbata e naiposha, kake eitu eyiolou lelo ooiteng'eni aajo Yesu." 
John21:5 Nejoki ninche, “Oyie ooti, iatata isinkir?” Newaliki aajoki, “Mikiaata.”" 
John21:6 Nejoki ninche, “Entanang'aki orreshet tatene e mpeut, naa itumutumu isinkir.” Nenang'aki orreshet enaiposha kake ore te nkaraki enkumoi oo sinkir nelaikino aateyietu." 
John21:7 Nejoki ilo oiteng'eni onyor Yesu Petero, “Olaitoriani doi!” Ore pee ening Simon Petero, neishopo (amu meeta duo nkilani), neidaki atua enaiposha." 
John21:8 Nepuonunye lelo kulikae ooiteng'eni empeut enye, eikurtutu orreshet loo sinkir amu melamita enkop natoyio, keba anaa iroruat iip nabo." 
John21:9 Ore pee epuku aabaiki enkop natoyio nedol teine enkima oo nkuk naiteleikino sinkir, o emukate." 
John21:10 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Eyau ene ematua oo sinkir limbung'a tena kata.”" 
John21:11 Neked Simon Petero empeut neikurtutu orreshet enkop natoyio ebore sinkir sapuki oora iip o onom o okuni; kake ore hoo naa kumok aaba nejia eitu epolosa orreshet. 
John21:12 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Wootu entadaata.” Nemeetae hoo obo loo lkipaareta oikilikuana ajoki, “Aira iyie ng'ae?” Amu etayioloito aajo Olaitoriani." 
John21:13 Nelotu Yesu nedumu emukate neisho, neikunaki sii nejia sinkir." 
John21:14 Ena taa taata enkata e uni pee eipang'aki Yesu lelo ooiteng'eni eidipa atopiu too lootuata. 
John21:15 Ore pee eidip aatadaata nejoki Yesu Simon Petero, “Simon olayioni le Yohana, ai kinyor iyie nanu alang kulo?” Nejoki, “Ee Olaitoriani, iyiolo iyie ajo kaanyor.” Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Intotio lkuoo laainei le kerra.”" 
John21:16 Neitoki ajoki eni are, “Simon olayioni le Yohana, ai kinyor iyie nanu?” Nejoki, “Ee Olaitoriani, iyiolo ajo kaanyor.” Nejoki, “Irrita nkerra aainei.”" 
John21:17 Neitoki ake ajoki ninye ene uni, “Simon olayioni le Yohana, ai kinyor iyie nanu?” Neisinanuo Petero amu etiaaka ene uni, “Ai kinyor iyie nanu?” Nejoki ninye, “Olaitoriani, iyiolo iyie pooki toki; iyiolo ajo kaanyor.” Nejoki Yesu ninye, “Intotio nkerra aainei." 
John21:18 Kesipa, kesipa, aajoki iyie, ore apa ira oti irreten kewan nilo eniyieu, kake ore kenya pee imoruau iyiooki aitorio nkaik inono, nikirreten likae nikiya ewueji nimiyieu nilo.”" 
John21:19 Etejo Yesu nejia eutu keeya e Petero nayaki Enkai enkitoo. Ore pee eidip atejo nejia nejoki Yesu Petero, “Tusujuaki nanu.”" 
John21:20 Neibelekenya Petero nedol olapa oiteng'eni onyor Yesu esujita, aa ninye olapa oirishakine olgoo lenye te ndaa e teipa nejoki, “Olaitoriani, ai ng'ae ilo likirojaa?”" 
John21:21 Ore pee edol Petero ilo nejoki Yesu, “Olaitoriani, oo ninye ele?”" 
John21:22 Nejoki Yesu, “Amaa tenayieu nebik ninye o maeu, kainyoo nikitii iyie? Tusujuaki iyie nanu.”" 
John21:23 Neibulaa ilo rorei too lalashera nchere ore ele oiteng'eni nemeye, hoo neitu ejo Yesu, meye ninye, “Kake, Amaa tenaa keyeunoto ai pee eton ninye o matushukunye, kainyoo nikitii iyie?”" 
John21:24 Ilo oiteng'eni ele oishakenu kuna baa neigero ninche, nikiyiolo iyiook aajo kesipa shakenisho enye." 
John21:25 Netii sii kulie baa kumok naataasa Yesu; naa te neigeri naaji maa naabo, kajo nanu meishaa enkop imbukui naaji naaigeri." 
Acts1:1 Olanyor Oloyanyiti Teofilo: Aigero te mbuku naitera, mbaa pooki naaiterua Yesu aas o naaiteng'enishe," 
Acts1:2 o metabaiki ina olong apa nailepieki aaya keper. Ore eton eitu eilepieki Yesu neitanapisho te ngolon e Nkiyang'et Sinyati, aitanap lelo tung'ana apa ootegelua metaa lkipaareta, lenyena." 
Acts1:3 Ore te rishata oo nkolong'i artam, etulusoyie keeya enye, neipang'aka ninche katitin kumok, too nkoitoi naaitadedeyie te ninche pee eoru ninche olng'ash nchere keishu; netoduaa ninche ninye, eirorie ninche eimaki mbaa e nkitoria e Nkai." 
Acts1:4 Ore pee etumo ninche te nebo, neitanap Yesu ajoki, “Emipuo aaing'uaa Yerusalem, kake entaanyu enkishorunoto natejo Papa keishoru, anaa enatiaaka intae." 
Acts1:5 Amu te nkare apa eibatisishe Yohana, kake ore too nkuti olong'i, keibatisae intae te Nkiyang'et Sinyati.”" 
Acts1:6 Ore enotote ilkipaareta te nebo neikilikuan Yesu aajoki, “Olaitoriani, ai te na rishata irrinyoki Siraeli enkitoria?”" 
Acts1:7 Nejoki Yesu ninche, “Ore rishat o nkatitin naa Papa lai ake openy oitore makewan, nemeishoro intae entayiolo enkata naaku." 
Acts1:8 Kake ing'amumu intae engolon, tenelotu Enkiyang'et Sinyati shumata intae, niaakuku intae lchakenini laainei tiatua Yerusalem, o tiatua Yudea pooki o Samaria, o metabaiki ineeiting'ie enkop.”" 
Acts1:9 Ore pee eidip atejo neijia, eing'orita ninche, neilepieki aaya keper neitemoo enkatampoi arishie nkonyek enye." 
Acts1:10 Ore egira aaimariri shumata aaduaaya ninye eloito, ore nabo kata nemaniki ltung'ana aare ooishopito nkilani naaibor eitashe." 
Acts1:11 Nejo, “Lo lewa le Galilaya, kainyoo pee intasheshe tene aaing'or shumata? Ore Yesu, ele oilepieki aaitung'uaa intae aaya keper keitu aikununye anaa ina nitoduaaitie elo keper.”" 
Acts1:12 Neitoki ilkipaareta aashuko Yerusalem aaing'uaa oldoinyo oji Oloo loirienito otaaniki Yerusalem oba anaa elototo e nkolong e Sabato. 
Acts1:13 Nejing ninche Yerusalem nepuo aailepaki olgilata le shumata le nkaji apa natijing'a: Aa Petero, Yohana, Yakobo o Anterea, Filipo o Tomas, Bartolomayo o Matayo, Yakobo le Alfayo o Simon laa olkirowuai, o Yudas ole Yakobo." 
Acts1:14 Neiturrurro pooki anaa ake aasaisho te nebo, netii nkituaak naaisiritore, inaatii Mariamu ng'otonye Yesu o lalashera lenyena." 
Acts1:15 Ore te nena olong'i neitashe Petero tiatua ilalashera, te eumata oo ltung'ana oobaya esiana iip o tikitam." 
Acts1:16 Nejo, “Ilalashera laainei, meeta kata apake nemeitabari ilkigerot anaa enatejo Enkiyang'et Sinyati, eimu Daudi, eimaki Yudas, laa ninye otorikuo ltung'ana ooetuo aaibung Yesu." 
Acts1:17 Amu ole siana ang apa Yudas neishooki ematua enye te na siaai.” 
Acts1:18 “Neinyiang'ua ele tung'ani enkurma to lerrinyore le nkarruoisho enye, naa ine etanang'a etusulari neng'era adanya neitiakunye enkoshoke pooki." 
Acts1:19 Nening iltung'ana pooki oomanya Yerusalem ina, nedung'oki ina kurma enkarna te nkutuk enye aajo Akeldama, (eji ‘Enkurma osarge’)." 
Acts1:20 Amu etisiraki te Mbuku e Olkerempe le Nkai aajo, ‘Metomijoono enkaji enye; nelaii oltung'ani omany.’ Nchoo sii, ‘Meisiaaisho likae te rishata enye.’" 
Acts1:21 Ore naa oltung'ani obo le lelo ooisiritore iyiook teina kata pooki etii Yesu atua iyiook," 
Acts1:22 eiteru te nkibatisare e Yohana, o metabaiki ina olong nailepieki Yesu aaya keper, aaitung'uaa iyiook, meeta kata nemeaku obo le lelo shakenini le mpiunoto te nebo iyiook.”" 
Acts1:23 Neaku etegelutua ltung'ana aare: Yosef oji Barsabas (neji sii Yustus) o Matias. 
Acts1:24 Neomon ninche nejo, “Olaitoriani, iyiolo iyie iltauja loo ltung'ana pooki. Ore te nkaraki ina, Olaitoriani, tuutaki iyiook olitudutayie te kulo pokira aare," 
Acts1:25 ojing ena rishata aaku olkipaaret neisiaaisho amu eshomo Yudas ewueji enye apake.” 
Acts1:26 Neosh enkukuo aadut nena arn pokira are. Nedoiki enkukuo Matias neikenakini encholiek e lelo kipaareta tomon o obo. 
Acts2:1 Ore pee ebau enkolong e Pentekoste, netii apa ilairukok pooki ewueji nebo." 
Acts2:2 Ore nabo kata nelotu enkikurrukur naing'uaa Keper naaijo eno lkutati, neiput ina aji pooki natii ninche." 
Acts2:3 Nedol ninche entoki naaijo lng'ejepa le nkima eisuaari: neiseyie ake ina ng'ejep naaijo enkima o lng'ejep le pooki tung'ani otii ine. 
Acts2:4 Neigany Enkiyang'et Sinyati ninche pooki neiteru aairo kulie kutukie, anaa enaidimie Enkiyang'et Sinyati meiroro." 
Acts2:5 Nemanya Yerusalem Ilyahudi laa iltung'ana ooserem e Nkai, ooetuo ninche eing'uaa nkuapi pooki e nkop." 
Acts2:6 Ore pee ening ina kikurrukur neiturrurro olorora kitok. Neiputukuny neing'asia pooki amu meetae ake oleitu ening lelo airukok eiro enkutuk naikini ninye. 
Acts2:7 Neiputukuny neing'asia nejo, “Amaa kulo tung'ana aime Lgalilaya pooki!" 
Acts2:8 Kainyoo naa pee kining'ito iyiook pooki eiro nkutukie ang naaikini iyiook? 
Acts2:9 King'uaa iyiook Partia o Midia o Elam; niking'uaa Mesopotamia o Yudea, o Kapodokia; niking'uaa Ponto o Asia," 
Acts2:10 niking'uaa Frigia o Pamfiliam. Niking'uaa Misiri o lkirinen le Libya o Kirene, neing'uaa kulikae lang Roma," 
Acts2:11 ndung'ot pokira, Lyahudi o Loreren ooibelekenyate aaku Lyahudi; niking'uaa kulikae lang Krete o Arabia kake eji nikining pooki eiro ninche nkutukie ang eimaki mbaa kituaak naataasa Enkai!”" 
Acts2:12 Ore eing'asiate pooki nemilo neikilikuana taa ake aajo, “Kainyoo eutu ena bae?”" 
Acts2:13 Kake etii ilootakueniyie ilairukok ejo, “Etemerate kulo tung'ana!”" 
Acts2:14 Kake neinyototo Petero eboitare ninye lelo kulikae tomon o obo, neiteru airorie olorere to ltoilo sapuk ajoki, “Lo lewa lang loo Lyahudi, o intae pooki oomanya Yerusalem, entoning enajo, matoliki intae enautu ena bae." 
Acts2:15 Eitu emera kulo tung'ana anaa ina nijoitoto, saa uni e ntadekenya tena kata." 
Acts2:16 Maa, enapa bae ena natolimuo oloiboni le Nkai oji Yoel pee ejo," 
Acts2:17 ‘Kaas ena bae te nena olong'i naabayie, Enkai najo, kabukoki ltung'ana pooki Enkiyang'et ai. Keyooki aaibonisho layiok linyi o ntoyie inyi; nedol ilbarnot linyi nduaat, netum ilpayiani linyi nkidetidetat." 
Acts2:18 Ee, o metabaiki sii ninche sinkan laainei, loo lewa o loo ng'oruo, kabukoki Enkiyang'et ai te nena olong'i, naa keibonisho kenya ninche." 
Acts2:19 Naa kaitodolu ine nking'asia te ntaiya e shumata, o sapiipiyieti ti abori te nkop. Nedoli osarge o enkima, o empuruo nairrusha:" 
Acts2:20 neitomisimisi enkolong, nedoru olapa atiu anaa osarge, eton etiooyo ina olong o Laitoriani, enkolong kitok e nkisisa." 
Acts2:21 Ore teina kata, ore pooki ng'ae oipot enkarna o Laitoriani neitajeuni.’" 
Acts2:22 “Lo lewa loo Siraeli! Entoning kulo rorei. Ore Yesu le Nasaret, oltung'ani otisirua Enkai abaraki te intae too mbaa e ngolon o ine nking'asia o nkitoduaat o lmonek ooitaasa intae Enkai te nkaina enye. Niyiololo intae ina amu atua intae etaasieki." 
Acts2:23 Enkai openy natudutayie te yieunoto o te ng'eno enye makewan apake nchere, keitarasari Yesu, nitara intae ninye, aaisho ltung'ana arruok metasho." 
Acts2:24 Kake eitopiwuo Enkai ninye aitung'uaa ilootuata: nelaku aoru emion e keeya amu meidimayu apa neenikino keeya ninye. 
Acts2:25 Amu eimaka Daudi ninye nejo, ‘Atoduaa Olaitoriani etii dukuya nanu nkatitin pooki: aatii te tatene, metaa maaigusugusieki." 
Acts2:26 Amu ore te nkaraki ena keng'ida oltau lai, nebore irorei laainei enchipai; ore nanu, nara ake olenye, nayeng'iyeng'a aanyisho to siligi," 
Acts2:27 amu ming'uaa iyie oltau lai te nemeneng'a, nimincho osinka lino sinyati metupurdayu ang'uoyu." 
Acts2:28 Kituutaka iyie nanu inkoitoi enkishui, ore amu itii iyie, eikilo aiput enchipai.’" 
Acts2:29 “Ilalashera laainei, enchooki maibalakinye intae ashirraki too mbaa e papa lang Daudi, Etua ninye, nenukari, netii enkurare enye atua iyiook o tene." 
Acts2:30 Oloiboni le Nkai apa metaa ketayiolo ina naisiligie Enkai ajoki, ore eishoi enye keikini likae aiguanani kitok oitoreisho anaa apa Daudi." 
Acts2:31 Ina etodolua Daudi naas kenya ake Enkai, pee eiroro aimaki empiunoto e Kristo pee ejo: ‘Eitu eing'uari ninye te nemeneng'a. Neitu epurda osesen lenye ang'uoyu.’" 
Acts2:32 “Ele Yesu likiimaki eitopiwuo Enkai aitung'uaa ilootuata, nikira iyiook lchakenini le ina bae." 
Acts2:33 Ore pee eilepieki nepiki tatene e Nkai, neng'amu Enkiyang'et Sinyati te Menye anaa enatejo apake; naa ore ena nidolitata nining'itoto, ina kishorunoto enye etubukoko iyiook." 
Acts2:34 Amu eitu elo Daudi makewan keper; kake etejo ninye makewan, ‘Etiaka Olaitoriani, Olaitoriani lai: Totona te tatene ai," 
Acts2:35 pee aitadou ilmang'ati linono metotiutu anaa olorika loo nkejek inono.’ 
Acts2:36 Entayioloito naa taata enkaji pooki oo Siraeli ena nadede nchere, ele Yesu, lishomo intae aashe to salaba, eitaa Enkai Olaitoriani o Kristo.”" 
Acts2:37 Kuna ake etoning'o ninche nerem ilo rorei iltauja, nejoki Petero o lkulikae kipaareta, “Kaa naa kiaas, ilalashera lang?”" 
Acts2:38 Nejoki Petero ninche, “Erridutu pooki tung'ani, neibatisae pooki linyi te nkarna e Yesu Kristo, pee epalakini intae ng'ok inyi; naa ing'amumu enkishorunoto e Enkiyang'et Sinyati." 
Acts2:39 Amu ore ena kisiligata naa eninyi apa o nkera inyi, o lelo pooki oolakua, lelo pooki ooipotoki Enkai kewan.”" 
Acts2:40 Neitirrishaki Petero aitadedeyie kulo omon te kulie baa kumok, nejoki, “Entajeu ate teina nainepu kulo tung'ana arruok.”" 
Acts2:41 Neiruk ilkumok nena baa naainosua ninye, neibatisae; neponikini ilo turrur iltung'ana oobaya nkalifuni uni teina olong." 
Acts2:42 Neaku ketumo ninche anaa ake te nkiteng'enare oo lkipaareta, neshulare aaisiritore, neng'arie endaa, neshula te nkomono." 
Acts2:43 Nejing aiput enkuretisho pooki ng'ae; neasi inenking'asia, o lmonek eimu lkipaareta." 
Acts2:44 Nebik ilairukok pooki te nebo te nchula neyau masaa enye aang'ar. 
Acts2:45 Neaku kemir masaa enye o ntokitin naata neorikino pooki mpisai, anaa enaatayie oltung'ani enkolat." 
Acts2:46 Netumo anaa ake ilo turrur te nkaji e Nkai, neng'ar ndaiki too nkajijik enye, neng'ida edaa to ltau obo." 
Acts2:47 Neisis Enkai, neshipakino iltung'ana pooki ninche. Neponaa Olaitoriani ilo turrur lenye anaa ake te lelo ooitajeuni." 
Acts3:1 Ore nabo olong, nepuo Petero o Yohana enkaji e Nkai saa naaudo etushuke enkolong, te nkata e nkomono." 
Acts3:2 Ore te Kishomi Sidai, amu nejia apa eji, netii oltung'ani laa olmaima eiteru te inoto enye. Naa kenapi anaa ake aaya ina kishomi meshomo aomonu mpisai too ltung'ana oopuo aajing enkaji e Nkai." 
Acts3:3 Ore pee edolu Petero o Yohana epuonu aajing enkaji e Nkai, neomon meishoo enkiti toki." 
Acts3:4 Neipirie ninche nkonyek aaing'or, nejoki Petero, “Ng'ura iyiook!”" 
Acts3:5 Neing'or ninche eisiligu toki te ninche. 
Acts3:6 Nejoki Petero ninye, “Maata enkosholai o saabu, kake kaaisho enaata, te nkarna e Yesu Kristo le Nasaret, aajoki shomo!”" 
Acts3:7 Neibung enkaina e tatene aitasheyie. Negolu nabo kata ndapi o rubat oo nkejek e ilo tung'ani; 
Acts3:8 neipid, neitashe too nkejek enyena, neiteru alo amanimanaa. Neitoki airiamariyie ninche ajing atua enkaji e Nkai, eloito neipid eisisita Enkai." 
Acts3:9 Nedol olorere pooki eloito neisisita Enkai. 
Acts3:10 Ore ade pee epuonu aaiyiolou aajo ninye oloshi aomononi oton te Kishomi Sidai e Nkaji e Nkai, neing'asia pooki, neiputukuny teina naitaasaki ninye." 
Acts3:11 Ore eibung'ita ilo tung'ani Petero o Yohana, neing'asia ltung'ana pooki nekuetu enetii ninche to Igoriet le Solomon, amu nejia apa eji ine." 
Acts3:12 Ore pee edol Petero ina, nejoki ninche, “Lo lewa lang loo Siraeli, kainyoo naing'asiayie intae te ne, naa kaji etiu paa iyiook ing'oring'oro? Ijojo pasa ai te nkaraki engolon ang maate aashu te nkaraki esupatisho ang pee eishiunyeki ele tung'ani meinyo alo?" 
Acts3:13 Enkai e Abraham, o Isaak o Yakobo, Enkai oo loo papa, naishoo Osinka lenye Yesu, enkitoo, Intae ooitarasaitie ninye aaisho lelo ooitoreisho, nitanyaita intae ninye te dukuya Pilato, etejo ninye alaku aisho elo." 
Acts3:14 Kake itanyaita intae Ilo Sinyati naa Supat. Niomonunu olarani meishori intae. 
Acts3:15 Niariara metua ilo aishoroni le nkishui. Kake eitopiwuo Enkai ninye aitung'uaa ilootuata, nikira iyiook lchakenini le ina bae." 
Acts3:16 Enkarna e Yesu o enkirukoto e nkarna enye naitagolo ele tung'ani lidolitata niyiololo, ore enkirukoto tiatua Yesu neishoo ele tung'ani ena biyotisho nalulung'a nidolitata pooki." 
Acts3:17 “Ore naa taata, ilalashera laainei, kayiolo ajo ore intae o lelo aitoriak linyi, te nkaraki emodai pee intaasa Yesu ina." 
Acts3:18 Etolimuo apake Enkai too nkutukie oo loibonok lenyena pooki ajo, meeta nchere pee meitamei Kristo lenye; netaa te kuna naatasate eitabayie." 
Acts3:19 Erridutu naa, embelekenyakinoto Enkai, pee ejutori ng'ok inyi," 
Acts3:20 o pee epuonu nkatitin naayagieki enkishui, naaing'uaa enetii Olaitoriani, Enkai, oo sii pee eirriu Yesu, laa ninye ilo Kristo lenye otisiraka apake intae." 
Acts3:21 Meeta kata nemeng'as ninye abik te Keper o metaba anaa neitang'ejuki pooki toki anaa enatolimuo apake Enkai te dukuya too nkutukie oo loibonok lenyena sinyat. 
Acts3:22 Amu etejo Musa, ‘Keirriwaki intae Olaitoriani Enkai oloiboni anaa apa pee aairriu nanu, olaa olo lorere linyi. Entoning ake mbaa pooki naaliki ninye intae." 
Acts3:23 Ore oltung'ani pooki lemening enajo ilo oiboni le Nkai, neari aaidaikie to lorere.’" 
Acts3:24 Netolimutuo lelo oibonok le Nkai, pooki ooiroro, ebaiki Samuel o lelo ootusujutua ninye, eibalunye sii apa ninche kuna olong'i." 
Acts3:25 Irara intae inkera e lelo oibonok le Nkai, o ne ilo sotua oishoo Enkai iloo minyi, anaa pee ejoki Abraham, ‘Te ishoi ino emayiani iloreren pooki le nkop.’" 
Acts3:26 Metaa Enkai nailepunye Osinka lenye, naa intae eiterua airriwaki, pee emayian intae pooki aibelekeny entung'uai inkoitoi inyi e nkarruoisho.”" 
Acts4:1 Ore eirorie Petero o Yohana olorere nepuonu ilapolosak o lkitok loo larripok le nkaji e Nkai o Sadukayo enetii ninche. 
Acts4:2 Netagorote te nkaraki naiteng'enita ilkipaareta olorere aaliki aajoki te Yesu etumi empiunoto o lootuata. 
Acts4:3 Neibung ninche aapik jila o mekenyu, amu emuto ina kata." 
Acts4:4 Kake eiruko ilkumok le lelo ootoning'o ilo rorei; naa kejo esiana oo lewa matabai nkalifuni miet. 
Acts4:5 Ore te nkolong natusujua ina neiturrurro ilarikok o lpayiani loo Lyahudi, o laiteng'enak loo nkitanapat te nebo te Yerusalem." 
Acts4:6 Netii Olapolosani Kitok oji Ananias, netii Kaiafas, o Yohana o Aleksanta o kulikae ake lo lmarei lo Lapolosani Kitok." 
Acts4:7 Neitasheyie lelo kipaareta te dukuya ninche neikilikuan aajoki, “Kaji intae nkuna pee itaasa ena? Kaa golon ena niatata, naa keneng'ae enkarna nitaasishore?”" 
Acts4:8 Ore eiganya Petero Enkiyang'et Sinyati, newaliki ajoki, “Lo kituaak lo lorere, o lpayiani," 
Acts4:9 te naa taa keikilikuanishoreki iyiook tele kekun te mbae supat naitaasaki oltung'ani maima o eneikuna pee eishiunyeki ele tung'ani," 
Acts4:10 neishiaakino te niyiolouu intae pooki, neishiaakino neyiolou olorere pooki loo Siraeli nchere, ore pee eitashe ele tung'ani te dukuya intae aa biyoto katukul, naa te nkaraki engolon e nkarna e Yesu Kristo le Nasaret lishomo intae aashe neitopiwuo Enkai ninye aitung'uaa ilootuata." 
Acts4:11 Yesu eimakita lkigerot pee ejo, ‘Ilo soit litemenaitie intae ilashetak otaa osoit kitok lo lmairroto.’" 
Acts4:12 Meetae tukul likae otumieki enjeunoto, nemeetae ai arna naishoruno te nkop pooki, naishooki ltung'ana pee kijeunye.”" 
Acts4:13 Ore pee edol Enkiguana ina natishirrakita Petero o Yohana, nemusu aajo ltung'ana ake ninche lemeeta enkisuma nashomo, neme ng'eni sii, neing'asia pee eyiolou aajo ninche lapa ooisiritore Yesu." 
Acts4:14 Ore te nkaraki nadolita ilo tung'ani oishiunyeki eitashe te nebo ninche, nelau enawaliki." 
Acts4:15 Kake ore pee eitanap ninche meipung'o te nkaji e nkiguana, neiteru lpayiani aaiguana oopeny." 
Acts4:16 Nejo kuna: “Kaa kintaas kulo tung'ana? Amu eibale ake ninye too ltung'ana pooki oomanya Yerusalem nchere ninche etaasishoreki te na bae naba nji e nking'asia, nimikiindim sii aatomiki." 
Acts4:17 Kake ore naa pee meitadarari ena bae tiatua olorere, maing'odia, nikirishie kulo tung'ana pee meigil aairorie likae tung'ani te na arna.”" 
Acts4:18 Neipotu ninche neitanap nereiki aajoki pee meigil ake aairorie aashu eiteng'en likae tung'ani te nkarna e Yesu. 
Acts4:19 Kake etawalikitia Petero o Yohana aajoki ninche, “Entirish intae oopeny maate enaishiaakino te Nkai, te naa ai intae kining ana ke Nkai." 
Acts4:20 Amu mikiindim ake iyiook aatapal mikilimu inikitoduaa o nikitoning'o.” 
Acts4:21 Neitoki ake ina kiguana aaing'ode ninche neitirrishaki oleng, neitoki aaisho epuo. Etalaita taa katukul enaitameyie ninche amu errepita ltung'ana pooki Enkai teina nataasaki." 
Acts4:22 Amu ore ilo tung'ani oitaasaki ina e nking'asia aaishiunye neitogiroyie larin artam. 
Acts4:23 Ore pee eing'ueikini Petero o Yohana, nepuonu enetii ilchoreta lenye, nelikioo nena pooki naatiaakita ninche ilapolosak kituaak o lpayiani." 
Acts4:24 Neisho ninche pee ening nena, neilepie tenebo iltoiloishi lenye aailepakinye Enkai ejo: “Olaitoriani, oitobira Keper o enkop o enaiposha, o nena pooki naatii," 
Acts4:25 naa iyie oirorie Papa lang Daudi ilo sinka lino, te Nkiyang'et Sinyati, pee ejo, ‘Kainyoo pee epush Iloreren leme Lyahudi, neipiru ltung'ana enkiguana nemeaku?" 
Acts4:26 Etanapate laiguanak kituaak le nkop, nesoto laitoriak te nebo, aa Olaitoriani Enkai earare, o ilo lenye otubukokoki eilata aaput.’" 
Acts4:27 Amu kesipa nchere tiatua ena anasa apa esotokinoi Osinka lino Yesu, osinka lino sinyati laa ninye itubukoko eilata aput, ninye etasotokinote Herode o Pontio Pilato o Loreren leme Lyahudi o ltung'ana loo Siraeli," 
Acts4:28 pee eitaas enapake naidipa magilanisho ino o enkiguana ino makewan atejo keaku. 
Acts4:29 Ore naa taata, Olaitoriani, toduaa iyie ina king'odia enye, nincho isinkan linono meiroro ororei lino te mpijan pooki." 
Acts4:30 Nintorioo iyie enkaina ino aishiunye olorere; ninchoru metaasi ilmonek o mbaa e nking'asia te nkarna e Yesu, Osinka lino sinyati.”" 
Acts4:31 Ore pee eomon neigirigiro ine netumore, neiput ninche pooki Enkiyang'et Sinyati neshirraki aairo ororei le Nkai." 
Acts4:32 Neaku lelo pooki ooiruko ilo ltau obo o le yieunoto nabo, nemeetae olojo inenyenak imasaa naata, amu etang'ara ninche ntokitin pooki naata." 
Acts4:33 Nelimu ilkipaareta te ngolon shakenisho e mpiunoto o Laitoriani Yesu; nelotu empiris e Nkai shumata ninche pooki. 
Acts4:34 Nemeetae hoo obo te ninche olau toki, amu ore lelo apa ooata masaa oo nkurman aashu inoo nkajijik, nemir neyau mpisai naainosieki nena masaa," 
Acts4:35 neyaki ilkipaareta pee eoriki pooki tung'ani, too nkiririkinot oo yieunot enye." 
Acts4:36 Neetae Yosef, oishoo lkipaareta enkarna aajo Barnaba (kejo ina oloitagol ilkulikae oishuaa) naa oloo Lawi, laa ole nkop e Kupro," 
Acts4:37 neeta ninye enkurma, nemir, neyau iropiyiani naainosie, neyaki lkipaareta." 
Acts5:1 Kake etii oltung'ani oji Ananias, o enkitok enye naji Safira, otimira erubata enkurma enye," 
Acts5:2 kake neshumaki kewan ematua oo mpisai, eyiolo enkitok enye, neyaki ilkipaareta nkulie naatelekutua." 
Acts5:3 Nejoki Petero, “Ananias, kainyoo pee inchoo Sheitani meitoria oltau lino teleja Enkiyang'et Sinyati adung'oo ematua oo mpisai nitimirie te nkurma ino?" 
Acts5:4 Aimme ninono apa eton eitu imir, naa ninono mpisai indipa atimira? Kaji naa etiu pee, itudutayie to ltau lino ajo aas ina? Mme taa oltung'ani iteleja kake Enkai iteleja!”" 
Acts5:5 Ore ake pee ening Ananias ina nebatata neye. Ore lelo pooki ootoning'o neiput enkuretisho. 
Acts5:6 Nejing'u lbarnot, neirin osesen lenye, neipung'ie, nepuo aanukaa." 
Acts5:7 Ore etulusoitie saai uni nejing'u enkitok enye nemeyiolo ninye nena naatupukutuo. 
Acts5:8 Nejoki Petero ninye, “Tolikioki sii iyie, amaa, kena siana inosie enkurma inyi? Ei mpisai esiana naje ake inosie?” Nejoki, “Ee esiana naje ake.”" 
Acts5:9 Nejoki taa Petero, “Kaji etiu pee itoning'okinote intae aatem Enkiyang'et o Laitoriani? Ng'ura ajo nenena nkejek oo laduoo ooshomo aanukaa olpayian lino naatii kutuk aji, naa iyie sii epuonu aaipung'ie aaya.”" 
Acts5:10 Nebatata nabo kata te nkalo oo nkejek enyena neye; nejing'u lelo barnot neinepu etua, neipung'ie aaya, nepuoi aanukaa aaitatashaki olpayian lenye." 
Acts5:11 Neiput enkuretisho sapuk ina sirit e lelo ooiruko pooki, o lelo pooki ootoning'o kuna baa." 
Acts5:12 Etaasaki apa ilmonek o mbaa e nking'asia tiatua iltung'ana too nkaik oo lkipaareta. Netii apa pooki tenebo to olgoriet le Solomon. 
Acts5:13 Nemeetae oltung'ani leme ole ina sirit oitieu atushulare ninche, hoo neimaki ake ltung'ana pooki esupatisho enye," 
Acts5:14 neponari ake sii esiana enye too lewa o nkituaak kumok naairuk Olaitoriani. 
Acts5:15 Ore te nkaraki nena pooki naasita ilkipaareta, neaku kenapuni iltamuoyia mbat oo nkoitoi oo nkaulele, neirragieki too rruatin o too lkarash paa ore eim Petero ine, neporoo oloip lenye kulikae lenye." 
Acts5:16 Neiturrurrunye sii ltung'ana loo nkang'itie naamanita Yerusalem, eyau iltamuoyia lenye o lelo ooata loiriruani; neishiunyeki ninche pooki." 
Acts5:17 Kake einyio Olapolosani Kitok, o lelo pooki ooboitare (oora le sirit oo Sadukayo), eiputa lelo pooki olom," 
Acts5:18 nepik ilkipaareta nkaik, nepuo aaen te jila napiki olorere." 
Acts5:19 Kake etabolo olmalaika lo Laitoriani nchomito e jila kewarie, neitupuku, nejoki," 
Acts5:20 “Enchom intae, entasho eroro te nkaji e Nkai entoliki iltung'ana mbaa pooki e na kishui.”" 
Acts5:21 Ore pee ening ninche ina neyooki ajing enkaji e Nkai enasirie neiteng'enisho. Kake eewuo Olapolosani Kitok, o lelo ooboitare, neiturrur enkiguana nalulung'a te nebo, o erikore pooki oo Siraeli, neirriwaa olkilikuai jila metorikuni ilkipaareta." 
Acts5:22 Kake etejo sikarini maetu jila nelau; neitu aalimu," 
Acts5:23 aajo, “Kineputua jila eikeno aitobiraki, neitashoo larripok too nchomito: kake kitejo matabol, metii oltung'ani otii atua.”" 
Acts5:24 Ore taa pee ening olkitok loo sikarini le nkaji e Nkai o Lapolosak kulo rorei, nemilo oleng etalaita enapukoki ina." 
Acts5:25 Nelotu oltung'ani obo nejoki ninche, “Ore lang'ole tung'ana litipika jila, etii enkaji e Nkai eitashe aaiteng'en olorere.”" 
Acts5:26 Nelo taa olkitok loo sikarini erikito sikarini lenyena neriku lkipaareta, kake eitu earu amu etureita olorere, meari ake ninche too soito." 
Acts5:27 Ore pee eriku, neitasheyie te dukuya enkiguana. Neikilikuan Olapolosani Kitok" 
Acts5:28 ajoki, “Kitutukunyakita apa intae nikintanap intae pee mintokiki ake aiteng'enisho te na arna: naa noolo intae ooibulunye Yerusalem pooki ena kiteng'enare inyi, ijojo pee iyauu osarge lele tung'ani shumata iyiook.”" 
Acts5:29 Kake etawalikitia Petero o lelo kulikae kipaareta nejoki, “Enkai pae kining iyiook alang te nikining iltung'ana." 
Acts5:30 Enkai oo loo papa naitopiwuo Yesu, lishomo intae aar, aashe to lchani." 
Acts5:31 Ninye eilepie Enkai te nkaina enye e tatene metaa ninye Olaiguanani Kitok, neaku Olaitajeunoni, oisho Siraeli enkirridunoto o empalakinoto oo ng'ok." 
Acts5:32 Nikira iyiook ilchakenini te kuna baa, naa shakeni Enkiyang'et Sinyati, naisho Enkai lelo ooning metoning'o ninche.”" 
Acts5:33 Ore pee ening enkiguana ena, nerem iltauja lenye negoro oleng, neyieu near ninche metuata." 
Acts5:34 Kake einyo obo le ina kiguana, loo Lfarisayo oji Gamaliel, laa olaiteng'enani kitok loo nkitanapat, oyanyit iltung'ana pooki, nejo meitupukuni lelo lewa te nkiti kata." 
Acts5:35 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Lo lewa loo Siraeli, entodol ake ate te kulo tung'ana, te na bae niyieuu nintaasiasa." 
Acts5:36 Amu einyio apa ai kata Teudas, neitaa kewan likae tung'ani kitok, nesuj iltung'ana oobaya iip ong'uan. Neari ninye, o lelo pooki ootoning'o ninye, neisardakieki, neaku pesho." 
Acts5:37 Ore eshomo ilo neinyototo Yudas le Galilaya, too napa olong'i e nkikenare, nerik sii ninye ltung'ana ootusuja, neidaaya sii ninye; ore lelo pooki ootusuja, neisardaka." 
Acts5:38 Najoki naa nanu intae taata, entalam kulo tung'ana, entapal. Amu tenaa kenoo ltung'ana ena kitobirata aashu ena siaai naa kebatata," 
Acts5:39 kake te naa kene Nkai, nimindimidimi intae aatabatat ninche; naa entodol ake meaku Enkai iararere!”" 
Acts5:40 Nening ninche ina kikoo e Gamaliel: ore pee eipotu lkipaareta meetu enetii, near, neitanap meitoki ake aairo te nkarna e Yesu, neisho epuo." 
Acts5:41 Nepuo ninche aaing'uaa ine netii enkiguana eng'ida etoduaa aajo keishiaakino ninche enkitamioto te nkaraki ina arna e Yesu. 
Acts5:42 Ore too nkolong'i pooki, eitu egira ninche meiteng'enisho te nkaji e Nkai o too nkang'itie enye nchere ore Yesu, ninye Kristo." 
Acts6:1 Ore apa te nena olong'i, etoponari esiana oo lkipaareta abul, nejing olong'unyung'unyi erishata oo Lyahudi ooiro enkutuk oo Lgiriki o Lyahudi ooikini enkop enye, ejo lelo loo Lgiriki eji eitololoikiaki inkolia enye te ndaa naorikini anaa ake." 
Acts6:2 Neipot lelo Tomon oaare esirit nalulung'a o lkipaareta te nebo nejoki, “Meishiaakino te nikipal iyiook elikioroto o rorei le Nkai pee kitumoki aisiaayia ltung'ana too mpisai." 
Acts6:3 Ilalashera lang, entegelu intae iltung'ana oopishana liyiololo tiatua ate nchere kebore Enkiyang'et Sinyati nebore eng'eno, pee kincho lelo meitasheiki ena bae." 
Acts6:4 Kake ore iyiook maate, enkomono kisheikino, o elikioroto e le rorei.”" 
Acts6:5 Neitiship ina walata ilo turrur pooki; negelu Stefano, oltung'ani obore enkirukoto o Enkiyang'et Sinyati o Filipo o Prokora o Nikano o Timos o Parmenas o Nikolao, oltung'ani leme oloo Lyahudi laa Antiok eing'uaa, oibelekenye apa ninye ang'amu enkirukoto oo Lyahudi." 
Acts6:6 Neriku ilo turrur lelo aarikoki Lkipaareta; neomonoki, neiteleiki nkaik." 
Acts6:7 Neponari ororei le Nkai, ore esiana oo lkipaareta neponari oleng te Yerusalem, ore ilapolosak kumok neunokino enkirukoto." 
Acts6:8 Ore Stefano, obore empiris e Nkai o engolon, neas imbaa e nking'asia o olmonek tiatua olorere." 
Acts6:9 Kake einyioito kulikae le nkaji e ntumo naji enoo Lkilakuno (amu nejia apa eji), o Lkirene, o le Aleksantria o Lkilikia o looing'uaa Asia, aaishankarrarre Stefano." 
Acts6:10 Kake nelaikino aairisha eng'eno o Enkiyang'et nairorie Stefano. 
Acts6:11 Nepuo too nkisudorot aarop iltung'ana ooetuo aajo, “Kitoning'o ninye eiro amor Musa, nemor Enkai.”" 
Acts6:12 Neinuaaki olorere, o lpayiani o laiteng'enak loo nkitanapat, nepuonu lelo enetii Stefano, neibung aayaki enkiguana." 
Acts6:13 Nesotu ltung'ana ooaku lchakenini le lejare, nejo lelo, “Megira ele tung'ani eitu esukeny ene wueji sinyati, nesukeny inkitanapat." 
Acts6:14 Amu kitoning'o iyiook ninye ejo, eji keyooki ilo oji Yesu le Nasaret aar ene wueji, neibelekeny nkoon naaitanapa iyiook Musa.”" 
Acts6:15 Ore lelo pooki ootii ina kiguana pee eing'or enkomom e Stefano, nedol eyia anaa enkomom o lmalaika." 
Acts7:1 Nejoki Olapolosani Kitok Stefano, “Ei nejia etiu nena baa?”" 
Acts7:2 Nejo Stefano, “Ilalashera laainei, o loo papa! Entoning'oki! Enkai e nkitoo naipang'aka papa lang Abraham eton emanya Mesopotamia, eitu eidur alo Haran," 
Acts7:3 nejoki, ‘Tung'uai olmarei linyi o enkop inyi, shomo enkop naautaki.’" 
Acts7:4 Neaku etung'uayie enkop e Kaldea nelo amany Haran. Ore pee eitianya menye Abraham, nejoki Enkai meidurraki ena kop taata namanya intae." 
Acts7:5 Eitu taa eisho Enkai ninye hoo enkiti wueji metujung'o aitaa enenye, eitu hoo eisho enkiti rashe e nkop, kake eishoo Enkai ninye o siligi ajoki keaku ene ishoi enye eshomo ninye. Naa ore taa ejoki Enkai ninye nejia, meeta Abraham enkerai." 
Acts7:6 Inji etiaaka Enkai ninye, ‘Kepuo kenya ilng'anayio linono aamany ai kop eeiking'a, nepuoi aaisinkanishore’ teine neinyali too larin iip ong'uan." 
Acts7:7 Kake kadung'oki enkiguana ilo orere oisinkanishore Enkai najo. ‘Naa ore te siadi neidurru teina kop naapuonu aaserem nanu tene wueji.’ 
Acts7:8 Neisho Enkai ina kata Abraham olkerreti le muratare. Neiu Abraham Isaak, nemurat te nkolong e isiet; neiu Isaak Yakobo, neiu Yakobo lelo loo papa pokira tomon o aare." 
Acts7:9 “Ore te nkaraki olom oatayie apa lelo loo papa Yosef, olalashe lenye, nemiraki Misiri, kake etii apa Enkai te nebo ninye," 
Acts7:10 nesaru too sinaitin lenyena pooki, neisho ninye omom o eng'eno nagut te dukuya Farao, olaiguanani le Misiri; neisho ninye meitoria Misiri neitore enkaji enye pooki." 
Acts7:11 Neaku eewuo olameyu Misiri, o Kanaan, nelotu osina sapuk; nelau lelo loo papa entoki nanya." 
Acts7:12 Kake ore pee ening Yakobo nchere keetae enkurma te Misiri, neirriwaa lelo loo papa te nkata e dukuya." 
Acts7:13 Ore te nkata e are neibalakinye Yosef kewan ilalashera lenyena, neyiolou Farao, olorere le Yosef." 
Acts7:14 Neirriwaa Yosef olkilikuai aipotu menye, Yakobo, o lmarei lenye pooki, iltung'ana oobaya ntomoni naapishana o miet." 
Acts7:15 Nedoyio Yakobo alo Misiri, teine eitianye ninye o lelo loo papa." 
Acts7:16 Nenapuni seseni lenye aayau Shekem nenukari te nkurare apa nainyiang'ua Abraham ainyiang'u too layiok le Hamor te Shekem te nkosholai. 
Acts7:17 “Kake ore pee etaanu enkata apa naisiligie Enkai Abraham, nebul olorere oleng te Misiri," 
Acts7:18 o metaba anaa netumi likae aiguanani kitok te Misiri lemeyiolo Yosef. 
Acts7:19 Neesek ilo olorere lang, nearaki te ngolon iloo papa metanang'ai nkera naaini ong'ata peyie eye." 
Acts7:20 Teina kata eini Musa naa sidai apa ninye oleng te dukuya Enkai; neitubuluni ninye lapaitin okuni te nkaji e menye: 
Acts7:21 ore pee eyai ninye ong'ata, nedumu entito e Farao, neitubulu aitoti, neitaa olenye." 
Acts7:22 Neiteng'eni Musa aaishaki eng'eno pooki oo Lmisiri; neaku magilani to rorei o too nkiaasin. 
Acts7:23 “Ore pee eaku Musa oloo larin artam nejo kelo abaiki ilalashera lenyena. 
Acts7:24 Nedol obo lenye einyalitai oltung'ani le Misiri; nelo amitu aitalaku te ilo Misiri near metua. 
Acts7:25 (Aa kejo apa ninye keyiolou olorere lenye aajo ninye eyooki Enkai aisiaaishore elaku ninche te sinkaisho; kake eitu eyiolou ninche ina). 
Acts7:26 Ore te nkolong nasujita ina nedol Siraeli aare ooara, nejo aitaiki osotua. Nejoki, ‘Oyie, irara doi lalashera, kainyoo iorrorro pokira?’" 
Acts7:27 Kake eiponyayie ilo oinyal olikae nejoki, ‘Ai ng'ae doi likinchoo iyie ntoria nirish iyiook?" 
Acts7:28 Ijo sa pee kiaar matua anaa eninkuna olang'ole Misiri?’ 
Acts7:29 Neisik Musa te nkaraki ilo rorei, nelo aaku olomoni te nkop e Midian, nelo aiu layiok aare teine." 
Acts7:30 “Ore etulusoitie larin artam, neipang'aki olmalaika Musa ti ong'ata o ldoinyo le Sinai, to sanag oyupuyup." 
Acts7:31 Ore pee edol Musa neing'asiayie ina, nejo anyikaki adol, nelotu oltoilo lo Laitoriani ojo," 
Acts7:32 ‘Kara Enkai oo loo minyi, Enkai e Abraham o Isaak, o Yakobo.’ Neikirikira Musa meitieu aing'ora." 
Acts7:33 Nejoki Olaitoriani ninye, ‘Talaku namuka too nkejek inono, amu ore ene nintasheyie, ewueji nesinya." 
Acts7:34 Kesipa nchere atoduaa osina loo ltung'ana laainei te Misiri, natoning'o olkiyioi lenye, naewuo pee asaru: wou naa taata amu, kaairriwaa Misiri.’" 
Acts7:35 “Olapa taa Musa ilo otanyaita nkera oo Siraeli ejo, ‘Ai ng'ae doi likinchoo iyie ntoria nirish iyiook?’ Ninye eirriwaka Enkai metaa oloitore nesaru te nkaina e ilo malaika oipang'aka to sanag oyupuyup." 
Acts7:36 Ilo tung'ani otorikuo, eidipa ataasa ine nking'asia o nkitoduaat te Misiri o te naiposha nanyokie, o ti ong'ata, larin artam." 
Acts7:37 Ilo Musa otiaaka nkera oo Siraeli, ‘Keputoki intae Enkai oloiboni too lalashera linyi, laaijo nanu.’" 
Acts7:38 Olapa taa otii atua ina siamo ti ong'ata te nebo olmalaika apa oirorie ninye to ldoinyo le Sinai, neirorie loo papa netang'amua sii nkitanapat naaishu naaishoo iyiook." 
Acts7:39 Ninye eitu ening iloo papa, neaku etaaraitie aarishie ate, nerrinyo ltauja lenye aaito Misiri," 
Acts7:40 nejoki ninche Aaron, ‘Ntobiraki iyiook inkaitin naarik iyiook; amu ore ele oji Musa, otorikuo iyiook aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri, mikiyiolo inaanoto ninye.’" 
Acts7:41 Neitobiru enkitanyaanyukoto o lashe te nena olong'i, neyaki lasarri lenye enkitanyaanyukoto, neng'idakino esiaai oo nkaik enye." 
Acts7:42 Kake eibelekenya Enkai neishooyo ninche meteserema lakir le shumata anaa enatisiraki aajo te mbuku oo loibonok le Enkai, ‘Ei nanu nchoo ng'uesi naayieng'i te lelo arin pokira artam ti ong'ata, na aji e Siraeli?" 
Acts7:43 Itudumutua olng'obor le Molek, o lakira le nkai e Rafan, nkitanyaanyukot nintobirakita ate iteserema; kaidurrie naa intae aitogiroo Babilon.’" 
Acts7:44 “Neeta apa iloo papa olapa ng'obor le shakeni ti ong'ata. Neitobiraki ninye ilo anaa enaitanapa Enkai Musa meiturubare anaa enaitoduaaki. 
Acts7:45 Ilo ng'obor enyaakita loo papa aanapu te nebo o Yoshua pee epuonu aajung enkop etaarayie Enkai kulikae oreren aing'atarie ninche. Nebik ilo ng'obor o metabaiki enkata e Daudi. 
Acts7:46 Enoto ninye kirotetisho te Enkai, neomonu meishoo meteshetaki Enkai e Yakobo enkaji." 
Acts7:47 Kake Solomon oteshetaka enkaji. 
Acts7:48 Hoo nememany Olotii Shumata Aisul te pooki inkajijik naashetuni too nkaik: anaa enatejo oloiboni," 
Acts7:49 ‘Olorika lai le nkitoo Keper, naa olorika loo nkejek aainei enkop. Kenkaji natiu aja pasa kishetakiki? Olaitoriani ojo: Naa kaji ine nayeng'iyeng'are?" 
Acts7:50 Ai mme enkaina ai naitobira kuna pooki?’ 
Acts7:51 “Lo tung'ana oogol ilukuny, lememurata ltauja nememurata nkiyiaa, igolong'akiki oshi ake Enkiyang'et Sinyati; ore enapake nataasa iloo minyi, ina itaasa sii intae." 
Acts7:52 Kalo oiboni eitu einyal iloo minyi? Netara metuata lelo apa ooitera aalimu elotunoto e ilo obo supat, lietuo intae aaitarasaa niariaara metua;" 
Acts7:53 naa intae ootang'amutua nkitanapat, anaa enaishorutua lmalaika kake eitu ntabayaya.”" 
Acts7:54 Ore ake pee ening enkiguana kuna baa, neminisu neonyiki lala te ngoro." 
Acts7:55 Ore ninye Stefano oiganya Enkiyang'et Sinyati neitirring'a aing'or shumata, nedol enkitoo e Enkai o Enkerai e Tung'ani eitashe te nkaina e tatene e Enkai," 
Acts7:56 nejo, “Kadolita etabole Keper, neitashe Enkerai e Tung'ani te nkaina e tatene e Enkai.”" 
Acts7:57 Kake etabuaa ninche to ltoilo sapuk, neiken inkiyiaa enye, nekuetiki pooki te nebo;" 
Acts7:58 nearaa auluo e ina anasa neurrui too soito: ore lelo ootaa shakeni neirragie nkilani enye te nkalo oo nkejek o lbarnoti oji Saulo. 
Acts7:59 Neirrui ninche Stefano too soito, eomonito ninye Olaitoriani, ajo, “Olaitoriani Yesu, tang'amai enkiyang'et ai.”" 
Acts7:60 Negil kung, nebuak ajo to ltoilo sapuk, “Olaitoriani, mintalak ninche ena ng'oki.” Ore pee ejo nejia nudung'o tau." 
Acts8:1 Netonyorrayie sii ninye Saulo ina keeya, nataaraki Stefano. Nedumakino ina olong ake osina kitok ina sirit oo looiruko Kristo natii Yerusalem, neidapashakino pooki lkirinen le Yudea o le Samaria, ilkipaareta ake ootelekutua." 
Acts8:2 Nedumunye ltung'ana aseremak le Enkai aapuo aanukaa Stefano, eishiraki to ltoiloishi sapuki." 
Acts8:3 Kake etetema ninye Saulo ajo amut ina sirit pooki, aa lewa aashu nkituaak, nejing'aki too nkajijik, neikurtutaa anang'aki jila." 
Acts8:4 Neaku ore lelo airukok ooidapashakinote nena kuapi nepuo ninche aalikioo ilo rorei. 
Acts8:5 Nelo Filipo enkanasa oo Samaria neinosaki ninche Kristo. 
Acts8:6 Ore ina siamo pooki neinining oleng, neng'amu pooki te nebo ilo rorei oinosaka Filipo, etoning'o nedol ninche nkitoduaat naataasa." 
Acts8:7 Ore lkumok lenye ooata loiriruani torrok, nepuku aaing'uaa eishir to ltoilo sapuk: ore lkumok oikaolote o lmaiman, neishiunyeki." 
Acts8:8 Nejing eng'ida sapuk ina anasa. 
Acts8:9 Kake eetae apa oltung'ani obo teine oji Simon oosh enkidong teina anasa, neing'asiayie ilo orere le Samaria, eitaa kewan likae tung'ani kitok," 
Acts8:10 nening pooki ninye oloti o lbotor, ejo, “Ore ele tung'ani, ele taa oshi enoshi naji ‘Engolon Kitok Enkai.’ ”" 
Acts8:11 Neinining ninche ninye amu keing'asiayie ninche te nkata naado, eing'asiayie nena kidong'i enyena." 
Acts8:12 Kake ore pee epuonu aairuk ilomon supati le nkitoria e Nkai ooinosu Filipo, neimaka enkarna e Yesu Kristo, neibatisae ninche ndung'ot pokira, ilewa o nkituaak." 
Acts8:13 O meiruko sii ninye Simon; ore pee eibatisae, neaku Filipo eisiritore. Ore pee edol nkitoduaat o mbaa sapuki e ngolon naas Filipo neitoki ninye aing'asia." 
Acts8:14 Ore pee ening lelo kipaareta ootii Yerusalem nchere etang'amutua iltung'ana loo Samaria ororei le Enkai, neirriwaki Petero o Yohana." 
Acts8:15 Ore pee ebaya ninche, neomonoki lelo ooiruko pee eng'amu Enkiyang'et Sinyati;" 
Acts8:16 amu eton apa meetae olenye otadoikio Enkiyang'et Sinyati, keidipaki ake aaibatisa te nkarna o Laitoriani Yesu." 
Acts8:17 Neiteleiki Petero o Yohana ninche nkaik neng'amu Enkiyang'et Sinyati. 
Acts8:18 Ore taa pee edol Simon ajo te neiteleiki lkipaareta oltung'ani nkaik neishori ilo Enkiyang'et Sinyati, neisho Petero o Yohana mpisai," 
Acts8:19 nejoki, “Enchooki sii ninye nanu ena kidimata paa ore ake oltung'ani laiteleiki nkaik neng'amu Enkiyang'et Sinyati.”" 
Acts8:20 Kake etiaaka Petero ninye, “Indaai o nena pisai inono! Amu itejo ainosie enkishorunoto e Enkai mpisai!" 
Acts8:21 Miata iyie ematua aashu erubata te na bae. Amu meisiriri oltau lino tialo Enkai. 
Acts8:22 Irridu naa enkarruoisho ino niomon Olaitoriani pee idol te naa eikipalakini ina yieunoto o ltau lino. 
Acts8:23 Amu adol ajo kibore enduaran o lodua, niteenikine atua ng'ok.”" 
Acts8:24 Newaliki Simon ajoki, “Entoomonokoki intae to Laitoriani pee maatum ake nena baa pooki nitejo.”" 
Acts8:25 Neaku ore pee eidip aaitadedeyie neinosaa ororei lo Laitoriani, nerrinyori Petero o Yohana aapuo Yerusalem, neimaa nkang'itie kumok oo Samaria, einosaa ilo rorei supat." 
Acts8:26 Kake eirorie olmalaika lo Laitoriani Filipo nejoki, “Inyo tanapayu shomo enkalo e kopikop, enkalo e idia oitoi oshi naing'uaa Yerusalem elo Gasa, (enoshi e mpusel).”" 
Acts8:27 Neinyototo alo. Naa ng'ura! Nedol oltung'ani kitok le Etiopia. Naa osunash ele tung'ani naa kitok te nkitoria e Kandake, aa taa, enkaiguanani kitok e Etiopia. Naa ilo tung'ani oitore masaa enyena pooki. Neewuo ilo Yerusalem aseremisho" 
Acts8:28 paa enkop enye egira arrinyo alo, neton te ngarri enye oo mbartan aisum embuku o loiboni le Nkai oji Isaya." 
Acts8:29 Nejoki Enkiyang'et Sinyati Filipo, “Shomo tinyikaki, turubare ina garri.”" 
Acts8:30 Nekuet Filipo alo enetii, nening ajo embuku e Isaya eisumita, neikilikuan ajoki, “Ining'u sa nena baa nisumita?”" 
Acts8:31 Nejoki ilo kitok, “Kaji aiko te naning'u eitu atum oltung'ani laautaa?” Nejoki Filipo meilepaki ina garri enye aton atashare." 
Acts8:32 Ore ine wueji neisuma ilo tung'ani too lkigerot naa ewueji nejo, “Etorikoki anaa olkuoo le ker opuoi aayieng; anaa enoshi ker nemebol enkutuk edung'i ilpapit, eitu sii ninye ebol enkutuk enye." 
Acts8:33 Ore te nborron enye, neoruni ninye esipata: naa ae ng'ae naa olimu eishoi enye? Amu eisha enkishui enye te nkop.”" 
Acts8:34 Newaliki ilo kitok sunash Filipo nejoki, “Aatasayia tolikioki, ae ng'ae doi eimaki ele oiboni le Nkai, ai kewan eimaki anaa ai likae?”" 
Acts8:35 Nebol taa Filipo enkutuk neiteru te ilo kigeroto, neinosaki ninye ilomon supati le Yesu."
