Acts8:36 Ore epuoito, nebaiki ewueji netii enkare. Nejo ilo sunash, “Nena enkare kainyoo namit aaibatisai?”" 
Acts8:37 [Nejoki Filipo ninye, “Kindimi pae aaibatisa te naa iruko iyie to ltau lino pooki.” Nejo, “Airuko nchere Yesu Kristo oinoti le Nkai.”]" 
Acts8:38 Neitanapisho meitasheyieki engarri; nedoyio pokira aare aapuo enkare, Filipo o ilo sunash, neibatisae ninye." 
Acts8:39 Ore pee eilepu ninche te nkare, newuapaa Enkiyang'et o Laitoriani Filipo teine. Neitu eitoki ilo sunash adol, nelo ninye enkop enye te ng'ida." 
Acts8:40 Nelo Filipo amaniki kewan etii Asotos. Ore eim ine, neinosaa ilo rorei supat te nena ang'itie pooki o metabai Kaisaria." 
Acts9:1 Kake ore ake eng'uyana Saulo eiture lkipaareta lo Laitoriani ajo kear metuata nelo enetii Olapolosani Kitok 
Acts9:2 aomon impala lelo ooitore nkajijik e ntumo te Dameski, paa te netum iloosujita ina Oitoi teine, neidim atipika nkaik, aa lewa o aa nkituaak, neriku Yerusalem eena." 
Acts9:3 Neaku ore etii Saulo enkoitoi eloito netinyikaka Dameski, neimerlelu nabo kata ewang'an naing'uaa Keper neman ninye." 
Acts9:4 Nebatata aosh enkop nening oltoilo ojoki, “Saulo, Saulo, kainyoo pee kisilisil?”" 
Acts9:5 Neikilikuan ajoki, “Eira ng'ae, Olaitoriani.” Nejoki, “Kara Yesu ilo ligira ainosie osina;" 
Acts9:6 kake inyo tijing'a ena anasa paa teine kilikini eniaas.” 
Acts9:7 Neisirng'ang'a lelo ooisiritore ninye negira aaitashe, naa oltoilo ake etoning'o neitu edol oltung'ani." 
Acts9:8 Neinyototo Saulo nebol inkonyek, nemedol toki. Neaku enkaina eibung'aki aarik atua Dameski." 
Acts9:9 Neya nkolong'i uni aa modooni nemenya endaa nemeok toki. 
Acts9:10 Neetae oloiteng'eni te Dameski oji Ananias. Nejoki Olaitoriani ninye te nduaata, “Ananias,” nejo ninye, “nele nanu, Olaitoriani.”" 
Acts9:11 Nejoki Olaitoriani ninye, “Inyo shomo enoshi oitoi naji Naisiriri, nkilikuanu te nkaji e Yudas oltung'ani le Tarso oji Saulo; amu eomonito ninye," 
Acts9:12 netoduaa oltung'ani te nduaata oji Ananias elotu enetii aiteleiki nkaik pee eitoki adolishoyu.” 
Acts9:13 Kake etawalikia Ananias nejoki, “Olaitoriani, atoning'oyie ele tung'ani too ltung'ana kumok, eneba entorroni naitaasa isinyat linono te Yerusalem;" 
Acts9:14 naa ore tene keeta enkidimata naishoo lapolosak kituaak naenie lelo pooki ooipot enkarna ino.” 
Acts9:15 Kake etiaaka Olaitoriani, “Shomo amu, emasaai ai nageluno ninye pee eya enkarna ai aitayiolo iloreren, o laiguanak o nkera oo Siraeli;" 
Acts9:16 amu kaliki nanu eneba enkitamioto naitamei ninye te nkaraki enkarna ai.” 
Acts9:17 Nelo Ananias nejing ina aji, neiteleiki Saulo nkaik nejoki, “Olalashe lai Saulo, ilo likimpang'aka te nkoitoi niimua, Yesu kewan laairriwua pee ingil adolishoyu, nikingany Enkiyang'et Sinyati.”" 
Acts9:18 Ore ina kata ake neing'abobunye entoki naaijo ilpala too nkonyek enyena neitoki adolishoyu. Neinyototo neibatisae. 
Acts9:19 Ore pee enya endaa netum engolon. Nebik Saulo te nebo o lelo ooiteng'eni otii Dameski nkuti olong'i. 
Acts9:20 Ore teina kata ake too nkajijik e ntumo nelikioo ninye Yesu, nejo, “Enkerai e Enkai ninye.”" 
Acts9:21 Neing'asia lelo pooki ootoning'o ninye nejo, “Aimme olapa tung'ani ele oitayio ntabo te Yerusalem ear lelo ooipot ena arna? Naa ina pee eewuo ene, pee etum ateena kulo neyaki lapolosak kituaak?”" 
Acts9:22 Kake etoponari elikioroto e Saulo atum engolon, neitala enkalo Ilyahudi ootii Dameski eitadedeyie nchere ore Yesu ninye Kristo." 
Acts9:23 Ore etulusoitie nkolong'i kumok, netumo Lyahudi aaiguana peyie ear Saulo metua;" 
Acts9:24 Kake etayiolo Saulo ina kiguana enye. Neaku kerrip ninche nchomito e ina anasa dama o kewarie, ejo pee ear ninye metua;" 
Acts9:25 kake neaku etoriko lkipaareta lenyena ninye kewarie, neitadooyo te suntai e ina anasa, neililioo te nkikapu o metadoi." 
Acts9:26 Ore pee elo Saulo Yerusalem netem ajo ashulare lelo ooiteng'eni le ine, kake etureita ninche pooki, amu meiruk ninche aajo etaa ninye oloiteng'eni." 
Acts9:27 Kake etudumua Barnaba ninye, nerikoki lkipaareta, neinosaki ninche eneikuna Saulo pee edol Olaitoriani te nkoitoi, neliki ninche inaataasa Saulo te Dameski elikioo enkarna e Yesu te mpijan." 
Acts9:28 Neparana o lelo neibulu Yerusalem pooki," 
Acts9:29 nelikioo lomon te mpijan te nkarna o Laitoriani. Neiro aishankarrarre lelo ooiro enkutuk oo Lyunani; neaku kejo maing'oru aasesekuan. 
Acts9:30 Ore pee eyiolou ilalashera, neitadou Saulo aariku Kaisaria, neirriwaa meshomo Tarso." 
Acts9:31 Netum esirit eseriani te Yudea pooki o te Galilaya o te Samaria neitubuluni; nelotie enkuretisho o Laitoriani neitagol Enkiyang'et Sinyati, neponari." 
Acts9:32 Neaku kelo Petero idie o idie abaiki ninche pooki o meeu enetii isinyat oomanya Luda. 
Acts9:33 Netum oltung'ani otii ine oji Aeneas oirraga te rruat larin isiet naa keikaole 
Acts9:34 Nejoki Petero ninye, “Aeneas, kinchiunye Yesu; inyo ntobira erruat ino.” Neinyototo nabo kata." 
Acts9:35 Nedol iltung'ana pooki oomanya Luda o Sharon ninye neibelekenyakino Olaitoriani. 
Acts9:36 Neetae teine te Yopa enaiteng'eni naji Tabita, (eji Dorkas aashu Enkolii). Naa kumok isiaaitin sidain o nkiaasin o lng'ur naataasa ninye." 
Acts9:37 Ore te nena olong'i nemuoyu neye. Ore pee eidip ninche aaisuja, nepuo aairragie to lgilata le shumata." 
Acts9:38 Ore amu kenyikita Luda Yopa, ore pee ening lkipaareta nchere etii Petero ine, neirriwaki ilewa aare nesai aajoki, “Wou sii ake ene nikitii nimimutie.”" 
Acts9:39 Neinyototo Petero airiamariyie ninche. Ore pee ebau, nerik ninche ninye ilo gilata le shumata. Neitashoo nkolia pooki teine aatashare ninye eishirita, neitodol lngotin o nkilani naatiripaka apa Dorkas eton eboitare ninche." 
Acts9:40 Kake eipang'ie Petero ninche pooki boo negil kung aomon: neitoki aibelekenyakino ilo sesen nejoki, “Tabita, topiu!” Nebol ninye nkonyek enyena, ore pee edol Petero, neinyototo aton." 
Acts9:41 Neitarasaki Petero enkaina neitasheyie. Neitoki taa aipot lelo sinyat o nena olia neitarasaki ninche eishu. 
Acts9:42 Neyiolouni ina bae te Yopa pooki, neiruk ilkumok Olaitoriani." 
Acts9:43 Nebik Petero inkolong'i kumok te Yopa te nkaji e Simon, olaitobirani loo lonito." 
Acts10:1 Etii apa Kaisaria, oltung'ani oji Kornelio, laa osajini kitok te sirit oo sikarini oo Roma naji, “Esirit oo Ltalian.”" 
Acts10:2 Oltung'ani apa aseremani neure Enkai ninye o enkaji enye pooki, naa aminin naleng too ltung'ana aisinak loo Lyahudi, neomon ninye Enkai anaa ake." 
Acts10:3 Ore nabo olong noo saa naaudo e ndama, nedol te nduaata eibale olmalaika le Enkai elotu enetii, nejoki, “Kornelio!”" 
Acts10:4 Ore ninye, nekurraki nkonyek te nkirutoto nejoki, “kainyoo lo Kitok?” Nejoki olmalaika ninye, “Etadamua Enkai enkomono ino o eleng'on ino o lng'ur." 
Acts10:5 Irriwai naa taata ltung'ana meshomo Yopa, aariku Simon oji Petero," 
Acts10:6 laa olomoni te nkaji e likae oji Simon, olaitobirani loo lonito, omanya embata e naiposha.”" 
Acts10:7 Ore pee elo ilo malaika aing'uaa ninye, neipot ilaisiaayiak aare le nkaji enye, o sikari obo oserem Enkai, oisiritore ninye anaa ake." 
Acts10:8 Ore pee einosaki nena pooki naataasate neirriwaa ninche Yopa. 
Acts10:9 Ore enkolong natusujua ina, etii lelo enkoitoi, etinyikakita ina anasa, nelo Petero aomon te shumata enkaji, etaa enaipirie enkolong." 
Acts10:10 Netir Petero esumash oleng, neyieu endaa. Kake ore eton eitobiritai, neimug neidetidet." 
Acts10:11 Nedol shumata etabole nedou entoki naaijo olkarasha oililio too lcholo pokira oong'uan eililiunye adoiki enkop; 
Acts10:12 nebore ng'uesi pooki oo nkejek maa ong'uan o naaikurtutari te nkop o motonyi e shumata. 
Acts10:13 Nelotu oltoilo ojoki ninye, “Inyo Petero, teyiang'a nosa.”" 
Acts10:14 Kake etiaaka Petero, “Mme nejia Olaitoriani; amu eitu ai kata anya nanu entoki naiduruk anaa enturuj.”" 
Acts10:15 Neigil ake oltoilo alotu enetii nejoki, “Ore entoki naa Enkai naitukuo, nimintaa iyie enturuj.”" 
Acts10:16 Neigilieki ina bae katitin uni: neito ilo karasha Keper. 
Acts10:17 Ore enoshi kata eing'asie ninye Petero oleng eiguana makewan aing'oru enajoki ina duaata natupukoko, nemaniki lang'ole tung'ana ooirriwua Kornelio, ooikilikuanu enkaji e Simon ooitashe te kishomi." 
Acts10:18 Neipotisho aaikilikuanu te naa ketii Simon oji Petero ina aji. 
Acts10:19 Ore eton egira Petero aibirribir ina natamanikia, nejoki Enkiyang'et ninye, Ng'ura, “Nelelo ltung'ana okuni liking'oru." 
Acts10:20 Kake inyo tadoi shomo, naa iriamariyie, nimitum ake olng'ash, amu nanu oirriwua ninche.”" 
Acts10:21 Nedoyio Petero alo enetii lelo tung'ana, nejoki, Ng'ura, “Nanu doi ele ling'oruru; kainyoo nayawua intae?”" 
Acts10:22 Nejoki ninche ninye, “Kornelio, osajini kitok, oltung'ani supat oserem Enkai naa yioloti eyanyit olorere pooki loo Lyahudi, eirriwaka Enkai olmalaika neirorie ajoki mikirriwaki olkilikuai wou shomo enkaji enye, meshomo ninye aning irorei lijoki.”" 
Acts10:23 Nepuonu aji neisho Petero ninche enkirragata. Ore pee ekenyu neinyototo airiamariyie ninche, nerik kulikae alashera ooing'uaa Yopa aitaa encholiek." 
Acts10:24 Ore te nkolong nasujita ina nejing Kaisaria. Neanyita Kornelio ninche, neipoto aiturrur olmarei lenye pooki o lchoreta le latia enye." 
Acts10:25 Ore pee elotu Petero ajing ine, nenang'are Kornelio ninye nebatata te nkalo oo nkejek enyena aserem." 
Acts10:26 Kake eitasheyie Petero ninye, nejoki, “Inyo ntasho. Kara sii nanu makewan oltung'ani ake.”" 
Acts10:27 Ore eirorie, nejing aji, neinepu etasotote ltung'ana kumok:" 
Acts10:28 nejoki ninche, “Iyiololo intae pooki aajo kemito ena amu meshulare oltung'ani loo Lyahudi ole likae orere, nemejing enkaji enye; paa Enkai naatiaaka nanu mijo ake enturuj likae tung'ani nimijo mesinya;" 
Acts10:29 naa ina pee aaipotoki nalotu neitu aing'ash. Naikilikuan naa intae ajoki, kainyoo pee kietuo aaipot?”" 
Acts10:30 Nejoki Kornelio ninye, “Ong'uan ade taata nkolong'i naashomo, ore aomonito anaa oshi ake saa naaudo e ndama te nkaji ai; ng'ura, neitashe oltung'ani oimerlel nkilani te dukuya nanu," 
Acts10:31 nejo, ‘Kornelio! Etoning'oki enkomono ino, netadamua Enkai eleng'on ino o lng'ur too laisinak." 
Acts10:32 Irriwai naa lkiliku Yopa, meipoto Simon oji Petero; naa olomoni ninye te nkaji e Simon laa olaitobirani loo lonito, omanya embata e naiposha.’" 
Acts10:33 Naairriwaki ltung'ana teina kata ake; nintobira naa iewuo. Ore naa etiu nejia, noolo iyiook pooki ootii ene te dukuya Enkai, pee kining nena pooki nikintanapa ninye tejo.”" 
Acts10:34 Nebol Petero enkutuk enye nejo, “Kesipa atayiolo nchere ore Enkai, meeta olkep," 
Acts10:35 kake ore pooki ng'ae oure ninye aa ololorere ora, neas isupati te Enkai, nenyorraa ninye." 
Acts10:36 Iyiololo intae olapa rorei oirriwaka nkera oo Siraeli, otolikioyioki lomon supati lo sotua te Yesu Kristo (olaa ninye Olaitoriani le pooki)," 
Acts10:37 ilo rorei ilo liyiololo intae maate, oitadarayioki te Yudea pooki, aaiteru te Galilaya, eidipe enkibatisa apa nalikioo Yohana." 
Acts10:38 Yesu le Nasaret etuputo Enkai te Nkiyang'et Sinyati o engolon nelotoo aas isupati, neishiunye lelo pooki ooibooko oloirirua enkop, amu ketii apa Enkai te nebo ninye." 
Acts10:39 Nikira iyiook shakeni le nena baa pooki naataasa te nkop oo Lyahudi o te Yerusalem. Ninye doi etaara ninche, aashe to lchani." 
Acts10:40 Neitopiu Enkai ninye te nkolong e uni, neishoru metodoli," 
Acts10:41 neme too ltung'ana pooki, kake te lelo apake ootegelua Enkai te dukuya metaa lchakenini, naa iyiook lelo ootang'arie endaa nikiok te nebo ninye eidipa atopiu too lootuata." 
Acts10:42 Ninye oitanapa iyiook matolikioi too ltung'ana pooki, nikinchakenoki nchere ninye osiruno te Enkai metaa oloiguanaki ilooishu o lootuata." 
Acts10:43 Ninye eitaikitia iloibonok le Nkai pooki shakenisho, nchere ore pooki oiruk enkarna enye netum empalakinoto oo ng'ok.”" 
Acts10:44 Ore eton ejoito Petero kulo rorei, nedoiki Enkiyang'et Sinyati lelo pooki ootoning'o ilo rorei." 
Acts10:45 Ore pee edol lelo airukok loo Lyahudi neing'asia, lelo taa ooiriamunore Petero, te nkaraki natubukokoki sii ninche Loreren enkishorunoto e Nkiyang'et Sinyati." 
Acts10:46 Amu ketoning'o ninche eiro te kulie kutukie aaisis Enkai. Newaliki Petero ajoki," 
Acts10:47 “Keetae oltung'ani omit ajo meibatisai kulo tung'ana te nkare ootang'amutua Enkiyang'et Sinyati anaa enikitang'amutua apa sii iyiook?” 
Acts10:48 Neitanapisho meibatisai te nkarna e Yesu Kristo Nesai ninche ninye metobiko nkuti olong'i. 
Acts11:1 Neaku etoning'o apa ilkipaareta o lalashera ootii Yudea nchere etang'amutua sii ninche loreren ororei le Nkai. 
Acts11:2 Ore pee eilepu Petero alotu Yerusalem, neishankarrarre lelo oorrep emuratare ninye," 
Acts11:3 aajoki, “Ishomo iyie ajing enetii Lmemurata, nilo ang'arie endaa.”" 
Acts11:4 Kake eiterua Petero aibalakinye ina bae aitobiraki, ajoki," 
Acts11:5 “Enkanasa naji Yopa apa atii aomonito: naainepu enduaata, e ntoki natiu anaa olkarasha oing'uaa shumata oitadouni too lcholo pokira oong'uan, nelotu enatii." 
Acts11:6 Neaku ore pee akurraki nkonyek aing'or, nadol ajo, ng'uesi e nkop oo nkejek maa ong'uan, o ng'uesi e ong'ata, o ntokitin naaikurtutari o motonyi e shumata." 
Acts11:7 Naning sii oltoilo laajoki, ‘Inyo Petero, teyiang'a naa nosa.’" 
Acts11:8 Kake atejo, ‘Olaitoriani, Mme nejia, amu eitu aekata eim enkutuk ai entoki e nturuj anaa enemesinya.’" 
Acts11:9 Kake aatawalikia ilo toilo ajoki te nkata e are eing'uaa Keper, ‘Ore entoki naitisinya Enkai, nimintaa iyie enturuj.’" 
Acts11:10 Neikoni nejia katitin uni, neitokini aainyaaya pooki Keper." 
Acts11:11 Ore ina kata eitashe ltung'ana okuni ti auluo ina aji nikitii, eirriwuaki eing'uaa Kaisaria pee epuonu enatii." 
Acts11:12 Naajoki Enkiyang'et maturubare, nemapik olng'ash. Naairiamariyie kulo alashera pokira ile; nikijing enkaji e ilo tung'ani." 
Acts11:13 Neliki ninye iyiook olmalaika otoduaa te nkaji enye, otiaka, ‘Irriwai ltung'ana Yopa, mpoto Simon oji Petero;" 
Acts11:14 pee kilotu aliki irorei lijeunye, iyie o enkaji ino pooki.’" 
Acts11:15 Neaku ore pee aiteru airo nedoiki ninche Enkiyang'et Sinyati, anaa apa enatadoikio iyiook te nkiterunoto." 
Acts11:16 Nadamu ororei lo Laitoriani, otejo apa, ‘Te nkare eibatisishe Yohana, kake keibatisae intae te Nkiyang'et Sinyati.’" 
Acts11:17 Amaa naa te neeishoo Enkai ninche enkishorunoto naaijo enapa naishoo ninye iyiook pee kiruk Olaitoriani Yesu Kristo, kara nanu ng'ae oibooyo Enkai?”" 
Acts11:18 Ore pee ening ninche nena baa negira neisis Enkai nejo, “Eishoo naa Enkai sii ninche Loreren enkirridunoto nayau puaan.”" 
Acts11:19 Neaku ore lelo ooisardakieki to lapa sina otupukuo te nkaraki Stefano nepuo o metabaiki Foinike o Kupro o Antiokia, naa Lyahudi ake einosakita ilo rorei." 
Acts11:20 Kake etii kulikae lenye, ltung'ana ooing'uaa Kupro o Kirene, laa ore pee ebaya Antiokia neinosaki sii ninche Ilyunani, nelikioo Olaitoriani Yesu." 
Acts11:21 Neiriamariyie engolon o Laitoriani ninche; ore lkumok ooiruko neibelekenyakino Olaitoriani. 
Acts11:22 Nebaiki ina nataasa ninche nkiyiaa e ina sirit natii Yerusalem: neirriwaa ninche Barnaba meshomo Antiokia. 
Acts11:23 Ore pee ebaya, nedol enkiaas e mpiris e Nkai, neng'ida, neisisaki pooki nejoki metaa ilooisiligayu to Laitoriani te nkitashoto nauno oo ltauja." 
Acts11:24 Amu oltung'ani supat ninye obore Enkiyang'et Sinyati o enkirukoto. Neponikino Olaitoriani olturrur sapuk. 
Acts11:25 Neaku eshomo Barnaba Tarso aing'oru Saulo. 
Acts11:26 Ore pee etum, neriku Antiokia. Neya olari olulung'a egira ake aatumore ina sirit, neiteng'en esiamo kitok e ilo orere; naa te Antiokia eiteraki aajo lkipaareta ile Kristiano." 
Acts11:27 Ore te nena olong'i nepuonu loibonok le Nkai ooing'uaa Yerusalem aapuo Antiokia. 
Acts11:28 Ore obo lenye oji Agabus neinyototo aibonu te Nkiyang'et ajo kelotu olameyu kitok e nkop pooki; (neewuo ina aaku too nkolong'i e Klaudio). 
Acts11:29 Nedung lkipaareta aajo ore anaa enaidima oltung'ani, keirriwaki eretoto ilalashera oomanya Yudea." 
Acts11:30 Neiko nejia, neisho Barnaba o Saulo nena kishoorot meyaki ilpayiani te Yerusalem." 
Acts12:1 Ore teina kata neibung olaiguanani Herode kulikae tung'ana le ina sirit pee einosie osina. 
Acts12:2 Nejo ninye metaari Yakobo olalashe Yohana to lalem. 
Acts12:3 Ore pee edol ajo keitiship ina Lyahudi, neitulus aibung sii Petero. Naa to sirua loo Nkolong'i oo Mukateni Nemeisuishieki." 
Acts12:4 Ore pee eibung Petero, nepik jila, neitarasaki ndung'ot ong'uan oo sikarini maa oong'uan metorripo ninye, aa kejo pee eyooki arikoki olorere etulusoyie osirua oji Pasaka." 
Acts12:5 Nerripi Petero te jila; kake eitirrisha ina sirit aasai Enkai naleng te nkaraki ninye. 
Acts12:6 Ore ina kewarie, etaa kejo Herode pee elaku Petero, neirura Petero te rishata oo sikarini aare, eenikino lelo sikarini pokira too lpisia, nerripito kulikae sikarini kutuk aji e ina jila." 
Acts12:7 Ore nabo kata neitashe olmalaika lo Laitoriani atashare ninye, neitawang ewang'an ina aji: neosh Petero ematua, neinyeyie, nejoki, “Inyo tasioki?” Neitiaari iladuoo pisia ootii nkaik teine." 
Acts12:8 Nejoki olmalaika ninye, “Terretenayu, nchopo namuka.” Neiko nejia. Nejoki, “Nchopo olkila tusujuaki.”" 
Acts12:9 Neipang alo nesujaa sii ninye: neton meyiolo ajo kesipa ina naasita olmalaika, kejo kenduaata ake." 
Acts12:10 Ore pee egiroo larripok le dukuya o li aare, nepuonu kishomi e sekenkei naipang'aki ina anasa; nebolo openy neipang aapuo, negiroo neng'eliki ai oitoi nabo nelo nabo kata olmalaika, ainguaa ninye." 
Acts12:11 Ore pee eputunye Petero ayiolou enaasita, nejo, “Atayiolo taa taata ajo Olaitoriani oirriwua olmalaika lenye maatasaru ang'adie enkaina e Herode, o nena pooki naayiewuaki olorere lo Lyahudi.”" 
Acts12:12 Ore pee eyiolou ina bae, nelotu enkaji e Mariamu, ng'otonye Yohana oji Marko naa ine esotore iltung'ana kumok eomonito." 
Acts12:12 Ore pee eyiolou ina bae, nelotu enkaji e Mariamu, ng'otonye Yohana oji Marko naa ine esotore iltung'ana kumok eomonito." 
Acts12:13 Ore pee eoshiosh kishomi, nelotu enkaisiaayiani ainining'isho, naa keji ina Rhoda." 
Acts12:14 Ore pee eyiolou oltoilo le Petero, neng'as apal kishomi mebolo, nekuet aji te ng'ida alikioo nchere eitashe Petero te kishomi." 
Acts12:15 Nejokini, “Oloirirua iata iyie.” Kake etareikio ninye ajo nejia etiu. Nejo ninche, “Olmalaika lenye pae!”" 
Acts12:16 Neitoki ake Petero aoshiosh kishomi, ore ade pee eboluni, nedoli ninye neing'asiae." 
Acts12:17 Kake eiyuko ninye ninche te nkaina metigirata, neibalakinye eneikuna Olaitoriani pee esaru aitung'uaa jila. Nejoki, “Entoliki kuna baa, Yakobo nilikiki sii lalashera.” Nelo ninye, dikai wueji." 
Acts12:18 Ore ake pee ekenyu, neng'uala sikarini oleng ejo kainyoo naawa Petero." 
Acts12:19 Ore pee eing'oru Herode, nelau, nejur lelo sikarini ootorripo neitanapisho meewai aar metuata. Neing'uaa Herode Yudea nedoyio alo Kaisaria, nebik teine." 
Acts12:20 Ore amu etagorokine Herode lelo tung'ana le Tiro o Sidon oleng; nepuonu ninche etoning'ote enetii ninye. Neng'as ninche aaning'ore Blasto aa ninye olaing'urani le nkaji o laiguanani, nepuonu aaing'oru osotua, amu enkop e ilo aiguanani apa etumie ninche endaa." 
Acts12:21 Ore teina olong nageluno neisikarra Herode aishop ilkilani le nkitoo, neton to lorika le nkitoo, neirorie olorere." 
Acts12:22 Nebuakita lelo tung'ana aajo, “Ole nkai ele toilo, mme olo ltung'ani.”" 
Acts12:23 Ore nabo kata ake neosh olmalaika lo Laitoriani ninye, amu mme Nkai eishoo enkitoo, neiruj; ilkurt nedung'o tau." 
Acts12:24 Kake etubula ninye ororei le Nkai neponari. 
Acts12:25 Nerrinyunye Barnaba o Saulo eing'uaa Yerusalem, eidipa esiaai enye, neriku Yohana oji Marko." 
Acts12:25 Nerrinyunye Barnaba o Saulo eing'uaa Yerusalem, eidipa esiaai enye, neriku Yohana oji Marko." 
Acts13:1 Neetae apa te sirit e Antiokia, te sirit natii ine, iloibonok le Nkai o laiteng'enak otii Barnaba, Simeon oji Olorok o Lukio le Kirene o Manaen oyati lo lmarei lo laiguanani Herode o Saulo." 
Acts13:2 Ore eseremita ninche Olaitoriani neitupukoo ate, nejoki Enkiyang'et Sinyati “Entegelakaki Barnaba o Saulo te nkaraki esiaai naipotoko.”" 
Acts13:3 Neaku ore pee eidip empukoroto neomon, neiteleiki ninche lelo nkaik, neirriwaa meshomo." 
Acts13:4 Neisho Barnaba o Saulo, eirriwayie Enkiyang'et Sinyati, nedoyio aapuo Seleukia; nejing empeut teine aapuo Kupro." 
Acts13:5 Ore etii Salamis, nelikioo ororei le Nkai te nkaji oo Lyahudi e ntumo; nerikito Yohana oji Marko eretito ninche." 
Acts13:5 Ore etii Salamis, nelikioo ororei le Nkai te nkaji oo Lyahudi e ntumo; nerikito Yohana oji Marko eretito ninche." 
Acts13:6 Ore pee epolos ilo odung'oro pooki aabaiki Pafo, netum olkuyantiki, oloiboni le lejare, laa Olyahudi, oji Bar-Yesu;" 
Acts13:7 neboitare ilo olgafanai oji Sergio Paulo, oltung'ani ng'en. Neipot ilo tung'ani Barnaba o Saulo meshomo enkang enye, eyieu nening ororei le Nkai." 
Acts13:8 Kake etorishie Elimas, (amu neijia eji ewalunoto e nkarna enye), ilo taa kuyantiki ejo pee eng'adie ilo balusui enkirukoto." 
Acts13:9 Kake ore Saulo, oji Paulo, eiganya Enkiyang'et Sinyati, neing'ode ninye," 
Acts13:10 nejoki, “Aish ele obore olosek o enkarruoisho pooki, ai mipal ake mikordil inkoitoi supati o Laitoriani?" 
Acts13:11 Ng'ura! Kitabaikia enkaina o Laitoriani. Naa imodoku, nimidol enkolong o metulusoi enkata naje.” Nedoiki nabo kata ninye enkirupurup o enaimin; nemanaa eing'oru olorik aibung enkaina." 
Acts13:12 Ore ilo balusui, pee edol ina nataase, neiruk, eing'asie te nkaraki enkiteng'enare o Laitoriani." 
Acts13:13 Nejing Paulo o encholiek enye empeut te Pafo, nepuonu Perga te Pamfilia; nelo Yohana oji Marko aing'uaa ninche teine nerrinyo Yerusalem." 
Acts13:13 Nejing Paulo o encholiek enye empeut te Pafo, nepuonu Perga te Pamfilia; nelo Yohana oji Marko aing'uaa ninche teine nerrinyo Yerusalem." 
Acts13:14 Kake etudumunye ninche te Perga, nepolos aapuonu Antiokia te Pisidia, nepuo enkaji e ntumo te nkolong e Sabato, netoni." 
Acts13:15 Ore eidipaki aaisuma nkitanapat e Musa o loibonok le Nkai, ore ilaitoriak le ina aji e ntumo, nejoki, “Ilalashera, te niatata ororei oret olorere, eroro.”" 
Acts13:16 Neinyototo Paulo, neyuk te nkaina nejo, “Lo lewa loo Siraeli o intae ilooure Enkai, enining'o." 
Acts13:17 Enkai e le orere loo Siraeli nategelua iloo papa, neitaa olosho kitok eton emanya Misiri neilepie enkaina enye neriku aitung'uaa ine." 
Acts13:18 Naa ore te rishata oo larin artam neng'iri empeepeen enye ti ong'ata. 
Acts13:19 Ore pee eidip atumuta loshon oopishana te nkop e Kanaan, neisho ninche enkop enye metujung'o, te rishata oo larin iip ong'uan o onom." 
Acts13:20 Ore etulusoitie nena neisho ninche larishak o metabaiki enkata e Samuel olapa oiboni le Nkai. 
Acts13:21 Ore te siadi neomonu ninche olaiguanani, neisho Enkai ninche Saulo ole Kishi, oltung'ani lo losho le Benchamen, te rishata oo larin artam." 
Acts13:22 Ore pee eiwuang'ie ninye, neitasheyie Daudi metaa olaiguanani lenye, oloitaikia Enkai shakeni, nejo, ‘Anoto Daudi ole Yese, oltung'ani onyor oltau lai, oas nena pooki nayieu.’" 
Acts13:23 Te ishoi e ilo tung'ani eitaikia Enkai Siraeli, Olaitajeunoni, Yesu anaa apa enaisiligie." 
Acts13:24 Netang'asa apa Yohana alikioo etiooyo elotunoto enye, enkibatisa naitoduaaya enkirridunoto natolikio ltung'ana pooki loo Siraeli." 
Acts13:25 Naa ore etaa keidip ninye Yohana inaaitanapaki, nejo, ‘Ijojo intae kara nanu ng'ae? Mara nanu ninye. A'a kake kelotu likae te siadi nanu, laa kaamakua te nalak nkeenta o namuka enyena.’" 
Acts13:26 “Lo alashera, kira e ntalipa e Abraham, o intae kulo ooure Enkai, iyiook eirriwakaki irorei le na jeunoto." 
Acts13:27 Te nkaraki lekua oomanya Yerusalem o laitoriak lenye, amu ninye eitu eyiolou, aashu eyiolou iltoiloishi loo loibonok le Nkai ooisumi anaa ake too nkolong'i e Sabato, ninche ooitabaitie ina pee edung'oki Yesu enkiguana e keeya." 
Acts13:28 Naa ore hoo netalaita te ninye ai naitanang, etoomono Pilato meishoo ninye metari." 
Acts13:29 Re pee eitabaya nena pooki naasirakino ninye, neitadou ninye to lchani nenukaa te nkurare." 
Acts13:30 Kake eitopiwuo Enkai ninye aitung'uaa ilootuata: 
Acts13:31 netoduaaki too nkolong'i kumok lelo apa ooiriamunore ninye eing'uaa Galilaya alotu Yerusalem, naa ninche taata shakeni to lorere." 
Acts13:32 Nikiyaki intae ilomon supati le nkisiligata naishoo apa Enkai iloo papa," 
Acts13:33 eneikona Enkai pee eitabaya ina te iyiook inkera enye, aitopiu Yesu anaa enaigero to Lkerempe le Nkai, le are nchere, ‘Ira iyie Enkerai ai, tele kekun aatoiwuo.’" 
Acts13:34 Naa ore ina naitopiwuo Enkai aitung'uaa ilootuata, nemeitoki naa aikata arrinyokino keeya, eiroro nejo, ‘Ekaaisho iyie ilo sinyati imayianat naadede e Daudi.’" 
Acts13:35 Amu etejo sii to Lkerempe le Nkai, ‘Nimincho iyie Ilo Sinyati lino epurda ang'uoyu.’" 
Acts13:36 Amu ore Daudi, eidipa too rishat enyena aitabai inaaitanapishe Enkai, neirura, neirragieki te nebo iloo menye, neng'uoyu osesen lenye." 
Acts13:37 Kake ore ilo oitopiwuo Enkai eitu eng'uoyu osesen lenye. 
Acts13:38 Entayioloito naa aajo, ilalashera laainei, tele tung'ani elikini intae enkitayunoto oo ng'ok:" 
Acts13:39 naa te ninye eoruni ntiyot pooki ng'ae oiruk ninye, neikenakini esupatisho te Nkai nemetum too nkitanapat e Musa." 
Acts13:40 Entodol naa ate, meinepu intae enapa nairoro iloibonok le Nkai aajo:" 
Acts13:41 ‘Eng'ura intae, ilasurdaanyak, ning'asiasia nindaayaya; amu keeta enaas too nkolong'i inyi amu ore enkiaas naas nemeeta nchere iruko, te neliki intae likae.’ ”" 
Acts13:42 Ore eipung Paulo o Barnaba aapuo, nesai menyaaki aaigilie lelo omon te nkolong e Sabato nasuju ina." 
Acts13:43 Ore pee eidapasha entumo, nesuj Ilyahudi kumok o kulikae ooure Enkai Paulo o Barnaba: neirorie ninche lelo neitirrishaki metobiko te mpiris e Nkai." 
Acts13:44 Ore te nkolong e Sabato natusujua ina, peno eitu etumokino ine enkanasa nalulung'a aaning ororei le Nkai." 
Acts13:45 Kake, ilo orere ake etoduaa Ilyahudi, neigany olom, neishankarru nena naatejo Paulo, nemor Enkai." 
Acts13:46 Neiro Paulo o Barnaba aashirraki, nejo, “Keishiaakino naa intae eiteraki aaliki ororei le Nkai. Kake ore amu itanang'aitie, nitoduaa oopeny nchere meishiaakino intae enkishui nemeish, kipuo iyiook enetii Loreren." 
Acts13:47 Amu ina doi eitanapa iyiook Olaitoriani, ajoki. ‘Aaitaa iyie ewang'an oo Loreren, peyie iyau iyie enjeunoto o metabaiki ineeiting'ie enkop.’ ”" 
Acts13:48 Ina ake etoning'o loreren, neng'ida oleng, neisho ilo rorei le Nkai enkisisa: ore lelo oogelakino enjeunoto neiruk." 
Acts13:49 Neibulunyeki ororei lo Laitoriani ilo kirine pooki. 
Acts13:50 Kake eshomo Lyahudi aaisur nkituaak naayanyiti, o lewa ooitore ina anasa, neing'oling'ol pee einyali Paulo o Barnaba, nearari metung'uai ilo Kirine lenye." 
Acts13:51 Kake eipiripirokito ninche enterit oo nkejek enye, nepuonu Ikonio." 
Acts13:52 Neiput lkipaareta enchipai o Enkiyang'et Sinyati. 
Acts14:1 Neaku ore te Ikonio, nejing Paulo o Barnaba enkaji e ntumo oo Lyahudi te nebo, neiro o meiruko esiamo kitok oo Lyahudi o enoo Ilyunani." 
Acts14:2 Kake eing'oling'ola lelo Yahudi leitu eiruk iltung'ana loo Loreren, neitagogong iltauja tialo lalashera." 
Acts14:3 Neaku etobiko naleng lelo kipaareta teine eshirraki aairo tiatua Olaitoriani, neitadedeyie ninye ilo rorei le mpiris enye, neishoru metaasi ilmonek o mbaa e nking'asia too nkaik enye." 
Acts14:4 Kake etoorote olorere le ina anasa neibung'are kulikae Ilyahudi, neibung'are kulikae lkipaareta." 
Acts14:5 Ore pee edumakino ndung'ot pokira, Iloreren o Lyahudi o laitoriak lenye pee esul ninche aaitukurru, nenang'i too soito," 
Acts14:6 neiyiolou ninche ina, neisikaki Listra o Derbe nena anas e Likonia o lelo kirinen oomanita:" 
Acts14:7 nelikioo ororei le Nkai te nene wuejitin. 
Acts14:8 Ore apa te Listra netii oltung'ani otonita maima, olaa olmaima pee eini, leitu ai kata elo too nkejek." 
Acts14:9 Nening ninye Paulo eiro, ore Paulo, nekurraki nkonyek nedol ajo keeta enkirukoto pee eishiunyeki," 
Acts14:10 nejoki to ltoilo sapuk, “Ntasho ntoriori too nkejek inono!” Neitiamu aitashe nelo." 
Acts14:11 Ore pee edol esiamo ina nataasa Paulo, neilepie ltoiloishi, aajo te nkutuk oo Likonia, “Etadoutuo nkaitin naatiu anaa ltung'ana!”" 
Acts14:12 Nejo Barnaba Seu; nejo Paulo Herme, amu ninye oljartan to rorei." 
Acts14:13 Nereu olapolosani le Seu otii olkitaret lenye auluo ina ang ilmong'i neyau lmarisian kishomi, naa anaata etopolosishote te nebo o nena siamon." 
Acts14:14 Kake ore pee ening ilkipaareta ina, Barnaba o Paulo, nepolos ilkilani lenye, neipang'u te siamo, ebuakita neishir," 
Acts14:15 nejo, “Lo kituaak! Kainyoo pee nkoko nji? Kira sii yiook iltung'ana ake laaijo intae, naa lomon supati kiyaki intae, pee imbelekenyanya, aaing'uaa kuna nemeeta tipat aaing'oru Enkai naishu, naitobira Keper o enkop o naaiposha, o nena naatii pooki:" 
Acts14:16 olaa ninye oishoo loreren pooki too lajijik ooishari meshomo loshon too nkoitoi enye maate. 
Acts14:17 Kake eitu sii epal kewan meeta ake shakeni enye, amu etaasa supati, neisho intae enchan eing'uaa shumata neisho intae larin oosinyunye, neitaraposh iltauja linyi te ndaa o te ng'ida.”" 
Acts14:18 Naa te pesho ade te kulo rorei etomitikio Paulo nena siamon epolosaki ninche. 
Acts14:19 Kake eetuo Lyahudi ine ooing'uaa Antiokia o Ikonio: ore pee eitoosh isiamon, nenang Paulo too soito neikurtutaa auluo ina anasa, ejo ninche ketua." 
Acts14:20 Kake ore pee eitashe lkipaareta aaman, neinyototo, nejing ina anasa: ore pee ekenyu nepuku o Barnaba aapuo Debe." 
Acts14:21 Ore pee elikioo ororei supat teina anasa, neitaa lkumok lkipaareta, nerrinyo Paulo o Barnaba aapuo Listra, o Ikonio o Antiokia." 
Acts14:22 Neitagol lkipaareta ltauja, nekurraki metobiko tiatua enkirukoto, “Amu kumok isinaitin likiimaa kijing enkitoria e Nkai”." 
Acts14:23 Ore pee egelaki ninche lpayiani too sirito enye pooki, neomonoki ninche Olaitoriani, egira aitupukoo ate, ilo laa ninye eiruko ninche." 
Acts14:24 Neimaa Pisidia, nepuonu Pamfilia." 
Acts14:25 Ore pee einosaa ilo rorei te Perga, nedoyio aapuo Atalia;" 
Acts14:26 nejing empeut te ine aapuo Antiokia, enapa wueji neisiligieki ninche empiris e Nkai te nkaraki ina siaai naitabaitie." 
Acts14:27 Ore pee ebau, neiturrur esirit te nebo, neinosaki nena pooki naataasishore Enkai ninche, ina nataboloko loreren enkoitoi e nkirukoto." 
Acts14:28 Nebik ninche teine nkolong'i kumok te nebo o lelo ooiteng'eni. 
Acts15:1 Nedou kulikae tung'ana ooing'uaa Yudea neiteng'en ilalashera, aajoki, “Te nememurati intae anaa enaitanapishe Musa, nimindimidimi aatajeu.”" 
Acts15:2 Ore pee eishankarrarre Paulo o Barnaba ninche neirish aaiguanare too mbaa kumok, negelu lalashera Paulo o Barnaba o kulikae ake lenye, meshomo Yerusalem eitarioo esirit ninche, neimaa Foenike o meshomo Yerusalem enetii lkipaareta o lpayiani te nkaraki ina bae." 
Acts15:3 Ore taa pee eitarioo esirit ninche, neimaa Foinike o Samaria, einosaa enkibelekenyata oo ltung'ana loo Loreren; neyaki lalashera pooki eng'ida kitok oleng." 
Acts15:4 Ore pee epuonu Yerusalem, neng'amu ina sirit o lkipaareta o lpayiani, neinosaki mbaa pooki naataasie Enkai ninche." 
Acts15:5 Kake einyieito kulikae le ncholiek oo Lfarisayo ooiruko, nejo, “Meeta nchere pee memurati ninche, neitanapi meibung'a nkitanapat e Musa.”" 
Acts15:6 Netumo lkipaareta o lpayiani te nebo aaimaki ena bae. 
Acts15:7 Ore etoodoro enkiguana narrish, neinyototo Petero, nejoki ninche, “Ilalashera laainei, iyiololo aajo ore apa te nkata naado etegelua Enkai obo linyi, peyie aa te nkutuk ai ening ltung'ana loo Loreren ororei supat, neiruk." 
Acts15:8 Ore Enkai nayiolo ltauja le pooki ng'ae, neaku shakeni te ninche aisho Enkiyang'et Sinyati, anaa enapake naishoo iyiook;" 
Acts15:9 neitu epik olgelati arish iyiook o ninche, neituku ltauja lenye te nkirukoto." 
Acts15:10 Oo naa taata pee itemiteme intae Enkai, aaiteleiki enchata murto oo lalashera, eneitu eidim iloo papa neitu kindim iyiook aatanap?" 
Acts15:11 Kake, kiruko iyiook nchere te mpiris e Yesu Kristo kijeu iyiook, naa nejia etiu ninche.”" 
Acts15:12 Negira olturrur pooki; neinining Barnaba o Paulo einosaki nkitoduaat o ne nking'asia naataasie Enkai ninche too ltung'ana lo Loreren. 
Acts15:13 Ore pee egira ninche, newalu Yakobo nejo, “Ilalashera, entoning'oki:" 
Acts15:14 einosua Simeon eneikuna apa Enkai pee ebaiki ltung'ana loo Loreren, agelu tiatua ninche ltung'ana le nkarna enye." 
Acts15:15 Neitadedeyie ina naairoro iloibonok le Nkai anaa enatisiraki nchere," 
Acts15:16 ‘Ore pee elusoo kuna karrinyunye nanu, naa kaitoki ashetu enkaji e Daudi e nkomono naturori; naa kaitoki ashet ilmuaateni lenye: naitasheyie nanu:" 
Acts15:17 pee eing'oru ltung'ana ootelekutua Olaitoriani, lelo tung'ana pooki loo loreren, ooipotieki enkarna ai." 
Acts15:18 Olaitoriani ojo, ololimu apa kuna baa te nkiterunoto e nkop.’" 
Acts15:19 Ore te nkaraki ina, neiguana aajo, emikintanyamal lelo loo Loreren ooibelekenyakino Enkai;" 
Acts15:20 kake emaigeroki metalama lkereu loo nkiri naapolosakini nkitanyaanyukot naaitaai nkaitin, nelam eloloito, o ntokitin naagori, o sarge." 
Acts15:21 Amu eeta Musa too lajijik o lajijik te nkanasa ake pooki lelo oolikioo ninye, eisumitai ninye anaa ake too nkolong'i e Sabato too nkajijik e ntumo.”" 
Acts15:22 Nedol ilkipaareta o lpayiani o ina sirit pooki aajo sidai te negeluni ltung'ana le ina sirit enye, neirriwari Antiokia te nebo Paulo o Barnaba. Negelu Yudas oji Barsaba o Sila, laa larikok too lalashera." 
Acts15:23 Neigeroki lelo nejo, “Ilkipaareta o lpayiani alashera ooigeroki ilalashera oora iloo Loreren te Antiokia o te Siria o Kilikia, kiroroki intae;" 
Acts15:24 te nkaraki naa ai kitoning'o aajo etii kulikae ooing'uaa atua iyiook ooetuo aaitanyamal intae too rorei neitapong'oo ltauja linyi; neitu kincho iyiook ninche imbaa naayaki ninche intae; 
Acts15:25 nikidol iyiook eishiaakino, kitoning'okinote nabo, nikigelu lewa likirriwaki intae meiriamunore ilaisotuak lang Barnaba o Paulo," 
Acts15:26 iltung'ana ootipika bata enkishon enye te nkaraki enkarna o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo. 
Acts15:27 Kirriutua naa Yudas o Sila naa ninche maate ooliki intae kuna baa te nkutuk. 
Acts15:28 Amu etoduaa Enkiyang'et Sinyati o iyiook; nchere pee mikinteleiki intae likae ola olusoo te kuna baa naata tipat; 
Acts15:29 nchere entirishie ate nkiri oo ntokitin naapolosakini nkitanyaanyukot naaitaai nkaitin, o sarge o ntokitin naagori, o eloloito; amu te nintalamilama ate nena, nitaasa supati. Ayia sere.”" 
Acts15:30 Ore ninche, pee eishori epuo, nedoiyio aapuo Antiokia; ore pee eiturrurru olorere te nebo, neitarasaki ina palai." 
Acts15:31 Ore pee eisum ninche, neng'ida te nkaraki ina kilejilejata." 
Acts15:32 Ore Yudas o Sila amu loibonok le Nkai sii ninche maate, neinosaki lalashera nkumok neitagol." 
Acts15:33 Ore ewaita enkata ebikito teine, neitanapare ilalashera ninche te seriani neisho enetii lelo apa ooirriutua ninche." 
Acts15:34 [Kake etoduaa ninye Sila ajo keishiaakino neton teine.] 
Acts15:35 Kake etobiko ninche Paulo o Barnaba te Antiokia eiteng'enisho nelikioo ororei lo Laitoriani, te nebo sii kulikae kumok." 
Acts15:36 Ore etulusoitie nkuti olong'i nejoki Paulo Barnaba, “Manyaai aabaiki ilalashera too nkanas apa pooki nikinosakita ororei lo Laitoriani, pee kidol eneikununo.”" 
Acts15:37 Neyieu Barnaba neshoroo Yohana oji Marko meiriamariyie. 
Acts15:37 Neyieu Barnaba neshoroo Yohana oji Marko meiriamariyie. 
Acts15:38 Kake etoduaa Paulo ajo mme sidai te nerik oltung'ani apa otorrinye aing'uaa ninche te Pamfilia, leitu erubare ninche te siaai." 
Acts15:39 Nejing empong'o o metooroto olikae o likae, nerik Barnaba Marko pee eiriamari nejing empeut aapuo Kupro." 
Acts15:39 Nejing empong'o o metooroto olikae o likae, nerik Barnaba Marko pee eiriamari nejing empeut aapuo Kupro." 
Acts15:40 Kake etegelua ninye Paulo Sila, nepuo, neitanap ilalashera ninche neomonoki empiris e Nkai." 
Acts15:41 Neimaa Siria o Kilikia neitagol nena sirito. 
Acts16:1 Nelotu sii Paulo Derbe o Listra, naa eetae apa oloiteng'eni teine oji Timoteo, olayioni le nkitok Yahudi nairuko, kake Olyunani menye." 
Acts16:2 Neimaki lalashera ninye aarrep ilootii Listra o Ikonio. 
Acts16:3 Ninye etegelua Paulo pee eiriamariyie; neibung nemurat te nkaraki lelo Yahudi le ilo kirine; amu keyiolo pooki aajo Olyunani apa menye. 
Acts16:4 Ore epuoito te nkoitoi neimaa nkang'itie, neliki inapa baa meibung'a, naaitanapishote lkipaareta o lpayiani ootii Yerusalem." 
Acts16:5 Metaa nedupayu nena sirito enkirukoto, neponari esiana oo lairukok anaa ake." 
Acts16:6 Neimaa olkirine le Frigia o Galatia, etorishie Enkiyang'et Sinyati pee melikioo ilo rorei te Asia." 
Acts16:7 Ore pee epuonu aaipirare Misia, netem aajo matijing Bitinia; neitu eisho Enkiyang'et e Yesu meshomo;" 
Acts16:8 neim embata e Misia nedou aapuonu Troas. 
Acts16:9 Neipang'aki Paulo enduaata kewarie o ltung'ani oitashe le Makedonia, osaita ninye ajoki, “Wou talang'u Makedonia, taretu iyiook.”" 
Acts16:10 Ore pee edol Paulo ina, neiteru nabo kata aing'oru elototo nalo Makedonia, etumuta ajo Enkai naipoto iyiook maape aaliki ninche ele rorei supat." 
Acts16:11 Ore pee kijing empeut te Troas, nikipolos aaitoriokino Samotrake, nikiyiooki te ntaaisere aapuo Neapolis;" 
Acts16:12 nikidumunye teine aapuo Filipi; enkanasa e Makedonia, naa ninye enkanasa kitok te ilo kerenket, naa abori enkitoria oo Roma etii. Nikibik teina anasa nkolong'i kumok." 
Acts16:13 Ore te nkolong e Sabato nikimpang auluo kishomi e ina anasa, te mbata o lkeju, kijo ebaiki neetae ewueji e nkomono teine; nikitoni, aairorie nkituaak naatoni te nebo." 
Acts16:14 Netii enkitok naji Lidia naa enkamirani oo lkarash oodo, naa ene nkanasa naji Tiatira, naserem ninye Enkai, nening iyiook. Nebol Olaitoriani oltau lenye, metoning'o mbaa naairoro Paulo." 
Acts16:15 Ore pee eibatisai ninye o enkaji enye, nesai iyiook, ajoki, “Te nikitoduaa intae aajo kaisiligayu to Laitoriani, wootu entijing enkaji ai, entotoni.” Neidimu iyiook." 
Acts16:16 Neaku ore kipuoito ine wueji e nkomono, nenang'are iyiook esila naata e nkiyang'et e naibon nadol imbaa, netopokie lkituaak lenyena ninye too masaa naayaki teina aibon." 
Acts16:17 Nesuj ninye Paulo o iyiook nebuaku eishir ajo, “Ore kulo tung'ana ilaisiaayiak le Nkai natii Shumata Aisul te pooki, naa intae eliki enkoitoi e njeunoto.”" 
Acts16:18 Neiko nejia nkolong'i kumok. Kake ore Paulo, etanyamala oleng neibelekenya nejoki ilo oirirua, “Aaisikong iyie te nkarna e Yesu Kristo tupuku tung'uai ninye.” Nepuku aing'uaa teina kata ake." 
Acts16:19 Kake ore pee edol ilopeny ina tito aajo eshomo osiligi le ina dupoto enye, neibung Paulo o Sila, neikurtutaa aaya enetii laitoriak te nemirishoreki," 
Acts16:20 ore pee eyau enetii iladung'ok le nkiguana, nejo, “Ore kulo tung'ana, loo Lyahudi, eitanyamalita naleng ena anasa ang," 
Acts16:21 aalimu lkerreti lemeishoruno matang'amai aashu kisuj, kira Iroma.”" 
Acts16:22 Nedumakino esiamo pooki te nebo nepolosaki ilkilani lenye aaoru, neitanapisho meidong'i too ng'usidin." 
Acts16:23 Ore eitudupaki ninche iwoshot kumok, nenang'akini jila, neitanapi olarriponi meitirrisha oleng." 
Acts16:24 Ore pee eng'amu ilo ina kitanapata, nepik ninche jila e atua, neen nkejek enye akurraki too lgarrameta." 
Acts16:25 Kake ore etaa keitorito enkewarie eomonito Paulo o Sila neranyaki Enkai isinkolioitin; neinining'ito ilooena ninche; 
Acts16:26 ore nabo kata, neikirikira enkop, neigirigiro lkitamanyunot le ina aji e jila. Nebolo nabo kata nkutukie enyena pooki; nelaa lgarrameta loo looena pooki." 
Acts16:27 Ore pee einyiototo olarriponi etuputuoki too njo, nedol inkutukie e jila ebolo, neshutu olalem neaku kejo aar kewan, ejo keisika ilooena aapuo." 
Acts16:28 Kake etabuaa Paulo to ltoilo sapuk, nejo, “Miar kewan! Kitii pooki ene!”" 
Acts16:29 Neipotu lkilang'ilang'eta, neng'orokino atua, eikirikira te nkuretisho, nebatatakino Paulo o Sila," 
Acts16:30 neitupuku, nejoki, “Lo kituaak, kaji aiko pee ajeu?”" 
Acts16:31 Nejoki ninche, “Iruko Olaitoriani Yesu, pee ijeu iyie o enkaji ino.”" 
Acts16:32 Neinosaki ninye ororei lo Laitoriani, te nebo o lelo pooki ootii enkaji enye." 
Acts16:33 Nedumu ninye ninche teina kata ake e nkewarie, neisuj nena oshot enye, neibatisae ninye nabo kata o lmarei lenye pooki." 
Acts16:34 Neriku ninche enkaji enye, neisho endaa, neshipa oleng o enkaji enye pooki, eiruko Enkai." 
Acts16:35 Ore pee ekenyu, neirriu iladung'ok le nkiguana lsikarini nejoki, “Enchoo lelo tung'ana epuo.”" 
Acts16:36 Neyaki olarriponi le jila Paulo ilo kilikuai, ajoki, “Eirriutua iladung'ok le nkiguana olkilikuai meishori intae enchom, enyoito naa taata naa enchom te seriani.”" 
Acts16:37 Kake etiaaka Paulo ninche, “Etaara iyiook te dukuya olorere, eitu eiguanareki iyiook, nikira sii iyiook Iroma, netanang'akita iyiook jila; neyieu taata neitupuku iyiook too nkurrat? Mme nejia; kake enchoo epuonu ninche maate aaitupuku iyiook.”" 
Acts16:38 Nepuo lelo sikarini aainosaki iladung'ok le nkiguana lelo rorei, neureishoyu, etoning'o aajo ile Roma ninche." 
Acts16:39 Nepuonu aasai ninche; ore pee eitupuku, neikilikuan te naa kepuo aaing'uaa ina anasa." 
Acts16:40 Nepuku ninche te jila, nepuo enkaji e Lidia: ore pee eidip aatodol ilalashera, neitagol ninche nepuo." 
Acts17:1 Nepuo Paulo o silaima Amfipoli o Apolonia o meetu Sesalonike, netii ine enkaji oo Lyahudi e nkomono." 
Acts17:2 Nelo Paulo nejing ine anaa olkuaak lenye. Ore te rishata oo wikii uni neishankarrarre oloreretoo lkigerot," 
Acts17:3 eliki enajo neitadedeyie ti atua ninche nchere meeta apake kata nemeinosieki Kristo osina, neitoki ake apiu too lootuata. Nejoki, “Naa ele Yesu laliki intae, ninye doi Kristo.”" 
Acts17:4 Nenyorraa kulikae lenye nena neaku ile nkalo e Paulo o Sila, naa nejia etiu Lyunani kumok ooserem Enkai, neme kuti sii ninche nkituaak arikok naairuko." 
Acts17:5 Kake eishoo ninche Lyahudi te nkaraki olom nepuo aasotu ilarruok o lwushuush too neemirishoreki, nesotu esiamo neliman ina anasa pooki; nerasaki enkaji e Yason, ejo pee erikoki ninche lelo tung'ana." 
Acts17:6 Ore pee elau, neikurtutaa Yason o kulikae le lelo alashera aayaki ilaitoriak le ina anasa, ebuakita aajo, ore “Kulo tung'ana ooijulujulo enkop aitala eseriani neetuo sii ene;" 
Acts17:7 naa Yason otang'amua arik enkaji enye: neetuo pooki aas inemeishoruno aakesh Kaisari, ejo eji eetae likae aiguanani oji Yesu.”" 
Acts17:8 Neng'uyan ninche ilo orere o lelo aitoriak le ina anasa pee ening ilo rorei. 
Acts17:9 Ore pee eya te Yason o te lelo kulikae mpisai naaisiligieki, neisho meshomo." 
Acts17:10 Ore ake pee emutu neisikie nabo kata lelo alashera Paulo o Silas kewarie meshomo Berea. Ore pee ebaya ninche ine nepuo aajing enkaji oo Lyahudi e nkomono. 
Acts17:11 Neaku kening'isho ninche lelo metiu anaa ile Sesalonike, amu etang'amutua ilo rorei eyieu to lokiyo sapuk, nejur ilkigerot anaa ake pee edol te naa ai nejia etiu kuna baa." 
Acts17:12 Neaku eiruko lkumok lene te nkaraki ina, o meiruko sii ninche nkituaak neme kuti naa nkarikok o Lyunani, o lewa leme kuti sii ninche." 
Acts17:13 Ina ake etoning'o Lyahudi le Sesalonike nchere etolikioyie Paulo ororei le Nkai te Berea, neitoki ake aapuonu ine, neing'oling'ol olorere aaitanyamal." 
Acts17:14 Nerik nabo kata lelo alashera Paulo meshomo o meitabaiki enaiposha: neng'as ninche Silas o Timoteo aabik teine. 
Acts17:15 Ore lelo ootoriko Paulo neitabau Atene. Ore eitanap Paulo ninche aisho olkilikuai oyaki Silas o Timoteo metasieku ine, nerrinyo aapuo." 
Acts17:16 Ore eanyita Paulo sils o timoteo te Atene, nenyamalu naleng te kewan enye etoduaa eneba enkumoi oo nkitanyaanyukot naaitaai nkaitin teina anasa." 
Acts17:17 Neishankarrarre Lyahudi o lkulikae tung'ana ooserem Enkai te nkaji e nkomono, o te nemirishoreki anaa ake, ilo oba anaa lootumore." 
Acts17:18 Neetae sii kulikae ang'eni teine, ooji ile Epikureo looji ile Stoiko oonotore ninye. Nejo kulikae lenye, “Kejo aa ele shoshoroi?” Nejo kulikae, “Ketiu anaa nkaitin eeiking'a elimu;” naa te nkaraki natolimuo Yesu o empiunoto." 
Acts17:19 Metaa ninche ootudumutua Paulonerik olkiu te wueji neji Areopago, ejoito, “Kaa kiteng'enare ng'ejuk ena nilimu amu eikiyieu nikiyiolou?" 
Acts17:20 Amu eijo keitu aekata kining kuna baa nilimu: kiyieu naa nikiyiolou enajo kuna baa.” 
Acts17:21 (Naa ore lelo tung'ana pooki le Atene o lomon ootii ina anasa, meeta ai naas neme ketoni ake aairo, einosakino aashu einining'u embae ake pooki ng'ejuk." 
Acts17:22 Metaa neitashe Paulo te dukuya ilo kiu le Areopago, nejo, “Lo lewa le Atene, adolita ajo ore te pooki oitoi irara ilaseremak oleng." 
Acts17:23 Amu ore aloito, nadol olperere lo lasar oigero ajo nji, ‘ENE ENKAI NEMEYIOLOI.’ Ore naa ina Ai niserememe miyiololo ninye ena naliki nanu intae." 
Acts17:24 Ore ina Ai naitobira enkop o ntokitin pooki, aa ninye taa Olaitoriani le shumata enkop, mme nkajijik naaitobiri too nkaik emany ninye." 
Acts17:25 Neme too nkaik eisiaai ninye, anaa keeta ae toki nayieu, naa ninye sii doi oisho pooki ng'ae enkishui, o enkiyang'et, o pooki toki." 
Acts17:26 Naa te ilo tung'aniobo eitobira iloreren pooki te nkop, metamanya oriong e nkop. Naa ketang'asa te dukuya aitaiki rishat o lpolosien oorish ineemany." 
Acts17:27 Neitaa ninche peyie etum aaing'oru Enkai, pee ebaiki ake neirrapirrapu, nebaiki netum. Hoo nemelakuaniki ninye hoo obo lang," 
Acts17:28 amu, ‘Ninye kinchuyie, naa ninye kipuoyie, naa ninye pee kira.’ Anaa enatejo likae aranyani linyi otejo, ‘Kira sii iyiook eishoi enye.’" 
Acts17:29 Te nikira naa eishoi e Nkai, emikintoki naa ake aajo eji ketiu empukunoto e Nkai anaa saabu, anaa enkosholai, anaa osoit oguetu enkarriyiano aashu endamunoto olosek le tung'ani." 
Acts17:30 Te nkaraki ina pee eimula Enkai enkong'u te nena katitin e modai; kake ore taata eitanapa ajoki ltung'ana te pooki wueji, ‘Embelekenyata entung'uai nkoitoi inyi e nkarruoisho.’" 
Acts17:31 Amu eidipa ninye atuuno enkolong, nayooki aiguanare enkop too sipat, te ilo tung'ani otegelua. Naa ninye eitadedeyie ninye too ltung'ana pooki, eitopiwuo ilo aitung'uaa ilootuata.”" 
Acts17:32 Ore pee ening ninche eimaki empiunoto oo lootuata neikordod kulikae; kake etii kulikae lenye ootejo, “Kintoki ake aainining iyie te likae kekun.”" 
Acts17:33 Metaa nepuku Paulo alo aing'uaa. 
Acts17:34 Kake etii kulikae ootaa le nkalo enye neiruk: ilootii Dionisio, obo le lelo le Areopago, o enkitok naji Damaris, o kulikae ake." 
Acts18:1 Ore pee elusoo kuna nedumunye Paulo te Atene, nelotu Korinto." 
Acts18:2 Netum Olyahudi obo oji Akuila, laa oinoti le Ponto, naa enalotunye det eing'uaa Italia te nebo o enkitok enye Prisila, te nkaraki naitanapishe olaiguanani kitok Klaudio meshomo Lyahudi pooki aaing'uaa Roma. Nelo Paulo enetii ninche;" 
Acts18:3 naa ore amu keng'ar enkarriyiano e siaai enye, nebik te nebo ninche, neasisho; amu ilaitobirak loo iimai ninche." 
Acts18:4 Neiguana anaa ake te nkaji e ntumo too nkolong'i e Sabato ejo ayietu Ilyahudi o Lyunani meiruko. 
Acts18:5 Ore pee edou Sila o Timoteo te Makedonia, nesheikino ninye Paulo elikioroto o rorei, neishakenoki too Lyahudi nchere Kristo Yesu." 
Acts18:6 Ore pee egilunore ninche maate ninye nemor, neipiripiroki Paulo ilkilani lenyena nejoki, “Tinimina intae, maata nanu entioto!, Ore ebaiki taata iltung'ana loo Loreren alo enetii.”" 
Acts18:7 Nelo aing'uaa lelo, nejing enkaji o ltung'ani oji Tito Yusto, oserem ninye Enkai, otashare enkaji enye ene ntumo." 
Acts18:8 Ore Krispas laa ninye oitore ina aji e ntumo, neiruk Olaitoriani, neiruk sii enkaji enye pooki; ore pee ening Ilkorintio kumok neiruk neibatisae." 
Acts18:9 Nejoki Olaitoriani Paulo nabo olong kewarie eirura, “Miureishoyu, iroro, nimigira;" 
Acts18:10 amu atii nanu te nebo iyie. Nemeetae oltung'ani likibaiki aitaas entorrono: amu kumok iltung'ana laainei te na anasa.” 
Acts18:11 Nebik Paulo teine olari obo o lapaitin ile, eiteng'enita ninche to rorei le Nkai." 
Acts18:12 Ore pee eitaai Galio olgafanai loo Roma te Akaia, nedumakino Lyahudi pooki Paulo te nebo, nerik olorika le nkiguana," 
Acts18:13 ejoito, “Keyiataki ele tung'ani olorere pee eserem Enkai te nkoitoi nemeishoruno too nkitanapat.”" 
Acts18:14 Kake ore ejo Paulo abol enkutuk, nejoki Galio Lyahudi, “Te nesipa naaji ajo kembae e ntorroni aashu ene nkarruoisho, lo Yahudi, naa anaata iatata esipata, nang'iri ainining intae." 
Acts18:15 Kake te na kenchankar oo rorei o nkarn o nkitanapat inyi, eng'urai oopeny. Mayieu nanu naaku olarishani loo mbaa naaijo nena.”" 
Acts18:16 Nearaa ninche aitung'uaa olorika le nkiguana. 
Acts18:17 Nesar pooki aaibung Sostene, ilo apa oitore enkaji e ntumo oo Lyahudi, neidong te nkalo o lorika le nkiguana. Neitu hoo eshilaa ninye Galio nena baa pooki." 
Acts18:18 Ore te siadi kuna, enyaaka Paulo abik nkolong'i kumok etulusoitie nena, neitanapare lalashera, neked emeli alo Siria, neiriamariyie Prisila o Akuila. Netabarnoki te Kenkrea: amu einosa olmumai." 
Acts18:19 Nepuonu ninche Efeso, neing'uaa Prisila o Akuila teine. Kake eshomo Paulo ajing enkaji e ntumo neishankarrarre Lyahudi." 
Acts18:20 Ore pee eji maiboo metobiko oleng, neany;" 
Acts18:21 kake etudumunye nejoki ninche, “Kaitoki ake ashukunye, te neyieu Enkai.” Neked emeli alo Efeso." 
Acts18:22 Ore pee elang'aki Kaisaria, neilep airoroki esirit, neitoki adoyio alo Antiok." 
Acts18:23 Ore pee ebik nkuti olong'i teine, nedumunye alo neimaa olkirine le Galatia, o Prigia aruk nenen, eitagol lkipaareta pooki." 
Acts18:24 Neetae Olyahudi oji Apolo, laa te Aleksantria etoiwuoki, nelotu elo Efeso; naa arriyia to rorei naa magilani too lkigerot." 
Acts18:25 Neiteng'enaki apa ilo tung'ani te nkoitoi o Laitoriani; naa ore amu oltung'ani oisusunkat oleng, neiro neiteng'enisho abaraki mbaa e Yesu, hoo naa enkibatisa e Yohana ake eyiolo" 
Acts18:26 neiteru airo te mpijan te nkaji e ntumo. Kake ore pee einining Prisila o Akuila, nerik enkaji enye, neibalakinye Enkoitoi e Nkai aabaraki." 
Acts18:27 Ore pee eyieu ninye, nelang alo Akaia, neitagol ilalashera le Efeso ninye nesiraki lkipaareta empalai metang'amu ninye. Ore pee ebaya Akaia neretu naleng lelo laa te nkaraki empiris e Nkai pee eiruko:" 
Acts18:28 amu etigilunore ninye Ilyahudi te ngolon naa te dukuya ltung'ana eitoduaayie too lkigerot inchere ore Yesu naa ninye Kristo. 
Acts19:1 Neaku ore etii ninye Apolo Korinto, neimaa Paulo ina kop oo ldoinyo nelotu Efeso, neinepu kulikae ooiteng'eni teine." 
Acts19:2 Nejoki lelo, “Itang'amaitie apa Enkiyang'et Sinyati pee irukuruku?” Nejoki ninche ninye, “A'a, keitu ninye ai kata kining aajo keetae Enkiyang'et Sinyati.”" 
Acts19:3 Nejoki Paulo ninche, “Kaa kibatisa naa apa eibatisaki intae?” Nejoki ninche, “Enkibatisa e Yohana.”" 
Acts19:4 Nejoki Paulo, “Eibatisishe Yohana enkibatisa e nkirridunoto, nejoki olorere, meiruko ilo olotu te siadi ninye, naa, Yesu taa ilo.”" 
Acts19:5 Ore pee ening ina, neibatisae te nkarna o Laitoriani Yesu." 
Acts19:6 Ore pee eiteleiki Paulo nkaik enyena, nedoiki Enkiyang'et Sinyati ninche: neiro kulie kutukie neibonisho." 
Acts19:7 Nera lelo tung'ana pooki tomon o aare. 
Acts19:8 Nejing Paulo enkaji e ntumo neshirraki airo te rishata oo lapaitin okuni, neishankarrarre nesayiaki ninche mbaa naaipirta enkitoria e Nkai." 
Acts19:9 Kake ore pee eikirnyanya kulikae neitagol onyek, nemor ena oitoi te dukuya olorere, nelo Paulo aing'uaa ninche, negelu lkipaareta, nelo aiteng'enisho anaa ake te nkaji naisumareki." 
Acts19:10 Neidikidik aas ina te rishata oo larin aare; o metaa ore lelo pooki oomanya Asia aa Lyahudi o Lyunani, nening ororei lo Laitoriani." 
Acts19:11 Neas Enkai e nking'asia too nkaik e Paulo: 
Acts19:12 o metaa kenapakini iltamuoyia ilkarash, o nkitampaani o nkarash o sesen le Paulo o nkarash naaisiaaishore. Nepuo nkeyaitin aaing'uaa iltamuoyia, nepuku nkiyang'eta torrok aaing'ua." 
Acts19:13 Kake enotoki sii kulikae Yahudi oopuaya, ooaraa nkiyang'eta torrok, nedumunye aaku enkarna o Laitoriani Yesu ejokinye nena kiyang'eta, “Aainosie olmumai te nkarna e ilo oji Yesu olikioo Paulo.”" 
Acts19:14 Neetae ilayiok oopishana le likae, apolosani kitok, oji Skewa ooikuna ninche nejia." 
Acts19:15 Newaliki enkiyange't torrono ajoki ninche, “Kayiolo Yesu, nayiolo Paulo; kake airara doi intae iloo ng'ae?”" 
Acts19:16 Neipidoki ilo apa tung'ani oata enkiyang'et torrono lelo pooki, neidimu ninche aarare, negilu aar, neisikie teina aji meishopo neeta lbaa." 
Acts19:17 Neyiolou pooki ng'ae ina ebaiki Lyahudi o Lyunani oomanya Efeso; nedoiki enkuretisho ninche pooki nerrepi enkarna o Laitoriani Yesu. 
Acts19:18 Nepuonu sii lkumok le lelo ooiruko, neirridu, neibalunye nkiaasin enye." 
Acts19:19 Ore esiana e lelo apa ooasishore ilosekin le naibon neyau mbukui enye aaiturrur: nepejoo edolita pooki ng'ae: neikeni esiana oo mpisai naainosieki neaku ropiyiani naaibor naabaya inkalusuni onom. 
Acts19:20 Nejia eikuna ororei lo Laitoriani te magilanisho neponari te ngolon. 
Acts19:21 Ore pee eiting kuna baa, nemut Paulo openy te Nkiyang'et Sinyati ajo, ore pee eidip aimai Makedonia o Akaia, neitoki alo Yerusalem, nejo, “Ore pee aidip ashomo ine, meeta nchere pee eitu alo Roma.”" 
Acts19:22 Ore pee eirriwaa aare le lelo aretok lenyena Makedonia, aa taa Timoteo o Erasto, neng'as ninye makewan abik te Asia te nkiti rishata." 
Acts19:23 Ore ake te nena katitin nedumunye oloilole leme kiti tialo ena Oitoi. 
Acts19:24 Amu eetae oltung'ani oji Demetrus, kunoni oitobir mpisai oo sekenke neidong'u too sekenke oo mpisai Artemis naatudupore oleng lelo kunono." 
Acts19:25 Nesotu ilo kulikae kunono ooitobir sii ninche nena tokitin, nejoki, “Lo kituaak, iyiololo aajo ena siaai ang oshi kidupore." 
Acts19:26 Nidolitata, nining'itoto aajo mme te Efeso ake, kake etaa ore ninye Asia pooki, eibelekenye eilejileja ilo oji Paulo ltung'ana kumok aitapong'oo, ajoki eji mme hoo nkaitin kuna naa too nkaik eitobiri." 
Acts19:27 Mme taa doi ena siaai ang ake etarrikio eyookini aamenaa; kake keyooki doi aaku ore ninye enkaji e nkai ng'oruoi kitok naji Artemis neitaai pesho, nebaiki doi ninye nesuluni te sikar enye, ina naa ninye eserem Asia neserem enkop pooki.”" 
Acts19:28 Ore ake pee ening ninche ina neiput engoro, nebuak aajo, “Kitok ake Artemis oo Leefeso.”" 
Acts19:29 Neiput olmilo ina anasa; nekuet pooki te nebo aapuo enkaji e nkiguran neikurtutaa Gayo o Aristako, ltung'ana le Makedonia, ooiriamariyie apa Paulo too lotot enyena." 
Acts19:30 Ore pee ejo Paulo ajing atua lelo tung'ana, nemitiki lkipaareta." 
Acts19:31 Ore sii kulikae loo laitoriak le Asia, laa lchoreta lenyena, neirriwaki olkilikuai aasai pee metem ninye makewan alo ina aji e nkiguana." 
Acts19:32 Nebuaku kulikae ejo ena nebuaku kulikae ejo ae: amu eing'oling'ole ina tumo: naa aimeyiolo esejata sapuk ajo kainyoo pee eiturrurroteki te nebo. 
Acts19:33 Neitupukuni Aleksanta tiatua olorere, naa Lyahudi ooturrumoitie. Neyuk Aleksanta ninche te nkaina, eyieu newaliki olorere." 
Acts19:34 Kake ore ake pee eyiolou aajo Olyahudi Aleksanta; nebuaku pooki to ltoilo obo neidikidik aaiko nejia te rishata oo saai are ejoito, “Kitok ake Artemis oo Leefeso.”" 
Acts19:35 Ore ade pee eitigir olasirani kitok le ina anasa olorora, nejo, “Lo lewa le Efeso, keetae pasa oltung'ani lemeyiolo ajo ena anasa e Efeso oshi enkarriponi e nkaji naseremieki Artemis kitok o ilo soit sinyati apa odou eing'uaa shumata?" 
Acts19:36 Ore naa amu iyiololo aajo meetae oltung'ani oishankarru kuna baa, keishiaakino naaji nigirara, pee miwuapakinono ake aas ae bae namurtana." 
Acts19:37 Amu iyautua kulo tung'ana ene, neme ketupurro nkajijik naaomonishoreki neitu sii emor enkai ang." 
Acts19:38 Te neeta Demetrus, aashu kulo kunono ooiriamunore embae naatakinore likae tung'ani, kebolo nkajijik e nkiguana neetae ilbalusuni: enchoo epuonu aaiguana olikae o likae." 
Acts19:39 Kake te niaatata kulie ning'oruru, kepuonunui aaiguanare nena te noshi ake kiguana." 
Acts19:40 Amu kebaiki doi neiguanareki iyiook tele ong'oling'oli le na olong, amu aimeeta duoo tipat nadumunyeki; naa te neikilikuani iyiook nikilau enikijo te nkaraki ele oilole.”" 
Acts19:41 Ore pee eidip atejo neijia, neidapasha ina tumo." 
Acts20:1 Ore pee eishunye ina liman, neipotisho Paulo aiturrur ilairukok neikok, neitanapare, nelo aing'uaa eyieu Makedonia." 
Acts20:2 Ore pee eimaa nene wuejitin, neikok ilairukok oleng nelotu enkop oo Lyunani." 
Acts20:3 Ore etobiko lapaitin okuni teine, neiguanare Lyahudi ejo pee ear metua, enoshi kata ejo pee elo aked emeli alo Siria, nerrinyo etumuta ajo keimaa ake pookata Makedonia." 
Acts20:4 Neiriamariyie Sopater olayioni le Pirro, le Berea o meitabaiki Asia; o kulo le Sesalonike, Aristako o Sekunto; o Gayo le Derbe, o Timoteo. Ore ile Asia naa Tikikos o Trifimo." 
Acts20:5 Kake eituruko apa kulo, nepuo aanyu iyiook te Troas." 
Acts20:6 Nikiked emeli te Filipi eishari osirua loo Mukateni Nemeisuishieki, nikibau Troas too nkolong'i miet; nikibik nkolong'i naapishana teine." 
Acts20:7 Ore te nkolong e dukuya e wiki, kitoni te nebo aabel emukate, neikok Paulo ninche ejo pee eyooki alo te ntaaisere; neitoodor ororei o meitoritoyu enkewarie." 
Acts20:8 Naa kumok ilkilang'ilang'eta te ilo gilata le shumata, likitumore." 
Acts20:9 Neton oloti barnoti oji Yutikas te lusie, neimug eiroshiutuo njo. Ore eton ake eitoodorita Paulo ororei, neidimutua olbarnoti njio nesulunye te nkaji e uni e shumata, nedumuni eji ketua." 
Acts20:10 Nedou Paulo, nepetaa nedumu amuataki nkaik nejo, “Emimputukuny amu eton eishu.”" 
Acts20:11 Ore pee eilep, nebel emukate, nedaa, neitoki ake airorie kata naado, o mekenyu, nelo taa aing'uaa." 
Acts20:12 Nerikuni oladuoo barnoti eishu neme kiti enkilejilejata nanoto ninche. 
Acts20:13 Kake kinturuko iyiook aapuo enetii emeli, nikiked nikilang aapuo Aso, kijo pee kipuo aang'amu Paulo teine, amu ninye otejo nejia eyieu ninye nelo aimaa enkop natoyio." 
Acts20:14 Ore pee elotu anang'are iyiook te Aso, nikintaked emeli, nikipuo mitelene." 
Acts20:15 Ore pee kidumunye teine, nikiyiooki aapuonu te ntaaisere o maipirare Kios, ore te nkolong nasuju nikintashe peno te Samo, ore te nkae olong nikipuonu Mileto." 
Acts20:16 Amu etumuta Paulo ajo kegiroo Efeso te meli, pee meya erishata te Asia; eyieu nesiooyo, ejo te neidimayu neyieu netii Yerusalem te nkolong e Pentekoste." 
Acts20:17 Ore kitii Mileto, neirriwaa Paulo olkilikuai Efeso, aipot ilpayiani le ina sirit." 
Acts20:18 Ore pee epuonu enetii ninye nejoki ninche: “Iyiololo maate ebaiki enapa olong nang'as are Asia, eneikununo entonata ai tiatua intae teina kata pooki;" 
Acts20:19 aisiaaita Olaitoriani te mborron pooki o te ng'eno, o too lkiyio, o toongololikinot nanoto te nkaraki losekin loo Lyahudi." 
Acts20:20 Niyiololo aajo eitu ae kata aing'ash aibalakinye intae embae ake pooki naret intae, naiteng'en intae te dukuya ltung'ana, naruk inkajijik" 
Acts20:21 aishakenoki ndung'ot pokira aa Lyahudi o aa Lyunani meirridu tialo Enkai, neiruk Olaitoriani lang Yesu Kristo." 
Acts20:22 Ore naa taata, ng'ura, Yerusalem aloito te nkanyit e nkiyang'et sinyati nemayiolo mbaa naapuo aatum teine." 
Acts20:23 Aaishakenoko nanu Enkiyang'et Sinyati nchere, ore te pooki anasa nalo naa inkeenta o nkitamiot naanyita." 
Acts20:24 Kake maikenaa enkishui ai ajo keeta tipat, anaa keeta dupoto te nanu, kake kajo pee aitabaya elototo ai, o esiaai natang'amua to Laitoriani Yesu, aishakenoki ororei supat le mpiris e Nkai." 
Acts20:25 Ore naa taata kayiolo ajo meekure intokiki ai kata aadol enkomom ai, intae kulo laisiritore alikioo enkitoria e Nkai." 
Acts20:26 Ore te nkaraki ina, kaishakenoki taata intae ajoki tenetii olotapong'ori, nemaata nanu entiyoto" 
Acts20:27 amu maata enatelekua eitu aibalakinye intae te lulung'ata e nkikoo e Nkai neitu aliki intae. 
Acts20:28 Entagolie ate maate o ina luaata pooki naitaa intae Enkiyang'et Sinyati ilaing'urak lenyena, aaitoti esirit e Nkai nainyiang'aka ninye kewan to sarge lenye." 
Acts20:29 Kayiolo ajo nanu ake olo, nejing atua intae isuyian ooata enkarri, lemeing'urrie ena luaata;" 
Acts20:30 naa keinyototo ltung'ana tiatua intae, oojo mbaa e nkiushoto pee eyiataa lkipaareta laa ninche esujaa." 
Acts20:31 Entashololoto naa nidamumu aajo ore te rishata oo larin okuni eitu agira aikokito intae pooki dama o kewarie too lkiyio. 
Acts20:32 Ore naa taata inkaik e Nkai aitarasaki intae o ele rorei le mpiris ooidim atesheta intae neisho intae enjung'ore te nebo lelo pooki ooiteng'elaki. 
Acts20:33 Eitu ang'uar enkosholai aashu saabu o enkila e likae tung'ani. 
Acts20:34 Iyiololo maate aajo kuna aik naaisiaayiakita nkolati aainei makewan o ne lelo laisiritore. 
Acts20:35 Aitoduaa intae pooki toki, nchere ti nisiaaishosho aaiko nejia niretirete ilooshal idamumu irorei lo Laitoriani Yesu anaa enatejo openy inchere, ‘Enkishooroto namayiana alang eng'amaroto.’ ”" 
Acts20:36 Ore pee eidip Paulo atejo nejia, negil kung neomon te nebo ninche pooki." 
Acts20:37 Neishiraki ninche pooki ninye oleng, nemuataki Paulo nkaik neng'utut ninye," 
Acts20:38 neisina oleng te nkaraki ilo rorei otejo eji, meitoki aekata aadol enkomom enye. Neitarioo ninche ninye aaitabaiki enetii emeli." 
Acts21:1 Ore kitung'uaitie ninche nikiked emeli, nikintoriounye aapuonu Kos, ore te nkolong nasuju ina nikibau Rodos, nikidumunye teine nikipuonu Patara." 
Acts21:2 Ore pee kitum emeli nalang alo Foinike, nikiked aapuo." 
Acts21:3 Ore pee kidol Kupro, nikincho kedianye aaporoo aapuo Siria o maetu Tiro, amu teine eitadou emeli lolan." 
Acts21:4 Ore pee kitum ilairukok, nikibik inkolong'i naapishana teine. Nejoki lelo Paulo te Nkiyang'et nchere pee melo ake Yerusalem." 
Acts21:5 Ore pee kiishu nena olong'i, nikidumunye aapuo enapake lototo ang; neitarioo iyiook ninche pooki o nkituaak o nkera, o maetu auluo e ina anasa, nikigil kung te mbata e naiposha nikiomon nikinchoro ole sere." 
Acts21:6 Nikintoki aaked emeli, nerrinyo ninche aapuo ang." 
Acts21:7 Ore kindipa elototo ang king'uaa Tiro, nikibau Tolemai; nikiroroki ilalashera nikibik nabo olong te nebo ninche." 
Acts21:8 Ore pee ekenyu nikidumunye o maetu Kaisaria; nikijing enkaji o lalikioroni Filipo, obo loo lapa oopishana, nikitoni te nkaji enye." 
Acts21:9 Neeta ninye ntoyie ong'uan nemeyama, naaishoro enaibon e Nkai." 
Acts21:10 Ore kitobiko nkuti olong'i, nelotu oloiboni le Nkai oing'uaa Yudea oji Agabo." 
Acts21:11 Nelotu ine nikitii nedumu enkeene e mpolos e Paulo neen kewan inkejek o nkaik, nejo, “Inji ejo Enkiyang'et Sinyati, ‘Inji epuo aaiko Lyahudi te Yerusalem aaen olopeny ena keene neitarasaki nkaik oo Loreren.’ ”" 
Acts21:12 Ore pee kining ina nikisai iyiook o lelo tung'ana Paulo pee meilep alo Yerusalem. 
Acts21:13 Newaliki Paulo ajoki, “Kaa ena niaasitata, kinchirakiki nikintashalishala oltau? Mme doi enkeene ake aitieu naaeni kake te naa kaye te Yerusalem naye te nkaraki enkarna o Laitoriani Yesu.”" 
Acts21:14 Ore pee kilaikino aaiboo, nikigira nikijo, “Metotiwuo naa anaa enayieu Olaitoriani.”" 
Acts21:15 Ore pee eishunye nena olong'i nikinapa pee kilep aapuo Yerusalem. 
Acts21:16 Neiriamariyie iyiook kulikae ooiteng'eni oing'uaa Kaisaria, nerik iyiook enkaji e likae oji Mnason le Kupro, olaa oloiteng'eni musana ninye, paa ninye kirragaitie." 
Acts21:17 Ore pee kipuonu Yerusalem, neng'amu iyiook ilalashera te nchipai." 
Acts21:18 Ore te nkolong natusujua ina, neiriamunore iyiook Paulo kipuoito enetii Yakobo; nelulung'a ilpayiani pooki teine." 
Acts21:19 Ore pee eidip airoroki ninche, neinosaki maa nabo nena baa pooki naataasa Enkai tiatua Loreren ooisiaaishore ninye." 
Acts21:20 Ore pee ening ninche, neisis Enkai. Nejoki ninche ninye, “Olalashe, idolita eneba nkalifuni oo Lyahudi ooiruko; neeta pooki olokiyo too nkitanapat." 
Acts21:21 Nikietuoki aakur te ninche nchere ishomo aiteng'en Ilyahudi pooki ootii Loreren metung'uai nkitanapat e Musa, eji nepal memurat inkera enye nemesuj lkerreti lang." 
Acts21:22 Kaa naa easi? Nemeeta nchere eitu ening aajo iewuo. 
Acts21:23 Taasa ena nikijoki iyie. Kiaata ltung'ana oong'uan ooinosa olmumai; 
Acts21:24 tudumu kulo tung'ana pokira oong'uan mikintukui te nebo ninche nilaaki ninche nena tokitin naaitalakishoi, pee ebarni. Ina eyiolounye pooki ng'ae nchere meeta tipat kunda baa naatiaakaki tialo iyie amu isujita iyie makewan nkitanapat e Nkai te nkishon ino." 
Acts21:25 Kake ore ltung'ana loo Loreren ooiruko, kirriwakita apa empalai nayakita enkiguana ang nchere pee erishie ate ntokitin naapolosakini nkitanyaanyukot neme Enkai o sarge o ntokitin naagori o eloloito.”" 
Acts21:26 Nedumu taa Paulo lelo tung'ana pokira oong'uan te nkolong nasuju ina, neitisiny kewan, tenebo ninche nejing atua enkaji e Nkai, alikioo eneiting'ie nkolong'i e ina kitukuoto, neishooyo sii ntokitin naaitukuyieki ninche pooki." 
Acts21:27 Ore etaa keishunye nena olong'i pokira naapishana, netii Ilyahudi ooing'uaa Asia, ootoduaa Paulo te nkaji e Nkai, neing'oling'ol esiamo, neitabaiki ninye nkaik aaibung," 
Acts21:28 ebuakita aajo, “Lo lewa loo Siraeli, entaret iyiook! Ele tung'ani doi oiteng'enita ltung'ana te pooki wueji meibai ele orere neibayu nkitanapat e Nkai o ena aji Enkai; nenyaaka ayau Iyunani aitijing enkaji e Nkai, neewuo aisarkionie ene wueji sinyati.”" 
Acts21:29 Naa Trofimo etoduaaki ae olong eiriamariyie Paulo teina anasa, nejo ninche ketoriko Paulo aitijing enkaji e Nkai." 
Acts21:30 Neing'oling'ola taa enkanasa pooki, nekuetu ltung'ana aaiturrurro te nebo; neibung'i Paulo neikurtutari aitayu teina aji e Nkai, neikeni kutuk aji nabo kata." 
Acts21:31 Ore eji matar metua, nebaiki ororei olkitok loo sikarini loo ltimito nchere einyio oloilole te Yerusalem pooki." 
Acts21:32 Nedumu ninye isikarini o lkituaak le lelo timito, nekuetu adoiki ninche: ore pee edoluni ilo kitok o sikarini, nepal eitu eitoki aar Paulo." 
Acts21:33 Nenyikaki ilo kitok loo sikarini Paulo, neibung arik ninye, neitanapisho meteeni too ilpisia aare, neikilikuan ajoki, “Aira ng'ae?” Neikilikuan enataasa." 
Acts21:34 Nebuaku kulikae tiatua ilo orora ae bae, nejo kulikae ae; ore pee edol ajo meeta ae naning te nkaraki ilo ololepilepi; neitanapisho meyauni atua emanyata oo sikarini." 
Acts21:35 Ore enoshi naitabaikini inkedeta e kishomi, neaku te shumata eya isikarini aaing'atie enkop te nkaraki olong'oling'oli le ilo orora egorokinoi;" 
Acts21:36 amu esujita ake ilo orere ebuakita aajo, “Ewaita ninye!”" 
Acts21:37 Ore etaa keitabaikini Paulo ina manyata, nejoki ilo kitok loo sikarini, “Eikincho pasa maairorie?” Nejoki ninye, “Iyiolo doi enkutuk oo Lyunani?" 
Acts21:38 Metaa mira doi olanaarri Misiri oirrikia olorere meitarrikinore enkitoria nerik ilapa tung'ana asesekuanak nkalifuni ong'uan te ong'ata?” 
Acts21:39 Newaliki Paulo ajoki, “Kara nanu Olyahudi, oing'uaa Tarso te Kilikia, metaa mme misil enkanasa naing'uaa; aatoomono naa nchooki mairorie ele orere.”" 
Acts21:40 Ore pee eisho, neitashe Paulo te nena kedeta e kishomi, neyuk olorere te nkaina; ore pee egira aajo tim, neirorie te nkutuk oo Lbrania, nejoki." 
Acts22:1 “Ilalashera laainei o loo papa, entoning'oki te kuna namitunye kewan te dukuya intae.”" 
Acts22:2 Ore pee ening'i aajo enkutuk oo Lbrania eirorie, neitirring'a oleng aainining. Nejo," 
Acts22:3 “Kara Olyahudi, naa te Tarso e Kilikia aaini, kake te na anasa aaitubuluaki too nkejek e Gamaliel, naaiteng'eni te risioroto oo nkitanapat oo loo papa naarrish, naata olokiyo te Nkai anaa ena nitiuu pooki tele kekun." 
Acts22:4 Aisilisilo nanu iltung'ana lena Oitoi o metuata naen anang'aki jila ilewa o nkituaak," 
Acts22:5 naa olchakeni lai olapolosani kitok naa nejia etiu olkiaama pooki loo lpaiyiani. Ninche laaishoo mpala nayaki lalashera, pee adumunye alo Dameski aibung lelo ootii ine ayau Yerusalem eena pee eitamei." 
Acts22:6 “Ore aloito atinyikaka Dameski, etaa enaipirie enkolong newang'u nabo kata ewang'an naing'uaa shumata naaman." 
Acts22:7 Nabatata te nkop naning oltoilo laajoki, ‘Saulo Saulo ainyoo pee kisilisil?’" 
Acts22:8 Nawaliki ajoki, ‘Olaitoriani, aira ng'ae?’ Naajoki ninye, ‘Kara Yesu le Nasaret lisilisilito!’" 
Acts22:9 Ore lelo laairiamariyie nanu nedol ina wang'an kake eitu ening oltoilo le ilo laairorie. 
Acts22:10 Najo, ‘Olaitoriani, kaji aiko?’ Naajoki Olaitoriani, ‘Inyo, shomo tijing'a Dameski, paa teine kilikini nena pooki nikitegelakaki taasa.’" 
Acts22:11 Ore amu meekure adolisho te nkaraki ina wang'an, naariki aaibung enkaina lelo ootii te nebo nanu, o maetu Dameski." 
Acts22:12 “Netii ine oltung'ani obo oji Ananias, oserem ninye Enkai anaa enajo nkitanapat, ooilet Ilyahudi pooki te supatisho, laa ine nemanya ninye." 
Acts22:13 Nelotu ilo enatii, neitashe tialo nanu naajoki, ‘Olalashe lai Saulo, todolisho.’ Ore teina saa ake nadolishoyu nadol ninye." 
Acts22:14 Nejo ninye, ‘Enkai oo loo papa nikitegelua tayiolo yieuna enye, nikincho toduaa ilo obo Asipani nining oltoilo te nkutuk enye;" 
Acts22:15 amu iaku shakeni lenye too ltung'ana pooki te nena nitoduaa o nitoning'o. 
Acts22:16 Kainyoo naa taata ianyita? Inyo mikimbatisai, intukuoi ing'ok inono, impoto enkarna enye.’" 
Acts22:17 “Ore pee aidip atushukunye Yerusalem aomonito te nkaji e Nkai, naainepu enduaata" 
Acts22:18 nadol aajoki ninye nanu, ‘Isarisara tasiooi tung'uai Yerusalem, amu meng'amaa hoo ninche shakenisho ino tialo nanu.’" 
Acts22:19 Najo, ‘Olaitoriani, eyiolo ninche maate enaikuna meeta enkaji e ntumo neitu ajing napik jila naar lelo likiruko." 
Acts22:20 Naa ore pee eibukori osarge le Stefano olchakeni lino, aitashe sii nanu atonyorrayie, naa nanu oitasheikio nkilani e lelo ootara.’" 
Acts22:21 Naajoki ninye, ‘Shomo, amu nanu laairriwaa neelakua shomo enetii Loreren.’ ”" 
Acts22:22 Neinining lelo tung'ana Paulo o metejo ele rorei; nejo ake nejia, neilepie pooki ltoiloishi nejo, “Ewuang'ie ele tung'ani te nkop! Amu meishiaakino neishu!”" 
Acts22:23 Ore ebuakita neisuaakita ilkilani lenye nekur enterit aaisuaaya," 
Acts22:24 neitanapisho ilo kitok loo sikarini meyauni Paulo atua emanyata enye, nejo metaari meiroro, pee eyiolou enatabuaakinye ninche ninye." 
Acts22:25 Ore eidipaki aateen too nkeenta, nejoki Paulo osajini oitasheiki, “Keishiaakino pasa neidong'i oltung'ani loo Roma, leitu eng'asi aaiguanare?”" 
Acts22:26 Ore pee ening ilo sajini ina nelo enetii olkitok loo sikarini nejoki, “Kaa bae ena nijo aas? Amu oloo Roma ele tung'ani.”" 
Acts22:27 Metaa nelotu ilo kitok enetii Paulo nejoki, “Tolikioki sii iyie japa, eji ira doi oloo Roma?” Nejoki Paulo, “Ee.”" 
Acts22:28 Newaliki ilo kitok loo sikarini ajoki, “Kainyiang'ua nanu ina kiela too ropiyiani kumok oleng.” Nejoki Paulo, “Kaikino nanu.”" 
Acts22:29 Metaa nepuo nabo kata aalam lelo apa oojo pee epuonu aajur; neureshoyu sii ninye ilo kitok loo sikarini amu etayiolo ajo oloo Roma Paulo neidipaki aateen. 
Acts22:30 Kake ore pee ekenyu, neyieu ake olkitok loo sikarini neyiolou enaitang'orie Lyahudi Paulo pee eisitaaitie, nelaku ninye, nejoki lapolosak kituaak o lkiaama pooki menototo, neriku Paulo neitasheyie te dukuya ninche." 
Acts23:1 Neing'or Paulo olkiaama akurraki nkonyek, nejo, “Ilalashera laainei, aitasho te dukuya Enkai o metabau ele kekun aata oltau sidai.”" 
Acts23:2 Nejoki olapolosani kitok oji Ananias lelo ooitashe aatashare Paulo metooshi enkutuk. 
Acts23:3 Nejoki Paulo, “Enkai nikiyiooki aosh iyie, olaaijo esuntai naiborrieki! Aiton pee kinguanare too nkitanapat e Nkai nintoki apaash enajo nena kitanapat ajo maatooshi?”" 
Acts23:4 Nejoki lelo ooitashe teine, “Kolapolosani kitok le Nkai imor?”" 
Acts23:5 Nejo Paulo, “Te nkaraki naa aimayiolo lalashera laainei, ajo ninye olapolosani kitok, amu etisiraki aajo, ‘Mijo ake ine nkarruoisho tialo oloitore olorere linyi.’ ”" 
Acts23:6 Kake ore pee edol Paulo ajo Isadukayo enchoto nabo naa Ilfarisayo enkae, nebuaku ajo to lkiama, “Ilalashera laainei, kara nanu Olfarisayoi naa Ilfarisayo laaiu; olapa siligi o empiunoto oo lootuata doi pee aaiguanareki.”" 
Acts23:7 Ore pee ejo nejia, nepuku empong'o too Sadukayo o Lfarisayo, neoro olkiooma." 
Acts23:8 Amu kejo Ilsadukayo meetae empiunoto, nemeetae ilmalaika, nemeetae enkiyang'et; kake kenyorraa ninche Ilfarisayo nena pooki." 
Acts23:9 Nepuku olong'oling'oli kitok; neinyiototo kulikae aiteng'enak loo nkitanapat Farisayo neiguana nejo, “Eitu hoo kitum iyiook entioto tele tung'ani. Oo doi te naa ke nkiyang'et aashu olmalaika oirorie?”" 
Acts23:10 Ore pee eaku keibelekenya empong'o aaku olarrabal, nedol ilo kitok loo sikarini, neureyu ajo kepolosi Paulo aaitaa ng'urrot, neirriwaa sikarini metadoi aayau ninye te ngolon aaitung'uaa ninche neyau emanyata." 
Acts23:11 Ore te nkae kewarie natusujua ina, neitashe Olaitoriani tialo Paulo nejo, “Intagoluoyu, amu ore anaa ina nikinchakenoko nanu te Yerusalem, nejia kiyiooki aiko aishakenoki te Roma.”" 
Acts23:12 Ore pee ekenyu neiguana Lyahudi nenya olmumai pee menya endaa nemeok ae toki o metaba anaa near Paulo metua. 
Acts23:13 Negiroo artam ilooinosa ina kiguana enkarruoisho. 
Acts23:14 Nepuo lelo enetii ilapolosak kituaak o lpayiani; nejo, “Kiteena ate katukul to lmumai nchere mikinchamisham endaa o metaba anaa nikiaar Paulo metua." 
Acts23:15 Enyoito intae, o lkiama, entiaaki taata olkitok loo sikarini meitadou Paulo, entaakunoto keeta eniyieuu nisipunyenye aabaraki. Amu kitanapate iyiook pee kiar metua eton eitu enyikaki intae.”" 
Acts23:16 Nening olayioni le nkanashe Paulo ina rreshoto enye nelo ajing emanyata neliki Paulo. 
Acts23:17 Neipot Paulo obo le lelo sajinini nejo, “Toriko ele barnoti enetii olkitok loo sikarini, amu keeta enayieu nejoki.”" 
Acts23:18 Nerikoki olkitok loo sajinini nejo, “Paulo oloshi oena laaipoto naajoki maatorikoki ele barnoti, amu keeta enikijoki.”" 
Acts23:19 Neibung ilo kitok enkaina nerik enkilepata neikilikuan too nkurrat ajoki, “Kaa kiyieu nikijoki?”" 
Acts23:20 Nejoki, “Eiguanate Ilyahudi pee kipuonu aaikilikuan tayooki taaisere intadoi Paulo meshomo enetii olkiaama, anaa keeta enayieunye pee epuo aajur oleng." 
Acts23:21 Kake minyorraa ina nayieu ninche; amu artam nadooyo iltung'ana lenye ootii olnukata aaresh ninye, eteena ate to lmumai aajo menya endaa nemeok toki mme keidipa aatar Paulo metua; neidipa taata aatanapata, iyie eanyita tonyorrai ina.”" 
Acts23:22 Neisho ilo kitok loo sikarini olbarnoti elo neitirrishaki ajoki, “Nimiliki ake likae tung'ani ajo kitolikio ena bae.”" 
Acts23:23 Neitoki ilo kitok loo sikarini aipot isajinini aare nejoki, “Ore te saa uni e nkewarie enchoo enapa sikarini iip are te nebo intomoni naapishana loo mbartan o loo remeta iip are oopuo aabaya Kaisaria." 
Acts23:24 Naa erotoki sii Paulo embarta naked, entorikoki olgafanai Feliks.”" 
Acts23:25 Neiger empalai ajo nji: 
Acts23:26 “Nanu Klaudio Lisia laairoroki, Oloyanyiti Olbalusui Feliks." 
Acts23:27 Ele tung'ani eibung'a Lyahudi, naa anaata etara metua, neaku ainepua aata sikarini nasaru, atayiolo ajo oloo Roma." 
Acts23:28 Ore ajo pee ayiolou embae naisitaarieki nariku aitadoiki olkiaama lenye. 
Acts23:29 Nayiolou ajo mbaa oo nkitanapat enye eisitaarie, kake meeta enataasa nairirikino keeya anaa eenata." 
Acts23:30 Ore pee aarojakini nchere einosaki enkiguana pee eari ele tung'ani metua, nairriu nabo kata enitii iyie, naitanap lelo ooisitaaya meetu aalimu te dukuya iyie enaatakinore ninye.”" 
Acts23:31 Neaku etoriko isikarini Paulo anaa enaitanapaki nerik kewarie o meitabaiki Antipatri. 
Acts23:32 Neyooki enkolong natusujua ina aashukunye emanyata, neing'ueikini iloo mbartan metoriko aapuo." 
Acts23:33 Ore pee epuonu Kaisaria neitarasaki olgafanai empalai, neitarasaki sii Paulo ninye." 
Acts23:34 Ore pee eisum olgafanai empalai, neikilikuan ajoki kalo osho ing'uaa?. Ore pee eyiolou ajo ole Kilikia" 
Acts23:35 nejo, “Kaayooki ainining te nebau lelo likintang'or.” Neitanapisho metorripi te nkaji e Herode e nkitoo." 
Acts24:1 Ore etulusoitie nkolong'i miet nedou Anania olapolosani kitok o kulikae payiani o ltung'ani olotu airo te rishata enye, oji Tertulo. Nepuonu aainosaki olgafanai nena baa naaitang'orie Paulo;" 
Acts24:2 ore pee eipoti Paulo neiteru Tertulo aitang'or Paulo ejo: “Ore amu iyie pee king'idare ena seriani kitok, naa te leng'on ino, Oloyanyiti Feliks, pee eibelekenyitai mbaa aaitang'ejuk tele orere," 
Acts24:3 niking'amaa nena te nashe too nkoitoi pooki o te pooki wueji. 
Acts24:4 Kake ore pee mikintoki aaibok iyie, naaomon to lng'ur lino toning'o iyiook too ndorropu." 
Acts24:5 Amu kinoto aajo serseri ele tung'ani naa oltang'oroi too Lyahudi pooki te nkop pooki, naa ninye obo loo larikok le na kiteng'enare kilaut naji eno Lnasarayoi." 
Acts24:6 Ketetema doi ninye ajo aisarkionie enkaji e Nkai paa iyiook ooibung'a. 
Acts24:7 [Eikijo apa iyiook pee kinguanare too nkitanapat ang, kake Lisia olkitok loo sikarini oewuo newuapaa aoru iyiook te ngolon oleng." 
Acts24:8 Neitoki ake Lisia aitoreisho nejo meetu lelo ooitang'or dukuya iyie.] Te nijur ele tung'ani, naa iyiolou iyie openy esipata e nena nikintang'orie.”" 
Acts24:9 Neirukoki Ilyahudi ina kitang'oro, neitisip aajo nejia etiu." 
Acts24:10 Ore pee eisho olgafanai Paulo meiroro, newal Paulo nejo: “Ore amu kayiolo ajo kumok ilarin intore ele orere, kashipa amitu kewan." 
Acts24:11 Te niyieu naa indim aitadedeyie nchere, eitu egiroo tomon o aare nkolong'i anaa nailep alo aserem Enkai te Yerusalem;" 
Acts24:12 neitu aainepu ninche aishankarrarre likae tung'ani aashu aing'oling'ol iltung'ana, te nkaji e Nkai, aashu too nkajijik e ntumo aashu teina anasa." 
Acts24:13 Nemeidim doi ninche aaitadedeyie kuna naapuonu aaitang'orie. 
Acts24:14 Kake kanyorraa ena nabo te dukuya iyie, nchere tena Oitoi, najo ninche enkiteng'enare kilaut aserem nanu Enkai oo loo papa, airukito mbaa pooki naalimuno too nkitanapat anaa too naaigero too mbukui oo loibonok le Nkai." 
Acts24:15 Kaata osiligi te Nkai naa kenyorraa sii ninche kulo nchere kelotu empiunoto e lelo ooata esipata o lemeeta. 
Acts24:16 Metaa anyokita oshi ake pee aata oltau sidai tialo Enkai o tialo ltung'ana. 
Acts24:17 Ore det etulusoitie lkuti arin nalotu ayaki olorere lang nkishorunot naaretieki laisinak nkishorunot e nashe. 
Acts24:18 Ore aa ina aasita, naainepu aadipaki aaitisinya te nkaji e Nkai, nemetii olorere aashu eliman. Kake eetae Lyahudi le Asia" 
Acts24:19 laa keishiaakino naaji netii ene pee aapuonu aaitang'or, te naa keeta enaatakinore." 
Acts24:20 Aashu doi elimu ninche kulo maate aajo kaa torroni apa aanotie pee aitashe te dukuya olkiaama," 
Acts24:21 neme ena nabo ake natabuakua aitashe te dukuya ninche ajo, ‘Te nkaraki e mpiunoto oo lootuata pee aitashe te dukuya intae maaiguanareki tele kekun.’ ”" 
Acts24:22 Kake ore ninye Feliks, amu ketiu anaa ketabaraka ayiolou ena Oitoi, neilitilit, nejoki, “Ore pee edou Lisia, olkitok loo sikarini naadung'oki enkiguana.”" 
Acts24:23 Neitanap osajini metorripi kake meitirrishi sii, nememitikini lchoreta lenyena epuonu aaret anaa enayieu." 
Acts24:24 Ore eshomo nkuti olong'i nelotu Feliks o enkitok enye naji Drusila, naa Eyahudi ninye; nejo meipoti Paulo meinining'o eimaki enkirukoto nairuki Yesu Kristo." 
Acts24:25 Ore pee elimu mbaa naaipirta enkiguana oo sipat o enkibooroto naaibooyo oltung'ani e kewan arishie ntorrok, o enkiguana kenya nalotu, neureishoyu Feliks nejo, “Shomo taata; ore pee atum erishata naaipot.”" 
Acts24:26 Ore eyia nejia naa kejo apa kebaiki neisho Paulo mpisai. Neaku keirriwaa lkiliku nkatitin kumok neinosie lomon. 
Acts24:27 Kake ore pee elusoo larin aare, neirriuni Porkio Festo meetijinga erishata e Feliks; ore ninye Feliks ejo pee eitiship Ilyahudi, neing'uaa Paulo te jila." 
Acts25:1 Ore pee ebau Festo, ina kop naitore, nkolong'i uni ake naatulusoitie, nedumunye te Kaisaria ailep alo Yerusalem." 
Acts25:2 Neitang'or ilapolosak kituaak o larikok loo Lyahudi Paulo te ninye nesai aaitirrishaki," 
Acts25:3 aajoki meitobiraki ninche mbaa aisho ilo tung'ani meewai Yerusalem, aa kejo pee erresh aasesekuan te nkoitoi." 
Acts25:4 Newaliki Festo ajoki te Kaisaria erripi Paulo, netataana pee elo sii ninye ine." 
Acts25:5 Nejoki, “Enchoo naa iltung'ana ooata enkitoria te intae edou mairiamari, paa te neetae enatapong'e te ilo tung'ani, nepuo aaitang'or.”" 
Acts25:6 Ore etobiko Festo nkolong'i naabaya isiet anaa tomon te nebo ninche, nedoyio alo Kaisaria. Ore te nkolong nasujita ina nelo aton to lorika lenye le nkiguana neitanapisho metorikuni Paulo." 
Acts25:7 Ore pee elotu Paulo, neisho Lyahudi ootadoutuo eing'uaa Yerusalem neitashe aaman Paulo neitang'or too mbaa kumok torrok kake etalaikinote aaitadedeyie." 
Acts25:8 Nejo Paulo egira amitu kewan, “Maata tukul enaitorruoyie too Lyahudi, nemaata te nkaji e Nkai aashu te Kaisari.”" 
Acts25:9 Kake eishoo ninye Festo, ejo pee eitiship Ilyahudi, nejoki Paulo, “Iyieu nilep alo Yerusalem, pee kipuoi aaiguanare teine te dukuya nanu te nkaraki kuna baa?”"
