Acts25:10 Kake etejo Paulo, “To lorika le Kaisari le nkiguana aitashe, naa tene eishaakino naaiguanareki; maata doi entorrono naitaasa Ilyahudi, naa esipata ina niyiolo iyie aitorioki." 
Acts25:11 Te naa kara olkiminchali, aashu te naa kaata enataasa nairirikino keeya, maing'oru ajo ailanyaa keeya; kake te nemeetae esipata te nena naaitang'orieki, nemeetae likae laaidim aitarasaki ninche. Atejo Kaisari eyakini enkiguana ai.”" 
Acts25:12 Ore Festo, etang'asa aikilikuanishore olkiaama lenye newaliki ajoki, “Kaisari itejo meyakini enkiguana ino, ilo naa ake enetii Kaisari.”" 
Acts25:13 Ore etulusoitie nkolong'i kuti, nebau olaiguanani Agripa o Bernike Kaisari aairoroki Festo." 
Acts25:14 Ore etobiko nkolong'i kumok teine, neinosaki Festo olaiguanani enkiguana e Paulo, nejoki, “Eetae oltung'ani otung'uayie Feliks eena." 
Acts25:15 Ore atii Yerusalem naainosaki lapolosak kituaak o lpayiani loo Lyahudi mbaa enyena, eyieu nadung'oki ninye enkiguana." 
Acts25:16 Nawaliki ajoki ninche, mme olkerreti lang Iroma pee kinchooyo oltung'ani eitu etumo nkomomi e lelo ooitang'oro, ooisitaari, netum oloitang'oroki erishata namitunye kewan newalu nena naaisitaarieki." 
Acts25:17 Ore taa pee etumo tene, eitu aimutie, amu ore pee ekenyu naton to lorika le nkiguana naitanapisho metorikuni ilo tung'ani." 
Acts25:18 Ore pee einyiototo aaitashe lelo ooitang'or, eitu eitang'or too mbaa e nkarruoisho anaa apa enajo nanu;" 
Acts25:19 kake eji enchankar ake eyautua naipirta nkoon enye neipirta oltung'ani oji Yesu, otua apa, neitadedeyie ninye Paulo ajo keishu." 
Acts25:20 Ore amu katala enaikunakino pee atum atujurro kuna baa, naikilikuan ninye tenaa keyieu nelo Yerusalem paa teine epuoi aaiguanare te nena." 
Acts25:21 Kake ore pee einyaku Paulo ajo metorripi paa Kaisari olo aiguanare, naitanapisho metorripi o manoto enaikunaa airriwaki Kaisari.”" 
Acts25:22 Nejoki Agripa Festo, “Kayieu o nanu nainining ilo tung'ani.” Nejoki, “Taisere iyiooki ainining ninye.”" 
Acts25:23 Neaku ore te nkolong nasujita ina nelotu Agripa o Bernike eisikarrate, nejing ina aji e nkiguana te nebo lkituaak loo sikarini o ltung'ana kituaak le ina anasa, neitanapisho metorikuni Paulo." 
Acts25:24 Nejo Festo, “Olaiguanani Agripa, o intae pooki ootii ene te nebo iyiook; ele tung'ani doi aaetuo olorere pooki loo Lyahudi aaitang'or, te idie te Yerusalem o te ne sii, eilepilep aajo meishiaakino neitoki aishu." 
Acts25:25 Ore nanu makewan, natisipua ajo eitu eas ai bae nairirikino keeya, kake ore pee ejo ninye lido Aiguanani Kitok ake olo aiguanare, najo kareu naa." 
Acts25:26 Nemaata embae enye nauno najo kaigeroki olaitoriani Kitok. Ina pee atorikuo dukuya iyie, Olaiguanani Agripa, peyie aa ore pee eidipi aatujur natum enaiger ajo." 
Acts25:27 Kadol nanu aa kemakua te nairriwaa oloena nemaitoduaaya mbaa naaitang'orieki.” 
Acts26:1 Nejoki Agripa Paulo, “Ekinchoro iroro makewan.” Neitorioo Paulo enkaina neiteru airishisho nejo:" 
Acts26:2 “Kajo nanu kamunyak aa te dukuya iyie Olaiguanani Agripa, airishisho tele kekun te nkaraki nena pooki naaitang'orie Lyahudi," 
Acts26:3 amu iyiolo pae iyie lkerreti o enchankar oo Lyahudi; naa ina pee aaomon ting'iria inining'okoki. 
Acts26:4 “Keyiolo Ilyahudi enkishon ai ebaiki keraisho, neyiolo nkiterunot atii atua ele orere lang te Yerusalem." 
Acts26:5 Kaayiolo te nkata naado, te naa naaji keyieu neishakenoki, nchere olkerreti orrish aisul te seremata e Nkai ataa Olfarisayoi." 
Acts26:6 Naa ore pee aitashe taata maaiguanareki tene naa te nkaraki osiligi oishoo Enkai iloo papa," 
Acts26:7 olaa ninye eisiligita lelo oshon pokira tomon o aare ejo pee etum, naa ina pee eitirrish aaserem Enkai dama o kewarie. Naa te nkaraki ele siligi, Olaiguanani, pee aaitang'oro Lyahudi!" 
Acts26:8 Kainyoo doi pee ijojo meirukoyu te intae nchere keitopiu Enkai ilootuata? 
Acts26:9 “Kajo apa nanu makewan keishiaakino te naas mbaa kumok agilunore enkarna e Yesu le Nasaret. 
Acts26:10 Naiko doi nejia te Yerusalem; neme taa kaikenoyie ake lelo sinyat kumok te jila, ekaaishoo lapolosak kituaak enkidimata, ore ninye pee eari metuata katii esiana e lelo ooyiewuaki ina." 
Acts26:11 Nainosie ninche osina nkatitin kumok too nkajijik pooki e ntumo natem ajo aitamor ninche Enkai; naa teina goro napi, atusujaka nkanas oo loreren." 
Acts26:12 “Ina pee atudumunye alo Dameski aaitanapa lapolosak kituaak naata sii mpala enye. 
Acts26:13 Ore enaipirie enkolong, lo aiguanani, nadol te nkoitoi ewang'an naing'uaa Keper, nawang alang enkolong, newang'u aamanita o lelo apa laairiamariyie." 
Acts26:14 Ore pee kibatata te nkop, naning oltoilo laajoki te nkutuk oo Lbrania, ‘Saulo, Saulo, kainyoo pee kisilisil? Iyie doi omeyu te niroro ljipeta!’" 
Acts26:15 Najo, ‘Aira ng'ae Lo Kitok?’ Nejo Olaitoriani, ‘Kara Yesu lisilisilito." 
Acts26:16 Kake inyo ntasho too nkejek inono; amu kaatayie enkolat pee aaipang'aka, aategelua iyie taasisho ninchakenoki nena baa nitoduaa o nena naaitoki aitaliorie te iyie." 
Acts26:17 Naa kaaitajeu te kulo tung'ana o too Loreren laa ninche aairriwaki 
Acts26:18 pee ibol inkonyek enye, pee eibelekenya aaing'uaa enaimin aapuonu ewang'an, neing'uaa engolon e Sheitani aapuonu enetii Enkai, pee eng'amu ampalakino oo ng'ok netum ewueji tiatua lelo ooitisinyaki amu nanu eiruko.’" 
Acts26:19 “Ore te nkaraki ina, Olaiguanani Agripa, eitu agolong'aki ilo otaliee te Keper," 
Acts26:20 kake aibalakinye lelo ootii Dameski, o lootii sii Yerusalem o atua enkop pooki e Yudea, o Loreren sii ninche, nchere pee eirridu neibelekenyakino Enkai neas nkiaasin naairirikino enkirridunoto enye." 
Acts26:21 Te nkaraki ina pee aaibung'a Ilyahudi te nkaji e Nkai naajo matar matua. 
Acts26:22 Ore ebaiki ena olong kaata eretoto naa Enkai eing'uaa, naa ina pee aitashe aishakenoki too looti o too lkituaak, maata ae najo neme napa naajo iloibonok le Nkai nejo Musa keaku:" 
Acts26:23 nchere meeta kata apa nemeitamei Kristo, o sii nchere ninye ong'as apiu to lootuata, pee eibalakinye ewang'an Ilyahudi o loreren.”" 
Acts26:24 Ore eirishisho Paulo ajo nejia, nejo Festo to ltoilo sapuk, “Paulo, oloirirua iata, eng'eno ino kitok nikioshoo elukunya.”" 
Acts26:25 Kake etejo Paulo, “Maata nanu oloirirua, Oloyanyiti kitok Festo, isipat naaishiaakino airorita." 
Acts26:26 Amu keyiolo ninye olaiguanani kuna baa, naa ninye ashirraki airorie; amu majo keeta hoo embae nabo e kuna nemeyiolo ninye, amu mme too nkurrat etaasaki kuna." 
Acts26:27 Olaiguanani Agripa, isiligita doi iyie loibonok le Nkai? Kayiolo ajo isiligita.”" 
Acts26:28 Nejoki Agripa Paulo, “Ijo sa eikintaa olairukoni le Kristo te nkiti kata.”" 
Acts26:29 Nejo Paulo, “Te naa ai te nkiti aashu te naado, kayieu naaji te Nkai neme iyie ake kake o kulo pooki laaning'ito te na olong netiu anaa enatiu nanu metii taa kulo pisia.”" 
Acts26:30 Neinyiototo taa Olaiguanani aitashe, o ilo Gafanai o Bernike o lelo ootoni te nebo ninche," 
Acts26:31 ore pee epuo, nejokino maate, “Meeta ele tung'ani enataasa nairirikino keeya anaa eenata.”" 
Acts26:32 Nejoki Agripa Festo, “Keidimi naaji aatalaku ele tung'ani te neme ketoomonuo meyakini Kaisari enkiguana enye.”" 
Acts27:1 Ore pee edung'i aajo kiked emeli aapuo Italia, neitarasakini Paulo o kulikae ooteenaki olkitok loo sikarini oji Yulio, lo ltim le Augusto." 
Acts27:2 Nikiked emeli e Adramitio nairoto pee edumunye alo nena ang'itie e mbata e naiposha te Asia, nikipuo, neiriamariyie iyiook Aristako Olmakedoniai le Sesalonike." 
Acts27:3 Ore te nkolong nasujita ina niking'eliki Sidon; neing'urrie Yulio Paulo, neisho meshomo abaiki lchoreta lenyena aitanapare." 
Acts27:4 Ore kitii enaiposha neigara iyiook Kupro, amu etaa keibooyo iyiook olkutati." 
Acts27:5 Ore kitalang'a enaiposha naipirare Kilikia o Pamfilia, nikibau Mira, enkanasa e Likia." 
Acts27:6 Ore teine netum ilo sikari kitok emeli e Aleksantria nalang alo Italia neitaked iyiook ina. 
Acts27:7 Nikipuo maakutiti too nkolong'i kumok naa te ngoloto kitabautua enetaaniki Nido. Ore amu meisho iyiook olkutati kipuo, nikiporoo king'ura Krete o maipirare Salmone." 
Acts27:8 Nikipuo te ngoloto kingara ine, o maetu ewueji neji Enkutoto Sidai, nenyikita enkanasa naji Lasea." 
Acts27:9 Ore amu kinturraitie erishata naado, netasuro elototo amu eidipa atulusoi enkata e mpukoroto, neiguan Paulo ninche," 
Acts27:10 nejoki, “Lo kituaak, kadol ajo keaku kearisho ena lototo e meli neimin intokitin kumok nikipik sii enkishui ang bata iyiook maate.”" 
Acts27:11 Kake etoning'o olkitok le ina meli loo sikarini olarewani le meli nening sii olopeny ina meli aitalang ina natejo Paulo. 
Acts27:12 Naa ore amu mme sidai ina kutoto oo melin tenebikieki te nkata e nkirobi, nejo lkumok lenye ai sidai te neporoo aapuo teine, ejo te neidimayu nebaya Foinike, naa enkutoto ina oo melin te Krete, naipirta enkalo e nkilepunoto e kopikop o erishata e nkilepunoto e moikuape, peyie ebik teine te nkata e nkirobi." 
Acts27:13 Ore pee ekutu maa kutiti olkutati le moikuape, nejo ninche kenoto ina nayieu, nedotu oenet le meli neporoo aashep Krete, enyikita embata e ina kop." 
Acts27:14 Kake ore te nkiti kata nelotu osiwuo oji ole rishata e nkilepunoto e kopikop, adoku teinakop." 
Acts27:15 Ore pee eibung osiwuo ina meli nelaikino emeli aitoriokinore, nikipalaa meterewa iyiook." 
Acts27:16 Ore ekuetie yiook kigira aagiroo enkiti lemankale naji Kauda, te ngoloto kinotokito eenata e mpeut;" 
Acts27:17 ore ina kata pee eyietu emeli, etureita aajo ebaiki nepuoi aaitar isinya le Sirti, neitadou olkarasha kitok oreu emeli, nerei etiu nejia." 
Acts27:18 Ore eiposhita iyiook olkutati, neiteru te nkolong nasuju ina aaitadooyo ilolan oonapita emeli." 
Acts27:19 Ore te nkolong e uni, neitadooyo ntokitin naagolieki emeli too nkaik enye maate." 
Acts27:20 Ore etulusoitie nkolong'i kumok eitu aekata eliooyu enkolong anaa lakir, neme kiti olkutati okutita iyiook, neish iyiook osiligi nikijo ebaiki ake neitajeuni iyiook." 
Acts27:21 Ore amu etupukoitie kata naado, neipang'u Paulo tiatua ninche nejo, “Lo lewa, keishiaakino apa te naa eikitoning'o naa anaata eitu idumunyenye te Krete nipuonunu metobori intae aaiko nji neimina imasaa naaba nji." 
Acts27:22 Ajoki naa taata intae, entagoluoto; amu meetae hoo obo oye tiatua intae, kake keparipara emeli." 
Acts27:23 Amu ore duoo te na kewarie naipang'aka olmalaika le Nkai, nara nanu olenye naa ninye aserem," 
Acts27:24 nejo, ‘Paulo, miureishoyu, amu meeta nchere pee mintashe ake te dukuya Kaisari, naa eikintajeu iyie Enkai o lelo pooki likiriamariyie te meli.’" 
Acts27:25 Metaa, entagoluoto, lo lewa, amu kaata enkirukoto te Nkai nchere ketiu anaa ina ake naatiaakaki." 
Acts27:26 Kake keetae ole mankale likikuetiki aaiponyakino.” 
Acts27:27 Ore pee ebau enkewarie e tomon oong'uan, Kipuoito ake te naiposha e Adria, o metaa keitorito enkewarie, nemusu lelo tung'ana arewak le meli aajo kitinyikakita ae kop." 
Acts27:28 Neitadooyo entemet netum ntemeta tomon o miet. 
Acts27:29 Ore pee eureishoyu ejo ebaiki neitooshi iyiook emarti oo soito, neitadooyo ieneta oong'uan te dukuya emeli, neomon mekenyu." 
Acts27:30 Ore eing'oru lelo arewak le meli eneiko pee eluaya aaing'uaa emeli neidipa doi ninye aaitadoiki empeut enaiposha, eitaakuno keeta kulikae eenata ooitadooyo te dukuya e meli," 
Acts27:31 nejoki Paulo olkitok loo sikarini o sikarini lenyena, “Te neitu etoni ltung'ana tiatua emeli meitajeuni intae.”" 
Acts27:32 Nedung'oo sikarini nkeenta e ina peut, neisho meshomie ina." 
Acts27:33 Ore etaa kekenyu, nejoki Paulo ninche pooki meinosa endaa, nejoki, “Ene tomon o oong'uan ade taata ena olong isirng'ang'ate miatata endaa, eitu inyanya toki." 
Acts27:34 Asayiaki naa intae ajoki enosa endaa; ekeisho intae engolon amu medoyio hoo ninye olpapita le lukunya e likae obo linyi.” 
Acts27:35 Ore pee ejo Paulo nejia nedumu emukate, ore pee eisho Enkai enashe etii pooki, nebel neiter anya." 
Acts27:36 Negolu pooki oishuaa nenya sii ninche maate endaa. 
Acts27:37 (Nikira pooki iltung'ana oobaya iip are o ntomoni naapishana o ile tiatua ina meli.) 
Acts27:38 Ore pee edaa aaraposho, neiteneneng emeli aanang'aki enkano atua enaiposha." 
Acts27:39 Ore pee ekenyu, eitu eyiolou ninche ina kop, kake etoduaa enkutoto natii osinyai oisiasha, neiguana te naa keidim aaitabaiki ina meli ina kop natoyio." 
Acts27:40 Metaa neiturraa ieneta lenyena nelaku nkeenta naaenita lkurteta ooboinieki emeli; neitoki taa alaaki olkarasha kitok osiwuo neitoriokino ilo sinyai oisiasha. 
Acts27:41 Kake neikob likae sinyai oitemoro neing'irtit emeli enkop neuno olkidong'oe le meli metaa meekure edotunoyu, negilita ilopir le naiposha dukuya emeli." 
Acts27:42 Neiguanare isikarini pee ear lelo tung'ana ooena metuata, pee meporoo ake enkare neisik aapuo;" 
Acts27:43 kake ore ilo kitok loo sikarini te nkaraki neyieu neitajeu Paulo, nerishie amitiki ninche eas ina nayieu. Neitanap ilo oba anaa ilo oidim aataporoi enkare meituruko aadoyo te meli neporoo enkare aapuo enkop natoyio," 
Acts27:44 ore lkulikae ootelekutua nepororie lkeek aashu mbelat e ina meli. Neaku etasarutua pooki enkop natoyio. 
Acts28:1 Ore kitajeutuo, nikipuonu aayiolou aajo keji ilo lemankale Malta." 
Acts28:2 Ore ilopeny ina kop neitoomon iyiook to lng'ur sapuk, amu einuaa enkima neng'amaa iyiook pooki, amu eiterua asha naa keirobi." 
Acts28:3 Netasotuo Paulo looti keek nepik enkima, nepuku olasurai te nkaraki enkirowuaj neirinakino enkaina enye." 
Acts28:4 Ore pee edol lelo oopeny ine eililio ina ng'ues te nkaina e Paulo nejokino maate, “Meeta nchere mme olarani ele tung'ani. Ore hoo netajeuo te naiposha, meeta esipata naishuyie.”" 
Acts28:5 Ore ninye Paulo, neipiripiroki ina ng'ues enkima nemeeta enaitaasa ninye." 
Acts28:6 Neanyu ninche ejo ebaiki nejeyu aashu ebatata aosh enkop etua; kake ore pee eanyu te nkata naado neitu eduaaki ninye ae apiak, neibelekenya neaku kejo enkai ninye." 
Acts28:7 Ore embata e ine wueji naa ninye etii olokeri lo laiguanani oitore ilo lemankale, neji ninye Pubilio, neng'amu ninye iyiook aitoomon aitobiraki inkolong'i naara uni." 
Acts28:8 Neaku kemuoi menye Pubilio eeta oloirobi nerotu sii osarge; nelo Paulo abaiki neomon, neiteleiki nkaik neishiunye ninye." 
Acts28:9 Ore pee etiu neijia, ore lkulikae tung'ana pooki le ilo lemankale ooata imuoyiaritin, nepuonu sii ninche meishiunyeki." 
Acts28:10 Neisho iyiook nkishoorot kumok; naa ore pee kidumunye, nepikaki iyiook emeli ntokitin pooki nikiaatayie enkolat." 
Acts28:11 Ore etulusoitie lapaitin okuni nikiked emeli natobiko te ilo le mankale te nkata e enkirobi. Emeli e Aleksantria, naa nkaitin mao naasirakino elukunya enye." 
Acts28:12 Nikipuo aang'eliki Sirakusa, nikibik nkolong'i uni teine." 
Acts28:13 Teine kitudumunye nikimanaa o matabau Regio. Enkolong nabo ake nashomo, nedumunye osiwuo le moikuape, ore te nkolong e are nikipuonu Puteoli." 
Acts28:14 Nikitum lalashera teine, neitoomon iyiook nikibik nkolong'i naapishana. Nikipuonu Roma." 
Acts28:15 Ore ilalashera ootii ine, pee ening'oo iyiook, nepuonu o metabau Sokoni e Apio o Mukaonini Uni aanang'are iyiook. Ninche ake etoduaa Paulo neisho Enkai enashe negolu oshoke." 
Acts28:16 Ore pee kibau Roma, neishori Paulo eton openy, te nebo o ilo sikari orripito ninye." 
Acts28:17 Ore pee elusoo nkolong'i uni neipotu Paulo larikok loo Lyahudi te nebo; ore pee eiturrurro nejoki ninye ninche, “Ilalashera laainei, ore hoo nemaata enaitaasa iltung'ana lang, aashu ilkerreti loo loo papa, kake aaishooyioki aena te Yerusalem aaisho nkaik oo Roma." 
Acts28:18 Ore pee aajur ninche nanu, neyieu naalaku mashomo, amu maata apa ae naaitanang'i pookata." 
Acts28:19 Kake ore pee eany Ilyahudi, naamiraki matasaru Kaisari hoo nemaata ae naaipotoki olorere lang." 
Acts28:20 Te nkaraki ina pee atejo kayieu nadol intae nairorie intae, amu te nkaraki ilo ora osiligi loo Siraeli pee aena tele pisiai.”" 
Acts28:21 Nejoki ninche ninye, “Mikiaata iyiook mpala nikitang'amaitie eing'uaa Yudea nikimpirta iyie, nimikiaata too lalashera lang ooetuo ene oloinosua aashu eliki iyiook ae torroni tialo iyie." 
Acts28:22 Kake kiyieu pae nikining enijo iyie te nena nilimu; amu pooki enikiyiolo tialo ena kiteng'enare ng'ejuk napaashari, keimakini te pooki wueji eibae.”" 
Acts28:23 Ore pee egelaki ninye olkekun, nepuonu enetii te nkaji natijing'a aa kumok oleng. Neinosaki ena bae te nkakenya o memuto, eishakenoki enkitoria e Nkai netem ajo aitijing'aa ninche mbaa e Yesu too nkitanapat e Musa o too loibonok le Nkai." 
Acts28:24 Nejing'aa kulikae nena naatejo ninye kake eitu eiruk kulikae. 
Acts28:25 Ore pee egela ninche maate, nepuo pee eidip Paulo atejo ena bae: “Etisipa apa Enkiyang'et Sinyati pee ejoki iloo minyi to loiboni le Nkai oji Isaya," 
Acts28:26 ‘Shomo enetii kulo tung'ana, tiaaki, ining'ining'i doi kake mejing'aa hoo intae, ning'oring'oro doi kake midolidolo hoo intae," 
Acts28:27 amu eikang'ate ltauja le kulo tung'ana, naa ming'anta nkiyiaa mening, neikeno nkonyek enye; pee medol ake too nkonyek enye, nening too nkiyiaa enye, nejing'aa ltauja lenye, neibelekenya maishiunye nanu ninche.’" 
Acts28:28 Entayioloito naa intae inchere, ore ena jeunoto e Nkai, eirriwakaki Loreren; ekeinining'u ninche.”" 
Acts28:29 [Ore pee ejo nejia nepuo ninche Ilyahudi eishankarra maate.] 
Acts28:30 Nebik ilarin aare oolulung'a teine, te nkaji enye naisilenuo, neng'amu lelo pooki ooetuo enetii ninye." 
Acts28:31 Nelikioo enkitoria e Nkai neiteng'enisho too mbaa o Laitoriani Yesu Kristo aibalie nemeetae olomitiki. 
Romans1:1 Paulo osinka le Yesu Kristo, oipotoki metaa olkipaaret, negeluni te nkaraki ororei supat le Nkai" 
Romans1:2 otolimuo apake te dukuya too loibonok le Nkai lenyena tiatua ilkigerot. 
Romans1:3 Naa ilo rorei supat oipirta ilo Inoti lenye, le ntalipa e Daudi tialo osesen." 
Romans1:4 Netolimuoki neitadedeyieki ninye te ngolon inchere Enkerai e Nkai to rrekie le Nkiyang'et Sinyati pee eitopiuni too lootuata, naa Yesu Kristo Olaitoriani lang," 
Romans1:5 laa ninye kinotie iyiook empiris e kipaaretisho nikiyaunye enkirukoto bayaroti too loreren pooki te nkaraki enkarna enye. 
Romans1:6 Nitii sii intae ilooipotoki te nebo ninche entaa ile Yesu Kristo. 
Romans1:7 Airoroki intae lelo pooki oonyor Enkai tiatua Roma, ooipotoki entaa sinyat. Meeu empiris o eseriani atua intae eing'uaa Enkai Papa lang o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo." 
Romans1:8 Ore enaituruk, ang'as aisho Enkai ai enashe tiatua Yesu Kristo te nkaraki intae pooki, te nkaraki netaa kelikiori enkirukoto inyi te nkop pooki." 
Romans1:9 Amu Enkai shakeni ai, naa ninye aisiaai te nkishui ai tialo ilo rorei supat lo Inoti lenye nchere eitu apal maimaki intae anaa ake te nkomono ai," 
Romans1:10 ajo oi kenya eishoru Enkai te yieunoto enye manoto erishata nabaikinye intae. 
Romans1:11 Amu kayieu naleng nadol intae, pee atum atang'arie intae enkishorunoto e nkiyang'et, natum aitagolo intae;" 
Romans1:12 ajo pee kiretutu intae te nkirukoto inyi naretu sii nanu intae te naai. 
Romans1:13 Kayieu niyiolouu ilalashera laainei inchere kumok inkatitin nayieu oshi nalotu abaiki intae, (kake eitu aaishori ebaiki taata,) peyie atum embata e nkikesare tiatua intae o too loreren." 
Romans1:14 Kaata nanu esile too Lyunani o too leme Lyunani, too looiteng'enaki o leitu." 
Romans1:15 Ina pee ayieu oleng naliki sii ninche intae Ilomon Supati tiatua Roma. 
Romans1:16 Makurru nanu te lelo Omon Supati; amu ninche engolon e Nkai nayau enjeunoto te pooki ng'ae oiruk, neiteru too Lyahudi neitoki too Lyunani." 
Romans1:17 Amu te ninche eibalunyeki esupatisho e Nkai nchere ore enkiterunoto o enkiting'oto e nkoitoi naitopokie Enkai oltung'ani naa enkirukoto. Anaa enajo ilkigerot, “Ore oltung'ani oisho Enkai esipata te nkoitoi e nkirukoto nepok.”" 
Romans1:18 Keibalunyeki taata engoro e Nkai eing'uaa Keper eiba entorroni pooki o enkarruoisho oo ltung'ana ooibooyo esipata. 
Romans1:19 Amu ore mbaa naayiolounoyu tialo Enkai keibala te ninche, amu Enkai naitoduaa ninche." 
Romans1:20 Ore anaa apa pee eitaini enkop, netayioloki ake ina pukunoto enye nemelioo, aa taa enkidimata enye oo ntarasi o ina nara ninye Enkai, netaliee te nena tokitin naaitayioki. Metaa meeta hoo ninche eneitolonyaki;" 
Romans1:21 amu ore hoo neyiolo Enkai, eitu eyanyit aaitaa ninye Enkai aashu eisho ninye enashe, kake eirriirrana too ndamunot enye, neirriirrana nkorroki enye nemisimisu." 
Romans1:22 Ore ejo ninche ai ng'eni neaku ilmoda," 
Romans1:23 neitawal enkitoo e Nkai nemeye ninye ntarasi newalunye inkitanyaanyukot naaijo oltung'ani oye ake, aashu imotonyi aashu ng'uesi, aashu ng'uesi naaikurtutari." 
Romans1:24 Ore te nkaraki ina etung'uayie Enkai ninche neisho ing'uarrat oo ltauja lenye oonyor iloirerioni, o metaa kelaiki enkanyit iseseni lenye maate," 
Romans1:25 amu etawalunye emonkoi isipat e Nkai nesai neisiaai entoki naitobiruaki nepal Ilo Oitobira, omayiana ninye intarasi. Eesai." 
Romans1:26 Ore te nkaraki ina etung'uayie Enkai ninche metang'uarra mbaa e sulare. Eibelekenyate ng'oruo enye aaing'uaa orrekie oishiaakino nepuo ilo lemeishiaakino," 
Romans1:27 nepal sii ninche ilewa aaku meing'oru nkituaak neinuaakino ng'uarrat maate, neas ilewa o lewa mbaa e nkurruna neng'amu too seseni lenye maate nena naaiu ina torroni nataasa." 
Romans1:28 Naa ore amu eitu edol ninche aajo keishiaakino neyanyit Enkai, neing'uaa Enkai ninche metaa keriata indamunot enye netum olkuaak torrono." 
Romans1:29 Kebore ninche empukunoto ake pooki e nkarruoisho o entorroni, o ing'uarrat laa intorrok ake edol, iloobore olom o looitayu iloikop o enchankar o losek torrono, esayiet e nkurrare," 
Romans1:30 o enkisuro, ilooiba Enkai, ilooilash, iloonya kutukie, ilooipiru ntorrok, iloogolong'aki intoiwuo," 
Romans1:31 ilmoda lemedamisho, ilemeisiligayu, ilooiba ilkulenye, ilemeeta olng'ur." 
Romans1:32 Ore hoo neyiolo enatundung'o Enkai ajo ore lelo ooas nena neiririkino keeya, neme ake duoo keas ninche kake kening'okino o lelo ooas." 
Romans2:1 Ore te nkaraki nena, miaata enintolonyaki lo tung'ani, ira toki nira, te ninguanare likae; amu ore pee inguanare iyie likae naa kewan inguanare, amu ore iyie, ira oloiguanare olikae, niaasita sii iyie nena." 
Romans2:2 Kiyiolo aajo kaasipani Enkai teneiguanare lelo ooas nena baa. 
Romans2:3 Ijo pasa, lo tung'ani, te ninguanare lelo ooas nena niaasita sii iyie openy, eijo pasa ilany iyie enkiguana e Nkai?" 
Romans2:4 Ana aimenaa iyie enkitoo o lng'ur lenye o eanyunoto o eng'iriata enye? Aimiyiolo aajo kejo Enkai pee kirikoki olng'ur lenye enkirridunoto? 
Romans2:5 Kake engolon o ltau lino lemeirridu likintaany iyie engoro e Nkai kenya te neboluni. 
Romans2:6 Amu kelaaki ninye pooki tung'ani aitorisioki isiaaitin enyena: 
Romans2:7 ore lelo oong'iri aas isupati eing'oru enkitoo o enkanyit o empuaan nemeish, neisho ninye lelo enkishui nemeish." 
Romans2:8 Kake ore lelo oonyor ate lemeiruk ina sipata, laa ntorrok ening nesuj, netum ninche engoro o erasakinoto." 
Romans2:9 Keaku osina o emion to ltung'ani pooki oas intorrok, neiteru to Lyahudi naa nejia etiu to Lyunani," 
Romans2:10 kake keaku enkitoo o enkanyit o eseriani te pooki ng'ae oas isupati, neiteru to Lyahudi naa nejia etiu too Lyunani." 
Romans2:11 Amu meeta Enkai olkep. 
Romans2:12 Ore lelo pooki ooas ing'ok meeta nkitanapat naa keidaaya meeta nkitanapat, ore lelo ootaasa ng'ok eeta nkitanapat neiguanareki te nena kitanapat." 
Romans2:13 Amu mme lelo ooning ake nkitanapat isupati tialo Enkai, kake lelo ooitabaya nkitanapat eishori isipat." 
Romans2:14 Te neas iloreren lemeeta nena kitanapat too lkerreti lenye oopeny nena naajo Inkitanapat, netaa nena kiasin enye inkitanapat te ninche, hoo nemeeta ninche nena kitanapat." 
Romans2:15 Keitoduaaya nkiasin enye aajo keigero nena naajo nkitanapat tiatua iltauja lenye, neaku too nkorroki enye shakeni. Ore ndamunot enye neiguanare ti ai kata, ore ti ai kata nemitu ninche," 
Romans2:16 teina olong kenya anaa enalimu nanu te kulo omon supati lalikioo, teina olong kenya eiguanare Enkai inkisudorot oo ltung'ana te Yesu Kristo." 
Romans2:17 Kake ti nikiji ira Olyahudi naa Nkitanapat ingarakino niwuasare osotua lino o Enkai," 
Romans2:18 niyiolou iyie eyieunoto enye ninyor ina naikishiaan, amu kituutakaki tiatua nkitanapat," 
Romans2:19 naa te naa kesipa nchere ira iyie olarikoni loo lmodook, nira ewang'an e lelo ootii enaimin," 
Romans2:20 nira oloutaa ilmoda, nira oloiteng'en inkera, amu iata eyiolounoto e sipata oo nkitanapat." 
Romans2:21 Amaa naa iyie oloiteng'en ilkulikae, oo pee minteng'en kewan? Amaa ilikioo ajo mipurrisho, ipurrisho pasa iyie?" 
Romans2:22 Oo iyie olojo miloloito, iloloito pasa iyie? Oo iyie oloiba nkitanyaanyukot naaitaai nkaitin, ipur pasa iyie inkajijik enye naasaishoreki?" 
Romans2:23 Ore iyie olowuasare nena kitanapat, intukurru pasa Enkai apaashare nkitanapat?" 
Romans2:24 Amu ore anaa enatisiraki, “To lbae linyi emor Iloreren enkarna e Nkai.”" 
Romans2:25 Amu kesipa keeta emurata tipat te nimbung inkitanapat; kake te nigil inkitanapat netiu imurata anaa eimimurata. 
Romans2:26 Metaa, te neibung oltung'ani lememurata nena naajo nkitanapat, aimetiu ole memurata anaa olomurata?" 
Romans2:27 Ore naa lelo lememurata ooibung nena kitanapat ninche ooiguanare intae ilooata nkitanapat naasira niaatata emurata kake nitapaashare nena kitanapat. 
Romans2:28 Amu mme Olyahudi odede pooki ng'ae ake odoli etiu ti oriong, neme pooki ake olomurata naa olodung'o ake osesen." 
Romans2:29 Olyahudi odede olora tiatua kewan, ore emurata nara naa embae o ltau naa ene nkiyang'et mme enasira ake. Ore enkisisa e ilo neme enoo ltung'ana kake ene Nkai." 
Romans3:1 Amaa naa, kaa dupoto eeta Olyahudi? Amaa kainyoo tipat e murata?" 
Romans3:2 Keeta tipat naleng too rrekiei pooki, neituruk nchere, Ilyahudi eitanapa Enkai ilkiliku lenyena." 
Romans3:3 O etaa meisiligayu kulikae lenye? Keidim ina aibelekenya metaa meisilgayu Enkai? 
Romans3:4 Mme nejia etiu ina katukul! Nchoo eaku Enkai asipani hoo naa aimonkoni pooki tung'ani, anaa enatisiraki nchere, “Kintadedeyieki iyie Enkai too rorei linono, nimirisho ake te nikinguanareki.”" 
Romans3:5 Kake amaa te naa kenkarruoisho ang naibalie esipata e Nkai, te nkiguana, eikijo aa naa? Eikijo mme asipani Enkai te neyau engoro enye (Kairorita taa doi anaa naajo ltung'ana.)" 
Romans3:6 Mme nejia! Amu te neaku nejia etiu, kaji naa eitoki Enkai aiko te neaku ninye olaiguanani le nkop?" 
Romans3:7 Naa amaa te naa kelejare ai naibalie oleng isipat e Nkai, neyaki ninye enchunet nalusoo oleng, oo naa pee aaitokini aaiguanare eji ataasa ing'ok?" 
Romans3:8 Oo naa pee mikiaas ntorrok pee epuonu isupati? Amu ina doi eiteenikitia kulikae iyiook aajo nejia kijo. Ore endung'okinoto e nkiguana natum ninche lelo naa keishiaakino. 
Romans3:9 Kanyioo naa kitalang'ie iyiook Ilyahudi ilkulikae? Meeta katukul, amu kindipa iyiook aatejo nchere etii Ilyahudi abori engolon oo ng'ok, naa nejia etiu Ilyunani." 
Romans3:10 Anaa enatisiraki nchere: “Meetae hoo oloata esipata, meetae hoo obo." 
Romans3:11 Nemeetae hoo olng'en, nemeetae hoo obo oing'oru Enkai." 
Romans3:12 Etapong'ori pooki, netaa te nebo: nemeetae obo oas isupati, meetae hoo obo.”" 
Romans3:13 “Enkurare nang'a ilgoso lenye, neasishore ilng'ejepa lenye aalejishore.” “Esayiet oo lasuriaa nanuka too nkutukie enye.”" 
Romans3:14 “Nebore nkutukie enye ildeketa o enduaran.” 
Romans3:15 “Neten inkejek enye epuo aaibukoo osarge," 
Romans3:16 ore irrekiei lenye naa enkidaaroto o sinaitin," 
Romans3:17 nemeyiolo ninche inkoitoi e seriani.” 
Romans3:18 “Nemetii olturiaki le Nkai dukuya nkonyek enye.” 
Romans3:19 Neaku kiyiolo iyiook aajo ore pooki najo nkitanapat naa lelo ejoki ootii abori nena kitanapat, pee eitigiri ake pooki kutuk, neaku Enkai eikenaki enkop pooki imbaa enye." 
Romans3:20 Amu meetae oltung'ani hoo obo oikenakini esupatisho tialo ninye to mbaa oo nkiasin oo nkitanapat, amu nkitanapat eimu eyiolounoto oo ng'ok." 
Romans3:21 Kake eibalunyeki taata esupatisho e Nkai neitu eimu nena kitanapat, hoo neishakenokito inkitanapat oo loibonok le Nkai o" 
Romans3:22 esupatisho e Nkai to rrekie le nkirukoto tiatua Yesu Kristo, te lelo pooki ooiruk. Amu meeta enepaashare;" 
Romans3:23 etaasa pooki ng'ok neitong'oro enkitoo e Nkai," 
Romans3:24 neikenakini esupatisho te mpiris enye metaa enkishorunoto e pesho, te lakunoto natii atua Kristo Yesu," 
Romans3:25 ilo oishorua Enkai metaa olkipoket to sarge lenye, ong'amaroyu te nkoitoi e nkirukoto. Ore apa ena naa keitodolu esupatisho e Nkai, amu ore te ng'iriata enye, neitaa Enkai parmetii ing'ok naatulusoitie;" 
Romans3:26 pee etum aitadedeyie makewan neitusupat sii ilo oata enkirukoto tiatua Yesu. 
Romans3:27 Kaji naa etii olwuasa lang? Eiwuang'ieki. Ti aa kitanapata? Ai te nkitanapata oo nkiasin? Mme nejia, kake te nkitanapata e nkirukoto." 
Romans3:28 Amu kimbung'a iyiook nchere te nkirukoto eitaae oltung'ani supat, metii easata oo nkitanapat." 
Romans3:29 Ana ketaa Enkai ke Nkai oo Lyahudi ake? Aimme Enkai ninye oo Loreren sii ninche leme Ilyahudi? Ee pae, enoo Loreren sii ninche." 
Romans3:30 Amu nabo Enkai, naa ninye oitusupat iloomurata te nkitanapata e nkirukoto enye o lelo lememurata te nkirukoto enye." 
Romans3:31 Ketaa naa iyiook ooibelekeny nena kitanapat te na kirukoto? Mme nejia! Ore enatii, nkitanapat kintudupaa." 
Romans4:1 Kaa naa kijo tialo Abraham, papa lang to rrekie lo sesen?" 
Romans4:2 Amu te naa naaji ei te nyuaata enye enotoko Abraham kewan esipata naa enaata eeta enawuasare. Kake mme te dukuya Enkai. 
Romans4:3 Amu kejo aa ilkigerot? “Eiruko Abraham Enkai ore te nkaraki ina neikenaki Enkai ninye esupatisho.” 
Romans4:4 Ore naa oloisiaaisho nemeikenakini olekoisiaayio lenye anaa ke nkishooroto kake anaa enenye naisiayua. 
Romans4:5 Ore naa ilo leitu eisiaayu toki kake neiruk ilo oikenaki isipat oleme supat, neikenaki Enkai enkirukoto enye nchere esupatisho." 
Romans4:6 Nejia sii eikuna Daudi aimaki emayianata o ltung'ani oikenaki Enkai esupatisho neme te nkaraki isiaaitin ejo: 
Romans4:7 “Emayiana lelo ootapalakaki enkarruoisho neitoipori ing'ok enye; 
Romans4:8 nemayiana ilo tung'ani lemeikenaki Olaitoriani eng'oki enye.” 
Romans4:9 Amaa ena mayianata ei loo murata ake ootum, anaa ketum sii ninche ilememurata? Kijo iyiook, eikenakaki Abraham esupatisho te nkirukoto." 
Romans4:10 Kaji naa eikuna pee eikenakaki ninye? Eidipaki aatumurat anaa eitu. Mme eidipaki aatumurat, kake eton eitu." 
Romans4:11 Ketumurataki pee eaku ilo olponoto anaa olmishire le supatisho naata apa te nkirukoto eton memurata. Eikunaki nejia pee eaku ninye menye le lelo pooki ooiruk memurata laa teina eikenakini esupatisho," 
Romans4:12 neaku sii menye le lelo oomurata leme kemurata ake, kake esuj ina kirukoto naata apa papa lang Abraham eton memurata." 
Romans4:13 Ore ina kisiligata naishooki Abraham o eishoi enye, nchere keyooki aajung enkop eitu eishori te nkaraki nkitanapat kake te nkaraki esupatisho e nkirukoto." 
Romans4:14 Tenaa naaji ilasujak loo nkitanapat oaku ilajung'ok, pesho naa enkirukoto naa pesho ina kisiligata." 
Romans4:15 Amu eyau nkitanapat engoro kake ore enemetii nkitanapat nemetii engilata oo nkitanapat. 
Romans4:16 Te nkaraki e ina paa enkirukoto eitasheyie peyie aa empiris eigarakino ina kisiligata, neitadedeyieki te ishoi enye pooki, neme te lelo asujak loo nkitanapat aa ninche ake, kake o te lelo oong'arie Abraham enkirukoto, amu ninye menye iyiook pooki." 
Romans4:17 Anaa enatisiraki aajo, “Aaitaa nanu iyie menye loo loreren kumok.” Te dukuya Enkai etang'amua ninye ina kisiligata, ina Ai nairuko ninye, naa ninye naisho ilootuata enkishui, neipotu intokin nemeetae neaku." 
Romans4:18 To siligi eiruko Abraham neisilig melioo entoki naisiligu pee etum ataa menye loo loreren kumok; anaa enapa natiaakaki eji, “Inji ebayu eishoi ino.”" 
Romans4:19 Eitu eshalu enkirukoto enye pee eing'or osesen lenye makewan, ototiwuo anaa olotua amu etinyikaka ilarin iip te moruao enye, aashu pee eing'or enguset e Sara ajo olupi." 
Romans4:20 Meetae olng'ash oidima aigusugusie enkisiligata naisiliga Enkai kake etagolo ninye teina kirukoto anaa pee eishoo Enkai enkitoo. 
Romans4:21 Etonyorrayie tukul nchere keidim Enkai aitabai ina naisiligie. 
Romans4:22 Ina pee eikenakaki enkirukoto enye nchere esupatisho. 
Romans4:23 Kake ore ilo rorei ojo “Eikenakaki”, mme te nkaraki ninye ake pee etisiraki;" 
Romans4:24 kake te nkaraki sii ninche iyiook ilo oiruk ilo oitopiwuo Yesu Kristo Olaitoriani lang too lootuata," 
Romans4:25 olotaraki te nkaraki ing'ok ang, neitopiuni pee eikenakini iyiook esupatisho." 
Romans5:1 Ore naa amu te nkirukoto eikenakaki iyiook isipat, kiaata iyiook eseriani te Nkai tiatua Olaitoriani lang Yesu Kristo." 
Romans5:2 Te ninye sii kinoto enyikakinoto e mpiris nikintasheyie, naa eiking'ida to siligi kitok likiaata te Nkai." 
Romans5:3 Ore enalusoo teina, eiking'ida o tiatua isinaitin lang, kiyiolo aajo osina oiu eng'iriata," 
Romans5:4 neiu eng'iriata olkuaak odupa, neiu olkuaak odupa osiligi," 
Romans5:5 nemeitukurru iyiook ilo siligi, amu etubukokoki enyorrata e Nkai atua iltauja lang te Nkiyang'et Sinyati naishooki iyiook." 
Romans5:6 Ore apa eton mikiaata eretoto, te nkata naishiakino, neye Kristo te nkaraki ltorrok." 
Romans5:7 Amaa, ei mme egol pee enang likae oltung'ani oikenakaki isipat, hoo nebaiki neitieu likae atua te nkaraki oltung'ani supat?" 
Romans5:8 Kake eitodolua Enkai eneba enyorrata nanyor iyiook amu ore apa eton kira iloo ng'ok, netua Kristo te nkaraki iyiook." 
Romans5:9 Ore naa te nkaraki ina, neikenakini taata iyiook isipat to sarge lenye, neisul naa teneyooki ninye aitajeu iyiook te ngoro e Nkai." 
Romans5:10 Amaa te naa ore apa kira iyiook ilmang'ati neitoning'oki iyiook o Enkai te keeya o Inoti lenye, kelusoo oleng, taata kitoning'ote, eitajeu iyiook enkishui enye." 
Romans5:11 Neme ina ake, eiking'ida sii te Nkai tiatua Olaitoriani lang Yesu Kristo, laa te ninye kinotie ilo sotua." 
Romans5:12 Ore etiu nejia, te nkaraki oltung'ani obo pee etijing'a ing'ok enkop, neitijing'u ng'ok keeya. Neaku eibulua keeya enkop pooki amu eitarruoitie ltung'ana pooki." 
Romans5:13 Ore doi ninye eton meetae inkitanapat, ekeetai apake ing'ok te nkop, kake ore te nemeetae nkitanapat nemeikenakini oltung'ani ing'ok." 
Romans5:14 Kake ore ake etiu nejia, ore ebaiki enkata e Adam o metabaiki Musa, neitoria ake keeya pooki o metabaiki lelo lemeeta enkitanapata natanyaita anaa pee etanya Adam. Ore apa Adam nenyanyukie ilo olotu" 
Romans5:15 kake merisio tukul enkiaas e mpiris e Nkai o idia apa kitarruorroto nabo e Adam. Eyaka eng'oki o ltung'ani obo iltung'ana pooki keeya, kake ore empiris e Nkai o enkishorunoto enye te ilo tung'ani obo oji Yesu Kristo neyaka pooki ng'ae emayianata." 
Romans5:16 Merisio tukul enkishorunoto e Nkai o nena naayawua enkitarruorroto e ilo tung'ani obo, amu ore enaiguanaka Enkai ina kitarruorroto naa nabo, mutata, kake ore enkishorunoto enye e mpiris neitayio inkitarruorrot kumok neyau empalakinoto." 
Romans5:17 Amu eyawua eng'oki o ltung'ani obo enkitoria e keeya, te ilo tung'ani obo. Kebaa elusoo empiris e Nkai ayaki olning'o o ninye neidimie lelo oong'amu ina te mborei pooki meitoreisho te nkishui tiatua Yesu Kristo." 
Romans5:18 Ore anaa ina nayaka enkias nabo torrono mutata pooki tung'ani, neyaki sii ninye enkias nabo supat o ltung'ani supat, iltung'ana pooki elakunoto." 
Romans5:19 Ore anaa ina naitaaki lkumok ilaitarruorrok te nkaraki engogong'i o ltung'ani obo, nejia eitaae ilkumok supati te nkaraki esupatisho o ltung'ani obo." 
Romans5:20 Eetuo nkitanapat aaponaa easata o ntorrok, kake ore ine netoponariyie ing'ok teine etuluso empiris aboreyu oleng." 
Romans5:21 Neaku ore ina nayau enkitoria oo ng'ok keeya too ltung'ana, neyau ninye empiris o lning'o o Enkai, olning'o oyau enkishui oo ntarasi tiatua Yesu Kristo Olaitoriani lang." 
Romans6:1 Aikijo aa naa? Aikienikino atua ing'ok pee eponari empiris? 
Romans6:2 Mme nejia pae! Kaji iyiook kinko ilootuata tialo ing'ok ti nikintoki aaenikino atua? 
Romans6:3 Aimiyiololo aajo ore iyiook pooki ooibung'are Yesu Kristo tiatua enkibatisa ang, nikitaa nabo o ninye te nkaraki keeya enye?" 
Romans6:4 Naa ore anaa ina nikitaa nabo o ninye te keeya enye te nkibatisa ang, netaa ina ketunukayioki iyiook te nebo ninye, neaku ina naitopiwuo Papa ninye too lootuata te nkias e nkitoo, neaku ina enkishui ng'ejuk te iyiook." 
Romans6:5 Amu te neitaaki iyiook nabo o ninye te keeya naaijo enenye, nesipa pae keyookini aaitaa iyiook nabo o ninye te mpiunoto naaijo enenye." 
Romans6:6 Nikiyiolo aajo etashoki enkorrok ang musana te nebo o Kristo peyie eitarruorri osesen loo ng'ok pee mikintoki aaku rrindiki loo ng'ok. 
Romans6:7 Amu ore olotua netalakuaki too ng'ok. 
Romans6:8 Kake te naa eikituata iyiook te nebo Kristo, nikiruko aajo eikinchu sii te nebo ninye." 
Romans6:9 Amu eikiyiolo aajo ore Kristo eitopiwuoki too lootuata nemeitoki aekata aigil keeya. Meekure eitore keeya ninye. 
Romans6:10 Ore keeya natua ninye naa ng'ok etanang'a, nabo kata ake. Kake ore enkishui naishu ninye naa te Nkai eishu." 
Romans6:11 Enkenai sii intae ate nchere ituata tialo ing'ok ninchushu tialo Enkai tiatua Kristo Yesu. 
Romans6:12 Emincho naa ng'ok eitoreisho tiatua iseseni linyi ooyooki aaye, metaa kearaki intae entoning ing'uarrat enye." 
Romans6:13 Emincho rubat oo seseni linyi eaku entoki naasishoreki te nkarruoisho, kake enchoo ate Enkai anaa iltung'ana ooitopiwuoki aaitung'uaa keeya meetu puaan, ninchosho Enkai irubat oo seseni linyi metaa ntokitin naaisiaaishore esupatisho." 
Romans6:14 Amu meitoki eng'oki aitore intae, amu meekure itii abori inkitanapat kake tiabori empiris itii." 
Romans6:15 Kaa ae naa? Eikias ing'ok amu meekure kitii abori nkitanapat kake abori empiris kitii? Mme nejia pae! 
Romans6:16 Aimiyiololo aajo ore ake olinchosho meitoria intae niakuku rrindiki lenyena, nitaa irrindiki le ilo lining'ining'i, aa too ng'ok naa ore pee aa ng'ok isiayiayia neiting'oki keeya; ore pee aa Enkai ining'ining'i, neiting'oki esupatisho." 
Romans6:17 Kake ashe te Nkai amu ore intae oora apa rrindiki loo ng'ok nitaa ilooning'isho too ltauja, aaning ina kiteng'enare naishooki intae." 
Romans6:18 Naa ore pee elakuni intae too ng'ok niakuku irrindiki le supatisho. 
Romans6:19 (Kairo anaa naajo ltung'ana te nkaraki e nchalan inyi e tung'anisho.) Amu ore anaa ina apa ninchooitie ate aaku irrindiki loo loirerioni o enkarruoisho, etaa taata inchooitie ate aaku rrindiki le supatisho pee itumutumu aatubulu te sinyatisho." 
Romans6:20 Ore apa irara irrindiki loo ng'ok, nemeeta enabaikinore intae esupatisho." 
Romans6:21 Naa kainyoo ilng'anayio linoto teina? Inoto imbaa naaitukurru taata intae amu keeya eiting'oki. 
Romans6:22 Kake eidipaki aatalaku intae entaa irrindiki le Nkai, niaatata ilng'anayio lenyena laa embolunoto te sinyatisho, neiting'oki ina enkishui oo ntarasi." 
Romans6:23 Amu ore olekoisiaayio loo ng'ok naa keeya; kake ore enkishorunoto e Nkai e pesho naa enkishui oo ntarasi tiatua Kristo Yesu Olaitoriani lang. 
Romans7:1 Eimiyiololo intae ilalashera laainei aajo ltung'ana sii doi ooyiolo inkitanapat airorie, nchere eitore ake inkitanapat oltung'ani eton eishu?" 
Romans7:2 Etiu anaa te neeniki nkitanapat enkitok olpayian lenye eton eishu. Kake ore pee eye olpayian nelakuni enkitok te nena kitanapat te nkaraki keeya o lpayian lenye. 
Romans7:3 Ore te nkaraki ina, keji ake keloloito te nelo meewa likae lee eishu olpayian lenye. Kake te neye olpayian netalakuaki teina kitanapata, naa te neyam likae lee nemeji keloloito ninye." 
Romans7:4 Nejia sii itiuu intae, ilalashera laainei, ituata intae tialo inkitanapat to rrekie lo sesen le Kristo, pee iakuku ile likae, naa ilo oitopiwuoki too lootuata pee kitum iyiook aatoiki Enkai ilng'anayio." 
Romans7:5 Ore apa aa iseseni kinchuyie, ore ng'uarrat ang oo ng'ok, etupututuo inkitanapat, neasisho tiatua rubat ang neiu ilg'anayio le keeya." 
Romans7:6 Kake ore taata, netalakuaki iyiook tialo nena kitanapat, nikituata iyiook tialo ina apa nateena iyiook, nemeekure aa nena kitanapat naaigero naaitore iyiook kake ena kishui ng'ejuk e Nkiyang'et kinchuyie." 
Romans7:7 Kaa naa kijo? Ketaa ng'ok inkitanapat? Mme neijia pae! Kake te neme nena kitanapat, anaata mayiolo nanu ajo ainyoo ing'ok. Anaata mayiolo ng'uarrat ajo ainyoo te neme nena kitanapat naatejo, “Ming'uar.”" 
Romans7:8 Kake ore ng'ok, pee eisho nkitanapat erishata, neputu tiatua nanu impukunot pooki oo ng'uarrat. Ore te nemeetae inkitanapat netuata ing'ok." 
Romans7:9 Eetae apa enkata naishu ake maata nkitanapat, kake ore pee elotu ina kitanapata, neinyototo ng'ok naye nanu." 
Romans7:10 Ina kitanapata kewan naji apa kaayaki enkishui nataa keeya te nanu. 
Romans7:11 Amu ing'ok naatijing'a ina rishata naayautua inkitanapat. Naalej nanu ng'ok naa ore te nkaraki ina kitanapata naar nanu matua. 
Romans7:12 Neaku sinyat ninche inkitanapat nesinya sii ina kitanapata, nesipa naa supat." 
Romans7:13 Ketaa ina apa naji kaaret naanyaaka aar matua? Taba mme ninye! Kake ore pee eibalayu eng'oki nchere eng'oki, neiu keeya te nanu tialo ina sidai paa ore te nkitanapata neaku eng'oki entoki torrono oleng." 
Romans7:14 Kiyiolo doi aajo ore Nkitanapat naa ine nkiyang'et, nematiu nanu nejia. Kake kara nanu oltung'ani otimiraki mataa orrindik loo ng'ok." 
Romans7:15 Eimayiolo doi iasat aainei makewan, amu maas enayieu naas, kake ina naiba ninye aas." 
Romans7:16 Neaku tenaas nena nemayieu, netiu anaa nkitanapat ake atonyorrayie ajo aisupati." 
Romans7:17 Kake ore enatii meekure aa nanu oas inaas, kake ina ng'oki natii atua nanu." 
Romans7:18 Amu kayiolo ajo, metii entoki supat namanya atua nanu, aa taa osesen lai, amu ore hoo naata eyiolounoto naasie esupat, maata enkidimata." 
Romans7:19 Kayieu naas isupati kake maas; neaku ntorrok nemayieu ninche aas. 
Romans7:20 Ore pee aas enda nemayieu naas nemeekure aa nanu oas kake eng'oki natii atua nanu. 
Romans7:21 Nena duoo enkewan natayiolo nanu; ekayieu nanu naas isupati kake maaing'uaa ai kata entorroni. 
Romans7:22 Ore tiatua enkorrok ai kewan nashipakino aning'ore nkitanapat e Nkai. 
Romans7:23 Kake nadol ake ae golon naarare ake nena nadamu openy. Ina kitanapata oo ng'ok naasisho tiatua osesen lai aaitaa orrindik. 
Romans7:24 Oi ele oibe oji nanu! Kanyioo kenya naakordu nanu tele sesen le keeya! 
Romans7:25 Ashe te Nkai, tiatua Olaitoriani lang Yesu Kristo, ore naa, nanu enkorrok ai, naisiai enkitanapata e Nkai te ndamunoto ai, kake ore to sesen lai, naisiai enkitanapata oo ng'ok." 
Romans8:1 Metii naa taata enkiguana te lelo ootii atua Kristo Yesu. 
Romans8:2 Amu aatalakutua nanu nkitanapat e Nkiyang'et e nkishui natii atua Kristo Yesu aaitung'uaa nkitanapat oo ng'ok o keeya. 
Romans8:3 Amu Enkai nataasa ina natalaikinote nkitanapat, to lbae le nchalan o sesen aataas. Eirriwua Enkai Oinoti lenye te mpukunoto o sesen loo ng'ok tiatua osesen," 
Romans8:4 pee etumi aaitabai nena sipat naajo nkitanapat tiatua iyiook; ilemerubare mbaa o sesen kake kirubare Enkiyang'et. 
Romans8:5 Amu ore lelo oopuo erubare osesen naa mbaa o sesen naaitore ltauja lenye, kake ore lelo oopuo erubare Enkiyang'et naa mbaa e Nkiyang'et naaitore ltauja lenye." 
Romans8:6 Ore paa osesen oitore mbaa o ltau, neaku ina keeya, ore paa Enkiyang'et naitore oltau, neaku ina enkishui o eseriani." 
Romans8:7 Amu ore oltau oitore osesen naa olmang'atinta te Nkai; amu meishoru meitoria nkitanapat e Nkai, nemeidim;" 
Romans8:8 naa ore lelo laa osesen oitore nemeidim aaitishipa Enkai. 
Romans8:9 Kake mme osesen oitore intae, Enkiyang'et naitore intae, te nesipa nchere etamanya atua intae Enkiyang'et e Nkai. Ore pooki ng'ae ake lemeeta Enkiyang'et e Kristo neme olenye ilo." 
Romans8:10 Kake ore ake pee etii Kristo atua intae, te neye ninye iseseni linyi te nkaraki ng'ok neishu enkiyanget inyi te nkaraki esupatisho." 
Romans8:11 Teneishu enkiyang'et e ilo oitopiwuo Yesu, ore ilo oitopiwuo Kristo Yesu too lootuata neisho sii lelo seseni linyi ooye enkishui teina kiyang'et enye namany atua intae." 
Romans8:12 Ore te nkaraki ina, lalashera laainei, eikiaata esile, kake mme eno sesen, metaa osesen oitore iyiook kinchu," 
Romans8:13 amu ore ake pee eaku osesen irubarere inchushu niyeye, kake ti niaariara intae te nkiyang'et inkiaasin o sesen metuata ninchushu." 
Romans8:14 Amu ore lelo pooki laa Enkiyang'et e Nkai narikito, ninche inkera e Nkai." 
Romans8:15 Amu mme enkiyang'et e rrindikisho eishooki intae entushukokinoto enkuretisho, kake eishooki intae enkiyang'et oo nkera inot. Ore te nikijo “Abba! Papa!”" 
Romans8:16 Enkiyang'et e Nkai kewan naishakenu te nebo enkiyang'et ang nchere kira nkera e Nkai," 
Romans8:17 naa ti nikira nkera, nikira ilajung'ok, kira lajung'ok le Nkai te nebo Kristo, naa keisilisili iyiook te nebo ninye pee eyookini sii aaisho iyiook enkitoo te nebo ninye." 
Romans8:18 Kayiolo nanu ajo ore nkisilisilot ena kata meitorisiokini ina kitoo nayookini aaboloki iyiook. 
Romans8:19 Keanyita pooki toki naitayioki te yieunoto kitok metaboluni inkera e Nkai. 
Romans8:20 Amu etipikaki seuseu erruorroto, neme te nkaraki naa enkop nayieu, kake te nkaraki yieuna e Nkai to siligi," 
Romans8:21 amu keyookini aalaku seuseu pooki aaitung'uaa rrindikisho enye e nkidaaroto, neng'amu elakunoto e nkitoo oo nkera e Nkai." 
Romans8:22 Amu kiyiolo aajo ore o tena kata, eigorito te mion seuseu pooki naitayioki to losilisili le mion o metabaiki ena olong." 
Romans8:23 Neme seuseu ake naishir, kake ore sii ninche iyiook, ooidipa aanoto enkishorunoto e Nkiyang'et naiturukuo te kulie naapuonu, nikinchirita sii iyiook tiatua ate kiaanyu meitaa Enkai iyiook inkera enyena, neitabaya elakunoto ang." 
Romans8:24 Amu tele siligi apa eitajewuoki eiyiook. Te naa eikidolita entoki nikisiligu, nemeitoki ilo siligi aata tipat. Keisiligu pasa oltung'ani entoki nadolita?" 
Romans8:25 Kake ti nikisiligu entoki nemelioo, naa eikiaanyu te ng'iriata." 
Romans8:26 Nejia eiko Enkiyang'et pee elotu aretu iyiook te nchalan ang; amu mikiyiolo iyiook aajo kainyoo kiomonu nimikiyiolo enikijo ti nikiomonu, kake Enkiyang'et makewan naomonoki iyiook te mion nagut nemeinosunoyu." 
Romans8:27 Ore ilo laa ninye ojur iltauja neyiolo ninye enajo Enkiyang'et, amu Enkai nayieu neaku enkiyang'et nanyikaki ninye too mbaa oo ltung'ana lenyena." 
Romans8:28 Nikiyiolo aajo ore te pooki toki neasisho Enkai too mbaa supati te lelo oonyor ninye, te lelo oipotoki te risioroto e yieuna enye." 
Romans8:29 Amu etayiolo apake Enkai ilenyena negelu metotiutu anaa ilo Inoti lenye, pee eaku ilo Inoti olkikau loo lalashera kumok." 
Romans8:30 Ore lelo ooidipa ninye ategelu, neiteng'el; ore lelo ooiteng'ela ninye neipot, ore lelo ooipoto neikenaki esipata, ore lelo ooikenaka esipata neisho ake sii enkitoo." 
Romans8:31 Kaa naa kijo tena? Amaa te netii Enkai enkalo ang, kalo oidim atigilunore iyiook?" 
Romans8:32 Eitu eibooyo ninye ilo Inoti lenye kake eishorua ninye te nkaraki iyiook pooki. Amaa etaasa ina, kainyoo ae naitoki amitiki ninye eisho iyiook pooki toki pesho?" 
Romans8:33 Ae ng'ae oitoki aitang'or ilgelunot le Nkai? Mme Enkai, amu ninye makewan naishoo ninche isipat." 
Romans8:34 Ae ng'ae naa odung'oki ninche enkiguana? Ae Kristo Yesu otua, oonyaaka apiu aing'uaa keeya, netii taata, enkaina e tatene e Nkai, nesipa nchere ninye oomonoki iyiook." 
Romans8:35 Kainyoo naidim atorishie iyiook enyorrata e Kristo? Keidim ingolikinot, anaa emion, anaa enkisilisiloto? Anaa olameyu, anaa tenikipuo mikinchopo, anaa batisho, anaa keeya, anaa olalem?" 
Romans8:36 Ore anaa enajo Ilkigerot: “Ore te nkaraki iyie, earitai iyiook dama o kewarie matuata; kitotiutuo anaa noshi tare naapuoi aayieng.”" 
Romans8:37 A'a, ore te kuna pooki kisula kimirisho te nkaraki ilo otonyorra iyiook." 
Romans8:38 Amu aitisipa nanu nchere mme keeya, neme enkishui, neme ilmalaika, neme engolon e naimin, neme ntokitin naatii, neme ntokitin naapuonu neme nkitoriat neme enguton, neme ae toki te seuseu pooki, naidim atorishie iyiook enyorrata e Nkai natii Kristo Yesu Olaitoriani lang." 
Romans8:39 Neme kulie kiyang'eta o loing'ang'e, aashu naatii olodo le nkop, neme hoo ae toki pooki natii enkop o loing'ang'e naidim atorishie iyiook enyorrata e Nkai natii Kristo Yesu Olaitoriani lang." 
Romans9:1 Isipat ajoito tiatua Kristo, malejisho nanu; naaishakenoki nanu oltau lai te Nkiyang'et Sinyati," 
Romans9:2 nchere kaara sapuk oleng osina o emion tiatua oltau lai. 
Romans9:3 Amu kayieu naaji naa nanu makewan edeki naadung'ori aarishie Kristo te nkaraki ilalashera laainei le ntalipa o lorere lai. 
Romans9:4 Isiraeli ninche, naa ninche eitaa inkera enyena, neisho enkitoo, neitayu osotua o ninche, ninche eishooki Nkitanapat, o esayiata e Nkai o nkisiligat enyena;" 
Romans9:5 ilkulenye iloo nkakuiyiaa, naa ole ilo orere Kristo. Metamayiani Enkai natii keper pooki ntarasi. Eesai." 
Romans9:6 Kake mme taa doi keetae enaturua ororei le Nkai. Amu mme Siraeli ate lelo pooki le ishoi e Siraeli," 
Romans9:7 neme inkera e Abraham lelo pooki le ishoi enye; kake, “Ore eishoi ino naa Isaak eimu.”" 
Romans9:8 Nejo ina nchere mme nena kera o sesen naara nne Nkai, kake inkera e nkisiligata enye eikenakini aajo eishoi enye." 
Romans9:9 Amu inji etejo enkisiligata enye, “Kalotu kenya tena rishata netum Sara enkayioni.”" 
Romans9:10 Neme nejia ake, kake ino lpayian obo inkera e Rebeka; papa lang Isaak." 
Romans9:11 Kake, ore meino eton eitu eas ninche ae supat aashu ae torrono, ore eji peyie eitobirari eyieunoto e Nkai o engelunoto enye, neme te nkaraki isiaaitin kake te nkaraki e nkipototo enye," 
Romans9:12 nejokini Rebeka, “Keaku olbotor oisiaai oloti.”" 
Romans9:13 Anaa enatisiraki aajo, “Yakobo atonyorra kake aibayie Esau.”" 
Romans9:14 Aikijo aa naa iyiook? Aikijo mme asipani Enkai te nkiguana enye? Mme nejia pae! 
Romans9:15 Amu etiaaka ninye Musa, “Nanu oing'urrie olayieu naing'urrie, naitanana oshoke to layieu naduaaya.”" 
Romans9:16 Ore pooki nemeigarakino enayieu oltung'ani, kake keigarakino olng'ur le Nkai." 
Romans9:17 Amu etiaakita Ilkigerot Farao, “Nanu laailepie naa kajo paa te iyie aitoduaaya engolon ai, nelikiori enkarna ai tiatua enkop pooki.”" 
Romans9:18 Neaku ninye oing'urrie oloyieu neing'urrie, neitagol oltau lo loyieu neitagol." 
Romans9:19 Naa ore taata nikijoki, “Oo naa pee eitokini ake aajo eitarruoitie ltung'ana?” Ae ng'ae oidim aibooi eyieunoto enye?" 
Romans9:20 Kake aira ng'ae lo tung'ani owaliki Enkai? Kejoki entoki naitobiruni ilo oitobirita, “Oo pee kintayio aikunuu inji?" 
Romans9:21 Eimeitore esarng'ab oloitobiru motioo e sarng'ab, neitainyie ae entoki sidai nashili, neitobirie ae entoki ake naasishoreki?" 
Romans9:22 Oo te naa Enkai nayieu, ejo pee etumoki aitoduaai engoro enye neyiolouni sii engolon enye, netang'asa ang'iriaki oleng lelo oora ile ngoro laa enkitarruorroto ake eitobirakaki," 
Romans9:23 naa ore pee eyiolouni eneba enkarsisisho e nkitoo enye te lelo laa olng'ur eitobirakaki, naa ninye sii oitera aitobiraki ninche te dukuya te nkitoo enye," 
Romans9:24 iyiook taa lelo laa ninye oitopiwuo, neme too Lyahudi ake kake too Loreren sii?”" 
Romans9:25 Nesipa etejo ninye te Hosea, “Iltung'ana apa leme laainei ayooki nanu aipot ajo, ‘ltung'ana laainei’, ore apa ina tinki nayooki nanu ajo, ‘Enkirotet ai.’ ”" 
Romans9:26 “Ore te napa ake wueji netiaakinyeki ninche, ‘Mirara iltung'ana laainei’ teina eyookini aajo ninche ‘Inkera e Nkai naishu.’ ”" 
Romans9:27 Netabuaa Isaya ajo tialo Siraeli: “Ore hoo neba nkera e Siraeli anaa osinyai le naiposha, oloti pisiai ake eitajeuni tiatua ninche;" 
Romans9:28 amu keitabaiki Enkai enkop enkiguana natudung'oko asioki o te ngolon.” 
Romans9:29 Naa ore anaa enatoduaa Isaya, “Te neme Olaitoriani loo lororani otelekaka iyiook inkera, anaata kitotiutuo anaa Sodom, neikoni iyiook anaa Gomora.”" 
Romans9:30 Aikijo aa naa iyiook? Iloreren leitu eing'oru ninche esupatisho, ninche oonoto, naa to rrekie le nkirukoto;" 
Romans9:31 kake eji ore ninche Siraeli ooing'orutua esupatisho aa nekua kitanapat eitasheyie neitu eidim ninche aaitabai nena kitanapat. 
Romans9:32 Aainyoo? Te nkaraki neitu eing'oru to rrekie le nkirukoto, kake ketiu anaa too nkiaasin eing'oru. Etarrorrote te ilo soit orrorrisho," 
Romans9:33 anaa enatisiraki, “Ng'ura, nanu oirragie te Sion osoit orror iltung'ana, osoit kitok obatat ninche, kake ore oloiruk ninye nemeitukurruni.”" 
Romans10:1 Ilalashera laainei, ore enayieu oleng oltau lai o enkomono ai te Nkai te ninche naa pee eitajeuni." 
Romans10:2 Kara nanu shakeni te ninche nchere keeta Siraeli olokiyo kitok te Nkai, kake mewang eyiolounoto." 
Romans10:3 Amu ore te nkaraki nemeyiolo esupatisho naa Enkai eing'uaa, nejo ninche maing'oru enenye naitasheyie, neaku eitu eisho meitoria esupatisho naing'uaa Enkai." 
Romans10:4 Amu eitabayie Kristo enajo nkitanapat, peyie aa ore pooki ng'ae oata enkirukoto neisho Enkai ninye esipata." 
Romans10:5 Eigero Musa ajo, “Ore oltung'ani oitabaya esupatisho naibalieki too nkitanapat, neishuyie ina supatisho.”" 
Romans10:6 Kake inji ejo esupatisho naa enkirukoto eimu, “Nimijo to ltau lino, ae ng'ae oilep alo keper?” Eji, alo aitadou Kristo enkop," 
Romans10:7 aashu “Ae ng'ae odoyio alo olodo le nkop?” Eji, ailepunye Kristo too lootuata." 
Romans10:8 Kake kejo aa? “Kinyikita ilo rorei, enkutuk ino etii, netii oltau lino,” eji, ilo rorei le nkirukoto likilikioo;" 
Romans10:9 amu ti nimbalunye iyie te nkutuk ino nchere Yesu Olaitoriani, niruk sii to ltau nchere eitopiwuo Enkai ninye aitung'uaa ilootuata, nikintajeuni." 
Romans10:10 Amu to ltau eiruk oltung'ani neaku teina eishori sipat, nelimu te nkutuk enye neitajeuni teina." 
Romans10:11 Ejo Lkigerot, “Meetae hoo oloiruk ninye oitukurruni.”" 
Romans10:12 Amu meeta enepaashare Ilyahudi o Lgiriki; ilo Aitoriani obo Olaitoriani le pooki naa ninye oitadoiki enkarsisisho enye lelo pooki ooipot ninye. 
Romans10:13 Amu, “Ore pooki ng'ae oipot enkarna o Laitoriani naa keitajeuni.”" 
Romans10:14 Kake amaa, kaji eiko iltung'ana te neipot ilo leitu eiruk? Naa kaji eiko te neiruk ninye oleitu aekata elikini metoning'o? Naa kaji eiko te nening meeta olalikioroni?" 
Romans10:15 Naa kaji eiko tenelikioo eitu eirriwari, “Kebaa esidano oo nkejek e lelo ooyau lomon supati.”" 
Romans10:16 Kake mme pooki ootishilaitie lelo omon supati; amu ejo Isaya, “Olaitoriani, aing'ae oiruko inaatoning'o te iyiook?”" 
Romans10:17 Neaku nena naaning'i eimu enkirukoto, ore ina naning'i naa elikioroto e Kristo." 
Romans10:18 Kake kaikilikuanu nanu ajo, keitu doi ening ninche? Keibala ajo etoning'o; amu, “Eshomo oltoilo lenye enkop pooki, nepuo irorei lenye ineeiting'ie enkop.”" 
Romans10:19 Naitoki ake nanu aikilikuanu ajo, keitu pasa ening'u Siraeli? Musa oitera ajo, “Kapik intae olom too ltung'ana leme olosho; naitagor intae to olosho omoda.”" 
Romans10:20 Nenyaaka Isaya ajo te mpijan, “Aanotito lelo leitu aaing'oru nanu, naitoduaayie kewan te lelo leitu aaikilikuanu nanu.”" 
Romans10:21 Kake etejo ninye tialo Siraeli, “Aitorioko inkaik aainei endama pooki ailejileju ltung'ana lemening'isho naatanyaita nanu.”" 
Romans11:1 Naikilikuanu naa ajo, keidipa ninye Enkai atanya ltung'an lenyena? Mme nejia pae! Kara nanu makewan Osiraeli, ole ishoi e Abraham, ole ntalipa o losho le Benchamen." 
Romans11:2 Eitu eany Enkai ltung'ana lenyena laa ninche apake etayiolo. Aimiyiololo enajo Ilkigerot te Eliya o ina natasayia Enkai agilunore Isiraeli ejo? 
Romans11:3 “Olaitoriani, etara ninche iloibonok linono metuata, eturoitie lpereren loo lasarri linono, nanu ake openy otelekua, naa enkishui ai taata eing'oru.”" 
Romans11:4 Ketawalikia ninye Enkai ajoki aa? “Atelekaka kewan ilewa oora inkalifuni naapishana leitu egilaki kung enkitanyaanyukoto e nkai naji Baal.” 
Romans11:5 Nejia sii taata etiu keetae olpisiai, laa te mpiris egeluno." 
Romans11:6 Kake te naa te mpiris nemeekure aa too nkiasin amu meitoki naa empiris aaku empiris. 
Romans11:7 Kainyoo naa? Siraeli leitu etum ina apa naing'oru ninche. Nenoto ninche lelo oogeluno, kake neitiming'ani lelo kulikae," 
Romans11:8 anaa enatisiraki aajo, “Eishoo Enkai ninche ltauja o lukuny nemening'u toki o nkonyek nemedolisho o nkiyiaa nemening'isho ometabaiki ena olong.”" 
Romans11:9 Nejo Daudi, “Enchoo metaa osirua lenye orreshet o eloket, neaku enarror o enaitalakuni te ninche;" 
Romans11:10 nchoo emisimisu nkonyek enye pee medolishoyu, neirrugori too nkoriong'i te nkaraki nyamalaritin enye ntarasi.”" 
Romans11:11 Naikilikuanu naa ajo, amaa, amu etabatatate Ilyahudi teine metaa meekure esarunoyu? Mme nejia pae! Kake te nkaraki natagolo onyek pee eewuo enjeunoto Iloreren, peyie epiki Siraeli olom." 
Romans11:12 Amaa te nenyaaka taata engolon enye oo nkonyek aaku enkarsisisho too loreren, naa amaa te netaa ina natalaikinote ninche naitaa Iloreren karsisi, kebaa kenya elusoo ina nayau emborei e ning'oto te nening'ishoyu ninye?" 
Romans11:13 Ore taata, intae Iloreren airorie. Naa te nkaraki nara nanu olkipaaret oirriwakaki Iloreren, esiaai ai aitasapuk" 
Romans11:14 peyie atumoki atipika Ilyahudi lang olom, pee ebaiki neitajeu ina kulikae lenye." 
Romans11:15 Amu te naa ina natanyaita ninche nayaka enkop metoning'ore Enkai, keeta ae nayau enyorrarroto enye neme empiunoto too lootuata?" 
Romans11:16 Te nesinya eoroti e nkurma naipurji naiteri aaisho Enkai aaitaa ilng'anayio ooiteruni aatum, nesinya sii ninye enkae lulung'ata pooki; naa te nesinya ntona o lchani, nesinya sii ninche ilng'osil." 
Romans11:17 Kake amaa te netigiluaki kulikae ng'osil, ore iyie olng'osila lo loirien le ntim, nikirubakini ine netigilunyeki pee king'arieki ina arsisisho e ilo oirien," 
Romans11:18 nimiwuasa naa ake tialo lelo kulikae ng'osil. Naa ti niwuasa, tadamu tejo mme iyie doi onapita ina tonai, kake ina tonai nikinapita." 
Romans11:19 Naa iyie oyooki ajo, “Etigiluaki ilng'osil peyie aarubakini nanu.”" 
Romans11:20 Nesipa ina. Etigiluaki te nkaraki neitu eiruk, kake te nkirukoto ake sii pee intashe iyie. Metaa miwuasa ake iyie, kake tureisho nintashe." 
Romans11:21 Amu te neitu eing'urrie Enkai ilng'osil ate le ilo shani, mikiduaaya sii ninye iyie." 
Romans11:22 Toduaa naa olng'ur o empijan e Nkai, ina pijan enye te lelo ootabatatate, kake ore olng'ur le Nkai, tenebik tiatua iyie, te neme nejia nikidung'ori sii ninye iyie." 
Romans11:23 Naa ore sii ninche lelo kulikae, te neibelekenya aapal ina neitu eiruk, kerubakini sii ninche, amu keeta Enkai engolon naitoki arubakinye ninche." 
Romans11:24 Amu ti nikitudung'uoki to loirien le ntim, nikipuonunui aarubaki oloirien oramati, kebaa naa etumoki lelo ng'osil le ilo oirien oramati enkibung'ata einyiaakaki ilo oirien liopeny." 
Romans11:25 Ore pee miakuku iloowuasa te ng'eno inyi, kayieu niyiolouu ena naisudoro, ilalashera laainei, nchere einepua engoloto ae shoto e nkop oo Siraeli, o metaba anaa neiputayu esiana oo Loreren oopuonu," 
Romans11:26 neaku keitajeuni kenya ake Siraeli pooki; anaa enatisiraki aajo; “Ekelotu Olasarunoni eing'uaa Sion, neoru Yakobo enkiba naiba Enkai;" 
Romans11:27 naa nelo osotua lai o ninche ina kata alotu aiwuang'ie iung'ok enye.” 
Romans11:28 Ore tialo ororei supat, ilmang'ati le Nkai ninche, naa te nkaraki intae; kake ore te nkalo e ngelunoto nenyorri te nkaraki lekua loo menye." 
Romans11:29 Amu meibelekenyayu nkishorunot aashu engelunoto e Nkai. 
Romans11:30 Ore anaa enapa nining'ining'i intae Enkai nitang'amutua olng'ur lenye te nkaraki natagolong'utua ninche," 
Romans11:31 nejia sii taata etiu, ore te nkaraki engolong'u enye neing'urrieki intae naa keyookini aaing'urrie sii ninche." 
Romans11:32 Amu eteenikia Enkai ltung'ana pooki engolong'u pee etum aing'urrie pooki. 
Romans11:33 Wooi kebaa enguton o enkarsisisho o enkarriyiano e ng'eno nagut e Nkai! Mejurrunoyu inkiguanat enyena nemeturunoyu inkoitoi enyena! 
Romans11:34 “Amu ai ng'ae doi otayiolo oltau le Nkai amu ai ng'ae otaa oloiguen ninye?” 
Romans11:35 “Amaa, ai ng'ae oishoo ninye enkishorunoto metaa keyookini aalaaki?”" 
Romans11:36 Amu ninye eing'uaa naa ninye eimu naa enetii ninye epuo intokitin pooki. Metaa enenye enkitoo ntarasi. Eesai. 
Romans12:1 Aishiraki naa intae, ilalashera laainei, te ilo ng'ur le Nkai, enchoru iseseni linyi metaa olasar oishu, osinya neng'amunoyu te Nkai, amu ina eseremata inyi e nkiyang'et." 
Romans12:2 Eminturubare ate mbaa ena kop kake embelekenyata, enchoo eitang'ejuki intae indamunot pee itumutumu aaitadedeyie eyieunoto e Nkai too mbaa naasipa neng'amunoyu naa bayarot." 
Romans12:3 Amu ore te nkaraki empiris naaishooki nanu, ajoki pooki ng'ae linyi pee medamu ajo ailepie kewan alang enairirikino kake pee etem aiguanare kewan too naatiu, aitorisioki kewan entemet e nkirukoto naishoo Enkai ninye." 
Romans12:4 Amu ore anaa enikiaata irubat kumok to sesen obo, neme nabo esiaai oo rubat pooki," 
Romans12:5 nejia sii kitiu iyiook, ore hoo nikira kumok, kira osesen obo tiatua Kristo, nikira erubata nabo olikae o likae." 
Romans12:6 Ore kiaata nkishoorot naapaasha anaa eneba empiris naishooki iyiook, mataasishore nena: ore paa enaibon e Nkai, neiririkino enkirukoto ang;" 
Romans12:7 ore paa ene nkisiaayiare nikisiaaishore, ore paa ene nkiteng'enare, nikinteng'enishore;" 
Romans12:8 ore paa ene nkikoo nikinkokishore; ore paa ekinchooyo nikinchooyo te leng'on; ore paa eretore, neaku te nkisosion; ore paa eno lng'ur, niking'urrie te nchipai." 
Romans12:9 Emincho enyorrata ejing esunkuroisho; embai intae intorrok, entirrisha isupati;" 
Romans12:10 entonyorrata intae maate to sotua loo lalashera o nkanashera; entukujata te nkanyit. 
Romans12:11 Emincho enkisosion inyi edukenya, entaa lkirowua te Nkiyang'et, esiayia Olaitoriani." 
Romans12:12 Enting'idata to siligi linyi, enting'iria to sina, entasheikinoto enkomono." 
Romans12:13 Enchooi te nkaraki lelo sinyat ooata ngolikinot, entaa iloonyor enkitoomono oo lomon." 
Romans12:14 Entamayian lelo ooisilisil intae; entamayian emidek ninche. 
Romans12:15 Enting'idata o lelo oong'ida ninchirishiri o lelo ooishir. 
Romans12:16 Entotoni ining'ong'o olikae o likae, emiika, entushulare lelo oomeni; emitiira." 
Romans12:17 Emilakie entorroni enkae torroni, kake ore enaishiaakino te pooki ng'ae entipik intae indamunot." 
Romans12:18 Te naa keidimayu, paa intae etioorie, entotoni te seriani o pooki ng'ae." 
Romans12:19 Ilanyor laainei, emintalaku ilapi, kake entung'ueiki mbaa inyi engoro e Nkai; amu etisiraki aajo, “Enaai elap, nanu oitalaku lapi, Olaitoriani ojo.”" 
Romans12:20 Aa, “Ore pee eeta olmang'atinta lino esumash, intotio; ore pee eeta enkure nchoo entoki naok; amu ore pee inko nejia, inkuk naayupuyup inteleikia elukunya enye.”" 
Romans12:21 Emincho entorroni emir intae, kake entimir entorroni too supati." 
Romans13:1 Entoning pooki tung'ani oitoreisho. Amu meetae enkitoria neme Enkai eing'uaa, ore lelo ootae naa Enkai naitasheyie." 
Romans13:2 Neaku ore ake oloibooyo enkitoria te ngogong'i, ina naa Enkai naitasheyie, ore lelo ooibooyo te ngogong'i naa ate eyaki enkiguana." 
Romans13:3 Amu ore oltung'ani oata olkuaak sidai nemeure ilaitoriak lenyena kake ore oloata olkuaak torrono naa keure ilaitoriak. Iyieu iyie nimiaata enkuretisho te ilo oitoreisho? Taasa naa isupati, naa itum errepet te ninye." 
Romans13:4 Amu ore ninye naa osinka le Nkai likiyaki isupati. Kake ore ake pee ias intorrok, tureisho, amu menapita ninye olalem pesho; osinka le Nkai ninye oitabaiki engoro enye ilo oas intorrok." 
Romans13:5 Ore te nkaraki ina entoning naa laitoriak, neme te nkaraki ake naa iurere engoro e Nkai kake te nkaraki oltoilo lo ltau." 
Romans13:6 Naa te nkaraki ake ina sii pee ilakilaka kodi, amu ore lelo ooitoreisho naa laisiaayiak le Nkai ooirrita ina bae." 
Romans13:7 Enchoo lelo pooki nena naairirikino ninche, enchoo kodi ilo oishori kodi, ninchosho esotore lelo le sotore, entureita ninchosho enkanyit lelo ooiririkino enkanyit." 
Romans13:8 Emiaatayie esile oltung'ani hoo obo, ae neme ene nyorrata inyi maate; amu ore ilo onyor ole latia enye neitabayie inkitanapat." 
Romans13:9 Ore nena kitanapat naajo, “Miloloito, miaar metua, mipurrisho, ming'uar” o kulie ake kitanapat, naa kulo rorei ooitululung. “Tonyorra ole latia ino anaa eninyor kewan.”" 
Romans13:10 Meitaas enyorrata ole latia entorrono; ina paa enyorrata enkitabaroto oo nkitanapat. 
Romans13:11 Ore etii nena niyiololo sii aajo kaa saa ena, nchere etabawua tukul enkata pee iputunyenye aaing'uaa injo. Amu taata etataanikia iyiook enjeunoto alang enapa kata pee kinteru aairuk;" 
Romans13:12 etinyikayie enkewarie, etaa kekenyu. Ematuburukushu naa isiaaitin e naimin emaishopo imasaa e wang'an;" 
Romans13:13 emaitobirai ate anaa loopuo dama, neme te sikar o te merai, neme te malmalisho oo ng'uarrat torrok, neme too nkitarrikinot o to lom." 
Romans13:14 Kake enchopo Olaitoriani Yesu Kristo, naa emintoki ake aaisho osesen erishata, metaa nena ake naayieu intabayaya." 
Romans14:1 Ore ilo tung'ani omena enkirukoto, entang'amu, kake mme pee eishankarrareki to ltau lenye." 
Romans14:2 Keeta likae enkirukoto ajo keidim ainosa pooki toki, ore olomena naa mbenek ake enya ninye." 
Romans14:3 Toduaa olonya mimen olemenya, nimidung'oki olemenya enkiguana olonya; amu etang'amua Enkai ninye." 
Romans14:4 Ira ng'ae pee idung'oki enkiguana osinka le likae? To lkitok lenye makewan eitashe aashu ebatata. Naa keitasheyieki, amu Olkitok lenye oitasheyie ninye." 
Romans14:5 Keitirrish likae tung'ani enkolong nabo aitulusoo te nkae, neitirrish likae nkolong'i pooki aitoris. Enchoo pooki tung'ani metonyorrai ina te ndamunoto enye makewan." 
Romans14:6 Ore oloitirrish enkolong nabo neitirrish aa Olaitoriani eyanyit. Ore sii ilo onya endaa nenya aa Olaitoriani eyanyit; amu Enkai eisho enashe; naa ore sii ilo lemenya endaa, nemenya te nkaraki naa Olaitoriani eyanyit neisho Enkai enashe." 
Romans14:7 Meetae hoo obo lang laa kewan ake eishuyie, nemeetae olalang laa kewan ake enang." 
Romans14:8 Ti nikinchu, Olaitoriani kinchuyie, naa ti nikiye Olaitoriani kinang metaa ti nikinchu aashu te nikiye kira ake ilo Laitoriani." 
Romans14:9 Amu te nkaraki e ina pee etua Kristo neitoki apiu, pee etum ataa Olaitoriani loo lootuata o looishu." 
Romans14:10 Oo doi pee idung'oki olalashe lino enkiguana? Oo, pee imen olalashe lino? Entadamu aajo ekintashe ake pooki te dukuya olorika le Nkai le nkiguana;" 
Romans14:11 amu etisiraki aajo, “Ore anaa pee aishu nanu, Olaitoriani ojo, ‘Kaayooki pooki ng'ae agilaki kung, neyooki pooki ng'ejep aisis Enkai.’ ”" 
Romans14:12 Neaku kiyiooki pooki ng'ae aaikenaki Enkai imbaa ang maate. 
Romans14:13 Emikintoki naa aadung'okino enkiguana aekata olikae o likae, kake ematumut aajo mikipikaki aekata iyiook likae alashe entoki narror anaa ae bae narruesh ninye." 
Romans14:14 Kayiolo nanu naaitijing'ayioki sii tiatua Olaitoriani Yesu nchere meetae entoki naiduruk te kewan enye; kake keiduruk entoki te pooki ng'ae ojo keiduruk. 
Romans14:15 Te naa keitarru olalashe lino entoki ninosita iyie, nemeekure igira iyie alotie enyorrata. Mincho ake ina toki ninya eaku ninye nabatat obo otanang'a Kristo." 
Romans14:16 Neaku mincho embae supat te iyie eimakini aajo eitorrono. 
Romans14:17 Amu ore enkitoria e Nkai mme endaata o eokore kake esupatisho o eseriani o eng'ida naaing'uaa Enkiyang'et Sinyati. 
Romans14:18 Ore ilo oisiaai Kristo aiko nejia neng'amunoyu te Nkai nenyorrarri sii too ltung'ana. 
Romans14:19 Ematusuj naa ina nayau eseriani o enchetunoto nashetu olikae olikae. 
Romans14:20 Emintarruoo esiaai e Nkai te nkaraki endaa. Kesinya pooki toki, kake eitorrono te neaku kebatat oltung'ani ilkulikae te ntoki nanya ninye;" 
Romans14:21 enaikash te nemenya oltung'ani nkiri aashu meok enaisho oo sabibu aashu ae ake bae nabatat likae alashe. 
Romans14:22 Ore enkirukoto niata, tagolie te kewan o te Nkai. Emayiana ilo lemeeta ae naiguanare te kewan te nena naatonyorrayie ninye." 
Romans14:23 Kake ore ilo oata ilng'ashi eidipaki aatudung'oki enkiguana, te nenya, amu mme te nkirukoto etaasa ina; amu ore pooki neme enkirukoto eing'uaa naa eng'oki." 
Romans15:1 Ore iyiook iloogol keishiaakino nikinap enchalan oo looshal, pee me ate kintiship." 
Romans15:2 Enchoo pooki ng'ae eitiship ole latia enye too supati enyena, neitagol ninye." 
Romans15:3 Amu eitu eitiship Kristo kewan; kake ore anaa enatisiraki aajo, “Ore imorot e lelo likimor iyie, nanu etuurokinote.”" 
Romans15:4 Amu ore nena apa pooki naaigeroki te nena olong'i naaishari naa iyiook eigerokoki pee eutarieki, paa ore enkitashoto o enkikoo oo lkigerot nikitumie iyiook osiligi." 
Romans15:5 Meishoo intae Enkai enkitashoto nauno o ene nkilejilej entobik to lning'o olikae o likae, olaaijo ole Yesu Kristo," 
Romans15:6 pee itumutumu to ltau obo aaisisa Enkai nara menye lo Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo. 
Romans15:7 Entang'amu olikae olikae, naa enkuna anaa ina natang'amua intae Kristo, te nkaraki enkitoo e Nkai." 
Romans15:8 Amu ajoki nanu intae etaa Kristo osinka le lelo oomurata pee eitoduaaya esipata e Nkai, netum aitabai enkisiligata naishoo apa iloo papa," 
Romans15:9 o pee etum sii ninche Iloreren aaisisa Enkai te nkaraki olng'ur lenye. Anaa enatisiraki aajo; “Ore te nkaraki ina kaaisis iyie tiatua Loreren, naranyaki enkarna ino;”" 
Romans15:10 nenyaakaki sii ajo, “Enting'idata Iloreren, te nebo o ltung'ana le Nkai;”" 
Romans15:11 o sii, “Esisa Olaitoriani, Iloreren pooki;”" 
Romans15:12 nenyaaka sii Isaya ajo, “Kelotu entonai e Yese, ninye ilo oinyototo aitore Iloreren; naa ninye eyooki Iloreren aaisilig.”" 
Romans15:13 Meiputaki intae Enkai osiligi o enchipai pooki o eseriani tiatua enkirukoto, paa ore te ngolon e Nkiyang'et Sinyati nebul nedooyo osiligi linyi." 
Romans15:14 Atonyorrayie nanu openy intae, ilalashera o nkanashera aainei, nchere kebore intae esupatisho, nebore intae eng'eno pooki naa indimidimi aatuutai olikae o likae." 
Romans15:15 Kake etii nkuti baa naigeroko intae te mpijan pee aitadamu intae te nkaraki empiris naaishoo Enkai 
Romans15:16 mataa olaisiaayiani le Kristo Yesu too Loreren naas esiaai o lapolosani lo rorei supat le Nkai, pee eaku Iloreren olasar ong'amunoyu, oitukuoki te Nkiyang'et Sinyati." 
Romans15:17 Ore naa tiatua Kristo Yesu, kaata esipata nawuasare esiaai ai te Nkai." 
Romans15:18 Amu maitieu aimaki ae toki neme ina nataasa Kristo te nanu pee etum Iloreren aatoning ninye, to rorei o too nkiaasin," 
Romans15:19 te ngolon oo nkitoduaat o too ne nking'asia e ngolon e Nkiyang'et Sinyati, metaa ore ebaiki Yerusalem o metamanai alo Ilirikum, atolikioyie tukul ororei supat le Kristo." 
Romans15:20 Naitaa eyieunoto natii oltau elikioroto o rorei supat, neme te nene wuejitin neeidipaki aaipoto Kristo, pee meaku olkitamanyunoto le likae tung'ani alotu ashet." 
Romans15:21 Kake ore anaa enatisiraki; “Keyooki aadol lelo leitu ae kata elikini ninye, neyooki ajing'aa lelo leitu ae kata ening ninye.”" 
Romans15:22 Te nkaraki ena pee aaibooyioki nkatitin kumok eitu alotu abaiki intae. 
Romans15:23 Kake ore taata, amu meekure aata dikae wueji naisiaaishore te kulo kirinen, naa larin kumok ayieu ake nalotu abaiki intae," 
Romans15:24 kaisilig ajo kalotu adol intae agiroo alo Spein, nikintobiraa sii intae teina lototo ai, atang'asa ashipakino aparanare intae te nkiti rishata." 
Romans15:25 Ore te na kata ake, etiu nejia, kalo Yerusalem ayaki lelo sinyat eretoto." 
Romans15:26 Amu etishipakinote Makedonia o Akaia esotore te nkaraki lelo sinyat aisinak ootii Yerusalem; 
Romans15:27 netishipate ninche eas ina, neibala ajo keetayie ninche esile, amu amaa te naa keetuo Loreren aang'arie ninche enkirukoto e nkiyang'et, neishiaakino sii ninche neret aaisiaai lelo too masaa e mayianata." 
Romans15:28 Ore naa pee aidip ena, naitabaiki ninche kuna naatasotuoki, nalotu aimaa intae aloito Spein;" 
Romans15:29 nayiolo ajo ore pee alotu enitii intae naa kalotu te mborei e mayianata e Kristo. 
Romans15:30 Asai naa intae ilalashera o nkanashera aainei, to Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo o te nyorrata e Nkiyang'et, entonyok te nebo nanu te nkomono niomonono Enkai kiomonokiki nanu," 
Romans15:31 pee aarishieki lelo lemeiruk ootii atua Yudea, neaku sii esiaai ai naisiaai lelo sinyat te Yerusalem enang'amu te lelo sinyat" 
Romans15:32 pee te neyieu Enkai nayooki alotu enitii te ng'ida naitumurru aparan intae. 
Romans15:33 Metaa Enkai e seriani te nebo intae pooki. Eesai. 
Romans16:1 Karrepaki intae enkanashe ang Fibi, enkaisiaayiani e sirit natii Kenkerea," 
Romans16:2 nchere entang'amu to Laitoriani anaa enaishiaakino lelo sinyat, niretutu te mbae ake pooki nayieu te ntae, amu ninye nataa enkaretoni oo lkumok ebaiki ilatii nanu." 
Romans16:3 Eroroki Prisila o Akuila, naaisiaishote te nebo nanu tiatua Kristo Yesu," 
Romans16:4 etipika ate batisho te nkaraki nanu, neme nanu ake oisho ninche enashe, keishorita sii ninche isirito pooki oo Loreren." 
Romans16:5 Eroroki sii ina natii enkaji enye. Eroroki olanyor Epaeneto, laa ninye oitera aibelekenyakino Kristo te Asia." 
Romans16:6 Eroroki Mariamu nataasishe oleng tiatua intae. 
Romans16:7 Eroroki Androniko o Yunias, le mudong ang likiriamakinote eenata; iltung'ana ooibala lelo tiatua lkipaareta, ooitera apa ninche aairuk Kristo eitu airuk nanu." 
Romans16:8 Eroroki Ampilato lanyor tiatua Olaitoriani. 
Romans16:9 Eroroki Urbano, likisiaayia Kristo te nebo o lanyor Stakis." 
Romans16:10 Eroroki Apelle, otonyorrayioki tiatua Kristo. Eroroki lelo lo lmarei le Aristobolo." 
Romans16:11 Eroroki oltung'ani le mudong ang oji Herodion. Eroroki lootii atua Olaitoriani le nkaji e Nakirso. 
Romans16:12 Eroroki nena aisiaayiak tiatua Olaitoriani, Trifana o Trifosa. Eroroki enanyor Persi, nataasishe oleng tiatua Olaitoriani." 
Romans16:13 Eroroki Rufo, ogeluno tiatua Olaitoriani, o ng'otonye naa yieyio sii nanu." 
Romans16:14 Eroroki Arinkristo o Flegon o Herme, Patroba o Herma, o lelo alashera ootii te nebo ninche." 
Romans16:15 Eroroki Filologo o Yuliaa, Nerea o enkanashe enye, O Olimpa o lelo sinyat pooki ootii te nebo ninche." 
Romans16:16 Erorokinoto te ng'ututata nasinya. Eiroroki intae isirito pooki e Kristo. 
Romans16:17 Asai intae, ilalashera o nkanashera aainei, entodol ake lelo ooipiru enchankar o ngolikinot, earare ina kiteng'enare natuutakaki intae; entaapaash ninche." 
Romans16:18 Amu ore ltung'ana laaijo lelo mme Olaitoriani lang Kristo eisiaaita ninche kake ng'uarrat enye maate, naa nkutukie eitamelon too rorei le nkisisa pee etumoki aatelej lelo oomaae." 
Romans16:19 Amu ore hoo neyiolo iltung'ana aajo ining'ishosho ntae, o metaa kang'idare nanu ntae, kayieu ning'enunu aayiolou nena supati nemetii elejare, niyiolouu sii nena torrok;" 
Romans16:20 pee etum Enkai e seriani atasioki atupurda Sheitani tialo nkejek inyi. Metaa te nebo intae empiris o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo. 
Romans16:21 Eiroroki ntae Timoteo, laaisiritore te siaai; naa nejia etiu Lukio o Yason o Sosipater oora le mudong ang." 
Romans16:22 Nanu Tertio, olaigeroni le na palai, oiroroki intae tiatua Olaitoriani." 
Romans16:23 Eiroroki sii ntae Gayo laa enkaji enye atii, o Erasto olashumani le nkanasa o lalashera lang Kuarto." 
Romans16:24 [Metaa te nebo ntae empiris o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo, Eesai.]" 
Romans16:25 Metaa taata enkisisa ene Nkai, ilo oidim aitagolo ntae anaa enatejo te ilo rorei supat lo Laitoriani lalikioo, aimaki Yesu Kristo o enatiu embolunoto e ina naisudoro apa too lporori ootulusoitie apa moitie," 
Romans16:26 netabolokoki taata. Ore tiatua ilkigerot le naibon, neitayioloki iloreren, te risioroto e nkitanapata e Nkai oo ntarasi pee eyau enkanyit e nkirukoto" 
Romans16:27 Metaa ene Nkai ang enkitoo ntarasi, tiatua Yesu Kristo. Eesai." 
1Corinthians1:1 Paulo eing'uaa ena palai, oloipotoki te yieunoto e Nkai metaa olkipaaret le Kristo Yesu, neing'uaa sii olalashe lang Sostene." 
1Corinthians1:2 Aigeroki esirit e Nkai natii Korinto. Etegeluaki intae tiatua Kristo Yesu neipoti intae entaa ltung'ana le Nkai te nebo lelo pooki ootii pooki wueji ooipot enkarna o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo, ilo Aitoriani lenye naa olalang." 
1Corinthians1:3 Enoto empiris o eseriani naing'uaa Enkai Papa lang o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo. 
1Corinthians1:4 Ashukoki oshi ake Enkai ai enashe te nkaraki intae. Ashukoki ninye enashe te mpiris enye naishooki intae tiatua Kristo Yesu," 
1Corinthians1:5 amu ore te pooki oitoi itaa intae karsisi too mpukunot pooki o te ng'eno pooki o enkarriyiano oo nkirorot 
1Corinthians1:6 amu ore shakenisho ang te Kristo neitadedeyieki tiatua intae. 
1Corinthians1:7 Neaku eitu eng'oriki intae enkishorunoto e nkiyang'et hoo nabo, ianyitata embolunoto o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo." 
1Corinthians1:8 Ninye ake sii oitasheyie intae o metabaiki enkiting'oto miatata entorrono naiguanareki te intae teina olong o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo. 
1Corinthians1:9 Keisiligayu Enkai, naa enchula enye eipotokoki intae te nebo ilo Inoti lenye, Yesu Kristo Olaitoriani lang." 
1Corinthians1:10 Asai intae ilalashera laainei, te nkarna o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo; entoning'oto pooki, emincho ejing eoro atua intae, kake enchoo errinyokini intae oltau obo o eyieunoto nabo." 
1Corinthians1:11 Amu aatolikioki imbaa inyi, ilalashera laainei iltung'ana oing'uaa enkaji e Kloe nchere ketii enchankar atua intae." 
1Corinthians1:12 Naa inji etiu: ejo obo linyi, “Kara nanu ole Paulo,” nejo likae, “Kara nanu ole Apolos,” nejo likae, “Kara nanu ole Kefa,” nejo likae, “Kara nanu ole Kristo.”" 
1Corinthians1:13 Ketoore Kristo? Ei Paulo apa etashoki te nkaraki intae? Ei te nkarna e Paulo eibatisaki intae? 
1Corinthians1:14 Kajo ashe amu maata nanu lkulinyi laibatisa leme Krispo o Gayo," 
1Corinthians1:15 pee mejo ake likae eji te nkarna ai eibatisaki intae. 
1Corinthians1:16 Aibatisa sii enkaji e Stefana; ore metii lelo majo kaata likae laibatisa nanu. 
1Corinthians1:17 Eitu aairriwaa Kristo maibatisa, kake pee alikioo lelo Omon Supati naitelelek enkutuk pee ening'unoyu meoruni ake osalaba le Kristo engolon enye." 
1Corinthians1:18 Ore ina likioroto o salaba naa emodai te lelo ootii enkoitoi nalo mutata, kake ore iyiook ilootii enkoitoi e njeunoto naa ninye engolon e Nkai." 
1Corinthians1:19 Amu ejo ilkigerot, “Kaitarruoo nanu eyiolounoto oo lang'eni, naiwuang'ie eng'eno e lelo ng'eni.”" 
1Corinthians1:20 Koree ilo tung'ani ng'en? Koree ilo asirani. Koree eolaiguanani le na kata? Keitu eitomod Enkai eng'eno ena kop? 
1Corinthians1:21 Amu ore Enkai te ng'eno enye nagut neitu eisho iltung'ana metayiolo ninye te ng'eno enye. Kake etonyorra Enkai aitajeu lelo ooiruk ninye to rrekie le ilo rorei likilikioo ojo lelo ng'eni emodai te ninche. 
1Corinthians1:22 Olmonekie eikilikuanu Ilyahudi neing'oru Ilyunani eng'eno," 
1Corinthians1:23 kake Kristo otashoki kilikioo iyiook, otaa ninye errorroto too Lyahudi neaku emodai too Loreren;" 
1Corinthians1:24 kake ore te lelo ooipotoki, aa Ilyahudi aashu aa Ilyunani, Kristo ninye ora engolon e Nkai naa eng'eno e Nkai." 
1Corinthians1:25 Amu ng'en emodai e Nkai alang eng'eno o ltung'ani, negol enchalan e Nkai alang engolon o ltung'ani." 
1Corinthians1:26 Entadamu enkipototo inyi, ilalashera laainei. Mme kumok ilkulinyi oora apa ng'eni anaa naajo iltung'ana, neme kumok iloogol; neme kumok iloo lmarei kituaak;" 
1Corinthians1:27 kake etegelua Enkai nena naamoda te nkop pee eitukurru nena naagol, negelu lelo oojo enkop emoda pee eitukurru lelo oogol." 
1Corinthians1:28 Etegelua Enkai lelo lemejo enkop keeta tipat nemenari sii, o lelo lemeetae apa pee etum aitaa pesho nena naatae," 
1Corinthians1:29 pee metumi oltung'ani hoo owuasa te dukuya Enkai. 
1Corinthians1:30 Te nkaraki easata enye pee itii intae atua Kristo Yesu oitaa Enkai te iyiook eng'eno o esupatisho o esinyatisho o elakunoto. 
1Corinthians1:31 Ore naa anaa enajo lkigerot, “Ore ake oloyieu neng'ida nchoo eng'idare Olaitoriani.”" 
1Corinthians2:1 Ore naa etiu nejia, lalashera laainei o nkanashera, eitu alotu enitii te nkarriyiano oo nkirorot aashu te ng'eno, apa pee alotu aliki intae ina sipata naisudoro e Nkai." 
1Corinthians2:2 Atumuta apa ajo mayieu nayiolou toki tiatua intae neme Yesu Kristo ake, naa ilo otashoki." 
1Corinthians2:3 Ore ina kata pooki atii atua intae kashal apa, naureisho naikirikira." 
1Corinthians2:4 Neitu aasishore irorei oomelok le ng'eno airorita o te likioroto ai, kake aataasishore enkitoduaaroto e Nkiyang'et o engolon," 
1Corinthians2:5 pee meaku eng'eno e tung'ani eitasheyie enkirukoto inyi kake te ngolon e Nkai eitashe. 
1Corinthians2:6 Nikiaasishore ake sii irorei le ng'eno te lelo ootubulutua, kake mme eng'eno ele porror neme ene lelo ooitoreisho tele porror amu eidipa ninche aataa keish." 
1Corinthians2:7 Aa eng'eno e Nkai naisudoro kilimu, eng'eno naisudoro apake, naa Enkai naiguanua te nkiterunoto, te nkaraki enkitoo ang."
