1Corinthians2:8 Nemeetae hoo obo le lelo aitoriak lena kop otoning'uo ina, amu tenaa ketoning'utuo, anaata eitu epuo aashe Olaitoriani le nkitoo;" 
1Corinthians2:9 kake, ore anaa enajo ilkigerot, “Eneitu hoo edol enkong'u neitu hoo ening enkiok, neitu hoo ejing oltau lo ltung'ani, ninye eitobiraka Enkai lelo oonyor ninye.”" 
1Corinthians2:10 Iyiook etaboloko Enkai kuna baa te Nkiyang'et. Enkiyang'et najur pooki toki, o metabaiki enguton e Nkai." 
1Corinthians2:11 Aing'ae nayiolo inaatii oltau lo ltung'ani neme enkiyang'et natii atua ilo tung'ani? Nejia naa etiu, Enkiyang'et e Nkai ake nayiolo inaatii oltau le Nkai." 
1Corinthians2:12 Mme nkiyang'et e na kop kitang'amutua iyiook kake enkiyang'et naing'uaa Enkai kitang'amutua, pee kitum aatayiolo nena kishoorot naaishoo Enkai iyiook." 
1Corinthians2:13 Ninye ena nikilimu, neme too rorei oolimu eng'eno e tung'ani kake too rorei ootuutaka iyiook Enkiyang'et neibalakinye nena e nkiyang'et lelo tung'ana le nkiyang'et." 
1Corinthians2:14 Menyorraa oltung'ani ake le nkop inkishorunot e Nkiyang'et e Nkai; emodai nena te ninye; nemening'u nena amu te nkiyang'et ake eidimi aatujur. 
1Corinthians2:15 Nejur ninye oltung'ani le nkiyang'et pooki toki, hoo nemeetae olojur ninye." 
1Corinthians2:16 Ae ng'ae doi, otayiolo indamunot o Laitoriani metaa keutaa ninye? Kake kiata endamunoto e Kristo." 
1Corinthians3:1 Ore etiu nejia, lalashera laainei o nkanashera, maidim apa airorie intae anaa ltung'ana ootamanya enkiyang'et e Nkai kake kairorie ntae anaa ltung'anak ake, anaa nkera kutiti tiatua Kristo." 
1Corinthians3:2 Kule aitotiyie intae, mme endaa nagol, amu mindimidimi apa aainosa ina neton doi ake mindimidimi," 
1Corinthians3:3 amu eton aa enoshi ake netii ilkulikae tung'ana itii. Amaa te neton etii olom o enchankar atua intae, aimirara intae ilo sesen? Neton inkunariri ake anaa lkulikae tung'ana?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Ore pee eaku kejo likae, “Kara nanu ole Paulo,” nejo likae, “Kara nanu ole Apolos,” nyorrikiki naa mirara iltung'ana ake?" 
1Corinthians3:5 Kainyoo ninye Apolos? Kainyoo ninye Paulo? Kira ake sinkan laa te ninche ietuo intae aairuk. Neeta ake oltung'ani ina naa Olaitoriani oishoo. 
1Corinthians3:6 Nanu otuuno, nepik Apolos enkare, kake Enkai naitubulua lelo ng'anayio." 
1Corinthians3:7 Neaku mme toki ilo otuuno neme toki olotipika enkare, kake Enkai nara naitubulu." 
1Corinthians3:8 Erisio ake olaunoni o lopik enkare, naa keyooki ake oltung'ani atum olekoisiaayio lenye oiririkino esiaai enye." 
1Corinthians3:9 Kira iyiook ilaisiaayiak te nebo o Enkai; nirara intae enkurma enye, irara enkaji e Nkai." 
1Corinthians3:10 Ore te nkaraki empiris naaishoo Enkai, atotiwuo nanu anaa olashetani arriyia aitobir olkitamanyunoto naa likae taata oshetisho teine. Toduaa naa ake pooki tung'ani eninkunaa enchetata ino teine." 
1Corinthians3:11 Meetae hoo oloidim anyaaki aitamanyu ae kitamanyunoto neme enapake naidipaki aatipik, naa ninye Yesu Kristo." 
1Corinthians3:12 Kake te naa keshetaki likae ele kitamanyunoto saabu, anaa enkosholai, anaa sooito le tipat, aashu inkeek, aashu olkujita, aashu suut," 
1Corinthians3:13 kelioyu kenya ake esiaai o ltung'ani. Amu keyooki akenyu ina olong te nkima neibalunye enatiu esiaai o ltung'ani. Ina kima naitisip eneikununo esiaai o ltung'ani. 
1Corinthians3:14 Ore pee etuune enchetata naitayio oltung'ani, netum ilo olekoisiayio lenye;" 
1Corinthians3:15 ore pee eaku etapejoyioki; nemetum olekoisiayio lenye kake keitajeuni enkorrok enye, kake ketiu anaa oloimunyeki enkima." 
1Corinthians3:16 Aimiyiololo intae aajo irara enkaji e Nkai neidipa Enkiyang'et e Nkai atamanya atua intae? 
1Corinthians3:17 Ore ake oloitarruoo enkaji e Nkai, neitarruoo Enkai sii ninye; amu sinyati enkaji e Nkai, naa intae doi ina aji." 
1Corinthians3:18 Emincho elej oltung'ani kewan. Te nejo likae linyi eing'en ninye anaa naajo taata ele ishoi, enchoo ilo eaku kemoda, pee etum ataa ng'en;" 
1Corinthians3:19 amu ore eng'eno ena kop kedol Enkai anaa emodai. Ejo Lkigerot, “Enkai naibung ilang'eni tiatua lelo osekin lenye!”" 
1Corinthians3:20 Neitoki sii aajo, “Keyiolo Olaitoriani ndamunot oo lang'eni neyiolo ajo pesho!”" 
1Corinthians3:21 Emincho hoo obo ewuasare iltung'ana amu nkuninyi ntokitin pooki, aa taa;" 
1Corinthians3:22 Paulo anaa Apolos anaa Kefa anaa enkop anaa enkishui anaa keeya anaa entaata anaa entaaisere; nkuninyi pooki. 
1Corinthians3:23 Kake irara intae ile Kristo, naa ole Nkai Kristo." 
1Corinthians4:1 Enkenai iyiook entejo kira laisiaayiak le Kristo ooisiligaki aaitanap nkisudorot e Nkai. 
1Corinthians4:2 Naa lelo ooitanapaki etiorie metaa ilooisiligayu. 
1Corinthians4:3 Mme hoo toki te nanu paa intae likipuonunu aajur aashu aaiguanare aashu likae ake tung'ani. Emaiguanare doi ninye kewan. 
1Corinthians4:4 Nemayiolo hoo toki namen tiatua kewan, kake mme taa keaku maata nanu ai tiyoto. Olaitoriani laaiguanare nanu." 
1Corinthians4:5 Neaku emipuny intae aadung'oki likae enkiguana eng'or enkata o meeu Olaitoriani. Ninye olotu aitupuku nkisudorot e naimin meetu enewang, nebolu iyieunot oo ltauja loo ltung'ana. Teina kata kenya etum pooki tung'ani enkisisa naing'uaa Enkai." 
1Corinthians4:6 Ilalashera laainei o nkanashera, oloji Apolos o kewan ai aimakinye kuna baa peyie aretu intae te nkitanyaanyukoto. Entuutarie ate iyiook pee iyiolouu enoshi naji, “Ilkigerot turubare iyie.” Kayieu naaji ning'enunu pee miwuasasa aaku lo ltung'ani obo nimbayuyu olikae." 
1Corinthians4:7 Kainyoo doi nailepie intae? Kainyoo doi ena niaatata neme enitang'amutua? Amaa naa te naa kenitang'amutua ake, kainyoo pee isisisisi ate anaa leitu eng'amu toki?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Indipa naa doi aaiputakinoto? Metaa indipakinote? Itaa intae karsisi! Nitaa intae ilaiguanak mikitii iyiook! Wooi te naa indipa aataa ilaitoriak, pee kitum sii iyiook aataa ilaitoriak te nebo intae." 
1Corinthians4:9 Kadol nanu ajo eitaa Enkai iyiook lkipaareta, ilooisiadu te pooki, iltung'ana laa keeya ake eanyita, amu kitaa iyiook entoki ake nashil enkop, neshil ilmalaika neshil iltung'ana." 
1Corinthians4:10 Iyiook ootaa Ilmoda te nkaraki Kristo, nitaa intae ng'eni tiatua Kristo! Kishal iyiook; nigoligolo intae! Neyanyiti ninche intae, nemenuni iyiook." 
1Corinthians4:11 Ore o tena kata, kiaata esumash nikiaata enkure, nimikinchopo toki, nelimanitae iyiook, nimikiaata enemanya iyiook," 
1Corinthians4:12 nikintanaur ate kiaasisho too nkaik ang. Ore pee emori iyiook, nikimayianisho, ore pee eisilisili iyiook niking'iri." 
1Corinthians4:13 Ore pee epiki iyiook imbaa e sulare nikintoborruo. Kitotiwuo anaa suut e nkop; ore o tene kitaa olchala loo suut e pooki toki! 
1Corinthians4:14 Aigero Kuna neme kajo pee aitukurru intae, kake intae aikok anaa nkera aainei nanyor." 
1Corinthians4:15 Te nera iip katitin iip ilaramatak linyi tiatua Kristo, mme kumok iloo papaai linyi! Amu ore tiatua Kristo Yesu, nanu otaa papaai linyi atolikio intae lelo Omon Supati." 
1Corinthians4:16 Asai naa intae pee kiduaayaya nanu. 
1Corinthians4:17 Ina pee airriwaki intae Timoteo. Enkerai ai nanyor ninye, neisiligayu tiatua Olaitoriani. Ninye olotu aitadamu intae nkoitoi aainei tiatua Kristo anaa oshi enaiteng'enisho tiatua sirito pooki." 
1Corinthians4:18 Kejo kulikae eji malotu ine nitii naa ina pee eitarriki lkulikae; 
1Corinthians4:19 kake kalotu asieku te neyieu Olaitoriani; mme kalotu ayiolou nena naajo lelo oowuasa, kake ayiolou enetii engolon enye." 
1Corinthians4:20 Ore enkitoria e Nkai mme embae oo rorei kake ene ngolon. 
1Corinthians4:21 Kaa taa iyieuu? Ei pee alotu enitii te ng'udi; ana ei te nyorrata e nkiyang'et e mborron? 
1Corinthians5:1 Etolimuoki doi ajo etii eloloito atua intae o enkiboraa oo nkonyek torrono nemeetae ninye tiatua iloreren lemeyiolo Enkai; eji keeta likae enkitok e menye! 
1Corinthians5:2 Neton ake iwuasasa. Oo pee eitu nchirishiri o metaba anaa nearari aaitung'uaa intae ilo otaasa ina bae? 
1Corinthians5:3 Ore taa nanu te nkalo ai, hoo nematii ine to sesen atii te nkiyang'et, naidipa atudung'oki ilo enkiguana anaa katii te nkarna o Laitoriani Yesu ilo otaasa ina bae." 
1Corinthians5:4 Enototo te nebo te nkarna o Laitoriani Yesu, enototo te nebo atii sii nanu te nkiyang'et, ore te ngolon o Laitoriani Yesu" 
1Corinthians5:5 entarasaki Sheitani ilo tung'ani meitarruoi osesen lenye, pee eitajeuni kenya oltau lenye teina Olong o Laitoriani." 
1Corinthians5:6 Mme sidai olwuasa linyi. Aimiyiololo aajo eisuishie enkiti suguroi entapa naipurji pooki? 
1Corinthians5:7 Entukuoi ilo suguroi musana, pee itumutumu aataa entapa ng'ejuk. Esipa metii osuguroi atua intae, amu Pasaka lang, Kristo eidipaki aaitaa olasar." 
1Corinthians5:8 Emainosa naa osirua lang, neme te ilo suguroi musana, neme to suguroi le nkarruoisho o le ntorroni, kake te ntapa nemeisuishieki e sidano o esipata." 
1Corinthians5:9 Atisiraka intae tiatua empalai nchere emisiritore iltung'ana ooibor onyek. 
1Corinthians5:10 Mme taa apa iltung'ana le nkop ooibor onyek aimaka, aashu lelo loo ng'uarrat torrok o laisimak, aashu iloomon nkitanyaanyukot naaitae inkaitin, aashu te naa ipuopuo tena kop tukul aaing'uaa!" 
1Corinthians5:11 Ore ake apa enaigeroko intae naa nchere emisiritore ilo tung'ani oji olalashe, leton ake eibor onyek, ilooata olorok, neserem nena kitanyaanyukot naaitae inkaitin, nemorisho, nemera aashu aa olaisimani. Eming'arie tukul endaa oltung'ani laaijo ilo." 
1Corinthians5:12 Kara nanu ng'ae oiguanare lelo leme le sirit ang? Aime intae ooiguanare lelo ootii atua esirit? 
1Corinthians5:13 Ore lelo leme le sirit ang, Enkai naiguanare. Entaarai intae oltung'ani arruoni metung'uai atua intae." 
1Corinthians6:1 Keetae pasa obo linyi, laa te neetakinore olikae, neitieu ashomo kotini e lelo leitu eiruk lemelo dukuya iltung'ana le Nkai?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Aimiyiololo aajo iltung'ana le Nkai ooyooki aaiguanare enkop? Amaa te naa intae ooyooki aaiguanare enkop, keaku mindimidimi aaiguanare nkunyinyi baa?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Aimiyiololo aajo iyiook ooyooki aaiguanare ilmalaika, tapala duoo iyie noshi ake baa pooki e nkishon?" 
1Corinthians6:4 Amaa ti niaata noshi ake baa pooki e nkishon, ei lelo tung'ana leme le toki tiatua esirit igelulu meiguanare?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Kairo pee aitukurru intae. Ketaa doi meetae oltung'ani ng'en tiatua intae ooidim atirisha oltung'ani o lalashe lenye? 
1Corinthians6:6 Ketaa doi kerik olalashe olikae alashe enkiguana naa enoo leitu eiruk? 
1Corinthians6:7 Etaa ina naibalie nchere eturua intae tukul ena te neton ake iatata nkiguanat e kotini olikae o likae. Aime enaikash ti ning'iri mikintaasi enemetii esipata? Oo doi pee mincho kisimarieki? 
1Corinthians6:8 Neaku, intae ooinyalisho, ninyalinyala sii ilalashera o nkanashera!" 
1Corinthians6:9 Anaa aimiyiololo aajo mejung ileme supati enkitoria e Nkai? Emilej ate, ore lelo tung'ana ooibor onyek o loomon nkitanyaanyukot naaitaae nkaitin o loololoito, iloosokori o loosokorisho," 
1Corinthians6:10 ilapurrok, ilooata olorok, ilamerak, iloomorisho, ilaisimak, meetae hoo obo le lelo ojung enkitoria e Nkai." 
1Corinthians6:11 Naa nejia apa etiu kulikae linyi, kake eitukuoki intae, neitisinyaki intae, neikenakakaki intae esipata, te nkarna o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo, o te Nkiyang'et e Nkai ang." 
1Corinthians6:12 “Keishoruno pooki toki te nanu”, kake meretisho ntokitin pooki, “Kaaishoro nanu pooki toki” – kake mayieu naaitore engolon e ae toki." 
1Corinthians6:13 “Ene nkoshoke endaa, naa ene ndaa enkoshoke” – kake keiwuang'ie kenya ake Enkai pokira are. Ore osesen pee eetae mme ole nkiborra oo nkonyek kake olo Laitoriani: naa olo sesen Olaitoriani;" 
1Corinthians6:14 Enkai naas pokira are eitopiwuo Olaitoriani naa keitopiu sii iyiook te ngolon enye. 
1Corinthians6:15 Aimiyiololo aajo ore iseseni linyi naa irubat o sesen le Kristo? Paa kalo nanu aya rubat o sesen le Kristo aitaa rubat o sesen le mulayoi? Maiko aikata nejia! 
1Corinthians6:16 Aimiyiololo aajo ore oloibung'are emulayoi netaa osesen obo o ninye? Amu ejo Lkigerot: “Keaku pokira are osesen obo.” 
1Corinthians6:17 Kake ore ilo oibung'are Olaitoriani netaa enkiyang'et nabo o ninye. 
1Corinthians6:18 Elanya enkiborra oo nkonyek. Ore enkae ng'oki ake pooki naas oltung'ani naa oriong osesen lenye etii kake ore ilo orubare eloloito naa osesen lenye epik eng'oki. 
1Corinthians6:19 Amaa, aimiyiolo ajo ore osesen lino naa enkaji e Nkai namany Enkiyang'et Sinyati natii atua iyie, naa Enkai eing'uaa ina pee iata, nemeekure ira ole kewan ino?" 
1Corinthians6:20 Kinyiang'uaki te nkinyang'a. Nchoo naa Enkai enkitoo tiatua osesen lino. 
1Corinthians7:1 Naa ore taata, te nkaraki nena baa nikingerokito, ee, aisidai te nemeboitare olee enkitok," 
1Corinthians7:2 kake ore te nkaraki natasapuka oleng enkiborra oo nkonyek, enchoo ake olee eeta enkitok enye, neeta enkitok olpayian lenye." 
1Corinthians7:3 Neisho olpayian enkitok ina naishiaakino; neiko sii ninye enkitok nejia olpayian lenye. 
1Corinthians7:4 Meitore enkitok osesen lenye, kake keitore olpayian lenye; nemeitore sii ninye olpayian osesen lenye, kake enkitok naitore." 
1Corinthians7:5 Emimitikino naa, meteleku ti nining'okinono te rishata naje pee itumokiki enkomono nintokiki ake aatumo. Emincho ake Sheitani erishata meyaki intae intemat te nkaraki nemeidim oltung'ani aitoria kewan." 
1Corinthians7:6 Kajo nejia aa intae aiteleliaki, mme kaitoriaki intae." 
1Corinthians7:7 Kayieu naaji netiu ilewa pooki anaa nanu; kake keeta ake oltung'ani enkishooroto enye naing'uaa Enkai, neisho likae te na oitoi, neisho likae te nkae." 
1Corinthians7:8 Ajoki lelo leitu eyamisho o nkolia eji, eisidai te netoni etiu ninche anaa nanu." 
1Corinthians7:9 Kake te nemeidim aaitoria ate, enchoo eyamisho ashu eyami ninche; enaikash ti niyamisho ashu kiyami alang ti nikipejito ake eyieunoto." 
1Corinthians7:10 Kake aitanap lelo ooyamishote, naa Olaitoriani oitanap mme nanu, pee meorore ake enkitok olpayian lenye," 
1Corinthians7:11 nemeiturraa sii ninye olpayian enkitok enye. Naa te neorore enkitok olpayian, neton meyama aashu eshuko aning'ore olpayian lenye." 
1Corinthians7:12 Ore te lelo kulikae pooki najo nanu, neme Olaitoriani ojo, te neeta olalashe enkitok neitu eiruk, netonyorrayie metotona ninche te nebo, nemeitoki ilo aituraa ina;" 
1Corinthians7:13 naa te neeta enkitok olpayian leitu eiruk, netonyorrayie metotona te nebo, nemeorore sii ninye olpayian lenye." 
1Corinthians7:14 Ore ilo payian leitu eiruk naa ole Nkai te nkaraki ina kitok enye, naa ene Nkai enkitok te nkaraki ilo payian oiruko. Naa te neme nejia neaku mme ine Nkai nkera inyi; kake ore enatiu, ine Nkai ninche." 
1Corinthians7:15 Kake te neyieu ilo leitu eiruk, neorori, ore ilo alashe aashu ina anashe, nelakuno te nena pukunot. Kake eipoto Enkai intae ilooiruko entotoni to sotua." 
1Corinthians7:16 Na kitok, ai ti aji iyiolo te naa aiyie naitajeu olpayian lino? Lo payian, ai ti aji iyiolo te naa iyie oitajeu enkitok ino?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Ore ake etiu nejia, enchoo oltung'ani eunokino enkishon enye te risioroto oo nkishoorot naaishoo Olaitoriani o te nkipototo natang'amayie te Nkai. Ena kitanapata aitanap isirito pooki." 
1Corinthians7:18 Keipotoki oltung'ani eidipaki aatumurat? Emincho etem ajo aisudoo lmonek le murata. Keipotoki oltung'ani memurata? Emijo metumurati. 
1Corinthians7:19 Mme emurata toki, neme toki te nememurata oltung'ani, kake enkitabaroto oo nkitanapat e Nkai naata tipat." 
1Corinthians7:20 Enchoo eton pooki tung'ani etiu anaa pee eipoti. 
1Corinthians7:21 Ira orrindik pee kimpoti? Mme toki ina. Tinikitalakuaki taasishore ake iyie ina sinkaisho ino. 
1Corinthians7:22 Ore oloipot Olaitoriani aa orrindik netaa ilo ololakuno lo Laitoriani; ore sii ninye ilo oipotoki elakuno netaa orrindik le Kristo. 
1Corinthians7:23 Einyang'uaki intae te nkinyang'a. Emiaku irrindiki loo ltung'ana. 
1Corinthians7:24 Neaku lalashera laainei, totona ake pooki tung'ani te nebo Enkai te mpukunoto apake niaata pee kimpoti." 
1Corinthians7:25 Ore too naaipirta lelo leitu eyamisho nemaata nkitanapat naaing'uaa Olaitoriani kake aliki intae enajo nanu anaa ina naaitaa olng'ur lo Laitoriani oloisiligayu. 
1Corinthians7:26 Kajo nanu, ore te nkaraki nena baa taata naaitanyamalita intae, sidai te naa keton oltung'ani etiu anaa enatiu ninye." 
1Corinthians7:27 Iyamishe aata enkitok? Mijo oi alakuno pee maata. Ira ilo lemeeta enkitok naenikino? Ming'oru naa enkitok. 
1Corinthians7:28 Kake ti niyamisho, neitu ias eng'oki. Naa teneyami entito neitu eas eng'oki, kake ore lelo ooyamisho ketum osina te nkop, naa ilo ajo pee arishie intae." 
1Corinthians7:29 Kajo nanu nji, lalashera laainei, eidorrop erishata; enchoo lelo ooata nkituaak etiu anaa aimeeta," 
1Corinthians7:30 ore lelo ooishir netiu anaa ilemeishir, netiu lelo oong'ida anaa lemeng'ida, netiu lelo ooinyang'isho anaa ilemeeta toki." 
1Corinthians7:31 Ore lelo ooatayie tipat enkop netiu anaa ilemeetayie tipat; amu kelusoo empukunoto ena kop o mbaa enyena pooki. 
1Corinthians7:32 Kayieu nimiaatata osina. Ore oltung'ani leitu eyamisho naa mbaa o Laitoriani enyamaliki, neyieu neitiship Olaitoriani." 
1Corinthians7:33 Ore oltung'ani oyamishe naa mbaa e nkop enyamaliki, neyieu neitiship enkitok enye," 
1Corinthians7:34 naa keoro ndamunot enyena. Ore enkitok nemeyama, anaa enemeyiolo olee naa mbaa o Laitoriani enyamaliki; pee etum ataa sinyati to sesen o to ltau. Kake ore enkitok nayama naa mbaa e nkop enyamaliki; naa olpayian lenye eyieu neitiship." 
1Corinthians7:35 Ntae ayieu naret pee ajoito kuna baa; neme kajo pee aibooyo intae, kake te nkaraki barare nauno o ndamunot naasho naanyor Olaitoriani." 
1Corinthians7:36 Te nedol oltung'ani ajo keitanyamalita entito shoruet enye nemeyiolo likae lee, naa te nerrish naleng eyieunoto, nchoo eyama; eitu eas eng'oki." 
1Corinthians7:37 Kake te neitashe oltung'ani auno to ltau lenye, nemeeta ae naitirrishita, neidim ninye aitoria enkorrok enye makewan, netaasa esidai te neitu eyam ina tito neisho eton meyama." 
1Corinthians7:38 Neaku ore ilo oyam entito shoruet enye netaasa esidai, ore ilo leitu eyamisho, ninye oikash to likae." 
1Corinthians7:39 Eteenikiaki enkitok olpayian lenye anaa neishu; kake te neye olpayian lenye nelakuno neidim ayama likae oyieu, kake tenaa kolairukoni." 
1Corinthians7:40 Kake keshipa neikash te neton etiu nejia. Nejia ajo nanu, naa kajo sii kaata Enkiyang'et e Nkai." 
1Corinthians8:1 Oo taa endaa napolosakini nkitanyaanyukot naaitaae nkaitin, aikiyiolo doi enoshi nijojo, “Aikiata pooki eng'eno.” Kake ore ina “Ng'eno” inyi naa olwuasa epik iltung'ana, kake keshetu ninye enyorrata." 
1Corinthians8:2 Te nejo likae keeta ae nayiolo nemeeta ilo enayiolo anaa enaaishiaakino neyiolo; 
1Corinthians8:3 kake ore ake olonyor Enkai neyiolo Enkai ninye. 
1Corinthians8:4 Ore te nkinosata e ina daa napolosakini enkitanyaanyukoto naitaae enkai “Neme toki te nkop,” nikiyiolo aajo, “Meetae ae Ai neme nabo ake.”" 
1Corinthians8:5 Naa te neetae nena naaji inkaitin, te keper aashu te nkop, amu kesipa keetae inkaitin kumok, o laitoriak kumok," 
1Corinthians8:6 kake ore te iyiook nabo ake Enkai, Papa, laa ninye eing'uaa ntokitin pooki, naa ninye kinchuyie iyiook naa obo Olaitoriani, Yesu Kristo laa ninye eimu ntokitin pooki naa ninye kinchuyie." 
1Corinthians8:7 Kake mme pooki ng'ae oata ena ng'eno. Ore amu etamoo kulikae tung'ana nena kitanyaanyukot naaitaae inkaitin, neton edol lelo endaa nanya etiu anaa enatopolosakaki ina kitanyaanyukoto; ore to ltau, lenye te nkaraki neton eshal neidurukie ina." 
1Corinthians8:8 Meisho iyiook endaa errepet te Nkai; nimikilau toki te neitu kinya endaa, nemeeta ae nikitum ti nikinya." 
1Corinthians8:9 Entodol naa ake ate meaku ina naishoro intae narror lelo ooshal. 
1Corinthians8:10 Te nedol intae oltung'ani oshal, intae taa lelo ng'eni, itonini aadaa te misa e nkaji nasayieki enkitanyaanyukoto, ijo meitagol ina oltau, teina shalan enye, nelo ninye anya endaa natopolosakaki nena kitanyaanyukot?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Neaku ina ng'eno inyi natara ilo tung'ani oshal, ilo alashe otua Kristo te nkaraki ninye." 
1Corinthians8:12 Ore pee intaasiasa ilalashera o nkanashera inyi iing'ok naaikununo nejia, iltauja lenye itipika ilbaa, niyiololo aajo keshal, Kristo intaasa nena ng'ok." 
1Corinthians8:13 Neaku te naa kendaa narror olalashe anaa enkanashe ai, nemaitoki ai kata anya nkiri, pee marror olalashe aashu enkanashe ai." 
1Corinthians9:1 Aimalakuno nanu? Aimara olkipaaret? Keitu adol nanu Yesu Olaitoriani lang? Aimirara intae ilng'anayio le siaai ai to Laitoriani? 
1Corinthians9:2 Te ne mara olkipaaret te kulikae, nara ake ninye te intae; naa intae olmishire le kipaaretisho ai tiatua Olaitoriani." 
1Corinthians9:3 Kamitu naa kewan aiko nji te lelo laayieu naajur. 
1Corinthians9:4 Aimeishoro doi iyiook endaa mainosa nikiokisho? 
1Corinthians9:5 Aimeishoro doi iyiook metoriko oltung'ani enkitok nairuko Kristo anaa nena naasita lelo kulikae kipaareta, neiko sii nejia lalashera Olaitoriani, neiko Kefa?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Anaa ei Barnaba doi ake o nanu etiakaki maisiaayu entoki nikinya? 
1Corinthians9:7 Keetae osikari oisiaai likae neitoki alaaki kewan olekoisiayio? Keetae oltung'ani oun enkurma oo lng'anayio nemenya lelo ng'anayio? Keetae oltung'ani oirrita eluaata oo masaa nemeok kule enye? 
1Corinthians9:8 Ko ltung'ani laatiaka matejo kuna? Aimme nejia sii ninche ejo Nkitanapat? 
1Corinthians9:9 Etisiraki too Nkitanapat e Musa neji, “Nimien olkiteng enkutuk errarru entapa.” Ijojo ei lelo, mong'i doi eimaka Enkai?" 
1Corinthians9:10 Ana mme iyiook sa pee etejo nejia? Te nkaraki iyiook pee etisiraki ina, amu ore ilo oturisho neishaakino neturisho to siligi, ore olorrarru ilng'anayio nerrarru eisiligu ajo ketum eoroti enye." 
1Corinthians9:11 Tinikituunokito intae ilng'anayio lo ltau kenyaaka aaku embae sapuk ti nikitumie intae ntokitin e sotore? 
1Corinthians9:12 Amaa te neeta kulikae esipata natumie toki te intae, aime iyiook ooata enalusoo teina? Kake eitu king'orunye iyiook intae ina. Kiting'iria pooki toki, pee mikintarru ororei supat le Kristo." 
1Corinthians9:13 Aimiyiololo aajo ore lelo ooisiaaisho te nkaji e Nkai naa ina aji e Nkai etumie endaa, ore lelo oopolosisho to lperere lo lasar netum ematua eilo asar to lperere?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Ina sii eitanapa Olaitoriani lelo oolikioo kulo Omon Supati, metaa ore nkolati e nkishon enye netumie kulo Omon Supati." 
1Corinthians9:15 Kake eitu ajo nanu aing'oru hoo nabo e kuna tokitin, neme ina pee atisiraka intae kuna baa; enaikash te naye alang te naiko nejia. Pee metumi oltung'ani hoo obo oyooki ajo kawuasare empesho." 
1Corinthians9:16 Te nalikioo lelo Omon Supati, neme toki ina nawuasare nanu. Meeta nchere, keitu alikioo. Wooi kewan ai te nemalikioo kulo Omon Supati." 
1Corinthians9:17 Te naa kalikioo naaji te nkaraki naa nanu oyieu, keaku olekoisiaayio aanyu maatalaakini; kake teneme eyieunoto ai, naa te nkaraki naa Enkai naaisiliga aitanap ena siaai." 
1Corinthians9:18 Kainyoo naa olekoisiayio lai laalaakini? Enkidimata nalikiorie kulo Omon Supati nemaitalaku toki; ina doi natanya aalaakini te nkaraki elikioroto oo Lomon Supati. 
1Corinthians9:19 Ore hoo nemara orrindik le likae tung'ani, aitaa nanu kewan orrindik le pooki ng'ae peyie ariku anaa enaidimayu, naitaa ilkumok ile Kristo." 
1Corinthians9:20 Ataa Olyahudi tialo Ilyahudi peyie atum Ilyahudi; ore nena kitanapat naaitore ninche, atotiwuo anaa oloitore nena kitanapat peyie atum atoriku ninche, hoo neme nena kitanapat naaitore nanu makewan." 
1Corinthians9:21 Ore ajo pee atumoki Loreren leme nena kitanapat naaitore, atotiwuo anaa olemetii atua Nkitanapat, hoo natii nanu atua nkitanapat e Kristo metaa matii sii duoo auluo nkitanapat e Nkai." 
1Corinthians9:22 Ore to loshal te nkirukoto natiu anaa ninye peyie ariku sii ninche atua ina kirukoto. Ataa pooki toki too ltung'ana pooki, peyie atem too nkoitoi pooki aitajeu ematua enye." 
1Corinthians9:23 Naas nena pooki te nkaraki kulo Omon Supati, peyie eaku katii atua lelo oong'ar ina mayianata." 
1Corinthians9:24 Aimiyiolo aajo ore te nkesha naa keitukuja pooki, kake obo ake lenye otum enchunet? Neaku enkuet pee itumutumu." 
1Corinthians9:25 Ore olokuet pooki naa keenu kewan too mbaa pooki. Neiko ninche nejia ejo pee eishori olmarisian omuta, kake ole memuta kitum iyiook." 
1Corinthians9:26 Neaku, makuetita nanu maata enkipirta, nemaipusho anaa oloosh olng'am;" 
1Corinthians9:27 kake kaarita osesen lai naitore, pee meaku ore aidipa atoliki ilkulikae naadung'ori nanu." 
1Corinthians10:1 Lalashera laainei o nkanashera aainei, keyieu niyiolouu nena baa naanoto iloo papa. Etoriko lelo pooki enapa atampoi, neima pooki ina Aiposha Nanyokie eserian," 
1Corinthians10:2 neibatisaki pooki teina atampoi o teina aiposha metaa ilasujak le Musa. 
1Corinthians10:3 Einosa pooki ina daa apa naishoo Enkai," 
1Corinthians10:4 netooko pooki ina are naishoo Enkai; amu etookishote te ilo soit oishoo Enkai metusuja ninche. Ore ilo soit naa Kristo kewan. 
1Corinthians10:5 Kake ore ake eyia eitu eshipakino Enkai ilkumok lenye neidapashaki impopoki enye ilo purkel. 
1Corinthians10:6 Netaa kuna pooki enkikoo te iyiook, pee miking'uar enkarruoisho anaa enataasa Isiraeli." 
1Corinthians10:7 Emiaaku intae iloomon nkitanyaanyukot anaa enaikuna kulikae lenye; anaa enajo Lkigerot, “Etotona Itung'ana aadaa neokisho neinyototo aaranyisho.”" 
1Corinthians10:8 Mikirubare iyiook mbaa torrok e nkiborra oo nkonyek, anaa enaikuna ilkulikae lenye, ore te nkolong nabo neye nkalifuni tikitam ookuni." 
1Corinthians10:9 Nimikitem iyiook Olaitoriani, anaa enaikuna apa kulikae lenye, nemut ilasuriaa lelo." 
1Corinthians10:10 Eming'unyung'uny anaa enaikuna kulikae lenye, lelo apa ooidaikie Olmalaika Omutisho." 
1Corinthians10:11 Eineputua ninche nena pooki pee eaku enkikoo, netisiraki pee eikoki iyiook aarishie, ilaa te nkata ang eitabayioki nkatitin." 
1Corinthians10:12 Neaku ore ilo ojo kenotoko enkitashoto neing'or kewan pee mebatata. 
1Corinthians10:13 Eitu einepu intae ae temata nemetiu anaa noshi ake naatum ilkulikae tung'ana. Keisiligayu Enkai, nemeisho ninye metetemi intae enalang ina nimindimidimi aairisha, kake ore ake entemata nalotu neisho ake intae enkoitoi nipaashieshie pee itumutumu aairisha." 
1Corinthians10:14 Ore te nkaraki ina, lchoreta laainei, entalam eseremare oo nkitanyaanyukot." 
1Corinthians10:15 Airorie intae anaa ltung'ana ooning'u mbaa; enguanare intae kuna najo. 
1Corinthians10:16 Amaa oshi kinchooyo enashe teina kikompe e mayianata, ai mme osarge le Kristo oshi ilo liking'ar? Naa amaa oshi kibel emukate, aimme osesen le Kristo ilo liking'ar?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Ore amu nabo emukate, ore iyiook hoo nikira kumok nikira osesen obo; amu keng'amu ake oltung'ani embelati e ina mukate nabo." 
1Corinthians10:18 Eng'ura sii intae enkirukoto oo lkerreti loo Lyahudi: keitu eaku lelo oonya nena tokitin naapolosi ile nchula e ina Ai natopolosakita lelo asarri? 
1Corinthians10:19 Kaa doi ajoito? Katejo doi eji ore endaa natopolosakaki nena kitanyaanyukot naaitaae inkaitin netubula ninye aaku ae toki? Aashu ajo kaae toki ninye ina kitanyaanyukoto? 
1Corinthians10:20 A'a, Kajoito ore lelo asarri oopolos lelo lemeyiolo Enkai iloiriruani epolosaki mme Enkai. Neaku, mayieu niatata enchula o loiriruani" 
1Corinthians10:21 Nimindim iyie atooko ina kikompe o Laitoriani nintoki enoo loiriruani: nimindim ataa olong'ar emisa o Laitoriani ning'arie sii enoo loiriruani. 
1Corinthians10:22 Aikiyieu sa iyiook nikintagor aapik Olaitoriani olom? Aiyiook oogol te ninye? 
1Corinthians10:23 Ijojo, “Keishoruno ntokitin pooki,” ee, kake mme pooki toki naretisho. Nijojo, “Keishoruno ntokitin pooki,” kake mme pooki toki nashetisho." 
1Corinthians10:24 Emincho eaku enaret kewan ake eing'oru oltung'ani, kake enchoo eing'oru oltung'ani enaret olikae." 
1Corinthians10:25 Enosa pooki toki namiri teine nemirieki inkiri, niminkilikuanunu nena baa o ltoilo lo ltau;" 
1Corinthians10:26 ore enkop o ntokitin pooki naatii naa ino Laitoriani. 
1Corinthians10:27 Ti nikintoomon iyie oleitu eiruk niyieu nilo, nosa nena pooki naatii dukuya iyie, niminkilikuanu nena naajo oltoilo lo ltau." 
1Corinthians10:28 Kake ti nikijoki oltung'ani ake pooki “Olasar ele le nkaji oo ntaleng'o.” Minya te nkaraki ilo likitolikio o te nkaraki oltoilo lo ltau; 
1Corinthians10:29 neme taa olo ltau lino makewan ajo, kake olo ltau le ilo tung'ani. Ijojo intae, “Oo paa ore elakunoto ai naa to ltoilo lo ltau le likae eiguanareki?”" 
1Corinthians10:30 Amaa te nang'arie likae endaa etii enashe, oo pee aaitokini aapik esulare te ntoki naishoorie enashe?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Naawaliki ajoki, ti nidaa aashu ti niokisho aashu ti nias ai ake bae pooki, taasa nena pooki te nkaraki enkitoo e Nkai." 
1Corinthians10:32 Nimiaaku iyie olkob too Lyahudi aashu to Lyunani aashu te sirit e Nkai," 
1Corinthians10:33 anaa sii enatiu nanu oloitiship iltung'ana pooki te pooki oitoi, nemaing'oru dupoto ai makewan, kake ene pooki, pee eitajeuni." 
1Corinthians11:1 Nanu entoduaai anaa enaduaaya sii nanu Kristo. 
1Corinthians11:2 Aisisita intae amu aikidamumu te pooki toki o te nkaraki nitukurrakita aaibung ilkerreti anaa enapake naitarasaka intae. 
1Corinthians11:3 Kake kayieu niyiolouu aajo Kristo endukuya o lee ake pooki, naa olee elukunya e nkitok, naa Enkai endukuya e Kristo." 
1Corinthians11:4 Ore pooki lee oiro aomon aashu elimu olkilikuai le Nkai eitoipito endukuya enye naa Kristo elaiki enkanyit, laa ninye elukunya enye." 
1Corinthians11:5 Ore enkitok ake pooki naomon aashu elimu olkilikuai le Nkai eitu eitoip endukuya enye, meeta enatalang'ie ina enkitok natabarnoki endukuya." 
1Corinthians11:6 Te nemeimulumul enkitok endukuya nemeeta naa enatiu te nedung'i ilpapit; naa te naa esulare te nedung'i enkitok ilpapit aashu ebarni elukunya, neishiaakino naa neimulumul endukuya." 
1Corinthians11:7 Meishiaakino neimulumul olee endukuya enye, amu ninye oitodolu eneyia empukunoto o enkitoo e Nkai; kake enkitoo o lee eitodolu ninye eng'oruoi." 
1Corinthians11:8 Mme eng'oruoi etupukunye olee, kake olee etupukunye eng'oruoi;" 
1Corinthians11:9 neitu eitaini olee te nkaraki eng'oruoi, kake te nkaraki olee pee eitayioki engorui." 
1Corinthians11:10 Ore teina, te nkaraki ilmalaika, keishiaakino ake neeta eng'oruoi enkitoduaata nautu enkitoria naitorei te lukunya enye." 
1Corinthians11:11 Kake ore ake eyia, ore tiatua Olaitoriani, mme toki eng'oruoi metii olee neme toki olee metii eng'oruoi;" 
1Corinthians11:12 amu ore anaa pee eitayioki eng'oruoi to lee, neing'uaa sii ninye olee eng'oruoi, kake Enkai eing'uaa ntokitin pooki." 
1Corinthians11:13 Eng'uanare oopeny, ijojo keishiaakino te neomon eng'oruoi Enkai meimulumula endukuya?" 
1Corinthians11:14 Ai meutaa intae empukunoto enye naitobirunyeki, ajo te neeta olee ilpapit adoru, neaku enkurruna te ninye," 
1Corinthians11:15 kake te naa adoru enkitok ilpapit, neaku esikar te ninye. Eishooki ninye lelo papit adoru pee eitoipore." 
1Corinthians11:16 Te netii oloyieu neishankarru kuna, najoki nanu intae, mikiaata likae kerreti, nemeeta sii ninche isirito e Nkai." 
1Corinthians11:17 Ore aitanap intae kuna baa, kaata enamen te intae naa nchere, keinyalisho ntumoritin inyi meretisho." 
1Corinthians11:18 Eituruk enatoning'o nchere ketii eoro atua intae ti nitumomo irara esirit, naa kairuk kulie e nena." 
1Corinthians11:19 Amu meeta nchere pee eitu eoro intae indamunot, pee kitum aatodol ilewa le tipat." 
1Corinthians11:20 Kake ti nitumomo te nebo, neme Endaa o Laitoriani ina nipuonunu aanya." 
1Corinthians11:21 Amu ipuonunu pooki aanya ndaiki inyi nelo likae eeta esumash nelo likae etemere. 
1Corinthians11:22 Amaa, ai nkajijik miatata nidaarere? Anaa imenimene esirit e Nkai, nintukurrurru lelo aisinak? Kajoki aa intae? Kaisis intae? Maisis intae teina." 
1Corinthians11:23 Ore olkerreti laishoo intae, to Laitoriani atang'amua, nchere ore teina kewarie naitarasarieki Olaitoriani Yesu, nedumu emukate," 
1Corinthians11:24 ore pee eidip aishooi enashe, nebelibel nejo, “Osesen lai ele, laishorita ntae; entaas ena kidamumu nanu.”" 
1Corinthians11:25 Neiko sii nejia nedumu enkikompe eidipe endaa, nejo, “Ore ena kikompe ninye Osotua ng'ejuk oitayu osarge lai; entaas ena anaa ake ti niokioko, pee kidamunyenye nanu.”" 
1Corinthians11:26 Amu ore enkata pooki ninyanya ena mukate niokioko ena kikompe, naa keeya o Laitoriani ilikioo, o meeu." 
1Corinthians11:27 Neaku ore pooki tung'ani onya ina mukate neok ina kikompe meishiaakino, keaku keeta eng'oki e ilo sesen o ilo sarge lo Laitoriani." 
1Corinthians11:28 Keishiaakino nejur ake oltung'ani kewan eton eitu enya ina mukate neokie ina kikompe. 
1Corinthians11:29 Amu te nenya oltung'ani neok neitu eyiolou tipat e ilo sesen, kewan etudong'oko enkiguana teina kinosata o teina okoto." 
1Corinthians11:30 Ina pee eshal nemuoyiaa ilkumok tiatua intae, netuata esiana." 
1Corinthians11:31 Ti niking'uanare ate too sipat nemeitokini aaiguanare iyiook; 
1Corinthians11:32 kake ore amu Olaitoriani oiguanare iyiook, ina pee eitamei iyiook, pee medung'okini iyiook enkiguana aairiamaa o enkop." 
1Corinthians11:33 Neaku, ilalashera o nkanashera aainei, ti nitumomo te nebo pee inyanya endaa o Laitoriani, entaanyunoto." 
1Corinthians11:34 Te netii oloata esumash, nenya endaa ti ang, pee meaku entumo enapukoki endung'okinoto e nkiguana. Kalotu aitanap intae kulie baa te nalotu." 
1Corinthians12:1 Ore too mbaa naaipirta nkishoorot e nkiyang'et, lalashera o nkanashera aainei, nayieu niyiolouu isipat." 
1Corinthians12:2 Iyiololo aajo, ore apa miyiololo Enkai, inkitanyaanyukot nemeiro erikokini intae, te na oitoi o ti ae." 
1Corinthians12:3 Ina pee aitayiolo intae nchere meetae hoo obo ooidim airoro te nkiyanget Enkai atejo, “Olaitoriani Yesu,” mme Enkiyang'et Sinyati naishoo metejo." 
1Corinthians12:4 Keetae mpukunot oo nkishoroot e nkiyang'et, kake ena kiyang'et nabo naishoru pooki;" 
1Corinthians12:5 keetae enkisiaayiare oo mpukunot kumok, kake obo ake Olkitok oisiaai;" 
1Corinthians12:6 neetae mpukunot kumok e ngolon e Nkai naasisho, kake ena Ai nabo naisiaaisho te nena kidimat pooki." 
1Corinthians12:7 Neishooki pooki tung'ani ewang'an e nkiyang'et naretie ilkulikae tung'ana pooki. 
1Corinthians12:8 Keetae oloishoo Enkai engolon nairorie mbaa e ng'eno te Nkiyang'et, neishori likae meiroro mbaa e nkarriyiano e ng'eno, anaa enaisho ake ina Kiyang'et," 
1Corinthians12:9 neishori likae enkirukoto, naa teina Kiyang'et nabo ake, neishori likae nkishoorot e mbaare, naa ina Kiyang'et ake ina," 
1Corinthians12:10 neishori likae engolon naasie mbaa naagol e nking'asia, neishori likae engolon nalikiorie lomon te naibon, neishori likae enkidimata nayiolounye atirisha iltauja, neishori likae enkidimata naasishore ilng'ejepa oopaasha, neishori likae enkidimata nawalunye nkutukie." 
1Corinthians12:11 Ore kuna pooki naa esiaai e ina Kiyang'et nabo ake, naa ninye naoriki nerishaki iltung'ana aiko anaa enayieu ninye." 
1Corinthians12:12 Ore taa anaa enatiu osesen lo ltung'ani ara obo, neeta rubat kumok, ore nena rubat aa kumok naa osesen obo. Nejia sii etiu te Kristo;" 
1Corinthians12:13 amu ti nikira apa Ilyahudi anaa kira ilgiriki, anaa ti nikira irrindiki aashu kira iltung'ana oolakuno, ore te nkibatisa teina Kiyang'et nabo, nikitaa pooki osesen obo neitookoki iyiook ina Kiyang'et nabo." 
1Corinthians12:14 Ore osesen lo ltung'ani mme erubata nabo kake oloo nkumok. 
1Corinthians12:15 Te nejo naaji enkeju, “Ore amu mara nanu enkaina, mara eno sesen,” nemeibelekenya aaku mme eno sesen te nkaraki ina." 
1Corinthians12:16 Naa te nejo enkiok, “Ore amu mara nanu enkong'u, mara nanu eno sesen,” nemeibelekenya aaku mme eno sesen te nkaraki ina." 
1Corinthians12:17 Amaa naaji te naa ke nkong'u osesen pooki, kaji eitoki atii enkiok? Naa amaa te neaku pooki enkiok, kainyoo naa eitokini aaing'ueishore?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Ore enatiu, Enkai natipika irubat pooki, aa naabo, nepik ilo sesen anaa enayieu ninye." 
1Corinthians12:19 Amaa naaji te naa kerubata nabo pooki, kaji eitoki atii osesen?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Ore enatiu, keetae irubat kumok, kake obo osesen." 
1Corinthians12:21 Nemeidim enkong'u atiaki enkaina, “Maatayie nanu iyie tipat,” nemeidim sii ninye elukunya atiaki inkejek, “Maatayie nanu intae tipat.”" 
1Corinthians12:22 Aa, ore metii ina, ore noshi rubat o sesen naashal naa ninche naata tipat oleng;" 
1Corinthians12:23 nikiyanyit naleng nena rubat o sesen naaijo mme ne tipat; ore nena nemeing'urayu naa ninche kirrita oleng; 
1Corinthians12:24 ore nena rubat sidain naaing'urayu nemeetayie tipat enkirrita. Kake eiruburuba Enkai osesen, neisho enkanyit sapuk nena rubat nemeeta," 
1Corinthians12:25 pee mejing ake osesen eoro, kake pee etum ake erubata pooki airrita enkae rubata." 
1Corinthians12:26 Ore pee eme erubata nabo, nemeyu rubat pooki te nebo ina; ore pee eisisi erubata nabo, neshipa nkulie rubat pooki te nebo ina." 
1Corinthians12:27 Irara taata intae osesen le Kristo, nirara moobo irubat enyena." 
1Corinthians12:28 Netipika Enkai atua ina sirit neiturukie lkipaareta, ile aare iloibonok le Nkai, liokuni laiteng'enak neitoki lelo ooas nkiasin e nking'asia, ilabaak, ilaretok, ilarikok o lelo ooiro too lng'ejepa oopaasha." 
1Corinthians12:29 Ei ilkipaareta doi pooki? Ei loibonok le Nkai pooki? Ei laiteng'enak pooki? Keas pooki nkiasin e nking'asia? 
1Corinthians12:30 Keeta pooki nkishoorot naaishiunye olorere? Keiro pooki too lng'ejepa oopaasha? Keyiolo pooki aatawalu ilng'ejepa? 
1Corinthians12:31 Kake entonyok eng'oru nena kishoorot naata tipat aaisul te pooki. Naa kaitodol intae enkoitoi nalus te pooki. 
1Corinthians13:1 Tenairo naa kairo naaji too lng'ejepa loo ltung'ana anaa too loo lmalaika, kake te nemaata enyorrata natotiwuo ana esekenkei naru anaa empilbil nadar." 
1Corinthians13:2 Kaidim ataa kaata enkishooroto e naibon o eyiolounoto oo nkisudorot misili pooki o eng'eno pooki, kaidim ataa kaata enkirukoto nadotu ildoinyio, kake te nemaata enyorrata nemara toki." 
1Corinthians13:3 Kaidim ataasishore pooki toki naata aitotiyie ilaisinak naidim sii aishooi osesen lai metapeji, kake te nemaata enyorrata, nematum toki." 
1Corinthians13:4 Keng'iri enyorrata, neeta olng'ur, nemeeta olom, nemewuasa enyorrata, nememenisho," 
1Corinthians13:5 nemeas mbaa e nkinyala, neme naaret kewan ake eing'oru, neme ng'arng'arri, nemeiken intorrok," 
1Corinthians13:6 nemerrep enkarruoisho, kake keshipakino esipata;" 
1Corinthians13:7 nenyuaakino mbaa pooki, neeta enkirukoto te pooki toki, neeta osiligi le pooki toki, neng'iriakino pooki toki." 
1Corinthians13:8 Ore enyorrata nemeru ae toki ntarasi. Te neetae enaibon ekeiting'ieki; te naa ilng'ejepa keiting, ore eng'eno naa keishari." 
1Corinthians13:9 Mebaya eng'eno ang, nemebaya enaibon ang;" 
1Corinthians13:10 kake keish nena pooki naang'or te nebau kenya ina lulung'ata naiputakine. 
1Corinthians13:11 Ore apa ara enkerai, nairo, nadamisho anaa enkerai, nawalu ana enkerai, ore taata ara oltung'ani botor, naiting'ie mbaa e keraisho." 
1Corinthians13:12 Ore taata mbaa nikidol netiu anaa naairupurup tiatua kiok, kake ore teidia kata nikiduaa nkomomi; melulung'a taata eng'eno ai, kake ore idia kata naitululung ayiolou, anaa enaaitululung'a Enkai ayiolou nanu." 
1Corinthians13:13 Ore naa, kebik kuna pokira uni: enkirukoto, o siligi, o enyorrata; kake enyorrata esapuk aisul pooki." 
1Corinthians14:1 Entuunokinoto enyorrata, kake entonyok eng'oru nkishoorot e nkiyang'et, neisul ina kishorunoto e likioroto o lkilikuai le Nkai." 
1Corinthians14:2 Ore ilo oiro to lng'ejep oje neme oltung'ani eirorie kake Enkai, amu meibung oltung'ani enajo; nkisudorot eiro aibonu." 
1Corinthians14:3 Kake ore ilo olimu olkilikuai le Nkai naa ltung'ana eirorie aliki mbaa naashetu, neisisaa, neilejilej." 
1Corinthians14:4 Ore ilo oiro te likae ng'ejep kewan eitubulu; ore ilo olimu olkilikuai le Nkai naa esirit eitubulu. 
1Corinthians14:5 Kayieu naaji nanu niroro pooki te lelo ng'ejepa, kake keisul ayieu oleng nilimumu olkilikuai le Nkai. Ore ololimu olkilikuai le Nkai ninye olkitok alang ilo oiro too lng'ejepa, aashu naa te neetae olowalu neretu esirit pooki metang'amu enkiti toki nashetu." 
1Corinthians14:6 Ore te nkaraki ina ilalashera o nkanashera, te nalotu naaji enitii nairo too lng'ejepa, kainyoo eret ina te intae aime enaikash te naa kairo irorei le mbolunoto aashu le ng'eno aashu le naibon aashu le nkiteng'enare ina kata airorie intae?" 
1Corinthians14:7 Nejia sii etiu too ntokitin nemeishu anaa endule aashu enkawuo oo sinkolioitin. Te neaku ore eoshitoi, nemening'unoyu osinkolio ooshitoi, kaji eiko pee eyiolouni aajo kalo sinkolio ilo?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Naa amaa te nemeibala enkorui e mowuo, aing'ae orretena alo olarrabal?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Nejia naa etiu, te neitu ilimu ororei oibala to lng'ejep lino, kaji eiko pee ening'unoyu ina nilimu? Keaku enkijape ake irorie," 
1Corinthians14:10 kajo ake, keetae mpukunot kumok e nkorui te nkop, nemeetae hoo enemeeta ake enajo." 
1Corinthians14:11 Neaku te nemayiolo enejo ina kutuk, naaku nanu oleeiking'a teina kutuk, neaku sii ninye olomoni te nanu." 
1Corinthians14:12 Nejia sii itiuu intae, ore amu kadol ajo iyieuu naleng niaatata inkitoduaarot e nkiyang'et, entonyok naa entejo maisulie nena naashetu esirit." 
1Corinthians14:13 Enchoo naa ilo oiro to lng'ejep oje, eomonu meishori enkidimata e walunoto." 
1Corinthians14:14 Amu te naomon to lng'ejep oje, enkiyang'et ai naomon, kake meeta enaitayu ndamunot aainei." 
1Corinthians14:15 Kaa naa aas? Kaomon ake te nkiyang'et ai kake naomon ake sii too ndamunot aainei, narany te nkiyang'et narany ake sii too ndamunot aainei." 
1Corinthians14:16 Amu ti ninchooyo enashe te nkiyang'et ino, kaji eiko likae oton teina tumo pee ejo “Eesai” teina kishooroto ino enashe, te nemeyiolo enijoito?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Keidim ataa sidai alang ina kishooroto ino e nashe, kake eitu eret ina likae." 
1Corinthians14:18 Kashukoki Enkai enashe nchere kairo nanu too lng'ejepa alang intae pooki: 
1Corinthians14:19 kake ore tiatua entumo nayieu nairo irorei imiet loo ndamunot aainei, pee atum atuutai sii ninche lelo kulikae; alang te nairo irorei iip tomon te likae ng'ejep." 
1Corinthians14:20 Ilalashera o nkanashera aainei emiaku nkera too ndamunot inyi. Ore too ntorrok entotiu ana nkera kutiti, kake ore too ndamunot inyi entimitunye." 
1Corinthians14:21 Etejo Lkigerot tiatua Nkitanapat: “Kairorie nanu ele orere too ltung'ana le kulie kutukie, too nkutukie oo ltung'ana leeiking'a, kake ore etiu nejia nemaaning ninche nanu.” Nejia ejo Olaitoriani." 
1Corinthians14:22 Neaku ore ina kiroroto oo lng'ejepa mme olmonekie te lelo ooiruko kake te lelo leitu eiruk, kake ore elikioroto o rorei mme ene lelo leitu eiruk kake enoo looiruko." 
1Corinthians14:23 Te neiturrurro entumo pooki te nebo neiro pooki ng'ae too lng'ejepa, nepuonu ltung'ana ake duoo leitu eiruk, eimejo lelo, “Oloirirua pae iatata?”" 
1Corinthians14:24 Kake te naa olkilikuai le Nkai elikioo pooki ng'ae nelotu oltung'ani ake duoo aashu ejing'u oleitu eiruk, ore embae pooki naning neputu metadamisho naleng." 
1Corinthians14:25 Ore nkisudorot o ltau lenye neibalunyeki newang'u. Nebatata ina kata te nkomom enye neomon Enkai, neibalunye ajo, “Kesipa ketii Enkai te nebo intae.”" 
1Corinthians14:26 Aikijo aa naa, lalashera o nkanashera aainei? Te neaku nturrurrote, nebaiki neterretene likae eeta osinkolio anaa eeta enkiteng'enare aashu, embolunoto aashu e nkiroroto oo lng'ejepa aashu ewalunoto e nena, kake enchoo nena pooki eaku ine nchetunoto ake e ilo turrur." 
1Corinthians14:27 Te neetae enkiroroto oo lng'ejepa, enchoo aare eiro aairukuruko anaa okuni nimintogiroo ine, naa enchoo eirukuruko, ninchosho oltung'ani obo ewalu, alimu enajo;" 
1Corinthians14:28 naa te nemeetae olowalu, ninchosho ilo oiro too lng'ejepa egira etiiki olturrur neirorie kewan neirorie Enkai." 
1Corinthians14:29 Ore lelo ooata olkilikuai oing'uaa enetii Enkai, enchoo aare aashu okuni eiro, neineneng lelo kulikae irorei lenye;" 
1Corinthians14:30 naa te neaku ore eirorita obo neinepu likae otonita embolokinoto, neng'as ilo le dukuya agira." 
1Corinthians14:31 Itumutumu pooki erishata nilimunyenye olkilikuai oing'uaa Enkai, moobo, pee eyiolou pooki neitagoli." 
1Corinthians14:32 Ore enkiyang'et e lelo ooata olkilikuai le Nkai ninche ooitore; 
1Corinthians14:33 amu ore Enkai, mme Enkai e ng'uyan kake ene seriani anaa enatiu too sirito pooki oo sinyat." 
1Corinthians14:34 Enchoo ng'oruo egira tiatua ntumoritin, amu meishoro meiroro. Ele kerreti esujita sirito pooki oo ltung'ana le Nkai. Enchoo ninche eigara olorere, amu nejia sii ninye ejo Olaitoriani." 
1Corinthians14:35 Ore pee eeta enayieu neyiolou, enchoo eikilikuan ilewa lenye ti ang, amu embae e nkurruna te neiro eng'oruoi etiiki entumo." 
1Corinthians14:36 Aainyoo! Ai te ntae etang'asua olkilikuai le Nkai anaa ai intae ake etabaikia? 
1Corinthians14:37 Te neetae oltung'ani ojo keeta ninye olkilikuai le Nkai aashu ejo keeta nkishoorot e nkiyang'et, entiaaki ore kuna naigeroki intae, Olaitoriani oitanapishe." 
1Corinthians14:38 Ore ake oloitaa ena parmetii enchoo sii ninye eaku parmetii. 
1Corinthians14:39 Neaku ilalashera laainei, enosai olkilikuai le Nkai te nkisosion, naa emimit enkiroroto oo lng'ejepa," 
1Corinthians14:40 kake enchoo ebarakini aas pooki toki too nkiririkinot. 
1Corinthians15:1 Ore taata, ilalashera o nkanashera aainei, kayieu naitadamu intae lelo Omon Supati latolikio intae natuutaka intae enajo. Nitang'amutua intae, nintasheito tiatua," 
1Corinthians15:2 naa ninye pee eitajeuni taata intae, te netaa mbung'itata aakurraki nena apa naitanapa nanu intae, nitisiputua aajo mme ene pesho enkirukoto inyi te ninye." 
1Corinthians15:3 Aitarasaka intae naiturukie ina natang'amua sii nanu: nchere etua Kristo te nkaraki ng'ok ang anaa enajo Ilkigerot," 
1Corinthians15:4 netunukayioki ninye, neitopiwuoki te nkolong e uni anaa enajo Ilkigerot," 
1Corinthians15:5 neipang'aka Kefa, neitoki lelo Tomon o Aare;" 
1Corinthians15:6 ore te siadi ina neipang'aki nabo kata lalashera oolusoo te iip imiet, neton eishu ilkumok le lelo o taata, kake etuata kulikae." 
1Corinthians15:7 Ore te siadi ina neipang'aki Yakobo, neitoki ilkipaareta pooki;" 
1Corinthians15:8 ore olobayie te pooki, naaipang'aki sii ninye nanu, atiu anaa ilo oini te nkata neme enenye." 
1Corinthians15:9 Amu aaipang'aka sii nanu, nanu oloti aisul ilkipaareta, nemaanarikino naaji olkipaaret amu aisilisilo esirit e Nkai." 
1Corinthians15:10 Kake kara toki nara te nkaraki empiris e Nkai, naa ore ina piris naaishoo ninye neitu eaku pesho tiatua nanu. Ore enatiu, nanu otaasishe alang lelo kulikae pooki, kake mme nanu otaasa nena, kake ina piris e Nkai natii atua nanu." 
1Corinthians15:11 Neaku, ore etii nena, te nalikioo nanu aashu elikioo ninche ilo ake olkilikuai lang naa ninye iruko intae." 
1Corinthians15:12 Amaa te naa ketolikioyioki Kristo aajo eitopiwuoki too lootuata, kaji enyaaka atiu pee emanaa kulikae tiatua intae aajo meetae empiunoto oo lootuata?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Te nemeetae empiunoto oo lootuata, netaa naa eitu eitopiuni Kristo kewan;" 
1Corinthians15:14 naa te netaa eitu eitopiuni Kristo, naa pesho ele kilikuai likinosu, naa pesho sii ninye enkirukoto inyi." 
1Corinthians15:15 Ore etii nena, keitoki sii aaku kintaikitia iyiook Enkai shakenisho e lejare amu kinchakenikito aajo Enkai naitopiwuo Kristo; kake eitu naa eitopiu ninye te netaa meitopiuni ilootuata." 
1Corinthians15:16 Amu te nemeitopiuni ilootuata, netaa naa eitu sii ninye eitopiuni Kristo;" 
1Corinthians15:17 naa te netaa eitu eitopiuni Kristo, naa pesho enkirukoto inyi neton itii atua ing'ok inyi." 
1Corinthians15:18 Netaa sii ore lelo ootuata etii atua Kristo neimina ntarasi. 
1Corinthians15:19 Te nemegiroo osiligi lang likisilig Kristo ena kishui nikiaata taata, nemeetae naa too ltung'ana pooki iltoluti oolang iyiook." 
1Corinthians15:20 Kake kesipa tukul nchere eitopiwuoki Kristo too lootuata, olng'anayioi le dukuya te lelo ootuata." 
1Corinthians15:21 Amu ore te nkaraki naa oltung'ani obo oyaka enkop keeya, oltung'ani obo sii oyawua empiunoto oo lootuata." 
1Corinthians15:22 Ore ake anaa ina naye pooki tiatua Adam, nejia sii etiu keitopiuni kenya pooki tiatua Yesu Kristo." 
1Corinthians15:23 Kake kelotu embae pooki te nkata enye: Kristo oituruko aitadedeyie, ore kenya, te neshukunye, neitoki lelo lenyena;" 
1Corinthians15:24 neitoki alotu enkiting'oto, ina kata elotu aitarasaki Enkai Papa enkitoria, eidipa ninye aishie nkitoriat pooki, o nkidimat pooki o engolon." 
1Corinthians15:25 Amu keng'as ake Kristo aitoreisho o metaba anaa nepik Enkai ilmang'ati lenyena pooki abori inkejek enyena; 
1Corinthians15:26 ore olmang'atinta obayie oishieki naa keeya. 
1Corinthians15:27 Amu, “Eitadowuo Enkai ntokitin pooki meetu abori inkejek enyena.” Ore taata te nejo Ilkigerot eitadowuoki ntokitin pooki, keibala ajo metii ninye Enkai esiana, amu Enkai naa apa naitadowuo ntokitin pooki aisho Kristo meitoria." 
1Corinthians15:28 Kake ore pee eidipi aaitadou ntokitin pooki ti abori ilo Inoti lenye, ina kata kenya eitadouni ninye kewan ti abori enkitoria e Enkai, natipika ntokitin pooki abori ninye, peyie eitore Enkai pooki toki." 
1Corinthians15:29 Amaa te nemeetae empiunoto kaa retoto etum lelo tung'ana oopuo meibatisai te rishata e lelo ootuata? Amaa te nemeitopiuni tukul ilootuata," 
1Corinthians15:30 kainyoo naa pee maserian pooki kata? 
1Corinthians15:31 Kesipa ajoki intae, ilalashera o nkanashera aainei, ore te nkaraki nawuasare intae Ile Kristo laaijo nanu, kaye nanu anaa ake." 
1Corinthians15:32 Amaa te naa kataarare ng'uesi te Efeso te tung'anisho ai ake duoo, kaa naaji eret ina te nanu? Naa te netaa meitopiuni ilootuata, “Ematadaata naa nikiokisho, amu eikiyiooki aaye taaisere,” anaa enajo Ilkigerot." 
1Corinthians15:33 Emincho eitapong'ori intae: “Ore encholiek oo lkiminchal keinyal olkuaak.” 
1Corinthians15:34 Enoto intae olkuaak sidai, emienikino ing'ok. Etii kulikae linyi lemeeta eyiolounoto e Nkai. Najo nejia pee aitukurru intae." 
1Corinthians15:35 Kake keikilikuanu likae nejo, “Kaji eikoni te neitopiuni ilootuata? Kaji eikununo osesen otum ninche?”" 
1Corinthians15:36 Kebaa ena modai ninkilikuanua! Ore ina niun iyie openy nemeeta nchere keitu eng'as aye pee etum atubulu. 
1Corinthians15:37 Ore ina niun naa enkantererai ake, aa ene nkano aashu ene ae ake tapa." 
1Corinthians15:38 Enkai naishoo mpukunot enye anaa enayiewuaki ninye enkantererai ake pooki. 
1Corinthians15:39 Neme ine mpukunoto nabo nkiri pooki. Empukunoto nabo nkiri o ltung'ani, naa ae inoo ng'uesi, naa ae inoo motonyi, naa ae inoo sinkir." 
1Corinthians15:40 Keetae iseseni le keper neetae iseseni le nkop; kake keeta seseni le keper enkishiaa enye neeta iseseni le nkop enenye. 
1Corinthians15:41 Keeta enkolong enkishiaa enye neeta olapa enenye; keeta doi ninye olakira obo enkishiaa e wang'an nalang eno likae. 
1Corinthians15:42 Nejia etiu empiunoto oo lootuata. Etiu anaa enkantererai, kenukari osesen te nkop eidaaya, neitopiuni te mpukunoto nemeidaaya ae kata." 
1Corinthians15:43 Kenukari te menatisho, neitopiuni te nkishiaa. Keshal enukari, neitopiuni eiputa engolon." 
1Corinthians15:44 Kenukari aa osesen le na kishon, neitopiuni aa ole nkiyang'et. Keetae osesen le na kishon, kake keetae sii likae sesen le nkiyang'et." 
1Corinthians15:45 Ina doi pee ejo Ilkigerot, “Neaku ilo tung'ani oiturukuo, Adam, osesen oishu,” ore Adam obayie, neaku oloishoru enkiyang'et enkishui." 
1Corinthians15:46 Eng'ura aajo mme ene nkiyang'et naiturukuo, kake ina e na kishon, neitoki taa ina e nkiyang'et." 
1Corinthians15:47 Enkop apa eing'uaa oltung'ani oiturukuo, too nkulupuok eitobiruaki; naa keper eing'uaa ilo tung'ani li are." 
1Corinthians15:48 Ore apa anaa enatiu oltung'ani loo nkulupuok nejia sii etiu lelo laa loo nkulupuok, ore anaa enatiu oltung'ani le keper naa nejia sii etiu ile keper." 
1Corinthians15:49 Ore anaa enikiwaita nyaanyukie e ilo tung'ani loo nkulupuok, aikiya sii nyaanyukie e ilo tung'ani le keper." 
1Corinthians15:50 Ore enajoito, ilalashera o nkanashera aainei, naa ena; meidim osesen o sarge aatujung enkitoria e Nkai, nemeidim entoki naidaaya atujung'o enkitoria e Nkai, nemeidim entoki naidaaya atujung'o enemeidaaya." 
1Corinthians15:51 Entoning, embae naisudoro aliki intae: mikiiye pooki kake keibelekenyi kenya iyiook pooki" 
1Corinthians15:52 nabo kata, te nkirriapata e nkong'u; amu keru emowuo, neitopiuni ilootuata nelakuni aaoru keeya ntarasi, neibelekenyi iyiook." 
1Corinthians15:53 Amu ore nena pooki naaye neaku ake inemeye. 
1Corinthians15:54 Ore pee eaku etalakuaki nena naaye aaoru keeya, netaa nena naaye inemeye, neitabari ina kata ina nasira too Lkigerot nesipayu nchere. “Etoijoyioki keeya tiatua olkishuroto.”" 
1Corinthians15:55 “Keeya, koree emirishoi ino? Keeya, koree enoshi bae ino?”" 
1Corinthians15:56 Ore oshi embae nang'orishore keeya naa ng'ok, naa nkitanapat engolon oo ng'ok:" 
1Corinthians15:57 kake ashe te Nkai naishoo yiook matimirisho to Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo. 
1Corinthians15:58 Ore te nkaraki nena, ilalashera o nkanashera aainei nanyor, entashoito, entaa ilemeigusugusieki, entaboreyia anaa ake te nkisiayiare o Laitoriani, iyiololo aajo ore tiatua Olaitoriani mme ene pesho esiaai inyi." 
1Corinthians16:1 Ore tialo esotore naishori isinyat enkuna sii intae anaa ina naitanapa isirito e Galatia. 
1Corinthians16:2 Ore te nkolong e dukuya e wiki ninchosho eiteng'el pooki tung'ani enkiti toki anaa enaidim; paa te nalotu nemeitokini aata esotore. 
1Corinthians16:3 Entegelu kulikae linyi, ore pee abau, nairriwaa ninche naisho mpala mewaita ina kishorunoto inyi Yerusalem." 
1Corinthians16:4 Naa te neishiakino nalo sii nanu, nikiriamari." 
1Corinthians16:5 Kalotu ina alo atang'asa aimaa Makedonia amu kayieu naimaa ine; 
1Corinthians16:6 nebaiki nang'as aton te nebo aashu abik te nebo intae te rishata e nkijape, paa intae likipuonunu aaitobiraa te nene wuejitin pooki nalo." 
1Corinthians16:7 Amu mayieu taata neaku kalotu ake aimaa intae, kaisilig ajo kabik te nebo intae te rishata naje, te neishoru Olaitoriani." 
1Corinthians16:8 Kang'as abik te Efeso o metabau Pentekoste; 
1Corinthians16:9 aatabolokoki empaash e siaai nadupa, naa kumok ilmang'ati." 
1Corinthians16:10 Ore te nelotu Timoteo, entodol ake pee meureishoyu etii te nebo intae, amu esiaai o Laitoriani easita anaa nanu," 
1Corinthians16:11 neaku emincho ake etumi oltung'ani omenaa ninye. Entaretoi meshomo te seriani pee elotu enatii. Amu kaanyita nanu neanyita sii ilairukok. 
1Corinthians16:12 Ore tialo olalashe lang Apolo, aitirrishaka oleng pee elotu ine nitii te nebo lelo alashera; kake meyieu ninye nelotu tena kata, kake kelotu te nkata naatae erishata." 
1Corinthians16:13 Entashololoto, entashoito oleng te nkirukoto, entagol nipijuju." 
1Corinthians16:14 Enchoo eaku ore pooki bae niasiasa, entaas te nyorrata." 
1Corinthians16:15 Ilalashera laainei, iyiololo intae enkaji e Stefana ninche naaitera aaibelekenyakino Enkai te Akaia netasheikinote aaisiaai isinyat." 
1Corinthians16:16 Aisisaki intae ajoki entonyorrai erikore oo ltung'ana laaijo lelo, o ene pooki ng'ae o sinka oisiaaisho te nebo intae." 
1Corinthians16:17 Atishipe naleng etabawua Stefana, o Fortunatu o Akaika, amu erishata inyi nimitii etijing'a ninche" 
1Corinthians16:18 amu aayeng'iyeng'ie embaunoto enye ndamunot naa nejia itiuu sii intae. Entayioloito ake tipat oo ltung'ana laaijo kulo. 
1Corinthians16:19 Eiroroki intae isirito e Asia. Ore Akuila o Priska, te nebo esirit natii enkaji enye, neirriwaki intae enkirorokino tiatua Olaitoriani." 
1Corinthians16:20 Eiroroki intae ilalashera pooki. Erorokinoto te ng'ututata nasinya. 
1Corinthians16:21 Nanu Paulo, oirriwaki intae ena kirorokino te nkaina ai makewan." 
1Corinthians16:22 Te netii obo lemenyor Olaitoriani inchoo metaa kediaa ilo! Olaitoriani lang, wou!" 
1Corinthians16:23 Metaa te nebo intae empiris o Laitoriani Yesu. 
1Corinthians16:24 Airriwaki intae pooki enyorrata ai tiatua Kristo Yesu. 
2Corinthians1:1 Nanu Paulo, olkipaaret le Kristo Yes u te yieunoto e Nkai o lalashe lang Timoteo. Kingeroki esirit e Nkai natii Korinto o lelo sinyat ootii pooki wueji te Akaia." 
2Corinthians1:2 Enoto empiris o eseriani naing'uaa Enkai Papa o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo. 
2Corinthians1:3 Meisisi Enkai nara Papa lo Laitoriani lang Yesu, Papa lo lng'ur lemeish ntarasi enkilejilej enye." 
2Corinthians1:4 Ninye oilejilej iyiook tiatua isinaitin lang pooki pee kindim sii iyiook aailejileja ilkulikae ooata osina teina kilejilej nailejilejie iyiook Enkai. 
2Corinthians1:5 Ore anaa eniking'ar oleng emion e Kristo nejia sii kinko king'ar oleng enkilejilejata te nkaraki Kristo. 
2Corinthians1:6 Te neinosieki iyiook osina keji pee eilejileji intae neitajeuni; naa teneilejileji iyiook kejo Enkai pee eilejilej intae tinintasheshe to sina laaijo ele likitii. 
2Corinthians1:7 Ore osiligi lang te intae nemeigusugus, amu eikiyiolo aajo, ore pee ing'arierie iyiook osina, ning'arierie sii iyiook ina kilejilej." 
2Corinthians1:8 Amu mikiyieu nimiyiololo ilalashera lang eneba enyamali nikinoto te Asia. Eirotokoki iyiook inaalang engolon ang o metaba anaa neish iyiook osiligi le nkishui. 
2Corinthians1:9 O metaa aikitejo etudung'okoki iyiook enkiguana e keeya, naa keji apa pee mikingarakino ake ate kake nikingarakino Enkai, naitopiu ilootuata." 
2Corinthians1:10 Ninye otasarua iyiook te batisho naitureisho e keeya, naa keitoki ake aigil asaru iyiook. Ninye kitipika osiligi lang nchere keitoki ake aigil asaru iyiook." 
2Corinthians1:11 Nenare niretirete iyiook te nkomono pee eisho ltung'ana kumok Enkai enashe te nkaraki iyiook te asata enye e mpiris naitaasa iyiook. 
2Corinthians1:12 Amu ena shakenisho ake oo ltoiloishi loo ltauja lang king'idare, nchere ore tiatua ltung'ana, neisul tiatua intae, kintoriokito iyiook aairo isipat naaisho iyiook Enkai, naa te mpiris e Nkai mme te nkarriyiano e ng'eno e tung'ani." 
2Corinthians1:13 Ore kulo rorei likingeroki intae naa ilindimidimi aaisuma nining'ung'u. Ore o taata naa inchot ake oo mbaa iyiololo te iyiook. Naisilig ajo iyiookiki aayiolou tukul aamitu. 
2Corinthians1:14 Ore teina olong o Laitoriani Yesu, niyiookiki ina kata aadol aajo iatata esipata niwuasarere te iyiook anaa enikiaata iyiook te intae." 
2Corinthians1:15 Te nkaraki apa naa kang'idare ena pee atejo kalotu abaiki intae. Kayieu apa naitaas intae kuna are sidain. 
2Corinthians1:16 Kayieu apa naimaa intae aloito Makedonia naitoki sii aimu intae ashukunye; nayieu sii apa nikiretoo alo Yudea. 
2Corinthians1:17 Amaa te kuna pooki, ijojo kanyaaka aing'ash? Ana ijojo kaiguane anaa oltung'ani le nkop kairiamaki ajo “Ee” najo sii “A'a?”" 
2Corinthians1:18 Ore anaa enaisiligayu Enkai, mme ake ninye ororei lang te intae ole “Ee” o “A'a.”" 
2Corinthians1:19 Ore ilo Inoti le Nkai Yesu Kristo, likitolikioitie iyiook tiatua intae o Silfanos o Timoteo o nanu, neme “A'a;” kake ore te ninye naa “Ee.”" 
2Corinthians1:20 Tiatua ninye etejo Enkai “Ee” too nkisiligat enyena pooki; naa ina paa te ninye kijo Eesai kisis Enkai. 
2Corinthians1:21 Enkai doi naitagol indung'ot pokira are, iyiook o intae tiatua Kristo. Enkai doi natubukoko iyiook eilata," 
2Corinthians1:22 nepik iyiook olmishire ojo kira ilenyena, neisho iyiook Enkiyang'et tiatua ltauja lang anaa embae naiturumu kulie naapuonu." 
2Corinthians1:23 Enkai aipot metaa olchakeni lai nchere intae atejo aduaaya pee eitu aigil alotu Korinto. 
2Corinthians1:24 Mme doi nena baa nemeeta nchere pee eitu irukuruku kisikong'aki intae; eidipa pae atuunoyu enkirukoto inyi. Eikisiaaisho doi te nebo intae too mbaa e nchipai inyi maate. 
2Corinthians2:1 Ina pee atejo malotu aigilie intae ae baikinoto name. 
2Corinthians2:2 Naa amaa te naitame nanu intae, aing'ae aitoki nanu ang'idare? Keilo laitame?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Ina pee aigeroko intae aiko nejia, pee te nalotu nemaitame lelo ooishiaakino neaku ninche laaiting'id. Amu kayiolo ajo tenang'ida nanu ning'idada sii intae." 
2Corinthians2:4 Aigeroko intae aabore osina kitok o emion atua oltau o too lkiyio kumok, neme kajo pee aitame intae, kake kajo pee iyiolouu eneba enyorrata nanyor nanu intae." 
2Corinthians2:5 Te neyawua likae linyi emion, neme nanu eyaka, kake kajo intae pooki, hoo nemayieu naitirrishaki ninye oleng." 
2Corinthians2:6 Ore ilo otiu nejia netabaikia ina aa kenoto earata naba nejia too ltung'ana kumok. 
2Corinthians2:7 Intae taata etioorie naa enaikash te nipalakiki neilejileji ninye, pee meidimu emion nalusoo." 
2Corinthians2:8 Asai naa intae enyaaki entadedeyie enyorrata ninyorrinyorro ninye. 
2Corinthians2:9 Naa ina doi apa pee aigeroko intae, pee atem intae ayiolou te naa irara ilooning'isho too mbaa pooki." 
2Corinthians2:10 Ore pooki ng'ae lipalakiki embae ake pooki, natapalaka sii nanu. Amu ore olatapalaka, te naa kaata enatapalaka, nataasa ina te nkaraki intae te dukuya Kristo." 
2Corinthians2:11 Eikiyiolo ilosekin le Sheitani nimikiyieu neidimu iyiook. 
2Corinthians2:12 Ore apa pee alotu Troas alikioo Lomon Supati le Kristo, kaabolokino tukul kutukaji maisiaayia Olaitoriani;" 
2Corinthians2:13 kake aatanyamala oltau lai amu eitu atum olalashe lai Tito; neaku atung'uayie ninche nalo Makedonia. 
2Corinthians2:14 Kake ashe te Nkai, narik iyiook maisula anaa ake te Kristo, neasishore iyiook maibulunye eyiolounoto e Kristo pooki wueji anaa esonkoyo narropil." 
2Corinthians2:15 Eikira doi iyiook erropili e Kristo te Nkai tiatua lelo oitajeuni o tiatua lelo oopuo erruorroto," 
2Corinthians2:16 ore ena rropili naa enkishui te lelo ooitajeuni, naa keeya te lelo ooye. Aing'ae doi ilo obaya te kuna pooki?" 
2Corinthians2:17 Mikitiu iyiook anaa kulikae kumok oopuo aaitaa olkilikuai le Nkai anaa nkutiti baa nemeeta tipat; eikiro iyiook anaa ltung'ana oojo mbaa naasipa, naa Enkai nairriwua, naa te dukuya Enkai kiro, anaa ltung'ana ootii atua Kristo." 
2Corinthians3:1 Ketaa ate kiingil aaiteru aaisis? Eikiaatayie iyiook tipat anaa enaatayie kulikae, tipat impala naarrepakinyieki iyiook intae aashu nirrepiepie intae iyiook?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Intae maate empalai e rrepet ang, naigero too ltauja linyi pee eyiolouni neisum ltung'ana pooki." 
2Corinthians3:3 Keibala nchere irara intae empalai naing'uaa Kristo, naa iyiook ooitarasutua neme olng'eriantus eigerore kake Enkiyang'et e Nkai naishu, neme too soito eigero kake too ltauja loo ltung'ana." 
2Corinthians3:4 Te Kristo kidup iyiook aatejo nejia tialo Enkai. 
2Corinthians3:5 Ore tiatua ate nimikiaata toki. Nimikijo atua iyiook maate eing'uaa ae toki. Enkai eing'uaa enkidimata ang," 
2Corinthians3:6 naa ninye oishoo iyiook inaaidip nkolati ang pooki, ina kata pee eitaa iyiook ilaisiaayiak lo sotua ng'ejuk neme too nkitanapat ake naasira kake te nkiyang'et; amu keeya eyau nena kitanapat naasira, kake keyau Enkiyang'et enkishui." 
2Corinthians3:7 Ore enkishorunoto e nena kitanapat, naaigeroki too sirat lo soit, naa keeya eiting'oko. Kake ore ake eyia neewuo te nkitoo e nking'asia o metaa meitieu Isiraeli aaing'ura enkomom e Musa te nkaraki ewang'an enye, hoo naa enaishari apake." 
2Corinthians3:8 Kebaa elusoo naa enkitoo nalotu te nkishorunoto e Nkiyang'et? 
2Corinthians3:9 Naa amaa te neiriamunore enkitoo naba nejia enkishorunoto oo nkitanapat naayau endung'okinoto e nkiguana, kebaa naa elusoo enkitoo e nkishorunoto e ina Kiyang'et naitaa iyiook ilooata enkitoo," 
2Corinthians3:10 Metaa, ore eina naata apa enkitoo, neewuo aaku meeta enkitoo tukul, te nkaraki ina kitoo nalus teina." 
2Corinthians3:11 Amu te neeta apa ina naishunye enkitoo enye, kebaa naa elusoo oleng enkitoo e ina nabik intarasi?" 
2Corinthians3:12 Ore te nkaraki nikiata ele siligi lang, eikiro mikiata olng'ash." 
2Corinthians3:13 Mikitiu anaa Musa, oimulumul apa enkomom pee meduaaya Isiraeli eishari ina wang'an." 
2Corinthians3:14 Eitagoloki apa lukuny enye; amu ore o taata, eton ake eitu eiwuang'ieki ina kimulumulata te neisumi Lkigerot lo sotua musana. Tiatua Kristo ake eiwuang'ieki." 
2Corinthians3:15 Ee, ore o taata, te neisumi mbukui e Musa, netiu anaa keimulumula lukuny e lelo ooinining;" 
2Corinthians3:16 Ena ejo ilkigerot tialo Musa: “Ore ake pee eibelekenyakino oltung'ani Olaitoriani neiwuang'ieki ina kimulumulata.” 
2Corinthians3:17 Ore Olaitoriani naa ninye Enkiyang'et, ore pooki wueji netii Enkiyang'et o Laitoriani, netii elakunoto." 
2Corinthians3:18 Ore iyiook pooki, nikitaa ilemeimulamula inkomomi, nikiwariwaru anaa kiok teina kishiaa o Laitoriani, eibelekenyitai iyiook matotiu anaa ninye eponari ake ina kitoo. Enkias o Laitoriani ena, naa Enkiyang'et ninye." 
2Corinthians4:1 Neaku, ore anaa ina naisho iyiook Enkai ena kisiaaiyiare to lng'ur lenye, mikidukenya iyiook." 
2Corinthians4:2 Kitejo mikiyieu inkiaasin pooki e nkurruna o nemeeta enkanyit; nikinchu mikiaata ilosekin torrok. Nimikikordil ororei le Nkai kake esipata kiyau enewang pee kirrep ate to ltoilo lo ltau le pooki ng'ae, anaa loodolita Enkai." 
2Corinthians4:3 Amu te naa keimulumularo Lomon lang Supati, naa te lelo ake oopuo enkiminata eimulumularo." 
2Corinthians4:4 Ore enkai ena kop naa ninye naitamodoo nkonyek e kulo lemeiruk, pee medol ewang'an oo Lomon Supati le nkitoo e Kristo, laa ninye nyaanyukie e Nkai." 
2Corinthians4:5 Mme ate kilikioo iyiook; Kristo Yesu kilikioo aajo Olaitoriani, nikira iyiook isinkan linyi, te nkaraki Yesu." 
2Corinthians4:6 Amu ina Ai natejo, “Inchoo metawang'a ewang'an te naimin,” ninye natawang'a tiatua iltauja lang, ayaki iyiook ewang'an e yiolounoto e nkitoo e Nkai te nkomom e Kristo." 
2Corinthians4:7 Kake aikiaata iyiook ele shumati tiatua imasaa oo nkulupuok pee eliooyu nchere ore ina golon magilani naa Enkai eing'uaa, mme atua iyiook maate." 
2Corinthians4:8 Eironyitai iyiook te pooki oitoi, kake eitu epurdi iyiook, neimagitae iyiook kake eitu kipalari; nenang'ieki iyiook enkop, nebatati iyiook kake eitu sii emuti," 
2Corinthians4:9 neinosieki iyiook osina kake eitu sii eiturrarri iyiook. 
2Corinthians4:10 Kinapita anaa ake too seseni lang keeya e Yesu, pee eitoduaari enkishui e Yesu tiatua iseseni lang." 
2Corinthians4:11 Amu ore iyiook, hoo nikinchu keishoori ake iyiook pooki kata aaisho keeya te nkaraki Yesu, peyie eitoduaari sii enkishui e Yesu te kulo seseni lang ooye kenya ake." 
2Corinthians4:12 Neaku keasisho ake keeya tiatua iyiook, kake enkishui naasisho tiatua intae." 
2Corinthians4:13 Kake kiaata enkirukoto anaa enajo Ilkigerot inchere, “Enkirukoto apa aata, pee airoro.” Ina kiyang'et ake e nkirukoto kiaata sii iyiook, naa ina sii iyiook pee kiro;" 
2Corinthians4:14 amu aikiyiolo aajo ore ilo oitopiwuo Olaitoriani Yesu keitopiu sii ninche yiook te nebo Yesu neyau iyiook te nebo intae maetu enetii ninye. 
2Corinthians4:15 Naa te nkaraki intae pee etiu kuna pooki. Paa ore anaa enaponari empiris e Nkai too ltung'ana kumok o kulikae ake, neponaa enkishooroto e nashe te nkitoo e Nkai." 
2Corinthians4:16 Te nkaraki e na pee mikidukenya. Ore hoo naa kemusanu ake ele tung'ani li oriong amuta, kake ore ilo tung'ani lang li atua neitang'ejuki nkolong'i pooki." 
2Corinthians4:17 Ole nkiti kata ake osina lang, kake eyaki iyiook enkitoo kitok oo ntarasi nemeetae ae toki natemakini," 
2Corinthians4:18 amu mme kuna naalioo king'orita kake nena nemelioo. Ore kuna naalioo naa ine nkiti kata; ore nena nemelioo naa inoo ntarasi. 
2Corinthians5:1 Amu aikiyiolo aajo te neidaikieki ele ng'obor te nkop likimanya nikiaata emanyisho naing'uaa Enkai, enkaji neme too nkaik eitobiraki, nabikoo te keper ntarasi." 
2Corinthians5:2 Ore doi kitii ele ng'obor eikiinchir kiyieu erripoto e ina ang e keper," 
2Corinthians5:3 paa ore eitoipito iyiook ina nemeinepuni iyiook mikinchopo. 
2Corinthians5:4 Amu ore kitii ele ng'obor, nikinchirita tele ola lang. Mikiyieu nikinturraa osesen le nkop, kake kiyieu nikitum erripoto e ilo ng'ejuk, paa ore ilo oye neijori te nkishui." 
2Corinthians5:5 Ore ilo oitobiraka iyiook ena toki naa Enkai, laa ninye oishoo iyiook Enkiyang'et anaa enkitisipata." 
2Corinthians5:6 Ore te nkaraki ina eikintieusho iyiook oshi ake, amu aikiyiolo aajo ore eton kitii ang tele sesen, nikilamita Olaitoriani." 
2Corinthians5:7 Enkirukoto kipuoyie, neme enduaata." 
2Corinthians5:8 Eikintieusho iyiook, naa aikiyieu naaji naa eikipuo aing'uaa ele sesen pee kitii ang te nebo Olaitoriani." 
2Corinthians5:9 Metaa ti nikitii ena ang, aashu ti nikitii idia, Enkai kiyieu nikintiship oleng." 
2Corinthians5:10 Amu eikintashe ake pooki te dukuya olorika le Kristo le nkiguana, neng'amu pooki ng'ae inaairirikino nena naataasa to sesen aa supati aashu aa torrok." 
2Corinthians5:11 Ore naa, aikiyiolo euriata o Laitoriani, nikiyietu iltung'ana, keyiolo Enkai iyiook tukul enikinkununo, naisilig ajo iyiololo sii intae enikinkununo." 
2Corinthians5:12 Mme taa ate kintoki aaisisaki intae, intae doi kincho erishata entawuasare iyiook, nitumutumu eniwalikiki lelo oowuasare enkitoo o ltung'ani, neme enatiu oltau lenye." 
2Corinthians5:13 Te naa koloirirua kiaata iyiook naa te nkaraki Enkai naa tenelulung'a iyiook ilukuny naa te nkaraki intae. 
2Corinthians5:14 Amu enyorrata e Kristo naitore iyiook. Ena bae kinting'okito iyiook nchere: etua ilo obo te nkaraki pooki ng'ae; ore te nkaraki ina etuata pooki. 
2Corinthians5:15 Etua ninye te nkaraki pooki, paa ore lelo ooishu nemeishu te nkaraki ate ake kake te nkaraki ilo otua nenyaakaki aaitopiu te nkaraki ninche." 
2Corinthians5:16 Ore naa ebaiki ena kata neito dukuya, nimikishilaa iyiook oltung'ani, te mpukunoto e tung'anisho, hoo nikitishilaitie apa Kristo te mpukunoto e tung'anisho, meekure iyiook kishilaa ninye aaiko nejia," 
2Corinthians5:17 neaku te netii oltung'ani atua Kristo, netaa enkitayunoto ng'ejuk, etulusoyie enapa musana, nelotu eng'ejuk." 
2Corinthians5:18 Enkai eing'uaa nena pooki, naa ninye oitoning'o iyiook o kewan te Kristo neisho iyiook esiaai maitoning'o ilkulikae," 
2Corinthians5:19 aa taa, Enkai apa tiatua Kristo naitoning'o enkop o kewan enye. Meshum ninye nemeikenaki iltung'ana nkitadiaat enye, kake eisiliga iyiook aisho olkilikuai oning'oreki ninye." 
2Corinthians5:20 Neaku kira ilbalusuni le Kristo, Enkai makewan, nairriwua iyiook matasai intae. Kitasayia intae te Kristo entoning'ore Enkai." 
2Corinthians5:21 Meeta apa Kristo ing'ok. Kake eitaa Enkai ninye eng'oki te rishata ang iyiook, paa te ninye king'ar esupatisho e Nkai." 
2Corinthians6:1 Ore kira ilaisiaayiak te nebo o Nkai, kisai intae eming'amaa empiris e Nkai pesho;" 
2Corinthians6:2 amu ejo ninye, “Ore te nkata namunyak aatoning'o nanu iyie; ore te nkolong e njeunoto naatareto nanu iyie.” Ng'ura, Taata ina kata namunyak; taata ina olong e njeunoto." 
2Corinthians6:3 Mikiaata iyiook olkob likipikaki hoo likae tung'ani, pee metumi ake olopik esiaai ang entiyoto." 
2Corinthians6:4 Kira ilaisiaayiak le Nkai ooitobiraa ate to mbaa pooki etiu enatiu: niking'iri tiatua enkinyala, too ngolikinot o too nkirrikinot," 
2Corinthians6:5 o too ooshot o too o larrabali tiatua olorere, too nkiaasin naagol, nikitoni o mekenyu, nikiaata esumash." 
2Corinthians6:6 Ore mikiaata ntiyot, naa eikiaata eyiolounoto, o eng'iriata o lng'ur; te Nkiyang'et Sinyati, o te nyorrata." 
2Corinthians6:7 Kilikioo esipata te ngolon e Nkai; too masaa e supatisho te tatene o te kedianye," 
2Corinthians6:8 eyanyiti iyiook o meyanyiti; einorri iyiook o meinorri. Keitaai iyiook ilalejak, kake kira asipak;" 
2Corinthians6:9 netiu anaa aimeyioloi iyiook neyioloi sii oleng; kiye, nikitiu anaa looena, naa eikinchu iyiook, kake eitu eari iyiook matuata;" 
2Corinthians6:10 neinyalitai iyiook, niking'ida anaa ake; kira aisinak, kake kintaa iyiook ilkumok karsisi; kitiu anaa ilemeeta toki hoo nikiaata pooki toki." 
2Corinthians6:11 Lo Korinto, eikirorie intae aabaraki, newang iltauja lang naleng;" 
2Corinthians6:12 mikijo maibooi intae, intae ooning nimbooyoyo ate." 
2Corinthians6:13 Entawang'a sii taata ltauja linyi. Airorie intae anaa olpayian oirorie inkera enyena. 
2Corinthians6:14 Emishulare aaku nabo o lelo lemeiruk. Ai ti aji eshula supati o ntorrok? Kaa shula eeta ewang'an o enaimin? 
2Corinthians6:15 Kening'o aekata Kristo o Belial? Kainyoo eng'ar oloiruko o leitu eiruk? 
2Corinthians6:16 Kainyoo eng'arie enkaji e Nkai enoo nkitanyaanyukot naaitaai inkaitin? Amu kira iyiook enkaji e Nkai naishu. Anaa enatejo Enkai, “Kamany atua ninche nairiamariyie ninche; naaku Enkai enye, neaku ninche iltung'ana laainei." 
2Corinthians6:17 Ore te nkaraki ina, entupuku tiatua ninche, entoorunye entung'uai ninche, Olaitoriani ojo. Emiseyie entoki naiduruk, naa kang'amu nanu intae," 
2Corinthians6:18 naaku nanu Papa linyi niaakuku intae ilayiok o ntoyie aainei, Olaitoriani Magilani ojo.”" 
2Corinthians7:1 Ore te nkaraki nikiaata iyiook kuna kisiligat, ilanyor laainei, emaitukuoi enkiduruk pooki o sesen aashu ene nkiyang'et, nikintabaya esinyatisho te uriata e Nkai." 
2Corinthians7:2 Enchoo iyiook erishata tiatua ltauja linyi. Mikiata iyiook olikintaasa enemesipa, nimikiata olikiminie, nimikiata olikimaga." 
2Corinthians7:3 Nemajo nejia aa intae adung'oki enkiguana; aidipa atiaaki intae nchere eikinyor intae enaa eikiyieu ake niking'arie intae embae pooki nalotu, nara keeya aashu puaan." 
2Corinthians7:4 Kaitieu nanu airorie intae; ekawuasare intae. Kaabore enkilejilejata; ore too sinaitin lang pooki kaadooyo nanu eng'ida. 
2Corinthians7:5 Ekesipa nchere ore pee kipuonu Makedonia neitu eishori iyiook mayagie. Kinoto osina too nkaloli pooki: kitaarate iyiook o lkulikae nikiata sii enkuretisho too ltauja. 
2Corinthians7:6 Kake ore Enkai, naa ninye naitagol ilooata osina, neitagol iyiook te mbaunoto e Tito;" 
2Corinthians7:7 neme te mbaunoto enye ake, kake o te nkitagolo nanoto tiatua intae. Etolikio iyiook ina niyieuu intae naleng nidolidolo, neliki iyiook olkiyioi linyi, nitaa intae ilaamitu nanu. Ina bae naaitishipa oleng." 
2Corinthians7:8 Amu tenaa kaitamio intae te mpalai ai, nemairridu (hoo naainosua) amu adol ajo eitamio intae ina palai, hoo te naa te nkiti rishata ake." 
2Corinthians7:9 Kashipa taata, neme te nkaraki naitamio intae, kake te nkaraki nayawua enkilishoto inyi enkirridunoto, iwaita ina mion inyi anaa enayieu apa Enkai, neaku meetae hoo enatalang'a intae neitu itumutumu te nkaraki iyiook." 
2Corinthians7:10 Ore emion nainyiaaya oltung'ani enkalo nanyor Enkai naa keyau enkirridunoto nabaiki enjeunoto nemeitoki aata enkusaka, kake ore emion e nkop keeya eyau." 
2Corinthians7:11 Eng'ura enaba enayaka intae ena sipata niwaita ina mion to rrekie onyor Enkai: eng'ura entejo kebaa enkisosion, kebaa eyieunoto niyieuu nimbalielie sipat inyi; kebaa engoro, kebaa enkuretisho, kebaa yieuna, kebaa enyuaata, kebaa enkitamioto! Ore too nkoitoi pooki nintoduaaitie intae nchere miatata entiyoto teina bae." 
2Corinthians7:12 Neaku taa, ore hoo naigeroko nanu intae, eitu aigeroki intae te nkaraki ilo oinyalishe, neme sii te nkaraki ilo oinyalaki, kake te nkaraki pee aitodol intae te dukuya Enkai nchere irowuarere ijing'ijing'i enkalo ang." 
2Corinthians7:13 Te nkaraki ena pee eitagoloki iltauja lang. Neme ilkulalang ake eilejilejaki kake eikiting'idate naleng te nchipai e Tito. Iyeng'iyeng'ie intae pooki indamunot enyena. 
2Corinthians7:14 Tenaa taa oshi katawuasare nanu intae te Tito, eitu kintukurrurru intae nanu. Mikiaata ai nikitejo te dukuya Tito neitu esipayu." 
2Corinthians7:15 Enyaaka aponari enyorrata nanyor ninye intae to ltau lenye te nedamu ina nitoning'o intae ninye, nintoomono intae ninye te uriata sapuk o lokirikiri." 
2Corinthians7:16 Kang'ida nanu oleng amu kaidim aisiliga intae katukul. 
2Corinthians8:1 Eikiyieu niyiolouu intae ilalashera o nkanashera, enataasa empiris e Nkai naishooki isirito e Makedonia." 
2Corinthians8:2 Etetemaki naleng to sina, kake ore tiatua nena pooki nedooyo eng'ida enye, naa ore hoo naa aisinak naleng, neitulusoitie eleng'on te nkishooroto enye." 
2Corinthians8:3 Amu kaidim nanu atiaaki intae nchere eishorutua inaairirikino nena naata neitoki aaitogiroo ine. Ore te yieunoto enye maate," 
2Corinthians8:4 eitirrishakita iyiook naleng eyieu neishori metang'ara eretoto nareti iltung'ana le Nkai. 
2Corinthians8:5 Netogiroitie kuna pooki enikinteiki apa iyiook, amu ate etang'asa aaisho Olaitoriani paa keitoki taa, te yieunoto e Nkai, aaisho iyiook." 
2Corinthians8:6 Ina pee kitiaakita Tito meitabai enkitobirunoto e na kishooroto tiatua intae; aa ninye apake oitasheikio te nkiterunoto. 
2Corinthians8:7 Ore anaa enituluso te pooki toki: tiatua enkirukoto, tiatua ororei, tiatua eyiolounoto, tiatua enyuaata pooki o tiatua enyorrata inyi te iyiook; entoduaai inchere ilusoo sii tena siaai e mpiris." 
2Corinthians8:8 Majo ena te nkaraki intae. Kajo pee aitisip te nkirowuaj e kulikae inchere kedede sii ninye enyorrata inyi. 
2Corinthians8:9 Iyiololo empiris o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo. Iyiololo eneba enkarsisisho enye! Kake etaa aisinani te nkaraki intae, peyie iakuku intae karsisi te nkaraki aisinanisho enye." 
2Corinthians8:10 Neaku kaliki intae enajo nanu teina bae. Ore te elde ari oishari naa intae ooitera aayieu niretishosho naa intae sii ooitera aaiko nejia. 
2Corinthians8:11 Keishiaakino naa taata nindipidipi ina apa ninterutua. Iyieuu apa oleng niretishosho ina kata, neaku entabai naa eririki anaa e niaatata." 
2Corinthians8:12 Te nesipa keyieu oltung'ani neishooyo, nemejoki Enkai ninye meishooi entoki nemeeta, kake keng'amu ina naata eishorua." 
2Corinthians8:13 Eitu ajo meiteneneng'i ilolan le kulikae neponari olinyi. Enchoo easi anaa nkiririkinot. 
2Corinthians8:14 Ore taata, dupoto inyi naret ilaikin enye; nerisioroyu nkaloli pooki ina kata." 
2Corinthians8:15 Anaa enejo lkigerot, “Ore ilo otasotuo esapuk neitu etum enalusoo, ore olotasotuo enkiti neitu eing'atiki.”" 
2Corinthians8:16 Kake ashe te Nkai naishoo Tito enyuaata metaa keyieu neret intae anaa enikitiu iyiook. 
2Corinthians8:17 Iyiook apa ootiaakita meeu enitii nenyorraa, kake keyieu apake ninye openy nelotu abaiki intae." 
2Corinthians8:18 Kirriu taata te nebo ninye likae alashe oning'o too sirito pooki te siaai e likioroto oo Lomon Supati. 
2Corinthians8:19 Neme doi ina ake, ketegelutua isirito ninye meisiritore iyiook neaku ninye oya ena kishooroto nikiramatita te nkaraki enkitoo o Laitoriani kewan, neitoduaaya sii enyuaata ang maate." 
2Corinthians8:20 Kinyokita pee metumi ake entiyoto naipotokini iyiook likae te ramatata e na kishorunoto e leng'on. 
2Corinthians8:21 Eikiiyieu nikias isupati neme te dukuya Olaitoriani ake, kake o te dukuya iltung'ana sii." 
2Corinthians8:22 Nikirriwaa te nebo ninche likae ake alashe lang likitetema enkirowuaj enye nkatitin kumok too nkoitoi kumok, naa ninye taata oirowua oleng te nkaraki enkisiligata kitok naata tiatua intae." 
2Corinthians8:23 Ore apa Tito naa ole ncholiek ai naa olaisiaayiani te nebo nanu te nkaraki intae, ore tialo kulo alashera lang, kipaareta loo sirito, neisisi Kristo te nkaraki ninche." 
2Corinthians8:24 Entoduaai naa enyorrata inyi o ina nikiwuasare intae te kulo tung'ana, pee edol isirito." 
2Corinthians9:1 Ore tialo ena siaai naitaasi isinyat neme nanu oigeroki intae. 
2Corinthians9:2 Kayiolo eneba eyieunoto niyieuu niretirete, kawuasare oshi aimaki intae too Lmakedonia, naliki ajoki eidipa apa Akaia esotore e pooki toki telde ari oishari. Enyuaata inyi nairowuajie ilkumok lenye." 
2Corinthians9:3 Kake kairriu ilalashera pee aitadedeyie nchere ore nena pooki nikiimakita te intae te na bae neibalieki nchere kesipa anaa enatejo nejia itiuu. Kayieu nelulung'a nkishoorot inyi pooki anaa ina natejo nanu indipa aaitabai," 
2Corinthians9:4 Pee meaku ake te nairiamunore kulikae le Makedonia nikinepu intae eitu ianyishosho, neme iyiook ake ookurru kake nejia itiuu sii intae, etaa kitawuasare intae oleng." 
2Corinthians9:5 Ina pee atoduaa ajo keishiaakino ake nairriu ilalashera meituruku aapuonu enitii te dukuya neitobir ina kishooroto nitejo inchoruru. Naa te neetuo eirrag, eidipe neitoduaaya ina nchere intae maate ootonyorra aaishoru, nemetii olmonir." 
2Corinthians9:6 Entadamu ena nchere, ore ilo oun te nkutisho nesotu te nkutisho, ore ilo oun te nkumoi nesotu sii te nkumoi." 
2Corinthians9:7 Tumuta pooki tung'ani too ndamunot inono tayiolo entoki ninchooyo inyor metii olng'ash; ilo oishoru te nchipai enyor Enkai. 
2Corinthians9:8 Keidim Enkai aishoo intae inoo nkolati inyi neitulusoo, pee itumutumu aataret esiaai pooki supat te nkaraki niaatata anaake inaaidip intae te pooki toki." 
2Corinthians9:9 Anaa enajo Lkigerot, “Eidapashaka pesho, eishoo laisinak, nebik esupatisho enye ntarasi.”"
