2Corinthians9:10 Ore ilo oisho olaunoni ilanterera, neisho emukate olonya, ninye oisho intae ilanterera neitubul; ninye oponaa esotore e leng'on inyi." 
2Corinthians9:11 Ninye oitaa intae karsisi oleng pee itumutumu aataleng too nkoitoi pooki, nedumaki ina lkulikae meishoo Enkai enchunet too nikitaasa iyiook." 
2Corinthians9:12 Amu ore ena siaai nikiasita mme ltung'ana le Nkai ake eretito; kelusoo sii te nashe nashukokini Enkai eing'uaa ltung'ana kumok. 
2Corinthians9:13 Ore ena siaai e nkisiaayiare naa ninye naitadedeyie enkirukoto inyi, neisis ninche Enkai teina; amu mme ororei supat le Kristo ake ilimumu kake itoning'o sii ing'aring'ara pooki niaatata te leng'on inyi te ninche o too lkulikae pooki." 
2Corinthians9:14 Ore te nkomono enye, neyooki ninche aadol enking'asia e supatisho e Nkai te nkishorunoto enye, nemeinosunoyu." 
2Corinthians9:15 Ashe te Nkai te nkishorunoto enye nemeimakinoyu! 
2Corinthians10:1 Nanu Paulo taata osai intae te nkaripo o te mborron e Kristo kewan, nanu oloshi obor enotote nkomomi kake neitieu intae enoshi kata mitii." 
2Corinthians10:2 Kaomon intae, te nalotu enitii pee meaku kaitodolu empijan natiu anaa enoshi naidim aitoduaa lelo oojo mbaa e nkop naadumu iyiook mataasisho." 
2Corinthians10:3 Ore hoo naa enkop kitii kinchu, mme mi." 
2Corinthians10:4 Ore imasaa nikiarare neme ake imasaa o larrabal; kake keeta nkunaang enkidimata e Enkai, enaa keparripar isempewueti." 
2Corinthians10:5 Eikiparripar iyiook enchankar oo monko; o pooki toki naitashe to lwuasa aibooyo eyiolounoto e Nkai; nikimbung aaen nkibirribirrat ake pooki metoning'o Kristo; 
2Corinthians10:6 naa ore pee eaku italaari aaishoru ate katukul, nikiterretenate pee kintame enkiaas pooki e ilo lemening'isho." 
2Corinthians10:7 Eng'ura nena baa naatii dukuya nkonyek inyi. Ketayiolo oltung'ani tukul ajo ole Kristo? Aisidai, kake enchoo ilo menyaaki aikenaa ena ae bae nchere: kira sii iyiook ile Kristo anaa pee era ninye." 
2Corinthians10:8 Ore te naa kanya naaji kutuk oleng awuasare enkidimata ai, naa Olaitoriani laaisho pee ashetunyie intae, neme pee aar intae, nemakurru sii aasishore ina kidimata." 
2Corinthians10:9 Emijo ake eji intae atem ajo aiture too mpala. 
2Corinthians10:10 Amu ejo ninche, “Keiroishi mpala e Paulo negol, kake te ning'or ninye, mijo hoo toki naa ore te neiro neme hoo nyoo ninye.”" 
2Corinthians10:11 Enchoo olojo nejia eyiolou nchere ore ina nitoduaa too mpala aainei alakuaniki intae, keyooki aasa atabawua ine nitii." 
2Corinthians10:12 Mme naaji emikiintieu iyiook aaitorisioki aashu kintanyaanyukie ate likae le lelo ooipang'u taata eisis ate, kake ore iltung'ana laa ate etemie ilkulikae, naa nkiasin enye eitorisioki ate, neidang'a oleng." 
2Corinthians10:13 Kake mikiwuasa iyiook aaitulus inaairirikino iyiook amu eidipa Enkai makewan aishoru nena kiririkinot, nebaiki sii intae." 
2Corinthians10:14 Iyiook ooiterutua aapuonu enitii kiyaki intae lelo Omon Supati le Kristo eton eitu hoo ebau likae, metaa ti nikiwuasare intae neitu taata kintogiroo nkiririkinot ang." 
2Corinthians10:15 Neme iyiook oopuo aagiroo nena kiririkinot kiwuasare enaa kulikae ootaasa kake kisilig nchere ore nkiririkinot ang naa pee eponari enkirukoto inyi, neponari murruna ang tiatua intae." 
2Corinthians10:16 Nikitumoki ina kata aatolikioi kulo Omon Supati too nkuapi naatii teidia alo intae, nemeitokini aata enalejishoi aajo kitawuasare iyiook esiaai naa kulikae ootaasa te wueji enye." 
2Corinthians10:17 “Te neyieu oltung'ani newuasa nchoo eaku Olaitoriani ewuasare.” 
2Corinthians10:18 Errepet o Laitoriani ake naata tipat, ene pesho errepet o ltung'ani makewan." 
2Corinthians11:1 Enting'iria peno emodai ai, aomon ntae enting'iria." 
2Corinthians11:2 Kalom nanu intae to lom le Nkai kewan. Aishoo intae Kristo anaa entito naishoori meyiolo likae lee, naishoo intae ninye metaa ninye ake openy olpayian linyi." 
2Corinthians11:3 Kake osunkuroi apake Sheitani oteleja Hawa, naure ake pee meinyali ndamunot inyi neaku mirukurukorere Kristo te nyorrata naitoriori nemetii eleyiata." 
2Corinthians11:4 Amaa te nelotu likae aliki intae likae Yesu leme olikitolikitio intae aashu ti nitang'amutua ae kiyang'et neme enapa nitang'amutua, keitu pasa doi eaku itasiokito aang'amu?" 
2Corinthians11:5 Kajo nanu madou hoo ti ae bae ake pooki te lelo kipaareta lijojo eikituaak oleng. 
2Corinthians11:6 Ebaiki nemara arriyia to rorei, kake kajo sii kayiolo naaba anaa naayiolo likae ake pooki. Kimbalakinye intae ina bae too nkoitoi pooki o too ntokitin pooki." 
2Corinthians11:7 Atolikio intae Ilomon Supati neitu aitalak intae hoo toki. Aiturukie intae hoo naisiadunye kewan. Keng'oki apa ina? 
2Corinthians11:8 Atang'amayie eretoto e kulie sirito, naasishore nena pisai aisiaai intae. Ke mpurrorre ina?" 
2Corinthians11:9 Ore apa atii atua intae naata nkolati, neitu aitaa kewan olola le likae, amu ore pee ebau ilalashera ooing'uaa Makedonia naaiputakita nkolati aainei neitulusoo. Aing'ura oleng pee maaku hoo olola te intae ti ae oitoi ake pooki, naa nejia eton aikunita o te ne." 
2Corinthians11:10 Ore anaa enatii esipata e Kristo atua nanu, meetae entoki hoo naamitiki awuasare ina tiatua Akaia." 
2Corinthians11:11 Aainyoo? Ke nkaraki nemanyor intae? Keyiolo Enkai ajo kanyor intae. 
2Corinthians11:12 Kake kalotoo ake aasita ena naasita taata, pee maisho erishata lelo ooyieu ina rishata naitoduaarie ate tenaa kerisiore esiaai naishooki ninche enaang." 
2Corinthians11:13 Ore iltung'ana laaijo lelo naa lkipaareta le lejare, ilaisiaayiak oolejisho, ooitaakuno lkipaareta le Kristo." 
2Corinthians11:14 Neme enking'asia ina amu keitaakuno ninye Sheitani kolmalaika le wang'an. 
2Corinthians11:15 Neme enking'asia naa, te neitaakuno isinkan lenyena eitaa ate isinkan le supatisho; keyooki aaiting'oki enaishiaakino nena naataasa ninche." 
2Corinthians11:16 Kaitoki ake ajo, emincho ake ejo likae kamoda, naa ti nijojo intae kamoda entang'amayioki atiu nejia pee awuasa sii nanu penyo." 
2Corinthians11:17 Ore kuna nawuasare taata neme inkirorot Olaitoriani kake emodai ake abaraki. 
2Corinthians11:18 Kenya iltung'ana kumok kutukie too mbaa enye e nkishon; kainyoo naa pee manya sii nanu kutuk? 
2Corinthians11:19 Ijo ming'idada aa ing'iriri ilmoda! Ijo mirara pasa intae ng'eni maate! 
2Corinthians11:20 Ing'iriri te neitaa intae likae irrindiki, nedaare intae likae, nenya likae intae anaa olowuaru, nemenu intae likae, nedam likae intae inkomomi." 
2Corinthians11:21 Atonyorrayie nanu te nkurruna nchere atashala oshi. Kake te neetae oloyieu nenya kutuk ti ai toki (kairorita taa doi anaa olmodai), kaidim sii nanu ainosa kutuk." 
2Corinthians11:22 Ae Lbrania ninche? Kara sii nanu. Ae Siraeli ninche, kara sii nanu. Ae le ishoi e Abraham ninche, kara sii nanu" 
2Corinthians11:23 ae laisiaayiak le Kristo ninche, nanu olusoo airorita anaa oloata oloirirua? Ateeke nanu te siaai nagol, te eenata te jila, te earata oo nkeenta o te batisho e keeya nalang enayiolo ninche." 
2Corinthians11:24 Katitin imiet aatipika Ilyahudi noshi oshot tomoni uni o naaudo; 
2Corinthians11:25 katitin uni aatooshoki too nkeenta oo sekenke; aairruyaki kata nabo too soito, katitin uni eimiso emeli atii; aawa enkewarie nalulung'a o enkolong nabo tiatua enaiposha." 
2Corinthians11:26 Ore too lotot aainei nemayeng'iyeng'a, nanoto batisho too lkejek, batisho too laisimak, batisho to lorere lang, batisho too ltung'ana loo Loreren, batisho tiatua enkanasa, batisho ti ong'ata, batisho tiatua enaiposha, batisho tiatua lelo ooitaakuno ilalashera." 
2Corinthians11:27 Ateeke natamio too ngolikinot. Kumok inkatitin natala njio, nalo aata esumash o enkure nkatitin kumok maata endaa nanya, naanya enkijape nkatitin kumok maadupa nkilani." 
2Corinthians11:28 Ore metii nena kulie pooki, naata olola laainaur anaake anyamaliki sirito pooki." 
2Corinthians11:29 Aing'ae oshal paa nanu lemeshal? Eimang'arie sii nanu ina shalan enye? Amaa te nebatata likae, eimaanya osina?" 
2Corinthians11:30 Te naa kanya ake kutuk, nanya too mbaa naaipirta enchalan ai." 
2Corinthians11:31 Enkai naa Papa lo Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo, laa ninye eisisi ntarasi, nayiolo ajo malejisho nanu." 
2Corinthians11:32 Ore te Dameski naa olbalosi otii ti abori Olaiguanani Aretas otorripo enkanasa e Dameski ejo pee aaibung nanu 
2Corinthians11:33 kake aaitadoyioki aaililioo te nkikapu aaimie elusie e suntai, nailany batisho." 
2Corinthians12:1 Kanya ake kutuk hoo naamakua, metaa kalimu taata nduaat o mbolunot naaing'uaa Olaitoriani." 
2Corinthians12:2 Kayiolo nanu oltung'ani tiatua Kristo, laa ore apa too larin tomon o ong'uan ooishari neilepieki aaya shumata e uni; naa te naa ei to sesen aashu metii osesen nemayiolo, Enkai nayiolo." 
2Corinthians12:3 Kayiolo ajo ore ilo tung'ani (te naa taa to sesen, aashu meeta osesen nemayiolo, Enkai nayiolo) eilepieki aaya Paradiso," 
2Corinthians12:4 nelo aning imbaa nemelimunoyu, nemeishoro oltung'ani meiroro." 
2Corinthians12:5 Kawuasare mbaa o ltung'ani laaijo ilo, kake ore tialo kewan ainanu nemanya kutuk, meteleku mbaa e nchalan ai." 
2Corinthians12:6 Ore hoo te naa kayieu nanya kutuk nemaaku olmodai, amu keaku isipat airo; kake mawuasa, amu ebaiki nejo likae kara kitok alang enaba, negiroo ina mbaa aainei naadolita ninye te nanu o nena naaning aa nanu eing'uaa." 
2Corinthians12:7 Naa ore pee majo ailepie kewan ajo kara kitok te nkaraki enkumoi oo mbaa naatabolokoki, aaishooki olkikuei to sesen lai, olkipaaret le Sheitani, oirriwuaki maatarasaki, pee maailepieki aaitulusoo oleng." 
2Corinthians12:8 Katitin uni atasayia Olaitoriani maatooru aya. 
2Corinthians12:9 Kake aatiaaka ninye, “Eikibaiki iyie empiris ai, amu te wueji neshal eitabari engolon ai katukul.” Neaku kang'idakino oleng awuasare enchalan ai, pee emany engolon e Kristo atua nanu." 
2Corinthians12:10 Te nkaraki ina pee ang'amu enchalan te ng'ida o enkinyala o ngolikinot o sinaitin o nyamalaritin te nkaraki Kristo, amu ore enkata nashal nanu, ina kata agol." 
2Corinthians12:11 Atomode! Intae likitaarakita neishiaakino naaji naa intae likirrepirrepe; amu eitu hoo adou ti ai bae te lelo kipaareta lijojo eikituaak oleng, hoo nemara nanu toki." 
2Corinthians12:12 Aitoduaa intae ilmonek lo lkipaaret osipa, too lmonek o mbaa e nking'asia o nkiaasin e ngolon." 
2Corinthians12:13 Kainyoo italaita naanoto nkulie sirito, ai neme ena, nchere eitu aaku olola te ntae? Entapalakaki ena kitadiaata!" 
2Corinthians12:14 Kayieu taata nalotu enitii te nkata e uni, nemaaku olola, amu mme doi masaa inyi ayieu kake intae ate. Mme nkera oshi naashumaki intoiwuo kake intoiwuo naashumaki inkera." 
2Corinthians12:15 Ore nanu, kaishooyo kewan naleng te ng'ida, naishorua kewan katukul maataasishoreki te nkaraki iltauja linyi. Amaa te naituluso enyorrata nanyor intae, keng'oru enyorrata naanyorri nanu?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Inyoraa naa aajo eitu aaku olola te intae. Ijojo pasa kataa osunkuroi opik intae olosek? 
2Corinthians12:17 Ketaa kaesek intae to ltung'ani obo lairriwaki intae? 
2Corinthians12:18 Nanu otiaaka Tito meeu nairriu olalashe obo meiriamunore. Ketudupore pasa intae Tito? Keitu kipuoyie iyiook ina Kiyang'et nabo, nikiimu orrekie obo?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Ijojo pasa kaate kirrepaa ena kata pooki? Ijo mme nejia naa ijojo? Itapong'ori! Te dukuya Enkai kirorita, tiatua Kristo. Pooki enikiyieu iyiook nikiaas, lo shoreta lang, eikiyieu nikishetu intae aaitubulu." 
2Corinthians12:20 Amu kaure ajo te nalotu, nalotu ainepu intae mitiuu anaa enayieu, nebaiki ninyorrikiki matiu nanu anaa eniyieuu intae. Kaure ajo keidim atupuku enchankar o lom o engoro o lorok o lmarenke o elejare o enking'oling'ol." 
2Corinthians12:21 Kaure ajo te nalotu naaigil Enkai ai aitukurru te dukuya intae neaku kaishiraki lelo ooidipa aataas intorrok neitu eirridu aapal ilduruki o ng'ok e loloito o ng'uarrat torrok naatamoo apa ninche. 
2Corinthians13:1 Enkata e uni ena alotu enitii. Ore anaa enajo Lkigerot, “Too nkutukie oo lchakenini aare aashu okuni edung'i enkiguana ake pooki.”" 
2Corinthians13:2 Ore enapa kata e are pee alotu enitii naikoo lelo apa ootaasa ntorrok, naikoo sii lkulikae pooki. Ore sii taata alamita intae naigil aikok intae; naa te naitoki taata alotu nemeekure aduaaya intae." 
2Corinthians13:3 Ena doi iyieuu naitadedeyie nchere Yesu oirorie intae tiatua nanu. Nemeshal taa ninye too nkiaasin naaitaas intae; keasisho engolon enye tiatua intae. 
2Corinthians13:4 Keshal apa ninye pee eshei, kake enyaaka engolon e Enkai aisho ninye enkishui. King'arie sii iyiook ninye ina shalan, kake engolon e Enkai naisho iyiook enkishui enye, pee kitumoki aaisiaaisho tiatua intae." 
2Corinthians13:5 Entujur ate te naa itii atua enkirukoto; entetem ate. Eimiyiololo aajo ketii Yesu Kristo atua intae? Naa te nemesipa, neturua intae enkirukoto." 
2Corinthians13:6 Kaisilig nanu ajo iyiolouu ake ninye aajo mikitii iyiook lelo ootabatatate. 
2Corinthians13:7 Kiomon Enkai pee miaasiasa ntorrok, neme pee eji kitudupote iyiook kake pee kias iyiook isupati, hoo naa kedol kulikae iyiook anaa keturua iyiook kias." 
2Corinthians13:8 Amu mikindim hoo iyiook aataas ae bae naarare esipata, kake enaipirare esipata kiaas." 
2Corinthians13:9 Eiking'ida iyiook ti nikishal igoligolo intae. Ore enatii, intae kiomonoki pee imputakinono." 
2Corinthians13:10 Ore pee aigerito nanu ena matii tenebo ntae, kajo paa te nabau nemaasishore enkidimata naata aitame intae. Olaitoriani laaishoo ena kidimata mateshetishore mme enaitarruorrie." 
2Corinthians13:11 Ore enabayie, lalashera laainei, naa enkitanapa: Entorioi inkoitoi inyi, entang'amu enkikoo ai, entoning'oto maate, entobikie eseriani; naa keaku Enkai e nyorrata o eseriani te nebo intae." 
2Corinthians13:12 Erorokinoto te ng'ututata nasinya. 
2Corinthians13:13 Eiroroki intae isinyat pooki. 
2Corinthians13:14 Metaa empiris o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo o enyorrata e Enkai o enchula e Nkiyang'et Sinyati, te nebo intae pooki." 
Galatians1:1 Paulo olkipaaret leme iltung'ana ooitaa neme ltung'ana eimua, kake Yesu Kristo eimua o Enkai Papa, oitopiwuo ninye aitung'uaa ilootuata" 
Galatians1:2 o kulo alashera ootii te nebo nanu, kirriwaki empalai e nkirorokino isirito pooki e Galatia." 
Galatians1:3 Meeu empiris o eseriani atua intae eing'uaa Enkai Papa o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo 
Galatians1:4 ilo oishorua kewan te nkaraki ng'ok ang pee esaru iyiook tena rishata torrono te risioroto e yieunoto e Nkai ang naa Papa. 
Galatians1:5 Metaa enenye enkitoo ntarasi o ntarasi. Eesai. 
Galatians1:6 Aing'asia nanu eji intae lelo oosioki aaing'uaa Ilo oipoto intae te mpiris e Kristo aaibelekenyakino kulikae omon oopaashari ooji supati. 
Galatians1:7 Meetae kulikae omon supati. Iltung'ana ooetuo aaliman intae eyieu neitapong'oo Lomon Supati le Kristo. 
Galatians1:8 Kake te naa doi naaji iyiook aashu olmalaika ooing'uaa keper olotu aaliki intae kulikae “Omon supati” leme lapa likitolikitio intae, enchoo ilo metaa kediaa." 
Galatians1:9 Kindipa apa aatejo naa kaitoki ake nanu ajo, te naa keetae oltung'ani olikioo kulikae “Omon supati” leme lapa litang'amutua, nchoo ilo metaa kediaa." 
Galatians1:10 Ketiu pasa ena anaa enkisisa oo ltung'ana aing'oru ana kene Nkai? Katiu pasa anaa ke ltung'ana ayieu naitiship? Te naa ltung'ana naaji ayieu naitiship, nemaitoki aaku olaisiaayiani le Kristo." 
Galatians1:11 Lalashera laainei o nkanashera kayieu niyiolouu nchere, ore lelo Omon Supati latolikio intae neme oltung'ani eing'uaa." 
Galatians1:12 Eitu ang'amu te likae tung'ani, neitu aautaki likae tung'ani. Yesu Kristo laataboloko makewan." 
Galatians1:13 Itoning'o intae empukunoto ai apa eton aa lkerreti loo lyahudi aishuyie. Iyiololo enaikuna ainosie osina esirit e Nkai maibooroyu aa kajo aidaikie. 
Galatians1:14 Niyiololo aajo ore te sujata oo lkerreti lang nanu oisul to lporror lang aitirrish inkoon oo loo papa. 
Galatians1:15 Kake Enkai naategelua apa eton maino naaipot te empiris enye. Neaku ore pee edutaa ninye 
Galatians1:16 ajo kaaboloki ilo Inoti lenye peyie atum atolikioi Lomon Supati tiatua Loreren, eitu aikilikuanishore likae tung'ani loo nkiri o sarge." 
Galatians1:17 Keitu doi ninye alo Yerusalem enetii lelo apa otaa ilkipaareta eitu aaku nanu. A'a, Arabia atang'asa alo naitoki ashukunye alotu Dameski." 
Galatians1:18 Ore etulusoitie ilarin okuni, nashomo Yerusalem peyie alo abaiki Kefa. Atobiko nkolong'i tomon o miet kiboita o ninye." 
Galatians1:19 Kake maata likae kipaaret laatoduaa meteleku Yakobo, olalashe Olaitoriani." 
Galatians1:20 Kanya olmumai ajo kesipa kulo rorei pooki laigerito malejisho te dukuya Enkai. 
Galatians1:21 Anyaaka alo ilkirinen le Siria o Kilikia. 
Galatians1:22 Kake ore te nena sirito e Kristo naatii Yudea, eton apa maayiolo ninche enkorrok ai." 
Galatians1:23 Ketoning'o ake eji, “Ore olapa tung'ani oinosie iyiook osina, nele taata olikioo enapa kirukoto natang'asa ajo aidaikie.”" 
Galatians1:24 Neisis ninche Enkai te nkaraki nanu. 
Galatians2:1 Ore etulusoitie Ilarin tomon oong'uan nanyaaka alo Yerusalem kiboita o Barnaba, narikito sii Tito." 
Galatians2:2 Ore pee ashomo ina kata, Enkai naataboloko mashomo. Anotore te nkilepata, lelo apa oitaaki larikok naibalakinye ninche kulo Omon Supati lalikioo nanu tiatua Loreren; mayieu nanu neaku esiaai ai nataasa apa o ena naasita taata ene pesho." 
Galatians2:3 Kake ore ninye Tito laboitare teine neitu earakini metumurati, hoo naa Olyunani ninye." 
Galatians2:4 Anaata doi ninye eitu eimakini ina bae te neme keiseleejakinote atua iyiook ltung'ana ooitaakuno ilalashera epuonu aajur elakunoto nikiaata iyiook tiatua Kristo Yesu. Kejo apa pee eitaa iyiook irrindiki," 
Galatians2:5 kake eitu hoo king'as aaisho enkiti rishata. Esipata apa e kulo Omon Supati kiyieu neserian tiatua intae. 
Galatians2:6 Ore lelo apa ooji eikituaak neme hoo toki ina te nanu etiu o metiu amu meeta ninye Enkai olkep, netalaita hoo toki naanyaakita aajo matoponiki." 
Galatians2:7 Ore hoo enatii, ketoduaa aajo aaisiligaki too Lomon Supati mayaki Ilmemurata anaa enaisiligaki Petero meyaki Iloomurata." 
Galatians2:8 Amu Enkai naidimie Petero metaa olkipaaret too Loomurata naaidimie sii nanu mataa olkipaaret too Loreren lememurata. 
Galatians2:9 Neaku Yakobo o Kefa o Yohana, lelo ooitaae ng'apeta e ina sirit ootoduaa kirotetisho naaishoo Enkai nanu neng'amaa Barnaba o nanu pee eitodolu aajo king'ar ena kisiayiare. Neaku kipuo iyiook Iloreren nepuo ninche enetii Iloomurata." 
Galatians2:10 Ena bae nabo ake eitanapa iyiook nchere pee kidamu laisinak naa ina bae apake airowuare pee aas. 
Galatians2:11 Kake ore pee elotu Petero Antiok naitasheiki ashirraki maing'urata, amu kelioo apa ajo eitarruoyie." 
Galatians2:12 Etang'asa aaku kedaa te nebo Loreren, kake ore pee epuonu ltung'ana ooing'uaa enetii Yakobo neitoki aaku kekepari, amu eturia lelo ooyieu nemurati Loreren." 
Galatians2:13 Ore lelo kulikae Yahudi ooiriamunore nesuj sii ninche ilo kuaak le sunkuroisho, o meteyietakini sii ninye Barnaba ina sunkuroisho." 
Galatians2:14 Kake ore pee adol nanu ajo meiriamari olkuaak lenye o esipata e kulo Omon Supati, najoki Petero te dukuya ninche pooki, “Ira iyie Olyahudi inoti, naa nele iyie olotie olkuaak loo Loreren, nimitiu anaa Olyahudi. Aainyoo naa pee ijo aaraki Loreren metotiutu anaa Lyahudi?”" 
Galatians2:15 Eikira doi iyiook iinot loo Lyahudi mikira, “Loreren aasak loo ng'ok.”" 
Galatians2:16 Kake kiyiolo ake iyiook aajo mme te nkitabaroto oo Nkitanapat meitoki Enkai aatakinore oltung'ani, kake enkirukoto eimu ina tiatua Yesu Kristo. Naa ore iyiook maate te nkaraki enkirukoto tiatua Kristo Yesu nemeekure eetakinore iyiook Enkai neme nkitanapat kintabaitie. Anaa enajo Lkigerot, “Meetae hoo obo laa enkitabaroto oo Nkitanapat eimua pee meekure eetakinore Enkai ninye.”" 
Galatians2:17 Kake amaa te niking'oru osotua o Nkai te Yesu Kristo, neton ake eji iyiook ilaasak loo ng'ok anaa loreren, keaku doi olaasani loo ng'ok sii ninye Kristo? Mme neijia pae!." 
Galatians2:18 Te neaku ilo rrekie loo Nkitanapat laturoyie aitoki aitasheyie, neitoduaaya naa ina nchere kesipa kara olotigila nkitanapat." 
Galatians2:19 Amu ore te nanu, nena Kitanapat ate naaiting'ie enkishui ai naitore nena Kitanapat. Ore tialo nena Kitanapat, atua nanu peyie atum ataa kaishu te nkaraki Enkai. Etashoki Kristo naatashoki nanu te nebo ninye." 
Galatians2:20 Aatashoki nanu tenebo Kristo, meekure aa nanu oishu, kake etaa Kristo oishu tiatua nanu. Ore enkishui naishu nanu taata to sesen, naishu te nkirukoto natii atua enkerai e Nkai, Ilo laatonyorra nanu neishoru kewan te nkaraki nanu." 
Galatians2:21 Nemaany nanu empiris e Nkai. Te neaku te nkitabaroto oo nkitanapat eikenakini oltung'ani esipata, nemeitoki naa keeya e Kristo aata tipat." 
Galatians3:1 Lo Galatia oomoda, aing'ae natasakuto intae? Amu eibalakinyeki intae tukul aajo etashoki Yesu Kristo metotiwuo anaa itoduaa too nkonyek inyi maate." 
Galatians3:2 Entolikioki naa ena nabo; ei nena Kitanapat intabaitie pee itang'amutua Enkiyang'et anaa ke nkirukoto niruko Lomon Supati apa pee ining'ining'i? 
Galatians3:3 Kesipa nchere imodada enaba nji? Te nkaraki Enkiyang'et e Nkai pee interutua enkishui inyi ng'ejuk. Ijojo pasa indimidimi aaitabai mbaa katukul ti ae oitoi neme ene nkiyang'et? 
Galatians3:4 Keton eeta tipat te intae nena baa pooki niimaitie intae? Mme neijia sii ake etiu. 
Galatians3:5 Amaa ilo oisho intae Enkiyang'et enye neas ine nking'asia tiatua intae, ketaasa te nkaraki naa nkitanapat intabaitie ana ke nkaraki niruko Lomon Supati apa pee ining'ining'i?" 
Galatians3:6 Ejo Ilkigerot, “Enkai eiruko Abraham; ore te nkaraki ina neikenaki Enkai ninye esipata.”" 
Galatians3:7 Neijia sii etiu te intae. Kajo naa sii ake idolidolo aajo lelo ooata enkirukoto oora nkera e Abraham. 
Galatians3:8 Kejo Ilkigerot tialo Abraham, ilo tung'ani oiruko, “Te iyie emayiani Loreren pooki;” naa te lelo rorei etolikioki apa ninye eton etiooyo kulo Omon Supati. Enkata eitodoluaki nayooki Enkai aikenaki Loreren isipat te nkaraki enkirukoto enye." 
Galatians3:9 Neaku ore ilo oiruk pooki nemaiyiana te nebo ilo Abraham oiruko. 
Galatians3:10 Ore lelo pooki ooigarakino enkitabaroto oo Nkitanapat naa kediaa, amu kejo Ilkigerot, “Etediaaki pooki ng'ae lemeas nena pooki naaigero too nkitanapat.”" 
Galatians3:11 Neibala nchere meetae hoo obo lemeetakinore Enkai te nkaraki naitabayie ninye Nkitanapat, amu kejo Ilkigerot, “Ore pooki ng'ae lemeetakinore Enkai ninye te nkaraki enkirukoto nepok.”" 
Galatians3:12 Kake mme nabo tukul Nkitanapat o enkirukoto, amu ejo Nkitanapat, “Ti niaas nena naajo Nkitanapat nipok.”" 
Galatians3:13 Kristo oinyiang'ua iyiook asaru to ldeket loo Nkitanapat, etanapa ninye makewan ilo deket te nkaraki iyiook, amu ejo Ilkigerot, “Kediaa pooki ng'ae oilili to lchani.”" 
Galatians3:14 Paa te Kristo Yesu ebaiki emayianata e Nkai natamayiana Abraham Iloreren, neaku enkirukoto eimu ina pee king'amu iyiook enkishorunoto e Nkiyang'et natolimuoki apake." 
Galatians3:15 Lalashera laainei, aisho intae enkitanyaanyukoto oo ltung'ana. Entadamu embae natoning'okinote ltung'ana aare. Ore pee eaku eidipa nemeitokini aata oloiwuang'ie aashu eponaa, hoo naa olning'o ake otoning'okinote ltung'ana." 
Galatians3:16 Ore too Lkigerot naa Abraham eishooki nkisiligat o ilo oiu ninye. Neitu eji, “Ilooiu ninye,” aajo ilkumok, kake obo etoiwuoki. Ore ilo obo naa Kristo." 
Galatians3:17 Ena doi ajo nanu; ore nena Kitanapat naaetuo enyaakita aalusoo larin iip ong'uan o tomoni uni, nemeidim ninche aaiwuang'ie osotua oidipa Enkai atuuno, nemeidim aaibooi enkisiligata enye pee meaku." 
Galatians3:18 Te naa too Nkitanapat kitum enkishorunoto e Nkai, nemeitoki naa aaku enkisiligata enye eitabayioki; kake ore enkishorunoto e Nkai naishoo Abraham pesho naa enkisiligata enye eitabayie." 
Galatians3:19 Kaa tipat naa apake eeta ninche Nkitanapat pee eetae? Eishoruaki pee eyiolouni teneitadiak oltung'ani, kake eishooki metobiko o metabau ilo inoti le Abraham naa ninye apa eipirieki enkisiligata naitayioki. Too lmalaika apa eitarasuaki nkitanapat aaimunye nkaik eilo oitaiki iltung'ana osotua." 
Galatians3:20 Ore embae naa obo oas nemeetayieki tipat likae tung'ani. Naa nabo sii ninye Enkai. 
Galatians3:21 Kepaashare nena kitanapat enkisiligata e Nkai? Mme neijia pae. Te naa apa kepokie ltung'ana nkitanapat naaishoruaki, naa anaata eikenaka Enkai iyiook isipat te nkaraki nena kitanapat." 
Galatians3:22 Kake keuno Ilkigerot nchere keena pooki toki too ng'ok, paa ina kisiligata naa te nkirukoto tiatua Yesu Kristo eitashe, eishori lelo ake ooiruk." 
Galatians3:23 Ore apa eton mikiata enkirukoto, nikiena iyiook ti abori nkitanapat o metaba anaa neboluni ina kirukoto naewuo." 
Galatians3:24 Neaku etotiutuo nena Kitanapat anaa olaramatani lang o metabau Kristo, pee eikenaki Enkai iyiook isipat te nkaraki enkirukoto;" 
Galatians3:25 kake ore taata eewuo enkirukoto nemeekure kitii abori ilo aramatani. 
Galatians3:26 Amu te nkirukoto irara nkera e Nkai tiatua Yesu Kristo. 
Galatians3:27 Ore intae lelo pooki ooibatisaki tiatua Kristo ninchopo Kristo. 
Galatians3:28 Meitokini aata Olyahudi anaa Olyunani, orrindik aashu ololakuno, olee aashu eng'oruoi; irara pooki nabo tiatua Kristo Yesu." 
Galatians3:29 Naa ti nirara ltung'ana le Kristo, nirara eishoi e Abraham, nirara ilajung'ok le Nkai te risioroto e ina kisiligata." 
Galatians4:1 Ajo doi nanu nji; ore olayioni te menye naa keidim ataa ninye ojung imasaa pooki, kake ore eton aa oti nemerisha o rrindik," 
Galatians4:2 eton aa abori laramatak etii o laitasheikinok o metabau enkata apa natejo menye. 
Galatians4:3 Neijia sii kitiu iyiook, ore apa eton kira ooti, neton kira irrindiki loo nkiyang'eta e nkop," 
Galatians4:4 kake ore pee ebau enkata sidai, neirriu Enkai Oinoti lenye, otoiwuo enkitok, netoiwuoki ninye tiabori Nkitanapat," 
Galatians4:5 pee einyiang'u lelo leton etii abori nena kitanapat pee kitum iyiook aatang'amu kiela naitaa iyiook nkera enyena. 
Galatians4:6 Ore pee etum aitodolu nchere irara nkera enyena, eirriwua Enkai Enkiyang'et o Inoti lenye atua ltauja lang, nebuak ajo, “Aba, Papa.”" 
Galatians4:7 Neaku meekure ira orrindik, kake itaa enkerai, naa ti nitaa enkerai, itaa sii olajung'oni, te nkiaas e Nkai makewan." 
Galatians4:8 Ore apa miyiololo intae Enkai, neaku irara apa irrindiki loo ntokitin neme hoo nkaitin." 
Galatians4:9 Kake amaa taata itayioloito Enkai, aashu doi taata eewuo Enkai ayiolou intae, kaji etiu pee intokiki arrinyokino inkiyang'eta aisinak nemeeta tipat neshal? Eji niyieuu intae nintokiki ake aaku rrindiki lenye." 
Galatians4:10 Niaatata nkolong'i nieniene o lapaitin o nkatitin o larin. 
Galatians4:11 Kintureita nanu matejo ore esiaai pooki nagol nataasa te nkaraki intae netaa ene pesho. 
Galatians4:12 Asai intae ilalashera o nkanashera, entotiu anaa enatiu nanu, amu atotiwuo sii nanu anaa enitiuu intae. Eitu kintaasiasa nanu ae bae torrono," 
Galatians4:13 iyiololo aajo te nkaraki emuoyian o sesen pee anoto erishata nalikinye intae Lomon Supati te nkiterunoto," 
Galatians4:14 naa ore eyia, eitu ntodolulu olmena aashu enyimore te nkaraki naamena osesen, hoo netetemaki intae enkuna neijia, kake kitang'amutua anaa kara olmalaika le Nkai, anaa kara Kristo Yesu." 
Galatians4:15 Koree naa taata ina aripo inyi? Kara shakeni nchere tenaa apa indimidimi, anaata itukurtutuo nkonyek inyi pee kinchosho nanu." 
Galatians4:16 Kataa naa taataolmang'atinta linyi, amu atolikio intae isipat?" 
Galatians4:17 Enyoito lelo laaiba aaitirrish intae oleng, kake mme too supati; kejo pee erishie intae nanu pee eaku ninche enyokitai." 
Galatians4:18 Aisidai te nikirrepi too mbaa sidain, te naa sidai embae napuku teina, naa too nkatitin pooki mme enoshi kata ake atii te nebo intae." 
Galatians4:19 Inkera aainei kutiti, kame nasaisai anaa entuaa naisho ajo pee eigili aaiu intae, o metaba anaa nepurupuranayu Kristo tiatua intae." 
Galatians4:20 Kayieu naaji naa katii te nebo intae pee atum aibelekenya oltoilo, amu eimayiolo enaas te nkaraki intae." 
Galatians4:21 Entolikioki intae lelo onguar netii abori nkitanapat, keitu pasa oshi ining'ining'i enajo nena Kitanapat?" 
Galatians4:22 Amu ejo Ilkigerot eji etoiwuo Abraham layiok aare, ole rrindik obo naa ole sayunoti nalakuno olikae." 
Galatians4:23 Kake ore ilo le rrindik netoiwuoki to loshi ake rrekie loo ltung'ana, ore ole sayunoti nalakuno naa enkisiligata e Nkai eitabayioki." 
Galatians4:24 Neeta ninche nena pokira enagut nalimu, ore nena kituaak pokira are naa sotuaitin pokira aare eutu. Oldoinyo le Sinai eimua obo, are nkera naaiu naa nkera e sinkaisho eiting'oki; naa Haga eimaka ina." 
Galatians4:25 Eitodolu Haga Oldoinyo le Sinai otii Arabia. Netiu anaa ena Yerusalem natii taata, amu etii sinkaisho te Yerusalem te nebo o nkera enyena." 
Galatians4:26 Kake ore ina kitok sayunoti nalakuno naa Yerusalem e keper eutu ninye naa ninye yieyio ang iyiook. 
Galatians4:27 Amu ejo Ilkigerot, “Ting'idayu enkolupi nemeisho, tabuaa nchira, hoo nimisaisai; amu ina kitok naton openy naata nkera kumok naalang ine ina naata olmoruo.”" 
Galatians4:28 Kake ore doi intae, ilalashera laainei o nkanashera itiuu anaa Isaak, irara nkera e nkisiligata e Nkai." 
Galatians4:29 Etii ae, ore apa te nena olong'i, ore elde otoiwuoki to loshi ake rrekie loo ltung'ana neinosie osina ilo otoiwuoki te ngolon e Nkiyang'et, naa neijia sii taata etiu." 
Galatians4:30 Kake kejaa Lkigerot? “Taarai ina rrindik o ilo ayioni lenye; amu mejung'isho olayioni le rrindik te nebo olayioni le sayunoti.” 
Galatians4:31 Neaku, lalashera o nkanashera, mikira iyiook nkera e rrindik, kake ine nkitok sayunoti nalakuno." 
Galatians5:1 Etalakua iyiook Kristo pee kibik kilakuno, Entashoito naa oleng, emincho eitokini aaibooki intae abori enchata e sinkaisho." 
Galatians5:2 Nanu Paulo, ele oirorie intae. Entisipu kuna najoito. Te neaku inchosho emurati intae, nimintokiki aata dupoto te Kristo." 
Galatians5:3 Kaigil ake aaishakenoki pooki ng'ae olo metumurati nchere, ketioorie ninye meitabai nena pooki naajo nena Kitanapat." 
Galatians5:4 Etudung'oyioki intae aarishie Kristo, intae taa lelo ooimu nkitanapat eji pee eikenaki Enkai intae isipat; imbelokinote oriong empiris e Nkai." 
Galatians5:5 Ore iyiook, Enkiyang'et naidimie iyiook maape dukuya te nkirukoto kianyu ilo siligi oikenakinye Enkai iyiook isipat." 
Galatians5:6 Amu ti nikitii atua Kristo Yesu nemeitoki aaku olomurata anaa olememurata ooata tipat; ore entoki e tipat naa enkirukoto naimu enyorrata. 
Galatians5:7 Anaaijo apa isosionono te lototo inyi; kainyoo nanyaaka aibooyo intae pee mining'ining'i esipata? 
Galatians5:8 Mme ake ninye mbaa e Nkai naipoto intae etiaaka ntae ilo oewuo aitapong'oo intae. 
Galatians5:9 Keisuishie enkinyi aisuishoi e ntapa naipurji pooki. 
Galatians5:10 Aata osiligi to Laitoriani, nchere kuna najo ijojo sii intae; kake ore pooki ng'ae olotu aitanyamal intae, ketum ilo enkiguana enye, era toki nara." 
Galatians5:11 Amaa ninye nanu, lalashera laainei te naa naaji kemuratare eton alikioo ajo kemuratishoe ake, kainyoo naa doi pee eton ake aainosieki nanu osina? Te naa naaji keton aa emuratare alikioo, nemeitoki elikioroto nalikioo nanu osalaba aitagor likae." 
Galatians5:12 Keyieu naaji naa ore lelo ooliman intae naa kepuo aagelem ate. 
Galatians5:13 Ore intae, lalashera laainei, elakunoto eipotokoki intae, nabo emiaas, emincho elakunoto inyi eaku enaitiship ing'uarrat torrok osesen; kake tareto olikae olikae te nyorrata;" 
Galatians5:14 amu eitabari nkitanapat tele rorei obo, nchere, “Tonyorra ole latia ino anaa eninyor kewan.”" 
Galatians5:15 Kake te neaku ionyonyo ninosasa maate anaa ng'uesi, entodol naa ake pee mimutumutu ate." 
Galatians5:16 Kake ajoki ntae enchom te Nkiyang'et pee mintabayaya iyieunot o sesen; 
Galatians5:17 amu ore iyieunot o sesen naa kegilunore ine nkiyang'et ore iyieunot e nkiyang'et negilunore ino sesen, amu mening'o pokira are, neaku mindimidimi aataas nena niyieuu niaasiasa." 
Galatians5:18 Te naa Enkiyang'et narikito intae, nimitii intae abori nena Kitanapat." 
Galatians5:19 Keibala nkiaasin o sesen, naa ninche kuna: emarmalisho e loloito, ilduruki, ng'uarrat torrok," 
Galatians5:20 eseremata e kulie tokitin neme Enkai, esakutore, mang'atisho, enchankar, olom, engoro, olorok, eoro, olarrabal le oro," 
Galatians5:21 enkiba te neeta likae toki, emerai, eului, o kulie naatiu neijia. Aikok nanu intae anaa enaidipa oshi aikoo, nchere, ore lelo ooas mbaa naaijo nena nemejung katukul Enkitoria e Nkai." 
Galatians5:22 Kake ore ilng'anayio le Nkiyang'et naa enyorrata, eng'ida, eseriani, eng'iriata, enanai e nkoshoke, esupatisho, enkisiligunoto," 
Galatians5:23 emboron o enkibooroto e kewan. Nemeetae nkitanapat naagilunore mbaa naaijo kuna. 
Galatians5:24 Ore lelo oora ile Kristo Yesu neidipa ninche aatasho enkewan o sesen o nena yieunot enyena. 
Galatians5:25 Tenaa ke Nkiyang'et taata kinchuyie iyiook, ematurubare naa erikore e Nkiyang'et." 
Galatians5:26 Ematalam olwuasa le modai; nimikintagor olikae olikae aashu kimbaikino olikae olikae. 
Galatians6:1 Ilalashera laainei o nkanashera, te neaku eirrashaki oltung'ani te nkitarruorroto naje, ore intae ile nkiyang'et nitemiteme aasaru te nkiyang'et e mborron; naa entodol ate, pooki ng'ae, mikitemi sii ninye iyie." 
Galatians6:2 Entaretokinoto lolan olikae o likae, amu teina intabayaya enkitanapata e Kristo." 
Galatians6:3 Te neitaa likae kewan kitok mme toki ninye kewan elej. 
Galatians6:4 Enchoo ejur pooki tung'ani inkiasin enyena, paa te netonyorrayioki netum aisisa kewan neme to le latia enye;" 
Galatians6:5 amu kenap ake pooki tung'ani olola lenye makewan. 
Galatians6:6 Enchoo ilo oiteng'eni eng'arie mbaa pooki supati ilo oiteng'en ninye. 
Galatians6:7 Emilej ate, mederrieki Enkai. Amu inaaun oltung'ani elo ake sii aikes." 
Galatians6:8 Ore ilo ounoki enkulupuoni enkewan o sesen nelo aikes teina kewan o sesen erruorroto, ore olounoki enkulupuoni e Nkiyang'et nelo aikes te Nkiyang'et enkishui oo ntarasi." 
Galatians6:9 Ore aa isupati kiaasita emikidukenya, amu kelotu enkata nikisotisho te neitu kintololong enyuaata ang." 
Galatians6:10 Ore te nkaraki ina, ore ake irishat pooki nikitum, emaitaasa pooki ng'ae isupati, neisul lelo otii enkaji e nkirukoto." 
Galatians6:11 Ore kulo kigerot sapuki lisumusumu, ilatisira te nkaina ai makewan." 
Galatians6:12 Ore lelo ooyieu newuasare intae eyiewuaki intae olkerreti lo sesen, intae ejo pee earaki metumurati, aa kejo pee mepuoi aarare ninche te nkaraki osalaba le Kristo." 
Galatians6:13 Ore doi ninche lelo oojo meeta nchere pee memurati intae, mesujita ninche oopeny nena kitanapat, kake eyieu ake nemurati intae pee etum ninche maate aatawuasare ina dung'oto oo seseni linyi." 
Galatians6:14 Ore nanu, mawuasare ai kata ae toki neme osalaba lo Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo, laa te ninye etashoki enkop tialo nanu neaku aatashoki nanu tialo enkop." 
Galatians6:15 Te naa kemurata oltung'ani aashu ememurata neme toki; ore enatii naa te naa keitaaki enkitobirata ng'ejuk. 
Galatians6:16 Menoto lelo pooki oosuj ena kitanapata eseriani o lng'ur, naa taa, o lelo oora Siraeli le Nkai." 
Galatians6:17 Ore ebaiki taata, mayieu naaitoki likae tung'ani aitanyamal, amu ore nkiporo naata to sesen lai ilmishiren le Yesu ninche." 
Galatians6:18 Metaa empiris o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo te nebo enkishui inyi, ilalashera laainei. Eesai." 
Ephesians1:1 Paulo, olkipaaret le Kristo Yesu te yieunoto e Nkai, esiraki lelo sinyat otii Efeso ooisiligayu tiatua Kristo Yesu." 
Ephesians1:2 Enoto empiris o eseriani naing'uaa Enkai Papa lang o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo. 
Ephesians1:3 Meisisi Enkai Papa lo Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo, olaa ninye otamayiana iyiook tiatua Kristo too mayianat pooki e nkiyang'et naaing'uaa iwuejitin e keper." 
Ephesians1:4 Ore eton eitu eitayuni enkop netegelua Enkai iyiook tiatua Kristo mataa sinyat nimikiaata entibili te ninye. 
Ephesians1:5 Etegelua apa ninye iyiook te nyorrata mataa nkera enyena tiatua Yesu Kristo, te risioroto enkipirta enye makewan. Ninye otonyorra iyiook, negelaki iyiook kewan neel iyiook mataa nkera enyena kiimu Kristo Yesu. Neijia apa eikununo enyorrata e yieunoto enye." 
Ephesians1:6 Neikuna ninye neijia pee kisipu iyiook nikiyiolou eneba enkishorunoto enye naikishiaan naishoo ninye iyiook pesho tiatua ilo Inoti lenye onyor. 
Ephesians1:7 Tiatua ninye kiaata iyiook enkordunoto te nkaraki osarge lenye, aa empalakinoto oo ntorrok ang, te risioroto e mpiris enye sapuk" 
Ephesians1:8 natoponikia ninye iyiook," 
Ephesians1:9 te ng'eno o te yiolounoto enye pooki te risioroto e mbarakinoto enye tiatua Kristo. 
Ephesians1:10 Te nebau enkata nanarikino, ore te mbarakinoto enye naa keyooki aiturrur pooki toki naitayioki metaa nabo tiatua Kristo, ntokitin naatii keper o naatii enkop." 
Ephesians1:11 Keasi ntokitin pooki te risioroto e ina nayieu Enkai, ilo oitabaya intokitin pooki te risioroto e nkiguana enye." 
Ephesians1:12 Ore iyiook ilooitera aairuk Kristo netegeluaki iyiook nesirakini enkitoo enye. 
Ephesians1:13 Tiatua ninye, intae ilootoning'o ilo rorei le sipata, lelo omon supati le njeunoto inyi, iruko ninye, nemishiri intae teina Kiyang'et Sinyati e nkisiligata enye," 
Ephesians1:14 naa ninye enkitisipata nauno e njung'ore ang, o metaba anaa niking'amu ina, te nkisisa o enkitoo enye." 
Ephesians1:15 Ore te nkaraki ena bae, ebaiki apa pee aning enkirukoto inyi tiatua Olaitoriani Yesu o enyorrata ninyorrinyorro lelo sinyat," 
Ephesians1:16 eitu apal maishooyo enashe te intae, nadamu intae te nkomono ai," 
Ephesians1:17 pee eisho intae Enkai o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo, iloo papa le nkitoo, enkiyang'et nagut e ng'eno o ene mbolokinoto, entayiolo ninye." 
Ephesians1:18 Kaomonoki ntae pee eitawang'i inkonyek oo ltauja linyi pee itumutumu aatayiolo ilo siligi oipotokoki intae," 
Ephesians1:19 niyiolouu aajo kebaa ina golon enye nemetemayu naa ninye naasisho tiatua iyiook iloiruko, te risioroto easata enkidimata enye kitok," 
Ephesians1:20 enapa nataasishore tiatua Kristo pee eitopiu aitung'uaa keeya neisho metotona te nkaina enye e tatene too wuejitin e keper. 
Ephesians1:21 Teine eitore tukul pooki ooitoreisho o nkidimat pooki o engolon e nkitoria, neitoreisho oleng te shumata pooki arna naipoti neme kuna ake e na kata kake o ne idia nalotu." 
Ephesians1:22 Netipika Enkai ntokitin pooki inkejek enyena nepik ninye metaa elukunya oo ntokitin pooki te nkaraki esirit," 
Ephesians1:23 nara osesen lenye, elulung'ata e ilo oitululung pooki toki tiatua pooki toki." 
Ephesians2:1 Naa intae eitopiwuoki, enapa kata ituata te nkaraki oo nkitarruorrot o ng'ok," 
Ephesians2:2 inaa ninche apa ipuoyieyie isujitata olkerreti lena kop, nisujitata ilo kitok le ngolon o loing'ang'e, ina kiyang'et naisiaaisho taata tiatua nena kera naagolong'u." 
Ephesians2:3 Naa atua kuna apa kitii sii iyiook pooki too ng'uarrat oo seseni lang, nikisuj iyieunot o sesen o enoo ndamunot, nikiaku iyiook maate te ikinet inkera e ngoro, anaa ina natiu ilkulikae tung'ana pooki." 
Ephesians2:4 Kake ore Enkai, naata olng'ur kitok, te nkaraki enyorrata kitok naa ninye etonyorrie iyiook," 
Ephesians2:5 hoo nikituata apa te nkaraki nkitarruorrot ang, enyaaka ninye aitopiu iyiook pee kinchu te nebo Kristo, (te nkaraki empiris pee eitajewuoki intae)." 
Ephesians2:6 Neitopiwuo Enkai iyiook te nebo Kristo neisho iyiook matotoni te nebo ninye too wuejitin e keper tiatua Kristo Yesu," 
Ephesians2:7 paa ore too lporori oopuonu netum aitoduaai eneba enkarsisisho e mpiris enye nemetemayu te nanai e nkoshoke enye tialo iyiook tiatua Kristo Yesu. 
Ephesians2:8 Amu te mpiris eitajewuoki intae to rrekie le nkirukoto: neme hoo te nkaraki ae nitaasa intae, enkishorunoto e Nkai," 
Ephesians2:9 neme te nkaraki nkiaasin pee metum ake likae tung'ani enawuasare. 
Ephesians2:10 Amu kira iyiook esiaai e Nkai naitayioki tiatua Kristo Yesu te nkaraki isiaaitin sidain naaitobira apa Enkai te nkiterunoto pee kias. 
Ephesians2:11 Neaku entadamu inchere, ore apa aekata intae Iloreren tialo osesen ooji ilmemurata lelo kulikae ooji iloomurata naa entoki naitobiri to sesen too nkaik." 
Ephesians2:12 Entadamu nchere ore apa ina kata miatata Kristo niminkenaroro intae tiatua olorere loo Siraeli, nirara apa ileeiking'a minkenaroro too sotuaitin le ina kisiligata, nimiaatata osiligi nimiaatata Enkai te nkop." 
Ephesians2:13 Kake ore taata tiatua Kristo, ore intae oolakua apa oleng neitinyikuaki intae tiatua ilo sarge le Kristo." 
Ephesians2:14 Amu ninye eseriani ang, olaa ninye oitaa iyiook indung'ot pokira nabo, neturoyie enapa suntai e nkiba narish iyiook," 
Ephesians2:15 naa to sesen lenye eiwuang'ie ninye nena kitanapat o nkoon naaitanapishoteki pee etum ninye aitaiki kewan oltung'ani obo ng'ejuk te lelo ootoorote are, neyau eseriani," 
Ephesians2:16 netum aitutumoki iyiook pokira Enkai tiatua ilo sesen obo te nkoitoi o salaba, neishu ina kiba neiting'ie." 
Ephesians2:17 Neewuo ninye aliki intae eseriani iloolakua apa neliki eseriani lelo apa ootaana," 
Ephesians2:18 te ninye kiindim indung'ot pokira are, teina kiyang'et nabo, aatinyikaki Papa." 
Ephesians2:19 Meekure naa irara lomon o leeiking'a; kake ing'aring'ara olorere obo o lelo sinyat nitaa ile nkaji e Nkai," 
Ephesians2:20 ooteshetakaki shumata olkitamanyunoto le lelo kipaareta o loibonok le Nkai, aa Kristo Yesu makewan ilo soit kitok lo lmairroto," 
Ephesians2:21 laa atua eidikidikokini enchetata pooki te nebo, nebulu enkaji nasinya tiatua Olaitoriani," 
Ephesians2:22 laa atua ninye sii eteshetakaki intae entaa ewueji nemanya Enkai tiatua ina Kiyang'et. 
Ephesians3:1 Ore te nkaraki ena bae, ore nanu Paulo, oloena le Kristo Yesu te rishata inyi intae Iloreren" 
Ephesians3:2 amu kajo sii ake itoning'o enkitanapa e mpiris e Nkai naaishooki te nkaraki intae 
Ephesians3:3 o eneikuna pee aaboloki nkisudorot e yieunoto enye, anaa enaidipa aigeroki intae too ndorropu." 
Ephesians3:4 Ore pee isumusumu ena niyiolouu aajo katabaraka ayiolou embae e Kristo naisudoro," 
Ephesians3:5 eneitu apa elikini nkera oo ltung'ana te kulikae porori anaa ena taata naibalakinyeki ilkipaareta lenyena sinyat o loibonok le Nkai teina Kiyang'et. 
Ephesians3:6 Naa ena naishoo Iloreren metang'arieki enjung'ore neaku irubat o sesen obo, le ncholiek e ina kisiligata tiatua Kristo Yesu eimu lelo Omon Supati." 
Ephesians3:7 Te kulo Omon Supati aaitaaki nanu olaisiaayiani te risioroto e nkishorunoto e mpiris e Nkai naaishoo nanu te ngolon enye. 
Ephesians3:8 Ore nanu hoo nara oloti aisul too sinyat pooki, nanu eishooki ena piris, matoliki Iloreren lelo Omon Supati le nkarsisisho nemejurroyu e Kristo," 
Ephesians3:9 naaishooki maitoduaa ltung'ana pooki eneikunari enkitabaroto eina kishorunoto naisudoyioki apa too lporori tiatua Enkai naitayio pooki toki; 
Ephesians3:10 paa ore to rrekie le sirit neboluni taata eng'eno enye oo mpukunot kumok metayiolo laitoriak enkitoo pooki too wuejitin e keper. 
Ephesians3:11 Ore ena nerubare enkiguana e Nkai oo ntarasi naitabayie ninye tiatua Kristo Yesu Olaitoriani lang," 
Ephesians3:12 laa te ninye kiaata empijan o enkitieunoto nikinyikakinye Enkai to rrekie le nkirukoto ang tiatua ninye. 
Ephesians3:13 Neaku ajoki intae emishalu to sina laainosieki te nkaraki intae, amu ninye enkisisa inyi." 
Ephesians3:14 Te nkaraki ena pee agilaki kung ilo Papa," 
Ephesians3:15 laa ninye eipotieki olmarei ake pooki te keper o te nkop," 
Ephesians3:16 paa te risioroto e nkarsisisho e nkitoo enye eisho meitagoli intae te ngolon naimu Enkiyang'et enye te ilo tung'ani li atua," 
Ephesians3:17 nemany sii Yesu atua iltauja linyi eimu enkirukoto; paa ore intae, inoto ntona nitonini te nyorrata," 
Ephesians3:18 nitumutumu engolon niyiolounyenye te nebo o isinyat pooki eneba elalai o enkadori o elakuani e shumata o enguton," 
Ephesians3:19 niyiolouu enyorrata e Kristo nalusoo te ng'eno pooki, nimitunyenye aaboreyu te nkiputakinoto e Nkai." 
Ephesians3:20 Ore taata ilo laa te ngolon naisiaaisho tiatua iyiook eidim ninye ataasa neitulusoo oleng alang nena pooki nikinkilikuanu aashu kidamu," 
Ephesians3:21 metaa enenye enkitoo tiatua esirit o tiatua Yesu too lporori pooki intarasi o ntarasi. Eesai. 
Ephesians4:1 Ore naa nanu oena te nkaraki Olaitoriani, asai intae entobik te nkishon naishiaakino ina kipototo naipotoki intae," 
Ephesians4:2 te nkanyit pooki o te mborron, te nebo eng'iriata iretokinono olikae o likae tiatua enyorrata." 
Ephesians4:3 Entonyok enoto naboisho e Nkiyang'et tiatua eseriani naitaa ntae nabo. 
Ephesians4:4 Eetae osesen obo o Enkiyang'et nabo anaa ina ake naipotokoki intae ilo siligi obo le ina kipototo inyi. 
Ephesians4:5 Obo Olaitoriani, nabo enkirukoto, nabo enkibatisa," 
Ephesians4:6 nabo Enkai naa Papa lang iyiook pooki, laa ninye otii shumata pooki neasisho tiatua iyiook pooki netii atua pooki." 
Ephesians4:7 Kake eishooki ake oltung'ani pooki te iyiook, empiris te risioroto e nkishorunoto e Kristo." 
Ephesians4:8 Ina pee etejoki, “Ore pee eilep ninye alo keper nerik olorora loo looena, neisho ltung'ana inkishoorot.”" 
Ephesians4:9 (Ore pee eji “eilepa” kaa ae naji neme nchere etadoyie sii apa alo wuejitin e abori enkop? 
Ephesians4:10 Ilo ake otadoyie onyaaka sii ailep agiroo shumata pooki, pee etum ninye aiputa pooki toki)." 
Ephesians4:11 Ore too nena kishorunot enyena naa ketejo pee eaku kulikae ilkipaareta, neaku kulikae iloibonok le Nkai, neaku kulikae ilalikiorok, neaku kulikae ilairritak o laiteng'enak." 
Ephesians4:12 Etaasa ena peyie erreten lelo sinyat, te nkaraki ina siaai e ramatare o ene nchetata o sesen le Kristo," 
Ephesians4:13 o metabaiki pooki naboisho naimu enkirukoto o eyiolounoto e ilo Inoti le Nkai, nikiaku iltung'ana ootubulutua aamitunye aabaiki entemet e mbotoro nalulung'a e Kristo;" 
Ephesians4:14 pee mikintoki aaku inkera, naanang'ari idie o idie to lkutati ake pooki le nkiteng'enare, o losek loo ltung'ana tiatua esunkuroisho o losekin le lejare." 
Ephesians4:15 Ore enatii, emairoro esipata tiatua enyorrata, nikibulu too nkoitoi pooki aabulaki atua ilo ora elukunya ang; aabulaki atua Kristo," 
Ephesians4:16 olaa tiatua ninye eruba osesen pooki, neidikokino atua ninye pooki rubata naishoro, easisho nena rubat pooki aaitobiraki, neitubulu osesen neitubulu kewan tiatua enyorrata." 
Ephesians4:17 Najo taata ena naishakenoki tiatua Olaitoriani nchere emintoki ake aaisho orrekie le nkishon inyi etiu anaa enatiu oloo loreren, too ndamunot enye e pesho." 
Ephesians4:18 Eitomisiimisoki ening'unoto enye; neaku ina kishui naishoru Enkai eneeiking'a te ninche, te nkaraki nemeyiolo toki; te nkaraki engolon oo ltauja lenye." 
Ephesians4:19 Eikaolote ninche neishooitie ate aaisho iloirerioni, netum enkului e pooki bae naiduruk." 
Ephesians4:20 Neme nena eiteng'enieki intae tiatua Kristo! 
Ephesians4:21 Amu ajo sii indipa aatoning imbaa enyena naaiteng'enieki intae tiatua ninye, anaa enatiu esipata tiatua Yesu." 
Ephesians4:22 Entuburukushu enkewan inyi musana, enapa kishon inyi musana narruoyo te nkaraki ng'uarrat naalejisho," 
Ephesians4:23 naa enchoo eitang'ejuki indamunot inyi. 
Ephesians4:24 Enchopo enkewan ng'ejuk, naitayioki enyaanyukie Enkai tiatua esupatisho nasipa o te sinyatisho." 
Ephesians4:25 Ore te nkaraki ina, entapal elejare, eroro isipat pooki ng'ae eirorie ole latia enye, amu kira iyiook irubat olikae o likae." 
Ephesians4:26 Entagoroto kake emiaas ng'ok; emincho edoyio enkolong itagorote. 
Ephesians4:27 Emincho sii Sheitani erishata. 
Ephesians4:28 Nchoo olapurroni metapala empurrorre, enaikash teniasisho aas esiaai e nkanyit too nkaik enyena, pee etum entoki naisho lelo lemeeta toki." 
Ephesians4:29 Emiimunye ilderrat torrok inkutukie inyi, kake eroro nena sidan naaretisho, neishiaakino teina kata pee eshetu te mpiris lelo ooning." 
Ephesians4:30 Emintagor Enkiyang'et Sinyati e Nkai, natipikieki intae olmishire le ina olong e lakunoto." 
Ephesians4:31 Enchoo enkiba pooki o engoro o ewuapa o enchankar o esulare metalama intae te nebo o emorore o entorroni pooki. 
Ephesians4:32 Eng'urrie olikae olikae, entaa iloonana oishuaa, entapalakinoto olikae o likae anaa enatapalaka Enkai intae tiatua Kristo." 
Ephesians5:1 Ore te nkaraki ina, entanyaanyukie ate Enkai anaa nkera kutiti naanyorri." 
Ephesians5:2 Naa enchomie enyorrata, anaa enatonyorra iyiook Kristo neishooyo kewan te nkaraki iyiook, neaku enkishooroto o lasar orropil oishooki Enkai." 
Ephesians5:3 Kake ore eloloito o loirerioni pooki aashu ng'uarrat torrok, emincho ake eipoti tiatua intae, amu ina naishiaakino tiatua isinyat." 
Ephesians5:4 Emintoki aata Iloirerioni, aashu lderrat loo mbaa nemeeta enkanyit, aashu le modai, lemeishiaakino; kake enkishooroto e nashe entoponai." 
Ephesians5:5 Entayiolo ena nasipa nchere meetae hoo olololoito aashu oloo loirerioni, aashu oloo ng'uarrat torrok (nkitanyaanyukot taa eomon olotiu neijia), otum hoo enjung'ore tiatua enkitoria e Kristo o ene Nkai." 
Ephesians5:6 Emincho hoo elej intae oltung'ani too rorei le pesho, amu te nkaraki oshi kuna baa pee edoiki engoro e Nkai nena kera nemening'isho." 
Ephesians5:7 Ore te nkaraki ina emisiritore ninche," 
Ephesians5:8 amu irara apa intae enaimin, kake irara taata ewang'an tiatua Olaitoriani; enchom anaa nkera e wang'an," 
Ephesians5:9 (amu ore ilng'anayio le wang'an naa ninche etumieki nena pooki sidain neitoriori nesipa)," 
Ephesians5:10 naa entetem aajo mateng'ena te nena naaitiship Olaitoriani. 
Ephesians5:11 Emiata eniporokiki nkiaasin e naimin nemeeta lng'anayio, kake ore eninkoko intae, entayu meibalata." 
Ephesians5:12 Amu enkurruna doi ninye te neimakini nena naas lelo too nkisudorot; 
Ephesians5:13 kake ore embae pooki nabolokini ewang'an naa keliooyu, amu ewang'an pooki toki nalioo." 
Ephesians5:14 Ina pee eji, “Inyo oloirura, tudumunye, tung'uai ilootuata, naa eikincho Kristo ewang'an.”" 
Ephesians5:15 Eng'ura entabaraki eninkunariri te lototo, mme anaa iltung'ana oomoda kake anaa lng'eni." 
Ephesians5:16 Entaasishore enkata, amu torrok inkolong'i." 
Ephesians5:17 Ore naa, emiaaku ilmoda, entoning'u eyieunoto o Laitoriani." 
Ephesians5:18 Emimera te naisho oo sabibu amu emutata e nkishon ina; kake enchoo Enkiyang'et eiput intae. 
Ephesians5:19 Entaranyisho to lkerempe le Nkai o sinkolioitin o rrepeta e nkiyang'et, iranyishosho aaisis Olaitoriani too ltauja linyi pooki." 
Ephesians5:20 Ore anaake o too mbaa pooki enchooi enashe te nkarna o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo aaisho Enkai Papa. 
Ephesians5:21 Entoning'oto maate te nkaraki naa Kristo iyanyititi. 
Ephesians5:22 Nakituaak, entoning ilpayiani linyi anaa enining'ining'i Olaitoriani," 
Ephesians5:23 amu olpayian elukunya e nkitok anaa paa Kristo elukunya e sirit, ilo sesen lenye, naa ninye Olaitajeunoni lenye." 
Ephesians5:24 Ore anaa enaning esirit Kristo, enchoo etiu sii ninche inkituaak neijia aaning ilpayiani lenye to mbaa pooki." 
Ephesians5:25 Lo payiani, entonyor inkituaak inyi, anaa enatonyorra Kristo esirit neishooyo kewan te nkaraki ninye," 
Ephesians5:26 pee etum aitisinya ninye, eidipa aisuja te nkitukuoto e nkare o te nebo ilo rorei," 
Ephesians5:27 pee etum aitaiki kewan ina sirit te sikar nemeeta entibili aashu emuguta aashu eeta ae ake toki nayia neijia, pee etum esirit ataa sinyati nemeeta eleyiata." 
Ephesians5:28 Neijia sii etiu ilpayiani, keishiaakino nenyor inkituaak enye anaa iseseni lenye maate. Ore olonyor enkitok enye, kewan enyor." 
Ephesians5:29 Amu meetae aekata oltung'ani oiba osesen lenye makewan, kake keitoti neramat ninye, anaa enaramat Kristo esirit," 
Ephesians5:30 amu kira iyiook irubat o sesen lenye! 
Ephesians5:31 Ore te nkaraki ena “Kelo olee aing'uaa menye o ng'otonye neibung'are enkitok enye, neaku pokira are nabo.”" 
Ephesians5:32 Enkisudoroto kitok ena, naa Kristo elimu o kanisa." 
Ephesians5:33 Ore etiu neijia, nchoo ake pooki ng'ae linyi enyorru enkitok enye anaa enanyor kewan, naa nchoo enkitok eyanyit olpayian lenye." 
Ephesians6:1 Nakera, eyanyita intoiwuo inyi tiatua Olaitoriani, amu aisidai ina." 
Ephesians6:2 “Iyanyita papaai lino o yieyio lino.” (Ena kitanapata naituruk neeta enkisiligata)," 
Ephesians6:3 “Pee eitobirari mbaa inyi nibikibiki inkolong'i kumok te nkop.” 
Ephesians6:4 Ore intae intoiwuo, emintagor inkera inyi, kake entubulu ninche te nkitamioto o te utaroto o te nkiteng'enare o Laitoriani." 
Ephesians6:5 Lo rrindiki, entoning intae lelo oora ilaitoriak linyi te nkop te nkuretisho o lokirikiri, to ltau obo, anaa eninkoko Kristo;" 
Ephesians6:6 neme eji pee edoli intae, anaa ilooitiship iltung'ana, kake anaa ilaisiaayiak le Kristo, iasiasa eyieunoto e Nkai eing'uaa atua ltauja." 
Ephesians6:7 Nisiaaishosho te yieunoto sidai anaa eninkoko to Laitoriani neme anaa too ltung'ana," 
Ephesians6:8 iyiololo aajo ore esupat ake pooki naas oloas, neyooki ake atum ina nataasa eing'uaa Olaitoriani, aa osinka aashu ololakuno." 
Ephesians6:9 Lo aitoriak, nena ake entaasa sii intae isinkan linyi, naa embooi olbuaa, iyiololo aajo ketii keper Olaitoriani lenye naa olinyi sii intae, nemeeta ninye olkep." 
Ephesians6:10 Ore enabayie, entagol tiatua Olaitoriani o te ngolon e nkidimata enye." 
Ephesians6:11 Enchopo iruparen pooki e Nkai, pee indimidimi aaitasho aairisha ilosekin pooki le Sheitani." 
Ephesians6:12 Amu mikiarare iyiook osesen o sarge, kake ilaitoriak kiarare, nikiarare engolon oo mpukunot kumok, nikiarare ilaitoriak le nkop lena aimin e taata, nikiarare ilororani loo nkiyang'eta torrok too wuejitin e oloing'ang'e." 
Ephesians6:13 Ore te nkaraki ina, enchopo iruparen pooki e Nkai, pee indimidimi intae aairishisho teina olong torrono paa ore indipa aataas pooki, nintasheshe." 
Ephesians6:14 Entashoito naa iterretena mpolosi inyi te sipata, ninchopo elong'o e supatisho too lgooitie linyi," 
Ephesians6:15 ninchopokito nkejek inyi inamuka oo Lomon Supati le seriani. 
Ephesians6:16 Ore enaaisul te nena pooki embung'a elong'o e nkirukoto naa ninye naidimie intae entushurie nena baa pooki e ilo torrono naayupuyup. 
Ephesians6:17 Naa enchopo enkopiyia e njeunoto nimbung'ubung'u olalem le Nkiyang'et laa ninye ororei le Nkai. 
Ephesians6:18 Entoomon inkatitin pooki te Nkiyang'et te nkomono pooki o eomonokinoto. Ore teina, entashololoto te ncheikinoto iomonokiki isinyat pooki," 
Ephesians6:19 o nanu sii, pee aaisho Enkai enajo paa tenabol enkutuk, nairo te mpijan alikioo mbaa naaisudoro e kulo Omon Supati," 
Ephesians6:20 laa te nkaraki ninche pee ara olbalusui oena too lpisia; pee atum atolikioi te mpijan, anaa enaishiaakino nairo." 
Ephesians6:21 Ore taata pee iyiolouu sii intae enaikununo o enaasita, Tikikos olalashe lang onyorri naa olaisiaayiani oisiligayu tiatua Olaitoriani olotu ainosaki intae imbaa pooki." 
Ephesians6:22 Nanu oirriwua ninye enitii te nkaraki ena pee iyiolouu enaikununo, netum ninye aitagolo iltauja linyi." 
Ephesians6:23 Menoto ilalashera eseriani o enyorrata te nebo enkirukoto naing'uaa Enkai Papa o Laitoriani Yesu Kristo. 
Ephesians6:24 Metobiko empiris te nebo lelo pooki oonyor Olaitoriani lang Yesu Kristo te nyorrata nemeye. 
Philippians1:1 Paulo o Timoteo, isinkan le Kristo Yesu ooigeroki lelo sinyat pooki tiatua Kristo Yesu ootii enkang e Filipi tenebo ilaitasheikinok le sirit e Nkai o laisiaayak." 
Philippians1:2 Enoto empiris o eseriani eing'uaa Enkai Papa lang o Laitoriani Yesu Kristo. 
Philippians1:3 Ore oshi enkata pooki nadamu intae, naisho Enkai ai enashe," 
Philippians1:4 naa te naomon, nadamu intae pooki te nchipai sapuk," 
Philippians1:5 te nkaraki ina nitaa intae ilaasak te nebo nanu te nkitubularoto o rorei supat ebaiki apa te nkiterunoto o taata. 
Philippians1:6 Nayiolo aitisip nchere ore Enkai naiterua esiaai sidai tiatua intae naa keitabaya teina olong e Yesu Kristo. 
Philippians1:7 Keishiaakino tenaata kuna tialo intae pooki amu aibung'ita intae to ltau lai amu itii te nebo nanu tiatua empiris o te enata ai o te ng'oroto o te nkitisipata o rorei supat. 
Philippians1:8 Naa shakeni ai Enkai teina yieunoto naata te intae teina nyorrata e Yesu Kristo. 
Philippians1:9 Ore enkomono ai naa nchere pee eponari enyorrata inyi oleng nitumutumu eng'eno o enjurrunoto oo mbaa," 
Philippians1:10 pee itumutumu aatujur nena sidan aaisul, niaakuku biyot, ilemeeta leyiat te nkolong e Kristo." 
Philippians1:11 Neboreyu intae ilng'anayio le supatisho, ooimu atua Yesu Kristo, neyau enkitoo e enkisisa e Nkai." 
Philippians1:12 Ayieu niyiolouu ilalashera laainei nchere, ore nena naaitaasaki nanu, netaretutuo enkitubularoto o rorei supat," 
Philippians1:13 o metaba anaa neyiolou isikarini pooki le nkaji enkitoo o ltung'ana pooki nchere ore pee aena naa te nkaraki Kristo. 
Philippians1:14 Nenoto ilalashera kumok enkitagoloto tiatua Olaitoriani te enata ai neaku kelimu ororei le Nkai te mpijan metii enkuretisho. 
Philippians1:15 Keinosu kulikae Kristo to lom o te nkesha kake keinosu kulikae to ltau sidai. 
Philippians1:16 Ore lelo ooinosu to ltau sidai neinosu te nyorrata eyiolo aajo aatipikaki nanu ene te nkaraki nang'orito ilo rorei supat; 
Philippians1:17 ore lelo kulikae nelimu Kristo te nkitokoos ejo pee aaitang'or nanu teina enata ai. 
Philippians1:18 Kainyoo naa enkiting'oto? Ena, nchere, ore too nkoitoi pooki naalikiorieki Yesu aa to lom aashu te nkesha naa kaaitiship nanu." 
Philippians1:19 Ee naa kang'ida. Amu kayiolo ajo ore te nkaraki enkomono inyi o te retoto e Nkiyang'et e Yesu naa keyau elakunoto ai. 
Philippians1:20 Ore eyieunoto e eanyunoto o siligi lai naa nchere pee makurru, kake ore te mpijan nabore taata anaa oshiake, neyanyituni Kristo to sesen lai, aa te nkishui aashu te keeya." 
Philippians1:21 Ore te nanu Kristo enkishui, ore keeya naa dupoto." 
Philippians1:22 Kake te naishu to sesen, neaku kumok lng'anayio le siaai ai neaku mayiolo ajo kaa adutaa." 
Philippians1:23 Amu kang'aashana aaitirrishita oleng nkaloli pokira are. Ore eyieunoto ai naa pee aiwuang'a to sesen naaku te nebo Kristo, amu ina esidai oleng." 
Philippians1:24 Kake tenabik tiatua ele sesen naa ina naata tipat te intae. 
Philippians1:25 Kaitisip ena nchere, kayiolo ajo katon naa kabik aret intae pooki, te nkaraki enkitubulunoto inyi o eng'ida tiatua enkirukoto," 
Philippians1:26 paa ore tiatua nanu, nitumutumu esipata niwuasarere tiatua Kristo naibala te naitoki alotu enitii." 
Philippians1:27 Ore too mbaa pooki, enkuna ena nabo, enchoo orrekie le nkishui inyi meishiaakinore ororei supat le Kristo peyie te naewuo adol intae aashu te nematii naning'oo ajo ituunote intasheshe to ltau obo, o te ndamunoto nabo, ninyokinyoko aairiamari te nkaraki enkirukoto o rorei supat," 
Philippians1:28 niminchosho eiture intae ae toki e lelo mang'ati ookesh intae. Ele olmonekie oibala le mutata te ninche kake ole njeunoto te intae, naa Enkai eing'uaa ina." 
Philippians1:29 Amu eishooki intae te nkaraki Kristo enkitamioto neme pee irukuruku ake, kake o pee eitamei sii ntae te nkaraki ninye," 
Philippians1:30 itii atua ilo arrabal apa ake litoduaa nining'itoto taata aajo eton ake atii. 
Philippians2:1 Metaa tenaa keetae enkitagoloto tiatua Kristo, te netii enkilejilejata e nyorrata, te netii enchula tiatua Enkiyang'et te netii enkaripo o lng'ur." 
Philippians2:2 Entabai naa eng'ida ai, aaku ile ndamunoto nabo o nyorrata nabo niaatata oltau obo nidamumu nabo." 
Philippians2:3 Emiaas ae bae te nkesha aashu te nkitokoos, kake te nkitadounoto e kewan meetae olemeitulusoo olikae aitalang kewan." 
Philippians2:4 Nchoo pooki te intae meaku mbaa enyena ake eing'or kake nchoo sii eing'or inoo lkulikae. 
Philippians2:5 Enoto ena damunoto tiatua intae maate niaatata sii tiatua Kristo Yesu," 
Philippians2:6 aa ore hoo neeta empukunoto e Nkai, neitu ninye eiken ina narisiore Enkai anaa ae toki naaji najo apidilakino," 
Philippians2:7 kake eitoroka ninye kewan neitanyaanyukie kewan osinka, neini anaa iltung'ana." 
Philippians2:8 Ore ake pee edoli eeta empukunoto e tung'ani neitadou kewan, nening'isho o metabaiki keeya, o metabaiki ina keeya te nchumata osalaba." 
Philippians2:9 Ore te nkaraki ena neitaa ninye Enkai kitok oleng, neisho ninye enkarna nalang inkarn pooki," 
Philippians2:10 neaku ore te nkarna e Yesu naa kegil pooki ng'ae kung, te keper o te nkop o ti abori enkop," 
Philippians2:11 neibalunye pooki ng'ejep inchere Yesu Kristo ninye Olaitoriani, te nkitoo e Enkai Papa." 
Philippians2:12 Ore naa ilanyor laainei, anaa enitoning'ishote oshi ake neijia sii enkuna ake o taata mme tenatii ake kake eisulaki oleng matii, entabai enjeunoto inyi te nkuretisho o te nkikirikirata." 
Philippians2:13 Amu Enkai naasisho tiatua intae, te pokira are, te yieunoto o te asata inyi te nkaraki yieuna enye sidai." 
Philippians2:14 Entaas mbaa pooki metii enking'unyung'uny anaa nkikilikuanat," 
Philippians2:15 pee metumi ake eleyiata napiki intae niaakuku nkera e Nkai nemeeta eleyiata tiatua ena kishon torrono niwang'ung'u aaku ewang'an te na kop; 
Philippians2:16 imbung'itata aakurraki ororei le mpuaan pee aa ore te nkolong e Kristo nawuasare intae nchere eitu akuet pesho aashu aisiaaisho pesho. 
Philippians2:17 Tenaa naaji ninye kaabukokini shumata olasar le enkirukoto inyi naa kang'ida nashipa nanu te nebo intae pooki. 
Philippians2:18 Ore teina, entishipata sii intae ning'idada te nebo nanu." 
Philippians2:19 Aisilig tiatua Olaitoriani Yesu ajo kairriu Timoteo meeu enitii asieku, pee aaitiship ilomon linyi." 
Philippians2:20 Maata likae laaijo ninye oing'or negolie mbaa inyi oleng. 
Philippians2:21 Mbaa enye ake eing'or ilkulikae, pooki neme nena e Yesu Kristo." 
Philippians2:22 Kake iyiololo intae tipat e Timoteo, nchere ore anaa enkerai o menye, netaasishe te nebo nanu tiatua ororei supat." 
Philippians2:23 Kaisilig naa ajo kairriu asioki tenayiolou mbaa aainei eneikunari; 
Philippians2:24 naisilig tiatua Olaitoriani nchere kalotu sii nanu makewan asieku. 
Philippians2:25 Atoduaa ajo keishiaakino nairriwaki intae Epafroditas olalashe lai, naa olaisiaayiani te nebo nanu, osikari te nebo nanu, naa olkipaaret linyi naa olaisiaayiani too nkolati aainei." 
Philippians2:26 Amu eyieuta oshi neduaare intae pooki, nenoto osina oleng amu itoning'o aajo kesipa etamuoyia." 
Philippians2:27 Etamuoyia o metinyikaki keeya kake eing'urrie Enkai neme ninye ake kake o nanu sii, pee matum ake osina aponiki likae sina." 
Philippians2:28 Nanu oyieu neirriu ninye, ajo pee ing'idayuyu te nintokiki aadol ninye, nemaitoki sii nanu aata osina." 
Philippians2:29 Entang'amu naa tiatua Olaitoriani te nchipai pooki niyanyititi iltung'ana ootiu inji. 
Philippians2:30 Amu eyieu eye te nkaraki esiaai e Kristo, etipika enkishui enye batisho pee eitabaya enkisiaayiare inyi." 
Philippians3:1 Ore enabayie, ilalashera laainei, enting'idata tiatua Olaitoriani. Tenasiraki intae aigil kuna nemaaitanaur, amu keitagol intae." 
Philippians3:2 Entodol ate te lelo diein, entodol ate te lelo aasak loo ntorrok, entodol ate te lelo oodung osesen." 
Philippians3:3 Amu iyiook emuratare nasipa, ilooserem Enkai te nkiyang'et, nikiwuasare Kristo Yesu, nimiking'idare osesen." 
Philippians3:4 Ore hoo duoo naata sii nanu makewan esipata pee ang'idare osesen, tenetii likae tung'ani ojo keeta esipata pee eng'idare osesen, nanu oisul." 
Philippians3:5 Te nkolong e isiet aatumurataki, nara ololorere loo Siraeli, lo losho le Benchamen, Olhebraniai, ore tialo nkitanapat nara Olfarisayoi," 
Philippians3:6 ore te nyuaata nara olaisilisiloni le sirit, ore te supatisho ti abori nkitanapat, nemaata eleyiata." 
Philippians3:7 Kake ore dupoto pooki apa naata, naikena aitaa pesho te nkaraki Kristo." 
Philippians3:8 Aikenayie ntokitin pooki aitaa pesho te nkaraki nemeeta enalang eyiolounoto e Kristo Yesu Olaitoriani lai. Ore te nkaraki ninye, naiturrayie ntokitin pooki naikenaa ajo etiu anaa nkik, pee atum Kristo." 
Philippians3:9 Naliooyu nanu tiatua ninye, maata esupatisho ai makewan naing'uaa nkitanapat, kake ina naing'uaa enkirukoto tiatua Kristo, ina supatisho naing'uaa Enkai nang'amuni te nkirukoto," 
Philippians3:10 pee ayiolou nanu ninye o engolon e mpiunoto enye, nang'arie olosilisili lenye, atiu anaa ninye tiatua keeya," 
Philippians3:11 paa teneidimayu natum empiunoto aing'uaa ilootuata. 
Philippians3:12 Mme taa kaidipa anoto ena neme kaidipa ataa bayaroti, kake kanyokita aitaa enaai amu Kristo Yesu laaitaa olenye." 
Philippians3:13 Ilalashera, mme taa kaikena kewan ajo kaidipa aitaa enaai; kake ena nabo aas, aishoo maatorikinoto inaatii siadi, naekenya alo dukuya abaiki idia naipirakinore," 
Philippians3:14 nanyok aisarrisar pee abaiki idia rishata o enkishooroto o enkipototo e Nkai e shumata tiatua Kristo Yesu. 
Philippians3:15 Enchoo lelo lang ootubulutua te nkirukoto aabaya metadamu ena, naa te nepaashari intae indamunot ti ae toki, naa keibalakinye sii ninche intae Enkai." 
Philippians3:16 Emaibung'a ake intae te sipata ina nikindipa aatang'amu. 
Philippians3:17 Ilalashera, embung'ata entaa lasujak laainei, ning'oring'oro lelo ootiu neijia te nkishon enye amu iatata enkitanyaanyukoto te iyiook." 
Philippians3:18 Amu ore anaa enaidipa atoliki ntae, naa kaliki sii taata intae, ebaiki too lkiyio, kebik ilkumok anaa ilmang'ati lo salaba le Kristo." 
Philippians3:19 Ore enkiting'oto enye naa mutata, ore enkai enye naa inkoishuaa enye. Neng'idare enkurruna enye naa ntokitin e nkop eenikino indamunot enye." 
Philippians3:20 Kake kira iyiook ile keper, naa ine eing'uaa Olaitajeunoni likiaanyita, Olaitoriani lang Yesu Kristo," 
Philippians3:21 laa ninye oyooki aibelekeny ele sesen lang oshal metotiwuo anaa ilo sesen lenye le nkitoo teina golon naidimie ninye metipika ebaiki ntokitin pooki abori enkitoria enye makewan. 
Philippians4:1 Ore naa ilalashera o nkanashera aainei nanyor, ntae eng'ida o enkopiyia ai e nkitoo, entashoito enkuna neijia tiatua Olaitoriani, ilanyor laainei." 
Philippians4:2 Asai Eudia, nasai Sintike metoning'oto anaa nkanashera tiatua Olaitoriani." 
Philippians4:3 Naaikilikuan sii iyie encholiek ai nadede, taretu kuna kituaak amu aatang'arie ninche enyamali te nkaraki ororei supat, te nebo Klement o lelo kulikae ootaasishote te nebo nanu, ootii nkarn enye atua embuku e mpuaan." 
Philippians4:4 Enting'idata tiatua Olaitoriani anaake, naitoki ake ajo enting'idata." 
Philippians4:5 Nchoo iltung'ana pooki metayioloito emborron inyi. Etataana Olaitoriani. 
Philippians4:6 Emintanyamal ate ti ae toki, kake ore te pooki toki te nkomono o te nkishooroto e nashe, Enchoo Enkai metayiolo inkolati inyi" 
Philippians4:7 neaku eseriani e Nkai nalang eyiolounoto pooki narrip iltauja linyi o ndamunot inyi tiatua Kristo Yesu. 
Philippians4:8 Ore enabayie ilalashera o nkanashera naa inchere, ore pooki naasipa, ore pooki nayanyitayu, ore pooki naata errepet sidai, te netii orrekie sidai netii orrekie oiririkino enkisisa, kuna entadamu." 
Philippians4:9 Ore nena nitayioloito o nitang'amutua o nitoning'o o nitoduaa te nanu, entaas; neaku Enkai e seriani te nebo intae." 
Philippians4:10 Ekang'ida tiatua Olaitoriani lang amu inyaakita aaitopiu osotua te nanu, esipa kitadamutua sii apa kake eitu itumutumu erishata." 
Philippians4:11 Neme taa kaing'unyung'uny ayieu ae toki, amu ateng'enaka aidipakinore mbaa pooki." 
Philippians4:12 Kayiolo eneikununo eng'orikinoto aashu enkiputakinoto, ore te pooki toki oo too rishat pooki atayiolo olosek lashurakinye eraposhoi o esumash, ti ari o ti ameyu." 
Philippians4:13 Kaidim ataasa mbaa pooki tiatua ilo laa ninye laaidimie. 
Philippians4:14 Kake itaasa enaishiaakino te nkaraki kitang'arie osina lai. 
Philippians4:15 Niyiololo intae Ilfilipi oopeny nchere ore apa te nkiterunoto o rorei supat, ina kata pee aing'uaa Makedonia, nemetii esirit naatang'arie enkishooroto aashu eng'amunoto meteleku intae ake." 
Philippians4:16 Ore ninye apa atii Sesalonike, kirriwakita nanu eretoto e dukuya o ene are." 
Philippians4:17 Neme taa enkishorunoto aing'oru, kake aing'oru ilng'anayio ooponari ooikenakini intae." 
Philippians4:18 Atang'amua te Epafroditas nkishoorot nirriutua, enkishorunoto narropil, o lasar ong'amaroyu naa oloitiship Enkai." 
Philippians4:19 Naa keiputaki Enkai ntae pooki olat inyi te risioroto e nkarsisisho enye te nkitoo tiatua Kristo Yesu. 
Philippians4:20 Metaa ene Enkai naa Papa lang, enkitoo ntarasi o ntarasi. Eesai." 
Philippians4:21 Eroroki lelo pooki sinyat tiatua Kristo Yesu. Eiroroki intae ilalashera ootii te nebo nanu. 
Philippians4:22 Eiroroki intae isinyat pooki neisulaki lelo le nkaji e Kaisari. 
Philippians4:23 Metaa empiris o Laitoriani Yesu Kristo te nebo ntae pooki. 
Colossians1:1 Paulo olkipaaret le Yesu Kristo te yieunoto e Nkai o Timoteo olalashe lang. 
Colossians1:2 Kingeroki isinyat o lalashera ooisiligayu tiatua Kristo ootii Kolosai. Enoto empiris o eseriani eing'uaa Enkai Papa lang. 
Colossians1:3 Kishukoki oshi ake Enkai enashe, Papa lo Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo, too nkatitin pooki kiomonoki intae;" 
Colossians1:4 amu kitoning'oitie enkirukoto inyi tiatua Kristo Yesu o enyorrata ninyorrinyorro isinyat. 
Colossians1:5 Ore eneing'uaa nena pokira are naa ilo siligi litoning'o apa pee elotu enitii olkilikuai osipa loo Lomon Supati, naa te keper eiputakini intae ilo siligi." 
Colossians1:6 Nebulita lelo Omon Supati aaiu ilng'anayio te nkop pooki; anaa enaikuna tiatua intae ebaiki ina olong apa nining'ining'i empiris e Nkai niyiolouu te sipata. 
Colossians1:7 Inteng'ena ate te Epafras lanyor naa osinka le ncholiek ai, naa osinka oisiligayu le Kristo ninye te rishata ang," 
Colossians1:8 naa ninye oinosaka iyiook eneba enyorrata naishoo Enkiyang'et intae. 
Colossians1:9 Ore te nkaraki ina, eitu kigira mikiomonoki intae ebaiki ina olong nikitoning'o pee eiput intae eyiolounoto e yieunoto e Nkai tiatua eng'eno pooki e yiolounoto o ltau," 
Colossians1:10 nikiomonoki intae pee ipuoyieyie enkishui naishiaa to Laitoriani, naitiship ninye katukul, nitumutumu aatoiu ilng'anayio too mpukunot pooki e supatisho, nitumutumu aatobikoi iponaa oleng oleng aayiolou Enkai." 
Colossians1:11 Meitagoli intae te ngolon pooki, te risioroto e ngolon kitok e nkisisa enye, te ng'iriata pooki ning'iriri nishipapa," 
Colossians1:12 ninchosho Papa enashe, oisho iyiook esipata neng'arie iyiook enjung'ore oo sinyat tiatua ewang'an." 
Colossians1:13 Ninye otalakua iyiook aitung'uaa enkitoria e naimin neidurrie iyiook maape enkitoria o Inoti lenye kirotet," 
Colossians1:14 laa te ninye kiaata elakunoto, aa empalakinoto oo ng'ok ang." 
Colossians1:15 Kristo nyaanyukie e ina Ai nemelioo, ninye olkikau le pooki toki naitayioki." 
Colossians1:16 Te nkaraki ninye pee eitayioki intokitin pooki, naatii keper o naatii enkop, inaalioo o nemelioo te naa ilorikan loo looitoreisho, aashu inkitoriat, aashu ilooishoro engolon e nkitoria, te ninye eitayioki ntokitin naa ninye eitobirakaki." 
Colossians1:17 Ninye otii enkiterunoto oo ntokitin pooki, naa atua ninye eitasheyie aatumokino ntokitin pooki." 
Colossians1:18 Kristo elukunya o sesen, aa esirit, ninye enkiterunoto, olkikau otopiwuo aing'uaa ilootuata, peyie eaku ninye oituruk te pooki toki." 
Colossians1:19 Amu atua ninye etonyorra Enkai aitamany emborei pooki enye," 
Colossians1:20 naa te Kristo eitaikinye Enkai osotua ntokitin pooki, te naa inaatii enkop aashu inaatii keper neyau eseriani to sarge lo salaba lenye." 
Colossians1:21 Ore intae, iloora apa aekata ileeiking'a tialo Enkai nirara ilmang'ati tiatua ndamunot inyi o to lbae loo iasat inyi torrok," 
Colossians1:22 neitaa intae Enkai nabo to sesen le Kristo eimu keeya enye, pee etum aitarasai intae irara sinyat nimiaatata intiyot nimiaatata entibili naipotokini intae te dukuya ninye," 
Colossians1:23 kake nchere pee ipuoyieyie enkirukoto, niunokinono nemeigusugusieki intae, nemeiwuang'ieki intae to siligi loo Lomon Supati litoning'o, ootolikioki pooki oishu te nkop, laa ninye ataa nanu Paulo olaisiaayiani lenye." 
Colossians1:24 Nang'ida taata nanu tiatua sinaitin laainosieki te nkaraki intae to sesen lai, naitabaya nena naang'or te nkisilisiloto e Kristo to lbae lo sesen lenye, aa esirit." 
Colossians1:25 Nataa nanu olaisiaayiani lenye te risioroto e siaai naaisho Enkai te nkaraki intae, maitudupai ilo rorei le Nkai katukul," 
Colossians1:26 naa ninye enkisudoroto naisudoyioki too nkatitin o too lajijik kake etabolokoki taata isinyat lenyena. 
Colossians1:27 Ninche etegelua Enkai aitayiolo eneba tiatua iloreren enkarsisisho e nkitoo ena kisudoroto, naa Kristo tiatua intae olora osiligi le nkitoo." 
Colossians1:28 Ninye kilikioo, kinkok pooki tung'ani, nikinteng'en pooki tung'ani te ng'eno pooki, peyie kitum aaitarasai pooki tung'ani otaa bayaroti tiatua Kristo." 
Colossians1:29 Te nkaraki ena pee anyokita; nanyamaliki te ngolon pooki te nkidimata e ilo Kristo oisiaaisho tiatua nanu. 
Colossians2:1 Kayieu niyiolouu eneba enyamali nanyamaliki intae o lelo ootii Laodikea o lelo pooki leitu aekata aadol enkomom," 
Colossians2:2 pee aitagol iltauja lenye neitaae nabo tiatua enyorrata. Kaas ena pee etum pooki dupoto te ning'unoto nasipa e ng'eno o enkisudoroto e Nkai laa Kristo," 
Colossians2:3 olaa tiatua ninye eisudoro imasaa pooki sidain e yiolounoto o eng'eno. 
Colossians2:4 Najo kuna, pee melej intae likae too rorei le lejare." 
Colossians2:5 Amu ore hoo nematii ine to sesen, kake katii te nkiyang'et naa kang'ida te nadol orrekie linyi sidai o enkitashoto e nkirukoto inyi tiatua Kristo." 
Colossians2:6 Ore anaa apa enitang'amutua Olaitoriani Kristo Yesu, enchoo eaku ninye inchuyieyie," 
Colossians2:7 niunokinono neshetuni intae, niponaa inchosho ninye enashe." 
Colossians2:8 Entodol ate mewuapaa intae likae te ng'eno oo losekin o elejare e pesho nasuj inkoon e tung'ani anaa inaajo nkiyang'eta o loing'ang'e, neme anaa naajo Kristo." 
Colossians2:9 Amu atua Kristo emanya elulung'ata pooki e Nkai to sesen," 
Colossians2:10 neewuo alulung'ayu enkishui inyi tiatua ninye, olaa ninye elukunya e nkitoria o enkidimata." 
Colossians2:11 Tiatua ninye etumurataki intae te murata neme enoo nkaik, eitayioki aaoru intae ina kewan o sesen tiatua emurata e Kristo." 
Colossians2:12 Netunukayioki intae te nebo Kristo tiatua enkibatisa, naa te ninye enyaakaki aaitopiu intae te nkirukoto tiatua enkiaas e Nkai, naitopiwuo ninye aitung'uaa ilootuata." 
Colossians2:13 Naa intae, ilootuata apa too nkitarruorrot o too seseni linyi lememurata eitopiwuo intae Enkai te nebo ninye, netapalaka iyiook inkitarruorrot ang pooki," 
Colossians2:14 netujuto enkiguana ang; ninye oiwuang'ie kuna, neshe to salaba." 
Colossians2:15 Ninye otuuruo nkitoriat o loogol pooki o masaa o larrabal neitoduaaya te neibala, nerik aitaa iyarunot etimira ninche." 
Colossians2:16 Emincho naa edung'oki likae intae enkiguana too mbaa e ndaa anaa te naoki aashu te masho, aashu te nkiborra o lapa aashu te nkolong e nkiyeng'iyeng'ata." 
Colossians2:17 Oloip ake kuna le kulie naapuonu; kake ore enkewan naa Kristo. 
Colossians2:18 Emincho hoo eoruni intae nchuneti lelo ooserem ilmalaika eji neunore kulikae induaat, neipopong'a meeta esipata too ndamunot enye e tung'anisho," 
Colossians2:19 nemeenikino ilo ora Elukunya, olaa ninye etumie osesen pooki dupoto neruburuba too morlooishi o sinigi lenyena, nebulu te mbulunoto naa Enkai eing'uaa." 
Colossians2:20 Te naa ituata te nebo Kristo te nkalo e nena kiyang'eta e nkop, kainyoo eton ake ipuopuo anaa ileton era ile nkop? Oo pee inchosho eitore intae irrekiei leeiking'a:" 
Colossians2:21 Eji, “Mimbung, minchamisham, nimiseyie?”" 
Colossians2:22 (Keimaki ninche intokitin naapurda easishoreki), aasuj inkoon oo ltung'ana o enkiteng'enare enye?" 
Colossians2:23 Kedoli doi kuna etiu anaa ine ng'eno etukunyaki iltung'ana esujata enye neitadou ate neitupukoo iseseni lenye kake, meeta hoo eneret te nkibooroto oo ng'uarrat o sesen." 
Colossians3:1 Tenaa keitopiwuoki intae te nebo Kristo, eng'oru nena baa naatii shumata, ewueji netii Kristo, etonita te nkaina e tatene e Nkai." 
Colossians3:2 Empirie indamunot inyi nena baa naatii shumata, mme nena naatii enkop." 
Colossians3:3 Amu indipa aatuata, neisudoyioki enkishui inyi te nebo Kristo tiatua Enkai." 
Colossians3:4 Ore pee eliooyu Kristo laa ninye enkishui ang, niliooyuyu sii intae te nebo ninye tiatua enkisisa." 
Colossians3:5 Entaar naa metuata tiatua intae, nena naara ine nkop; aa enkiborra oo nkonyek, iloirerioni, olorok, ng'uarrat torrok, olodo ong'u, eomonoto oo nkitanyaanyukot naaitaae inkaitin." 
Colossians3:6 Te kuna baa elotu engoro e Nkai. 
Colossians3:7 Kuna apa ipuoyieyie eton itii atua ninche. 
Colossians3:8 Kake ore taata, ewuang'ie nena pooki: aa ewuapa, engoro, enkiba, esukeny, o lderrat torrok ooing'uaa inkutukie inyi." 
Colossians3:9 Milej olikae olikae, te nkaraki ituburukushutua enkewan musana o rrekiei lenyena," 
Colossians3:10 ninchopo enkewan ng'ejuk, naitang'ejuki te ng'eno metanyaanyukie ilo oitayio ninye." 
Colossians3:11 Ore naa, meetae Olgiriki o Lyahudi o loomurata o lememurata, olmeeki, Osikite, orrindik, ololakuno, kake Kristo pooki toki, netii ninye atua pooki." 
Colossians3:12 Irara ntae ilgelunot le Enkai, oosinya nenyorri, enchopo enanai e nkoshoke o lng'ur o emoolisho o emborron o eng'iriata." 
Colossians3:13 Enting'iriakinoto olikae o likae, naa teneeta ake oltung'ani enkigunyung'uny to likae, nepalaki olikae anaa pee kitapalaka sii iyie Olaitoriani, neaku keishiaakino sii iyie pee ipalaki." 
Colossians3:14 Ore enaituruk te kuna pooki, enoto enyorrata, te naboisho nabaya." 
Colossians3:15 Naa enchoo eseriani e Kristo eitore iltauja linyi, amu ina eipotokoki intae tiatua ilo sesen obo, naa enoto enashe." 
Colossians3:16 Enchoo ororei le Kristo emany atua intae te nkarsisisho, inteng'enana niutaroro olikae o likae te ng'eno pooki, iranyiranya Olkerempe le Nkai o sinkolioitin le nkishui inchosho Enkai enashe tiatua iltauja linyi." 
Colossians3:17 Ore embae ake pooki niaasiasa, to rorei aashu too nkiaasin, entaas pooki toki te nkarna o Laitoriani Yesu inchosho Enkai Papa enashe eimu ninye." 
Colossians3:18 Na kituaak, entoning ilpayiani linyi, anaa enaishiaakino to Laitoriani." 
Colossians3:19 Lo payiani, entonyor inkituaak inyi, emisomit." 
Colossians3:20 Nakera, entoning intoiwuo inyi too mbaa pooki, amu ena naitiship Olaitoriani." 
Colossians3:21 Ore intae iloo menye, emintagor inkera inyi, pee miariara iltauja." 
Colossians3:22 Lo rrindiki, entoning te pooki bae lelo oora ilkituaak linyi te nkop, neme te nkisiaayiare oo nkonyek anaa ilooitiship iltung'ana, kake to ltau obo, iurere Olaitoriani." 
Colossians3:23 Ore esiaai inyi pooki niasiasa, entaas too ltauja linyi pooki, anaa Olaitoriani iasakiki neme iltung'ana," 
Colossians3:24 iyiololo aajo to Laitoriani itumutumu enjung'ore anaa olekoisiaayio linyi; Olaitoriani Kristo isiaaitata. 
Colossians3:25 Amu keyookini aaitalak oloas intorrok nena torrok naataasa, nemeetae enyorrakinoto." 
Colossians4:1 Ore intae ilooitoreisho, entaasa irrindiki linyi isipat o too nkiririkinot, iyiololo aajo iatata sii intae Olkitok linyi te keper." 
Colossians4:2 Entasheikinoto enkomono emingusugus, irripishosho nisholololo, niomonokiki sii ninche iyiook," 
Colossians4:3 metaboloki Enkai iyiook enkoitoi ele rorei, matolikioi enkisudoroto naipirta Kristo naa te nkaraki ninye pee atii nanu jila," 
Colossians4:4 peyie atum aibalunye enaaishiaakino nairo. 
Colossians4:5 Enteng'enuoto tialo ilelo leme ilairukok niasishorere irishat pooki. 
Colossians4:6 Enchoo nkirorot inyi nkatitin pooki eaku ine mborron neeta emunyan, pee itumutumu aatayiolo enijojo te niwalikiki pooki ng'ae." 
Colossians4:7 Tikikos olotu aliki intae mbaa aainei; olalashe lai lanyor naa olaisiaayiani oisiligayu naa osinka le ncholiek ai tiatua Olaitoriani. 
Colossians4:8 Nanu oirriwua enitii ajo pee, itumutumu aatayiolo enikitiu netum aitagolo iltauja linyi," 
Colossians4:9 neiriamunore Onesimas olalashe onyorri neisiligayu, laa obo linyi. Ninche oopuonu aainosaki intae mbaa pooki naataasate tene." 
Colossians4:10 Eiroroki intae Aristakos oena te nebo nanu, neiroroki intae Marko le nkanashe e Barnaba (Iindipa aanoto olkilikuai loo mbaa enyena - te neewuo ninye enitii, entang'amu)," 
Colossians4:10 Eiroroki intae Aristakos oena te nebo nanu, neiroroki intae Marko le nkanashe e Barnaba (Iindipa aanoto olkilikuai loo mbaa enyena - te neewuo ninye enitii, entang'amu)," 
Colossians4:11 neiroroki intae Yesu oji Yusto. Kulo tung'ana okuni ake loo lyahudi oora laisiaayiak le ncholiek aikisiaai enkitoria e Enkai, naataretutuo ninche." 
Colossians4:12 Eiroroki intae Epafras, laa obo linyi, osinka le Yesu Kristo, neiroroki intae, nedamu intae oshi ake oleng te nkomono enye, peyie intasheshe te mbulunoto neitisipi eyieunoto e Nkai tiatua intae."
