Colossians4:13 Kara shakeni lenye nchere etonyuaa aaisiaai intae naleng o lelo ootii Laodikea o lelo ootii Hierapolis. 
Colossians4:14 Eiroroki intae Luka oloshi abaani lanyor, neiroroki intae Demas." 
Colossians4:15 Enchoo lalashera laainei ootii Laodikea enkirorokino ai, ninchosho Nimfa o ina sirit natii enkaji enye." 
Colossians4:16 Naa ore pee eidipi aaisumaki intae ena palai enchoo sii eisumakini esirit oo Laodikea; naa entodol pee eisumakini sii ninche intae ina palai naing'uaa Laodikea. 
Colossians4:17 Naa entiaaki Arkipus, “Toduaa ake pee intabaya ina siaai nitang'amua tiatua Olaitoriani.”" 
Colossians4:18 Nanu, Paulo oigero ena kirorokino te nkaina ai makewan. Entadamu ilpisia laainei. Metaa empiris e Nkai te nebo intae." 
1Thessalonians1:1 Nanu Paulo o Silvano o Timoteo, ooigeroki esirit oo Lsesalonike, tiatua Enkai Papa o Laitoriani Yesu Kristo. Enoto empiris o eseriani." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Kincho oshiaake Enkai enashe te nkaraki intae pooki nikidamu ntae anaake tiatua enkomono ang. 
1Thessalonians1:3 Kidamu intae te dukuya Enkai ang Papa o esiaai inyi e nkirukoto o enyamali e nyorrata o enkitaushoto o siligi tiatua Olaitoriani lang Yesu Kristo. 
1Thessalonians1:4 Amu irara nkanashera o lalashera oonyor Enkai kiyiolo aajo etegelua ninye intae," 
1Thessalonians1:5 amu aime to rorei ake etabaikia intae ororei supat, kake te ngolon sii o te Nkiyang'et Sinyati o te sipunoto nalulung'a. Iyiololo empukunoto ang enaikununo apa kitii atua intae naa te nkaraki intae." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Nitaa intae ilooduaaya iyiook o Laitoriani amu, itang'amutua ilo rorei te nkaripo sapuk, te ng'ida naing'uaa Enkiyang'et Sinyati." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Itaa intae enkitanyaanyukoto too lairukok pooki tiatua Makedonia o tiatua Akaia. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Amu mme taa ake tiatua Makedonia o Akaia etoning'e ele rorei lo Laitoriani naa intae eing'uaa kake ore enkirukoto inyi tiatua Enkai neshomo aibulaa pooki wueji, neaku meeta tipat pee kijo ae." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Amu ore ninche maate netolimutuo tialo iyiook eneba enkitoomono nikinoto te intae o eninkuna pee imbelekenyakinono Enkai aaing'uaa inkitanyaanyukot, aaisiaai Enkai naishu nasipa," 
1Thessalonians1:10 nianyunyu Oinoti lenye eing'uaa keper, ilo oitopiwuo ninye aitung'uaa ilootuata, Yesu laa ninye olaku iyiook aitung'uaa engoro e Nkai nalotu." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Iyiololo intae maate, ilalashera o nkanashera inchere mme ene pesho elotunoto ang nikietuo enitii intae." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Amu iyiololo, olosilisili o morot nikinoto te Filipi, neme toki amu eishoo iyiook Enkai empijan nikilikinye intae Ilomon Supati, hoo netii enkesha sapuk." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Amu ore esayiakinoto ang nemepuku eing'uaa enkitapong'oroto anaa ilduruki neme to losek eitobiruaki. 
1Thessalonians2:4 Kake ore anaa enatonyorrayie iyiook Enkai neisiligaki iyiook Ilomon Supati, neijia kijo iyiook neme pee kintiship iltung'ana, kake pee kintiship Enkai naineneng indamunot ang." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Amu ore iyiook neitu aekata kiasishore irorei le nkilelemare, anaa eniyiololo, aashu kiaata imbaa naisudoo eului naa Enkai shakeni." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Neitu king'oru enkisisa too ltung'ana, aa te intae, aashu te kulikae, hoo naa anaata kinkuna neijia anaa ilkipaareta le Kristo." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Kake aikibor apa tiatua intae anaa enkaibung'ani naing'or inkera enyena. 
1Thessalonians2:8 Neaku ore te nkaripo kiyieu intae kiterretenate pee king'ar te nebo intae neme ilomon ake Supati le Nkai maate, kake o yiook sii maate amu itaa intae kiroteti oleng te iyiook." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Amu idamumu intae enyamali ang o esiaai nagol, ilalashera o nkanashera, kitaasishote dama o kewarie, pee mikiek hoo likae te intae, kiliki intae Ilomon Supati le Nkai." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Irara intae shakeni, naa neijia sii etiu Enkai, te sinyatisho o te supatisho nimikiaata entiyoto to lkuaak lang tialo intae ilairukok." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Iyiololo aajo kintaasa intae anaa enaitaas menye inkera enyena, kinkoo pooki ng'ae te ntae nikintagol oishuaa, nikintanapa intae." 
1Thessalonians2:12 Pee ipuopuo te nkishon naishiaakino te Nkai, ilo oipotoki intae atua enkitoria enye makewan e nkitoo." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Nikincho sii iyiook oshiaake Enkai enashe te nkaraki ena, inchere pee ing'amumu ororei le Nkai litoning'o te iyiook, eitu intae ing'amumu anaa ororei loo ltung'ana, kake anaa enatiu te dede ororei le Enkai tiatua intae ilairukok." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Amu ore intae ilalashera o nkanashera intoduaarie ate isirito e Nkai tiatua Kristo Yesu naatii atua Yudea. Amu inoto sii intae olosilisili too ltung'ana lo lorere linyi anaa enanoto sii ninche too Lyahudi," 
1Thessalonians2:15 laa ninche ootaara ndung'ot pokira metuata, Olaitoriani Yesu o loibonok le Nkai, nearaa iyiook ong'ata, nemeitiship Enkai neibooyo ltung'ana pooki" 
1Thessalonians2:16 emitiki iyiook kiliki Iloreren enaiko pee eitajeuni, ejo pee etum aaiputu emborei o ng'ok enye pooki. Kake eewuo engoro e Nkai te nkiting'oto shumata ninche." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Kake ore naa ilalashera o nkanashera, anaa neorieki iyiook intae te nkiti kata, too seseni neme too ltauja, kitonyuaa te yieuna sapuk o te nyorrata kitok pee kintoki aadua." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Amu kitayieutua nikipuonu enitii intae, atetema nanu Paulo enkata neme nabo kake eibooyie iyiook Sheitani." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Amu kainyoo osiligi lang aashu eng'ida aashu entoki naisul nikiwuasare te dukuya Olaitoriani lang Yesu te lotunoto enye? Aime intae? 
1Thessalonians2:20 Amu irara intae enkitoo ang o eng'ida ang. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Ore etaa meekure kindim aating'iria, nikinyorraa metung'uari iyiook oopeny te Atene." 
1Thessalonians3:2 Nikirriutua iyiook Timoteo, olalashe lang naa osinka le Nkai tiatua Lomon Supati le Kristo pee elotu ashet intae tiatua enkirukoto inyi neilejilej sii intae;" 
1Thessalonians3:3 pee metii hoo obo linyi orinyo siadi te kulo sinaitin, amu iyiololo intae maate inchere erubata ang ina." 
1Thessalonians3:4 Amu ore apa kitii te nebo intae, kitolikitio intae eado kop inchere keyookini aaisilisil iyiook; anaa enayewuo ake atiu, anaa eniyiololo intae." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Ore te nkaraki ina neitu aitoki aidim ating'iria, nairriu Timoteo enitii ayiolou enkirukoto inyi, amu aturia ajo ebaiki netetema intae Sheitani neaku esiaai ang ene pesho." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Kake ore taata eewuo Timoteo enikitii eing'uaa enitii intae, neinosaki iyiook ilomon sidain le nkirukoto o enyorrata inyi, nelimu inchere idamumu oshiaake iyiook too sidain niyieuu oleng nidolidolo iyiook anaa enikiyieu sii iyiook nikidol intae." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Ore te nkaraki ena ilalashera, o nkanashera eilejilejaki yiook tialo emion o sinaitin lang pooki te nkaraki enkirukoto inyi." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Amu ore taata naa aikinchu iyiook, tinintasheshe intae nimiwuatiwuatata tiatua Olaitoriani." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Amu kebaa enashe nikindim aaishoo Enkai te nkaraki intae, te ng'ida pooki nikiaata te nkaraki intae te dukuya e Nkai." 
1Thessalonians3:10 Kiomon aaitirrish kewarie o dama pee kitum aatodol intae pee kintoki aaduaa, pee kitum aaishoo intae ina nang'or tiatua enkirukoto inyi." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Kiomon naa taata metooroki iyiook Enkai ang naa Papa makewan o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo enkoitoi pee kipuonu enitii intae; 
1Thessalonians3:12 metoponai Olaitoriani enyorrata te rishata inyi intae maate o too ltung'ana pooki anaa enikitiu iyiook te intae," 
1Thessalonians3:13 pee etum ninye aitagolo iltauja linyi meeta entiyoto te sinyatisho te dukuya e Enkai ang naa Papa lang te lotunoto o Laitoriani lang Yesu te nebo isinyat lenyena pooki. 
1Thessalonians4:1 Ore enabaiyie ilalashera, o nkanashera kinkilikuan intae nikisai intae tiatua Olaitoriani Yesu, anaa enitayioloito te iyiook enaishiaakino te nitiuu to lkuaak o te nkitishipata e Nkai, ore anaa eniaasitata, entaas ina oleng oleng." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Amu iyiololo inkiteng'enat, nikinchoo iyiook intae eing'uaa Olaitoriani Yesu." 
1Thessalonians4:3 Amu ena eyeiunoto e Nkai te intae nchere pee iakuku iloosinya nilamilama eloloito," 
1Thessalonians4:4 neyiolou sii pooki ng'ae linyi enaiko te nerikoki kewan enkitok te sinyatisho o te nkanyit," 
1Thessalonians4:5 neme tiatua ing'uarrat torrok anaa iltung'ana lemeiyiolo Enkai; 
1Thessalonians4:6 inchere pee mepong'ori oltung'ani ainyal olalashe lenye te na bae; amu Olaitoriani oitalaku tiatua kuna baa pooki, anaa enikinturukokito aaikok intae te dukuya." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Eitu eipotoki iyiook Enkai olduruk kake atua esinyatisho eipotoko iyiook. 
1Thessalonians4:8 Metaa ore oltung'ani pooki lemeshilaa ena neme oltung'ani eitu eshilaa kake Enkai, naisho intae Enkiyang'et enye Sinyati." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Kake ore tialo enyorrata oo lalashera, nemeeta tipat pee eigeroki likae tung'ani ntae ae toki, amu ore intae maate eiteng'ena intae Enkai entonyorrata olikae o likae," 
1Thessalonians4:10 nedede inchere inyorrinyorro ilalashera o nkanashera pooki natii atua Makedonia. Kake kisai intae ilalashera entaas ina oleng oleng," 
1Thessalonians4:11 ning'oruru pee itonini aaitirring'a nigolielie isiaaitin inyi. Niaasishosho too nkaik inyi anaa enikintanapa intae; 
1Thessalonians4:12 pee itilitili kuldo leme ile ncholiek inyi, nemeitoki aaku oltung'ani ingarakinono." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Ilalashera o nkanashera mikiyieu nimiaatata intae eyiolounoto tialo lelo ootuata pee misinanuonuo enaa anaiko kulikae lemeeta osiligi. 
1Thessalonians4:14 Amu ore te nkaraki nikiruko inchere etua Yesu neitoki apiu, neijia sii etiu, ore tiatua Yesu, kerrinyu Enkai te nebo ninye lelo ootuata." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Amu ena kimbalakinye intae to rorei lo Laitoriani, inchere ore iyiook ilooishu, ootelekutua ometabau elotunoto o Laitoriani, nimikipuo aaituruk te lelo ootuata." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Amu Olaitoriani makewan odou eing'uaa keper to ltoilo le nkitoria o to ltoilo lo lmalaika kitok o endarata e mowuo e Nkai. Ore ilootuata tiatua Kristo nepiu te dukuya. 
1Thessalonians4:17 Ore iyiook ilooishu, ootelekutua, neibung'i iyiook aailepie te nebo ninche tiatua inkatampo pee kinang'are Olaitoriani to loing'ang'e, nikiaku iyiook tenebo Olaitoriani anaake." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Metaa entagoloto olikae olikae te kulo rorei. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Kake ore too naaipirta inkatitin o rishat ilalashera o nkanashera nemeeta tipat pee eigerokini intae ae bae. 
1Thessalonians5:2 Amu iyiololo intae maate oleng inchere kelotu enkolong o Laitoriani anaa olapurroni te nkewarie. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Ore ejo olorere, “Keetae eseriani nemeetae batisho,” ore nabo kata nelotu erruorroto shumata ninche anaa emion nainepu enkitok nairoshiwuo nemeeta eneilanyaki." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Kake mitii intae atua enaimin ilalashera metaa keluam intae ina olong anaa olapurroni. 
1Thessalonians5:5 Amu kira iyiook pooki inkera e wang'an o nkera e ndama, metaa mikira ile nkewarie aashu ile naimin." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Ore te nkaraki ina, emikirura naa anaa enairura kulikae, kake matashololoto nikinteng'enuo." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Amu ore kuldo ooirura naa kewarie eirura ore kuldo oomera naa kewarie emera. 
1Thessalonians5:8 Kake ore amu kira ile ndama emaiteng'enuoto nikinchop elong'o oo lgooitie aa enkirukoto o enyorrata, ore enkopiyia ang naa osiligi le njeunoto." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Amu mme engoro enye eyieu Enkai nikinting'oki kake pee kitum enjeunoto naimu Olaitoriani lang Yesu Kristo," 
1Thessalonians5:10 otua te nkaraki iyiook paa te naa aikinchu aashu kituata nikinchu te nebo ninye. 
1Thessalonians5:11 Neaku entagoloto oishuaa o likae o likae naa enteshetata olikae o likae anaa ina niaasitata. 
1Thessalonians5:12 Kake kisai intae, ilalashera o nkanashera, enchoo enkanyit lelo ooasisho tiatua intae, anaa ilairukok outaa ntae tiatua Olaitoriani neikok intae." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Enchoo ninche enkanyit sapuk nalus o enyorrata te nkaraki esiaai enye. Enchoo ejing eseriani atua intae maate. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Nikisai intae ilalashera, enkoo ilturua nipikipiki enyuaata ilootapalari niretutu ilooshal, enting'iria te lelo pooki." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Entodol pee melaaki oltung'ani olikae entorroni te ntorroni, kake entetem anaake entaasata isidain maate o ltung'ana pooki." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Entishipata anaake. 
1Thessalonians5:17 Entoomon pooki kata," 
1Thessalonians5:18 enchooi enashe te pooki pukunoto, amu ena doi eyieunoto e Nkai te ntae tiatua Kristo Yesu." 
1Thessalonians5:19 Nimisiorogogo Enkiyang'et Sinyati," 
1Thessalonians5:20 nimimenaa enaibon e Nkai. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Kake eneneng'a pooki toki, embung'a entukurraki ina sidai." 
1Thessalonians5:22 Entalam empukunoto pooki e ntorroni. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Meitisinya intae Enkai e seriani makewan tukul, ore enkiyang'et inyi o ltau o sesen, metaa biyoto meeta entibili o metaa enkata e lotunoto o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Ore ilo ooipot intae, keisiligayu naa keitabaya ninye." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Ilalashera entoomonoki iyiook. 
1Thessalonians5:26 Eroroki ilalashera pooki te ng'ututata sinyati. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Nasai intae to Laitoriani pee eisumakini ena palai ilalashera pooki. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Metaa empiris o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo tenebo intae. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Paulo o Silvano o Timoteo, kingeroki esirit oo Lsesalonike e Nkai Papa lang o Laitoriani Yesu Kristo." 
2Thessalonians1:2 Enoto empiris o eseriani naing'uaa Enkai Papa o Laitoriani Yesu Kristo. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Meeta nchere pee mikincho Enkai enashe inkatitin pooki te nkaraki intae ilalashera o nkanashera, anaa enaishiaakino amu kegira enkirukoto inyi abulu oleng. Ore enyorrata e pooki ng'ae te intae to likae o likae neponari." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Ina naa pee kiwuasare iyiook intae maate tiatua nena sirito e Nkai te nkitashoto inyi nemeiwuatiwuata o enkirukoto tiatua inkisilisilot inyi pooki, o tiatua isinaitin ling'iriri taata." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Olmonekie ele le nkiguana nasipa e Nkai, pee etumi aaitaa intae ilooishiaakino enkitoria e Nkai naa te ninye eisilisilitoi intae." 
2Thessalonians1:6 Ore te nkaraki natoduaa Enkai inchere esipata te nelaaki te nkisilisiloto lelo ooisilisilito intae," 
2Thessalonians1:7 neisho intae ilooisilisiloki enkiyeng'iyeng te nebo iyiook, teina kata naibalunyeki Olaitoriani Yesu Kristo eing'uaa keper te nebo ilmalaika lenyena magil," 
2Thessalonians1:8 tiatua enkima nayupuyup neyau enkitamioto e nkitalaata shumata kuldo lemeyiolo Enkai o shumata kuldo lemening Ilomon Supati lo Laitoriani lang Yesu. 
2Thessalonians1:9 Keitamei te mutata oo ntarasi neorori aaitalam enetii Olaitoriani o enetii enkitoo e nkidimata enye. 
2Thessalonians1:10 Ore te nelotu ninye teina olong pee eitaai kitok tiatua isinyat lenyena pee eing'asiakinoi ninye ti atua lelo pooki ooiruko nitii ntae, amu ore shakenisho ang te ntae neirukoki." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Ina pee kiomonoki oshiaake intae, pee eitaa intae Enkai ang ilooishiaakino te nkipototo enye, neitabaya pooki bae sidai o esiaai enkirukoto te ngolon enye." 
2Thessalonians1:12 Paa ore enkarna o Laitoriani lang Yesu, neisisi tiatua intae, neisisi intae tiatua ninye, te risioroto e mpiris e Nkai ang o Laitoriani Yesu Kristo." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Ore tialo elotunoto o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo o enkiturrurroto ang pee kinang'are ninye, kisai iyiook intae, ilalashera o nkanashera" 
2Thessalonians2:2 eminchosho eirrirrani indamunot inyi aasioki aashu eituria neme te nkiyang'et to rorei aashu te mpalai naji iyiook eing'uaa eji etabawua Enkolong o Laitoriani. 
2Thessalonians2:3 Eminchosho ake oltung'ani elej intae te pooki oitoi, amu melotu ina olong eitu elotu eserserisho, neibalunyieki ilo tung'ani le ngogong'i, enkerai e nkiminata," 
2Thessalonians2:4 okeshisho neilepie kewan eiba pooki toki ake ninye naji Enkai aashu ina naseremi, neitoton kewan to lorika te nkaji e Nkai, nelikioo kewan eitaa kewan Enkai." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Aimidamumu intae aajo ore apa aboitare intae atolikio intae ena? 
2Thessalonians2:6 Niyiololo intae entoki neton eibokito taata pee etumi aaibalunye ninye te nkata enye. 
2Thessalonians2:7 Ore ina kisudoroto e ngogong'i neasisho taata, ore ilo oibooyo ninye neiko neijia o metaba anaa neiwuang'ieki ninye." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Ore ina kata neibalunyieki ilo torrono, naa kear Olaitoriani Yesu te ntooma e nkutuk enye, naa keidaikie ninye ninye te liooto enye o te lotunoto enye." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Ore te lotunoto e ilo torrono te ngolon e Sheitani, neasi te nkidimata pooki ilmonek le lejare o ne nking'asia," 
2Thessalonians2:10 neleji lelo ooimin te monkoi e ntorroni amu etanyaita ninche enyorru esipata naidim aitajeu ninche. 
2Thessalonians2:11 Neaku eirriwaka ninche Enkai enkitarruorroto nagol, meiruko enda e monkoi," 
2Thessalonians2:12 pee etumi aaiguanare lelo pooki lemeiruk esipata kake keshipakino entorroni. 
2Thessalonians2:13 Kincho oshiaake Enkai enashe te nkaraki intae ilalashera oonyorri to Laitoriani, amu etegelua apa intae Enkai ebaiki enkiterunoto pee eitajeuni te nkoitoi e nkitisinyata te Nkiyang'et o te nkirukoto tiatua esipata." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Eipotoko Enkai intae ena kirukoto te nkaraki Ilomon Supati likiyakita iyiook intae pee itumutumu enkitoo e nkisisa o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo. 
2Thessalonians2:15 Ore naa ilalashera o nkanashera, entashoito emingusugus, embung'a entukurraki olkerreti likituutakita iyiook intae to rorei le nkutuk aashu te mpalai." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Ore ninye Olaitoriani lang Yesu Kristo makewan, o Enkai Papa lang otonyorra iyiook, neisho iyiook enkilejilej oo ntarasi o siligi sidai oing'uaa empiris," 
2Thessalonians2:17 meilejileja iltauja linyi neitasheiyie ninche tiatua enkiaas pooki sidai o to rorei. 
2Thessalonians3:1 Ilalashera o nkanashera, ore enabayie entoomoki iyiook, pee esioki ororei lo Laitoriani aibulaa nemirisho anaa enatimirishe tiatua intae," 
2Thessalonians3:2 pee eitajeuni iyiook too ltung'ana arruok naa torrok; amu mme pooki ooata enkirukoto. 
2Thessalonians3:3 Kake keisiligayu Olaitoriani naa keitagol ninye intae nerrip intae te ntorroni pooki. 
2Thessalonians3:4 Aikiaata enkitieunoto tiatua Olaitoriani tialo intae inchere iasitata naa imookiki aas imbaa nikintanap intae. 
2Thessalonians3:5 Metuutai Olaitoriani iltauja linyi aitorioki enyorrata e Nkai o enkitashoto nemeiwuatiwuata e Kristo. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Intae ilalashera kintanap taata te nkarna o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo inchere entalam olalashe pooki oton te nturuaisho lemesuj ilo kerreti litang'amutua te iyiook. 
2Thessalonians3:7 Iyiololo intae maate eninkoko te niduaayaya iyiook, amu ore apa kiboitare intae neitu kitoni pesho," 
2Thessalonians3:8 neitu kinya endaa o ltung'ani hoo obo eitu kilak kake kinaurita nikisiaaisho kewarie o dama, pee mikiaaku ake olola le likae obo linyi." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Neme te nkaraki naa esipata mikiaata kake pee kintodol iyiook intae to lkuaak lang enkitanyaanyukoto niduaayaya. 
2Thessalonians3:10 Ore doi ninye ina kata kiboitare intae nikinchoo intae ena kitanapata: Te nemeasisho oltung'ani emincho enya endaa. 
2Thessalonians3:11 Kijo nji amu kining ake inchere etii kulikae linyi ootoni tiatua enturuaisho neitanyamaluo too siaaitin e kulikae nemeeta esiaai naas. 
2Thessalonians3:12 Kintanap iltung'ana anaa lelo nikinkok te nkarna o Laitoriani Yesu Kristo metaasa esiaai enye te ngira nenya endaa naisiaayu oopeny. 
2Thessalonians3:13 Ilalashera o nkanashera eminauru te asata oo supati. 
2Thessalonians3:14 Te neany oltung'ani ening enikiliki iyiook intae te na palai, entayiolo ilo tung'ani, nimintokiki aata eniporokiki ninye, pee ekurru ninye." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Emiing'or ninye anaa olmang'atinta, kake enkoo anaa olalashe." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Ore taata Olaitoriani le seriani meishoo ninye intae makewan eseriani inkatitin pooki tiatua nkoitoi pooki, metaa Olaitoriani te nebo intae pooki." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Nanu Paulo oigero ena kirorokino te nkaina ai makewan. Ele olmonekie le mpalai ai pooki, neijia oshiaake aiko te naiger." 
2Thessalonians3:18 Metaa empiris o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo te nebo intae pooki. 
1Timothy1:1 Paulo, olkipaaret le Kristo Yesu te nkitanapata e Nkai Olaitajeunoni lang, o te Kristo Yesu osiligi lang." 
1Timothy1:2 Aigeroki Timoteo, enkerai ai te sipata tiatua enkirukoto. Metaa enino empiris o lng'ur o eseriani eing'uaa Enkai Papa o Kristo Yesu Olaitoriani lang." 
1Timothy1:3 Ore anaa enapa naaitanapa aloito Makedonia, tobiko te Efeso peyie intanap amitiki lelo kulikae elikioo pooki kiteng'enare napaashaa." 
1Timothy1:4 Aashu eitanyamal ate too nkatinin o loo nkakuyiaa nemeeta enkiting'oto, neyau nkikilikuanat naapaashari neme enchetunoto e atua Enkai natii enkirukoto atua." 
1Timothy1:5 Amu ore enaipirta enkitanapata ang naa enyorrata naing'uaa oltau owang o ltau sidai lemeeta nkibirribirrat torrok, enkirukoto nemetii esunkuroisho." 
1Timothy1:6 Ore kulikae tung'ana netapaashari aapong kuna neidapashakino enchankar e pesho," 
1Timothy1:7 eyieu ninche neaku ilaiteng'enak loo nkitanapat nemeyiolo nena naajoito aashu nena baa naaimaki aakurraki. 
1Timothy1:8 Ore iyiook nikiyiolo aajo sidain inkitanapat te neasishore oltung'ani te sipata," 
1Timothy1:9 kiyiolo ena nchere, ore nkitanapat, neitu eitanapisho te nkaraki lelo supati, kake te nkaraki lelo aasak loo ntorrok o loogolong'u o te nkaraki lelo lemeure Enkai o laing'okok o te nkaraki lelo lemesinya o loomorisho o te nkaraki lelo ooar iloo menye o looar inoo ng'otonye metuata o te nkaraki lelo ooitayu iloikop o" 
1Timothy1:10 loo loloito o loosokorisho o lapurrok loo ltung'ana o ilaimonkok, o loonya olmumai le lejare o lelo pooki oopaashare enkiteng'enare supat," 
1Timothy1:11 naipirare ilomon supati kituaak le Nkai namayiana, laaishooki nanu aaisiligie." 
1Timothy1:12 Kaisho nanu Kristo Olaitoriani lang enashe, laa ninye laaishoo engolon naasishore nanu aatoduaa ajo kara olairukoni naagelaki ena kisiaayiare enye," 
1Timothy1:13 hoo te natamoro apa enkarna enye naisilisil namor ninye: kake atang'amua olng'ur amu ataasa apa nena te modai maata enkirukoto," 
1Timothy1:14 naaiputakini empiris o Laitoriani lang aaitadooyo te nebo o enkirukoto, o enyorrata natii atua Kristo Yesu." 
1Timothy1:15 Ekesipa ena kiroroto, neishiaakino neng'amari nenyorrarri katukul inchere, eewuo Kristo enkop aitajeu ilooata ng'ok. Naa nanu oituruk too looata." 
1Timothy1:16 Kake aatoduaka Enkai olng'ur paa ore tiatua nanu ara olaing'okoni torrono, neibalunye Yesu Kristo eng'iriata enye nalulunng'a, pee eaku enkitanyaanyukoto te lelo ooyooki aairuk ninye, netum enkishui nemeiting." 
1Timothy1:17 Metaa eno Laiguanani loo lporori pooki, lemeye aekata, lemelioo, laa ninye ake Enkai, enkanyit o enkitoo intarasi o ntarasi, Eesai." 
1Timothy1:18 Ena kitanapata aaishoo iyie, Timoteo, enkerai ai, te risioroto oo nkirorot e naibon nikimpirta iyie, pee kidumu ninche tijing'a ilo arrabal sidai." 
1Timothy1:19 Imbung'a enkirukoto to ltau supat lemeeta nkibirribirrat torrok. Ore kulikae netanyaita enkikoo oo ltauja lenye neidaikie enkirukoto enye," 
1Timothy1:20 ore te lelo netii Hemanayo o Aleksanta laitarasaka Sheitani pee eiteng'eni meigil aamor Enkai. 
1Timothy2:1 Ore naa enaituruk, entirrisha esayiata o enkomono o eomonokinoto o enkishooroto e nashe metaasi too ltung'ana pooki," 
1Timothy2:2 too laiguanak o lelo pooki ootii iwuejitin e nkitoo pee kitoni te mborron o te nkishon naserian, neure Enkai neyanyitisho too nkoitoi pooki." 
1Timothy2:3 Ena esidai naa ninye nang'amaroyu too nkonyek e Nkai Olaitajeunoni lang," 
1Timothy2:4 laa keyieu ninye neitajeuni iltung'ana pooki nepuonu aatum eyiolounoto e sipata. 
1Timothy2:5 Amu nabo Enkai, naa obo olaitutumoni le Nkai o ltung'ana, oltung'ani oji Kristo Yesu," 
1Timothy2:6 oishorua kewan enye pee eaku elakunoto te pooki, neitakiaki shakenisho te nkata enye naishiaakino." 
1Timothy2:7 Te nkaraki ena pee aategeluaki nanu mataa olalikioroni o lkipaaret (naasipa ajoito, malejisho nanu), ataa olaiteng'enani loo loreren te nkirukoto o te sipata." 
1Timothy2:8 Kayieu naa neomon ilewa too wuejitin pooki, neilepie inkaik naasinya nemetii engoro aashu enchankar." 
1Timothy2:9 Keishiaa sii pee ekus ate inkituaak aaiririki te ng'eno o too lkilani ooishiaakino, neme te nchetata oo lpapit aashu te saabu aashu too lului, aashu too nkilani naagol enkinyiang'a" 
1Timothy2:10 kake too iasat sidain, anaa enaishiaakino inkituaak naajo keeta enkirukoto." 
1Timothy2:11 Inchoo enkitok eiteng'enuo te ngira neaku enaning'isho. 
1Timothy2:12 Manyorraki hoo enkitok meiteng'enisho aashu meitoria ilewa, inchoo ninye metigirayu." 
1Timothy2:13 Amu Adam apa eiteraki aaitobir neitokini Hawa. 
1Timothy2:14 Neme Adam apa etelejaki, kake enkitok apa etelejaki, neaku etigila nkitanapat." 
1Timothy2:15 Kake keitajeuni enkitok te ishoi oo nkera te nebik tiatua enkirukoto o enyorrata o esinyatisho, te nebo o eng'eno o esupatisho te nebo o eng'eno biyoto." 
1Timothy3:1 Enkiroroto nasipa ena inchere, te neyieu oltung'ani neaku olarikoni le sirit, naa eyieunoto sidai." 
1Timothy3:2 Keishiaakino olarikoni le sirit, nemeeta eleyiata, olee le nkitok nabo loo nkiririkinot, naa ng'en, pirisut, naa aminin, neyiolo aiteng'enisho," 
1Timothy3:3 nememera, nemearisho, kake oltung'ani supat, neme olaishankarrani, nemenyor impisai." 
1Timothy3:4 Neitasheiki olmarei lenye aitobiraki, neikok inkera enyena, pee eyanyitisho too nkoitoi pooki." 
1Timothy3:5 Amaa te nemeyiolo oltung'ani aitasheiki enkaji enye, kaji eiko te neing'or esirit e Nkai?" 
1Timothy3:6 Keishiaa neme ilo otajewuo det pee merup kewan to Iwuasa nebatatakino enkiguana e Sheitani. 
1Timothy3:7 Neme ina ake, keishiaakino neeta errepet te lelo leme ilairukok pee medoiki ake atua esulare o rreshet le Sheitani." 
1Timothy3:8 Neijia ake sii etiu ilaisiaayiak, inchoo emut nabo nemeitoki aaing'ashing'ash too nkirorot, neme ilooitabaitie enaisho, nemeeta olorok le dupoto," 
1Timothy3:9 inchoo eibung enkirukoto to ltau owang. 
1Timothy3:10 Nchoo sii eng'asi aatem ninche, ore ake peyie eitisipi nchere meeta ileyiat, nchoo easisho anaa ilaisiaayiak." 
1Timothy3:11 Neijia ake sii eishiaa neikununo inkituaak enye; nchoo emut nabo, neme inaakurrisho kake inoo nkiririkinot, neisiligayu too mbaa pooki." 
1Timothy3:12 Inchoo ilaisiaayiak eaku ilpayiani loo nkituaak maa naabo, neitasheiki sii ninche inkera enye o nkajijik enye aaitobiraki." 
1Timothy3:13 Amu ore lelo ooasisho aaitobiraki anaa ilaisiaayiak naa ketum errepet sidai maate, netum enkitieunoto kitok tiatua enkirukoto natii atua Kristo Yesu." 
1Timothy3:14 Kaisilig ajo kalotu enitii asieku, kake kasiraki intae kuna kiteng'enat peyie," 
1Timothy3:15 te naimutie niyiolouu enaishiaakino neas oltung'ani tiatua enkaji e Nkai. Naa ninye esirit e Nkai naishu, ninye eng'ape o olkitamanyunoto loo sipat." 
1Timothy3:16 Kitejo iyiook tukul inchere, eikitok oleng enkisudoroto e nkirukoto ang: Eibalunyeki ninye to sesen, neitadedeyieki ninye te Nkiyang'et nedol ilmalaika, nelikiori too loreren, neiruk enkop, neyae ninye keper te nkitoo." 
1Timothy4:1 Eibalunye Enkiyang'et Sinyati ajo nchere, ore too nkatitin e nkiting'oto, naa keing'uaa kulikae enkirukoto nerubare lelo tauja le lejare o nkiteng'enat oo loiriruani" 
1Timothy4:2 eimu esunkuroisho e lelo oolejisho ootokilote iltauja lenye," 
1Timothy4:3 oomit eyamishoe, nemit einosi kulie daiki naaitayio Enkai, nemit eng'amuni te nashe lelo ooata enkirukoto ooyiolo isipat." 
1Timothy4:4 Amu ore pooki toki naitayio Enkai naa eisidai, nemeetae hoo ae toki nabo naanyi te naa te nashe eng'amuni;" 
1Timothy4:5 amu keitisiny ororei le Nkai o enkomono. 
1Timothy4:6 Ti ninguan esirit te kuna kiteng'enat niaaku olaisiaayiani supat le Kristo Yesu, oitubuluaki too rorei le nkirukoto o nkiteng'enare sidai naa ninye iyie itusuja." 
1Timothy4:7 Tapaasha nena atinin e modai neme ne Nkai. Intamoo kewan orrekie le Nkai; 
1Timothy4:8 amu te naa keeta enkitamooto o sesen enkiti retoto, enkitamooto oo mbaa e Nkai naata te pooki oitoi, amu keeta enkisiligata tena kishui o te nkishui nalotu." 
1Timothy4:9 Ororei osipa ele neishiaakino neng'amari katukul. 
1Timothy4:10 Te nkaraki kuna pee kintanyamal ate nikinyok, amu Enkai naishu kitipika osiligi lang naa ninye Olaitajeunoni le pooki tung'ani neisulaki lelo ooiruk." 
1Timothy4:11 Intanapisho ninteng'enishore kuna baa. 
1Timothy4:12 Mincho oltung'ani hoo obo kimenu te nkaraki kitisho ino, kake intoduaa ilairukok enkitanyaanyukoto tiatua enkiroroto o to lkuaak, tiatua enyorrata, tiatua enkirukoto o tiatua esinyatisho." 
1Timothy4:13 Tasheikinoyu enkisumata oo lkigerot te dukuya iltung'ana o elikioroto o enkiteng'enare o metaba anaa nalotu. 
1Timothy4:14 Mintololoiki ina kishooroto niaata, nikinchooki apa too nkirorot e naibon apa peyie kinteleiki ilpayiani inkaik." 
1Timothy4:15 Intamoo kewan kuna siaaitin tasheikinore ninche, pee edol pooki ng'ae eninkunari te nyuaata." 
1Timothy4:16 Tagolie kewan o nena kiteng'enat inono, imbung'a, amu te niaas ina nintajeu kewan o lelo likinining." 
1Timothy5:1 Mibuaaki olpayian kitok kake irorie anaa papaai lino. Ntaasa iltung'ana ooti anaa ilalashera linono," 
1Timothy5:2 ninko nkituaak moruak anaa noo ng'utunyi, ninko nkituaak kutiti anaa nkanashera inono te sinyatisho pooki." 
1Timothy5:3 Iyanyita inkolia naara te dede. 
1Timothy5:4 Naa te neeta enkoliai inkera aashu inoo nkoko, inchoo eng'as aitabaya nena siaaitin e nkirukoto too lmareita lenye neisho intoiwuo enye olerrinyore amu keng'amaroyu ena te dukuya Enkai." 
1Timothy5:5 Ore naa enkoliai te dede, netung'uayioki aa ninye ake naa Enkai eisilig nebik eomon dama o kewarie;" 
1Timothy5:6 kake ore ina naa ng'uarrat ake naaitore, netua hoo neishu." 
1Timothy5:7 Intanapa nena pee metum ake ninche ileyiat. 
1Timothy5:8 Te netii oltung'ani lemegolie iltung'ana lenyena neisulaki lelo le nkaji enye, neiturrayie ninye enkirukoto, neaku torrono alang oleitu eiruk." 
1Timothy5:9 Nchoo eng'amuni aaiger enkoliai nemeitong'or ilarin ntomoni ile, naa enkitok apa o lpayian obo," 
1Timothy5:10 neeta ake sii shakenisho oo mbaa enyena sidain anaa enaitubulua inkera neitoomonishe, neitukuo inkejek oo sinyat, netasarua lelo oonyamal, netasheikine aas impukunot pooki oo siaaitin sidain too nkoitoi pooki." 
1Timothy5:11 Kake tanya ing'amu aiger inkolia kutiti: amu te nepaashari ninche neyieu neyami," 
1Timothy5:12 neaku keiguanareki ninche amu eiturraitie enapa kiroroto natang'asa aaibung. 
1Timothy5:13 Ore ake etiu neijia, keitamok ate enturuaisho neirrang'irrang aaruk inkajijik, neme neijia ake, kake keeta sii olmarenke o enkilepilep nekurrisho neiro mbaa nemeishiaakino neiro." 
1Timothy5:14 Metaa ajo nanu, keishiaakino neyami inkolia kutiti, neiu inkera, neitore nkajijik enye, peyie metum olmang'atinta erishata nasukenyie iyiook." 
1Timothy5:15 Amu eidipa kulie aatapong'ori aasuj Sheitani. 
1Timothy5:16 Te netii enkairukoni naata inkolia too lmarei lenye, nchoo enap ninche; Mincho esirit eiteleikini olola, peyie etum ataretu nena kulie olia te dede." 
1Timothy5:17 Nchoo lelo payiani laa larikok supati edamuni neigilieki aaisho enkanyit, neisulaki lelo oonyok te likioroto o te nkiteng'enare." 
1Timothy5:18 Amu ejo ilkigerot, “Mien olkiteng enkutuk eidong'ito enkurma,” nejo sii, “Keishiaakino olaisiaayiani olekoisiaayio lenye.”" 
1Timothy5:19 Minyorraa te neitang'ori olpayian aashu te naa ketii ilchakenini oaare anaa okuni. 
1Timothy5:20 Kake ore lelo ooenikino ing'ok tabuaaki etii pooki pee etum iltung'ana pooki enkuretisho. 
1Timothy5:21 Ore te dukuya Enkai o Kristo Yesu o lelo malaika oogeluno, aaitanap iyie nchere imbung'a kuna kitanapat miaata nyorrakino, nimiaas hoo ae bae to lkep." 
1Timothy5:22 Misioki enkiteleikinoto oo nkaik te lelo ooputokini enkisiaayiare, niming'arie likae tung'ani ing'ok enyena, torripo kewan, taa sinyati." 
1Timothy5:23 Mintoki aok enkare narok, kake tooko enkiti aisho oo sabibu te nkaraki enkoshoke ino o teina muoyian e anaa ake." 
1Timothy5:24 Keibala ing'ok e kulikae tung'ana neutu endung'okinoto e nkiguana, kake ore kulikae te siadi eyooki aaibalayu." 
1Timothy5:25 Neijia sii etiu iasat supati e kulikae tung'ana, keibalayu aasioki, naa te nemeibalayu nemeidim aaisudori o kenya." 
1Timothy6:1 Nchoo lelo pooki ootii abori enchata e rrindikisho eikenaa ilkituaak lenye aajo keiririkino enkanyit pooki, peyie mesukenyi ake enkarna e Nkai aashu nkiteng'enat ang." 
1Timothy6:2 Ore lelo ooata ilkituaak airukok nemeishiaa neituraa enkanyit enye amu kejo lelo ilalashera, kake peyie easisho oleng amu ore lelo oodupore ena siaai enye naa ile tipat, amu lairukok oonyor. Inteng'ena nintudup ninche kuna siaaitin." 
1Timothy6:3 Te neiteng'enisho oltung'ani ae kiteng'enare napaashaa neany eibung irorei supati lo Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo o enkiteng'enare naishiaakino orrekie le Nkai," 
1Timothy6:4 nerup kewan te modai nemeyiolo toki. Keeta ninye enkure e nchankar o empong'o, naa ine epukunye olom o lolepilepi o emorore o nkiteenikinot torrok," 
1Timothy6:5 o enchankar tiatua iltung'ana lemelulung'a lukuny enye, nemeeta esipata, oojo ore orrekie le Nkai naa enkoitoi naduporeki." 
1Timothy6:6 Ketii dupoto sapuk orrekie le Nkai te nebo enkidipakinoto. 
1Timothy6:7 Amu eitu apa kiyau ae toki atua enkop, nimikindim aawaita hoo toki aaitung'uai enkop." 
1Timothy6:8 Kake ti nikiaata endaa o nkilani, ore kiaata kuna, neidip iyiook nena." 
1Timothy6:9 Kake ore lelo ooyieu neaku karsisi naa kedoiki ntemat nedoiki atua orreshet, nedoiki atua mbaa kumok e modai, naaitameisho neitadoiki iltung'ana atua enkitarruorroto o enkidaaroto." 
1Timothy6:10 Amu ore enyorrata oo mpisai ninye entonai oo ntorrok pooki naa te nkaraki ena pee etapaashari ilkulikae aaing'uaa enkirukoto nerem iltauja lenye too nkitamiot kumok. 
1Timothy6:11 Kake ore iyie, lo tung'ani le Nkai, ilanya kuna pooki, ing'oru esupatisho o rrekie le Nkai o enkirukoto o enyorrata o enkitashoto o emborron." 
1Timothy6:12 Taarisho te ilo arrabal sidai le nkirukoto; imbung'a ina kishui nemeiting, nikimpotokoki apa pee imbalie te dukuya ilchakenini kumok." 
1Timothy6:13 Ore te dukuya Enkai naa ninye naishoo empuaan pooki toki; o te dukuya Kristo Yesu laa ore shakenisho enye te dukuya Pontio Pilato neibalunye enkirukoto enye," 
1Timothy6:14 aaitanap inchere, imbung'a inkitanapat miata olduruk nimiaata enikimpotokini o metabau eliooto o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo." 
1Timothy6:15 Naa keibalunyeki ena te nkata naishiaakino, ilo omayiana naa ninye ake Olaitoriani loo laitoriak;" 
1Timothy6:16 laa ninye ake le meye, obik te wang'an nemeing'urayu. Nemeetae aekata oltung'ani otoduaa ninye nemeeta oloidim atoduaa. Metaa enenye enkanyit o enkitoria intarasi. Eesai." 
1Timothy6:17 Ore lelo karsisi le na kop inkoo pee mepik osiligi atua enkarsisisho enye nemebikoo, kake peyie eisilig Enkai naiputaki iyiook nena pooki pee kishipakino." 
1Timothy6:18 Nchoo ninche eaku supati, nekarsisu too iasat sidain, neretisho neleng'u sii," 
1Timothy6:19 amu te nena eitobiraki ate olkitamanyunoto sidai too nkolong'i naapuonu, peyie eyooki aang'amu ina kishui naa ninye nara katukul." 
1Timothy6:20 Oo Timoteo, torripo ina toki apa nikisiligieki. Talama nena kirorot neme no rrekie le Nkai, o mpaashat e nena naaitaae eng'eno te lejare." 
1Timothy6:21 Amu ena eibung'a kulikae nepong'ori neitu etil enkirukoto. Metaa empiris e Nkai te nebo intae. 
2Timothy1:1 Paulo, olkipaaret le Yesu Kristo te yieunoto e Nkai te risioroto e nkisiligata e mpuaan natii atua Kristo Yesu." 
2Timothy1:2 Timoteo enkerai ai nanyor aigeroki: Metaa te nebo iyie empiris o lng'ur o eseriani eing'uaa Enkai Papa o Kristo Yesu Olaitoriani lang. 
2Timothy1:3 Te naadamu oshi te nkomono dama o kewarie naisho Enkai enashe, ina naisiaaita to oltoilo lo ltau owang, anaa apa iloo papa." 
2Timothy1:4 Ore te nadamu ilkiyio linono ina kata apa inchirita, naayieu naadol dama o kewarie, peyie aaboreyu eng'ida." 
2Timothy1:5 Kadamu sii ina kirukoto ino nasipa, enkirukoto apa naitera amany kokoo ino Lois, o ng'utunyi Oinike, nayiolo taata aitisip nchere etamanya atua iyie." 
2Timothy1:6 Te nkaraki ina peyie aaitadamu nchere nyaaki ntopiu enkishooroto e Nkai natii atua iyie ninoto apa te nkiteleikinoto oo nkaik aainei. 
2Timothy1:7 Amu eitu eisho iyiook Enkai oltau le nkuretisho kake oltau le ngolon o le nyorrata o le nkibooroto e maate. 
2Timothy1:8 Mikurru naa te nintayu shakenisho o Laitoriani lang aashu te nanu oloena lenye, kake tonyorrai erishata ino o sina litum te nkaraki ororei supat te ngolon e Nkai," 
2Timothy1:9 naitajewuo iyiook neipot iyiook teina kipototo nasinya, neme te nkaraki esupatisho oo nkiaasin ang, kake te nkaraki esupatisho e yieunoto enye makewan o te mpiris naishoo ninye iyiook tiatua Kristo Yesu apa moitie." 
2Timothy1:10 Neibalunyeki taata te lotunoto o Laitajeunoni lang Kristo Yesu, oiwuang'ie keeya neyau puaan o enkishui nemetii keeya." 
2Timothy1:11 Te nkaraki ele rorei pee aategeluaki mataa olalikioroni o Lkipaaret o laiteng'enani," 
2Timothy1:12 naa te nkaraki ena pee aata ele sina. Kake madol enkurruna amu kayiolo ilo lairuko natisipua nchere keidim ninye atorripo ina naaisiligieki nanu o metabau ina olong. 
2Timothy1:13 Tusuja ilo rrekie loo rorei ooata puaan apa litoning'uo te nanu, te nkirukoto o te nyorrata natii atua Kristo Yesu." 
2Timothy1:14 Torripo ina sipata nikinchooki iyie te Nkiyang'et Sinyati natamanya atua iyiook. 
2Timothy1:15 Iyiolo ajo ore lelo pooki ootii Asia neibelekenyate, naaing'uaa nanu, ore te lelo netii Figelo o Ermogene." 
2Timothy1:16 Meishoo Olaitoriani olng'ur enkaji e Onesiforo amu aaitagolo ninye oshoke katitin kumok, eitu edol isura too lpisia le enata ai," 
2Timothy1:17 kake ore pee ebau Roma naing'oru omaanoto. 
2Timothy1:18 Meidimie Olaitoriani menoto olng'ur te ina olong kenya o Laitoriani, niyiolo sii eneba esiaai nataasa Onesifero te Efeso." 
2Timothy2:1 Ore naa iyie, enkerai ai, tagolo te mpiris natii atua Kristo." 
2Timothy2:2 Ore ina nitoning'o te nanu te dukuya lchakenini kumok, intarasaki lelo tung'ana ooisiligayu ooidim sii ninche aaiteng'ena ilkulikae." 
2Timothy2:3 Tonyorrai tang'arieki osina anaa osikari odupa le Kristo Yesu. 
2Timothy2:4 Meetae osikari otii enjore oisho metarruesha mbaa neme ne njore, amu ore enayieu ninye naa pee eitiship ilo oigero." 
2Timothy2:5 Meishori olokuet enkopiyia e nkitoo mme keshomo te risioroto oo nkitanapat. 
2Timothy2:6 Ore olaturoni le nkurma onyok keiririkino netum ilng'anayio le dukuya. 
2Timothy2:7 Tadamu kuna najo amu eikincho Olaitoriani ening'unoto te pooki toki. 
2Timothy2:8 Tadamu Yesu Kristo, otopiwuo aing'uaa ilootuata, le ntalipa e Daudi, anaa enainosuaki te ilo rorei supat lalikioo." 
2Timothy2:9 Lelo omon supati laa te ninye aainosieki osina o maateeni too lpisia anaa olarruoni. Kake ore ororei le Nkai nemeena. 
2Timothy2:10 Neaku kang'iri pooki toki te nkaraki lelo gelunot, pee etum sii ninche aanoto ina jeunoto tiatua Kristo Yesu, te nebo enkitoo oo ntarasi." 
2Timothy2:11 Ororei osipa ele nchere: Ti nikituata te nebo ninye, naa eikiyiooki sii aaishu te nebo ninye." 
2Timothy2:12 Ti niking'iri nikiyiooki sii aaitoreisho te nebo ninye; ti nikimiki ninye nemiki sii ninye iyiook; 
2Timothy2:13 ti nimikisiligayu, neton ninye eisiligayu - amu meidim ninye atomiki kewan." 
2Timothy2:14 Intadamu iltung'ana linono ena, nintanap te dukuya Olaitoriani, metapaashare enchankar oo rorei amu meretisho, kake keiminie ake lelo ooning." 
2Timothy2:15 Tonyuaa intoduaai kewan te Nkai ajo inyorraro, nira olaisiaayiani lemeeta enaitukurru, oasishore te nkitoriokinoto ilo rorei osipa." 
2Timothy2:16 Tapaasha nena kirorot e pesho nemetii euriata e Nkai, amu iltung'ana ake erikoo metalama euriata e Enkai oleng." 
2Timothy2:17 Ore inkirorot enye nedaari anaa enkeeya nayieng'i, ore te lelo netii Hermenayo o Fileto;" 
2Timothy2:18 ootapong'o enkoitoi nasipa, eji kejo eidipa empiunoto oo lootuata atulusoi, neibelekeny enkirukoto e kulikae." 
2Timothy2:19 Kake etuuno Enkai olkitamanyunoto le nkirukoto, nepik ele mishire ojo, “Keyiolo Olaitoriani lelo oora ilenyena,” neitoki ajo, “Ore pooki ng'ae oipot enkarna o Laitoriani nchoo eing'uaa entorroni.”" 
2Timothy2:20 Ore atua enkaji sapuk neme ntokitin e saabu o ne nkosholai ake natii, kake ketii sii noo nkeek o ne nkulukuoni, ore nkulie neasishoreki too mbaa e tipat ore nkulie neasishoreki too mbaa neme ine tipat." 
2Timothy2:21 Te neituku oltung'ani kewan nepaash iloirerioni, neaku emasaai naasishoreki te nkanyit naitisinyaki pee easishore olopeny enkaji, neirragieki aaitaanyu nena siaaitin sidain." 
2Timothy2:22 Neaku ilanya naa ng'uarrat e lelero, ning'oru esupatisho o enkirukoto o enyorrata o eseriani, te nebo lelo ooipot enkarna o Laitoriani to ltau owang." 
2Timothy2:23 Tapaashare enchankar e modai nemeeta enajo, iyiolo iyie ajo ilarrabali ake eiu." 
2Timothy2:24 Meishiaakino osinka lo Laitoriani te neaku olo larrabal kake keishia paa oltung'ani oibor oshoke te pooki ng'ae, olaiteng'enani onyor aiteng'enisho, ong'iri," 
2Timothy2:25 nererioo te mborron lelo ookesh ninye, amu ebaiki neidim Enkai aishoo meirridu nepuonu aayiolou ina sipata." 
2Timothy2:26 Pee ebaiki neisik aaing'uaa oorreshet le Sheitani, otang'asa apa aibung metaasa enayieu ninye." 
2Timothy3:1 Kake tayiolo ena nchere ore too nkolong'i e nkiting'oto naa kepuonu nkatitin oo sinaitin. 
2Timothy3:2 Amu keaku iltung'ana iloonyor ate, iloonyor mpisai, iloowuasa, ilooilash, iloomorisho, iloogolong'aki intoiwuo enye, ilemeeta enashe, nemeure Enkai." 
2Timothy3:3 Iloorook oishuaa, ilemesayiayu, nekurrisho, nemeeta esupatisho, ilemeibooyo ate too ntorrok pushunot, ilooiba esupatisho." 
2Timothy3:4 Ilooudoo ilkulenye, neipopong'a to lwuasa, iloonyor esikar alang enanyor Enkai." 
2Timothy3:5 Iloitaakuno kenyor Enkai netanyaita engolon enye. Talama iyie iltung'ana ooikununo neijia. 
2Timothy3:6 Amu ore tiatua ninche netii lelo ooruk inkajijik, neibung nena kituaak naamoda naanapita lolan loo ng'ok nerikito ng'uarrat enye oo mpukunot kumok," 
2Timothy3:7 nkituaak naainining pooki ng'ae nemebaiki aikata eyiolounoto e ina sipata. 
2Timothy3:8 Anaa Yanes o Yampres ootanyaita enatejo Musa, neijia sii etiu kulo tung'ana ootanyaita esipata, iltung'ana ootarruoitie indamunot ninche." 
2Timothy3:9 Kake meeta dikae nebaya ilenkirukoto e nkitaakuno amu keibalayu emodai enye te pooki anaa ene lelo tung'ana apa pokira oaare. 
2Timothy3:10 Kake indipa iyie atoduaa enkiteng'enare ai o rrekie lai o enaipirta te nkishui ai o nkirukoto ai o eng'iriata ai o enyorrata ai, o enkitashoto ai o" 
2Timothy3:11 inkisilisilot aainei o sinaitin laainei. Iyiolo iyie nena naaineputua te Antiok o te Ikonio o te Listra, eneba inkisilisilot nating'iria nanu; kake ore te nena pooki naatokordua Olaitoriani." 
2Timothy3:12 Kesipa ore lelo pooki ooyieu neibung orrekie le Nkai tiatua Kristo Yesu, nemeeta nchere pee meisilisili." 
2Timothy3:13 Ore lelo tung'ana torrok o lalejak neponari aaku torrok, elejisho neleji sii ninche." 
2Timothy3:14 Kake ore iyie, tobiko te nena nindipa atayiolo aitisip, amu iyiolo iyie ajo aing'ae likinteng'ena nena." 
2Timothy3:15 Naa ore ebaiki keraisho ino itayiolo lelo kigerot sinyat likindim aaiteng'ena te njeunoto naimu enkirukoto tiatua Yesu Kristo. 
2Timothy3:16 Ore ilkigerot pooki naa Enkai nayang'ua naa keeta dupoto te nkiteng'enare o te nkisikong'ata o ereriot o te nkitubulunoto tiatua esupatisho," 
2Timothy3:17 paa ore oltung'ani le Nkai neitabari te nkiaas pooki sidai. 
2Timothy4:1 Aaitanap iyie te dukuya Enkai o Kristo Yesu, laa ninye oyooki aiguanare ilooishu o lootuata, o teina lotunoto enye," 
2Timothy4:2 tolikioi ele rorei, isosiono te nkata sidai o te ntorrono. Inguanaki intijing'ai, nisikong, ninkok niaaku olemesi te ng'iriata o te nkiteng'enare." 
2Timothy4:3 Amu kelotu enkata nemeyieu iltung'ana neng'iri ina kiteng'enare supat kake kesuj ninche iyieunot enye neing'uraki ate ilturrurri loo laiteng'enak ooitabaya nena naayieu ninche, te ng'ion oo nkiyiaa enye." 
2Timothy4:4 Nepaash inaasipa aasuj inkaatini e lejare. 
2Timothy4:5 Kake ore iyie ntasho anaake, ting'iria osina, taasa esiaai o lalikioroni, ntabai enkisiaayiare ino." 
2Timothy4:6 Amu eidipa atabau enkata pee aaitaae olasar. Etabawua enkata e lototo ai. 
2Timothy4:7 Ataarare olarrabal sidai, naidipa ina kuetata, natagolie enkirukoto." 
2Timothy4:8 Ore ebaiki taata aatushumakaki nanu enkopiyia e nkitoo e supatisho, naa Olaitoriani, ilo arishani asipani laayooki aisho teina olong, neme nanu ake eishori, kake keishori sii lelo ootonyorra aanyu enkata naliooyu ninye." 
2Timothy4:9 Tonyuaa oleng, tasieku ene natii." 
2Timothy4:10 Amu ore Demas, etonyorra ena kop e taata naashomo aing'uaa nelo Sesalonike. Eshomo Kreskes Galatia neshomo Tito Dalmatia." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka ake openy laaboitare. Ing'oru Marko pee ishoru, amu kaaretu oleng te siaai." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka ake openy laaboitare. Ing'oru Marko pee ishoru, amu kaaretu oleng te siaai." 
2Timothy4:12 Airriwayie Tikikos meshomo Efeso. 
2Timothy4:13 Ore te nilotu iyie nishoru olkila apa latung'ueikia Karpo te Troas o mbukui sii, neisulaki nena oo ndapan." 
2Timothy4:14 Ore Aleksanta ele kunoni loo suyan aaitaasa ntorrok oleng, keitalak Olaitoriani te nkaraki nkiaasin enyena." 
2Timothy4:15 Torripo naa kewan te ninye amu etishirraka aany olkilikuai lang. 
2Timothy4:16 Ore apa ang'orito kewan te dukuya nemetii hoo obo laatijing'a enkoriong; aatung'uaitie pooki. Oi ake eaku meikenakini ninche ena! 
2Timothy4:17 Kake eitasho Olaitoriani te nkalo ai, naaisho nanu engolon nalimunye ororei te lulung'ata, pee etum iloreren pooki aatoning, neaku aatang'adieki enkutuk o lng'atuny." 
2Timothy4:18 Ee kaakordu Olaitoriani te ntorroni ake pooki, naaitajeu aaitaany ina kitoo enye e keper metaa enenye enkitoo ntarasi o ntarasi. Eesai." 
2Timothy4:19 Iroroki Priska o Akuila o enkaji e Onesiforos. 
2Timothy4:20 Etobiko Erasto te Korinto natung'uayie Trofimo emuoi te Mileto. 
2Timothy4:21 Tonyuaa tasioku eton eng'or enkata e nkirobi. Kirriwaki Eibulo enkirorokino naa neijia etiu Punten o Lino o Klaudia o lalashera pooki. 
2Timothy4:22 Metaa Olaitoriani te nebo enkishui ino. Metaa empiris e Nkai te nebo intae. 
Titus1:1 Paulo osinka le Nkai olkipaaret le Yesu Kristo, pee eitubulaa enkirukoto e lelo gelunot le Nkai o eng'eno naishiaakino orrekie le Nkai," 
Titus1:2 te ilo siligi le nkishui nemeiting, oisiligie apa Enkai nemeeta elejare ninche apa moitie;" 
Titus1:3 ore ake pee eiririkino enkata, neibalunye tiatua ororei lenye aimunye ina likioroto naaishooki nanu mainosai te nkitanapata e Nkai Olaitajeunoni lang." 
Titus1:4 Tito aigeroki, enkerai ai nasipa tiatua enkirukoto niking'ar. Meeu enitii empiris o eseriani eing'uaa Enkai Papa o Kristo Yesu Olaitajeunoni lang." 
Titus1:5 Te nkaraki ena apa pee aatung'uayie te Krete, pee itum aitobira mbaa naang'or, nigelu ilpayiani too nkang'itie pooki anaa enaatuutaka," 
Titus1:6 olpayian lemeeta eleyiata, olee le nkitok nabo, neiruko inkera enyena, nemekurri aajo aiserseri aashu mening'isho." 
Titus1:7 Amu ore olaitasheikinoni te nkaji e Nkai, naa olaisiaayiani le Nkai, meishiaakino neeta eleyiata; nchoo eaku mme ole makewan aashu olosieku engoro, aashu emera, aashu arruoni aashu eeta olorok le dupoto." 
Titus1:8 Kake keishiaa paa aminin, olonyor esupatisho, oloata entonata sidai, oloitoriori, sinyati neibooyo kewan." 
Titus1:9 Neibung akurraki ilo rorei osipa anaa enaiteng'enishoteki, pee eidim ninye aishooi eutaroto tiatua ina kiteng'enare supat, neibooyo lelo ooishankarra." 
Titus1:10 Ketii iltung'ana kumok lemening'isho, ooata irorei le pesho, oolejisho neisul lelo ooibung imbaa e muratare aitaa enjeunoto." 
Titus1:11 Meeta nchere emeitigiri ninche, meitoki aaibelekeny ilmareita oolulung'a eiteng'enisho nena nemeitoriori ejo pee etumisho te ntorroni nemeeta esipata naiteng'enishore." 
Titus1:12 Ore obo lenye maate eji laa kejo ninche oloiboni, nejo, “Ilalejak oshiaake Lkrete, ilowuarak torrok, ilaikoshuaak turua!”" 
Titus1:13 Ekesipa ena shakenisho. Metaa isikong'a ninche te mpijan pee etum aataa supati te nkirukoto 
Titus1:14 alang te nesuj nkaatini oo Lyahudi aashu nkitanapat oo ltung'ana ooany isipat. 
Titus1:15 Ore to supat naa eisidain intokitin pooki kake ore te ilo torrono o too lemeiruk meetae entoki sidai. Eidurukieki eng'eno enye o ltoiloishi loo ltauja lenye. 
Titus1:16 Kejo ninche keyiolo Enkai, kake neany ninye too nkiasin enye; ilainyalak ninche, oogolong'u lemeeta tipat ti ae siaai sidai hoo nabo." 
Titus2:1 Kake ore iyie Tito nteng'enisho nena naaishiaakino enkiteng'enare sidai. 
Titus2:2 Tiaaki ilpayiani kituaak meiririki mbaa, nedupayu naa ng'eni, neaku sidain te nkirukoto, te nyorrata, te nkitashoto o te ng'iriata." 
Titus2:3 Tiaaki nkituaak moruak neijia, metaa inaayanyitayu to lkuaak, nepal olmarenke nemeaku rrindiki e merai; nchoo eiteng'enisho nena sidain." 
Titus2:4 Neiteng'eni sii isiankikin metonyorra ilpayiani lenye o nkera enye," 
Titus2:5 neaku ng'eni neisosion, neramatisho ti ang, naa supati, nening ilpayiani lenye pee memenuni ake ororei le Nkai." 
Titus2:6 Neijia sii nkuna, tiaaki ilpayiani ooti pee eibooyo ate." 
Titus2:7 Intoduaai kewan too mbaa pooki, niaaku enkitanyaanyukoto oo nkiasin sidain. Ore te nkiteng'enare ino ntodolu esipata o ltau o entukunyakinoto," 
Titus2:8 o enkiroroto sidai nemeidimi aatusukeny, pee etumi aaitukurru ilo okeshisho, meeta ae torrono najo tialo iyiook." 
Titus2:9 Tiaaki irrindiki metoning'o ilaitoriak lenye, neitiship ninche te pooki bae, nemeeta ntorok naawaliki, pee eitoduaaya esupatisho pooki," 
Titus2:10 paa ore too mbaa pooki nejukaa enkiteng'enare e Enkai Olaitajeunoni lang. 
Titus2:11 Amu eitaliooki empiris e Nkai te nkaraki enjeunoto oo ltung'ana pooki," 
Titus2:12 neiteng'en iyiook maibai nena pooki neme nne Enkai, o ng'uarrat e nkop, nikitoni te nkiririkinoto, o te nkitorioroto o to rrekie le Nkai tena kop," 
Titus2:13 nikiaanyu osiligi lang omayiana, ina lotunoto e nkitoo e Nkai ang kitok o Laitajeunoni lang Yesu Kristo," 
Titus2:14 oishorua kewan te nkaraki iyiook, pee elaku iyiook aitung'uaa entorroni pooki neitisinyaki kewan iltung'ana lenyena. Lelo ooata enyuaata te nkaraki nkiasin sidain." 
Titus2:15 Mbalunye kuna baa, nkoo ninguan te ngolon pooki. Mincho hoo oltung'ani obo mikitemena." 
Titus3:1 Ntadamu iltung'ana metaa ilooning'isho too laitoriak nening'isho, neas pooki siaai metii esunkuroisho," 
Titus3:2 nememor likae tung'ani, nepaash olarrabal, neaku loobor, neitoduaaya esupatisho too ltung'ana pooki." 
Titus3:3 Amu eikira sii apa iyiook ilmoda, nikigolong'u, neitapong'oyioki iyiook, nikiaaku rrindiki loo ng'uarrat o sikarri oo mpukunot pooki, nikinturraa nkolong'i ang te ntorroni o lom, neibayuni iyiook iltung'ana nikimbayuno iyiook maate;" 
Titus3:4 kake ore ake pee eliooyu esidano o enyorrata o esupatisho e Nkai Olaitajeunoni lang," 
Titus3:5 neitajeu ninye iyiook neme te nkaraki nkiasin nikitaasa iyiook tiatua esupatisho, kake te nkaraki olng'ur lenye, te nkitukuoto o enkitang'ejukoto o einoto tiatua Enkiyang'et Sinyati," 
Titus3:6 ina natubukoko ninye iyiook te nkiputakinoto tiatua Yesu Kristo Olaitajeunoni lang," 
Titus3:7 pee eikenaki iyiook esupatisho te mpiris enye nikiaaku ilajung'ok lo siligi le nkishui oo ntarasi. Ororei osipa ele. 
Titus3:8 Kayieu naa nimbung akurraki kuna baa, peyie aa ore ilooiruko Enkai nejurru aaitayiolo ate nkiasin sidain; kuna ninche sidain naata dupoto too ltung'ana." 
Titus3:9 Kake tapaasha nkirorot emodai o ishoritin oo lmakui o mpaasharot o enchankar oo mbaa oo nkitanapat, amu meeta eretoto naa pesho." 
Titus3:10 Ore oltung'ani okepari indipa aikoo ninye ene dukuya o eniare, talama." 
Titus3:11 Iyiolo ajo ore oltung'ani oikununo inji netapong'ori naa kaaing'okoni netudung'oko kewan enkiguana. 
Titus3:12 Te nairriu nanu Atemas aashu Tikikos meeu enitii, tonyuaa oleng, wou ene natii te Nikapolis, amu atonyorayie pee aton teine te nkata e nkirobi." 
Titus3:13 Tonyuaa isosionie Senos, ilo aiteng'enani loo nkitanapat o Apolos te lototo enye; nimincho eng'oriki hoo toki." 
Titus3:14 Naa nchoo iltung'ana lang meitamoo ate nkiasin sidain, pee eretu nkolati naarrish pee meaku ilemeeta ilng'anayio." 
Titus3:15 Eirriwaki intae enkirorokino kulo pooki laboitare. Iroroki lelo pooki oonyor iyiook tiatua enkirukoto. Metaa empiris e Nkai te nebo intae pooki. 
Philemon1:1 Paulo oena te nkaraki Yesu Kristo o Timoteo olalashe lang - kingeroki Filimon likinyor oasisho te nebo iyiook 
Philemon1:2 o Afia enkanashe ang o Arkipos osikari te nebo iyiook, o esirit natii atua enkaji ino." 
Philemon1:3 Meeu empiris enitii o eseriani eing'uaa Enkai Papa lang o Laitoriani Yesu Kristo. 
Philemon1:4 Aisho Enkai ai enashe te naadamu iyie te nkomono ai," 
Philemon1:5 amu aning'ito enyorrata ino o enkirukoto niaata ti atua Olaitoriani Yesu o lelo sinyat. 
Philemon1:6 Naomon paa ore ing'arie ilkulikae enkirukoto ino, neitubulaa eyiolounoto enena pooki supati naara nkunaang ti atua Kristo." 
Philemon1:7 Amu anoto nanu eng'ida sapuk o enkilejilejata naayaka enyorrata ino, olalashe lai, amu eitagoloki iltauja loo sinyat te nkaraki iyie." 
Philemon1:8 Ore etiu neijia, hoo naaitieu ti atua Kristo, aaitanap taasa ina naishiaakino," 
Philemon1:9 Kake ore te nkaraki enyorrata, nayieu naasai nanu Paulo, Olbalusui lo Laitoriani naena taata te nkaraki Kristo Yesu" 
Philemon1:10 aasai nanu iyie te nkaraki enkerai ai Onesimas, ataa nanu menye ti atua eenata ai." 
Philemon1:11 (Ore apa te dukuya naa pesho ninye te iyie, kake ore taata netaa ole tipat oleng, te iyie o te nanu.)" 
Philemon1:12 Naa kairriu nanu ninye metushukunye enitii, airriu oltau lai kewan." 
Philemon1:13 Kayieu naaji naa kaiboo maataboitare, peyie aatum aisiaayia te rishata ino, te enata ai te nkaraki Ororei Supat;" 
Philemon1:14 kake atejo maas aetoki eitu atum ewalata ino pee metiu esupatisho ino anaa earakinoto kake pee eaku eyieunoto ino makewan. 
Philemon1:15 Ebaiki naa ina apa pee kintung'uayioki Onesimas te nkiti kata, pee kintokini aaitaboitaki ntarasi," 
Philemon1:16 meekure aa orrindik, kake etuluso alang orrindik, etaa olalashe onyorri, eisulaki te nanu kake eisul naa oleng te iyie, te pokira are to sesen o to Laitoriani." 
Philemon1:17 Metaa te naa eikinken nanu ajo kira nabo, tang'amu ninye anaa naaji eniking'amu nanu." 
Philemon1:18 Te nikinyala apa ninye ti ae bae aashu te neeta esile ino e ae toki, nchoo eaku esile ai." 
Philemon1:19 Nanu Paulo oigero ena te nkaina ai makewan. Ekalak nemaimaki esile nikiaatayie nanu ebaiki kewan ino. 
Philemon1:20 Ee, olalashe kayieu nanu dupoto te iyie ti atua Olaitoriani. Entagolo oltau lai ti atua Kristo." 
Philemon1:21 Ore amu kaaisilig ajo ining'isho, aaigeroki kuna ayiolo ajo ias oleng aitulus enatejo." 
Philemon1:22 Ore te nebo nena, intobirakaki olgilata loo lomon, amu aisilig ajo ore te nkaraki enkomono inyi naa kaaishori nanu maeu enitii intae." 
Philemon1:23 Kirriwaki enkirorokino Epafras, ilo oena te nebo nanu te nkaraki Kristo Yesu." 
Philemon1:24 Naa neijia etiu Marko, o Aristakos o Demas o Luka ooasisho tenebo nanu." 
Philemon1:24 Naa neijia etiu Marko, o Aristakos o Demas o Luka ooasisho tenebo nanu." 
Philemon1:25 Metaa empiris o Laitoriani Yesu Kristo te nebo enkiyang'et inyi. 
Hebrews1:1 Eirori apa Enkai iloo papa too nkoitoi kumok o too mpukunot kumok too loibonok lenyena," 
Hebrews1:2 kake ore te kuna olong'i naabayie neirorie iyiook to Inoti otegelua ninye metaa olajung'oni loo ntokitin pooki, olaa te ninye eitayioki enkop." 
Hebrews1:3 Ninye oitodolu enatiu enkitoo e Nkai naa ninye otaa olmishire le naikununo Enkai, naa ninye oibung'ita shumata o enkop to rorei le ngolon enye. Ore apa pee eidip aitobira enkipooto oo ng'ok, neton te tatene e Nkitoo te keper." 
Hebrews1:4 Eidipa Enkerai aisula ilmalaika amu ore enkarna nanoto naa ninye nalusoo too nkunenye. 
Hebrews1:5 Amu kalo malaika etiaaka Enkai ae kata nchere, “Ira iyie Oinoti lai latoiwuo tele kekun?” Aashu sii, “Kaaku nanu menye lenye, neaku ninye Oinoti lai?”" 
Hebrews1:6 O sii, pee eyau olkikau lenye enkop nejo, “Inchoo eserem ninye ilmalaika pooki le Nkai.”" 
Hebrews1:7 Ore tialo ilmalaika nejo ninye, “Oloitaa ilmalaika lenyena isiwuoishi, neitaa isinkan lenyena ilng'ejepa le nkima.”" 
Hebrews1:8 Kake etejo tialo Oinoti lenye, “Ore olorika lino, iyie Enkai naa oloo ntarasi o ntarasi orinka le supatisho ilo rinka le nkitoria ino." 
Hebrews1:9 Itonyorra iyie esupatisho nimbayu entorroni. Ore te nkaraki ina nikitubukoko Enkai ino eilata aput, nikiela te ilata e ng'ida nalang ene sirit ino.”" 
Hebrews1:10 Ore sii, “Iyie, Olaitoriani, oitobira enkop te nkiterunoto, ore keper naa esiaai oo nkaik inono." 
Hebrews1:11 Keishari ninche, kake ibik ake iyie, kemusanu ninche, kake ibik ake iyie, kemusanu ninche anaa enkila," 
Hebrews1:12 naa iyie oyooki apiyai ninche anaa enkila neibelekenya ninche. Kake itiu iyie anaa apake, nemeishunye ilarin linono ntarasi.”" 
Hebrews1:13 Kake kalo malaika etiaaka aekata Enkai, “Totona te nkaina ai e tatene o metaba anaa naitaa ilmang'ati linono olorika loo nkejek inono?”" 
Hebrews1:14 Aime nkiyang'eta aisiaayiak ake ilmalaika pooki oirriwayioki meisiaaisho, te nkaraki lelo ootum enjeunoto?" 
Hebrews2:1 Ore te nkaraki ina, keishiaakino nikirrip nena nikitoning'o oleng, pee mikipaashare ake aaing'uaa." 
Hebrews2:2 Amu amaa tenaa keewuo olkilikuai apa otolimutuo ilmalaika neaku ore engilata enye aashu eanyata netum enkitamioto," 
Hebrews2:3 kaji kijeunye iyiook ti nikintololoiki enjeunoto kitok naba inji? Olaitoriani otang'asa alimu ena jeunoto te dukuya, neetuo aaishakenoki tialo iyiook lelo apa ootoning'o ninye." 
Hebrews2:4 Neishakenoko sii ninye Enkai too lmonek o too mbaa e nking'asia o too mpukunot kumok e nking'asia o too nkishorunot e Nkiyang'et Sinyati naaori te risioroto e yieuna enye. 
Hebrews2:5 Amu mme ilmalaika eishoo Enkai meitoria enkop nalotu, naa ninye ena nikiimaki." 
Hebrews2:6 Eishakenoki aajo te dikae, “Kainyoo ninye oltung'ani linkenaa iyie, anaa enkerai e tung'ani niramat iyie?" 
Hebrews2:7 Iyie oitadowuo ninye te nkiti rishata meeu abori lmalaika, naa iyie oishoo olmarisian le nkitoo o enkanyit," 
Hebrews2:8 nintadowuo pooki toki meeu abori nkejek enyena.” Nitipika pooki toki abori enkitoria enye, nemeetae ae toki natelekua nemeitore ninye. Ore anaa enatiu, eton mikidol iyiook pooki toki, tiabori enkitoria enye." 
Hebrews2:9 Kake kidolita Yesu, otang'asaki aaitadou te nkiti rishata metadou abori ilmalaika, neishooki enkopiyia e nkitoo o enkanyit te nkaraki emion enye e keeya, peyie aa te mpiris e Nkai eishamishama ninye keeya te rishata e pooki ng'ae." 
Hebrews2:10 Amu keiririkino apa paa ore Enkai, olaa inenyena naa te ninye pee eetae intokitin pooki naa ore pee etumoki ninye atorikoki inkera kumok enkitoo, neiteraka emion neitaa bayaroti ilo oipirua enjeunoto enye te mion o larikoni." 
Hebrews2:11 Amu ore ilo oitisinyi o lelo ooitisinyi nebo eing'uaa pooki. Naa ina pee mekurru Yesu te nejo ninche ilalashera 
Hebrews2:12 Nejo, “Kaliki ilalashera laainei enkarna ino, naaisis iyie te mpolos e umata.”" 
Hebrews2:13 Nejo sii, “Ekapik nanu osiligi lai atua Enkai.” Neigil ake ajo, “Nele nanu o nena kera naaishoo nanu Enkai.”" 
Hebrews2:14 Ore naa te nkaraki nang'ar inkera nkiri o sarge, etang'arie sii ninye Yesu makewan ina pukunoto, paa te keeya etum ninye aitarruoi ilo oata engolon e keeya, aa oloirirua," 
Hebrews2:15 netum atokordu lelo pooki ooena te nkishui enye pooki te nkaraki naure keeya. 
Hebrews2:16 Amu kesipa nchere mme lmalaika doi eret kake eishoi e Abraham. 
Hebrews2:17 Te nkaraki ina pee eishooki Yesu metotiwuo anaa lalashera lenyena too mpukunot pooki, pee etum ataa olapolosani oata olng'ur neisiligayu te siaai e Nkai, netum aitayu enkitukuoroto oo ng'ok oo ltung'ana." 
Hebrews2:18 Amu ore te nkaraki netamio ninye makewan pee etemi, ekeidim ninye atareto lelo ootemi." 
Hebrews3:1 Ore te nkaraki nena, lo alashera sinyat, oong'ar enkipototo e keper, entadamu Yesu, olkipaaret naa olapolosani kitok likilikioo." 
Hebrews3:2 Etaa ninye oloisiligayu tialo ilo otegelua ninye, anaa apa sii ninye Musa pee etaa oloisiligayu tiatua enkaji e Nkai." 
Hebrews3:3 Kake ore ninye Yesu neikenakaki nchere keiririkino enkitoo nalang ene Musa anaa te neeta oloshetu enkaji enkitoo nalang ene nkaji. 
Hebrews3:4 Amu keeta ake enkaji pooki oloteshetua kake Enkai olashetani loo ntokitin pooki. 
Hebrews3:5 Etaa apa Musa oloisiligayu anaa olaisiaayiani te pooki naatii enkaji e Nkai, pee eishakenoki mbaa naanyaakaki aalimu te siadi." 
Hebrews3:6 Kake ore Kristo netaa oloisiligayu te nkaji e Nkai anaa Oinoti. Nikira iyiook enkaji enye ti nikimbung aakurraki empijan ang o lwuasa tiatua ilo siligi lang. 
Hebrews3:7 Ore te nkaraki ina, anaa enajo Enkiyang'et Sinyati, “Ore taata ena olong, ti nining'ining'i oltoilo le Nkai," 
Hebrews3:8 emintagol iltauja linyi anaa te napa gogong'i, te napa olong e ntemata ti ong'ata," 
Hebrews3:9 peyie aatem iloo minyi, nedol isiaaitin aainei too larin artam." 
Hebrews3:10 Ore te nkaraki naaitagoro ilo porror, najo, ‘Kepaashari oshi ake ninche tiatua iltauja lenye; neitu aekata eyiolou inkoitoi aainei.’" 
Hebrews3:11 Ore anaa enainosa olmumai te ngoro ai, ‘Mejing aekata ninche enkiyeng'iyeng'ata ai.’ ”" 
Hebrews3:12 Entodol ate, lo alashera, pee metii ake atua intae likae linyi lo ltau torrono, lemeiruk, orik intae nesulaa neitapaash Enkai naishu." 
Hebrews3:13 Kake entaretunoto anaa ake, anaa neton ejoitoi, “Taata ena olong,” pee megolu likae linyi lukunya te nkaraki elejaroto oo ng'ok." 
Hebrews3:14 Amu Kristo king'ar iyiook te nesipa eikikurraki aaibung empijan ang o metabaiki enkiting'oto," 
Hebrews3:15 eton ejoitoi, “Ore taata ena olong, ti nining'ining'i oltoilo lenye, emintagol iltauja linyi anaa te napa gogong'i.”" 
Hebrews3:16 Kakua apa lelo ootoning'o oltoilo le Nkai neitoki aagolong'aki? Aime lapa pooki ootung'uaitie Misiri ootorikuo Musa? 
Hebrews3:17 Naa kakua etagorokine Enkai too larin artam? Aime lelo ootaasa ng'ok, ooitanang'a iseseni lenye ilo purkel?" 
Hebrews3:18 Naa kakua einosaka Enkaiolmumai ajo, mejing enkiyeng'iyeng'ata enye ntarasi, ei kulikae leme lelo ootogolong'akita?" 
Hebrews3:19 Neaku kidol aajo eitu eidim ninche aatijing ine te nkaraki neitu eiruk. 
Hebrews4:1 Ore te nkaraki ina eton eetae enkisiligata najing'ieki enkiyeng'iyeng'ata e Nkai, emaing'ura ake pee meiguanareki ake likae linyi neji eturua ebaiki." 
Hebrews4:2 Amu etabaikitia iyiook lelo omon supati anaa enatabaikitia sii ninche; kake ore ilo kilikuai otoning'o ninche neitu eret, amu eitu einepu enkirukoto tiatua lelo ootoning'o." 
Hebrews4:3 Amu iyiook ilooiruko oojing ina kiyeng'iyeng'ata, anaa ina natejo Enkai nchere, “Ore anaa enainosa olmumai tiatua engoro ai nchere, ‘Mejing ae kata ninche enkiyeng'iyeng'ata ai ntarasi,’ ” hoo neidipate isiaaitin enyena ebaiki apake pee eitamanyuni enkop." 
Hebrews4:4 Amu eimakaki enkolong e naapishana te dikae nejo nji, “Neyeng'iyeng'a Enkai te nkolong e naapishana eidipa isiaaitin enyena pooki.”" 
Hebrews4:5 Nenyaaka ake ajo teine wueji, “Mejing aekata ninche enkiyeng'iyeng'ata ai.”" 
Hebrews4:6 Ore naa amu ketiooyo pee ejing kulikae ine, ore lelo ootang'amutua lelo omon supati neitu ninche ejing te nkaraki neitu eiruk." 
Hebrews4:7 Enyaaka naa Enkai apik ae olong, “Taata ena olong”, etejo te Daudi etulusoyie enkata naado, te lelo rorei ooidipaki aairoro, “Ore taata ena olong ti nining'ining'i oltoilo le Nkai, emintagol iltauja linyi.”" 
Hebrews4:8 Amu tenaa keidipa apa Yoshua aishoo ninche enkiyeng'iyeng'ata anaata eitu eitoki Enkai aimaki ae olong. 
Hebrews4:9 Neaku eton ake eetae enkiyeng'iyeng'ata e Sabato oo ltung'ana le Nkai; 
Hebrews4:10 amu ore pooki ng'ae, ojing enkiyeng'iyeng'ata e Nkai nepal sii ninye isiaaitin enyena anaa enatapala Enkai inenyena." 
Hebrews4:11 Ematonyok naa pee kijing ina kiyeng'iyeng'ata, pee mebatata hoo obo te ngolong'u naaijo ina apa enye." 
Hebrews4:12 Amu keishu ororei le Nkai neeta engolon, nepi ninye alang olalem ake pooki opi mbat pokira, neimisho enarish oltau o enkiyang'et, neim irubat o ntolo, neyiolou indamunot o nkiguanat o ltau." 
Hebrews4:13 Naa ore te dukuya Enkai, meetae hoo toki te nena naaitayioki naisudoro kake keibala pooki neboluno te dukuya inkonyek e ilo likiyaki imbaa ang." 
Hebrews4:14 Ore naa amu kiaata olapolosani kitok oilepa keper, Yesu, Oinoti le Nkai, ematukurraki aaibung elimunoto ang." 
Hebrews4:15 Amu mme olapolosani likiaata olemeidim atayiolo enchalan ang, kake ore ilo obo likiata naa oloidipaki apa aatetem anaa enatemitae iyiook, kake eitu eas ninye ng'ok." 
Hebrews4:16 Ematinyikaki naa ilo orika le mpiris kintieu, pee king'amu olng'ur nikitum empiris naretu iyiook te nkata e ngoloto." 
Hebrews5:1 Amu ore olapolosani ake pooki ogeluni tiatua olorere netegeluaki metaasisho te nkaraki olorere tialo Enkai, neitayu nkishoorot o lasarri te nkaraki ing'ok." 
Hebrews5:2 Neidim ninye ataretu te mborron ilmoda o lwushuush, enapita ninye makewan enchalan enye." 
Hebrews5:3 Ore te nkaraki ena, meeta nchere pee meng'as aitayu olasar loo ng'ok enyena makewan neitayu sii noo ilkulikae tung'ana." 
Hebrews5:4 Nemeetae oloisho kewan ina kitoo, kake Enkai naipot, anaa apa pee eipot Aron." 
Hebrews5:5 Neaku ore sii ninye Kristo eitu eilepie kewan meitaae olapolosani kitok, kake ketegelua ilo otiaaka ninye, “Ira iyie Oinoti lai taata aatoiwuo iyie,”" 
Hebrews5:6 anaa pee ejo te dikae wueji, “Ira iyie olapolosani ntarasi, to lkerreti le Melkisedek.”" 
Hebrews5:7 Ore too nkolong'i enyena o sesen etoomonuo Yesu esaisho, nebuaku oleng too lkiyio, esai ilo apa oidim aitajeu te keeya, netoning'oki ninye te nkaraki naure ninye Enkai." 
Hebrews5:8 Amu ore hoo naa Oinoti ninye le Nkai, eitamoo kewan enkirukoto teina mion nanoto," 
Hebrews5:9 naa ore amu eitabayioki, etaa ninye enjeunoto oo ntarasi te lelo pooki ooning ninye," 
Hebrews5:10 neitaa Enkai ninye olapolosani kitok to lkerreti le Melkisedek. 
Hebrews5:11 Ore tena bae naa keetae nkumok naaji naagol elimunoto, amu eijo ketagolo intae ilukuny mining'ung'u." 
Hebrews5:12 Amu ore aa intae naaji taata ilaiteng'enak, eton eiririkino tenelotu likae aigilie aiteng'en intae nkiterunot o rorei le Nkai. Eton aa kule naairirikino intae, mme endaa nagol;" 
Hebrews5:13 amu ore pooki ng'ae laa kule ake eishuyie naa kaalani to rorei le supatisho, amu eton aa enkerai ninye." 
Hebrews5:14 Kake ore endaa nagol naa enoo ltung'ana botoro, ene lelo ooiteng'enaki to lmoo metayiolo aatirishu isupati o ntorrok." 
Hebrews6:1 Ore naa ematogiroi nkiterunot oo nkiteng'enat e Kristo emaape dukuya aabulu pee meaku aikintoki aaitamanya enkirridunoto naipirta isiaaitin naatuata, o enkirukoto e Nkai," 
Hebrews6:2 o enkiteng'enata e nkisuja o enkiteleikinoto oo nkaik, o empiunoto oo lootuata, o enkiguana oo ntarasi." 
Hebrews6:3 Naa aikiaas kuna pooki eishorua Enkai. 
Hebrews6:4 Amu meidimayu neitokini aitasheyie te nkirridunoto lelo ooidipaki aaitawang'a, neishamishama enkishorunoto e keper, netang'arieki Enkiyang'et Sinyati," 
Hebrews6:5 neishamishama esupatisho o rorei le Nkai o engolon e ina kata nalotu. 
Hebrews6:6 Teneitoki ninche etii nena, aaibelekenya neany eiruk, amu ilo Inoti le Nkai eigil aashe maate nepik enkurruna metalioyu." 
Hebrews6:7 Amu ore enkop naok enkare nashaiki nkatitin kumok, nebulaki endaa naret lelo ooturokini, netum emayianata naing'uaa Enkai." 
Hebrews6:8 Kake te neiu ilkiku o endiati, neaku pesho nenyikaki oldeket; naa empejoroto eiting'oki." 
Hebrews6:9 Ore hoo naa neijia etiu tinikiro, ore te intae, ilanyor laainei, kesipa nchere kiatayie intae osiligi loo mbaa naaikash e njeunoto." 
Hebrews6:10 Mme Enkai neme asipani metaa kerikino enkisiaayiare inyi o enyorrata nintoduaaitie tialo lelo sinyat ooisiaaisho, neton ake isiaaitata." 
Hebrews6:11 Ekiiyeu neitoduaaya pooki ng'ae linyi enyuaata naikununo neijia pee itumutumu emborei oo sipat o siligi o metabaiki enkiting'oto," 
Hebrews6:12 pee miaakuku yietuti, kake ilooduaaya lelo laa te nkirukoto enye o te ng'iriata etujung'o nkisiligat." 
Hebrews6:13 Amu ore pee eisho Enkai Abraham enkisiligata naa ore amu meetae likae kitok olang oinosie olmumai, neinosie kewan olmumai," 
Hebrews6:14 ejo, “Kesipa kaamayian nanu iyie naaponaa.”" 
Hebrews6:15 Neaku ore Abraham, etobiko neng'iri, netum ina naisiligieki." 
Hebrews6:16 Oltung'ani kitok alang kewan einosie oltung'ani olmumai naa ore te nchankar ake pooki naa olmumai oitadedeyie ina shankar pooki. 
Hebrews6:17 Neaku ore apa pee eyieu Enkai neitoduaaya tukul nchere meibelekenya enkiguana enye, nepik olmumai," 
Hebrews6:18 peyie aa too mbaa are nemeibelekenya, naa te nena meidimayu pee eaku Enkai olalejani, kinoto iyiook ilooisikakita aasaru eretoto nagol nikimbung'ie ilo siligi otipikaki dukuya iyiook." 
Hebrews6:19 Kiata iyiook ena ng'ape nauno naenikino oltau, naa osiligi ojing agiroo oliatua lo lkarasha orish enkaji e Nkai," 
Hebrews6:20 ine neshomo Yesu aituruk te nkaraki iyiook, eidipa ninye ataa olapolosani kitok intarasi to lkerreti le Melkisedek." 
Hebrews7:1 Amu ore ele oji Melkisedek, olaiguanani le Salem, naa olapolosani le Nkai natii shumata te pooki. Netanang'are ninye Abraham eshukunye eing'uaa enjore natimirie ilaiguanak, nemayian ninye;" 
Hebrews7:2 naa ninye etoorikia Abraham ematua e tomon e pooki toki. Ore te walunto e nkarna enye naa olaiguanani le supatisho, naa olaiguanani le Salem, “Eji Olaiguanani le seriani”." 
Hebrews7:3 Meeta ninye menye anaa ng'otonye, nemeeta entipat, nemeeta eneiting'ie enkishui enye, kake etiu anaa ilo Inoti le Nkai, ora olapolosani ntarasi." 
Hebrews7:4 Ng'ura eneba enkitoo enye! Eishoo papa lang Abraham ninye ematua e tomon oo yarunot. 
Hebrews7:5 Naa ore lelo le ishoi e Lawi oong'amu empolosare neetae inaaitanapaki tiatua nkitanapat meishoo olorere ninche ematua e tomon, naa too lalashera lenye, hoo naa le ishoi e Abraham sii ninche." 
Hebrews7:6 Kake ematua e tomon naishoo Abraham Melkisedek hoo neme ole ishoi oo Lawi naishoo metamayiani ninye, otang'amua nkisiligat." 
Hebrews7:7 Metii enchankar inchere olkitok ake omayian oloti. 
Hebrews7:8 Ore tene, iltung'ana ooyooki aaye oong'amu ematua e tomon, ore teine, naa ilo obo oitadedeyieki aajo keishu." 
Hebrews7:9 Keidim doi ninye oltung'ani atejo ore ninye Lawi makewan, oishoro metang'amu ematua e tomon, eishooyie ematua e tomon te Abraham," 
Hebrews7:10 amu eton apa etioyo too sapo e nkakuyiaa lenye pee enang'are Abraham Melkisedek. 
Hebrews7:11 Ore naa tenaa ketumoyu apa bayarotisho te mpolosare oo le Lawi, amu te ninche etang'amutua ilo orere nkitanapat, kainyoo eitokini aayieunye likae apolosani olotu to lkerreti le Aron?" 
Hebrews7:12 Amu te neibelekenyi ilapolosak neibelekenyi sii ninche inkitanapat. 
Hebrews7:13 Amu ore ele oimaki kuna baa naa ole likae osho lemeeta ninye aekata oltung'ani lenye otopolosishe to lperere lo lasar. 
Hebrews7:14 Amu keibala ajo olosho le Yuda etoikioki Olaitoriani lang, naa ore te ilo osho, neitu ejo Musa ae naipirta ilapolosak." 
Hebrews7:15 Keitoki ena bae awang'u oleng te neinyototo likae apolosani lo rrekie le Melkisedek," 
Hebrews7:16 ajo eitaaki olapolosani neme to rrekie loo nkitanapat anaa te ntipat o sesen ake eeta engolon, kake te nkidimata e nkishui nemeidimi aaishie." 
Hebrews7:17 Amu keitaikiaki ninye shakenisho nchere, “Ira iyie olapolosani ntarasi to rrekie le Melkisedek.”" 
Hebrews7:18 Ore te nabo alo, eiwuang'ieki enapa kitanapata naituruku te nkaraki nashal nemeeta dupoto," 
Hebrews7:19 amu meetae entoki nataa bayaroti te nkaraki nkitanapat, ore te nkae alo, eyawuaki osiligi oikash, laa te ninye kinyikaki iyiook Enkai." 
Hebrews7:20 Neitu easi ina metii olmumai. 
Hebrews7:21 Ore lelo apa ooitera aaku ilapolosak netaa metii olmumai, kake ore ele netolimuoki to lmumai, “Einosa Olaitoriani olmumai nemeibelekeny enatejo inchere, ‘Ira iyie olapolosani intarasi.’ ”" 
Hebrews7:22 Ena naishoo Yesu meitadedeyie osotua olusoo to likae. 
Hebrews7:23 Ore lapa apolosak ooiturukutuo naa kumok esiana enye, amu etomitikio keeya ebikoo te mpolosare;" 
Hebrews7:24 kake eibung'ita ninye Yesu empolosare enye nemeiting, amu kebik ninye intarasi." 
Hebrews7:25 Ina pee eidim ninye aitajeu nkatitin pooki lelo ooimu ninye epuonu aanyikaki Enkai, amu keishu oshi ake ninye netumoki atoomonoki ninche." 
Hebrews7:26 Amu keishiaakino te iyiook, ti nikiata olapolosani kitok oba nji, osinyati, lemeeta entiyoto, nemeeta entibili, olotirishuaki too laing'okok neilepieki aaitogiroo shumata." 
Hebrews7:27 Meetayie ninye tipat, anaa enatiu apa lelo kulikae apolosak, meeta tipat napolosishore anaake, to lbae loo ng'ok enyena makewan, neitoki apolosisho to lbae loo ng'ok o lorere, eitabayie ninye ina nabo kata ake apa pee eishooyo kewan." 
Hebrews7:28 Kesipa nchere nkitanapat naaitaa ltung'ana ooshal ilapolosak kituaak, kake ore ilo rorei lo lmumai, otusujua nkitanapat, netegelua ilo Inoti bayaroti obik intarasi." 
Hebrews8:1 Ore embae sapuk te kuna baa naa ena: eikiaata doi iyiook olapolosani kitok oba neijia, olotonita te tatene e Nkitoo e keper," 
Hebrews8:2 olaisiaayiani le ine wueji sinyati o le ilo ng'obor osipa leme oltung'ani oitasheyie kake Olaitoriani. 
Hebrews8:3 Amu ore olapolosani ake pooki netegeluaki meishooi nkishoorot neitayu lasarri, naa keishiaakino apa neeta sii ninye ele apolosani entoki naishooyo." 
Hebrews8:4 Ore te naa kena kop etii, nemeaku hoo olapolosani, amu keetae naa lelo kulikae apolosak ooishooyo nkishoorot anaa enajo nkitanapat." 
Hebrews8:5 Neisiaai ninche nyaanyukie o loip le ine wueji sinyati te keper; amu ore pee eaku keun Musa olng'obor, netuutaka Enkai ninye nejoki, “Toduaa taa ntobira pooki toki nturubare lelo sirat likintoduaaki to ldoinyio.”" 
Hebrews8:6 Kake ore anaa enatiu, enoto ninye Kristo enkisiaayiare naisul ele sotua oyau ninye, amu eitabayioki too nkisiligat naalusoo te nekua." 
Hebrews8:7 Amu tenemeeta apa ilo sotua le dukuya ntiyot, naa anaata meetae ae nayaunyeki likae liaare." 
Hebrews8:8 Amu ntiyot etoduaa Enkai te ninche pee etejo: “Kepuonu nkolong'i, Olaitoriani ojo, naa kayooki aitayu osotua ng'ejuk o enkaji oo Siraeli o enkaji e Yuda." 
Hebrews8:9 Nemetiu anaa olapa sotua laitayio o loo menye enapa olong pee aibung ninche te nkaina ariku aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri; amu eitu ninche etoni tiatua osotua lai, naa ina pee eitu aitoki ashilaa ninche, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Hebrews8:10 Nele osotua laitayu o enkaji oo Siraeli te nelusoo nena olong'i, Olaitoriani ojo. Kapik inkitanapat aainei atua ilukuny enye, naiger ninche tiatua iltauja lenye, naa kaaku Enkai enye, neaku ninche iltung'ana laainei." 
Hebrews8:11 Nemeitoki pooki ng'ae aiteng'en ole latia enye aashu eiteng'en pooki ng'ae olalashe lenye, ajoki, ‘Tayiolo Olaitoriani,’ amu kaayiolou pooki nanu, eiteru to loti te pooki o metabaiki olkitok te pooki." 
Hebrews8:12 Amu katum kenya ake olng'ur tialo ntorrok enye, nemaitoki aekata adamu ng'ok enye.”" 
Hebrews8:13 Ore eimaki ninye osotua ng'ejuk neitaa Enkai musana ole dukuya. Ore ilo omusanu aaku moruo netinyikaka enkiishata. 
Hebrews9:1 Ore doi ninye ilo sotua le dukuya naa keeta apa irrekiei le seremare o ewueji sinyati e nkop. 
Hebrews9:2 Amu eitobiraki olng'obor li oriong, laa atua ninye etii olkilang'et o emisa o emukate nasinya; neji ine Ewueji Sinyati." 
Hebrews9:3 Ore ti oriong olkarasha li aare neitashe olng'obor oji ewueji Sinyati Oleng," 
Hebrews9:4 netii olperere lo lasar le nkorropil le saabu o ilo sanduku lo sotua omura pooki alole te saabu, netii atua ilo moti e saabu natii mana, o enapa ng'udi e Aron natubulakita mbenek, o lapa soito lo sotua;" 
Hebrews9:5 netii ilkerubi le nkitoo ooitushurita ilo orika lo lng'ur. Ore kuna tokitin nimikindim aaimaki taata nikisipu. 
Hebrews9:6 Ore pee eidipi aaitabai kuna kitobirat, neaku kejing ilapolosak anaake atua ilo ng'obor aaitabaya empolosare enye;" 
Hebrews9:7 kake ore ilo ng'obor li are, olapolosani kitok ake ojing, ore ninye naa kata nabo to lari, nemejing meetae osarge oishooyo te nkaraki kewan enye o te nkaraki inkitarruorrot e ilo orere." 
Hebrews9:8 Te na bae eitodolu Enkiyang'et Sinyati inchere eton mebolo enkoitoi najing'ieki ine wueji sinyati eton ake eitashe ilo ng'obor lioriong," 
Hebrews9:9 naa ina enkitanyaanyukoto e na kata taata. Ore te risioroto ele rrekie neishoori inkishoorot, o lasarri kake meidim aaitaa supati indamunot e lelo oosaisho," 
Hebrews9:10 kake endaa ake eipirta o enaoki o enkitukuore oo mpukunot kumok, naa imbaa naaitore osesen naatuunoki o metabau enkata e nkibelekenyata." 
Hebrews9:11 Kake ore eewuo Kristo anaa olapolosani kitok loo mbaa supati naapuonu, neaku ore to lng'obor kitok obaya, leme inkaik naaitobira, inchere (ime olena kitayunoto)," 
Hebrews9:12 etijing'a ninye nabo kata Ewueji Sinyati, neme osarge loo lkineji o lasho etoshoroyie kake osarge lenye makewan, neitadedeyie teina elakunoto oo ntarasi." 
Hebrews9:13 Amu amaa te naa ore iltung'ana ooiduruk naa keituku enkisuaakinoto o sarge loo lkineji o loo loing'ok o nkuruon e ntawuo te nkipooto o sesen," 
Hebrews9:14 kebaa naa elusoo osarge le Kristo, laa teina Kiyang'et oo ntarasi eishoo kewan Enkai meeta entiyoto eituku indamunot inyi neitung'uaa intae isiaaitin naatuata esiaayia Enkai naishu." 
Hebrews9:15 Ore te nkaraki nena, Kristo olaitutumoni lo sotua ng'ejuk, paa ore lelo ooipotoki netum inkisiligat e njung'ore oo ntarasi, amu enotoki keeya ng'ejuk nalaku too nkitarruorrot lelo ootii abori lido sotua le dukuya." 
Hebrews9:16 Amu ore te neetae empalai e njung'ore, neng'asi ake aaitadedeyie keeya eilo oitujung'ishe." 
Hebrews9:17 Amu pooki ake pee ejung'ishoi naa te neetae olotua, amu mejung'ishoi eishu olojung'isho." 
Hebrews9:18 Naa ina pee eitu apa eitabari olapa sotua musana metii osarge. 
Hebrews9:19 Amu ore apa, keimaki ake Musa enkitanapata ake pooki enena aliki olorere nedumu osarge loo lasho o loo lkineji, te nebo enkare o lpapit oonyokie loo ntare o lchani oji hisop, neisuaaki embuku kewan o lelo tung'ana pooki," 
Hebrews9:20 ejoito, “Osarge ele lo sotua oitanapa intae Enkai.”" 
Hebrews9:21 Neiko sii neijia ilo sarge eisuaaki kunda pokira are, ilo ng'obor o ntokitin pooki naasishoreki te seremare." 
Hebrews9:22 Kesipa nchere, ore to lkerreti loo nkitanapat, osarge apake eipokieki pooki toki, naa ore eitu eibukori osarge nemeetae empalakinoto oo ng'ok." 
Hebrews9:23 Neaku meeta apake kata nemeitukui kuna tokitin naa inkitanyaanyukot ake e nekua e keper aaipokie kulo asarri, kake ore nena tokitin maate e keper neipokieki lasarri oolang kulo." 
Hebrews9:24 Amu eitu eitijing'i Kristo, ewueji sinyati naitobiraki too nkaik naa enkitanyaanyukoto ake e idia nasipa, kake atua keper kewan etijing'a, paa keitashe taata te dukuya Enkai te rishata ang." 
Hebrews9:25 Neme keitoki ninye Kristo aigiligil aishooyo kewan, anaa enaiko ilo apolosani kitok ejing atua ine Wueji Sinyati anaake to lari eeta osarge leme o lenye;" 
Hebrews9:26 amu te naa neijia etiu, naa anaata eigilieki ninye emion ana apa moitie pee eitamanyuni enkop. Kake ore enatiu, etaliee ninye nabo kata ake te pooki eiting'o enkata pee eiwuang'ie ing'ok eitaa ninye kewan olasar." 
Hebrews9:27 Naa ore anaa enaye iltung'ana nabo kata ake, ore pee elusoo ina nelotu enkiguana," 
Hebrews9:28 neijia sii etiu Kristo, ore eidipaki aaitarasai ena nabo newa ng'ok oo lkumok, keliooyu eni are, neme ng'ok elotu aararr kake kelotu aitajeu lelo ooanyita ninye te yieunoto sapuk." 
Hebrews10:1 Ore amu oloip ake le nena sidain naapuonu eeta nena kitanapat neme nekua tokitin naasipa naara, meidim aekata lelo asarri ooitaini te pooki ari, aaitaa bayarot lelo tung'ana oonyikaki." 
Hebrews10:2 Amu te naa keidim anaata apa meekure eitaini. Te naa keitukuoki lelo aseremak, anaata meitoki aayioloiki ate ng'ok." 
Hebrews10:3 Kake ore tiatua lelo asarri netii enkitadamunoto oo ng'ok anaake te pooki ari. 
Hebrews10:4 Amu meidimayu metaa osarge loo loing'ok o lkineji ooya ng'ok. 
Hebrews10:5 Naa ina paa, ore apa pee elotu Kristo enkop, nejo, “Ore ilasarri o nkishoorot nimiyieu kake kintobiraka iyie nanu osesen." 
Hebrews10:6 Ore ilasarri oopeji o nkishorunot oo ng'ok neitu ishipakino iyie. 
Hebrews10:7 Ina pee atejo, ‘Ng'ura nele nanu, oewuo pee aas eniyieu, eyieunoto ino, Na Ai ai!’ Anaa enatisiraki tialo nanu tiatua olpiyayati le mbuku.”" 
Hebrews10:8 Ore pee ejo te ine te shumata, “Eitu iyieu iyie neitu ishipakino ilasarri o nkishoorot naapeji o nkishoorot oo ng'ok.” (Neishooyioki kuna te risioroto anaa enajo nkitanapat)," 
Hebrews10:9 nenyaaka aponaa ajo, “Nele nanu, aewuo pee aas eyieunoto ino.” Keiwuang'ie ninye idia e dukuya peyie etum aitasheyie eniare."
