Hebrews10:10 Naa ina eitukuyieki iyiook te nkishorunoto o sesen le Yesu Kristo nabo kata ake te rishata e pooki. 
Hebrews10:11 Neitashe olapolosani ake pooki anaake te siaai enye, neigil aitayu iloshi ake asarri, lemeidim aekata aawaita ng'ok." 
Hebrews10:12 Kake ore pee eidip Kristo aitayu olasar loo ng'ok obo ake loo nkatitin pooki, neton ninye te nkaina e tatene e Nkai." 
Hebrews10:13 Paa teine eton o metaba anaa neitaae ilmang'ati lenyena olorika loo nkejek enyena. 
Hebrews10:14 Amu to lasar obo eitabayie ninye te nkata pooki lelo ooitukuoki. 
Hebrews10:15 Neitaiki sii ninye iyiook enkiyang'et Sinyati shakeni; te nkata nasuju ejo," 
Hebrews10:16 “Nele osotua laitayu nanu o ninche te siadi nena olong'i, Olaitoriani ojo, naa kapik inkitanapat aainei iltauja lenye, naiger ninche too ndamunot enye.”" 
Hebrews10:17 Neitoki aponaa nejo, “Ore ing'ok o nkitarruorrot enye nemaitoki adamu aekata.”" 
Hebrews10:18 Ore enetii empalakinoto e kuna, nemeitoki atii olasar loo ng'ok." 
Hebrews10:19 Ore te nkaraki nena, ilalashera, ore naa amu eikiaata iyiook enkitieunoto nikijing'ie ine wueji sinyati to sarge le Yesu," 
Hebrews10:20 teina oitoi ng'ejuk naishu nataboloko ninye iyiook te ilo karasha, aa taa to sesen lenye," 
Hebrews10:21 nikiaata sii olapolosani kitok oitore enkaji e Nkai. 
Hebrews10:22 Ematinyikaki to ltau osipa tiatua emborei e nkirukoto, neisuaakaki iyiook aaisuj ltauja lang metaa mikiaata nkibirribirrat torrok too ltauja lang neisujaki iseseni lang te nkare nasila." 
Hebrews10:23 Emaibung'a aakurraki elimunoto o siligi lang mikingusugus, amu keisiligayu ilo oishorua ina kisiligata;" 
Hebrews10:24 naa ematadamu enikinkunakino olikae olikae enkisusunkat o enyorrata o siaaitin sidain. 
Hebrews10:25 Nimikipalaa entumo, anaa enatiu olkuaak le kulikae, kake intagolo olikae olikae neisul idolitata aajo etinyikua ina Olong." 
Hebrews10:26 Amu ti nikiaas ing'ok aaotiki kindipa aatang'amu eyiolounoto e sipata, nemeitokini aata olasar loo ng'ok," 
Hebrews10:27 kake enkuretisho e anyunoto e ndung'okinoto e nkiguana, o engoro e nkima namut lelo mang'ati." 
Hebrews10:28 Ore apa oltung'ani ogil nena kitanapat e Musa neye metii olng'ur te neetae shakenisho oo ltung'ana aare aashu okuni. 
Hebrews10:29 Ijo kebaa elusoo enkitamioto nayaki kewan oltung'ani oany Oinoti le Nkai, neisarkionie osarge lo sotua laa ninye eitukuyieki neitagor ina Kiyang'et e mpiris?" 
Hebrews10:30 Amu eikiyiolo ilo otejo, “Enaai elap, nanu oitalaku.” Nejo sii, “Olaitoriani oiguanare iltung'ana lenyena.”" 
Hebrews10:31 Entoki naitureisho ti nibatatakino inkaik e Nkai naishu. 
Hebrews10:32 Kake entadamu sii intae napa olong'i e dukuya ina kata apa eidipaki aaitawang'aki intae, ning'iriri enkitirrishakinoto nagol te nebo o emion," 
Hebrews10:33 neaku kebolori intae metamori te dukuya olorere neisilisili intae, nitaa ti aekata encholiek e lelo ooikunaki neijia." 
Hebrews10:34 Amu iatata apa olng'ur too looena, nitonyorraitie te nchipai meishang'itieki masaa inyi, amu iyiololo apa aajo iatata intae maate entoki nalang naa enabikoo." 
Hebrews10:35 Ore te nkaraki ina, eminturraa naa empijan inyi, amu keeta olerrinyore kitok." 
Hebrews10:36 Amu meeta nchere pee ming'iriri, pee itumutumu aataas enayieu Enkai, ning'amumu ina kisiligata natolimuoki," 
Hebrews10:37 “Amu keng'or enkiti kata, pee elotu ilo olotu nemeimutie;" 
Hebrews10:38 Kake enkirukoto eishuyie osinyati lai, naa te nerrinyo siadi, nemeshipakino oltau lai ninye.”" 
Hebrews10:39 Kake mikira iyiook ile lelo oorrinyo siadi nemuti, kake kira ile lelo ooata enkirukoto negolie iltauja lenye." 
Hebrews11:1 Ore enkirukoto naa ninye naitadedeyie intokitin naaisiliguni, naa ninye enkitisipata e nena tokitin nemelioo." 
Hebrews11:2 Amu te nkirukoto etonyorrarrie Enkai iltung'ana li apa. 
Hebrews11:3 Te nkirukoto kiyiolo aajo eitayioki enkop te nkiroroto e Nkai, neaku ore kuna naadolitai naa too nemelioo eitobiraki." 
Hebrews11:4 Te nkirukoto eyaka Abel Enkai olasar ong'amaroyu alang ole Kain, laa ninye etonyorrarrie Enkai ninye ajo eisupat. Etaa Enkai shakeni amu etang'amayie olasar lenye; etua ninye Abel kake ore te nkirukoto enye neton eirorita." 
Hebrews11:5 Te nkirukoto ewaki Enok aailepie pee medol keeya; neitu etumi, amu Enkai naawa ninye. Naa ore eton eitu eilepieki neitisipaki nchere eitishipa ninye Enkai." 
Hebrews11:6 Naa ore metii enkirukoto nemeidimayu peyie eitishipi Enkai. Amu ore pooki ng'ae oyieu nenyikaki Enkai keishiaa neiruk inchere keetae Enkai naa ninye oisho inkishoorot lelo ooing'oru ninye. 
Hebrews11:7 Te nkirukoto eitoduaa Enkai Noa nena baa apa neton melioo, nening ninye neitobir esafina pee esaru enkaji enye; tena bae etudung'oko Noa enkop enkiguana neaku ninye olajung'oni le supatisho natumi te nkirukoto." 
Hebrews11:8 Te nkirukoto etoning'ishe Abraham pee eipoti metupuku alo ewueji nelotu atum nejung; nepuku ninye nelo, nemeyiolo enelo." 
Hebrews11:9 Te nkirukoto etobiko aa omoni teina kop naisiligieki, anaa te nkop eeiking'a naa ilng'oborri emany o Isaak o Yakobo, oora sii ninche ilajung'ok le ina kisiligata te nebo ninye." 
Hebrews11:10 Amu ina anasa apa eanyita naata olkitamanyunoto, enaa ore oloshetu o loitobir naa Enkai." 
Hebrews11:11 Te nkirukoto enoto Sara enkidimata e ishoi hoo netaa moruo, netulusoitie ilarin lenyena, etoduaa ninye ajo keisiligayu ilo oishoo enkisiligata." 
Hebrews11:12 Te nkaraki ena paa ore eimu oltung'ani obo, hoo netiu apa ninye anaa olotua enotoki eishoi naba te nkumoi anaa ilakir le shumata nemeikenayu, etiu anaa osinyai le mbata e naiposha." 
Hebrews11:13 Etuata kulo pooki etii atua enkirukoto, neitu eng'amu ninche enapa naisiligieki, kake etoduaa neirorokito te nelakua, netolimutuo inchere ilomon ninche naa yararot ninche te nkop." 
Hebrews11:14 Amu ore lelo tung'ana oojo neijia neibalunye inchere enkop apa nabikie eing'oru. 
Hebrews11:15 Te naa kenkop apa natung'uaitie edamu ninche, anaata apa enoto erishata nashukore." 
Hebrews11:16 Kake ore anaa enatiu, ae kop eyieu sidai teina, naa ene Keper, te nkaraki e ina pee mekurru Enkai te neji ninye Enkai enye, amu eitobiraka ninye ninche enkanasa." 
Hebrews11:17 Te nkirukoto eitayio Abraham, Isaak, enapa kata pee etemi, aishooyo oinoti lenye obo," 
Hebrews11:18 oloimakaki aajo, “Isaak eipotieki eishoi ino.”" 
Hebrews11:19 Etoduaa Abraham ajo keidim Enkai aitopiu iltung'ana ebaiki ilootuata; neaku ore teina kitanyaanyukoto, etushukoko Enkai Isaak Abraham too lootuata." 
Hebrews11:20 Te nkirukoto etamayiana Isaak Yakobo o Esau too naapuonu. 
Hebrews11:21 Te nkirukoto, etaa keye, etamayiana Yakobo ilayiok le Yosef, eigarakino ninye elukunya e ntirma enye eirrugo aseremisho." 
Hebrews11:22 Te nkirukoto etaa keye Yosef, eimaka enaidurra oo Siraeli neutaki eneikunaa enukaroto enye." 
Hebrews11:23 Te nkirukoto, pee eini Musa, eisudoyioki lapaitin okuni intoiwuo enyena, amu etoduaa ninche aajo aisidai ina kerai; neitu eureyu ninche ina naitanapishe olaiguanani." 
Hebrews11:24 Te nkirukoto, etanya Musa, etubulua, eipoti aajo ole ntito e Farao," 
Hebrews11:25 nedutaa meinosieki osina te nebo iltung'ana le Nkai alang te neton aitumurru olkar loo ng'ok. 
Hebrews11:26 Etoduaa ajo emoroto namori te nkaraki Kristo naikash alang enkarsisisho o masaa kiroteti e Misiri, amu keanyita idia kishorunoto." 
Hebrews11:27 Te nkirukoto eshomo aing'uaa Misiri, neitu eiureyu engoro e ilo aiguanani; amu eting'iria anaa olodolita ilo lemelioo." 
Hebrews11:28 Te nkirukoto, eitayio Pasaka neisuaaya osarge, pee, mear ninche ilo Arani loo lkikaunot." 
Hebrews11:29 Te nkirukoto etalang'a lelo tung'ana enaiposha nanyokie anaa enkop natoyio; kake ore Ilmisiri pee etem aajo matalang, neya enkare." 
Hebrews11:30 Te nkirukoto etuurori isunta e Yeriko etamanaki too nkolong'i naapishana. 
Hebrews11:31 Te nkirukoto pee eitu eari Rahab ina mulayoi, te nebo lelo apa kulikae lemening'isho, amu etang'amua ninye lelo aikitalak to sotua." 
Hebrews11:32 Naa kakua kulie naitoki ajo? Amu maata enkata naimakinye Gideon, Barak, Samson, Yepta, Daudi o Samuel o lelo oibonok le Nkai" 
Hebrews11:33 ilaa te nkirukoto etimira inkitoriat, neitabaya te ngolon enkiguana oo sipat, neng'amu nkisiligat, neibooyo nkutukie oo lng'atunyo," 
Hebrews11:34 near olkutati le nkima, neilany enepi o lalem, netum enkidimata tiatua enchalan, neaku magil te njore, nemir injoreitin oo lmang'ati." 
Hebrews11:35 Etang'amutua inkituaak ilootuata lenye eitopiwuoki, Einosieki kulikae osina etanyaita elakuni, ejo pee eyooki aapiu te mpuaan nalang ina." 
Hebrews11:36 Eting'iria kulikae imorot o oshot, o metabaiki ilpisia o jila." 
Hebrews11:37 Eirruyaki too soito, nedung'i te musumeno aitaa are, neari to lalem nepuaya eishopito ndapan oo nkerra oo noo nkineji, ilaisinak o looisilisili neinyali," 
Hebrews11:38 ilemeishiakino enkop te netii nepuaya too lpurkel o too ldoinyio, o too rrumati o too nkapuniaa e nkop." 
Hebrews11:39 Ore kulo pooki, hoo neitadedeyieki te nkirukoto enye, neitu eng'amu ina kisiligata," 
Hebrews11:40 amu etasioko apa Enkai adol embae naikash te iyiook, inchere ore mikitii iyiook nemeitabari ninche." 
Hebrews12:1 Ore te nkaraki nena, amu kemanita iyiook enkatampoi kitok e lelo shakenini, emaiturrai sii iyiook enkiroishi ake pooki o eng'oki naonyikino iyiook oleng, emaipirrio te ng'iriata teina kuetata natipikaki dukuya iyiook." 
Hebrews12:2 Emaimariria Yesu olaa ninye oiterua naa ninye oitabaya enkirukoto ang, olaa ore te nkaraki eng'ida natipikaki dukuya ninye neting'iria osalaba, nemenu ina kurruna, neton taata te nkaina e tatene o lorika le nkitoo e Nkai." 
Hebrews12:3 Entadamu intae ilo oting'iria enkiba naba neijia oo laing'okok eiba kewan enye, pee minaururu intae nemidukenyanya tiatua iltauja linyi." 
Hebrews12:4 Ore te nkesha inyi iararere ing'ok neton eitu igilunorere o meibukori osarge. 
Hebrews12:5 Anaa ketorikine intae ina naikokieki intae anaa nkera? “Enkerai ai, nimimenu earata nikiaar Olaitoriani, nimilepori ti nikiosh ninye!" 
Hebrews12:6 Amu olonyor eosh Olaitoriani, neitame enkerai ake pooki nang'amu ninye.”" 
Hebrews12:7 Te nkaraki naa ioshot e nkikoo pee ing'iriri. Eitaasa intae Enkai enaitaas inkera enyena, anaa kaa kerai eetae nemeosh menye arere?" 
Hebrews12:8 Te nemeoshi intae aarere, anaa enaitaasaki ilkulikae pooki, nitaa nkera naadumuni nimirara inot." 
Hebrews12:9 Ore etii ena, ekiaata loo papa lang te nkop ootosho iyiook aarere nikiyanyita ninche. Paa eimikiyanyit naa oleng ilo Papa loo nkiyang'eta pee kinchu?" 
Hebrews12:10 Amu etoosho ninche iyiook aarere te nkiti rishata anaa enayieu ninche, kake keosh ninye iyiook arere amu eisidai ina te iyiook pee kitum esinyatisho o esupatisho enye." 
Hebrews12:11 Ore te pooki rishata ore eoshoto pooki narere oltung'ani nememelok; ore te siadi neiu ilng'anayio le seriani e supatisho te lelo ootarerioki teina. 
Hebrews12:12 Ore te nkaraki ina entarrapu nena aik naalepori naa entagolo nena kung inyi naashal," 
Hebrews12:13 naa entobiraki inkejek inyi inkoitoi naaitoriori, paa ore ilo ng'ojine nemeburukusha kake pee etumi aaishiunye." 
Hebrews12:14 Entonyok eng'oru osotua too ltung'ana pooki o esinyatisho naa ore te nemeetae nemetumi hoo olodol Olaitoriani. 
Hebrews12:15 Entodol ake pee meetae hoo obo olau empiris e Nkai; inchere pee metumi “Entonai e nduaran” nabulu neyau entorroni, neaku teina eisarkionieki ilkumok." 
Hebrews12:16 Eminchosho etumi oltung'ani hoo obo ololoito aashu olemeserem Enkai anaa Esau, otimira enjung'ore e ikinet enye neinosie endaa e nabo kata." 
Hebrews12:17 Amu iyiololo aajo ore te siadi, pee eitoki aayieu nejung ina mayianata, netanyaki ninye, amu eitu etum erishata pee eirridu, hoo neing'orua too lkiyio." 
Hebrews12:18 Amu mme doi entoki naiseyieki ietuo enetii, enkima nayupuyup o enaimin o entoki naitureisho o lkutati," 
Hebrews12:19 o ltoilo le ntarumpeta o ltoilo laa ore nkirorot enyena netureita lelo apa ootoning'o metasaisho aajo pee meitokini aaigilie kulie kirorot. 
Hebrews12:20 Amu meitieu apa ninche aating'iria enkitoria naishooki, “Te neiseyie ninye eng'ues ele doinyio, neari too soito.”" 
Hebrews12:21 Eituria ina naitoduaaki o metejo Musa, “Kaikirikira nanu te nkuretisho.”" 
Hebrews12:22 Kake Oldoinyo le Sion ietuo intae o enkanasa e Nkai naishu, Yerusalem e keper, o enetii ilmalaika lemeikenayu ooiturrurro eikodoki," 
Hebrews12:23 nietuo eumata oo lkikaunot ooigero te keper, nietuo enetii olarishani laa ninye Enkai e pooki; o enetii inkiyang'eta oo ltung'ana sinyat ooitabayioki," 
Hebrews12:24 o enetii Yesu, ilo Aitutumoni lo sotua ng'ejuk, o enetii ilo sarge oisuaayioki neiro te mpiris nalang eno sarge le Abel." 
Hebrews12:25 Entodol ake emiaany ele olimu kuna. Amu amaa te neitu eilanyisho lelo ootanyaita ninye te nkop, mikiaata sii iyiook enikilanyie ilo oirorie iyiook etii keper." 
Hebrews12:26 Eikirikirie oltoilo lenye enkop ina kata apa; kake eitayio taata enkisiligata ajo, “Eton aigil ena nabo neme enkop ake aikirikirie kake o shumata sii.”" 
Hebrews12:27 Ore ena bae najo “Kaigil ena nabo,” neitodolu inchere keiwuang'ieki ina apa naikirikirieki, neitodolu ena entoki naitobiraki, pee eing'uari ina nemeikirikirieki." 
Hebrews12:28 Ore te nkaraki ina emanoto iyiook enashe kitang'amutua enkitoria nemeidimi aaigusugusie, naa emaishoo Enkai eseremata nang'amaroyu, natii enkanyit o lturiaki;" 
Hebrews12:29 amu ore Enkai ang naa enkima namutisho. 
Hebrews13:1 Entonyorrata anaa lalashera o nkanashera tiatua Kristo. 
Hebrews13:2 Emintololoiki enkitoomono oo lomon amu teina eitoomono apa kulikae ilmalaika meyiolo. 
Hebrews13:3 Entadamu lelo ootii jila, anaa itii jila te nebo ninche, o lelo ooinyali, amu itii sii intae atua ilo sesen." 
Hebrews13:4 Enchoo eyanyiti enkiyama tiatua iltung'ana pooki naa emincho ina rruat e nkiyama eisarkionieki; amu Enkai naiguanare lelo ooibor onyek o loo lololoito. 
Hebrews13:5 Entorrip enkishui inyi tialo enyorrata oo mpisai ninchosho ebaiki intae entoki niaatata; amu etejo Enkai, “Maapal maadamu nemaaing'uaa.”" 
Hebrews13:6 Neaku eikintieu aatejo, “Olaitoriani olaretoni lai, nemaureishoyu. Kaa aaidim oltung'ani aitaasa?”" 
Hebrews13:7 Entadamu ilarikok linyi, lelo ooinosakita apa intae ele rorei le Nkai, entoduaai inkiasin enye, naa enturubare enkirukoto enye." 
Hebrews13:8 Ore Yesu Kristo ninye ake olang'ole taata o ntarasi. 
Hebrews13:9 Emincho eitapong'ori intae too nkiteng'enat naapaashaa; amu keishiaakino naa empiris naitagol oltau, neme indaiki, neitu eret lelo ooitudupita." 
Hebrews13:10 Eikiaata iyiook olperere lo lasar lemeng'arie iyiook lelo ooisiaaisho teilo ng'obor. 
Hebrews13:11 Amu ore nkiri e nena kishu naayau olapolosani ine wueji sinyati aitaa olasar loo ng'ok naa ti auluo enkang oo lng'oborri epejori. 
Hebrews13:12 Neaku ore sii ninye Yesu naa ti auluo kishomi einosieki osina pee etum aitisinya iltung'ana lenyena to sarge lenye makewan. 
Hebrews13:13 Ore te nkaraki ina emainyoito aapuo auluo enkang oo lng'oborri, nikinapaki nena morot." 
Hebrews13:14 Amu mikiaata iyiook enkanasa nikibikie tene, kake ae anasa king'oru nalotu." 
Hebrews13:15 Tiatua ninye naa maitaiki Enkai anaa ake olasar le nkisisa, aa inchere, ilng'anayio loo nkutukie naalimu enkarna enye." 
Hebrews13:16 Emintololoiki easata oo supati, o eng'arata oo ntokitin niaatata, amu ore ilasarri laaijo lelo naa keitiship Enkai." 
Hebrews13:17 Entoning ilarikok linyi niyanyititi, amu iltauja linyi eirrita, anaa iltung'ana ooyookini aikilikuan, enchoo naa eiko ninche neijia te ng'ida, neme to sina, amu meeta ina dupoto te intae." 
Hebrews13:18 Entoomonoki iyiook, amu king'idare ena nchere mikiaata nkibirribirrat torrok tiatua iltauja lang, eikiyieu nikiaasisho to rrekie sidai too mbaa pooki." 
Hebrews13:19 Atukunyaki intae naleng enkuna neijia pee aasiokini aarrinyoki intae. 
Hebrews13:20 Ore naa taata Enkai e seriani nanyaaka ashuku Olaitoriani Yesu aitung'uaa ilootuata, ilo shekut kitok loo nkerra, te ilo sarge lo sotua loo ntarasi," 
Hebrews13:21 meishopoki intae pooki toki sidai pee itumutumu aataas ina nayieu ninye, neas ina naitiship ninye tiatua intae; tiatua Yesu Kristo, olaa enenye enkitoo ntarasi o ntarasi. Eesai." 
Hebrews13:22 Asai intae ilalashera o nkanashera, emisi tele rorei lai le nkikoo, amu too ndorropu atisiraka intae." 
Hebrews13:23 Entayiolo inchere etalakuaki olalashe lang Timoteo, naa kayooki adol intae te nebo ninye te netasiekuo." 
Hebrews13:24 Eroroki ilarikok linyi pooki o lelo sinyat pooki. Eiroroki intae ilooing'uaa Italia. 
Hebrews13:25 Metaa empiris e Nkai te nebo intae pooki. Eesai. 
James1:1 Yakobo, osinka le Nkai o lo Laitoriani Yesu Kristo, Enkirorokino, too loshon tomon o aare ooidapashakino inkuapi pooki." 
James1:2 Ilalashera laainei, enkenai inchere eng'ida te nitumutumu intemat oo mpukunot kumok," 
James1:3 amu iyiololo nchere ore entemata natemi enkirukoto inyi neyau eng'iriata. 
James1:4 Ning'iriri ometabaiki enkiting'oto pee iakuku ilooiputakinote nelulung'a neitu eng'oriki toki. 
James1:5 Naa te netii olinyi otong'orikia eng'eno, enchoo ninye metoomonu te Enkai naisho iltung'ana pooki te leng'on o te mpiris naa keishori sii ninye." 
James1:6 Kake enchoo ninye eikilikuanu te nkirukoto meeta olng'ash katukul; amu ore oltung'ani oing'ash netiu anaa ilopir le naiposha ooreu osiwuo nekutaa. 
James1:7 Mincho oltung'ani laaijo ilo edamu ajo ketum toki to Laitoriani," 
James1:8 oltung'ani oata mbaa are to ltau lemeuno too rrekiei lenyena pooki. 
James1:9 Inchoo olalashe aisinani metishipayu te nkaraki nailepieki ninye," 
James1:10 ore olalashe karsis enchoo sii ninye metishipayu te nkaraki neitadowuoki, amu etiu anaa intapuka e ntim kelusoo." 
James1:11 Amu keilepu enkolong eirowua, nepej intapuka nemugut, nedoiyio, nerruoyo empukunoto e sidano enye. Neijia ake etiu oltung'ani karsis, kerruoyo eitoritote mbaa enyena pooki." 
James1:12 Emayiana oltung'ani ong'iri too ntemat, amu ore pee eidip ating'iria entemata neng'amu ninye enkopiyia e nkitoo e nkishui naisiligie Enkai, lelo oonyor Ninye." 
James1:13 Emincho ake oltung'ani te netemi, ejo, “Enkai naatetema;” amu metemisho Enkai too ntorrok, nemetem sii ninye Enkai oltung'ani." 
James1:14 Kake ketemi pooki tung'ani, te nkaraki eng'uarrata enye torrono; nayietaa aitalamaa neitasur." 
James1:15 Ore pee eidip ina ng'uarrata anoto intona neiu ing'ok. Ore pee ebaya ng'ok, neiu keeya." 
James1:16 Ilalashera laainei lanyor, eminchosho eleji intae." 
James1:17 Ore entoki pooki sidai o enkishooroto pooki nemeeta entiyoto nedou eing'uaa keper enetii Papa loo wang'aritin, nemeibelekenya Ninye, aashu etii enetii Ninye oloip le nkibelekenyata." 
James1:18 Te nkaraki eyieunoto enye, etoiwuo Ninye iyiook to rorei loo sipat, pee eaku iyiook ilng'anayio le dukuya loo nkitobirat enyena." 
James1:19 Entayiolo ena ilalashera laainei lanyor. Inchoo pooki tung'ani metaa olosioki aning, nemesioki airo, nemesioki sii agoro." 
James1:20 Amu ore engoro o ltung'ani nemeas isipat e Nkai. 
James1:21 Entalama ate olduruk pooki o enkumoi oo ntorrok, ning'amaa te mborron Ororei otuunokoki atua intae oidim aitajeu iltauja linyi." 
James1:22 Emilejileje ate kake entaa laasak lo rorei mme lainining'ok ake. 
James1:23 Amu te neaku ake oltung'ani olaning'oni lo rorei, neme olaasani, netiu ninye anaa oltung'ani oing'or enkomom enye te nking'uret." 
James1:24 Amu keing'or ninye enkomom enye, ore pee elo, nerikino nabo kata enaikununo." 
James1:25 Kake ore olojur asipu inkitanapat bayarot, inkitanapat e lakunoto, nesheikino, nemetiu anaa elde ake oning nerikino, kake olaasani ooata nkiaasin, ore ilo nemaiyiani ti atua iyiasat enyena." 
James1:26 Te nedamu oltung'ani ajo olaseremani le Nkai, nemeitore olng'ejep lenye, kewan elej, ore eseremare enye naa pesho." 
James1:27 Ore eseremare sidai nemeeta entiyoto te nkomom e Nkai, Papa, naa ena: embaikinoto oo ltung'ana okishin o nkolia, tiatua isinaitin lenye o erripoto e kewan pee mitum entibili te nkop." 
James2:1 Ilalashera o nkanashera aainei, emiaaku ilooata olkep imbung'itata enkirukoto o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo, Olaitoriani le nkisisa." 
James2:2 Amu te nelotu naaji oltung'ani oata ilgiso le saabu, neishopito inkilani sidain atua enkaji inyi e ntumo, nelotu sii ninye ine oltung'ani aisinani oishopito isiapird." 
James2:3 Ning'oring'oro intae elde oishopito inkilani sidain, nishilaa aajoki, “Totona te ne,” nijokiki elde aisinani, “Intasho te nde,” aashu, “Isukudoyu te mbata oo nkejek aainei.”" 
James2:4 Aimidol ajo iatata olkep maate, niaakuku ilooiguanare too ndamunot torrok?" 
James2:5 Entoning, ilalashera laainei o nkanashera aainei. Keitu egelu Enkai laisinak te nkop metaa karsisi te nkirukoto o lajung'ok le nkitoria naisiligieki lelo oonyor ninye?" 
James2:6 Kake eitu iyanyititi intae ilo tung'ani aisinani. Aime ilkarsisi doi ooibooki intae enkop? 
James2:7 Aime ninche doi ooyiataki ntae inkajijik e nkiguana? Aime ninche doi oomor ina arna sidai nayanyiti? 
James2:8 Te nintabayaya inkitanapat o Laitoriani anaa enajo isirat, “Tonyorra olelatia ino anaa eninyor kewan,” itaasa esupat." 
James2:9 Kake te nintodolulu olkep, nitaasa eng'oki, neiguanare intae inkitanapat inchere irara ilagilak loo nkitanapat." 
James2:10 Amu ore pooki ng'ae oibung inkitanapat pooki neitapong te nabo, netaa eitarruoyie te pooki." 
James2:11 Amu ore olotejo, “Miloloito,” netejo sii, “Miaar metua.” Metaa te neitu iloloito, kake itaara metua, itaa naa olagilani loo nkitanapat." 
James2:12 Eroro, niaasishosho, anaa iloopuoi aaiguanare too nkitanapat e lakunoto." 
James2:13 Amu meeta enkiguana olng'ur, te ilo leitu eitodolu olng'ur, kake kemir olng'ur enkiguana." 
James2:14 Kaa dupoto, ilalashera o nkanashera aainei, eeta, te nejo oltung'ani keeta enkirukoto nemeeta nkiasin? Keidim enkirukoto enye aitajeu?" 
James2:15 Amaa te nemeishopo anaa te nemeeta endaa olalashe anaa enkanashe," 
James2:16 nejoki obo linyi ninche. “Enchom te seriani, erowuaja, niraposhosho,” neitu eisho ninche nkolati o sesen, kaa dupoto eeta?" 
James2:17 Neijia etiu enkirukoto openy, te nemeeta nkiasin, netua naa pesho." 
James2:18 Kake eidim oltung'ani oje atejo, “Iata iyie enkirukoto naata nanu nkiasin.” Intoduaaki naa enkirukoto ino aa ninye ake, metii nkiasin inono ore naa too nkiasin aainei naaitodol enkirukoto ai." 
James2:19 Iruk iyie ajo nabo Enkai? Itaasa esidai. Eiruk sii ninche iloirriruani neikirikira. 
James2:20 Iyieu iyie nikintodoli lo tung'ani omoda inchere ore enkirukoto nemeeta nkiasin naa koolupi? 
James2:21 Amaa papa lang Abraham keitu eikenakini sipat te nkaraki nkiasin, pee eishoyo oinoti lenye Isaak to olperere lo lasar?" 
James2:22 Aimidol ajo ore enkirukoto o nkiasin enyena neasisho te nebo? Neitabayioki enkirukoto enye too nkiasin. 
James2:23 Pee ebaya osirata ojo, “Eiruko Abraham Enkai, ore te nkaraki enkirukoto neikenaki Enkai ninye esupatisho,” Neipoti aajo olchore le Nkai." 
James2:24 Idol taa ajo eikenakini oltung'ani isipat too nkiasin mme to lbae le nkirukoto ake. 
James2:25 Aime teina oitoi ake sii oo nkiasin eikenakaki Rahab ina mulayoi isipat pee eng'amu lelo aikitalak, neipang'ie ninche ti ae oitoi?" 
James2:26 Ore anaa enatua osesen te nemetii enkiyang'et neijia etiu enkirukoto nemetii nkiasin ketua. 
James3:1 Emincho ilkumok te intae ilalashera o nkanashera aainei eaku ilaiteng'enak, amu iyiololo aajo ore iyiook pooki ooiteng'enisho naa keiguanareki oleng iyiook te nikintadiak." 
James3:2 Amu ore iyiook pooki naa eikintadiak too nkumok naa te netii obo lemeitadiak too naajo, oltung'ani lemeeta entiyoto ilo, oidim sii aitoria osesen lenye pooki." 
James3:3 Ing'ura ti nikipik mbartan isenkenke inkutukie naarewueki, nening iyiook, nikindim aatoboin iseseni lenye pooki anaa enikiyieu." 
James3:4 Eng'ura sii imelin, hoo naa sapuki oleng, nerrumoo olkutati ogol oleng, neutaa ninche enkiti toki aipirie enkalo ake ninye naba anaa enayieu olarewani." 
James3:5 Neijia etiu olng'ejep enkiti rubata to sesen, kake ejo isapuki oleng. Tadamu eneba esapuko e ntim, naidim oloti tiili atapejo?" 
James3:6 Ore olng'ejep naa enkima, enkop nebore intorrok ti atua irubat ang, nepik osesen pooki intibil, neinuaaki enkima enkishui o sesen olulung'a te nkima naing'uaa Yehanum." 
James3:7 Amu keidim iltung'ana aaitamo neidipa aaitamo pooki pukunoto oo ng'uesi o motonyi o noo ng'uesi naaiserpepiari te nkop oo noo ng'uesi e naiposha," 
James3:8 kake metii oltung'ani oidim aaitamo olng'ejep, eeta entorroni nemeitirring'a, nebore esayiet nayaisho." 
James3:9 Te ilo ng'ejep kimayian Olaitoriani o Papa, naa ninye kidekie iltung'ana, lelo ooitobiraki te nkitanyaanyukoto e Nkai." 
James3:10 Ina kutuk ake eimu emayian o ldeket. Ilalashera o nkanashera aainei mme neijia duoo eishiaakino netiu. 
James3:11 Keimu enkong'u nabo e nchorro enkare namelok o e naisukut? 
James3:12 Amaa ilalashera laainei, keidim olng'aboli atoiu ilosiyio anaa osabibu ilng'abolo? Meidim sii ninye enchorro naisukut aishoru enkare namelok." 
James3:13 Kaing'ae te intae olng'en neeta endamunoto? Nchoo eitoduaaya te nkishon enye sidai o to lkuaak lenye inkiaasin enyena te mborron e ng'eno. 
James3:14 Kake ti niatata olom odua o enyorrata e ate ti atua iltauja linyi, eminya kutukie nimilejishosho aaibooyo esipata." 
James3:15 Ore ena ng'eno eitu edou eing'uaa shumata, kake ene nkop, o enoo ltung'ana, o enoo loiriruani." 
James3:16 Amu ore enetii olom o enyorrata e kewan, netii olong'oling'oli o empukunoto pooki suuji." 
James3:17 Kake ore eng'eno nagut naing'uaa shumata nesila neeta eseriani, nebor, netemaa mbaa, nebore olng'ur, neiu ilng'anayio sidain, nemeeta olng'ash anaa esunkuroisho." 
James3:18 Ore enkikesare e supatisho neun ti atua osotua lelo ooitayu osotua. 
James4:1 Kainyoo nayau ilarrabali o nchankari ti atua intae? Aime ing'uarrat inyi naara ti atua intae? 
James4:2 Iyieuwu nimitumutumu; ina pee, iariara metuata, ning'uarring'uarra, nimindimidimi aanoto, naa ina pee iarara nidumumu olarrabal. Miaatata toki amu miomonunu te Nkai." 
James4:3 Iomonunu intae nimitumutumu, amu iomonunu te nkoitoi torrono, pee itumokiki aaishang'itie too ng'uarrat oo seseni linyi." 
James4:4 Intae iloololoito, aimiyiololo aajo ore olchore le nkop naa olmang'atinta te Enkai? Ore pooki oyieu neaku olchore le nkop, neitaa kewan olmang'atinta le Nkai." 
James4:5 Anaa aijojo eimesipa isirat oojo, “Ore ina kiyang'et natipika Enkai atua iyiook keeta olom too nguarrat o sesen?”" 
James4:6 Kake keisho iyiook empiris nalus, amu ejo isirat, “Keany Enkai iloowuasa neisho empiris ilo obor.”" 
James4:7 Entoning naa Enkai, erisha Sheitani, naa keipirri ninye ailany intae." 
James4:8 Entinyikaki Enkai, pee enyikaki sii ninye intae. Entukuo inkaik inyi, intae ilaing'okok, nintukuku iltauja linyi, intae iloo ndamunot maare." 
James4:9 Esinanuoto, ninchirishiri, niyietutu aaishir. Enchoo enkuenia inyi meta enkishirata neaku eng'ida inyi enkimuntut." 
James4:10 Entadou ate te dukuya Olaitoriani, pee eilepie ninye intae." 
James4:11 Emisukenya maate ilalashera laainei, amu ore ilo osukeny olalashe lenye anaa eiguanare olalashe lenye, inkitanapat esukeny, aa ninche eiguanare. Amu te ninguanare inkitanapat, nimira naa olaibung'ani loo nkitanapat, kake itaa oloiguanare." 
James4:12 Obo ake olaishooroni loo nkitanapat o ladung'oni le nkiguana naa ninye oidim aitajeu anaa aitarruoi. Aira iyie ng'ae oiguanare olelatia ino? 
James4:13 Entoning naa lelo oojo, “Kipuo taata anaa taaisere atua enkanasa naje o enaje nikibik teine olari obo nikimirisho, nikitum dupoto.”" 
James4:14 Nimiyiololo enayooki atiu taaisere; anaa ainyioo enkishon inyi? Itiuwu ake anaa enkinuku naliooyu enkiti kata, kiti neishunye." 
James4:15 Ore enaishiaakino te nijojo. “Naa inchere te naa eyieunoto Olaitoriani, nikinchu nikiaas ena anaa enda.”" 
James4:16 Kake ore eyia, isisisisi ate to lwuasa. Ore ina kinosata e kutuk pooki naa entorroni." 
James4:17 Ore pooki ng'ae oiyiolo ataasa esidai, nemeas, naa eng'oki te ninye." 
James5:1 Entoning taa lo karsisi, enchira nibuakibuaka amu kelotu shumata intae osina." 
James5:2 Netupurdate imasaa inyi, neinosa oriri inkilani inyi." 
James5:3 Ore saabu inyi o nkoshola inyi etodoro einosa enkop, ore ina doron e nkinosata e nkop neaku olmonekie te intae naa kenya inkiri oo seseni linyi anaa enkima. Irragie olchumati loo masaa too nkolong'i e nkiting'oto." 
James5:4 Eng'ura ajo ore olekoisiaayio loo laisiaayiak ootudung'o inkurman, litomito too losekin, etabuaa aishir, netabaikia olkiyioi loo laisiaayiak inkiyiaa o Laitoriani loo lororani." 
James5:5 Inosa intae olkar te nkop, nitonini ti atua inaaitiship osesen, nintotiti iltauja linyi te nkolong e yiang'are." 
James5:6 Itudung'okito enkiguana niaariara metua oltung'ani supat lemeirish ninye intae. 
James5:7 Enting'iria, intae ilalashera o nkanashera; o metabau elotunoto o Laitoriani. Eng'ura aajo keanyu olaturoni le nkurma ilng'anayio sidain le nkop. Neng'iri o metaba anaa netum enchan e dukuya o ene siadi." 
James5:8 Enting'iria sii intae. Entagolo ltauja linyi, amu etinyikua elotunoto o Laitoriani." 
James5:9 Eming'unyung'unyakino, ilalashera o nkanashera aainei pee meiguanareki ake intae, eng'ura eitashe Oladung'oni le nkiguana too nkutukie oo nkajijik." 
James5:10 Entusuj, ilalashera o nkanashera aainei enkitanyaanyukoto o sina o eng'iriata oo loibonok le Nkai ooiroro te nkarna o Laitoriani." 
James5:11 Eng'ura, kijo emayiana lelo oongiri. Itoning'o eng'iriata e Yoab, nitoduaa enaitaasa Olaitoriani ninye te nkiting'oto, amu kenana Olaitoriani oshoke neeta olng'ur." 
James5:12 Kake ore enalang pooki, ilalashera o nkanashera aainei eminya olmumai te shumata anaa te nkop, anaa ti ae ake ninye toki, enchoo “ee” inyi metaa “ee” ake, ore “A'a” neaku “A'a” ake, pee mijing'ijing'i ake abori enkiguana." 
James5:13 Ketii obo ti atua intae oata enyamali? Inchoo eomon. Ketii oloshipa? Inchoo erany isinkolioitin le nkisisa. 
James5:14 Ketii obo ti atua intae omuoi Inchoo eipot ninye ilpayiani le sirit pee eomonoki, neelie ninye eilata te nkarna o Laitoriani;" 
James5:15 naa keitajeu enkomono e nkirukoto ilo tung'ani omuoi, neinyeyie Olaitoriani ninye, naa te netaasa ng'ok, nepalakini." 
James5:16 Neeku, embalakinoto ng'ok inyi maate, niomonokinono, pee eishiunyieki intae. Amu eeta enkomono o ltung'ani supat enkidimata sapuk." 
James5:17 Ore Eliya, oltung'ani apake le mpukunoto ang. Netoomono akurraki pee mesha; neitu eshaiki enchan enkop too larin okuni o lapaitin ile." 
James5:18 Neitoki ake aomon, neishoru shumata enchan, neiu enkop ilng'anayio lenyena." 
James5:19 Ilalashera o nkanashera aainei te neibakibak obo linyi aing'uaa esipata, neshuku likae ninye," 
James5:20 nincho ninye metaiyiolo inchere ore pooki oshuku olaasani loo ng'ok aitung'uaa enkoitoi enye e marmalisho, eitajewuo oltau lenye te keeya neitoipoo olorora loo ng'ok." 
1Peter1:1 Petero, olkipaaret le Yesu Kristo - enetii ilgelunot ooidapashakinote Ponto o Galatia o Kapodokia o Asia o Bitinia" 
1Peter1:2 ootegeluaki apa neitaanya Enkai Papa te Nkiyang'et metoning'o Yesu Kristo te nkisuaakinoto o sarge lenye. Metoponari tiatua intae empiris o eseriani. 
1Peter1:3 Meisisi Enkai naa Papa lo Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo! Ore te nkaraki olng'ur lenye sapuk eishoo iyiook metoini aaigil tiatua osiligi oishu te mpiunoto e Yesu Kristo aing'uaa lootuata," 
1Peter1:4 pee kitum enjung'ore nemerruoyo, nemeiduruk, nememusanu naiteng'elaki te keper te nkaraki intae." 
1Peter1:5 Kerripi ntae te ngolon e Nkai te nkaraki enkirukoto inyi, pee itumutumu enjeunoto nairragita ake pee eibalunyieki te nkolong e nkiting'oto." 
1Peter1:6 Entishipata te nkaraki ina, hoo ninye te naa aimeeta inchere pee mitumutumu intemat oo mpukunot kumok te nkiti kata," 
1Peter1:7 ore pee etiu inji, enkirukoto inyi eji pee etemi nenyorrarri aajo keeta tipat alang saabu narruoyo netetemaki te nkima nitumutumu enkisisa, o enkitoo o enkanyit te mbolunoto e Yesu Kristo." 
1Peter1:8 Oleitu idolidolo, ninyorrinyorro ninye, nirukuruku hoo nimidolitata ninye taata, nishipapa, enchipai nemeimakinoyu ebore enkisisa." 
1Peter1:9 Ning'amumu te nkiting'oto e nkirukoto inyi, enjeunoto oo ltauja linyi." 
1Peter1:10 Ena jeunoto apa eing'orutua, neikeni iloibonok le Nkai ooibonutuo empiris nalotu aaku eninyi." 
1Peter1:11 Eikilikuanutua aajo kalo tung'ani naa kaa kata etuutua Enkiyang'et e Kristo natii atua ninche, ina kata apa namurutoo aalimu inkisilisilot e Kristo o enkitoo nasuju." 
1Peter1:12 Etabolokoki ninche metayiolo, inchere imme ate eisiaayiaki te nena kake intae, nena baa naainosakaki intae taata lelo oolikioo ilomon supati te ngolon e Nkiyang'et Sinyati nairriwuaki eing'uaa keper naa imbaa naang'uar apa ilmalaika pee edol." 
1Peter1:13 Ore naa entorrip indamunot inyi, eririki mbaa nipikipiki osiligi linyi pooki shumata empiris nayakini intae te mbolunoto e Yesu Kristo." 
1Peter1:14 Anaa inkera naaning'isho, eminturubare ate inapa ng'uarrat niaatata enapa kata imodada." 
1Peter1:15 Kake ore anaa sinyati ilo oipoto intae, entaa sii intae sinyat to lkuaak linyi pooki." 
1Peter1:16 Amu etisiraki aajo, “Entaa intae sinyat, amu kara Nanu Sinyati.”" 
1Peter1:17 Naa te naa aimpotipoto ninye aajo Papa, ilo oiguanare pooki tung'ani metii enyorrakinoto eng'ura ate entotoni te nkuretisho tena rishata nitii ene anaa nkisikat." 
1Peter1:18 Iyiololo aajo, etalakuaki intae too rrekiei linyi lemeeta tipat litujung'utuo too loo papaai linyi, mme too ntokitin naaruoyo anaa enkosholai o saabu" 
1Peter1:19 kake to sarge ogol enkinyiang'a le Kristo, otiu anaa olkuoo lemeeta entiyoto anaa entibili." 
1Peter1:20 Oloitaanyitai apa eton eitu eitamanyuni enkop, kake keibalunyieki te nkiting'oto oo nkatitin te nkaraki intae," 
1Peter1:21 naa te ninye ing'idarere intae Enkai, ilo oitopiwuo Yesu aitung'uaa ilootuata, neisho ninye enkitoo paa ore enkirukoto o siligi linyi naa atua Enkai etii." 
1Peter1:22 Ore te nkaraki nindipa aaitukuo iltauja linyi te nkibung'ata oo sipat, niaatata enyorrata nemetii esunkuroisho too lalashera linyi o nkanashera inyi, entonyorrata intae maate aakurraki too ltauja." 
1Peter1:23 Etoiwuoki intae aaigil neme te mpeu narruoyo kake te nemerruoyo, eimu ororei le Nkai oishu nebik intarasi." 
1Peter1:24 Amu “Etiu iseseni anaa nkujit, netiu enkitoo enye pooki anaa ene ntapukai oo nkujit. Ketoyu inkujit, nedoiyio entapukai;" 
1Peter1:25 kake kebik ororei lo Laitoriani intarasi.” Ore ilo rorei naa lelo omon supati ooinosakaki intae. 
1Peter2:1 Enturrai elap pooki o losek o esunkuroisho o esukeny pooki, nitiuwu anaa inkera naanana," 
1Peter2:2 entang'uar ororei le Nkiyang'et lemeeta olosek, paa te ninye ibululu aabaiki enjeunoto." 
1Peter2:3 Amu inchiamishama enanai e oshoke o Laitoriani. 
1Peter2:4 Wootu enetii ninye, osoit otanyaita iltung'ana, kake etegeluaki, neeta tipat too nkonyek e Nkai." 
1Peter2:5 Anaa isoito ooishu, pee iakuku inkasisin e mumuaisho sinyati ooitayu ilasarri sinyat le Nkiyang'et oong'uarrayu te Nkai te Yesu Kristo." 
1Peter2:6 Amu etisiraki tiatua Ilkigerot aajo, “Ng'ura airragie te Sion Osoit kitok lo lmairroto, ogeluno negol enkinyiang'a, ore pooki oiruk nemeitukurruni.”" 
1Peter2:7 Ore te intae ilo oiruk keeta tipat oleng, kake ore te lelo lemeiruk, etaa “Ilo soit otanyaita ilashetak otaa kitok to lmairroto”" 
1Peter2:8 naa “Osoit orror iltung'ana, osoit sapuk obatat iltung'ana,” kerrorro ninche amu etanyaita ening ororei, naa ina apake eji pee eitaaie ninche." 
1Peter2:9 Irara intae olorere ogeluno, inkasisin e nkaji e nkitoo, olorere sinyati, iltung'ana le Nkai makewan, pee itumutumu aainosai inkiaasin enyena e nking'asia, o loipotuo intae entung'uai enaimin aitijing atua ewang'an enye naing'asiasho." 
1Peter2:10 Intae ilemera olorere apa; kake irara taata olorere le Nkai Ileitu apa etum olng'ur kake itang'amutua olng'ur. 
1Peter2:11 Ilanyor laainei asai intae, anaa ilomon o laisikak pee ipaasharere ing'uarrat o sesen naashet enjore naarare iltauja linyi." 
1Peter2:12 Niaakuku ilooata orrekie sidai tiatua Loreren lemeiruk, pee te neiro neiteleiki intae mbaa anaa laasak loo ntorrok, neidim te nedol too nkiasin inyi sidain, aaisisa Enkai te nkolong e mbaikino." 
1Peter2:13 Eyanyita pooki kitoria oo ltung'ana to lbae lo Laitoriani, te naa ko laiguanani kitok," 
1Peter2:14 anaa ilooti te ninye ooirriwuaki meitamio lelo ooas intorrok neisis lelo ooas isidain. 
1Peter2:15 Amu eyieunoto e Nkai inchere ore te yasata oo sidain nintigiriri emodai oo ltung'ana oomoda. 
1Peter2:16 Entotoni anaa iltung'ana oolakuno, nimintaa elakunoto inyi entoki nintiemorierie entorroni, kake entobik anaa ilaisiaayiak le Nkai." 
1Peter2:17 Eyanyita iltung'ana pooki, entonyor ilalashera, o nkanashera eyanyita Enkai niureyuyu olaiguanani kitok." 
1Peter2:18 Lo aisiaayiak entadou ate, niyanyititi oleng ilaitoriak linyi, neme ake isupati nebor, kake o metabaiki lelo ooisomit intae." 
1Peter2:19 Amu ketum oltung'ani enchunet te naa, ore te nkaraki nadamu Enkai neng'iri te neidong'i metii esipata." 
1Peter2:20 Amu kaa dupoto ina, te neitamei intae enkata niaasiasa intorrok? Kake te niaasiasa isupati, ning'iriri te neisilisili intae niaatata enchunet te Nkai." 
1Peter2:21 Amu teina eipotoki intae, amu eisilisiloki sii ninye Kristo te nkaraki intae, neing'ueki intae enkitanyaanyukoto, pee isujusuju iroruat enyena." 
1Peter2:22 Eitu eas ninye eng'oki, neitu etumieki te nkutuk enye ororei lo losek laa ore pee emori," 
1Peter2:23 neitu eshukoki emorisho, ore pee eisilisili neitu ejo aarisho, kake eitarasaka imbaa enyena pooki ilo oiguanare te sipata." 
1Peter2:24 Ninye makewan otanapa ing'ok ang to sesen lenye te nchumata olchani, pee kitum aatuata too ng'ok, nikinchu too supati, too lbaa lenyena eishiunyieki intae." 
1Peter2:25 Amu itapong'ori apa anaa intare naaimina, kake itorrinyokinote taata Olchekut naa Olarriponi loo ltauja linyi." 
1Peter3:1 Neijia entotiu sii intae, na kituaak entadou ate too lpayiani paa te netii te ninche oleitueiruk Ororei, netum aairuko metii ororei te nkaraki olkuaak loo nkituaak enye," 
1Peter3:2 te nkaraki nadol ninche olkuaak linyi sidai, le nkuretisho." 
1Peter3:3 Eminchosho eaku enkuso inyi enioriong osesen, o enchetata oo lpapit, o enkikodo oo ntokitin e saabu anaa ene nkishopoto o nkilani," 
1Peter3:4 kake enaisudoro tiatua oltau, nememuta o emborron o engira, neeta tipat oleng too nkonyek e Nkai." 
1Peter3:5 Amu neijia apa eikuna inkituaak sinyat, naaisilig Enkai te nekus ate, aaning ilpayiani lenye," 
1Peter3:6 anaa enatoning'o Sara Abraham pee eipot ninye ajo olaaitore lai. Nitaa intae inkera enyena, ti niaasiasa sidan, niminchosho toki meituria intae." 
1Peter3:7 Entotiu sii intae neijia lo payiani, entotoni aitobiraki o nkituaak inyi te ng'eno, nincho enkitok inaairirikino anaa entoki nashal, amu irara ilajung'ok te nebo le mpiris e mpuaan pee meiboori enkomono inyi." 
1Peter3:8 Ore enabayie entaa pooki ilooata endamunoto nabo, loobore olng'ur o enyorrata oo lalashera, o nkanashera iloonana oishuaa, ilo obor indamunot." 
1Peter3:9 Neme iloolaakino entorroni te ntorroni, anaa oldeket to ldeket, kake entapaashare intae entamayianisho, amu teina doi eipotoki intae pee itumutumu aatujung emayianata." 
1Peter3:10 Amu ejo ilkigerot “Ore ilo onyor enkishui neyieu nedol inkolong'i sidain, inchoo erishie olng'ejep lenye entorroni nerishie enkutuk enye pee mejo emonkoi." 
1Peter3:11 Inchoo eibelekenya apaashare entorroni neas esidai; inchoo eing'oru eseriani nesuj oleng. 
1Peter3:12 Amu etii inkonyek o Laitoriani shumata oo lelo supati, nebolo inkiyiaa enyena te enkomono enye; kake kegilunore enkomom o Laitoriani lelo ooas intorrok.”" 
1Peter3:13 Kaing'ae oidim aitaasa intae entorrono, te naa airara intae ilanyuaak le nena sidain?" 
1Peter3:14 Kake te naa keisilisili hoo ninye intae te nkaraki oo supati, imayianana. Emiureyu ninche, nimiruturutu." 
1Peter3:15 Kake ore too ltauja linyi eyanyita Kristo anaa Olaitoriani, enterretenata anaake pee iwalikiki oltung'ani pooki oikilikuan intae embae o siligi otii atua intae. Kake te mborron o te nkanyit." 
1Peter3:16 Entisidana iltauja linyi, paa ore enkata nasukenyi olkuaak linyi sidai tiatua Kristo, netumi aaitukurru." 
1Peter3:17 Amu enaikash te neitamei oltung'ani easita isupati te naa eyieunoto e Nkai, alang te naa intorrok." 
1Peter3:18 Amu etua sii Kristo nabo kata ake too ng'ok nemeigil, osupat too leme supati, pee etum atoriku iyiook enetii Enkai. Amu etaraki metua to sesen neitopiwuoki te Nkiyang'et" 
1Peter3:19 te ninye sii eshomo ainosaki ilomon le Nkai nkiyang'eta naa ena. 
1Peter3:20 Lelo apa ootanyaita ening, eton eanyisho eng'iriata e Nkai too nkolong'i e Noa eshetita emeli, ina naa ilkuti tung'ana isiet ake eitajewuoki te nkare." 
1Peter3:21 Naa keitanyaanyukieki ena are enkare e nkibatisa naitajeu neme te nkisujata o loirerio lo sesen, kake eomonoto e Nkai to ltoilo oisiasha lo ltau te mpiunoto e Yesu Kristo," 
1Peter3:22 oilepa alo keper, neton te nkaina e tatene e Nkai, netipikaki te nebo ilmalaika, o enkitoria e ngolon meetu abori ninye." 
1Peter4:1 Ore naa te nkaraki naitamioki Kristo to sesen, enterreten sii intae ate teina damunoto, amu ore pooki onoto emion to sesen nemeitoki aas ing'ok," 
1Peter4:2 pee meitoki ninye arubare imbaa o sesen too nkolong'i enyena naatelekutua te nkop anaa enatiu ing'uarrat oo ltung'ana kake anaa eyieunoto e Nkai. 
1Peter4:3 Nchoo enkata natulusoiyie eidip nena naayieu neas iloreren oolamita Enkai oopuoyie enkiborra oo nkonyek, o ng'uarrat e merai, ooitalala indaat, incholieki e okore, agilak loo nkitanapat ooserem kulie aitin." 
1Peter4:4 Neing'asia te nedol intae mishularere ninche te nena baa e nkiminchalisho, nemor intae;" 
1Peter4:5 kake kepuo aaisho iwalat ilo oterretene pee eiguanare ilooishu o lootuata. 
1Peter4:6 Naa te nkaraki ena pee etolikioki sii ilootuata Ilomon Supati le Nkai pee eiguanareki to sesen anaa iltung'ana, nepok te nkiyang'et anaa Enkai." 
1Peter4:7 Etinyikua enkiting'oto oo ntokitin pooki, neaku enoto eng'eno o ndamunot naauno nebor pee itumokiki enkomono." 
1Peter4:8 Ore enalusoo te pooki, embung'a enyorrata nauno olikae o likae amu keitoip enyorrata olorora loo ng'ok." 
1Peter4:9 Intoomono olikae olikae metii enking'unyung'uny. 
1Peter4:10 Taasishore inkishoorot naaba anaa inikinchooki aisiaayie ilkulikae, anaa olaing'urani supat te mpiris e Nkai oo mpukunot kumok." 
1Peter4:11 Naa te neiro oltung'ani inchoo eiro anaa enatiu Ororei le Nkai; naa te neisiaaisho oltung'ani, inchoo eisiaaisho anaa enkidimata naishoo Enkai: pee eisiaai Enkai te pooki toki tiatua Yesu Kristo, laa enenye enkisisa, o enkitoria ntarasi o ntarasi. Eesai." 
1Peter4:12 Ilanyor laainei, eming'asia intae too ntemat naata emion e nkima naapuonu shumata intae, aatem intae anaa duoo kentoki omoni naipang'aka intae." 
1Peter4:13 Kake enting'idata te nkaraki ning'arierie Kristo isinaitin lenyena pee itumutumu sii intae aating'idata te ng'ida sapuk te nkata naibalieki enkisisa o enkitoo enye. 
1Peter4:14 Kake imayianana intae te nesukenyi intae te nkaraki enkarna e Kristo, imayianana amu eton te shumata intae oltau le nkisisa e nkitoo o le Nkai." 
1Peter4:15 Kake emincho obo te intae meitamei te nkaraki etara metua anaa olapurroni, anaa olarruoni, anaa olaisuroni." 
1Peter4:16 Kake te neitamei oltung'ani, eji amu olairukoni, mincho edol enkurruna, kake inchoo eisis Enkai teina arna." 
1Peter4:17 Amu etabawua enkata e nkiguana naa te nkaji e Nkai eng'asu. Amaa te naa iyiook eng'as, kaji pasa etiu enkiting'oto e lelo lemeiruk Ororei supat le Nkai?" 
1Peter4:18 Naa, “Amaa aa te pesho eitajeuni Oltung'ani supat, ai ti aaji eliooyu oltung'ani lemeiruk Enkai naa olaasani loo ng'ok?”" 
1Peter4:19 Te nkaraki ena enchoo lelo pooki oomeyu te risioroto o enyorrata e Nkai, eas isupati neitarasaki iltauja lenye ilo oitayio enkop oisiligayu." 
1Peter5:1 Neaku airorie ilpayiani ootii atua intae, ara sii nanu olpayian anaa ninche nara olchakeni loo nkisilisilot e Kristo nang'arie enkitoo napuoi aabolu." 
1Peter5:2 Taramata ntare e Nkai niking'orieki, neme te arakinoto kake te nyorrata ino, neme te dupoto e nkurruna kake te yieunoto" 
1Peter5:3 neme anaa ilaitoriak ooimagarraki lelo ooishooki intae entaramat, kake aaku enkitanyaanyukoto naduaaya intare." 
1Peter5:4 Pee te neboluni ilo Shekut kitok, neishori intae enkopiyia e nkitoo nemejuto emua." 
1Peter5:5 Neijia enkuna sii intae iltung'ana ooti entoning enkitoo inyi, Enchopoki ate intae pooki emborron anaa enkila, nintadouu ate pee isiaayiayia maate, amu keany Enkai iloowuasa, “Kake keisho empiris ilooitadou ate.”" 
1Peter5:6 Entadou naa ate ti abori enkaina nagol e Nkai, pee etum ninye ailepie intae te nkata nageluno." 
1Peter5:7 Enteleiki inkolati inyi shumata Ninye, amu kegolie Ninye intae." 
1Peter5:8 Entashololoto nirretenana amu kemanimanaa olmang'atinta linyi, Sheitani, anaa olng'atuny, oikurrukur eing'oru olonya." 
1Peter5:9 Erisha ninye te nkirukoto nauno iyiololo aajo osina laaijo ele eimatie ilalashera linyi te nkop pooki. 
1Peter5:10 Ore pee indipidipi aanoto osina le nkiti kata, ore Enkai e mpiris pooki naa ninye naipotoko intae atua enkisisa e nkitoo enye oo ntarasi tiatua Kristo, ninye makewan oramat intae, neitirring'ie miwuatiwuatata neitopok, neitasheyie neitagol intae." 
1Peter5:11 Metaa enenye enkitoo o enkitoria, intarasi o ntarasi. Eesai." 
1Peter5:12 Te Silvano, olalashe laaijo nanu oisiligayu, atisiraka intae ena kiti palai, pee aitukuj intae naishakenoki intae inchere empiris e Nkai ena nasipa. Entasho emiwuatiwuata tiatua Ninye." 
1Peter5:13 Eiroroki intae esirit natii atua Babilion nageluno sii ninye anaa intae, neijia etiu enkerai ai Marko." 
1Peter5:13 Eiroroki intae esirit natii atua Babilion nageluno sii ninye anaa intae, neijia etiu enkerai ai Marko." 
1Peter5:14 Erorokinoto intae maate te ng'ututata e nyorrata. Metijing'a osotua intae pooki ootii atua Kristo. 
2Peter1:1 Simon Petero osinka naa olkipaaret le Yesu Kristo oigeroki lelo oonoto enkirukoto naba anaa enaang, tiatua esupatisho e Nkai ang o eno Laitajeunoni lang Yesu Kristo." 
2Peter1:2 Metoponari empiris osotua te intae te yiolounoto e Nkai o Yesu Olaitoriani lang. 
2Peter1:3 Engolon kitok e Nkai naishoo iyiook intokitin pooki naaishiaakino te nkishon o te sinyatisho e Nkai, te yiolounoto enye ilo oipotoko iyiook enkitoo o enkishiaan enye." 
2Peter1:4 Naa te na oitoi eishoo iyiook nkisiligat enyena e tipat naa sapuki oleng, paa ore te nkaraki nena nitumutumu aailanya erruorroto natii enkop te nkaraki ing'uarrat, niaakuku ilooshulakino esinyatisho e mpukunoto e Nkai." 
2Peter1:5 Ore te nkaraki ena, entipik enyuaata pooki aponaa enkirukoto inyi, ore enkirukoto niponikiki eng'eno;" 
2Peter1:6 ore eng'eno inyi niponikiki enkibooroto e maate, ore enkibooroto e maate enkitashoto, ore enkitashoto esinyatisho e mpukunoto e Nkai." 
2Peter1:7 Ore esinyatisho e mpukunoto e Nkai entoponiki enkaripo e nyorrata too lalashera, ore enkaripo enyorrata too lalashera." 
2Peter1:8 Ore iyatata kuna tokitin te nkumoi nemeisho intae iliarara anaa ilauu ilng'anayio tiatua eyiolounoto o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo. 
2Peter1:9 Ore pooki ng'ae lemeeta kuna baa naa aimodooni, nemedol enelakua, netorikine enkitukuoto oo ng'ok enyena musan." 
2Peter1:10 Te nkaraki ena, ilalashera entonyok oleng entisipa enkipototo o engelunoto inyi, amu ti niaasiasa ina nimibatata aekata." 
2Peter1:11 Amu tena oitoi eishori intae esipata te leng'on entijing atua enkitoria oo ntarasi o Laitoriani lang naa Olaitajeunoni Yesu Kristo. 
2Peter1:12 Ore te nkaraki ena, kayieuta oshiaake naitadamu intae kuna baa, hoo ninye te naa indipa aatayiolo, nintirring'ang'a tiatua isipat naatii atua intae." 
2Peter1:13 Adol ajo keishakino, eton atii ele ng'obor te nkop, te nainyeiyie intae te nkoitoi e nkitadamunoto," 
2Peter1:14 amu kayiolo ajo, kasioki airragie osesen lai le nkop, anaa enaitoduaa Olaitoriani lang Yesu Kristo." 
2Peter1:15 Kanyok aas anaa enaidim, paa ore aidipa ashomo, nindimidimi aatadamu kuna baa inkatitin pooki." 
2Peter1:16 Amu eitu kisuj iyiook inkaatini naaitobiruaki te ng'eno ina kata kintayiolo intae engolon o elotunoto o Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo, kake kira ilchakenini ootoduaa too nkonyek enkitoo enye e nkisisa." 
2Peter1:17 Amu ore pee eng'amu enchunet e nkisisa e nkitoo eing'uaa Enkai Papa, neewuo oltoilo enetii eing'uaa Enkitoo e nkisisa nalus, nejo, “Oinoti lai ele lanyor, natishipe oleng te ninye.”" 
2Peter1:18 Kitoning'o iyiook ele toilo pee elotu eing'uaa shumata amu kiboitare apa iyiook ninye te ilo doinyo sinyati. 
2Peter1:19 Amu kiaata iyiook ilo rorei le naibon oitadedeyieki oleng nitaasa intae esidai te ning'amaa ninye anaa oltaa oilang'ilang ewueji nemisimis o metaba naa nekenyu, neilepu olakira too ltauja linyi." 
2Peter1:20 Ore enaituruk te pooki, entayiolo ena, inchere meetae enaibon oo sirat nalotu ake te yieunoto o ltung'ani makewan," 
2Peter1:21 amu metii aekata enaibon naishoruaki te yieunoto o ltung'ani, kake eiroro iltung'ana sinyat ilomon le Nkai anaa enautaki Enkiyang'et Sinyati eing'uaa Enkai." 
2Peter2:1 Kake enyoito sii apa iloibonok le lejare tiatua olorere, anaa enayooki sii aainyototo tiatua intae ilaiteng'enak le lejare, ooyau too nkisudorot inkiteng'enat naaiminie neitarruoo, nemiki doi ninye Olaitoriani laa ninye oinyiang'ua ninche, neyaki ate enkidaaroto nasieku." 
2Peter2:2 Naa kesuj ilkumok irrekiei lenye torrok, ore te nkaraki ninche nesukenyi enkoitoi oo sipat." 
2Peter2:3 Ore te nkowuarisho enye neitorogony intae too rorei loo monko, amu meyiata enkiguana enye e apa, nemeirura erruorroto enye." 
2Peter2:4 Amu amaa te neitu eing'urrie Enkai ilmalaika apa pee eitarruoo, kake etanang'aka ninche atua enkima, meteeni too ngumot e naimin, ometabau enkata enkiguana," 
2Peter2:5 amaa te neitu eing'urrie enapa kop musana, kake etalakua Noa eserian, ilo alikioroni loo supati te nebo kulikae oopishana, pee eyau oloirrag le nkare shumata enkop oo ltung'ana torrok." 
2Peter2:6 Amaa te neibelekenya Enkai inkang'itie e Sodom o Gomora metaa inkuruon, nedung'oki enkiguana neidaikie, neitaa enkitanyaanyukoto e natiu too nkolong'i naapuonu te lelo lemeure Enkai;" 
2Peter2:7 naa amaa te neitajewuo Lutu supat, oitanyamala naleng orrekie lo lduruk loo ltung'ana torrok," 
2Peter2:8 ebikito tiatua ninche, nemeyu oltau lenye supat too iasat enye torrok oo nkolong'i pooki." 
2Peter2:9 Neaku keyiolo Olaitoriani enaiko te nekordu too ntemat lelo ooure ninye, o enaiko pee eibooki enkitamioto lelo ooas intorrok o metabau ina olong e nkiguana" 
2Peter2:10 neisulaki lelo oosuj ing'uarrat naaidurukie osesen nemen enkitoria e Nkai. Ilootolo negogong, nemeure ninche aatamor ilo oata enkitoo e shumata." 
2Peter2:11 Ore ninye ilmalaika oolusoo te nkidimata o te ngolon, eitu eyau enkitang'oroto e nkiguana torrono shumata ninche te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
2Peter2:12 Kake ore kulo ootiu anaa ing'uesi nemedamisho, ooitore ing'uarrat e atua ate, ilootoiwuoki pee eibung'i neari metuata, iloomorisho too mbaa nemeyiolo, keidaikieki ninche teina kidaaroto te nebo ninche." 
2Peter2:13 Netum osina torrono te nkaraki iasat enye torrok, nedol ninche anaa olkar te nemera dama, intibil ninche o ntiyot, edaa te nkilepilep, epepeeno enyaita osirua te nebo intae." 
2Peter2:14 Neeta inkonyek naabore eloloito, nemeraposho aekata eas ing'ok. Nelejaa iltauja lemeuno, neeta iltauja ooitamooki ing'uarrat nemeishiaakino, Inkera o Ldeket!" 
2Peter2:15 Etung'uaitie enkoitoi naitoriori, eibaabaa aasuj inkoitoi e Balaam olayioni le Beor, otonyorra dupoto naing'uaa easata oo ntorrok." 
2Peter2:16 Kake etabuaakaki te nkaraki natigila ninye makewan inkitanapat; airo osikiria lemeeta enkutuk to ltoilo lo ltung'ani; aibooyo oloirirua le ilo oiboni. 
2Peter2:17 Ore kulo naa inchorroi nemetii enkare, inkinukun naareu olkutati, amu ninche eitaanyaki emisimisi o lodo le nkop." 
2Peter2:18 Amu keiro ninche imbaa o lwuasa le pesho, neitasur too yieunot o sesen, o ng'uarrat torrok lelo tung'ana laa enailanyie lelo ootoni tiatua inkitadiaat." 
2Peter2:19 Eisiligie ninche lelo elakunoto, ore ninche maate naa isinkan le ntorroni; amu ore pooki naidimu oltung'ani neaku ninye osinka le ina naidimua ninye." 
2Peter2:20 Amu amaa eidipa ailanya ilduruki le nkop te yiolounoto o Laitoriani naa Olaitajeunoni lang Yesu Kristo, neitoki ake aaisho metarrueshi te ninche, neidimuni, ore imbaa enye e nkiting'oto neaku torrok te ninche oleng aalang ine dukuya." 
2Peter2:21 Amu enaikash te ninche te neitu apa eitasim aaiyiolou nkoitoi e sipata, alang teneyiolou ina oitoi, neitoki aaibelekenya aaing'uaa ina kitanapata sinyati naishooki ninche." 
2Peter2:22 Etotiwuo te ninche anaa endung'et e rashe nasipa inchere, “Keshukokino oldia irrugumat enyena,” neji sii “Naa keisuji embitir neitoki ashukokino olokidong'oi aiperipera.”" 
2Peter3:1 Ena taata empalai e are nasiraki intae, ilanyor laainei. Ore te pokira are natuputuo indamunot inyi nemetii esunkuroisho te nkitadamunoto e kuna baa," 
2Peter3:2 inchere kenyor nidamumu intae irorei ooiroro iloibonok sinyat le dukuya o enkitanapata o Laitoriani naa Olaitajeunoni, oimua ilkipaareta linyi." 
2Peter3:3 Entayiolo ena te dukuya inchere ore too nkolong'i e siadi kepuonu ilasukenyak te sukeny enye, oopuoyie ing'uarrat enye maate," 
2Peter3:4 neikilikuanu aajo, “Koree doi enkisiligata e lotunoto Enye? Amu ore apa ebaiki pee eirura iloo papa, epuoito intokitin pooki aaikunari anaa enatiu apake te nkiterunoto pee eitaini enkop.”" 
2Peter3:5 Etootikitio ninche aagiroo ena sipata, inchere to rorei le Nkai eetae keper apa moitie o enkop naitobiraki te nkare naa enkare eitainyieki;" 
2Peter3:6 naa te ninye eidaikieki ina kop apa naatae aaitemoo to loirrag le nkare neidaaya. 
2Peter3:7 Naa te ilo rorei ake sii etushumaki keper taata natii o nkop aaitanyu enkima, nepali o metabaiki enkolong e nkiguana o emutata oo ltung'ana lemeure Enkai." 
2Peter3:8 Kake ore intae, ilchoreta laainei, emincho erikino intae ena bae nabo, inchere ore enkolong nabo to Laitoriani netiu anaa ilarin enkalifu nabo, ore ilarin enkalifu nabo netiu anaa enkolong nabo." 
2Peter3:9 Meimutie Olaitoriani eitu eitabaya enkisiligata enye anaa enadamu kulikae enkimutioto, kake keng'iri te intae amu meyieu obo oimin, kake pee ebaiki pooki ng'ae enkirridunoto." 
2Peter3:10 Kake kelotu enkolong o Laitoriani anaa olapurroni. Ore teina olong neishieki keper to ltoilo kitok. Ore wuejitin e shumata nepejori aaidaikie, ore enkop o pooki toki natii nepejori." 
2Peter3:11 Amaa taa te naa inji eikoni kuna tokitin pooki aaidaikie keishiaakino intae niaakuku iltung'ana ooikununo aja, to rrekie le sinyatisho o esidano e nkishiaa inyi too naaishiaakinore e Nkai?" 
2Peter3:12 Ore iyanyitata nintasiekuku ina olong e Nkai, ore ina olong naa kepeji shumata nesholi, ore intokitin naaitobirieki shumata neshola te nkima." 
2Peter3:13 Kake ore te risioroto e nkisiligata e Nkai, kiaanyita iyiook keper ng'ejuk o enkop ng'ejuk naa atua ninye emanya esupatisho." 
2Peter3:14 Ore te nkaraki ina ilanyor amu kuna iyanyitata entonyok naa pee einepu Enkai intae miaatata entibili anaa entiyoto, niserianana." 
2Peter3:15 Naa enkenai eng'iriata o Laitoriani lang inchere enjeunoto, neijia sii etiu olalashe lang onyorri Paulo etisira te risioroto e ng'eno naishooki ninye," 
2Peter3:16 eimaki ena anaa enajo too mpala enyena pooki. Amu etii atua ninche kulie naagol eyiolounoto naaboin iltung'ana lemeiteng'ena, nemeeta enkitashoto nauno nemerregel te nkidaaroto enye maate, anaa enaiko ilkulikae kigerot." 
2Peter3:17 Ore naa intae, ilanyor, itayioloito ena eton eado kop, entorrip ate pee meshoroo ake aaya intae te nkitapong'oroto oo ltung'ana lemeshilaa inkitanapat, neitiakieki intae enkitashoto inyi nauno." 
2Peter3:18 Kake entubulu te mpiris o te yiolounoto o Laitoriani naa Olaitajeunoni lang Yesu Kristo. Metaa enenye enkitoo te pokira, taata o metabaiki ina olong oo ntarasi." 
1John1:1 Ore ilo Rorei le nkishui otii apake te nkiterunoto, ilo likitoning'o iyiook, nikitoduaa too nkonyek ang, niking'ura nikimbung'a too nkaik ang," 
1John1:1 Ore ilo Rorei le nkishui otii apake te nkiterunoto, ilo likitoning'o iyiook, nikitoduaa too nkonyek ang, niking'ura nikimbung'a too nkaik ang," 
1John1:2 ina kishui naibalunyeki, nikitoduaa iyiook, naa ina kinchakenoo aajoki intae nchere ina kishui oo ntarasi natii apake te nebo Papa, neibalakinyeki iyiook." 
1John1:2 ina kishui naibalunyeki, nikitoduaa iyiook, naa ina kinchakenoo aajoki intae nchere ina kishui oo ntarasi natii apake te nebo Papa, neibalakinyeki iyiook." 
1John1:3 Ilo likitoduaa nikitoning'o kinosaki sii ninche intae pee itumutumu enchula te nebo iyiook; naa ene Papa enchula ang te nebo Oinoti lenye Yesu Kristo. 
1John1:3 Ilo likitoduaa nikitoning'o kinosaki sii ninche intae pee itumutumu enchula te nebo iyiook; naa ene Papa enchula ang te nebo Oinoti lenye Yesu Kristo. 
1John1:4 Nikinger ena pee elulung'ayu eng'ida ang. 
1John1:4 Nikinger ena pee elulung'ayu eng'ida ang. 
1John1:5 Olkilikuai ele laa ninye kitoning'o te Kristo Yesu kinosaki intae nchere, ewang'an Enkai nemetii enaimin atua ninye katukul."

1John4:9 Inji eikuna Enkai pee eibalie enyorrata enye tiatua iyiook, nchere eirriwua Enkai Enkerai enye meeu enkop, metaa ninye kinchuyie."
