Jude1:1 Nanu Yuda, osinka le Yesu Kristo naa olalashe le Yakobo, oigeroki lelo ooipotoki, oonyorri ti atua Enkai Papa lang ooiteng'elaki te nkaraki Yesu Kristo." 
Jude1:2 Metoponikini intae olng'ur o eseriani o enyorrata. 
Jude1:3 Ilanyor laainei, ore anaa eyieunoto naata naleng pee aigeroki intae mbaa naaipirta enjeunoto ang niking'ar, nadol ajo meeta nchere pee maigeroki intae, asai intae erishisho aamitu enkirukoto e Nkai naishooki apa nabo kata te lulung'ata lelo sinyat." 
Jude1:4 Etijing'akita atua intae te mpurrokinoto ilkulikae laa ninche apa etegelakaki endung'okinoto e nkiguana, iltung'ana lemeiruk Enkai ookur empiris e Nkai ang aaitaa enkoitoi naasie ntorrok nemiki ilo laa ninye ake olkitok lang, naa Olaitoriani lang Yesu Kristo." 
Jude1:5 Kayieu naitoki aitadamu intae, hoo naidipa apa aitayiolo intae nchere ore ilo oitajewuo iltung'ana aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri, nenyaaka amut lelo leitu eiruk." 
Jude1:6 Ore lelo malaika leitu egolie ewueji enye neing'uaa emanyisho enye naishiaakino, neteenaki ninche too lpisia loo ntarasi ti abori te nemisimis ometabau ina olong kitok e nkiguana;" 
Jude1:7 anaa enaikunaki Sodom o Gomora o nena ang'itie naamanita naatusuja sii ninche ng'uarrat oo loirerioni torrok, neitamioki ninche te nkima oo ntarasi pee eaku enkitanyaanyukoto te pooki." 
Jude1:8 Neton ake eiko neijia kulo tung'ana too nkidetidetat enye neidurukie osesen, neany enkitoria, nemor ilo oata enkitoo le shumata." 
Jude1:9 Kake ore Mikael ilo malaika kitok, eishankarra o loirirua eorro osesen le Musa, eitu ninye eitasim aipotoki emoroto e nkiguana, Kake etiaaka, “Metaa Enkai nikisikong.”" 
Jude1:10 Kedekisho lelo tung'ana too ldeketa lemening'u ninche, ore too naayiolo te mpukunoto o sesen anaa pee eyiolo ng'uesi, neyaki ate embatisho nemuti ninche." 
Jude1:11 Oi ninche! Amu etusujaitie orrekie le Kain netapalakita ate enkitapong'oroto e Balaam te nkaraki dupoto, nemuti ninche te nkiseroto e Kora." 
Jude1:12 Ore ninche naa iltipot ooiduruk ti atua isiruai linyi le nyorrata epepeeno te nebo meeta osul negolie ate meeta isura. Inkatampo nemeeta enkare, naaya osiwuo, o lkeek lemeeta ilng'anayio te siadi ari ootuata katitin are, ootadotuoki." 
Jude1:13 Ilopir le naiposha ootarasutua ooitokitoku ilabur le nkurruna enye, ilakir oopuaya laa ninche eitaanyitai emisimisi e naimin o lodo le nkop ntarasi." 
Jude1:14 Kuna apa sii eibonuo Enok ilo apa le ishoi e naapishana ebaiki Adam ejo, “Ng'ura eewuo Olaitoriani te nebo iip inkuyu oo sinyat lenyena," 
Jude1:15 pee edung'oki enkiguana pooki ng'ae nemir lelo pooki lemeure Enkai, too nkiaasin enye pooki torrok nemetii euriata e Nkai naatasa too rrekiei lemetii olturiaki le Nkai, o too mbaa pooki e nkisikong naatejo ilaasak loo ng'ok lemeure Enkai neiba ninye.”" 
Jude1:16 Kulo laing'unyung'unyak, ilooata olorok, iloosuj ing'uarrat oo seseni lenye, iloorup ate te njartano enye, nepakas iltung'ana ejo pee edupore." 
Jude1:17 Kake entadamu intae ilanyor laainei nena apa naatolimutuo ilkipaareta lo Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo. 
Jude1:18 Etiaakita intae, “Ore te nkata e nkiting'oto naa kepuonu ilasukenyak, oosuj ing'uarrat enye nemetii euriata e Nkai.”" 
Jude1:19 Kulo ninche ooyau eoro, ile na kop ninche lemeeta Enkiyang'et Enkai." 
Jude1:20 Kake ore intae ilanyor laainei, enteshetu ate ti atua ina kirukoto inyi nasinya, entoomon te Nkiyang'et Sinyati." 
Jude1:21 Entotoni intae maate ti atua enyorrata e Nkai, entaanyu olng'ur lo Laitoriani lang Yesu Kristo oitabaiki intae ina kishui oo ntarasi." 
Jude1:22 Entudupa ilkulikae leton eing'ashing'ash. 
Jude1:23 Entajeu ilkulikae entawuapu ninche tiatua enkima, eng'urrie lelo kulikae to lturiaki nimbayuyu ebaiki ninye enkila naidurukie osesen." 
Jude1:24 Ore taata ilo oidim atorripo intae pee mibatatata, neitoduaaya intae te dukuya enkitoo enye miaatata eleyiata, iatata eng'ida," 
Jude1:25 olaa ninye ake Enkai Olaitajeunoni lang, tiatua Yesu Kristo Olaitoriani lang. Metaa enenye enkitoo o enkisisa, o enkitoria, o engolon, te dukuya nkatitin pooki taata o ntarasi. Eesai." 
Revelation1:1 Embolunoto e Yesu Kristo, naishoo Enkai ninye meitoduaa isinkan lenyena, imbaa nemeeta nchere pee meesayu aasioki. Neisho metayiolouni te nkirriwakinoto nairriwaka olmalaika osinka lenye Yohana," 
Revelation1:2 oishakenoko ororei le Nkai o shakenisho e Yesu Kristo, ebaiki nena pooki naatoduaa." 
Revelation1:3 Emayiana ilo oisum metoning'i irorei le naibon, nemayiana lelo ooning, neibung nena naaigero teine, amu etataana enkata." 
Revelation1:4 Nanu Yohana oigeroki isirito naapishana e Asia: Enoto empiris o eseriani eing'uaa ilo otii taata, netii apa, naa ninye kenya olotu, neing'uaa sii inkiyang'eta naapishana naatii dukuya olorika lenye le nkitoo," 
Revelation1:5 neing'uaa Yesu Kristo olchakeni osipa, olaa ninye olkikau loo lootuata, naa Olaitoriani loo laiguanak ootii enkop. Metaa ene ilo otonyorra iyiook nelaku iyiook too ng'ok ang to sarge lenye," 
Revelation1:6 neitaa iyiook enkitoria oo lapolosak le Enkai Menye lenye, metaa enenye enkisisa o enkitoo ntarasi o ntarasi. Eesai." 
Revelation1:7 Ng'ura elotu ninye too nkatampo, naa kedol pooki ong'u ninye, lelo pooki ootaremo ninye. Ore loshon pooki le nkop, neyietu neishir te nkaraki ninye. Neijia taa etiu. Eesai." 
Revelation1:8 “Kara nanu Alfa o Omega,” Olaitoriani Enkai ojo, Otii taata, netii apa, naa ninye olotu, Olaidimani." 
Revelation1:9 Nanu Yohana olalashe linyi ong'arie intae tiatua Yesu, osina o enkitoo o eng'iriata o enkisulata, atii apa olemankale le naiposha oji Patmos te nkaraki ororei le Nkai o shakenisho e Yesu." 
Revelation1:10 Naainepu Enkiyang'et te nkolong o Laitoriani, naning oltoilo kitok te siadi nanu laaijo ole ntarumpeta," 
Revelation1:11 ejo, “Ingero nena nidolita tiatua embuku nirriwaki nena sirito pokira naapishana, ene Efeso, o Smirna o Pergamam o Tiatira o Sardis o ene Filadelfia o Laodikea.”" 
Revelation1:12 Naibelekenya ajo pee adol ilo toilo laairorie, ore ake pee aibelekenya nadol ilkilang'ilang'eta oopishana le saabu," 
Revelation1:13 naa ore te mpolos e lelo kilang'ilang'eta netii ilo obo laaijo Enkerai e Tung'ani, eishopokoki olkila oodo neenita enkeen e saabu to lgoo lenye." 
Revelation1:14 Ore endukuya enye o lpapit lenyena naa keibor anaa lpapit loo ntare, neibor anaa enturoto, netiu nkonyek enyena anaa olng'ejep le nkima," 
Revelation1:15 netiu inkejek enyena anaa isuyan oosika te nkima, netiu oltoilo lenye anaa iltoiloishi loo nkariak kumok;" 
Revelation1:16 neeta te nkaina enye e tatene ilakir oopishana, nepuku te nkutuk enye olalem opi nkaloli pokira are, netiu enkomom enye anaa enkolong te nedalu te ngolon enye pooki." 
Revelation1:17 Ore peyie adol ninye nabatatakino nkejek enyena natiu anaa oltung'ani otua. Kake aaiteleikia enkaina enye e tatene, nejo, “Miureishoyu, kara nanu ole nkiterunoto o le nkiting'oto;" 
Revelation1:18 nara ilo oishu, atua apa, naa ng'ura ajo kaishu taata o ntarasi, naa nanu oata imboleta e keeya o ewueji e nkima." 
Revelation1:19 Naa ngero taata nena nidol, enatii o enayooki aaku." 
Revelation1:20 Ore enkisudoroto e lelo akir oopishana litoduaa te nkaina ai e tatene, o lelo kilang'ilang'eta oopishana le saabu naa nji etiu: ore ilakir oopishana naa ilmalaika loo sirito naapishana, ore ilkilang'ilang'eta naa sirito, pokira naapishana." 
Revelation2:1 “Tisiraki ilo malaika le sirit natii atua Efeso nchere, ‘Irorei le ilo oibung'ita ilakir oopishana te nkaina enye e tatene, olo tiatua ilkilang'ilang'eta oopishana le saabu." 
Revelation2:2 “ ‘Kayiolo nkiaasin inono o eekenyata ino o eng'iriata ino, nchere mindim aisiritore iltung'ana torrok kake itetema lelo oojo ate ilkipaareta neme ninche, nirrasha ninche ajo ilalejak." 
Revelation2:3 Kayiolo ajo iata enyuaata niting'iria te nkaraki enkarna ai, neitu inauru." 
Revelation2:4 Kake kaata ena namen te iyie. Nchere, itung'uaiyie enyorrata apa niaata te dukuya." 
Revelation2:5 Tadamu naa eneba enitusulunore, irridu niaas isiaaitin niaasita apa te dukuya. Naa ti nimiaas, naa kalotu enitii naiwuang'ie olkilang'ilang'et lino te wueji enye, te neitu irridu." 
Revelation2:6 Kake iata ena nabo, imba isiaaitin oo Lnikolatin naiba sii nanu." 
Revelation2:7 Ore oloata enkiok inchoo ening enajoki Enkiyang'et nena sirito. Ore ilo omirisho naisho meinosa ilng'anayio te ilo shani le mpuaan otii atua olchampa le Nkai.’ 
Revelation2:8 “Naa ore olmalaika le sirit natii atua Smirna, tisiraki nchere, ‘Irorei le ilo le Nkiterunoto o le nkiting'oto, otua apa, nenyaaka apiu." 
Revelation2:9 “ ‘Kayiolo osomit lino o aisinanisho ino, kake ira karsis, nayiolo sii imorot e lelo oojo ate Ilyahudi neme ninche, kake enkaji e ntumo e Sheitani ninche." 
Revelation2:10 Miureyu ilo sina olotu. Ng'ura, etaa enajo pee enang'aki Sheitani lkulikae te intae atua jila pee etum atetema intae, naa ore too nkolong'i tomon nitumutumu intae osomit. Taa oloisiligayu o tabaiki keeya naa kaaisho iyie enkopiyia e nkitoo e nkishui." 
Revelation2:11 Oloata enkiok, inchoo ening enajoki Enkiyang'et nena sirito. Ore ilo omirisho nemeitame ninye ina keeya e are.’" 
Revelation2:12 “Naa ore olmalaika le sirit natii atua Pargamam, tisiraki nchere, ‘Irorei lo loata olalem opi nkaloli pokira are." 
Revelation2:13 “ ‘Kayiolo enikimanya, ine etii olorika le nkitoo le Sheitani; nimbung'ita enkarna ai akurraki, neitu imiki enkirukoto ai ebaiki inkolong'i e Antipas olchakeni lai asipani otaraki metua tiatua intae teine nemanya Sheitani." 
Revelation2:14 Kake kaata nkuti namen te iyie; iata kulikae teine ooibung inkiteng'enat e Balaam oiteng'ena Balak metipiki eloket narror inkera oo Siraeli pee etum aainosa indaiki oo lasarri ootopolosaki leme le Nkai, neas intorrok e loloito." 
Revelation2:15 Metaa iata sii iyie kulikae ooibung inkiteng'enat oo Lnikolatin. 
Revelation2:16 Irridu naa. Naa te neitu, nalotu enitii asieku naitainyie ninche olarrabal to lalem le nkutuk ai." 
Revelation2:17 Oloata enkiok inchoo ening enajoki, Enkiyang'et nena sirito. Ore ilo omirisho naa kaisho ninye eoroti e mana naisudoro, naisho osoit oibor, osirakino enkarna enye ng'ejuk, nemeyiolo likae tung'ani meteleku ilo ake ong'amu.’" 
Revelation2:18 “Ore olmalaika le sirit natii atua Tiatira, tisiraki nchere, ‘Irorei lo Inoti le Enkerai e Nkai, otiu nkonyek enyena anaa lng'ejepa le nkima, netiu nkejek enyena anaa isuyan ootisikaki." 
Revelation2:19 “ ‘Kayiolo isiaaitin inono, o enyorrata ino, o enkirukoto o enkisiaayiare, o eng'iriata, o nchere etalang'a isiaaitin inono e det ine dukuya." 
Revelation2:20 Kake kamen ena te iyie nchere, itapalayie ina kitok naji Yesebel naitaa kewan enkoiboni pee eiteng'enisho neitapong'oo isinkan laainei metaasa imbaa e loloito nenya indaiki naatopolosakaki inkitanyaanyukot." 
Revelation2:21 Aishoo ninye enkata meirridu, kake etanya eirridu te loloito enye." 
Revelation2:22 Neaku, ekanang'aki ninye erruat e muoyian, ore lelo oololoito te nebo ninye nanang'aki atua olosilisili kitok aashu te neirridu inkiaasin enye." 
Revelation2:23 Naa kaosh inkera enyena metuata. Naa keyiolou isirito pooki aajo nanu ilo ojur indamunot o ltau, naa nanu oisho pooki ng'ae linyi anaa erisioroto e siaai enye." 
Revelation2:24 Kake ore intae kulikae ootii atua Tiatira leitu eibung ena kiteng'enare, leitu eiteng'en ate te nena naajo kulikae imbaa naagut e Sheitani, ajoki intae, maitoki aiteleiki intae likae ola." 
Revelation2:25 Embung'a ake intae entukurraki ina niaatata, o metaba anaa nalotu." 
Revelation2:26 Ore ilo omirisho neibung isiaaitin aainei o metabau enkiting'oto naisho ninye engolon meitoria iloreren. 
Revelation2:27 Naa keitore ninche te ng'udi e sekenkei anaa te nedanyi motioo oo nkulupuok metaa mbelibelat, anaa sii ninye nanu enatang'amua engolon eing'uaa Papa lai." 
Revelation2:28 Naa kaisho ninye olakira le nkakenya. 
Revelation2:29 Oloata enkiok nchoo ening enajoki Enkiyang'et nena sirito.’ 
Revelation3:1 “Naa ore to lmalaika le sirit natii atua Sardis, ing'ero nchere, ‘Irorei le ilo oata nena kiyang'eta naapishana e Nkai o lelo akir oopishana. “ ‘Kayiolo isiaaitin inono, iata enkarna anaa oltung'ani oishu, nitua." 
Revelation3:2 Tuputunye naa nintagol ina natelekua netaa keye, amu eitu ainepu isiaaitin inono aa bayarot too nkonyek e Nkai ai." 
Revelation3:3 Tadamu naa ina apa nitang'amua o nitoning'o, mbung'a ina nirridu. Te nimiputunye nalotu anaa olapurroni, nimiyiolou ajo kaa saa alotunyie enitii iyie." 
Revelation3:4 Neton ake iatata nkuti arn tiatua Sardis, iltung'ana leitu epik oloirerio inkilani enye, naa kaairiamariyie ninche nanu eishopo inkilani naaibor amu keiririkino ninche." 
Revelation3:5 Ore ilo omirisho neikodi aaiko nejia too nkilani naaibor, nemajut enkarna enye te mbuku e mpuaan; naishakenoki enkarna enye te dukuya Papa lai o te dukuya ilmalaika lenyena." 
Revelation3:6 Oloata enkiok, nchoo ening enajoki Enkiyang'et nena sirito.’" 
Revelation3:7 “Naa ore to lmalaika le sirit natii atua Filadelfia, ingeroki nchere, ‘Irorei le ilo Obo Sinyati, olosipa, oloata embolet e Daudi, olobol nemeetae likae oiken, oloiken nemeetae likae obol." 
Revelation3:8 “ ‘Kayiolo nkiaasin inono. Ng'ura ajo atipika dukuya iyie kutukaji nabolo nemeidim hoo ng'ae aikeno; kayiolo ajo enkiti golon iata, kake imbung'a ororei lai neitu imiki enkarna ai." 
Revelation3:9 Ng'ura ajo kareu lelo le nkaji e ntumo e Sheitani oojo ate Ilyahudi neme ninche, kake kelejisho, kareu ninche meetu aairrugokino inkejek inono neyiolou nchere aatonyorra nanu iyie." 
Revelation3:10 Ore amu imbung'a ororei lai te nyuaata o eng'iriata, ekaarrip teina saa oo ntemat nalotu enkop pooki, atem lelo ootii enkop." 
Revelation3:11 Ekalotu asieku. Imbung'a tukurraki ina niaata pee mikioru ake likae enkopiyia ino e nkitoo. 
Revelation3:12 Ore ilo omirisho naitaa ninye eng'ape tiatua enkaji e Nkai ai, nemeitoki aekata aipang aing'uaa ine, naa kasiraki ninye enkarna e Nkai ai, o enkarna e nkanasa e Nkai ai, ina Yerusalem nadou eing'uaa Enkai ai te keper o enkarna ai kewan ng'ejuk." 
Revelation3:13 Oloata enkiok, nchoo ening enajoki Enkiyang'et nena sirito.’" 
Revelation3:14 “Naa ore too lmalaika le sirit natii atua Laodikea, ingeroki, ‘Irorei le ilo oji Eesai, Oloisiligayu naa olchakeni osipa, naa ninye enkiterunoto e nkitobirata naitobira Enkai seuseu." 
Revelation3:15 “ ‘Kayiolo inkiaasin inono. Mirobi iyie nimirowua, oi imut airopiju aashu irowuaju." 
Revelation3:16 Neaku ore amu imololong, mirobi nimirowua, ekaanotu aitayu te nkutuk ai." 
Revelation3:17 Amu ijo iyie, Kara nanu karsis, atudupe, malau toki. Nimiyiolo iyie ajo ira menati, ira tolut, nira olaisinani modooni niminchopo." 
Revelation3:18 Ore te nkaraki ina, aaikok iyie naa pee inyiang'u te nanu saabu natisilaki te nkima, pee itum ataa karsis, ninchop ilkilani ooibor pee eitemoo enkurruna e masipaisho ino, meitokini aadol, o lchani liyelie nkonyek inono pee idolishoyu." 
Revelation3:19 Ore lelo lanyor naa kaisikong naitame metaa, tonyuaa naa irridu." 
Revelation3:20 Ng'ura ajo aitashe te kutukaji naoshiosh, ore ake pooki ng'ae oning oltoilo lai nebol kutukaji, naa kajing'aki nanu;" 
Revelation3:21 nalo anya endaa te nebo ninye, nenya sii ninye te nebo nanu. Ore ilo omirisho naa kaisho ninye metotona te nebo nanu to lorika lai le nkitoo anaa apa enatimirishe nanu, naton te nebo Papa lai to lorika lenye le nkitoo." 
Revelation3:22 Oloata enkiok nchoo ening enajoki Enkiyang'et nena sirito.’ ” 
Revelation4:1 Ore pee eidipayu ena, naing'orisho, nadol etii atua keper kutukaji nabolo! Ore oladuoo toilo latang'asa aning aairorie te dukuya, etiu anaa ole ntarumpeta. Nejo, “Ilepu, tinyiku ene, pee aaitodol ina nemeeta nchere pee measayu asuju ena.”" 
Revelation4:2 Ore nabo kata naaigany Enkiyang'et, naa ng'ura, euno olorika le nkitoo te keper, netii obo otonita te ilo orika." 
Revelation4:3 Ore ilo otonita teine neikununo anaa osoit oji Yaspa, o ltoto oonyori ooji karnelian nemanita olokirrai ilo orika oikununo anaa iltoto ooji emerald." 
Revelation4:4 Nemanita ilo orika ilorikan tikitam oong'uan le nkitoo. Netonita te lelo orikan le nkitoo ilpayiani tikitam oong'uan ooishopito nkilani naaibor, neeta too lukuny enye nkopiyiani e nkitoo e saabu." 
Revelation4:5 Nepuku te ilo orika le nkitoo inkiwuang'at naaimerlel o ndarat o enkikurrukur. Ore te dukuya ilo orika le nkitoo neyupuyup ilkilang'ilang'eta oopishana le nkima, naa ninche inkiyang'eta naapishana e Nkai." 
Revelation4:6 Ore te dukuya ilo orika le nkitoo netii entoki natiu anaa enaiposha e kiok nayia anaa oltotoi oibor, nemanita ilo orika le nkitoo too nkaloli pooki ing'uesi ong'uan naaishu, naabore nkonyek dukuya o siadi." 
Revelation4:7 Ore ina ng'ues e dukuya naishu neikununo anaa olng'atuny, ore ina ng'ues e are naishu neikununo anaa olkiteng, ore ina ng'ues e uni naishu neeta enkomom o ltung'ani, ore ina ng'ues e ong'uan naishu neikununo anaa olkurragos olo ti ai." 
Revelation4:8 Ore nena ng'uesi ong'uan naaishu neeta ake nabo inaipuko ile, nebore ninche inkonyek pooki wueji, oriong o atua. Ore dama o kewarie nemegira aekata meranyisho ejo, “Osinyati, Osinyati, Osinyati, Osinyati, Olaitoriani Enkai, Olaidimani le pooki, otii apa netii taata, naa ninye olotu.”" 
Revelation4:9 Naa ore ake pee eisho nena ng'uesi naaishu enkisisa, o enkitoo o enkanyit enashe ilo otonita to lorika le nkitoo, oishu ntarasi o ntarasi." 
Revelation4:10 Nebatata lelo payiani tikitam o oong'uan te dukuya ilo otonita to lorika le nkitoo, neserem ilo oishu ntarasi o ntarasi, neirragie nkopiyiani enye e nkitoo te dukuya ilo orika le nkitoo, neranyisho aajo," 
Revelation4:11 “Kinchiaakino iyie, Olaitoriani lang o Enkai ang, pee ing'amu enkisisa o enkanyit o engolon, amu iyie oitobirua intokitin pooki, naa te yieuna ino eetae ninche neitobiruaki ninche.”" 
Revelation5:1 Nadol sii te nkaina e tatene e ilo otonita to lorika le nkitoo olpiyayati le mbuku naigero atua o oriong, netipikaki ilmishiren oopishana." 
Revelation5:2 Nadol sii olmalaika ogol elimu to ltoilo sapuk ajo, “Ai ng'ae eishiaakino nebol ele piyayati le mbuku nebol lelo mishiren lenyena.”" 
Revelation5:3 Nemeetae hoo obo te keper aashu te nkop aashu tiabori enkop oidima atabolo ilo piyayati aashu aing'ura atua. 
Revelation5:4 Naishir oleng amu eitu etumi oltung'ani hoo obo oishiaakino pee edol ilo piyayati aashu eing'or atua. 
Revelation5:5 Naajoki nanu obo le lelo payiani lo losho le Yuda, mintoki aishir. Ng'ura, olng'ur le ntonai e Daudi etimirishe peyie etum atabolo ilo piyayati o lelo mishiren lenyena oopishana." 
Revelation5:6 Ore te rishata o lorika le nkitoo o ng'uesi ong'uan naaishu o tiatua ilpayiani, nadol olkuoo le ker eitashe, etiu anaa keteyiang'aki apa, neeta mowuarak naapishana o nkonyek naapishana, naa ninche nkiyang'eta naapishana e Nkai, naairriwayioki meshomo enkop pooki." 
Revelation5:7 Nelo ilo kuoo le ker nedumu ilo piyayati le mbuku te nkaina e tatene e ilo otonita to lorika le nkitoo. 
Revelation5:8 Ore ake pee edumu ilo piyayati le mbuku, nebatata nena ng'uesi naaishu ong'uan te dukuya ilo kuoo le ker, nemeetae ake enemeibung'ita enkawuo oo sinkolioitin, o mbakulini e saabu naabore empuruo narropil naa enkomono oo sinyat." 
Revelation5:9 Nerany osinkolio ng'ejuk aajo, “Kinchiaakino iyie pee idumu olpiyayati le mbuku, nibel ilmishiren lenyena. Amu kiteyieng'aki apa naa to sarge lino inyiang'aka Enkai iltung'ana aitung'uaa loshon pooki, o lng'ejepa, o ltung'ana o loreren." 
Revelation5:10 Nintaa ninche enkitoria o lapolosak le Nkai ang, naa keyooki ninche aaitoreisho te nkop.”" 
Revelation5:11 Naitoki nanu aing'orisho, naning emanita olorika le nkitoo o nena ng'uesi naaishu o lelo payiani oltoilo loo lmalaika kumok. Ore esiana enye naa iip nkuyu iip nkuyu o nkalifuni o nkalifuni." 
Revelation5:12 Nejo ninche to ltoilo sapuk, “Keishiakino ilo Kuoo le ker apa oteyiang'aki te neng'amu engolon o enkarsisisho o eng'eno nagut o enkidimata o enkanyit o enkitoo o emayianata.”" 
Revelation5:13 Naning nena pooki naaiseuseu te keper o te nkop o tiabori enkop o naatii enaiposha, o nena pooki naatae ejo, “Metaa ene ilo otonita to lorika le nkitoo neaku eno lkuoo le ker, emayianata o enkanyit o enkisisa o enkidimata intarasi o ntarasi!”" 
Revelation5:14 Nejo nena ng'uesi ong'uan naaishu, “Eesai.” Nebatata ilpayiani aaserem." 
Revelation6:1 Nadol ina kata pee elo ilo Kuoo le Ker abol obo le lelo mishiren oopishana, naning nabo e nena ng'uesi ong'uan naaishu ejo to ltoilo le ndarata, “Wou!”" 
Revelation6:2 Nadol te dukuya nanu embarta naibor, neeta ilo okedito enkawuo o enkopiyia e nkitoo naishooki ninye, neipang alo." 
Revelation6:3 Ore pee ebol ilo kuoo ilo mishire li aare, naning ina ng'ues e are naishu ejo, “Wou!”" 
Revelation6:4 Neipang'u enkae barta nanyokie oleng, ore ilo okedito neishooki engolon meiwuang'ie eseriani aitung'uaa e nkop pee eyiang'a iltung'ana maate, neishooki ninye olalem sapuk." 
Revelation6:5 Ore pee ebol olmishire li okuni, naning ina ng'ues e uni naishu ejo, “Wou!” Naing'orisho nadol nanu, embarta narok, ore ilo okedito neeta entemet te nkaina enye." 
Revelation6:6 Naning entoki naaijo oltoilo te mpolos e nena ng'uesi ong'uan naaishu ejo, “Emborei e mpirlbil e nkano te mpisai nabo, o mboreitin uni e shairi te dinari nabo. Kake mintarruoo eilata o enaisho oo sabibu.”" 
Revelation6:7 Ore pee ebol ilo kuoo leker olmishire li ong'uan, naning oltoilo le ina ng'ues e ong'uan naishu ejo, “Wou!”" 
Revelation6:8 Naing'orisho nanu, nadol embarta pus, ore enkarna e ilo okedito naa keji Keeya, neirukurukore ninye Enemeneng'a. Neishooki ninye engolon meitoria ematua e ong'uan e nkop, peyie ear metuata to lalem o to lameyu o too lmeitai o too ng'uesi e ntim naatii enkop." 
Revelation6:9 Ore ebol ilo kuoo olmishire le miet nadol ti abori olperere lo lasar iltauja le lelo apa ootaaraki te nkaraki ororei le Nkai o te shakenisho naitayutuo. 
Revelation6:10 Neishir aajo to ltoilo sapuk, “Iyie Olaitoriani Kitok, Oyanyiti nesipa, kanu kenya inguan nintalaku osarge lang te lelo ootii enkop?”" 
Revelation6:11 Neishori pooki te lelo olkila oibor, nejokini meyeng'iyeng'ata te nkiti kata, o metaba anaa neiputayu esiana e lelo ooisiaaishote te nebo ninche leton eitokini aar anaa apa ninche maate." 
Revelation6:12 Ore pee ebol ilo kuoo olmishire le ile, naing'orisho nadol etii enkikirikirata sapuk enkop, neroku enkolong netiu anaa olkila orok, neibelekenya olapa olulung'a netiu anaa osarge." 
Revelation6:13 Nesulunye ilakir to loing'ang'e nesulakino enkop anaa ilng'abolo oorrarrunye ilng'anayio te nkata enkirobi eyukito olkutati. 
Revelation6:14 Neng'ishari oloing'ang'e anaa olpiyayati otununukoki. Neiwuang'ieki pooki doinyo, o pooki lemankale aaitung'uaa ewueji enye." 
Revelation6:15 Ore ilaiguanak le na kop, o ltung'ana kituaak, o larikok loo njorin, o lkarsisi o loogol, o pooki ng'ae orrindik aashu ololakuno. Neisudori too nkapuniaa o too soito loo ldoinyo." 
Revelation6:16 Neipot nejoki ildoinyo o soito, “Entusulakinoto iyiook, nisudoo iyiook too nkonyek e ilo otonita to lorika le nkitoo, o te ngoro e ilo Kuoo le Ker." 
Revelation6:17 Amu etabawua ina olong kitok e ngoro enye, naa ai ng'ae oidim aitasho te dukuya ninye?”" 
Revelation7:1 Ore te siadi ena nadol ilmalaika oong'uan eitashe too lubot pokira ong'uan e nkop, eibooyo isiwuoishi pokira oong'uan le nkop, pee meitoki olkutati akutu te nkop aashu te naiposha aashu akutaki olchani ake pooki." 
Revelation7:2 Naitoki adol likae malaika eilepu te nkilepunoto e nkolong, neeta olmishire le Nkai naishu, neipot to ltoilo sapuk lelo malaika oong'uan ooishooki engolon meinyiala enkop o enaiposha." 
Revelation7:3 Nejoki, “Eminyial enkop aashu enaiposha aashu ilkeek, o metaba anaa nikimishir isinkan le Nkai ang inkomomi enye.”" 
Revelation7:4 Naning esiana, e lelo ootimishiraki; naa nkalifuni iip artam o oong'uan ilootimishiraki eing'uaa iloshon pooki loo layiok loo Siraeli:" 
Revelation7:5 inkalifuni tomon o aare ilo losho le Yuda," 
Revelation7:6 inkalifuni tomon o aare ilo losho le Ruben, inkalifuni tomon o aare ilo losho le Gad, inkalifuni tomon o aare ilo losho le Asheri, inkalifuni tomon o aare ilo losho le Naftali, inkalifuni tomon o aare ilo losho le Manase." 
Revelation7:7 Inkalifuni tomon o aare ilo losho le Simion, inkalifuni tomon o aare ilo losho le Lawi," 
Revelation7:8 inkalifuni tomon o aare ilo losho le Isaakar naa nkalifuni tomon o aare ilootimishiraki eing'uaa olosho le Sebulon, nkalifuni tomon aare ilo losho le Yosef, nkalifuni tomon oaare ilootimishiraki to losho le Benchamen." 
Revelation7:9 Ore te siadi ena, naing'orisho, nadol olorora kitok lemeeta oltung'ani oidim aikena, eing'uaa pooki orere, neing'uaa iloshon pooki, o ltung'ana o lng'ejepa pooki, eitashe te dukuya olorika le nkitoo o te dukuya ilo Kuoo le Ker, neishopito ilkilani ooibor, neibung'ita ilng'osil loo ltuka too nkaik enye." 
Revelation7:10 Nebuaku too ltoiloishi sapuki aajo, “Ene Nkai ang enjeunoto: ina natonita to lorika le nkitoo o ene ilo Kuoo le Ker.”" 
Revelation7:11 Neitashe ilmalaika pooki aaman olorika le nkitoo o lelo payiani o nena ng'uesi ong'uan naaishu, nebatata too nkomomi enye te dukuya ilo orika le nkitoo neserem Enkai." 
Revelation7:12 Ejoito, “Eesai, metaa emayianata o enkisisa o enkitoo, o eng'eno nagut o enkishooroto enashe o enkanyit o engolon o enkidimata ene Enkai ang intarasi o ntarasi. Eesai.”" 
Revelation7:13 Naaitoki obo le lelo payiani airorie nanu ajoki, “Kakua tung'ana kulo ooishopito ilkilani ooibor, naa kaji eing'uaa ninche?”" 
Revelation7:14 Najoki nanu ninye, “Olkitok, iyiolo iyie.” Naaitoki aajoki, “Kulo ninche lelo ooiturukutuo aaing'uaa ilo sina kitok neitukuo ilkilani lenye neiborrie to sarge lo Lkuoo le Ker.”" 
Revelation7:15 Naa te nkaraki ina pee etii dukuya olorika le nkitoo le Nkai neisiaai ninche ninye dama o kewarie tiatua enkaji enye. Ore ilo otonita to lorika le nkitoo naa keitushur ninche teine netii ninye. 
Revelation7:16 Nemeitoki aekata ninche aaisumashu aashu aatum enkure. Nemedal enkolong ninche aashu ae kirowuaj napejisho. 
Revelation7:17 Amu ilo Kuoo le Ker otii empolos o lorika le nkitoo oaku olchekut lenye, naa kerikoo ninche too nchorroi oo nkariak naaishu. Naa kejut Enkai pooki kiyioi too nkonyek enye." 
Revelation8:1 Ore pee ebol Olkuoo le Ker olmishire li oopishana, negira keper te rishata naba anaa enusu e saa." 
Revelation8:2 Nadol nanu lelo malaika oopishana, ooitashe te dukuya Enkai, neishori ninche sekekuani naapishana." 
Revelation8:3 Nelotu likae malaika aitashe te mbata o lperere lo lasar, eeta emoti e saabu napejirishoreki, neishori enkorropil sapuk, meitushulaki enkomono e lelo sinyat pooki te nchumata o lperere lo lasar le saabu otii dukuya olorika le nkitoo." 
Revelation8:4 Neilep empuruo e nkorropil o lasar te nebo enkomono e lelo sinyat te nkaina o lmalaika otii dukuya Enkai. 
Revelation8:5 Nedumu olmalaika emoti neiput enkima naitayio to lperere lo lasar, neisuaaki enkop neaku kumok indarat sapuki o nkikurrukurrot naabuaku, o enkimerlel o nkiwuang'at, o enkikirikirata e nkop." 
Revelation8:6 Ore lelo malaika oopishana ooibung'ita sekekuani naapishana neitobir ejo pee eosh. 
Revelation8:7 Neosh ilo malaika le dukuya esekekua enye, neshau enchan oo soito o enkima, nashulare osarge; nedoiki enkop; nepejori ematua e uni e nkop, nepejori ematua e uni oo lkeek, nepejori nkujit pooki naanyori." 
Revelation8:8 Neosh olmalaika li aare esekekua enye. Ore enkito toki naaijo oldoinyo nayupuyup te nkima nenang'akini atua enaiposha. 
Revelation8:9 Neaku ematua e uni e naiposha osarge, neye ematua e uni oo ng'uesi naaishu naatii atua enaiposha, nemuti ematua e uni oo melin." 
Revelation8:10 Neosh olmalaika liokuni esekekua enye, nedou olakira sapuk oing'uaa shumata eyupuyup anaa olkilang'ilang'et, nedoiki ninye ematua e uni oo lkejek, o enoo nkonyek oo nkariak." 
Revelation8:11 Neji enkarna e ilo akira Enduaran. Neitaduari ematua e uni e nkare, neye iltung'ana kumok teina are, amu eitaduaraki." 
Revelation8:12 Neosh olmalaika li oong'uan esekekua enye, ore ematua e uni e nkolong neari, o ematua e uni o lapa, o ematua e uni oo lakir, neaku eitomisimisoki ematua e uni e wang'an enye. Nemitikini ematua e uni e ndama ewang'u naa neijia etiu ematua e uni e nkewarie." 
Revelation8:13 Naitoki aing'orisho naning olkurragos oishirita to ltoilo sapuk eipirri te mpolos o loing'ang'e nejo, “Wooi, Wooi, Wooi, ninche lelo oomanya enkop, te nkaraki enkorui e nena tarumpetani netaa keosh ilmalaika okuni.”" 
Revelation9:1 Neitoki olmalaika le imiet aosh esekekua enye, nadol olakira otusulunye eing'uaa shumata elotu enkop. Neishori ninye olbolet lo lgos le ina gumoto nemeeta eneiting'ie." 
Revelation9:2 Nebol ilo gos le ina gumoto nemeeta eneiting'ie, neilepu empuruo te ilo gos naikununo anaa empuruo o lkokuet sapuk, nemisimisu enkolong, o enkijape teina puruo napuku teina gumoto." 
Revelation9:3 Nepuku teina puruo ilmaat nepuonu enkop. Neishori engolon natiu anaa engolon oo nkolopani e nkop. 
Revelation9:4 Nejokini ninche pee meinyal inkujit e nkop, aashu ae toki nabulu nanyori aashu pooki shani, kake lelo tung'ana ake lemeeta olmishire le Nkai too lpurai loo nkomomi enye." 
Revelation9:5 Neishori ninche meisilisilo ninche too lapaitin imiet, kake pee mear metuata. Netiu enkitamioto enye anaa emion e nkolopa, te neng'or oltung'ani." 
Revelation9:6 Naa ore te nena olong'i naa keing'oru oltung'ani keeya nemetum ninye. Neng'uar ninche keeya, neilany keeya ninche." 
Revelation9:7 Ore lelo maat te nidol, neikununo anaa mbartan naatanapate to larrabal. Netii ilukuny enye ntokitin naatiu anaa nkopiyiani e nkitoo e saabu, neikununo nkomomi enye anaa nkomomi oo ltung'ana." 
Revelation9:8 Neikununo ilpapit lenye anaa ilpapit loo nkituaak, neikununo ilala lenye anaa ilala loo lng'atunyo." 
Revelation9:9 Neeta ilpala laaijo nkilani oo lgooitie oo sekenke, ore enkikurrukur oo naipuko enye, netiu anaa enkikurrukur oo ngarrin oo mbartan kumok ekuetiki olarrabal." 
Revelation9:10 Neeta ilkidong'o laaijo loo nkolopani oonyisho, ore engolon enye naitameiyie iltung'ana too lapaitin imiet naa atua lkidong'o lenye etii." 
Revelation9:11 Ore olaiguanani oitore ninche naa ilo malaika le ina gumoto nemeeta eneiting'ie. Ore enkarna enye too Lbrania naa Abadon neji te nkutuk o Lyunani Apolion (nchere olamutani). 
Revelation9:12 Eidipa entaboi e dukuya atulusoi, kake eton eng'or intabo are naapuonu te siadi." 
Revelation9:13 Neitoki olmalaika le ile aosh esekekua enye, naning oltoilo oing'uaa nena mowuarak pokira ong'uan o lperere lo lasar le saabu otii dukuya Enkai." 
Revelation9:14 Nejoki ilo malaika le ile, oata emowuo, “Talaku lelo malaika oong'uan ooena to lkeju sapuk le Frati.”" 
Revelation9:15 Nelakuni lelo malaika pokira oong'uan apa ooibooki aaitaanyu ina saa, o ina olong, o ilo apa, oilo ari, pee ear ematua e uni oo ltung'ana." 
Revelation9:16 Ore esiana oo ltimito ookedito mbartan netasha are naa nkalifuni tomon katitin nkalifuni tomon. Atoning'o nanu esiana enye. 
Revelation9:17 Naa nji eikununo nena bartan natoduaa te nduaata ai, neeta lelo ookedito nkilani oo lgooitie oo sekenke naayia anaa enkima, neyia anaa soito pusi ooji Salfa neyia anaa enkima e nkibiriti. Neikununo ilukuny oo mbartan anaa ilukuny oo lng'atunyo Nepuku enkima e Nkibiriti too nkutukie enye." 
Revelation9:18 Ore te kulo meita pokira okuni near metuata ematua e uni oo ltung'ana te nkima o te mpuruo o te nkima e nkibiriti, naing'uaa inkutukie enye." 
Revelation9:19 Amu ore engolon e nena bartan naa atua inkutukie enye etii o lkidong'o lenye. Netiu ilkidong'o lenye anaa ilasuriaa, keeta ilukuny, naa ninche epikishore ilbaa." 
Revelation9:20 Ore iltung'ana ootelekutua, leitu eari metuata te kulo meita, neitu eirridu inkiaasin oo nkaik enye, neitu epal eseremata o eomonoto oo loiriruani o nkitanyaanyukot neme nkaitin e saabu o enkosholai o suyai o soito o enoo nkeek nemedolisho, aashu ening'isho aashu aashom." 
Revelation9:21 Neitu sii eirridu too loikop lenye o te sakutore enye, o te loloito enye o te mpurrorre enye." 
Revelation10:1 Naitoki adol likae malaika edou eing'uaa keper eimulumula te nkatampoi, netii olokirrai shumata endukuya enye, netiu enkomom enye anaa enkolong, neikununo nkejek enyena anaa ng'apeta e nkima." 
Revelation10:2 Neeta te nkaina enye enkiti piyayati e mbuku nabolo. Neroro te nkeju enye e tatene enaiposha, neroro te ne kedianye enkop natoyio." 
Revelation10:3 Neipotisho abuaku to ltoilo sapuk, anaa olo lng'atuny oipur. Ore ake pee eipotisho nedaru nena kikurrukurrot naapishana." 
Revelation10:4 Ore pee edar nena kikurrukurrot naapishana, najo aigerisho kake, naning oltoilo oing'uaa keper ejo, “timishira nena naatejo ndarat naapishana, niminger ake.”" 
Revelation10:5 Ore ilo malaika latoduaa eitashe te naiposha o te nkop natoyio, neilepakinye enkaina enye e tatene keper." 
Revelation10:6 Nenya ninye olmumai te ilo oishu ntarasi o ntarasi, laa ninye oitaa keper o pooki naatii atua, o enkop o pooki natii atua, o enaiposha oo pooki naatii atua nejo pee meitoki atii enkimutioto." 
Revelation10:7 Kake ore ti atua inkolong'i naaoshi ina tarumpeta, neosh kenya ilo malaika li oopishana neitabari enkisudoroto e Nkai anaa apa enatolikio ninye, isinkan lenyena lelo oibonok." 
Revelation10:8 Ore ilo toilo duoo latoning'o eing'uaa keper, naaitoki airorie, nejo, “Shomo tudumu ilo piyayati le mbuku obolo, otii enkaina e ilo malaika oitashe te naiposha o te nkop natoyio.”" 
Revelation10:9 Nalo enetii olmalaika najoki ninye maaishoo nanu ilo piyayati le mbuku. Naajoki ninye nanu, “Tudumu naa inosa. Kelo aduaru te nkoshoke kake kemelok anaa enaisho oo lotorok te nkutuk ino!”" 
Revelation10:10 Nadumu ilo piyayati le mbuku te nkaina e ilo Malaika. Naa kemelok anaa enaisho te nkutuk ai, kake ore ake pee aaidip ainosa neitaduar enkoshoke ai." 
Revelation10:11 Naajokini, “Meeta nchere pee mintoki aibonisho too ltung'ana kumok, o too lng'ejepa o laiguanak.”" 
Revelation11:1 Naaitokini aaisho entemet naikununo anaa eng'udi, naajokini nanu, “Inyo tetema enkaji e Nkai o ewueji o lperere lo lasar o lelo ooserem teine." 
Revelation11:2 Kake mitem ake olgoriet otii boo e nkaji e Nkai. Tapala ilo amu eishooki iloreren, naa keituny ninche ina ang sinyati too lapaitin artam o aare." 
Revelation11:3 Naa kaisho ilchakenini laainei oaare engolon naibonishore nkolong'i enkalifu nabo o iip are o ntomoni ile, eishopito ilkuniyiani.”" 
Revelation11:4 Kulo ninche lelo oirienito aare, o lelo kilang'ilang'eta aare ooitashe te dukuya Olaitoriani le nkop." 
Revelation11:5 Naa te neyieu oltung'ani neinyal ninche, nepuku enkima too nkutukie enye, nemut ilmang'ati lenye. Te neyieu oltung'ani near ninche neari metua aaiko neijia." 
Revelation11:6 Keeta ninche engolon naikenie oloing'ang'e pee meshau enchan te nena olong'i e naibon enye. Neeta ninche engolon naitoreyie inkariak o enaibelekenyie metaa osarge. Near enkop to lmeitai ake pooki oba anaa enayieu ninche. 
Revelation11:7 Ore ake pee eidip ninche shakenisho enye, ore ina ng'ues nailepua teina gumoto nemeeta eneiting'ie nedumaki ninche enjore, nemir ninche, near ninche metuata." 
Revelation11:8 Neirrag impopoki enye te nkoitoi nalala eina anasa kitok, naji te nkiroroto e nkitumususet, Sodom o Misiri, naa teine apa etashoki Olaitoriani lenye." 
Revelation11:9 Ore too nkolong'i uni o lpisiai ore iltung'ana loo loshon, o lng'ejepa o loreren neshil nena popoki enye, nemit enukari aapik inkuraren." 
Revelation11:10 Ore lelo tung'ana omanya enkop, neshipakino ninche, neitayu isiruai neishoro inkishoorot, amu ore kulo oibonok le Nkai pokira aare, neisomita oleng lelo ootii enkop." 
Revelation11:11 Kake ore te siadi nena olong'i uni o lpisiai, nejing enkiyang'et e nkishui naing'uaa Enkai, atua ninche neitashe ninche too nkejek enye, neiput enkuretisho sapuk lelo ootoduaa ninche." 
Revelation11:12 Ore ina kata nening lelo oibonok le Nkai aare oltoilo sapuk oing'uaa keper ejoki ninche. “Elepu wootu ene!” Ore eing'orita ilmang'ati lenye neilep ninche aapuo keper te nkatampoi. 
Revelation11:13 Ore teina saa nejing olokirikiri kitok enkop, neurori ematua e tomon e ina anasa. Neari iltung'ana inkalifuni naapishana, metuata teina kikirikirata. Neiputukuny lelo ootelekutua, neisho enkisisa Enkai e keper." 
Revelation11:14 Etulusoyie entaboi e are kake kelotu entaboi e uni asieku. 
Revelation11:15 Neitoki olmalaika li oopishana aosh esekekua enye, netii iltoiloishi sapuki te keper oojoito, “Etaa enkitoo e nkop enkitoo o Laitoriani lang o ene Kristo lenye, naa keitoreisho ninye intarasi o ntarasi.”" 
Revelation11:16 Ore lelo payiani tikitam oong'uan ootoni too lorikan lenye le nkitoo te dukuya Enkai nebatata too nkomomi enye aaserem Enkai. 
Revelation11:17 Nejo, “Kincho iyie enashe, Olaitoriani Enkai, olopeny enkidimata pooki, otii taata, netii apa amu iwa te ngolon ino sapuk, ninterua aitoreisho." 
Revelation11:18 Etagorote loreren, kake eewuo engoro ino, neewuo enkata naiguanareki ilootuata, nilaaki ole koisiaayio isinkan linono, iloibonok sinyat o lelo ooure enkarna ino, ilooti o lkituaak, o enkata namuti lelo amutak le nkop.”" 
Revelation11:19 Neitokini aabol enkaji e Nkai te keper nedoli osanduku lo sotua lenye ti atua enkaji enye. Netii enkimerlel oo nkiwuang'at o ltoiloishi oobuak, o ndarat e nkikurrukur o lokirikiri le nkop, o enchan sapuk oo soito oleng." 
Revelation12:1 Neliooyu entoki sapuk enking'asia te shumata, enkitok naishopokoki enkolong netii olapa abori inkejek enyena. Ore te ndukuya enye, neeta enkopiyia e nkitoo oo lakir tomon o aare." 
Revelation12:2 Naa entuaa ninye, neishir te mion e saisai o te mion e ishoi." 
Revelation12:3 Neitoki aliooyu enkae toki sapuk e nking'asia te shumata, nadol enkito tiamasi nanyokie, naata lukuny naapishana o mowuarak tomon, neishopokino nkishiliaa e nkitoria naapishana ilukuny enyena." 
Revelation12:4 Neor olkidong'oe lenye ematua e uni oo lakir le shumata, nenang'aki ninche enkop. Neitashe ina tiamasi te dukuya ina tuaa nasaisai, pee enya enkerai enye te neini." 
Revelation12:5 Neiu enkayioni naa ninye oyooki aitore iloreren pooki te ng'udi e sekenkei, kake etawuapayioki ina kerai enye aailepie enetii Enkai o enetii olorika lenye le nkitoo." 
Revelation12:6 Neipirri ina kitok ong'ata, ewueji neitobiraka Enkai, naa ine eitotiyieki aaitagol ninye too nkolong'i enkalifu nabo o iip are o ntomoni ile." 
Revelation12:7 Nepuku olarrabal te Keper earare Mikael o lmalaika lenyena ina tiamasi. Nearare sii ninye ina tiamasi o lmalaika lenyana. 
Revelation12:8 Kake etimiraki ina tiamasi o lmalaika lenyena neaku meeta ewueji netii ninche te Keper. 
Revelation12:9 Nenang'uni ina tiamasi kitok enkop, ilo asurai musana, laa ninye eji Oloirirua o Sheitani, ilo alejani le nkop pooki, nenang'uni ninye enkop, ore ilmalaika lenyena nenang'akini enkop te nebo ninye." 
Revelation12:10 Naning oltoilo sapuk te Keper ejoito, “Eewuo taata enjeunoto, o engolon, o enkitoria e Nkai ang, o enkidimata e Kristo lenye. Amu etanang'akaki enkop olaitang'oroni loo lalashera lang, laa ninye oitang'or ninche dama o kewarie te dukuya Enkai ang." 
Revelation12:11 Netimira ninche ninye te ilo sarge lo Lkuoo le Ker, o to rorei le shakenisho enye, amu eitu enyorru ninche enkishui enye o metabaiki keeya." 
Revelation12:12 Ting'idayu naa, iyie keper o intae lelo pooki ootii atua. Kake wooi, intae nakop o enaiposha, amu etadowuo Sheitani enitii te ngoro sapuk. Amu eyiolo ajo dorrop enkata enye.”" 
Revelation12:13 Ore ake pee edol ina tiamasi ajo etanang'akaki enkop, nemir ina kitok natoiwuo enkayioni." 
Revelation12:14 Kake eishooki ina kitok inaipuko are naaijo ino lkurragos sapuk loo lmurran, pee elotie ti ai ailany ilo asurai, nelo ong'ata, ine wueji neitotiyieki aaitagol, te nkata, o too nkatitin, o lpisiai le nkata." 
Revelation12:15 Nebuku ina tiamasi enkare naaijo olkeju eing'uaa enkutuk enye te siadi ina kitok ejo pee eoroo to loirrag le nkare. 
Revelation12:16 Kake etaretuo enkop ina kitok, neng'a enkop enkutuk neijoo ilo keju otonotua ina tiamasi te nkutuk enye." 
Revelation12:17 Negorokino taa ina tiamasi ina kitok nelo aitainye olarrabal eishoi natelekua e ina kitok, lelo pooki leton eibung'ita nkitanapat e Nkai, neishakenoki Yesu." 
Revelation12:18 Neitashe ina tiamasi to sinyai le naiposha. 
Revelation13:1 Nadol nanu eng'ues eilepu aing'uaa atua enaiposha naata imowuarak tomon o lukuny naapishana neishopokino nkishiliaa tomon e nkitoo nena mowuarak enyena. Netii enkarna e morore nena lukuny enyena. 
Revelation13:2 Ore ina ng'ues natoduaa neikununo anaa olowuaru keri, netiu inkejek enyena anaa ino lng'arurumi, netiu enkutuk enye anaa eno lng'atuny. Neisho ilo asurai ina ng'ues engolon enye o lorika lenye le nkitoo, o enkidimata sapuk." 
Revelation13:3 Ore nabo oo lukuny enyena, naa ijo keeta olbae le keeya. Ore ilo bae lenye le keeya neishiwuo, nesuj enkop pooki ina ng'ues eing'asia." 
Revelation13:4 Neserem iltung'ana ilo asurai, amu eishoo ninye enkidimata enye ina ng'ues, neserem ninche ina ng'ues ejo “Ae ng'ae otiu anaa ina ng'ues, naa ae ng'ae oidima airisha?”" 
Revelation13:5 Neishori ina ng'ues enkutuk nairorie imbaa naarupie kewan o roreii oomor Enkai, neishori meitoreisho too lapaitin artam o are." 
Revelation13:6 Nebol enkutuk enye emorisho, nemor Enkai, amor enkarna enye o emanyisho enye. Aa nchere lelo pooki oomanya keper." 
Revelation13:7 Neishori sii meitayunye olarrabal isinyat, nemir ninche. Neishori ninye enkitoria naitoreyie iloshon o ltung'ana, o lng'ejepa, o loreren." 
Revelation13:8 Ore lelo pooki ootii enkop neserem ninye, pooki ng'ae apa leitu eigeri enkarna enye apa eton eitu eitamanyuni enkop, ti atua embuku e mpuaan e ilo Kuoo le Ker apa otaraki." 
Revelation13:9 Te neetae oloata enkiok, nchoo ening." 
Revelation13:10 Ore ake pooki ng'ae oarari, nelo eyararoto; ore ake pooki ng'ae oarisho to lalem meeta nchere meari sii ninye to lalem. Ene taa etii enkipototo te nkaraki eng'iriata o enkirukoto oo sinyat." 
Revelation13:11 Naitoki adol ae ng'ues natudumunye te nkop neeta mowuarak are anaa olkuoo le ker, neiro ninye anaa ilo asurai." 
Revelation13:12 Neitoreishore ninye enkidimata pooki e idia ng'ues e dukuya, teine netii ninye, nearaki enkop o pooki oomanya enkop meteserema ina ng'ues e dukuya, apa naishiwuo olbae lenye le keeya." 
Revelation13:13 Neas ilmonek sapuki o metaa ninye keitadou enkima eing'uaa keper meeu enkop edolita iltung'ana. 
Revelation13:14 Ore too lmonek ooishooki metaasa teine netii ina ng'ues neitapong'oo lelo ootii enkop. Neitanap lelo oomanya enkop meitobira ninche enkitanyaanyukoto e ina ng'ues naata endung'oto o lalem neton ake eishu. 
Revelation13:15 Neishori ninye meishoo enkiyang'et ina kitanyaanyukoto e ina ng'ues, pee etum ninye ina kitanyaanyukoto ataa keiro. Nejo metaari metuata lelo pooki lemeserem ina kitanyaanyukoto e ina ng'ues." 
Revelation13:16 Neisho sii pooki ng'ae, looti o lkituaak, ilkarsisi o laisinak, irrindiki o leme rrindiki, metipiki olmishire enkaina e tatene aashu enkomom," 
Revelation13:17 pee meitoki hoo obo ainyiang'isho aashu emirisho, meteleku ake te neeta ilo mishire, aa taa enkarna e ina ng'ues, aashu esiana e ina arna enye." 
Revelation13:18 Keyieu taa ena eng'eno nagut, nchoo ilo oata ening'unoto eikenisho atum esiana e ina ng'ues. Amu esiana e tung'ani. Ore esiana enye naa iip ile o ntomoni ile o ile." 
Revelation14:1 Naitoki aing'orisho, nadol te nchumata o Ldoinyo le Sion eitashe Olkuoo le Ker. Netii te nebo ninye iltung'ana nkalifuni iip artam o oong'uan ooata enkarna enye o ene menye lenye eigero too lpurai loo nkomomi enye." 
Revelation14:2 Naning oltoilo eing'uaa keper laaijo enkikurrukur oo nkariak kumok, netiu sii anaa enkikurrukur sapuk. Ore ilo toilo latoning'o netiu anaa oltoilo loo laoshok loo nkinantani eoshito inkinantani enye." 
Revelation14:3 Nerany osinkolio ng'ejuk te dukuya olorika le nkitoo o te dukuya nena ng'uesi ong'uan naaishu, o te dukuya lelo payiani. Nemeetae hoo obo oidim atayiolo ilo sinkolio meteleku ake lelo nkalifuni iip artam o ong'uan ooidipaki aatokordu te nkop." 
Revelation14:4 Naa kulo leitu eidurukie ate too ng'oruo, amu meyiolo ninche inkituaak. Naa kulo ooirukurukore ilo Kuoo le Ker pooki wueji nelo. Etokorduaki kulo ti atua ltung'ana, pee eaku ilng'anayio le dukuya le Nkai o ilo Kuoo le Ker." 
Revelation14:5 Neitu etumieki nkutukie enye emonkoi, amu meeta eleyiata." 
Revelation14:6 Naitoki adol likae malaika eipirri te mpolos o loing'ang'e, neeta ilomon supati loo ntarasi olo aliki lelo oomanya enkop, pooki kop, o pooki osho o pooki ng'ejep o ltung'ana." 
Revelation14:7 Nejo to ltoilo sapuk, “Entureita Enkai ninchosho ninye enkisisa. Amu eewuo e nkiguana enye. Enteserem ilo oitobira keper o enkop, o enaiposha o nchorroi oo nkariak.”" 
Revelation14:8 Ore likae malaika, li aare, nesuju, ejo, “Eturori, eturori Babilon kitok, ina naitooko iloreren pooki enaisho e mpushuna e loloito enye.”" 
Revelation14:9 Nelotu likae malaika liokuni asuju ninche, ejoito to ltoilo sapuk, “Ore pooki ng'ae oserem ina ng'ues o enkitanyaanyukoto enye, netum olmishire to lpura le nkomom enye aashu te nkaina enye," 
Revelation14:10 neyooki sii aok e naisho e ngoro, e Nkai, natubukokoki enkikompe e ngoro eirrusha. Naa keitamei te nkima o te nkibiriti te dukuya lelo malaika sinyat o te dukuya ilo Kuoo le Ker?" 
Revelation14:11 Ore empuruo e nkisilisiloto enye neilep intarasi o ntarasi. Nemeeta enkiyeng'iyeng'ata dama o kewarie lelo aseremak le ina ng'ues o enkitanyaanyukoto enye, o pooki ng'ae ong'amu olmishire le nkarna enye.”" 
Revelation14:12 Ene taa etii enkipototo e ng'iriata e lelo sinyat, lelo ooibung inkitanapat e Nkai o enkirukoto e Yesu." 
Revelation14:13 Naning oltoilo oing'uaa keper ejo, “Ngero ena, Emayiana lelo ootuata laa ti atua Olaitoriani eye taata o kenya.” “Esipa emayiana,” ejo enkiyang'et, “Pee etum aayeng'iyengata too sinaitin lenye, amu kesuj ninche inkiaasin enye.”" 
Revelation14:14 Naitoki aing'orisho nadol enkatampoi naibor. Netonita teina atampoi obo onyaanyukie Enkerai e Tung'ani, neishopito te lukunya enye enkopiyia e nkitoo e saabu, neibung'ita olalem opi oololo te nkaina enye." 
Revelation14:15 Nepuku likae malaika eing'uaa atua enkaji e Nkai, eipotito to ltoilo sapuk ilo otonita te nkatampoi amu ejo, “Tudung'ishore ilo alem lino oololo ninkesisho amu enkata e nkikesare, eo abaya enkikesare e nkop.”" 
Revelation14:16 Neyuk ilo otonita te nkatampoi olalem lenye oololo neikesishoe te nkop. 
Revelation14:17 Neitoki apuku likae malaika teina aji e Nkai natii keper, neeta sii ninye olalem opi oololo." 
Revelation14:18 Neitoki likae malaika apuku eing'uaa olperere lo lasar, laa ninye oata engolon naitoreyie enkima. Neipot to ltoilo sapuk ilo oata olalem opi oololo nejoki, “Tudung'ishore olalem lino oololo tasotu nkimarrimarrat oo sabibu te nkop, amu eoto isabibu lenyena.”" 
Revelation14:19 Neaku eyuko olmalaika olalem lenye oololo te nkop nesotu isabibu le nkop. Nenang'aki ninche atua enkironyet e ngoro e Nkai. 
Revelation14:20 Neitunyi lelo sabibu teina kironyet ti auluo ina anasa, nerukunye osarge teina kironyet, o metabaiki mbartan inkeenta oo nkutukie, neba te nkadoro anaa inkilomitani iip uni." 
Revelation15:1 Naitoki adol entoki sapuk e nking'asia te shumata, kitok naa ene nking'asia, ilmalaika oopishana ooata ilmeita oopishana laa ninche oobayie, laa te ninche etimitunye engoro e Nkai." 
Revelation15:2 Naitoki adol entoki naikununo anaa enaiposha e kiook nashulare enkima. Ore lelo ootimira ina ng'ues o enkitanyaanyukoto enye o esiana e nkarna enye, neitashe te mbata e ina aiposha e kiook, neibung'ita nkinantani e Nkai too nkaik enye." 
Revelation15:3 Nerany osinkolio le Musa ilo sinka le Nkai osinkolio lo Lkuoo le ker, aajo, “Eikituaak naa ine nking'asia nkiaasin inono, iyie Olaitoriani Enkai Magilani, keitoriori nesipa inkoitoi inono, Olaiguanani loo lporori." 
Revelation15:4 Ae ng'ae lemeureisho neisis enkarna ino, Olaitoriani. Amu iyie ake openy osinyati. Eikipuonu nkuapi pooki aserem iyie, amu ore inkiguanat inono neidipaki aaibalunye.”" 
Revelation15:5 Ore te siadi ena naing'orisho, ore enkaji e Nkai o lng'obor le shakenisho ti atua keper neboli." 
Revelation15:6 Neipang'u tiatua ina aji e Nkai lelo malaika oopishana ooata ilmeita oopishana, eishopito nkilani nemeiduruk naawang oleng neenita too lgooitie lenye nkeenta e saabu." 
Revelation15:7 Ore nabo e nena ng'uesi e ong'uan naaishu, neisho lelo malaika oopishana mbakulini naapishana e saabu naabore engoro e Nkai, naishu ntarasi o ntarasi." 
Revelation15:8 Neigany enkaji e Nkai empuruo eing'uaa enkitoo e Nkai neing'uaa engolon enye. Nemeetae hoo obo oidima atijing'a atua ina aji e Nkai o metaba anaa nelusoo lelo meita oopishana le lelo malaika oopishana. 
Revelation16:1 Naitoki aning oltoilo sapuk oing'uaa enkaji e Nkai ejoki lelo malaika oopishana, “Enchom entubukoki enkop lelo bakulini oopishana le ngoro e Nkai.”" 
Revelation16:2 Nelo olmalaika le dukuya nebukoki olbakuli lenye oriong enkop. Nejing inkirondoni torrok naang'u lelo tung'ana ooata olmishire le ina ng'ues neserem enkitanyaanyukoto enye. 
Revelation16:3 Nebukoki olmalaika li aare olbakuli lenye enaiposha, netiu enkare anaa osarge lo ltung'ani otua. Neye pooki toki naishu natii atua enaiposha." 
Revelation16:4 Nebukoki olmalaika liokuni olbakuli lenye atua ilkejek o nchorroi e nkare, neaku ninche osarge." 
Revelation16:5 Naning ilo malaika loo nkariak ejo, “Ira iyie asipani te kuna kiguanat inono, iyie olotii taata nitii apake, losinyati obo, amu ena enkiguana ino." 
Revelation16:6 Amu eibukoitie iltung'ana osarge loo sinyat o loo loibonok le Nkai, ninchoo iyie ninche osarge metooko. Ina nairirikino ninche.”" 
Revelation16:7 Naning olperere lo lasar pee eishir ajo, “Ee Olaitoriani Enkai, Olmagilani, esipa neitoriori nkiguanat inono.”" 
Revelation16:8 Nebukoki olmalaika liong'uan olbakuli lenye enkolong, neishori ninye metapejo iltung'ana te nkima." 
Revelation16:9 Nepeji iltung'ana te nkirowuaj napi, nedek ninche enkarna e Nkai naa ninye naata engolon te kulo meita. Neitu eirridu ninche anaa eisho ninye enkitoo." 
Revelation16:10 Nebukoki olmalaika le miet olbakuli lenye ilo orika le nkitoo le ina ng'ues, nemisimisu enkitoria enye. Neony iltung'ana ilng'ejepa lenye te mion." 
Revelation16:11 Nedek Enkai e keper te nkaraki emion o te nkaraki inkirondoni, neitu eirridu inkiaasin enye." 
Revelation16:12 Nebukoki olmalaika le ile olbakuli lenye olkeju kitok le Freti, netoyu enkare e ilo keju, pee eitobiri enkoitoi naimu ilaiguanak ooing'uaa enkilepunoto e nkolong." 
Revelation16:13 Nadol nanu, epuku te nkutuk e ina tiamasi, o te nkutuk e ina ng'ues, o te nkutuk e ilo le lejare, inkiyang'eta uni torrok naaijo ntuaan e nkare." 
Revelation16:14 Amu inkiyang'eta oo loiriruani ninche naas inkitoduaat, nepuaya enetii ilaiguanak le nkop pooki pee eiturrurru ninche te njore ena olong kitok e Nkai Magilani." 
Revelation16:15 “Ng'ura, kalotu nanu anaa olapurroni. Emayiana ilo oshololo, ogolie inkilani enyena pee melo ake meishopo nedoli meishopo.”" 
Revelation16:16 Neiturrur ninche te wueji neji te nkutuk oo Lbrania Har-Magedon. 
Revelation16:17 Nebukoki olmalaika liopishana olbakuli lenye atua enkijape. Nepuku oltoilo sapuk tiatua enkaji e Nkai, eing'uaa ilo orika le nkitoo nejo, “Etaasaki!”" 
Revelation16:18 Nepuku nkiwuang'at e enkimerlel, o ltoiloishi sapuki, o ndarat o enkikurrukur, o enkikirikirata e nkop neitu aekata etumi anaa nejing tung'ani oriong enkop. Kitok ilo okirikiri le nkop oleng." 
Revelation16:19 Neoro ina anasa kitok aaku matuan uni, neuror nkanas kituaak oo loreren. Nedamu Enkai Babilon kitok, pee eitook ninye metimita enkikompe e mpijan e ngoro enye." 
Revelation16:20 Neilanyisho aaisik pooki lemankale, neitu eitokini aadol ildoinyo." 
Revelation16:21 Neshau enchan isoito sapukin oleng, laa nkiloi onom enkiroishi o soit obo, nedoiki iltung'ana eing'uaa keper, o metaba anaa nedek iltung'ana Enkai te nkaraki ina shan oo soito, ilo meitai oitureisho naleng." 
Revelation17:1 Neitoki olmalaika obo le lelo oopishana ooata ilbakulini oopishana alotu enatii naajoki, “Wou, maaitoduaa nanu iyie enkiguana nadung'okini ena mulayoi yioloti, natonita too nkariak kumok." 
Revelation17:2 Naa te ninye etololoitore ilaiguanak le nkop naa te naisho e loloito enye etemerate lelo ootii enkop.” 
Revelation17:3 Naaya ilo malaika nanu te nkiyang'et ong'ata nadol enkitok natonita te nkoriong e ng'ues nanyokie nabore nkarn e morore neeta ilukuny naapishana o mowuarak tomon. 
Revelation17:4 Netukusoki ina kitok too nkilani morijo o naanyokie. Neikodi te saabu o too ntoto sidain o museitani naagol o too lului. Neibung'ita te nkaina enye enkikompe e saabu nabore olminong o loirerioni le loloito enye. 
Revelation17:5 Ore to lpura le nkomom enye neigero enkarna e nkisudoroto: “Babilon kitok, ng'oto mulayoni o ilo minong le nkop.”" 
Revelation17:6 Nadol ina kitok etemere to sarge loo sinyat le Nkai o to sarge loo lchakenini le Yesu. Ore pee adol nanu ninye naing'asia oleng. 
Revelation17:7 Kake aatiaaka olmalaika, “Kainyoo pee ing'asia? Kaaliki taata enkisudoroto e na kitok, o ene ina ng'ues naata ilukuny naapishana o mowuarak tomon naanapita ninye" 
Revelation17:8 re ina ng'ues nitoduaa keishu apa, nemeekure eishu. Naa kepuku ailepu te ngumoto nemeeta enkiting'oto nelo atua enkidaaroto. Ore lelo oomanya enkop leitu esiri inkarn enye te mbuku e mpuaan ebaiki apa pee eitamanyuni enkop naa keing'asia te nedol ina ng'ues, amu etii apa, nemeetii taata, naa kelotu." 
Revelation17:9 Eyieu ena eng'eno nagut. Ore nena lukuny naapishana naa ildoinyo oopishana oogira ina kitok atonie. 
Revelation17:10 Naa ilaiguanak oopishana sii. Netabatatate imiet lenye, netii obo, neton eitu elotu olikae, naa ore te nelotu meeta nchere pee me nkiti kata ake eton." 
Revelation17:11 Ore ina ng'ues apa natii nemetii taata, naa ene isiet kake ene nena naapishana sii, naa kelotu enkidaaroto." 
Revelation17:12 “Ore nena mowuarak tomon nitoduaa naa ilaiguanak tomon leton eitu eng'amu engolon naitoreishore. Kake keng'amu engolon anaa ilaiguanak te saa nabo te nebo ina ng'ues. 
Revelation17:13 Ile ndamunoto nabo kulo neishoo ina ng'ues engolon o enkidimata enye. 
Revelation17:14 Neitayunyie olarrabal ilo kuoo le ker, nemir Olkuoo le Ker ninche, amu ninye Olaitoriani loo laitoriak naa Olaiguanani loo laiguanak, ore lelo ooboitare ninye naa keipoto negeluno neisiligayu.”" 
Revelation17:15 Naajoki ninye ilo malaika, “Ore nena ariak nitoduaa teine netonie emulayoi naa iltung'ana o lororani o nkuapi o lng'ejepa." 
Revelation17:16 Ore nena mowuarak tomon nitoduaa, ore ninche o ina ng'ues keibayu ina mulayoi, nekiny ninye aitalioo meishopo, nenya nkiri o sesen lenye nepejoo ninye te nkima." 
Revelation17:17 Amu Enkai natipika atua oltau lenye meitabai inaayieu ninye, neaku ile ndamunoto nabo, neishooyo engolon enye, e nkitoria aaisho ina ng'ues, o metaba anaa neitabari ororei le Nkai." 
Revelation17:18 Ore ina kitok nitoduaa naa ina anasa kitok naata enkitoria alang ilaiguanak le nkop.” 
Revelation18:1 Ore te siadi ena nadol likae malaika edou aing'uaa keper neeta enkidimata sapuk, neitawang'i enkop teina sikar enye." 
Revelation18:2 Nebuaku to ltoilo le ngolon ejo, “Eturori, eturori Babilon kitok! Etaa emanyisho oo loiriruani, orrumat le pooki kiyang'et torrono, orrumat le pooki motonyi torrono naibaisho." 
Revelation18:3 Amu etooko iloreren pooki enaisho oo sabibu oo ng'uarrat enyena torrok. Ore laiguanak le nkop neloloito te ninye, netaa karsisi ilbiasharani le nkop te nkiborra enye oo nkonyek.”" 
Revelation18:4 Naitoki aning likae toilo oing'uaa keper ejo, “Entupuku entung'uai ninye lo tung'ana laainei, pee mimbung'arere ake ninye ti atua ing'ok enyena, pee ming'arierie ake ilmeita lenyena." 
Revelation18:5 Amu eturupate ng'ok enyena oleng aabaya keper. Netadamua Enkai intorrok enyena. 
Revelation18:6 Entalaaki ninye anaa enaitalakishe sii ninye makewan. Entalaaki katitin are te risioroto oo nkiaasin enyena. Eng'oling'olaki ninye mboreitin are teina kikompe naing'ola sii ninye. 
Revelation18:7 Ore anaa ina naturupa ninye kewan neiborrie onyek nchoo sii ninye olosilisili o lkiyioi ntorisioki ena. Amu ejo to ltau lenye eton ara enkaiguanani, mara nanu enkoliai, ore olkiyioi madol aekata." 
Revelation18:8 Metaa kepuonu ilmeita lenyena te nkolong nabo, inkeyaitin o lkiyioi o lameyu. Naa kepejori ninye te nkima. Amu aimagilani Olaitoriani Enkai nadung'oki ninye enkiguana.”" 
Revelation18:9 Ore ilaiguanak le nkop ootololoitore ninye neiborrie onyek te nebo ninye naa keyietu neishir neishiraki ina anasa te nedol empuruo enye e mpejoroto. 
Revelation18:10 Neitashe ninche te nelakua te nkuretisho o enkitamioto enye ejo, “Wooi ina anasa kitok, naa magilani Babilon! Te saa nabo eewuo endung'okinoto ino e nkiguana.”" 
Revelation18:11 Ore ilbiasharani le nkop neishir aaishiraki ninye amu meekure eetae hoo obo oitoki ainyiang'u imasaa enyena. 
Revelation18:12 Imasaa e saabu o enkosholai, o soito oogol enkinyang'a o lului, o lkarash oopuyiapui o lmorijo o loonyokie o mpukunot pooki oo lkeek oorropil o ntokitin pooki naaguetuni too lala loo lkanchaoni, o ntokitin pooki oo nkeek naagol enkinyiang'a, o suyai, o esekenkei o ltoto ooibor;" 
Revelation18:13 o lmadalasini o ltankausi o enkorropil o emanoo narropil o lbani, o enaisho oo sabibu o eilata enkurma napuyiapui, o enkano o nkishu o nkerrai o mbartan o ngarrin oo mbartan o rrindiki, aa taa iltauja loo ltung'ana." 
Revelation18:14 “Ore ilo ng'anayioi oshi otang'uarra oltau lino nikitung'uayie iyie, ore intokitin inono pooki e nkuso o esikar kitung'uaitie ninche, nemeitokini aekata aatum.”" 
Revelation18:15 Ore ilamirak le nena masaa ootudupore enkarsisisho naing'uaa ina anasa neitashe te nelakua te nkuretisho e mion enye, neishir neyietu abuaku ajo," 
Revelation18:16 “Wooi, wooi ena kito anasa naishopo apa too nkilani naapuyiapui o morijo o naanyokie, neikodi, te saabu o too soito oogol enkinyiang'a o too lului." 
Revelation18:17 Te saa nabo eidaikieki ena arsisisho pooki.” Ore ilkituaak pooki loo melin, o ltung'ana oopuo too naaiposha, ilaisiaayiak loo melin o pooki laa ore enkinyiang'a enye naa enaiposha etii neitashe te nelakua." 
Revelation18:18 Nebuaku aaishir ina kata pee edol empuruo e mpejoroto eina anasa nejo, kaa anasa nanyaanyukie enkanasa kitok?" 
Revelation18:19 Neisuaaki enterit ilukuny enye, eishiraki ninye. Neyietu nebuaku aaishir nejo, “Wooi, wooi, te nkaraki ena anasa kitok natudupore kulo pooki ooata melin, te naiposha teina arsisisho enye. Te saa nabo eidaikieki." 
Revelation18:20 Ting'idakinoyu iyie ninye na keper o intae isinyat, o lkipaareta, o loibonok le Nkai, amu etudung'oko Enkai ninye enkiguana te nkaraki intae.”" 
Revelation18:21 Nedumu olmalaika ogol osoit kitok laaijo oloiwutuutishoreki nenang'aki atua enaiposha nejo, “Neijia eikunakini Babilon kitok ina ang kitok esuluni enkop te ngolon, nemeitokini aekata aatum;" 
Revelation18:22 ore iltoiloishi loo loowosh nkinantani o laranyak, o lakutak loo ndulen, o sekekuani, nemeitokini aekata aaning ti atua iyie. Nemeitokini aekata aatum ti atua iyie oltung'ani le nkiaas e nkarriyiano hoo nabo. Ore Oltoilo lo soit ooiwutuutishoreki nemeitokini aekata aaning ti atua iyie;" 
Revelation18:23 ore ewang'an o ltaa nemeitoki aekata awang'u ti atua iyie; ore oltoilo lo loyamisho o enayami nemeitokini aekata aaning ti atua iyie amu ore lbiasharani linono naa ninche apa iltung'ana kituaak te nkop, netelejaki nkuapi pooki teina sakutore ino." 
Revelation18:24 Naa ti atua ninye enotoki osarge loo loibonok le Nkai o loo sinyat, o lelo pooki ootaraki te nkop.”" 
Revelation19:1 Ore te siadi ena naning entoki naaijo oltoilo kitok lo lorora kitok te keper ebuaku aajo, “Haleluya, ene Nkai ang enjeunoto o enkisisa o engolon." 
Revelation19:2 Amu ore nkiguanat enyena nesipa neitoriori; etudung'oko ninye enkiguana ina mulayoi yioloti apa naitapong'oyie enkop te loloito enye, neitalakua te ninye osarge loo sinkan lenyena.”" 
Revelation19:3 Neitoki ake ninche aaigil aabuaku aajo, “Haleluya eijukujuk empuruo enye ailep alo shumata ntarasi o ntarasi.”" 
Revelation19:4 Ore lelo payiani tikitam oong'uan o nena ng'uesi naaishu nebatata neserem Enkai etonita te ilo orika le nkitoo, ejoito, “Eesai Haleluya!”" 
Revelation19:5 Nepuku oltoilo oing'uaa olorika le nkitoo obuaku ajo “Esisa Enkai ang intae isinkan lenyena pooki, intae ilooure ninye, ilooti o lkituaak.”" 
Revelation19:6 Naitoki aning oltoilo laaijo olo lorora kitok oikununo anaa enkikurrukur oo nkariak kumok netiu sii anaa indarat oo nkikurrukurrot sapuki ebuaku aajo, “Haleluya! Amu Olaitoriani Enkai ang Magilani oitoreisho." 
Revelation19:7 Mating'idata nikiosh olkerempe, nikincho ninye enkitoo, amu etabawua enkiyama o Lkuoo le Ker, netukuso kewan ina nayami." 
Revelation19:8 Neishooki ninye meishopo ilkarash oopuyiapui ooibor newang,” nemetii olduruki. Amu ore lelo karash sidain naa iasat supati e lelo sinyat." 
Revelation19:9 Naajoki ilo malaika, “Ing'ero, ena; emayiana lelo ooitoomonoki to sirua le nkiyama o Lkuoo le Ker.” Naajoki ninye nanu, “Irorei oosipa le Nkai kulo.”" 
Revelation19:10 Nabatata too nkejek enyena aserem ninye, kake aatiaaka ninye nanu, “Mintoki aiko neijia! Amu kara ake osinka oasisho te nebo iyie o lalashera linono ooibung'ita shakenisho e Yesu. Teserema Enkai!” Amu ore shakenisho e Yesu naa ninye enkiyang'et e naibon." 
Revelation19:11 Naitoki adol keper etaboloki; nadol embarta naibor, ore ilo okedito ina naa keji, Oloisiligayu naa Asipani, naa too sipat eiguana neitayu olarrabal." 
Revelation19:12 Ore nkonyek enyena neikununo anaa olng'ejep le nkima neeta te lukunya enye nkaradan e nkitoria kumok, neeta enkarna nasirakino nemeyiolo likae tung'ani kake ninye ake oyiolo." 
Revelation19:13 Neishopito olkila oitadoikioki osarge neji enkarna naipotieki Ororei le Nkai. 
Revelation19:14 Nesujita ninye njorin e keper naaishopito nkilani sidain e kitani napuyiapui newang, nesujita ninye imbartan naaibor." 
Revelation19:15 Nepuku te nkutuk enye olalem opi laa ninye earie inkuapi, neitore ninche te ng'udi e sekenkei. Neituny ninye ewueji neironyieki enaisho e ngoro napi e Nkai Magilani." 
Revelation19:16 Ore to lkila lenye o te nkupes enye neeta enkarna naigerokino ajo, Olaiguanani loo laiguanak naa Olaitoriani loo laitoriak." 
Revelation19:17 Naitoki adol olmalaika eitashe tiatua enkolong. Nebuaku aipotisho to ltoilo sapuk aipot imotonyi pooki naapuoito te mpolos o loing'ang'e, nejoki, “Wootu enturrurrokinoto osirua kitok le Nkai," 
Revelation19:18 pee inyanya nkiri oo ilaiguanak o ilarikok loo njorin o nkiri oo ltung'ana magil, nkiri oo mbartan o noo lookedito ninche o nkiri oo ltung'ana pooki, loolakuno o rrindiki, ndung'ot pokira, ilooti o lkituaak.”" 
Revelation19:19 Nadol nanu ina ng'ues o lelo aiguanak le nkop te nebo o njorin enye eiturrurrote pee earare ilo okedito ina barta nearare enjore enye. 
Revelation19:20 Neibung'i ina ng'ues, te nebo ilo oiboni lenye le lejare, otaasa ilmonek te dukuya ninye naa ninche etelejie lelo ootang'amaitie olmishire le ina ng'ues o lelo ooteserema ina kitanyaanyukoto enye. Ore lelo pokira o are, nenang'akini eishu atua ilo balbal le nkima, oyupuyup te nkibiriti." 
Revelation19:21 Ore ilootelekutua neari to lalem le ilo okedito ina barta. Te ilo alem opuku ti tua enkutuk enye; ore imotonyi pooki nenya inkiri enye ometaraposhoto. 
Revelation20:1 Naitoki adol olmalaika odou aing'uaa keper, eibung'ita te nkaina enye olbolet le ina gumoto nemeeta eneiting'ie o lpisiai kitok." 
Revelation20:2 Neibung ninye ilo asurai, ilo asurai musana laa ninye Oloirirua naa Sheitani, neen ninye ilarin enkalifu nabo." 
Revelation20:3 Nenang'aki olmalaika ninye atua ina gumoto, neiken nemishiraa ninye teine pee meitoki ae kata alej iloreren, o metaba anaa neishunye lelo arin enkalifu nabo. Ore pee elusoo ina nemeeta nchere pee melakuni te nkiti rishata." 
Revelation20:4 Naitoki adol ilorikan le nkitoo, ore lelo oogira aatonie ninche naa ninche eishoro endung'okinoto e nkiguana. Naitoki sii adol iltauja le lelo ootudung'oyioki ilukuny enye te nkaraki shakenisho e Yesu o te nkaraki ororei le Nkai, naa lelo leitu eserem ina ng'ues aashu ina kitanyaanyukoto enye, neitu, eng'amu olmishire lenye too lpurai loo nkomomi enye aashu too nkaik enye. Nepiu ninche neitoreisho te nebo Kristo ilarin enkalifu nabo." 
Revelation20:5 Ore lelo kulikae ootuata neitu epiu o metaba anaa neishunye ilarin enkalifu nabo. Ena empiunoto e dukuya. 
Revelation20:6 Emayiana naa sinyati ilo ong'arieki empiunoto e dukuya. Ore te lelo, nemeeta keeya e are engolon. Kake keaku ninche ilapolosak le Nkai o le Kristo naa keitoreisho ninche te nebo ninye ilarin enkalifu nabo." 
Revelation20:7 Ore pee eishunye lelo arin enkalifu nabo, nelakuni Sheitani te jila enye." 
Revelation20:8 Naa kelotu alej inkuapi naatii ilubot pokira ong'uan e nkop, aa taa Gog o Magog, neiturrur ninche te nkaraki olarrabal, neba esiana enye anaa osinyai le naiposha." 
Revelation20:9 Neidondorra ninche aailepaki endapasho e nkop, neman ina ang oo ilng'oborri loo sinyat, o ina anasa kirotet kake etadowuo enkima eing'uaa keper neidaikie ninche." 
Revelation20:10 Ore oloirirua laa ninye apa oteleja ninche nenang'akini atua olbalbal le nkima o enkibiriti ine netii ina ng'ues o ilo oiboni le lejare, nepuoi aaitame ninche dama o kewarie intarasi o ntarasi." 
Revelation20:11 Naitoki adol olorika le nkitoo oibor kitok o ilo otonita. Neilanyisho enkop o keper aaing'uaa ine netii ninye nelaii ewueji neishaa ninche. 
Revelation20:12 Nadol nanu lelo apa ootuata, ilkituaak o looti eitashe te dukuya olorika le nkitoo, neboli mbukui. Neitokini sii aabol ae buku naa ninye embuku e mpuaan. Nedung'okini lelo ootuata enkiguana anaa enasira tiatua nena bukui, te nena apa naataasa ninche." 
Revelation20:13 Neitayu enaiposha ilootuata ootii atua ninye. Neitayu keeya o ene meneng'a ninche neiguanareki ninche too naataasa. 
Revelation20:14 Nenang'akini keeya o enemeneng'a atua ilo balbal le nkima. Ena ninye keeya e are, ilo balbal le nkima." 
Revelation20:15 Naa ore pooki ng'ae leitu etumi enkarna enye eigero tiatua ina buku e mpuaan, nenang'akini ninye atua olbalbal le nkima." 
Revelation21:1 Naitoki adol keper ng'ejuk o enkop ng'ejuk. Amu ore keper e dukuya o enkop e dukuya neidipa aatulusoi, meekure eetae enaiposha." 
Revelation21:2 Nadol ina anasa Sinyati, Yerusalem ng'ejuk edou te keper eing'uaa Enkai, eitobiraki anaa esiankiki naikodokini olpayian lenye." 
Revelation21:3 Naning oltoilo kitok oing'uaa olorika le nkitoo ejo, “Ng'ura Etii emanyisho e Nkai te nebo iltung'ana. Keton ninye te nebo ninche neaku iltung'ana lenyena. Ore Enkai kewan neaku ketii te nebo ninche;" 
Revelation21:4 naa kejut ninye pooki kiyioi too nkonyek enye, ore keeya nemeitokini aekata aata aashu eitokini aata olkiyioi, aashu enkishirata aashu emion aekata. Amu etulusoitie intokitin pooki e dukuya.”" 
Revelation21:5 Ore ilo otonita to lorika le nkitoo nejo, “Ekaitaa intokitin pooki ng'ejuko.” Nejo sii, “Ngero ena, amu ore kulo rorei naa keisiligayu nesipa.”" 
Revelation21:6 Naajoki ninye nanu. “Eidipe, Ara nanu Alfa o Omega, enkiterunoto o enkiting'oto. Ore oloata enkure naa kaisho nanu enkare metii enkinyiang'a eing'uaa enchorro e nkare e mpuaan." 
Revelation21:7 Ore ilo omirisho naa ketum ena jung'ore naa kaaku nanu Enkai enye neaku ninye enkerai ai. 
Revelation21:8 Kake ore ilkureti o lemeiruk o looikereek o larak o loololoito o lasakutok o looserem inkitanyaanyukot o lalejak pooki, ore ewueji enye naa keaku ilo balbal le nkima oyupuyup te nkima e nkibiriti. Naa ninye keeya e are.”" 
Revelation21:9 Neitoki alotu olmalaika obo le lelo oopishana ooata ilbakulini oopishana oobore ilmeita oopishana oobayie naairorie naajoki, “Wou, kaaitodol ina siankiki, ina kitok o Lkuoo le Ker.”" 
Revelation21:10 Naaya enkiyang'et o maaitabaiki oldoinyo kitok oodo, naaitodol ina anasa sinyati, Yerusalem, edou te shumata eing'uaa enetii Enkai te keper," 
Revelation21:11 eeta enkitoo e Nkai, naikununo enkitiil anaa eno soit lemetumoyu aashu osoit oji yasper, owang anaa oltotoi." 
Revelation21:12 Neeta esuntai kitok naado, neeta inchomito tomon o aare, netii ilmalaika tomon o aare, nena shomito, nesira inkarn e lelo oshon tomon o aare loo layiok loo Siraeli te nena shomito." 
Revelation21:13 Netii enkalo e nkilepunoto e nkolong inchomito uni, netii kopikop inchomito uni, netii moikuape uni, netii endoyioroto e nkolong inchomito uni." 
Revelation21:14 Neeta ina suntai e ina anasa ilkitamanyunot tomon o aare, nesirakino ninche inkarn tomon o aare o lkipaareta lo Lkuoo le Ker." 
Revelation21:15 Ore ilo laairorie nanu neeta ninye entemet e ng'udi e saabu natemie ina anasa, o nchomito enyena o sunta." 
Revelation21:16 Ore ina anasa nerisio nkaloli pokira ong'uan, erisio enkadoro enye o endapasho enye, netem ninye ina ang teina ng'udi, neaku inkilomitani nkalifuni are o iip ong'uan. Erisio enkadoro o endapasho o enkadoro nailep." 
Revelation21:17 Netem sii esuntai enye naa ntemeta ntomoni ile te ntemata o ltung'ani aa taa enoo lmalaika. 
Revelation21:18 Ore ina suntai naa osoit oji yasper eshetare. Ore ina anasa naa ene saabu nasila, newang anaa kiook." 
Revelation21:19 Ore ilkitamanyunot le suntai e ina anasa neikodoki te pooki soit oata tipat; ore ole dukuya naa yasper, ore o liaare naa soito pusi ooji safi, ore o liokuni naa soito ooji agate, ore o lioong'uan naa soito oonyori ooji emerald," 
Revelation21:20 ore ole mmiet naa osoit oji oniks ore ole ile naa osoit oji karnelian, ore ole oopishana naa osoit oji krisolite, ore ole isiet naa osoit oji beril, ore o liooudo naa osoit oji topas, ore ole tomon naa osoit oji krisopras, ore ole tomon o obo naa osoit oji yasinas, ore ole tomon o aare naa osoit oji ametist." 
Revelation21:21 Ore nena shomito tomon o aare naa ilului tomon o aare, ore ake enkishomi naa lulu nabo eitobirieki, ore enkoitoi e ina anasa naa saabu nasila newang anaa kiook." 
Revelation21:22 Neitu adol enkaji e Nkai teina anasa amu ore enkaji enye naa Olaitoriani Enkai Magilani, o Lkuoo le Ker." 
Revelation21:23 Ore ina anasa nemeetayie tipat enkolong aashu olapa oitawang ninye amu enkitoo e Nkai ewang'an enye naa ilo Kuoo le Ker Oltaa lenye. 
Revelation21:24 Naa ina wang'an enye epuoyie iloreren ore ilaiguanak neyau enkitoo enye atua ninye. 
Revelation21:25 Nemeikeni aekata inchomito enyena dama nemeetae enkewarie teine. 
Revelation21:26 Naa keyau ninche atua ina anasa enkitoo o enkanyit oo loreren. 
Revelation21:27 Kake mejing entoki hoo nabo naiduruk atua ninye aashu pooki ng'ae oas olminong aashu elejare, kake lelo ake ooigeroki inkarn enye tiatua embuku e mpuaan e ilo Kuoo le Ker." 
Revelation22:1 Naaitoki olmalaika aitodol nanu olkeju le nkare e mpuaan owang anaa oltotoi orukunye aing'uaa olorika le nkitoo le Nkai olo Lkuoo le Ker. 
Revelation22:2 Neruko aim empolos enkoitoi nalala e ina anasa. Ore sii too lkekuno pokira leilo keju netii ilo shani le mpuaan te nebo o mpukunot tomon o aare oo lng'anayio lenyena. Neiu ake to lapa lelo ng'anayio lenyena; ore imbenek e ilo shani naa ninche naaishiunye iloreren. 
Revelation22:3 Nemeitokini aekata aata hoo toki nadiaa, kake ilo orika le nkitoo le Nkai o lo Lkuoo le Ker, ninche kenya ootii atua ina anasa, naa keserem ninye isinkan lenyena;" 
Revelation22:4 naa Kedol ninche enkomom enye, ore inkarn enye netii ilpurai loo nkomomi enye." 
Revelation22:5 Nemeitokini ai kata aata enkewarie nemeetayie ninche tipat ewang'an o ltaa aashu ene nkolong, amu Olaitoriani Enkai oaku ewang'an, naa keitoreisho ninche intarasi ontarasi." 
Revelation22:6 Naajoki olmalaika nanu, “Keisiligayu nesipa kulo rorei. Naa Olaitoriani Enkai o nkiyang'eta oo loibonok le Nkai nairriwua olmalaika lenye meitoduaa isinkan lenyena nena nemeeta nchere pee eitu epuonu aasieku." 
Revelation22:7 Naa toning'o kalotu asieku.” Emayiana ilo oibung ororei le naibon e na buku. 
Revelation22:8 Nanu Yohana ilo otoning'o nadol kuna baa. Ore ake pee aning nadol ninche, nabatata too nkejek e ilo malaika laaitoduaa ninche aserem ninye." 
Revelation22:9 Kake aatiaaka ninye nanu, “Mintoki aiko neijia! Kara nanu osinka te nebo iyie o lalashera linono lelo oibonok le Nkai, o lelo ooibung irorei le na buku. Enkai teserema.”" 
Revelation22:10 Naajoki ninye nanu, “Minuk irorei le naibon ena buku, amu etinyikua enkata." 
Revelation22:11 Inchoo olarruoni eton aas enkarruoisho, nchoo oloiduruk eton eiduruk, nchoo osupat eton aas isupati. Neton osinyati aa sinyati.”" 
Revelation22:12 “Ng'ura, kalotu asieku naata olekoisiaayio lai te nebo nanu, pee alaaki pooki ng'ae anaa anataasa ninye." 
Revelation22:13 Kara nanu Alfa o Omega, ole dukuya o le siadi, enkiterunoto o enkiting'oto.”" 
Revelation22:14 Emayiana lelo ooisuj ilkilani lenye pee etum esipata nabaikinye ilo shani le mpuaan netum sii aaima inchomito e ina anasa. 
Revelation22:15 Auluo etii ildiein, o lasakutok, o loololoito, o looitayu iloikop, o looserem inkitanyaanyukot, o pooki tung'ani onyor elejare nelejisho." 
Revelation22:16 “Nanu Yesu laairriwaka iyie olmalaika lai meeu enitii, ayau ena shakenisho te nkaraki sirito, nanu entonai e ishoi e Daudi, olakira owang le Nkakenya.”" 
Revelation22:17 Ejo enkiyang'et o ina siankiki narikori. “Wou!” Nchoo ilo oning ejo, “Wou!” Nchoo ilo oata enkure, elotu, nchoo ilo oyieu eng'amu enkare e mpuaan metii enkinyiang'a." 
Revelation22:18 Aikok pooki ng'ae oning irorei le naibon ena buku: te neponaa ake oltung'ani, neponiki sii ninye Enkai lelo meita ootolimuoki tiatua ena buku." 
Revelation22:19 Ore pooki ng'ae oiwuang'ie tiatua ilo irorei le naibon ena buku, neiwuang'ie Enkai erubata enye tiatua ilo shani le mpuaan tiatua ina anasa sinyati, nalimuno imbaa enye tiatua ena buku." 
Revelation22:20 Ore ilo oishakenoki kuna baa, “Ejo kalotu asieku!” Eesai. Wou, Olaitoriani Yesu!"
